Name: FINCANTIERI
Description:
Fincantieri is one of the world’s largest shipbuilding groups and number one by diversification and innovation. And we bring future on board. We are the change we want to bring to the global Industry. We are leader in the realization and life cycle management of all high value-added sectors: cruise ship, naval and offshore vessels and a reference player in all high-tech shipbuilding industry’s sectors, ship repairs and conversions, systems and components production and after-sales services.

Headquartered in Trieste (Italy), our Group has built more than 7,000 vessels in over 230 years of maritime history. With almost 20,000 employees, of whom more than 7,800 in Italy, 90.000 job roles, 18 shipyards in 4 continents, today Fincantieri is the leading Western shipbuilder. We have among our clients the major cruise operators, the Italian and the U.S. Navy, in addition to several foreign navies, and we are partner of some of the main European defense companies within supranational programmes.

Name: Damen
Description:
Oceans, seas, lakes and rivers offer growing possibilities in the areas of trade, food, energy and recreation. To ensure global prosperity for next generations and keep the earth habitable with an ever-increasing population, it is essential to utilise and protect these possibilities as efficiently and responsibly as possible.

Damen provides unprecedented maritime solutions for this, through design, shipbuilding, ship repair and related services. We offer versatile platforms that enable our customers to be successful and that raise the standard in terms of safety, reliability, efficiency and sustainability. We want to become the most sustainable shipbuilders in the world. 

In the previous century, we revolutionized shipbuilding. Thanks to standardisation, we were able to supply our customers with better ships, faster. More than 90 years and 6,500 ships later, the importance of standardisation is only increasing in the light of zero-emissions and digitalisation. 

We do not build our ships alone, but together with an extensive network from the international maritime cluster. We firmly believe in the power of sharing. It means that we also use our craftsmanship to build platforms on production facilities that are not ours. In this way, through knowledge transfer, we not only contribute to better, safer and more eco-friendly ships, but also to sustainable local development and prosperity.

We are a family owned business and stand for fellowship, craftsmanship, entrepreneurship and stewardship. Our playing field is the world. Our horizon is the long term. We firmly believe in our team, but also in the strength of the individual. Each colleague is an entrepreneur, focused on ensuring truly satisfied clients and making our contribution to a better world. In every aspect of our business the next generation is our starting point.

Name: Seatrium
Description:
A Premier Global Player with Deep Engineering Expertise in the offshore, marine and energy industries 

Engineering our Future Together.

Name: Ferretti Group
Description:
Ferretti Group is a world leader in the design, construction and sale of luxury yachts and pleasure vessels. The Group has a portfolio of prestigious, exclusive brands, such as Ferretti Yachts, Riva, Pershing, Itama, CRN, Custom Line and Wally.

Helmed by CEO Alberto Galassi, Ferretti Group owns and operates seven shipyards across Italy, combining efficient industrial production with quintessential Italian craftsmanship.    We serve clients in more than 70 countries worldwide through our direct presence in Europe, Asia and the USA and a 55-strong network of meticulously selected dealers. Ferretti Group motor and sail yachts are the finest expression of Italian-made elegance and creative genius. They have long stood out for their exceptional quality and exclusive design, their futuristic technology and uncompromising safety, their timeless allure and supreme performance on the water. #LeadingTheFuture

Name: Grupo Bravante
Description:
O Grupo Bravante é 100% brasileiro com mais de 60 anos provendo serviços para a indústria de óleo e gás, além de atuar nas áreas de apoio marítimo, apoio portuário, construção e reparo naval e proteção ambiental.

Bravante is a 100% Brazilian group with over 50 years providing services for the oil and gas industry and operating in the areas of marine support, port support, shipbuilding and ship repair and environmental protection.
Location: Rio de Janeiro , Rio de Janeiro

Name: Navantia, S.A., S.M.E
Description:
Empresa dedicada a la construcción naval civil y militar, reparación de buques, fabricación de turbinas, motores, sistemas de armas, con mas de 300 años de experiencia.

Cuenta con instalaciones en los puntos clave de la geografía española, Ferrol, Cádiz y Cartagena. 

Equipo profesional con amplia experiencia en el mundo naval y marítimo, con Delegaciones en: Canberra, Adelaida, Sídney, Nueva Delhi, Estambul, Río de Janeiro, y Bergen.

Name: Azimut Yachts
Description:
Welcome aboard. We are happy to take you on a journey that will amaze you.
We are the leader in the design and production of luxury motor yachts. 

The history of Azimut yachts officially began in 1969, when the young university student Paolo Vitelli started a small sailing boat rental business by founding Azimut SRL. In a short time, the iconic AZ 43' Bali was born. The dream came true. The company has grown a lot since then, but the mission has remained the same: to define new stylistic and industrial standards to create amazing yachts. 
Thanks to an unmistakable design contaminated with the world of art and architecture, our boats can be recognized even from far away on the horizon. Always at the forefront in introducing innovations that change the world of yachting, our masterpieces are distributed through the world's most global dealer network. From Italian style, a love that lasts over time.

Name: Benetti Yachts
Description: The House of Yachting

Name: Royal IHC
Description:
Royal IHC is a leading supplier of maritime technology and expert craftsmanship. Driven by innovation, our dedicated experts provide a competitive edge to our worldwide customers in the dredging, offshore, mining and defence industries. However, Royal IHC is much more than vessels, equipment and services. 

We deliver reliable, integrated solutions that improve operational efficiency and create a platform for a more sustainable performance. As we navigate new waters, our aim remains unchanged: to discover the smartest and safest way forward for both our customers and our people. Together, we create the maritime future.

For career opportunities check www.royalihc.com/careers  or contact our Staffing department: +31 (0)88015 4444

Name: VARD
Description:
VARD is one of the major global designers and shipbuilders of specialized vessels. Headquartered in Norway and with approximately 8,000 employees, VARD operates six strategically located shipbuilding facilities, including three in Norway, two in Romania and one in Vietnam. Through its specialized subsidiaries, VARD develops power and automation systems, deck handling equipment, and vessel accommodation solutions, and provides design and engineering services to the global maritime industry.
 
VARD’s long shipbuilding traditions, cutting-edge innovation and technology coupled with its global operations and track record in constructing complex and highly customized vessels have earned it recognition from industry players and enabled it to build strong relationships with its customers. 
 
VARD was listed on the Main Board of the Singapore Exchange on 12 November 2010. Majority shareholder Fincantieri Oil & Gas S.p.A., a wholly owned subsidiary of FINCANTIERI S.p.A., owns 79.2% in the Group. Headquartered in Trieste, Italy, FINCANTIERI is one of the world’s largest shipbuilding groups and has, over its 200 years of maritime history, built more than 7,000 vessels.

Name: Estaleiro Jurong Aracruz
Description:
O Estaleiro Seatrium Aracruz chega ao Espírito Santo para realizar uma modalidade de negócios inédita do Estado. Com o avanço da exploração do petróleo na camada pré-sal, as expectativas de investimentos em infraestrutura naval tornam necessária a criação de um estaleiro apropriado para suprir as demandas dessa indústria, que exige tecnologia de ponta e produtos de qualidade para a realização de projetos ousados.

A estrutura oferecida pelo Estaleiro Seatrium Aracruz está preparada para atender não só as demandas da Petrobras, mas as exigências do mercado mundial, na fabricação de embarcações e jaquetas (estruturas básicas das plataformas de petróleo), gerando negócios para fornecedores locais, emprego e renda para trabalhadores locais e divisas para o Espírito Santo.

Name: Estaleiro Jurong Aracruz
Description:
O Estaleiro Seatrium Aracruz chega ao Espírito Santo para realizar uma modalidade de negócios inédita do Estado. Com o avanço da exploração do petróleo na camada pré-sal, as expectativas de investimentos em infraestrutura naval tornam necessária a criação de um estaleiro apropriado para suprir as demandas dessa indústria, que exige tecnologia de ponta e produtos de qualidade para a realização de projetos ousados.

Name: HD Hyundai Heavy Industries
Description: HD Hyundai Heavy Industries (HHI), founded by the late Chung Ju-yung on March 23, 1972 wrote the first chapter of its shipbuilding history in June, 1974 by completing construction of the world's largest shipyard and two 260,000-DWT VLCCs all at the same time. A decade after its first delivery, the Hyundai Shipyard topped 10 million deadweight tons in aggregate ship production, and has maintained the leading position in the world shipbuilding market ever since. Hyundai Shipyard's drive has mirrored the growth of modern Korean heavy industry, and our success has allowed us to expand into other heavy industry areas, ultimately leading to the formation of Hyundai Heavy Industries, an integrated heavy industry company.

Name: Fincantieri Marine Group
Description:
Fincantieri Marine Group is a leading US shipbuilder active in the naval and commercial sector. FMG employs more than 2,200 people across its three shipyards: 
• Fincantieri Marinette Marine will build the Navy's future guided-missle frigate or FFG(X) and has built the U.S. Navy’s Freedom variant Littoral Combat Ship. 
• Fincantieri Bay Shipbuilding is one of the main U.S, builders of merchant ships. Our product lines include LNG bunkering, windfarm vessels, ATB's, fishing vessels, passenger/car ferries, self-unloaders, bulk
carriers, OSV's and more. Leader in repair and conversions in the Great Lakes region. 
• Fincantieri ACE Marine, is a center of excellence for aluminum construction, with experience in building small and medium-sized boats and patrol vessels especially for the U.S, Coast Guard. FMG has experienced naval architecture and marine engineering staff, and a highly skilled workforce committed to safe operation. 

Fincantieri Marine Group is the U.S. division of Italian shipbuilding giant FINCANTIERI, one of the world's largest shipbuilders, and number one by diversification and presence in all high value-added market sectors, having built more than 7,000 vessels over 230 years. Headquartered in Trieste, Italy, the Group has approximately 20,000 employees, and operates through 20 shipyards on four continents. It is world leader in cruise ship construction and a reference player in other sectors, including naval vessels, offshore support vessels, mega-yachts, as well as ship repair and conversion. 

Fincantieri Marine Group is an Equal Opportunity Employer/Affirmative Action Employer and promotes a Drug Free Work Environment. Minorities, Women, Veterans and Disabled are encouraged to apply. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, or protected veteran status, and will not be discriminated against on the basis of disability.

Name: Chantiers de l'Atlantique
Description:
Installée sur la façade Atlantique, Chantiers de l’Atlantique est une entreprise de construction maritime (paquebots, sous-stations…) et de services aux flottes. 
Grâce aux expertises développées par son personnel et son réseau de co-réalisateurs, combinées à un outil industriel de premier plan, l’entreprise est un des leaders mondiaux pour la conception, la fabrication, le montage et la mise en service de navires hautement complexes et d’installations marines.

Le savoir-faire de Chantiers de l’Atlantique est mondialement reconnu. Grâce à un outil industriel à la pointe de la technologie en perfectionnement constant. Des techniques et process avancés sont mis en œuvre pour construire dans des délais maitrisés et dans un souci permanent de la qualité, des navires et installations marines innovants plus respectueux de l’environnement.

Name: Seaspan ULC
Description:
Seaspan is an association of Canadian companies involved in coastal marine transportation, shipdocking/ship escort, ship repair & refit, shipbuilding, ship design, commercial ferry services, and LNG bunkering on Canada's West Coast.

The scope of Seaspan's services, the quality of its employees and over a century of successful participation in coastal commerce, make the company a major partner in the economy of the Pacific Northwest.

Name: ICN - Itaguaí Construções Navais
Description:
Um Acordo Estratégico firmado entre Brasil e França no final do ano de 2008 originou o Programa de Desenvolvimento de Submarinos – PROSUB

O PROSUB é de coordenação da Marinha do Brasil e tem como principal objetivo capacitar o Brasil a produzir e operar submarinos convencionais e movidos a propulsão nuclear, visando o fortalecimento do sistema de defesa e o controle da área costeira, e do mar territorial do país. Este projeto abrange a construção de um Estaleiro, uma Base Naval, uma Unidade de Fabricação de Estruturas Metálicas (UFEM), quatro submarinos convencionais e um com propulsão nuclear.

Para a construção dos submarinos brasileiros, foi constituída uma nova empresa, a Itaguaí Construções Navais – ICN, uma parceria entre a francesa Direction des Constructions Navales et Services – DCNS (detentora da tecnologia) e a Construtora Norberto Odebrecht – CNO, que está sendo instalado no município de Itaguaí, na região metropolitana do Rio de Janeiro.

A ICN estabelece-se como uma empresa com forte foco em Recursos Humanos, investindo no desenvolvimento de pessoas, valorizando a diversidade cultural e com responsabilidade socioambiental.

Name: Feadship
Description: Based in the Netherlands and with roots dating back to 1849, Feadship is recognised as the world leader in pure custom superyachts. Each Feadship is defined by its superb craftsmanship and sets the standard in design, engineering, and construction. These bespoke motoryachts are created with owners who invest in a wonderful building experience and enjoy long-term rewards in both pleasure and resale value. Beyond new builds, Feadship supports owners throughout their yacht’s lifecycle, offering dedicated resale services and expert refits tailored specifically for Feadships. This commitment ensures every Feadship maintains its exceptional quality, performance, and value for generations.

Name: COTECMAR
Description:
Somos una organización innovadora que trabaja dentro del campo de investigación científica y tecnológica, apoyando el desarrollo de la industria marítima colombiana.

Nuestra experiencia considera desde el diseño avanzado y construcción de plataformas navales personalizadas a las necesidades de cada cliente; hasta la reparación y mantenimiento de embarcaciones con los más altos estándares de calidad, tecnicismo y capacidad de respuesta en tiempos oportunos de atención.

Name: Damen Yachting
Description: Damen Yachting is the master yacht builder behind more than 100 Amels superyachts, Xplorer expedition yachts, Yacht Support vessels and major yacht refits.

Name: Damen Naval
Description:
Damen Naval is the only naval original equipment manufacturer (OEM) in the Netherlands and has delivered more than 420 vessels to customers around the world, offering a role as designer, engineer, builder, integrator, and service provider throughout our ships’ lifecycle.

This year, we celebrate 150 years of naval excellence. Damen Naval traces its origins back to 1875 when the Royal Schelde Shipyard (Koninklijke Maatschappij De Schelde, KMS) was founded in Vlissingen. Strategically located with direct access to the North Sea via the Schelde River, De Schelde established itself as a cornerstone of craftsmanship and naval shipbuilding in the Netherlands. In 2000, this heritage entered a new chapter as Damen Naval, the dedicated naval division of the Damen Shipyards Group.

For our launching customer, the Dutch Ministry of Defence, Damen Naval is working strategically to renew and replace the Royal Netherlands Navy fleet. This includes the Combat Support Ship and the new Anti-Submarine Warfare frigates. In addition, Damen Naval leads a range of naval projects for NATO/EU partners, including the ASW frigates for the Belgian Navy and the F126 frigates for the German Navy.

As we celebrate our heritage, we continue to chart the future, designing and delivering ships to meet the challenges of tomorrow.

Name: Estaleiro Mauá S/A
Description:
O MAIS EXPERIENTE ESTALEIRO DO BRASIL

O Mauá é o mais experiente e tradicional estaleiro em operação no Brasil com atividades desde 1845. Localizado em Niterói, Rio de Janeiro, com uma área de 180.000 m2, tem capacidade de processamento de 36.000 ton de aço por ano e é o maior estaleiro na Baía de Guanabara. Sua localização antes da Ponte Rio-Niterói, facilita a atracação de embarcações e plataformas com restrições de altura e manobra. O Estaleiro oferece ao mercado um pacote completo de serviços incluindo construção naval, construção e integração de módulos offshore, docagem, reparo naval & offshore além de serviços ambientais e de terminal portuário. Isso faz com que hoje, o Mauá seja considerado um dos maiores centros de construção, integração e reparo para a indústria de óleo e gás.

Name: Sembcorp Marine Ltd
Description:
Delivering Sustainable Synergies for Global Possibilities

Sembcorp Marine is an integrated brand offering one-stop engineering solutions for the offshore, marine and energy industries. We focus on four key capabilities: Rigs & Floaters, Repairs & Upgrades, Offshore Platforms and Specialised Shipbuilding.

As a global solutions provider committed to Sustainability, we deploy the most suitable assets and competencies from across our worldwide operations to support projects of any scale and in any location. With this flexibility, we help our customers realise exciting possibilities in a responsible manner, amid an increasingly complex operating environment.

Sembcorp Marine operates shipyards and facilities in Singapore, Indonesia, the United Kingdom, Norway, USA and Brazil.

Sembcorp Marine. Integrated Synergies, Global Possibilities.

Name: Oceanco
Description:
OCEANCO 
Oceanco has specialized in building large custom yachts up to 160m in length since 1987. Offering a highly personalized service to clients, Oceanco applies innovative design and technology to create one-of-a-kind yachts that respect the vision of both the Owner and the designer. 


CUSTOM REDEFINED  
At Oceanco, we only build custom yachts. But that doesn’t mean we take a standard approach. By redefining custom with our distinctive range of offerings, we put an owner’s experience and needs first. 


OUR FLEET 
Every Oceanco yacht is unique, but they all share the hallmark of our DNA: distinguished achievement realized through the power of partnership and a drive to go further and do better. 


A CULTURE OF EVOLUTION 
Our drive to evolve pushes us to raise the bar. In our DNA as a company, we feel an instinct to progress, to evolve. It can be traced back to Oceanco’s earliest days and is still reflected in our endeavors today. To support. To collaborate. To grow.


FACILITIES 
To build next-generation yachts, we need state-of-the-art facilities in line with our progressive approach to innovation and sustainability. The Zwijndrecht construction and refit facilities allow for the maintenance, refit and lifetime extension activities of the Oceanco fleet as well as providing the ability to do outside refit work, while the Alblasserdam outfitting facilities boast ecological enhancements as well as updated state-of the-art technologies. We have the capacity to work on multiple yachts of up to 160m, whilst we are creating a yachting hub and brain park at our construction and refit site, which is set to become a key platform for efficiency and innovation. 

Oceanco has created some of the most recognizable and timeless yachts afloat. Perfection is hard to come by, but at Oceanco we build the Owner’s perfect yacht.

Name: Irving Shipbuilding
Description:
Irving Shipbuilding Inc. is the most modern shipbuilder and in-service ship support provider in North America. Headquartered in Halifax, Nova Scotia, our skilled team and innovative facilities provide efficient building, fabrication, conversion and servicing of vessels and offshore platforms. As Canada’s National Shipbuilder, Irving Shipbuilding Inc. is working with the Royal Canadian Navy on the next class of River Class Destroyers and Arctic and Offshore Patrol Ship (AOPS) vessels under the National Shipbuilding Strategy (NSS). We are proud to continue our long history as a trusted partner in Canadian shipbuilding. 

Irving Shipbuilding Inc. is a member of the J.D. Irving, Limited group of companies, a diverse family owned company with operations in Canada and the United States.

Learn more at www.ShipsforCanada.ca.

If you are interested in a career with Irving Shipbuilding visit www.ShipsforCanada.ca/Careers

Name: Austal
Description: From defending nations to connecting communities and sustaining fleets, we deliver proven performance, next generation innovation and mission-critical reliability. For more than three decades we have been designing, constructing and supporting commercial and defence vessels for leading ferry operators, navies and defence forces. With a genuine focus on research and development of emerging maritime technologies and cutting-edge ship designs, we are leading the industry in the innovation of commercial and defence solutions.

Description:

Name: BENETEAU
Description:
BENETEAU's story began in 1884 in Croix-de-Vie, in the West of France. That year, Benjamin BENETEAU (1859-1928) decided to create the boatyard whose eponym would give birth to the first fishing boats.

130 years later, his visionary spirit is still central to BENETEAU's philosophy. His heritage is a unique vision of sailing and a perpetual desire to innovate.

BENETEAU conceives, designs and builds sailing yachts and motorboats to match to everyone's sailing dreams. From the design office to the 400 dealers throughout the world, 2,500 employees work to offer high-performing, safe, comfortable and elegant boats, together with impeccable service.

BENETEAU now has 80,000 owners on all the world's seas and ranks as a global leader in the building of pleasure boats.

Name: Heesen Yachts
Description:
At Heesen, we are more than shipbuilders. We are a team of individuals who are passionate about what we do and take great pride in delivering nothing but the best. 
 
At our shipyard, no two days are alike and our valued team of around 1,000 experienced workers, each one an expert in their field, brings a wide range of knowledge and ability to our company. Our range of skill sets spans the full range of shipbuilding, from welders and naval architects to joiners and project coordinators. As a result of this, we are one of a few shipyards in the world that can build superyachts in-house, including bespoke, sophisticated interiors. 
 
As a world leader in custom-built yachts ranging from 50 and 80 metres as well as series yachts between 50 to 60 metres, we are recognized for our excellence. Our current fleet encompasses aluminium, steel, displacement, semi-displacement and the revolutionary Fast Displacement Hull Form. Progressive innovation is at the heart of the brand, and our D&D team of engineers continually strive to improve hull efficiency and develop more sustainable yachts.
 
Our 4.4-hectare shipyard located in Oss has nine sheds, five of which are dry docks. Each year, over four million parts are used in the meticulous construction of up to eight yachts. In one of the most modern shipbuilding facilities in the world, every aspect is geared towards achieving exceptional standards of engineering and the highest level of Dutch quality yacht construction.
 
It is because of our employees' smart, tenacious, ingenious minds, that we think outside the box, raise our game, and deliver the Dutch quality we are known for. In creating a healthy working environment, we invest in education, nurture the next generation, and continue to build innovative and ground-breaking superyachts.

Name: Sanlorenzo Yacht
Description:
Since 1958 the Sanlorenzo shipyards have been producing luxury motoryachts, the result of a combination of craftsmanship, design and advanced technologies, made-to-measure according to the owner’s specific requests.

Under the direction of Mr. Massimo Perotti, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Sanlorenzo, the shipyard has gone through a period of extraordinary growth, successfully implement numerous completely unprecedented concepts that have profoundly changed the yachting world.

This unique, innovative approach has led the company to bond with the world of design and art: is global partner of Art Basel for the annual events in Hong Kong, in Basel and Miami Beach and since 2020 became the Institutional Patron of the Peggy Guggenheim Collection. In this cross journey, Sanlorenzo created Sanlorenzo Arts, an active and interactive channel for projects connected with these two worlds. In 2022 Sanlorenzo is main sponsor of the Italian Pavilion at the 59th International Art Exhibition in Venice.

Name: Lürssen
Description:
Lürssen has been renowned throughout the world for the highest quality products as well as innovative technologies in shipbuilding since 1875. This family-owned company, based in Northern Germany, specialises in the design and manufacture of yachts for discerning owners from all over the world. The new build sector also includes extensive after-sales services, including repairs, refits, maintenance and global logistics services. With five highly specialised production sites in Bremen, Hamburg and Rendsburg the family company will continue to rely on the proven shipbuilding traditions of Northern German shipyards and the passion of its employees.

More information: https://karriere.luerssen.de/imprint/?lang=en

Imprint: https://www.lurssen.com/en/imprint/
Privacy Policy: https://www.lurssen.com/en/privacy-policy/linkedin

Name: ADSB
Description:
ADSB is the regional leader in the new build, repair, maintenance, refit and conversion of naval and commercial vessels. With almost a quarter century of service to the UAE and beyond, we have evolved into one of the most experienced shipyards in the region, and our shares have been traded on the Abu Dhabi Securities Exchange since 2003. Deploying the latest technologies, we help maximize fleet availability, extend ship lifetimes and lower overall lifecycle costs.

We deliver superior reliability, ease of operations, and cost efficiencies through five powerful enablers:
•	Superior design selection
•	Skilled workforce with extensive technical experience
•	World-class shipyard facilities
•	Exceptional integration capabilities
•	Precision steel fabrication

Name: MEYER WERFT
Description:
Innovation and Technology

MEYER WERFT GmbH based in Papenburg was founded in 1795. MEYER WERFT has achieved an excellent worldwide reputation in recent decades for constructing and building special-purpose ships. The company is especially well-known due to the construction of large, modern and sophisticated cruise ships.

MEYER WERFT offers its customers innovations and technologies: car and passenger ferries as well as RoRo ships have been successfully constructed in Papenburg for decades. In order to stay successful in worldwide competition, production technology has been continuously extended. Today, MEYER WERFT has the most modern production premises in the shipbuilding industry.
                    .                                      .
Disclaimer: https://www.meyerwerft.de/en/disclaimer.jsp

Name: Estaleiro Atlântico Sul
Description:
Founded in 2005, Atlântico Sul (EAS) is currently the premier benchmark for the construction of Suezmax and Aframax oil tankers in the Americas, as well as a major ship repair hub in the region.

Located in Northeast Brazil at the Port of Suape, Pernambuco, EAS is strategically positioned at the center of international shipping routes, between the Brazilian Pre-Salt fields and the Gulf of Mexico. The shipyard combines best-in-class processes—permanently updated through Continuous Improvement principles—with the most robust infrastructure and technology.

With an installed capacity to process 100,000 tons of steel per year, EAS is one of the largest shipyards in the Southern Hemisphere. It is widely recognized for its distinctive infrastructure and its steadfast focus on safety, quality, and efficiency in tanker construction.

As a vital driver of employment and income, contributing significantly to the socioeconomic development of the State of Pernambuco, Atlântico Sul is prepared to go even further. The company is expanding its portfolio to offer a broader range of products and services, maintaining the same standard of excellence that established the region as a major hub for the Brazilian naval industry.

Name: Sunreef Yachts
Description:
The Sunreef Yachts shipyard, established in Gdansk – Poland in 2002 by French Businessman- Francis Lapp, has the knowledge, experience and technical background necessary to manufacture unique multihulls of the highest quality composite using the most advanced technology practiced in the yachting industry today.
Each Sunreef custom-made catamaran is designed in great detail for the most demanding customer and delivers the best in comfort, living, and safety. Every yacht boats high-performance sailing, luxury “tailored” accommodation, extensive living space and innovative design features. Thanks to the large distance between their two hulls and proper weight distribution, Sunreef`s catamarans are much more stable than typical monohulls. These vessels are regarded by their users as real “floating villas”. They are significantly wider so that they can provide even double the living space of a monohull. With exceptional space and great stability, all Sunreef Yachts make spending time aboard nothing but a pleasure. On a catamaran of a certain size there is no need to compromise on the comfort which boat owners and guests are used to from their homes- it is possible to accommodate a large number of guests, dine and rest comfortably in any of the nicely arranged areas indoors or outdoors no matter whether cruising on the ocean, anchored in the bay or moored in the marina. Sunreef Yachts are well known among customers around the world.
The combination of all the features of Sunreef`s units together with designs that are fully customizable and prepared upon individual request, reinforce Sunreef Yachts as the undisputed leader in luxury catamarans. Thus far the shipyard has launched more than 80 super sailing and power units for individual requests.

Name: Cochin Shipyard Limited
Description: Cochin Shipyard was incorporated in the year 1972 as a fully owned Government of India company. In the last three decades the company has emerged as a forerunner in the Indian Shipbuilding & Shiprepair industry. This yard can build and repair the largest vessels in India. It can build ships upto 1,10,000 DWT and repair ships upto 1,25,000 DWT. The yard has delivered two of India’s largest double hull Aframax tankers each of 95,000 DWT . CSL has secured shipbuilding orders from internationally renowned companies from Europe & Middle East and is nominated to build the country’s first indigenous Air Defense Ship. Shipyard commenced ship repair operations in the year 1982 and has undertaken repairs of all types of ships including upgradation of ships of oil exploration industry as well as periodical lay up repairs and life extension of ships of Navy, UTL, Coast Guard, Fisheries and Port Trust besides merchant ships of SCI & ONGC. The yard has, over the years, developed adequate capabilities to handle complex and sophisticated repair jobs. The Shipyard also trains graduate engineers to marine engineers who later join ships both Indian and foreign as 5th Engineers. 100 are trained every year.

Name: BrasFELS
Description: Empresa multinacional na área de construção e reparos de navios e plataformas.

Name: Sunseeker International Ltd
Description:
Sunseeker is the world’s leading brand for luxury performance motor yachts. Originally named Poole Power Boats, the company was founded by brothers Robert and John Braithwaite in 1969. The company changed its name to Sunseeker International in 1985 and has since become a global icon, with every Sunseeker the result of an uncompromising and unmatched approach to design, craftsmanship and performance.

From its manufacturing base in Poole, Dorset on the south coast of England, Sunseeker employs c.2,000 people and produces around 150 boats every year.

The Sunseeker range sets new standards and benchmarks for luxury performance motor yachts. From the majestic Yacht and Superyacht ranges through to the timeless Performance and our very latest Ocean range, each Sunseeker is the pursuit of perfection.

Never settling for second best, it is this spirit of excellence that has driven Sunseeker to its pre-eminent position in the leisure marine industry today.

Name: Hanwha Ocean
Description:
Global Ocean Solution Provider
Hanwha Ocean

Hanwha Ocean provides sustainable global ocean solutions, backed by over 40 years of accumulated expertise in world-class shipbuilding, offshore plant engineering, and unrivaled defense technologies.
We are globally recognized for our competitiveness in a wide range of high-value vessel sectors, including LNG carriers, ultra-large container ships, drillships, LNG-FPSO, submarines, and destroyers.
Our yard, located in Okpo, Geoje, Gyeongsangnam-do, South Korea, spans 4.9 million square meters and is equipped with optimal infrastructure—including the world’s largest 1-million-ton dry dock and a 900-ton Goliath crane. Through the development of an automation-based smart yard, we are enhancing operational efficiency and safety to deliver the highest-quality results to our clients.
With over 30,000 members across 9 countries, Hanwha Ocean is boldly navigating forward—creating transformative solutions for individuals, society, and the planet.
You can apply for the Offshore Business position through the following link.
https://jobs-offshore.hanwhaocean.com/

한화오션은 40여 년간 축적한 세계 최고 수준의 조선 및 해양 플랜트, 초격차 방산 기술 역량을 바탕으로 지속가능한 글로벌 해양 솔루션을 제공합니다. LNG 운반선, 초대형 컨테이너선, 드릴십, LNG-FPSO, 잠수함 및 구축함 등 광범위한 고부가가치 선박 분야에서 세계적인 경쟁력을 인정받고 있습니다.
대한민국 경상남도 거제시 옥포에 위치한 사업장 야드는 490만㎡의 넓은 부지에, 세계 최대 1백만톤급 도크와 900톤 골리앗 크레인 등 최적의 설비를 갖추고 있습니다. 자동화 기반 스마트 야드 구축을 통해 운영 효율성과 안전성을 고도화하며 고객에게 최상의 결과물을 제공합니다.
우리는 전 세계 9개 국가, 30,000명 이상의 구성원과 함께 담대히 항해하며 개인, 사회, 지구를 위한 혁신적인 솔루션 창출을 위해 나아갈 것입니다.

Name: Azimut|Benetti Group
Description: Azimut|Benetti Group is the world’s leading builder of motor yachts and was founded in 1969 by Paolo Vitelli, who is still the main shareholder today. The Group’s Azimut Yachts and Benetti brands produce over 45 models of yachts and megayachts that express a new concept of luxury characterised by heritage, quality, uniqueness, creativity, innovation, contamination from outside the yachting industry, and an extraordinary bond with owners. With value of production of more than 1.2 billion for this year, over 2,000 employees, six shipyards and a network of 138 points of sale and service worldwide, Azimut|Benetti Group operates in the European, American, Middle Eastern and Asian markets. The path pursued over the years has always been consistent and uncompromising, reconciling steady growth with an entrepreneurial philosophy focused on the major issues raised by Sustainability.

Name: Groupe Beneteau
Description:
Founded in Vendée 140 years ago by Benjamin Bénéteau, Groupe Beneteau today has international industrial capabilities, with 16 production sites, and a global sales network. The Group employs 6,500 people, primarily in France, the US, Poland, Italy, Portugal and Tunisia.

A global market leader, Groupe Beneteau, thanks to its Boat division’s 9 brands, offers more than 150 recreational boat models serving its customers’ diverse navigational needs and uses, from sailing to motorboating, monohulls and catamarans.

Boat brands: BENETEAU, JEANNEAU, LAGOON, PRESTIGE, DELPHIA, EXCESS, FOUR WINNS, WELLCRAFT and SCARAB.

Through its Boating Solutions division, Groupe Beneteau is also present in the boat club, charter, marina, digital and financing sectors.
Location: St Gilles Croix de Vie, Vendée

Name: PaxOcean
Description: PaxOcean owns and operates 5 shipyards located in Singapore, China and Indonesia. First established in 2007 in Singapore, PaxOcean offers a wide range of services covering newbuilding, module fabrication, green recycling, repairs and conversion of conventional and renewable energy assets

Name: ULSTEIN
Description: Join our journey in pushing for progress in the maritime industry, where innovation meets action, equipping you with the tools and insights for safer, smarter and more sustainable operations at sea.

Name: Harland & Wolff
Description:
Situated in the Port of Belfast, Northern Ireland, Harland & Wolff is now the beating heart of Navantia UK’s Fleet Solid Support (FSS) shipbuilding programme.

Our 81-acre shipyard was purposely developed to be able to take some of the world’s largest vessels and offers two of the largest drydocks in Europe.

Under Navantia UK’s ownership, a major modernisation programme of this historic site is underway, set to turn Belfast into one of the most advanced shipbuilding facilities in the UK.

This investment, significantly increased beyond the original FSS plans, includes infrastructure upgrades, cutting-edge manufacturing systems, and state-of-the-art automation – all designed to boost productivity, sustainability, and quality.

Name: Meyer Turku
Description:
The Meyer Turku Oy shipyard is specialized in the construction of very demanding, innovative, and environmentally efficient cruise ships, car ferries, and special vessels. Our share of the global cruise construction market is approximately 10%, and our shipyard's order books extend to 2028. As part of a long-term agreement, Royal Caribbean Ghroup has reserved shipbuilding slots at Meyer Turku through 2036.

Meyer Turku employs over 2 300 top professionals and operates the Turku shipyard where vessels are built since 1737. Meyer Turku’s subsidiaries are Piikkio Works Oy, a cabin factory located in Piikkiö, Shipbuilding Completion Oy, which offers complete deliveries to public spaces, and ENG’nD Oy, a shipbuilding and offshore design company based in Rauma.

Name: Estaleiro EBR  (Estaleiros do Brasil Ltda)
Description: Somos o EBR – Estaleiros do Brasil Ltda.
Location: Sao José do Norte, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Tersan Shipyard
Description:
Tersan Shipyard Inc. is belonging to 'Tersan Group of Companies' providing services in four maritime sectors, 

-New ship building
-Ship repair, docking & conversion 
-Ship owning & operation
-Ship agency services 

Relatively young group’s, especially the ship building division has become one of the leading players in Turkey and as well as in Europe. Tersan’s sustained success that is achieved by its experienced human resources, modern facilities, customer support and reliability guided the company to gain unique and challenging big orders.

Name: Besiktas Shipyard
Description:
Besiktas Shipyard was established in 2007 in Yalova Turkey as an investment of Besiktas Group. Today it is listed as the 8th most active ship repair yard in the World, ranking 1st place in Europe.

Besiktas Shipyard is also a specialized shipbuilder and carried out 50 new building projects such as LPG / Ethylene tankers, Off shore support vessels and Norwegian type fishing vessels.

Boasting three graving and floating docks, the largest of which is 382m, and covering an area of 200,000 sqm, at Besiktas Shipyard we can accommodate 15 ships at the same time including Suezmax tankers, Capesize bulk carriers, Q-Max LNG tankers and containers of up to 15,000 TEU capacity.
With our service oriented and customer friendly approach, strong communication skills and absolute commitment to international safety and quality standards, Besiktas Shipyard is recognised as one of the leading ship repair yard in the World.

We keep planning our future to remain as the home port of the main ship owners and managers of the shipping industry.

Name: ASMAR
Description:
ASMAR es una empresa del Estado de Chile, de administración autónoma, del área de la industria naval y de defensa, cuya actividad principal es efectuar el mantenimiento y la reparación de las unidades navales de la Armada de Chile y, además, de embarcaciones nacionales y extranjeras. Junto con esto, construye naves y artefactos navales para la Marina y para terceros.

Para ello,  la Empresa está organizada en tres plantas industriales ubicadas en las ciudades de Valparaíso, Talcahuano y Punta Arenas. Su Dirección Corporativa se encuentra ubicada en Valparaíso.

Name: Grandweld Shipyards
Description:
Grandweld is a fully integrated shipyard providing shipbuilding, ship repair, and engineering solutions to serve the offshore and marine industry around the world. Established in 1984, Grandweld has developed as one of the region’s most established and versatile shipyards, providing both quality and value.

With its headquarters strategically located in Dubai, Grandweld has been continuously dedicated to offer a comprehensive range of proven offshore and marine products and services to clients worldwide.

Our Services

Shipbuilding

The Shipbuilding division specializes in the design and the construction of a broad range of offshore vessels of both steel and aluminum such as Harbour/Terminal Tugs, Dive Maintenance Support Vessels, Seismic Support Vessels, Utility Vessels, Multi Purpose Supply Vessels, Fast Support Intervention Vessels (FSIV), Anchor Handling Tug Supply Vessels, Offshore Support Vessels, Salvage Tugs, Crew Boats, Pilot Boats and Security/Patrol Boats.

Ship Repair and Conversion

The ship repair division provides major repair, refit and conversion services of all types of marine vessels. With modern facilities and a large skilled workforce, the company is fully equipped to handle a broad range of vessel repairs and provide services to international clients with high customer satisfaction.

Name: Portsaid shipyard,SCA
Description: Port Said Shipyard (PSS) is a leading shipyard in the area; it has a unique strategic place and is considered as a distinguished spot at the northern entrance of Suez canal giving it a great privilege to attract many transiting ships for repair purposes.

Name: LOFTMANS MARINE SERVICES
Description:
The Loftmans Marine Services is an International Marine Consultancy firm in India and Europe specialized in innovative designs,marine survey, special craft production,ship brokerage, towing support  delivery assistance, chartering and Owners representation etc.

Having MoU with European Design consultancies and Yards until 2023.

Name: Sea Naval Solutions.be
Description:
Sea Naval Solutions is a consortium of 4 professional companies, Engine Deck Repair - Thales Belgium - Chantier d'Atlantique & Socarenam, specifically established in 2018 with the purpose of offering the best suited solution to the Belgian-Dutch Navy MCM-project.

Each company brings along his own expertise and competence, which makes SNS (Sea Naval Solutions.be) the most attractive candidate for this innovative project.

Name: Neptune Yacht Refit Services
Description:
Neptune offers a wide range of specialized services to meet all of your yacht's needs, from exterior and interior painting, deck replacement, electrical and electronic solution upgrades, metal cleaning and polishing, structural and detail repairs, whether interior or exterior, always in constant communication with the client throughout the refit project. 

Located in the city of Aveiro, less than an hour's drive from Oporto airport and two and a half hours from Lisbon airport, Located in the city of Aveiro, less than an hour's drive from Oporto airport and two and a half hours from Lisbon airport, @Neptune Yacht Refit Shipyard is situated at the South Terminal of the Commercial Port of Aveiro, a strategic hub on the Portuguese Atlantic coast.

Very close to the city center and served by some of the main highways that connect the region to several major cities in Portugal and Spain, Neptune thus benefits from a privileged location for everyone seeking its services in refitting, reconstruction, and dry storage for their yachts.

Main shipyard facilities:

23 500 m2 shipyard – plus 40 000 m2 available in a near future
15 000 m2 of offshore dry berthing for mono or multihull yachts up to 30 m
150 m front sea (canal draught > 5,5 m) – plus 300 m available in a near future
4 000 m2 covered refit services boatyard
80 t Croc lift
40 t Travel lift
Fuel Station
Spray painting booth (24 L x 11 W x 11 H meters)
365 working days operation

Name: Marine supply
Description:
Marine supply ltd was born from a collective of passion and love for the yachting industry and the hope to become a well established and integral part of it, under our newly created brand. We aim to provide our clients with the highest quality service that rightfully so, is expected when creating something as grand as a luxury super yacht.  

We specialise in sourcing and providing skilled and trusted marine industry professionals that not only understand the process but genuinely take pride and care in the work they produce. 
To bring these incredible designs to life requires a keen eye for detail and many years of experience. Under our guidance and management we own the process from start to finish. 

Our capabilities span across multiple disciplines in the yacht building and refit sectors to include, Exterior/Interior fairing and painting, Corrosion repair, Coating consultancy and detailed reporting, Interior carpentry specialists, Fabrication, Teak decking specialists, Exterior outfit, Stainless steel polishing and caulking specialists, to name a few. 

Having successful operations in both the UK and the UAE, we can offer our clients a unique geographical advantage enabling us to deliver an efficient service within this fast paced industry.

Name: China Deyuan Marine Fitting Co.,ltd
Description:
China Deyuan Marine Fitting Co.,ltd, www.deyuanmarine.com
maily supply more than 2150 kinds of marine equipment,such as Tunnel Thruster   
FIFI system,fire monitor,lifeboat&davit,marine winch,windlass,anchor,anchor chains and other safety equipment &outfitting equipment etc.
We approved by quality assurance and quality
management system: ISO9001:2008.
Most of our products are approved by:
ABS,LR,DNV,BV,RINA,MED/EC,NK,GL ETC.
Over the years,we always stick to the development concept of "move customer,achieve staff's value,develop win-win cooperation".
With years  of efforts,we have a more than 20person sales team with enough energy,high efficiency and good service,
always can provide prompt technical support and perfect after-sales service.
And with great support from many strong manufacturers,we always can offer good quality products with cheaper price,deeply receive best appraisal from shipyards,shipowners which come from Indonesia,Vietnam,Korea,Iraq, UAE, Philippines,Thailand,Norway, Belgium,Australia,USA and so on.
We are located at a beautiful and livable city-ZHUHAI,China.Only 30Mins to Macao International Airport,70mins to Hong Kong,2 hours to Guangzhou international airport,warmly welcome new and old friends come to visit us,We look forward to your participation in building a longtime and win-win business relationship together.

Name: Excess Catamarans
Description:
Excess has set itself the task of challenging catamaran standards. To create a range of boats that are at the same time racy, simple and accessible, that balances the need for comfort of a multihull with the thirst for the sensations of a monohull.

Dive into the world of Excess, a world where catamarans are as much fun to live on as they are to sail. A design with character, remarkable colors and clean lines all combine in a catamaran that is a pleasure to helm.

Resolutely smart and seaworthy : an increased sail area, a mast stepped forward of the coachroof, twin aft helm stations for direct connection to the rudders, and good volumes allowing a lifestyle inspired by the oceans.

Architectural choices signed by VPLP design, specialists in ocean racing. A perfect combination for living the sea, and living at sea in all its simplicity.

Name: Floorganise, software for shipyard operations.
Description: The maritime industry and especially shipyards have many of the answers for the challenges of our time. Such as capturing wind energy on sea, reducing emissions or delivering on safety and security. But how does this industry make sure they can deliver on time, within budget and faster every day? For over a decade Floorganise delivers the IT backbone for operational excellence within European and American shipyards. Through shipyard specific IT solutions, digital process innovation and continuous improvement. Our Shipyard-MES system Floor2Plan aims at making life easier for front line supervisors, engineers and project managers within shipyards. Please reach out if you are curious about finding out more.

Name: ASOCIACION CLUSTER NAVAL GALLEGO
Description:
The mission of the Cluster of the Galician Naval Sector (ACLUNAGA), created by initiative of the Ministry of Innovation and Industry of the Galician Government, is to improve the competitiveness and to promote the development of the group of companies that integrate the Galician naval sector, establishing anagreement among the protagonists on:
The challenges they face
The objectives and strategies to overcome said challenges
The high-priority actions to be accomplished by the companies and the Cluster itself, with the essential support and involvement of the rest of the agents that influence the sector (Administration, University, Unions,Sectorial Associations, etc)
At the present time 110companies participate in the Cluster. Their products and services cover all the segments of the value chain of the naval construction (from shipyards and engineering companies to classification and certification societies, from capital goods and supplying companies, to equipment companies, installers or metal companies). This way the first goal of ACLUNAGA, consistent in becoming the institution that more faithfully refiects and represents the Galician naval sector has been accomplished.

Name: Marine Repair B.V.
Description:
Welkom op onze officiële LinkedIn-pagina. 
Volg ons om op de hoogte te blijven van de laatste projecten en nieuws omtrent Marine Repair B.V.
Door de vele inspirerende projecten, willen we je laten zien wat je zou kunnen bereiken met ons als partner, klant en als collega. Onze expertise omvat een breed scala aan disciplines, waaronder lassen, snijden, gutsen, conventioneel kotteren en draaien, thermische Lansen, en dit alles in-house.  Zoals wij altijd zeggen @yourservice!

Name: Godfrey Marine
Description:
Godfrey Marine is headquartered in Elkhart, IN and builds marine products throughout the Northern Indiana Region.

Year in and year out, the Godfrey Marine brands continue to receive recognition for its owner loyalty, customer satisfaction and product innovation. Over the past several years, the company has been recognized with numerous industry awards including the Customer Satisfaction Index (CSI) Awards, Innovation Awards presented by the NMMA, and Excellence in Design Awards presented by Boating Industry.                                                                     

www.HurricaneBoats.com
Since 1974, Hurricane Boats has been the driving force in deck boat innovation. We’ve been perfecting fun on the water with our innovative and incredibly versatile deck boat design. The Hurricane Boats lineup includes the following series: SunDeck, SunDeck Sport, FunDeck and Center Console. 

www.GodfreyPontoonBoats.com
Godfrey Pontoon Boats built the industry's first ever all aluminum pontoon boat in 1958 at the Chicago World's Fair, and in doing so, created an entire segment in the marine industry. The Godfrey Pontoon Boats portfolio consists of the following series: XP, Sanpan, AquaPatio, Monaco, Sweetwater, Xperience and Mighty G.

Name: BASQUE MARITIME CLUSTER
Description:
Somos el Foro Marítimo Vasco, el Clúster de la Industria Marítima del País Vasco.

Somos el punto de encuentro para agentes del sector, y nuestro objetivo es promover la cultura marítima y la competitividad de las empresas de la Industria mediante la cooperación.

En definitiva, un núcleo de agrupaciones, asociaciones, empresas, entidades, centros educativos e industriales y departamentos gubernamentales que reman en una misma dirección.

Name: Ostseestaal GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
GER
Die Ostseestaal GmbH & Co. KG ist eine Spezialfirma für die Herstellung und Lieferung von passgenauen Bausätzen aus zugeschnittenem und dreidimensional geformtem Metallblech. Dabei werden Werkstoffe höchster Qualität wie Stahl, Edelstahl, Aluminium und Speziallegierungen wie INVAR etc. verarbeitet.

EN
Ostseestaal GmbH & Co. KG is a company specialising in the manufacture and supply of custom-fit building kits from fitted and three-dimensional formed sheet metal. In doing so, we use materials of the highest quality such as steel, stainless steel, aluminium and special alloys such as INVAR etc.

Name: Shipbuilding Completion Oy
Description:
Shipbuilding Completion Oy is an interior turnkey supplier for cruise ships and passenger ferries. We specialize in interior outfitting of public spaces and handle all areas of the turnkey project from project planning, designing and sourcing the materials to the actual building and eventual delivery.

As a turnkey supplier, our strength lies in comprehensive turnkey deliveries. We have created stunning interiors for some of the largest cruise ships in the world. Our professional and experienced staff, who is supported by a strong network of trusted suppliers, ensures a successful project from start to completion. 

Shipbuilding Completion Oy was founded in 2009 and we currently employ around 50 experts in-house and several reliable suppliers. As a young company, strengthening our corporate culture and staff commitment is important to us. Everyone in our team has a positive and service-minded attitude, which is reflected in everything we do. 

Our office is centrally located at the premises of Meyer Turku shipyard. Our parent company Meyer Turku Oy, family-owned by Meyer Werft, is one of the leading European shipbuilding companies.

Name: AL FATTAN SHIP INDUSTRY
Description: AL FATTAN SHIP INDUSTRY is a Shipbuilding company located in Dubai-Abu Dhabi Road, Al Tawia, Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates.

Name: HR Piping
Description: Piping, motorenbouw en machinekamerinbouw. Garandeert maatwerk, kwaliteit en vakmanschap.

Name: Sociber
Description:
Bienvenido a SOCIBER Ltda., un astillero certificado NKK, I.S.P.S. e ISO 9001 - 2008, con un solo Dique Flotante fondeado en la bahía de Valparaíso - CHILE, junto a las principales rutas marítimas de océano Pacífico en Sud América.

Desde 1985, SOCIBER Ltda. ha sido sinónimo de actitud, velocidad y focalización en la actividad de reparaciones de naves, condición que asumimos día a día, logrando un envidiable balance de plazos - costos - calidad, brindando a nuestros clientes un flujo continuo de soluciones, aumentando la disponibilidad de sus naves y agregando valor a su actividad.

Es cierto, solo tenemos un dique flotante, uno de los de mayor capacidad en la costa weste de Suda América y el segundo en tamaño en las costas de Chile, lo que se traduce en que toda la organización esté preocupada de cumplir los requerimientos de su nave en los plazos comprometidos, de tal suerte de no atrasar a la nave entrante.   En SOCIBER Ltda. visualizamos la actividad de reparación de naves como una actividad complementaria a la del armador y/o administrador de la nave, comprometiéndonos día a día para aumentar la eficiencia de nuestra organización y por sobre todo, la efectividad de su nave.

Name: Snijtechniek Brabant B.V.
Description: Gespecialiseerd in het frezen van aluminium- en houten platen en het snijden van stalen platen voor de Scheepvaart.

Name: Triyards Holdings Ltd
Description:
Headquartered in Singapore and listed on the Singapore Mainboard Stock exchange, TRIYARDS provides integrated full-service engineering, fabrication and ship construction solutions for the global offshore and marine industries with a focus in shipbuilding, ship conversions, medium to heavy fabrication works and ship repair. By focusing on sophisticated platforms and equipment that can tackle even the most complex offshore projects, we have already established ourselves as a front runner in the fabrication of self-elevating units (SEUs) in Southeast Asia. 

Guided by our core values of being Dynamic, Distinctive and Dedicated, we seek to fulfill our vision to be a yard of choice in the region.

Name: EMENASA
Description:
Electromecánica Naval e Industrial, S.A., EMENASA, es una empresa eléctrica de larga tradición y experiencia en la instalación y reparación naval en Vigo. Su origen se remonta al año 1956 y con el tiempo ha ido completando su actividad trabajando en otros sectores diferentes del naval como el energético, la ingeniería, la instalación en la industria en tierra, automoción, etc.

Una de las características más singulares es la capacidad que tiene de realizar obras completas, que superan el marco eléctrico, debido a la incorporación de otras empresas con actividades mecánicas, hidráulicas, de diseño, tecnología, etc. Este hecho unido a la larga experiencia hacen de Emenasa un adecuado socio para un amplio abanico de actividades y servicios a la industria .

Name: ALVA YACHTS
Description:
ALVA YACHT is an electric luxury yacht brand harnessing uncompromised design and cutting-edge technology.
Our mission is to bring yachting into a new era with a product offering of progressive, electrified solar catamarans and sailing yachts that are designed and engineered without compromise. Combining self-sufficient sailing and comprehensive customer experience, 
Alva Yachts offers the best boats for forward thinking explorers of the oceans.

Name: Nosco Shipyard - Vietnam
Description:
NOSCO Shipyard is a leading and internationally trusted solutions provider for the marine, offshore and energy sectors. Our core businesses include ship repair, upgrading and conversion, large-scale module construction as well as building specialised vessels for offshore operations and transportation in the energy sector.

NOSCO Shipyard has gained an excellent reputation with our timely delivery of quality products and services, and we are committed to continue our focus in building our capabilities and standards to lead the marine and offshore industry.

Name: BOGAZICI Shipyard
Description:
BOGAZICI Shipyard, founded in 1992 has built various capacity of Cargo vessels and focused on particularly building Tug Boats since 2005 for international and major tug owners and tug operators.

The construction of the state of the art new BOGAZICI Shipyard in Yalova, Turkey has been completed in mid-April 2020  and now in operation for global shipowners and operators.

Name: 4OCEAN DESIGN
Description: Looking for a reliable partner in ship, yacht, and offshore structure design? Look no further! Our team specializes in delivering comprehensive documentation, from initial concepts to technical and final designs. We also provide on-site supervision at shipyards worldwide, ensuring quality and timely project completion. Keeping pace with the latest technological advancements, we integrate cutting-edge innovations into our projects. Quality and punctuality are our top priorities, and we are committed to meeting even the most challenging project requirements. Partner with us and bring your most ambitious projects to fruition. The sky is the limit!

Name: Peters Werft GmbH
Description:
Peters Werft is synonymous with expertise, individuality and innovation. Whether it’s about new building, conversion or repairing, our qualified personnel find bespoke solutions – tailor-made in Germany. We set great store by high quality and environmental standards. In this way, we meet the highest demands and requirements of our clients. Openness and trust are the very foundation of a successful partnership and we’ve been doing this for more than 145 years

At our shipyard, we build container vessels up to 900 TEU, multi-purpose vessels, special purpose ships and mega-yachts. We value precision, quality and keeping adherence to delivery dates. Repairs, in particular, require a high degree of flexibility: they are either carried out at the yard or by our mobile repair service. The facilities at our shipyard make it possible to build ships up to a length of 138 metres and a width of 22 metres.

Name: Scanunit AB
Description:
Scanunit provides smart maintenance solutions for the shipping industry, covering general repairs, welding and piping, installations, and surface treatment.

In addition to our core services, we are an established dealer and agent for several well-known suppliers, offering high-quality Dyneema ropes, epoxy repair kits such as Wencon, and a range of other specialized marine solutions.

Furthermore, we are actively engaged in the Alternative Fuels sector and provide expertise in PFAS decontamination and PFAS foam conversions.

Scanunit also offers full certification services for cargo handling and lifting equipment, along with periodic inspection and maintenance of life-saving appliances (lifeboats, rescue boats, davits, winches, and release hooks).

We provide a broad range of lifting solutions and related equipment, including steel wire rope slings, ensuring safe and efficient operations for our customers.

Name: EVO YACHTS
Description:
Evo Yachts is a brand born in 2015 and is the result of long experience of its creators, working in the field of yachting since 2008. Passion, skill and ability create a new line of boats in 2015, the product of different experiences extending from the north to the south of the peninsula, and capturing the impeccable quality of Italian craftsmanship in all its yachts.

All of Evo Yachts’ projects combine traditional style with innovative technologies and cutting-edge design, to give form to luxury vessels of exceptional great elegance, set off by modern lines and practicality. And all without giving up on comfort and safety for owners and guests.

Name: Yuniboat
Description:
En octobre 2021, naissait YUNIBOAT, le premier chantier de reconditionnement de bateaux basé au Pouliguen, La vision audacieuse de YUNIBOAT repose sur le modèle novateur du reconditionnement, inscrit dans une logique écocirculaire, démontrant ainsi une approche avant-gardiste dans le secteur maritime.
Le constat de l'éphémère durée d'utilisation des bateaux, estimée à seulement 1,5 an sur une vie totale de 40 ans, a motivé la création de ce chantier pionnier. YUNIBOAT s'est engagé dans une démarche visant à allonger la vie des bateaux pour réduire l'impact environnemental lié à leur production et à leur élimination, le chantier s'oriente vers la prolongation de la durée de vie des produits déjà créés. 
Cette approche répond à une demande croissante des plaisanciers pour des bateaux responsables, garantie et plus économique parfois issus de générations antérieures.
YUNIBOAT s'appuie sur un collectif d'experts et de partenaires stratégiques, allant de la formation à la réglementation, en passant par l'innovation et l'impact environnemental.
YUNIBOAT déploie un modèle écocirculaire qui contribue à préserver l'environnement, limiter les déchets, et soutenir l'activité économique régionale. Cette initiative réduit les émissions de gaz à effet de serre et la pollution marine en limitant la production de nouveaux déchets et surtout en offrant une solution pour l'industrie maritime. En adoptant un modèle scalable, il propose une approche conforme aux principes de l'ADEME. 
Le chantier offre des emplois variés, favorisant la transmission intergénérationnelle des compétences et contribuant ainsi au maintien de l'expertise. En phase avec les attentes du marché, la vision économique et éthique de YUNIBOAT ouvre une troisième voie : celle du reconditionnement, une approche moderne et responsable pour l'industrie maritime et au-delà.

Name: Estaleiros Navais do Mondego, SA
Description:
The Shipyard was founded on September 1944 and is located by Figueira da Foz, at the mouth of Mondego River, in the centre of Portugal. 
In 1944 the Yard had two slipways and workshops for wooden shipbuilding. Three years later, the Yard built it's first steel ships, three 71-m codfish trawlers. 
Upon celebration of their 50th anniversary, in 1994, Mondego Shipyard began construction of a 45-m long, 500-passenger aluminium catamaran. 
In the meantime, the Yard continuously expanded and updated its facilities and now has a shipbuilding slipway for ships up to 100 m and workshops for full construction and outfitting and a ship repair slipway for ships up to 90 m. 
In it's existence, Mondego Shipyard has built pontoons, barges, workboats, floating cranes, dredgers, tugs, fishing vessels, cargo ships, tankers, ferries and Navy ships, in a total of 256 ships. The Repair Department has been engaged with dredgers, fishing vessels, ferries and research ships, amongst others. 
This diversity of built and repaired ships demands great flexibility and capacity of response for a wide range of situations. The Design and Production Departments have to cope with different standards, regulations and market demands, with an ever-increasing necessity to compress the delivery times.

Name: CSSC Marine Service co.,ltd.
Description:

(65%), CSSC Marine Power Co., Ltd. (20%), Anqing CSSC Diesel Engine Co., Ltd. (10%) and China Shipbuilding Trading Co., Ltd. (5%). These personal private submersibles are ABS classed and the subs are also approved for the Cayman flag.  These personal submarines and private submersibles have been used in scientific, commercial, and superyachts and have also been used in National Geographic, BBC, and other numerous film projects. SEAmagine has a perfect safety record and a solid track record in reliability and practicality in both the professional and superyachts markets.

Description:
Costa Etrusca Group nasce nel 1999 da una grande intuizione di Fabrizio Sonnini, attuale CEO dell'azienda e sua moglie Maria Teresa. La Passione e Dedizione al proprio lavoro è stata trasmessa anche al figlio Federico, rappresentante del futuro e ringiovanimento dell'azienda.

La struttura gestisce i due cantieri nautici di Scarlino (località "La Botte") e Punta Ala (Porto), nel quale risiede il nuovissimo ufficio di Front Office situato nel cuore del Porto come punto di accoglienza e pronto intervento.  

Il Cantiere Navale di Punta Ala è in grado di prendersi completamente cura della vostra imbarcazione, di effettuare importanti lavori anche di straordinaria manutenzione e di apportare modifiche strutturali di ogni tipologia, sia a livello progettuale che realizzativo. Name: Signal International
Description:

•New construction
•Heavy fabrication

Signal facilities from Texas to Alabama support projects with state-of-the-art equipment, advanced processes and highly skilled and abundant workforces.

Drilling rigs are fabricated at two facilities in Pascagoula, Miss., while shipbuilding and heavy manufacturing occur at fab yards in Orange and Port Arthur, Texas. Ship drydocking, repair and overhaul take place at Signal Ship Repair in Mobile, Ala.

Name: Valstad Shipworks
Description:
American influence depends on sea power and the industrial base to support it, a base that has become dangerously anemic.

Valstad is building highly automated factories to produce ships for commercial & defense customers 5x faster and at globally competitive prices.

We focus on 3 key areas:

1. Reinventing the shipbuilding process with modular designs & automated production lines.
2. Accelerating the shift to sustainable transport.
3. Achieving full autonomy to relieve critical labor shortages.

Our first facility will manufacture ships that transport cargo via inland & coastal waters at a scale not seen since WWII.

Name: Highfield France
Description:
In just six years, Highfield Boats has become the world’s number one aluminum hulled RIB manufacturer. Established in 2011, Highfield Boats has developed into worldwide boat builder with a complete line of rigid-inflatable hull boats (RIBs). Highfield now offers small tenders from 2.4m, all the way up to a full line of heavy duty RIBs at home on any ocean. With dealers and distributors in 38 countries, Highfield Boats has become the top choice world wide for families, yacht clubs, even international mariners.

Highfield rigid hull inflatable boats (RIBs), featuring exclusive powder-coated aluminum hulls, can trace their design heritage to the Australian line of Swift Boats. Developed to handle the tough conditions found along the Great Barrier Reef, Swift rigid-hull inflatable boats are renowned for their durability and performance.

Highfield’s state-of-the-art production facility is located in Weihai, China. Under European management the facility covers 10,000 sqm, employs 200 staff and has adopted the latest technologies available to guarantee production of the finest RIBs money can buy.

With its short-listing by the Australian government in the Future Frigates – SEA 5000 Programme, the Company hopes to bring its 230 years of maritime experience to the region in one of Australia’s most significant naval projects. Fincantieri Australia is committed to developing the Australian industry through growing local workforce and drawing upon its networks of naval ship building executives and global expertise.

At ARES, building the exceptional is second nature.

Now, with ARES Yachts, we bring this heritage of maritime expertise into the world of superyachts, crafting eternal moments for those who dare to dream big.

Name: Nirmon Marine & Offshore Design
Description:
"Nirmon: Your Maritime Solutions Partner

Based in scenic Goa, India, Nirmon is a dynamic team of young, passionate professionals, including Naval Architects, Marine Engineers, and Shipbuilding Engineers. We bring a wealth of experience from ship design, classification societies, shipyards, and ship operations. With this diverse background, we offer independent technical support and optimized solutions.

Our Services:

Concept Design: We offer tailored ship design solutions, considering owner requirements, hull forms, materials, and machinery arrangements.

Preliminary Design: Take your project to shipyards with confidence, armed with our General Arrangement Plans, midship sections, stability parameters, and more.

Classification Society & Flag Administration: We ensure your designs comply with the rigorous standards of classification societies and flag administrations.

Detail Design: Our construction-optimized designs are 'build-friendly,' reducing errors and improving the actual construction process.

At Nirmon, we believe in providing quality and simplified solutions for complex maritime challenges. Let us navigate your next project to success."

Name: Trimm Design
Description:
Trimm Design is a Dutch design, naval architecture, and engineering studio specialising in high-precision yacht builds.

From our office in Leeuwarden, our team of 50+ designers and engineers delivers an integrated chain of services across the full lifecycle of a vessel—covering concept design, exterior styling, naval architecture, and engineering in construction, exterior/outfitting, and complete interior technical design through to production level.

Grounded in decades of experience in the Dutch superyacht industry, we combine technical depth with a meticulous and methodical approach. Our teams work in advanced 2D and 3D environments including Siemens NX, TopSolid’Wood, AutoCAD, Rhino, ShipConstructor and more, ensuring an accurate and efficient translation from concept to engineering and ultimately to production.

We support shipyards, interior builders, casco manufacturers, naval architects, and private clients with:
	•	Interior Engineering – GA refinement, technical floor plans, 1:20 packages, detailed production drawings, workshop preparation, and CNC output.
	•	Exterior & Structural Engineering – Basic and Detail Engineering (BE/DE), outfitting, construction detailing, structural integration, and production-ready 3D modelling.
	•	Yacht Design – exterior styling, concept development, 3D modelling, and build-oriented design documentation.
	•	Naval Architecture – feasibility studies, stability, weight calculations, performance requirements, regulatory compliance, and design-to-engineering support.
	•	Project Management & Process Support – planning, coordination, on-site support, and optimisation of CAD-CAM workflows for both newbuild and refit programmes.

Since 2008, Trimm Design has contributed to numerous national and international yacht projects—acting as a flexible, accountable partner known for precision, reliability, and seamless collaboration across all design and engineering disciplines.

Name: Elektryka Morska
Description:
ELEKTRYKA MORSKA was founded in February 2007. The main business of the company is technical supplies for the marine industry. In September 2012, as a thriving company we opened the biggest cable warehouse in Poland. We currently have more than 100km of various types and diameters cables in stock, so we guarantee prompt and complete delivery. Diversely stocked warehouse is equipped with cable winder and cable cutter which allows for quick preparation and marking of ordered goods. In our offer we also have specialist, certified cables for electrical switchboards designed for maritime market.  Our cables have, i.a. DNV, GL, ABS,BV, LR and PRS recognition.

From 2013 our business have expanded to maintenance services. We have a group of qualified electricians, designers and locksmiths. We provide electrical and locksmith works for shipbuilding, ship conversion and ship repair. We develop detailed technical documentation and prefabricate distribution boards.

Currently, we co-operate with the largest Polish shipyards in Szczecin, Swinoujscie, Gdansk and Gdynia. Our customers are companies that provide ship building and ship repair services.  Cooperation with the biggest producers in Europe gives us the guarantee to provide our customers with high quality products. We are the official sales representative of shipbuilding sector companies, such as; TKF, John Gjerde, Rubber Design, Eltorque, AIK, Seematz. We represent cutting-edge technologies and technical expertise currently used on the market. We have adequate technical and design background which helps in the selection of suitable products to customers’ requirements.

Our main certificates are - TÜV certificate for welding, Polish Ship Register approval for electrical works on ships and ISO 9001 quality management system certified by DNV GL. In 2018 our company has passed AQAP 2110 NATO certificate - which is a result of developing our knowledge and skills in navy industry.

Name: Proton Yachts

Name: Melita Marine Group
Description:
The Melita Marine Group was founded in 1989 offering basic yachting services. Following initial success, an expansion plan was drawn with the goal of offering a comprehensive range of yachting services in Malta. These services included refit management, agency, yacht brokerage, yacht charter, customs clearance, duty free supplies and bunkering. After gaining invaluable experience and a vast understanding of the Maltese yachting market, we soon recognised the huge potential of Malta to become a major player in the Mediterranean Yachting Industry.

This lead to Melita Power Diesel being set up in 1998, which was the result of the buyout of Marine Industrial Repairs, offering the services of engine repair, overhauling and reconditioning. Following through the success of Melita Power Diesel Ltd, Melita Yacht Painters Ltd, representing AWLGRIP, was set up in 1999 with a professional team of 8 painters.

The Group's strategy then focused on expansion, both in the services offered collectively as well as expanding the Group's international reach.

Name: Virginia Ship Repair Association
Description:
The Virginia Ship Repair Association (VSRA) is a regional association representing companies engaged in, or supporting, the ship repair industry in Virginia and the Mid-Atlantic region. Our mission is to focus and coordinate member resources on issues, challenges, and opportunities facing the ship repair industry in Virginia and across the nation.

VSRA represents over 250 member companies whose combined businesses have an economic impact in the Hampton Roads area on more than 60,000 jobs, $6.4 billion in economic impact and $4.3 billion in employee earnings and benefits.
