Description:
PaxOcean Pertama is situated on a 280,000m2 site on the north-western coast of Batam, and shares a common boundary with our Graha yard, while lying within close proximity to Nanindah. This enables us to utilise our yard resources with greater flexibility to meet our customers’ needs. PaxOcean Pertama has also developed capabilities, complete with a well-established team, for repair and conversion projects as well as the construction of newbuildings.

A strength of PaxOcean Pertama is having a 7.5m sea depth for berthing bigger vessels for repairs, and has become one of the premier ship repair and conversion yards in Batam. PaxOcean Pertama also fabricates vessel sections in support of the Nanindah yard, and has garnered a strong track record of building specialty offshore support vessels.

Name: Lagersmit
Description:
Ever since it's establishment in 1856, Lagersmit has met the needs of many sectors that call for absolute reliability. Thanks to this heritage and with more than 45.000 seals delivered, we have gained the knowledge, resources and capacity to develop secure, predictable seals that keep going - both now and in the future.

It’s important that all sealing components are of the highest quality and are perfectly compatible with each other. At the production facility at our headquarters in the Netherlands, we make sure that our Liquidyne pump shaft seals and Supreme propulsion seals meet
these high standards – adding quality and reliability to your operation. In a nutshell, we deliver you Peace of Mind.

Believing that there’s always room for improvement, we keep developing new ideas for your applications and deliver the best sealing solutions according to our Modular, Made-to-Measure philosophy. 

Our dedicated service network covers your needs 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, worldwide.

Name: Dynamiq
Description:
Dynamiq was founded in 2014  with a goal to assemble a “dream team” of world thinkers, engineers and naval architects to turn the next-generation superyacht concept into reality, creating the world’s first “smart yachts”. The shipyard undertakes builds from 35 to 65 meters that are a product of leading European technology, thoughtful design and elite craftsmanship. Dynamiq’s international approach has resulted in award-winning superyachts of the highest North European quality.

Dynamiq believes it can propose something better that simply outperforms the competition and offers owners more choice. We're talking about versatile yachts perfect for any occasion, whether it’s relaxing family cruising, vibrant deck parties or exploring the remotest destinations. Fast but with ocean-going range, easy to order and customize with top world brands.

Dynamiq is the first company in the superyacht industry to introduce an online configurator, allowing the yacht to be easily configured online 24/7 with transparent costs and delivery dates.

Description: Founded in 2003, Allures Yachting builds exceptional boats for cruising in hot and cold latitudes. Reliable and powerful boats with a remarkable quality of finishes. A reference in the world of the full aluminum sailing dinghy sailboat. Allures Yachting is also the first shipyard behind the Grand Large Yachting Group, which today brings together six shipyards and two service companies and operates in three markets: pleasure, professional and service.

Description:
Merima’s services include comprehensive turnkey supply projects, tailored solutions for unique needs and refurbishment for the renewal and renovation of areas.

World-class project directors, established best practices, and over 35 years of experience in shipbuilding means we find solutions for even the most demanding projects and on tight schedules.

We stand by our promise of being a quality and dependable partner.

Name: Marine Consultancy Group (Singapore - India)
Description:
We provide complete design solutions for steel and aluminium hull vessels including conceptual & basic design, construction & complete working drawings, engineering drawings, conversion drawings, block drawings, composite piping plans, spool drawings, nesting plans, and other drawings that help with project management. In addition, we also conduct hull model testing of the designed hull or CFD analysis for accurate prediction of speed/ power. We also provide complete documentation required for classification.
From 1985 to 2015, we owned one of the foremost shipbuilding company Neptune Marine Pvt. Ltd in India with a shipyard in Mumbai. In this shipyard, we constructed 50 vessels of various sizes & specifications, and to the requirements of several classification societies including 7 mini bulk carriers, ranging from 2200 to 2700-tonne dwt. As a result of this foundation, our designs benefit from this practical experience and are more pragmatic, cost-effective and innovative.
We provide project management, marine consultancy, and equipment solutions that meet the latest technological and international regulatory standards. As part of our equipment solutions, we have supplied complete equipment packages which comprise construction materials, mechanical, electrical, nautical, outfitting, accommodation, and deck machinery and mooring equipment. 
We have offices in Singapore, India and Bangladesh with affiliate offices in South Korea and Sweden. Our Indian company, Marine Consultancy Services, Kolkata is the ship design arm, and the drawing office of our company in Singapore.

Name: Chantier Naval de L'Ocean Indien Ltd
Description:
Le CNOI, chantier naval situé à Port-Louis, Ile Maurice, est essentiellement concentré sur la réparation de navires de pêches (thoniers senneurs, palangriers), militaires (notamment la Marine Francaise et Americaine), et autres navires de servitudes.
Le CNOI est  également engagé dans la construction neuve (amphidromes, barges, pilotines, crevetiers, etc...)
Le chantier emploie plus de 420 personnes (permanents et interimaires inclus).

Name: FRIZONIA
Description:
FRIZONIA se creó en el año 1992 por Profesionales del sector del Aire Acondicionado y la Refrigeración siendo en la actualidad una Empresa especializada en el desarrollo de ingeniería, suministro y montaje de sistemas de Aire Acondicionado y Refrigeración para su aplicación en la Industria Naval, Offshore y Defensa. No obstante, FRIZONIA nace de un importante grupo de refrigeración industrial que fue fundado en 1973.

Desde sus comienzos, FRIZONIA trata de mantenerse como un referente del sector con un estándar de calidad autoexigente y un desarrollo permanente de sus conocimientos, así como de las nuevas aplicaciones e innovaciones del mundo de la Refrigeración y el Aire Acondicionado. En la actualidad, FRIZONIA ha diversificado su actividad al sector Naval y Offshore a nivel internacional. Todo ello gracias a un equipo humano muy profesional con un elevado nivel de conocimiento e implicación, así como de seriedad sobre nuestros compromisos.

Con el objetivo de satisfacer las necesidades y los requisitos de nuestros clientes, y encontrar la adecuada relación calidad/precio en nuestros productos, FRIZONIA mantiene implantado un sistema de Calidad bajo la norma ISO 9001:2008, certificado por Bureau Veritas y la mejora continua como pilar fundamental. Además, nuestra empresa está implicada con el valor del medio ambiente mantiene su compromiso en el mantenimiento de un Sistema de Gestión Medioambiental conforme a la norma UNE-EN-ISO 14001:2004.

Una de las últimas certificaciones obtenidas por FRIZONIA se trata de la certificación según norma PECAL/AQAP 2110 que acredita que el Sistema de Gestión de Calidad de FRIZONIA cumple con los requisitos de aseguramiento de la Calidad, establecidos por los diferentes Ministerios de Defensa de los países integrantes de la OTAN en el Diseño, Fabricacion, Mantenimiento, Suministro y Montaje de productos e instalaciones de Refrigeración y Climatización para el sector naval de defensa.

Name: sm electrics

BOOK YOUR SERVICE at turbo@trumarine.com

Name: Koninklijke de Vries Scheepsbouw te Aalsmeer
Description:
De Vries first opened its doors in 1906 and today is solely dedicated to custom-built superyachts. Client wishes are at the forefront of the process and the experienced after sales department ensure this relationship continues long after delivery. Some 300 highly skilled craftsmen launch an average of three superyachts per year, each up to 100m in length. Spread across five hectares the facilities include two dry docks and one slipway. In house disciplines include steel, aluminum, interior and exterior joinery, mechanical engineering and paintwork.

Feadship
Feadship is widely recognised as the world leader in custom built superyachts. Based in the Netherlands with roots dating back to 1849, Feadship is defined by unparalleled craftsmanship, setting the standard in every aspect of design, engineering and construction. Each bespoke superyacht is created in partnership with an owner who invests in a uniquely rewarding build experience.

Name: BERTHON
Description:
Berthon has been trading from our riverside site in Lymington since 1877. The Berthon Group is made up of three distinct areas - Yacht Sales and Brokerage, Berthon Marine Services and Boatyard, and Lymington Marina. 

Our Yacht Sales and Brokerage team is international, with offices in the UK, Scandinavia, Spain and the USA. They can be found here - https://www.linkedin.com/company/berthon-international/. 

Our Berthon Marine Services department and Boatyard has over 100 skilled tradesmen and a state of the art yard facility - covering all aspects of marine services to the commercial, government and private sectors. Including Boatbuilding, refits, marine engineering, in-services support, design modifications, new build programmes, yacht & boat maintenance, boat repairs, boat storage, marine electronic sales and installations, rigging services, valeting and paint spraying. Berthon also represents and supports all major brands and is a key equipment suppliers, from Outboard/Inboard engines and modular docking systems to navigation and communication suites.”

Berthon Lymington Marina offers 280 deep water berths for yachts up to 45m (150ft) LOA on the Lymington River in the West Solent. The Marina is just a short walk from Lymington High Street and on the doorstep of the New Forest National Park. We offer full marina facilities including shore power, fuel, free Wi-Fi, fresh water, ice, launderette and the legendary Berthon washrooms.

Name: Euro Marine Group
Description:
Euro Marine Group is an International Diversified Group of Marine Companies Specializing in Design, Engineering, New Build, Refit, Management, Sales and Brokerage, Charter, Fractional Ownership, and World-Wide Service of the World's Finest Yachts.

Euro Marine Group consists of a Yacht Design Studio; Engineering, Technology, and Analytics Divisions that specializes in Research, New Product Development, and Marine Engineering Solutions; OEM Shipyards for New Build and Yacht Refits in Multiple Locations; Yacht Management and Services Division; Marine Equipment Distribution; Yacht Crew Agency as well as Sales, Brokerage, Charter, and Fractional Ownership Divisions.

Euro Marine Group also Owns and Manages Several Unique Yacht Brands.

Name: Detroit S.A.
Description:
La Compañía fue constituida como sociedad comercial el 10 de septiembre de 1949, ante la Notaría de don Jorge Maira Castellón e inscrita en el Registro de Comercio de Santiago con el nombre de Jaras Limitada.

Comenzó sus actividades distribuyendo combustible y lubricantes hasta su nombramiento como representante para Chile de vehículos Vauxhall Bedford, de General Motors – Inglaterra. En 1960, la empresa es nombrada distribuidor de B.F. Goodrich Co., para la comercialización de neumáticos, línea que posteriormente fue dejada en 1976 a fin de dedicar todos los esfuerzos como representante exclusivo de Detroit Diesel Corporation y Allison Corp.

Las representaciones arriba mencionadas sumadas a otras adquiridas en los años siguientes (MTU y Donaldson) se mantiene vigentes hasta la fecha y representan el nucleo principal de la División Motores, prestando servicios de asistencia técnica y venta de repuestos dentro del ámbito industrial, especialmente en minería donde mantiene una activa participación.A partir de 1985, los actuales accionistas controladores, asumen la administración superior iniciando un período de consolidación y de expansión en los negocios de la sociedad.

En 1990 inicia la operación el astillero de Puerto Montt, en el cual se han construido mas de 100 embarcaciones de trabajo, dando también servicio de mantenimiento y reparación a embarcaciones a las industrias pesqueras, marina mercante, Armada de Chile y transbordadores y salmoneras que operan en la región de los canales.

En el año 2000, se inicia la prestación de servicios logísticos para la industria salmonera por lo que se realizan importantes inversiones especialmente centrada en la construcción de flota propia, adquisición y transformación de naves usadas, instalaciones portuarias, de almacenaje y oficinas, constituyéndose a lo largo de estos años en una importantes proveedor de servicios de transporte de alimento y peces vivos para la industria acuícola nacional.

A principios del 2001, la Compañía cambia su razón social a DETROIT CHILE S.A. y crea la nueva División de Turismo, bajo la cual se inicia la construcción del Hotel Loberías del Sur , el transporte de pasajeros en catamaranes de alta velocidad a la laguna San Rafael y el parque AIKEN del Sur en las orillas del lago Riesco, todo esto ubicado en la XI Región de Aysén,

En el primer semestre del 2002 y debido al potencial de desarrollo se decide adquirir las instalaciones de un astillero en la ciudad de Itajaí en el Estado de Santa Catarina en Brasil, creándose la filial Detroit Brasil Limitada, entregando las primeras unidades construidas en sus instalaciones en los primeros meses del 2003, constituyéndose al cabo de los años en un referente de la industria de construcción naval brasilera para el segmento de remolcadores y naves offshore.

En septiembre de 2007 las filiales Detroit Brasil Limitada y Naviera Detroit Chile S.A. constituyeron Starnav Serviços Marítimos Limitada, sociedad radicada en Brasil y que se dedica a prestar servicios marítimos especializados para la industria petrolera de ese país. A la fecha la Compañía presta servicio a Petróleos Brasileiros S.A. (Petrobras) con naves del tipo Line Handline (LH) y Plattaform Supply Vessel (PSV).

Name: Gibdock Ltd
Description:
Gibdock has a long standing reputation for providing the highest standard in shipyard services in one of the most convenient locations in Europe. Situated in the Strait of Gibraltar at the gateway between the Mediterranean and the Atlantic, Gibdock offers comprehensive repair, maintenance and conversion in its three dry docks and protected deep-water port. 

Gibdock’s commitment to professionalism and safety is certified by the standards we maintain in every area of the yard. With customer service and confidence in mind, the team at Gibdock is united by a shared professional spirit. Every aspect of the shipyard, from training to individual technical skills, quality control and safety is operated to meet the highest international standards.

The shipyard has 7,000m2 of covered workshops all comprehensively fitted out with machinery and craneage to handle a wide range of jobs from minor repairs to extensive conversion projects.

Name: Prop & Rudder
Description: Placing exceptional skilled trades professionals across the yachting, maritime, and shipbuilding industries. We help companies build, service, and operate with excellence.

Name: USP Maritime
Description:
USP Maritime provides commercially driven solutions throughout an asset's life cycle, from concept design through New build, ship repair and decommissioning, for a broad range of marine assets, including Defence, Super Yacht, Offshore and Commercial vessels.

USP Maritime’s reputation for excellence and high standards of delivery for a wide range of commercial services to the maritime engineering sector ensures peace of mind to our clients and project stakeholders.

Due to constantly evolving scopes of work, short deadlines and stringent quality and regulatory requirements, Marine Engineering projects benefit from the intelligent and viable commercial solutions that USP Maritime delivers in partnership with our clients.

Name: Shipyard Ferus Smit - Improvement as tradition
Description:
Welcome to Shipyard Ferus Smit! Our products are general cargo ships, bulkers, tankers and dedicated purpose vessels, sized up to approximately 30.000 deadweight tons.

Our company has been active in shipbuilding for over 100 years.
Its history is one about hard work and includes a good deal of rowing upstream if neccessary. This past reflects in what we are now. A solid family-owned company, focussing on long term continuity and relationships. Costantly in search for the smallest steps forward in improving its own processes and products. A lot of those steps over the years bring an important advantage in the end.

Our improvements are driven by knowledge and craftmanship. Therefore we keep both design & engineering and production of our ships for 100% in-house. Only then we can overview and control the complete chain, assuring quality as a standard for our clients. With our workforce of 200 people we build of 6 to 8 vessels anually. The company has two building sites: at Westerbroek, Groningen (also Offices), and Leer, Germany.

Name: Dynamic Group of Companies
Description:
Dynamic Group of Companies, established in 1989, is a leader in the maritime industry, specializing in advanced ship repair, maintenance, and shipbuilding. 

We proudly hold ISO 9001 for quality management, ISO 14001 for environmental management, and ISO 45001 for occupational health and safety. Additionally, our certifications by NACE, NATO, and Europe Navy Repairs, along with an NCAGE code, underscore our commitment to excellence and reliability.

Our mission is to provide high quality services through innovation, sustainability, and efficiency. We offer a range of services, from state-of-the-art ship repairs to the rejuvenation of heavy industry machinery and pioneering shipbuilding projects. 

Our values are transparency, innovation, and top-quality work. We prioritize open communication, embrace continuous technological advancements, and consistently deliver exceptional results, ensuring excellence and reliability in all our maritime services.

We cater to a broad spectrum of clients within the maritime industry, including shipping enterprises, shipyards, and major industry stakeholders.

Over the years, we have earned recognition for our contributions to the maritime field, receiving awards for innovation, service excellence, and sustainability. Our future outlook remains focused on innovation and expansion, exploring new technologies, forming strategic partnerships, and entering new markets.

Join us on our journey towards a more sustainable, efficient, and interconnected maritime community.

Name: West Atlantic Shipyard
Description:
West Atlantic Shipyard is a Subsidiary of the PIRIOU group formed in 2004 in Nigeria. To build support ships for the offshore oil and gas industry in accordance with the Nigerian Coastal and Inland Shipping Act and in keeping with the spirit of promoting “local content”.

To meet exponential repair demand and the demands of the shipbuilding order book, the shipyard’s workforce has grown to over 200 workers.

In line with the spirit of the PIRIOU group, the shipyard aims to be attuned to the needs of current and potential clients by playing the card of proximity to the operating zones, both in construction and in repair and of responsiveness, quality and global offer.

| Ship Repair & Refit | Mechanical Services | Electrical Services | Life Saving Appliances .

Name: Hamburgische Schiffbau-Versuchsanstalt GmbH - Hamburg Ship Model Basin (HSVA)
Description:
For a century, the private and independent Hamburg Ship Model Basin HSVA has been at the forefront of hydrodynamic research. HSVA has influenced and led developments of testing technology, methods, standardisation and numerical procedures to solve complex problems.

Today, HSVA is also a service and consulting company for industrial customers worldwide. Highly skilled staff is trained to interact with customers to optimise products and procedures quickly with high precision. HSVA skills are acknowledged in other areas as well such as the aircraft industry. Its leading role in national and international research programs makes HSVA a most competent partner in science and services around the field of hydrodynamics and related areas.

You would appreciate our accreditation to ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, and ISO 45001:2018. Quality workmanship and timely turnaround at a competitive price are the essences of our contracts. Name: Yonca Shipyard
Description:
n 1986, when we founded our shipyard to design and build fast boats in advanced composites, our dream was to become a world leader in our field. The indications were not favorable that such an ambitious undertaking would succeed. But the few hand-made boats that we created with such pride and pleasure left us free to build boats just the way we wanted them. Today, we are happy to see that we have customers who share our ideals. 
Today, Yonca Shipyard is an industrial-scale enterprise with a modern shipyard capable of serial production of state-of-the-art pleasure, commercial and naval craft. We are proud that, with a highly specialized dedicated workforce capable of creating our own concepts, developing our own technology and building to perfection, 
Our struggle continues in research and development of new technologies, in order to hold the leading position won by imaginative application of our skills and technical resources. This will ensure that, now and in the future, we will continue to fulfill our customer's requirements and keep our commitments.

Yours sincerely,
 
Şakir A. Yılmaztürk,
Chairman

Name: GYG Ltd
Description:
GYG is a global market leading superyacht painting, service and supply company, offering services throughout the Mediterranean, Northern Europe and the USA. The Group primarily trades under the Pinmar, Pinmar Yacht Supply and Technocraft brands, see our affiliated pages for more information.

With over 70 years’ collective experience in the superyacht industry and a highly-skilled workforce, GYG is a leading provider to the world’s superyacht fleet – including many of the largest ever built.  

GYG is consistently at the forefront of new technology and continuously investing to improve efficiency, creativity and innovation – all backed up by strict quality control and the very best in after sales service.

With a headquarters in Palma de Mallorca and offices in Barcelona, France, Germany, Holland, the UK and the USA (namely Fort Lauderdale, West Palm Beach, Florida and Savannah, Georgia), the Group has broad international service capability – no matter the size or location of the project.

Name: Bennington Pontoon Boats
Description:
It began in 1997. A small group of industry veterans, long on ambition and short on patience, embarked on building boats that could only be called The Best. The kind of people who believed that when you do the right thing, everything else falls into place. Their vision and values are at the core of our brand today and are embodied in each and every boat we build. 

What Makes A Bennington?
Each and every Bennington is designed, engineered, and meticulously hand-built with the same level of attention. From our entry-level S Series to our flagship QX models, every boat is crafted using the highest quality materials. Whether choosing an ultra-premium vinyl, using stainless steel hardware or scrutinizing the selection of the raw materials – Every Detail Matters!

Not only do we believe in building the highest quality boat in the industry, but we also back it with the industry’s strongest warranty. With a lifetime structural and decking warranty and an additional 10-year bow-to-stern warranty, your new Bennington will provide many years of carefree enjoyment.

We want true sea lovers to free their emotions. We want them to get ready to see never-seen places, hear never-heard sounds, or simply follow the blueness of the waves. Passion will lead the way.

Name: R&M Group
Description:
The R&M Group is an internationally operating organization with a unique and extensive portfolio for ship interior and outfitting, from single components to turnkey solutions (steel-to-steel/visual). Founded in 1887, we stay for perfection aa well as reliability and thanks to our many years of experience we have established ourselves as well-known experts in the maritime industry. We have a large network of shipyards, ship owners, operators and architects, and realize projects aboard all types of ships, such as cruisers and river cruisers, ferries, expedition ships and mega yachts, as well as all areas of the ship, whether passenger, crew, public or utility.

We offer our customers products from our own production facilities, comprehensive services and solutions, covering the entire value chain. From engineering and consulting to project management and installation in the context of a new building or repair and maintenance services of ships in service. This includes the design and installation of thermal and acoustic insulation as well as heating, air conditioning and ventilation systems (HVAC) and the production of modular interior systems such as walls, floors, ceilings, doors, wet rooms, prefabricated cabins and furniture, standard or tailor-made designer pieces.

Certified according to the valid standard (DIN ES ISO 9001: 2015), we always meet the very high demands of the maritime industry and attach great importance to the highest precision, high quality and longevity of our work. As a long-standing supplier, we are very familiar with the processes at a shipyard and know what is important. Our customers value our expertise in combination with our flexibility. We know that every ship is different and requires individual project planning. Tight schedules and complex tasks are challenges we gladly accept and master at any time.

Name: Chantier Naval Forillon
Description:
FIABILITÉ, PERFORMANCE ET SÉCURITÉ
Notre chantier naval est plus qu’une fabrique maritime. C’est un endroit où se construisent des bateaux de grande qualité et des relations fortes. Nous fabriquons des bateaux allant jusqu’à 800 tonnes avec la plus grande rigueur : bateaux de pêche, barges, remorqueurs, traversiers et bateaux de service. Fiabilité, performance et sécurité sont les mots d’ordre de toute l’équipe, qui est fière de vous livrer des navires qui dépassent les standards de l’industrie maritime.

CRÉER LA NOUVELLE NORME
Tous nos bateaux sont construits avec l’incroyable créativité de notre équipe et sont dotés des meilleures technologies! Nous voyons l’innovation comme la combinaison de ce qui se fait de mieux dans notre domaine et ailleurs. Nous transférons les méthodes efficaces et audacieuses d’autres secteurs d’activité et développons des façons de faire inédites. Toujours d’avant-garde, nos bateaux pourraient créer une norme d’ici quelques années. Nous y travaillons fort!

EXPERTS DEPUIS 1952
Notre équipe est composée de gens engagés de tous âges (de véritables piliers encyclopédiques et de jeunes fougueux). Chacun est un expert dans son domaine. Chacun participe sur le terrain ou au bureau à perpétuer l’histoire de professionnalisme de l’entreprise qui a déjà plus de 70 ans. L’expérience et l’expertise vont l’une avec l’autre au Chantier Naval Forillon!

DANS LA TRANSPARENCE ET LE RESPECT
L’équipe de Chantier Naval Forillon vise toujours à se dépasser. Sur le plan de la construction de bateaux comme sur celui du service à la clientèle, elle rivalise d’ingéniosité et d’initiative. Nous offrons des solutions clés en main dans le respect des échéanciers et dans une relation de confiance réciproque. Nos clients sont au courant des étapes de construction de leur navire et sont les bienvenus au chantier pour voir l’avancement de leur projet. Nous prenons soin des bateaux, des gens et de la convivialité des échanges.

Name: Mumbai Port Trust
Description:
Mumbai Port Trust (also known as the Bombay Port Trust) is a port which lies midway on the West coast of India, on the natural deep-water harbour of Mumbai (Bombay) in Maharashtra. The harbour spread over 400 square kilometres (150 sq mi) is protected by the mainland of Konkan to its east and north and by the island city of Mumbai to its west. The harbour opens to the south to the Arabian Sea.

The port is administered by the Mumbai Port Trust (MbPT, formerly the Bombay Port Trust (BPT)), an autonomous corporation wholly owned by the Government of India. The port is primarily used for bulk cargo, while most container traffic is directed to Nhava Sheva port across the harbour.

Name: KRM Yacht Refit & Rebuild
Description:
KRM Yacht Refit & Rebuild is Türkiye’s first and leading professional facility exclusively dedicated to the refit and rebuild of superyachts. Established in 2010, the company has developed a strong reputation for delivering high- quality services tailored to the specific needs of superyacht owners. With over 15 years of experience and more than 200 successfully delivered projects, KRM Yacht is recognized for its reliability, innovation, and commitment to excellence in the global superyacht refit sector.

KRM Yacht operates in Tuzla, Istanbul—one of the world’s premier maritime hubs—offering fast and efficient service thanks to its proximity to top suppliers, subcontractors, and authorized services. The company’s team of over 100 professionals, including project managers, engineers, naval architects, and skilled craftsmen, ensures that every project is completed to the highest standards. Conveniently located just 15 minutes from Sabiha Gökçen International Airport, the Tuzla-based facility is surrounded by restaurants, hotels, shopping malls, and other amenities, providing easy access and acomfortable environment for captains and crew during refit projects.

KRM Yacht is the sole member of the prestigious ICOMIA Superyacht Refit Group in Türkiye, aligning itself with the world’s top refit and repair yards. Furthermore, KRM Yacht is the only facility in Türkiye with all three major ISO certifications—ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001—in the fields of refit, repair, and maintenance, awarded by LRQA, demonstrating its commitment to quality, safety, and environmental responsibility.
KRM Yacht’s state-of-the-art facility in Tuzla, Istanbul, offers tax-free services for foreign-flagged vessels, making it an ideal choice for international clients. The facility is equipped with:

– 900-ton travel lift
– 300-ton travel lift
– 40,000 m² hard-standing area, accommodating up to 50 vessels
– 2500 m² workshop area and 800 m² storage space
– Repair quays for up to 15 superyachts.

Name: Nam Cheong
Description:
Nam Cheong is a leading global offshore marine group specialising in the construction and supply of offshore support vessels used in the offshore oil and gas exploration and production and oil services industries.

Having been building vessels for nearly half a century, and delivered more than 100 vessels since 2007, we are able to strategically envisage and identify the most appropriate vessels to construct for our prospective customers, before they needs them. Our expertise in doing this has enable us to reduce valuable delivery lead time for our customers and as a result has helped our customers to increase their competitiveness.

Our customers, who recognised us as a winning partner, consist primarily of ship owners and marine services operators that provide logistics support, offshore construction and field operation services to companies operating in the offshore oil and gas support industry in South East Asia, Middle East, Latin America and West Africa.

Headquartered in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia and listed on the Singapore Exchange, Nam Cheong’s expertise in constructing OSVs and strong track record have earned us recognition globally.

Below are some of our most recent awards and accolades:

Best Investor Relations Award 2016 - Silver

Best Managed Board Award 2014 – Bronze

Most Transparent Company Award 2014 – Runner up

Name: Tuzla Gemi Endustrisi A.S.
Description:
Gemak Group is proud of being in service to over 2000 ship owners and managers. With its experienced and committed workforce and management, modern facilities, and excellent track record, Gemak Group continues to be the leading Ship Repair and Ship Building group in Turkey. Gemak Group consists of Gemak Tuzla Shipyard (established in 1969), Gemak TGE Shipyard (acquired in 2000), Gemak Neta Steel & Pipe Fabrication Yard (established in 2008) and Gemak Altinova Yard (established in 2013) and continues to provide services for dry-docking, ship repair & conversion, offshore - oil&gas and new ship building as the most competitive shipyard in the Mediterranean. The Group strives to bring benefit to its clients by combining strengths generated by involvement in these main activites.

Gemak Group even thrived more by a significant involvement in massive steel construction activities, started by building steel shafts for Izmit Bay Bridge and continued by landing prestigious contract for fabrication of steel decks for 3rd Bosphorus Bridge. While executing these projects, Gemak has upgraded existing and also developed new facilities and technology that has profiled the Group as a leading fabricator of high quality large steel constructions in the wider region.

In line with Gemak Group's diversification strategy, Group is also providing its services for Offshore and Onshore Construction works and has already completed significant number of modification and repair projects of Offshore vessels and rigs. Group will continue to take an increasing role in construction of Offshore Platforms and Vessels, Topsides, Modules and Jackets in very close future.

Name: Reinstate Sunderland Shipbuilding
Description:
The Pallion Shipyard in Sunderland, UK is the country's largest fully undercover shipyard. Built in 1976, closed in 1989 and mothballed to this day, it is an asset that is little known to the world. 

With the shortage of capacity in the UK and the wider world and to help realise the UK Government's National Shipbuilding Strategy, we are asking the Government to compulsory purchase this shipyard and work with a new operator to reinstate this strategic national asset.

Name: FN Diving Rotterdam and Algeciras 24/7 Underwater Ship Repair Maintenance and Inspection
Description:
FN Diving Rotterdam Holland and Algeciras Spain perform underwater in situ, ship repair maintenance and inspection reducing and avoiding off-hire time on commercial vessels World Wide. 

FN Diving reacts quickly and deploys necessary equipment on customers demand within 24 hrs worldwide.

Furthermore FN Diving is recognized by all major classification societies for in-water survey and repair. 

FN Diving its main office is based in Rotterdam, and reachable 24/7 year round.

www.fndiving.com

Our Worldwide Headquarters is based in Rotterdam Port, and reachable 24/7 year round.

Underwater maintenance, repair and inspection operations are carried out without any interference with the vessel’s sailing schedule and during cargo operations.
Underwater Ship Repair

Underwater Welding
Underwater Cutting
Hull Insert Plate Repairs
In-water removal and installation of propellers
Underwater Transducer replacement and repair
Blank off sea chests (suctions and discharges, etc.) to facilitate repairs inside vessel
Replacing echo sounders and speedlogs
Replacing ICCP and Cathodic protection Shields
Bow thruster repair and replacement
Repair of ballast tanks
Complete hull surveys, including still and video color photography documentation.
Complete running gear inspection, including struts, fairwaters, rope guards, propellers, 
Underwater inspections on rudders and bearings.
Special inspections at request of ship owners/ representative, classification inspectors,        surveyors and insurers.
dry-dock extension inspections in compliance with all major classification societies
Pre-purchase, pre/post charter surveys.
Pre and Post dry dock inspections.
Damage assessment inspections.
Hull coating inspections.
Bottom survey at berths or anchorages to locate and remove obstructions hazardous to vessels.
Underwater paint/epoxy/coating inspection and application.
Propeller polish
Underwater hull cleaning
Blank off sea inlets and overboard discharges

Name: ShipConstructor Software - SPI
Description:
ShipConstructor Software Solutions- (SPI) Strategic Partner International - A Strategic Partner of SSI Canada, an international company providing Autodesk based software solutions to the shipbuilding and offshore industry. SPI ShipConstructor Software focuses on sales, support, training, and implementation for Middle Eastern and Indian users of SSI’s ShipConstructor and EnterprisePlatform PLM software. SPI ShipConstructor Software is headquartered in Singapore and Dubai, the heart of the MENA and Southeast Asia shipbuilding region and staff members have extensive knowledge of engineering and design software.
SSI ShipConstructor, an Autodesk based Shipbuilding & Offshore Software.
ShipConstructor software, an AutoCAD based CAD/CAM product line; and Enterprise Platform, a tool for sharing product data model information.

Name: KM Yachtbuilders
Description:
In 1999, KM Yachtbuilders acquired a yard with 30 years experience of building aluminum yachts. This valuable experience combined with the fresh air that Eeuwe Kooi, the new owner, brought with him, has made KM Yachtbuilders a young and innovative business. 

KM Yachtbuilders specializes in the building and finishing of aluminum custom-built sailing yachts. We also supply aluminum hulls for sailing and motor yachts up to thirty metres length. KM Yachtbuilders also build and maintain aluminium structures for onshore and offshore equipment. We built aluminium parts for Royal Huisman Shipyard and De Vries Feadship. 

This market segment requires high quality standards. Our shipbuilders, carpenters and marine engineers have proved time and again that they can deliver the goods. 

Our modern yard is located in the village of Makkum at the IJsselmeer. You can even reach us by boat! You are cordially invited to come and visit the yard. We would be more than happy to show you around.

Name: PT. Caputra Mitra Sejati
Description:
PT. CAPUTRA MITRA SEJATI - SHIPYARD & SHIPBUILDER

Established in 1971, as a general  contractor company. Started with services in Civil and Mechanical engineering,  followed  by Shipbuilder  in  1990  and  published in 2000. The Shipyard is located in Merak – Serang, province of Banten, with the company expertise in naval architecture to all aspect of marine operations, primarily design and modification of all types of ship. PT. Caputra Mitra Sejati represents reputed Shipyards for Docking repairs of all types of Vessels. PT. Caputra Mitra Sejati become a highly qualified and reliable Shipbuilding company and be able to compete in the domestic and regional market.

Therefore, PT. CAPUTRA MITRA SEJATI ready to fulfill the needs new ship in Indonesia with our concern on excellent quality, competitiveness cost, and reliable delivery time.

Name: ASIS Boats
Description:
Asis Boats has been leading the ribs industry and saving lives at sea since 2005. Asis has the privilege of working with more than 80 countries, 50+ government agencies, organizations, and private companies worldwide, such as the NEOM, the US Navy, the UAE Armed Forces, the Brazilian Armed Forces, and many others.											
											
World-class uniqueness 											
Asis showcases innovation, durable construction, advanced technology, and rigorous testing on all its boats. As leaders in the boat industry, we are proud of our expertise in customization, outstanding service, industry leadership, continuous improvement, global presence, and recognition. 											
											
Let's work together:											
Join us in shaping the future of maritime innovation. Let's meticulously craft a vessel that aligns with your exact specifications and intended purpose, ensuring durability and excellence.

Name: Arcadia Yachts
Description:
With ARCADIA YACHTS, sailing revolves around man, who rediscovers a more natural harmony with the sea, constantly unveiling new horizons in eternal awe. The yachts’ large spaces and the windows create living environments where you can immerse yourself in nature, which is exalted and protected by technology.

Arcadia Yachts lies in places brimming with love for hospitality and culture. Most importantly, Pompeii, where the ancient Roman nobles had their summer residences and from where the Emperors set sail for their villas on Capri. Stylish taste and the delight of enjoying time together still live on today in ARCADIA, which continues telling the timeless love story for the sea.

Drawing inspiration from consolidated technologies, ARCADIA designs yachts that are synonymous with innovation and excellence, placing man at centre stage: life’s pleasures accompany the Yacht owner on board, in seamless spaces where you can rediscover real contact with nature. Respecting the natural heritage is a fundamental value for ARCADIA: that is why the Yachting Renaissance focuses on man and aims to encourage ethical behaviour. Thanks to the hull forms made in-house, delightful sailing in an ARCADIA YACHT is 15 to 40% more efficient in terms of consumption than yachts of the major competitors. This saves the Yacht owner a considerable amount of money and the benefit for the marine environment is priceless.

ARCADIA yachts offer stunning scenery you can simply gaze at for hours. The design is in fact studied to allow the experience of multisensorial contact with the external environment, to welcome guests with the smells and sounds of the sea and to sail in total energy efficiency, with minimal use of air conditioning, low consumption rates and soundproofing. ARCADIA’s continuous quest for perfection and its collaboration with leading partners has increased solar panel output by more than 30%.

Name: Rondal
Description:
At Rondal, we live by our core values: reliable, confident, experienced, committed, and adventurous. These values drive us to create top-notch sailing systems and components for the world's most incredible superyachts.

Our team includes over 70 skilled craftsmen and apprentices who are dedicated to maintaining our tradition of excellence while also exploring new frontiers in superyacht composite technology.

Rondal was founded by Royal Huisman Shipyard and continues to work closely with them, as well as building strong relationships with other leading boat builders around the world.

Name: STX Finland
Description: STX Finland Oy has three shipyards in Finland: Turku Shipyard, Rauma Shipyard and Arctech Helsinki Shipyard Oy, of which STX Finland Oy owns 50 percent. The Turku Shipyard is the experienced builder of  cruise ships and other technically demanding specialized ships and offshore units. The Rauma Shipyard is known for ferries, research vessels, naval ships and multipurpose vessels. The shipyard in Helsinki is specialized in ice-breaking and ice-going offshore and arctic vessels.

Name: Iguana Yachts
Description:
Iguana Yachts, an innovative French company who build luxury boats with a powerful landing gear that can conquer virtually any terrain. Combined with a modern design and luxurious comfort the range is the perfect yacht tender, waterfront property boat, day cruiser and all round explorer. 

Iguana Yachts brings boating to a level of innovation that has never been seen in the industry.

Name: Sefine Shipyard - New Building
Description: Founded in 2005 and occupying over 140.000 m2 of land for newbuilding, repair-maintenance and conversion, Sefine Shipyard is one of the leading establishments in Yalova region with over 4000 yardemployees including subcontractor personnel.

Name: MAURIC
Description:
MAURIC is a french private company which core business is to carry out any studies, ranging from concept to detailed design, research and expertise, technical assistance to ship owners and shipyards, in naval architecture and marine engineering, civilian or military.


Our main qualities are :
 - the creation of lines of products, in order to be able to answer quickly to  our customer's requirements,
 - the capacity to develop specific ships, to answer specific and complex requirements,
 - the capability to develop innovation and to design new ships with fresh and news ideas including the last up to date technologies,
 - the participation in collaborative National or EU R&D programs, to promote comfort safety, efficiency or environment care,
 - the consulting and expert activities for ship owners or any customer in technical assistance or ship survey.


We have many references for civil as well as military ships. These boats represent more than 300 ships or crafts from 10 to 75 meters, built since the creation of the company.

Some of them highly contributed to our company's reputation and expertise : Capitain Cousteau' Alcyone, Acajou motor yatch, Eric Tabarly' Pen Duick VI or patrol crafts for French Coastguards.

Name: ORC Catamarans
Description:
ORC is a company based out of Lorient, Brittany, France.
Thanks to our strong experience in moulding and building of CFRP parts, we developed and commercialize a line of semi-custom catamarans, missing link between racing multihulls and cruising cats : the ORC42, ORC50 (both on a Crhistophe Barreau design), and the ORC57 (on a Marc Lombard Yacht Design).
Both show top results in semi-pro offshore races kink the ARC, the Rollex Fastnet, Carribean 600, Voiles de Saint Barth, Trophée du Multicoque, ... An ORC42 and an ORC50 engaged for the first time (and finished) the 2018 Route du Rhum. Both models won the last two ARC.
The first ORC57 wa launched in march 2022 and bring a whole new dimension to our model line.

These fast cruisers are the logical follow-up of the various racing multihulls built in the 2000s by the yard, like IDEC II, Prince de Bretagne, or Paradox.

But further to being incredibly fast and providing unique sailing sensation, they are comfortable cruisers, meant to sail - fast -  across the oceans, in any place, any time, by any weather.

They are perfect support for True Sailing Adventures.

Aside of these fast cruisers, we continue to offer infusion CFRP parts and one-offs building, mainly for the naval industry and private customers, ground to our expertise and at the origin the company success.

Name: Hellenic Shipyards S.A
Description:
Hellenic Shipyards S.A. was the largest shipyard in the area of the eastern Mediterranean from the mid 1950s to the end of 2022. During its operation, it stood worldwide for its outstanding know-how and experience in building and repairing naval and commercial ships. It also carried out major new building projects for the Hellenic Navy such as the MEKO frigates and the Class 214 submarines, which are to this day the backbone of the Hellenic Navy's Fleet.

In April 2018, Hellenic Shipyards S.A. was placed under special administration and the company stopped operating altogether  in January 2023, when the entire staff was dismissed and all activity in the yard stopped. 

It has since been replaced by a different business entity with a new corporate name, operating under a new owner and with different limited staff.

Name: MAGNA MARE - Consulting & Trading
Description:
Trusted By Maritime Industry Leaders To Deliver Innovative Business Development Strategies & Turn Key  Engineering Solutions.

Proudly connecting world-class manufacturers with shipyards, shipowners, and operators across the maritime industry.

Our mission goes beyond supply — it’s about building strong partnerships, supporting our customers, and championing the excellence that drives the global maritime industry forward.

Name: PT Batamec
Description: Shipbuilding and Repair with Syncrolift Facilities

Name: D3 Marine Services
Description: We are amongst the noted luxury yacht service providers in the country and building our way up to get recognized internationally. Being passionate about yacht operation we take pleasure in the opportunities our clients bring to demonstrate how we can meet their sophisticated and often complex challenges and satisfy their pursuit for excellence. Each work that we commit to, we try and excel to set a new benchmark in the marine industry. Our team has exceptional experience in the industry and for many years working with Azimut, Benetti, Princess, Sunseeker, Riviera, Hatteras, and more. Our amazing team has been together for the past six years.

Name: SYNERGY SHIPBUILDERS N Dock Works Ltd
Description:
Synergy ship builders have experienced tremendous growth in our shipbuilding facilities and our ships that are built are very well received by the customers. Today, Siddarth Engineering and Shipbuilding Co. Pvt. Ltd is one of the Prominent Shipbuilders in Goa with the maximum carrying capacity.Synergy Shipbuilders started of as Siddarth Engineering & Shipbuilding Pvt. Ltd. in the year 1988. The company was established by Mr. Shriram Malik, to build and maintain the companies personal fleet of various Inland vessels. In the year 1996 the company build its first vessel for a domestic client.

 

Since 1996 the company has experienced tremendous growth in our shipbuilding division and our ships that are built are very well received by the customers. Today, Synergy Shipbuilders is one of the Prominent Shipbuilders in Goa-India.

Name: Atilgan Shipping Trading Company Ltd.
Description:
With the experience of 20 years on Marine Industry; Atilgan Shipping is providing consultancy services to ship owners on Technical Management, Ship repairing, Ship Surveys and Trouble Shootings, etc.  Dry Dock Service
-NB Site Team Arrangement
-Repair Prj. Site Supervision
-Voyage Afloat Repair
-Vessel Pre-Purchase Inspection/Condition Survey
-Ballast Water Treatment Equipment Sales, Installation, After-Sales Service
-Exhaust Gas Cleaning System Equipment Sales, Installation, After Sales Service 
-3D Scanning & Design
-Trouble Shooting Service

Name: Master Boat Builders, Inc.
Description: Master Boat Builders, Inc. opened in 1979 with a vision to build quality boats for quality minded customers. After all these years that tradition of quality continues. We specialize in work boats, with an emphasis on WORK. Our boats are built to last and when they are delivered to our customers, they are ready for the high seas.

Name: Nichols Brothers Boat Builders
Description:
Nichols Brothers Boat Builders is the Northwest's premiere custom boat builder specializing in steel and aluminum vessel construction, repair and major conversions for all vessel types ranging from 70' to 380' in length. Established in 1964; NBBB offers 55+ years' experience building one-off custom vessels and multiple vessel sister-ships for both the commercial and private operation sectors. NBBB's portfolio demonstrates the diversity of vessels built within the shipyard, from fishing vessels, landing craft, research vessels, pilot boats, fire boats, barges and tugs; to, high-speed catamaran passenger ferries, tour boats, dinner boats, car ferries, yachts, and overnight cruise boats. NBBB works closely with the Owner and design firm to plan and execute vessel construction seamlessly. 

A factor of NBBB's huge success are our employees. With over 20% of our workforce serving their life careers at NBBB of over 20-years, has allowed us to continue to train and invest in the next generation of shipbuilders. Our mentors are educating up-coming shipbuilders through our Washington State certified apprenticeship program so NBBB's trade-force continues to remain strong for years to come. 

www.nicholsboats.com

Name: Hellenika LLC. - Ship Repairs and Maintenance
Description:
Hellenika LLC. – Ship Repair & Maintenance Since 1998

Headquartered in Bulgaria, with dry dock facilities in Varna and Burgas, Hellenika LLC. delivers expert ship repair, dry dock services, and maritime maintenance solutions to clients worldwide.

For over 27 years, we’ve supported shipowners, fleet managers, and port operators with ISO-certified solutions, including 24/7 mobile repair teams for emergency and voyage repairs — both in port and at sea, wherever your vessels operate.

 Core Services
• Dry dock & afloat repair
• Steelwork, certified welding & pipe fabrication
• Main & auxiliary engine overhauls
• Turbocharger, thruster & cargo system servicing
• Surface preparation: cleaning, blasting & coating
• Electrical & automation repairs
• BWTS (Ballast Water Treatment System) installation
• Marine equipment & spare parts supply

 Why Choose Hellenika LLC.
 24/7 global mobile repair teams
 ISO 9001 / 14001 / 45001 – Bureau Veritas certified
 10,000 m² modern fabrication workshops
 IMO & Class-compliant procedures
 Transparent pricing & competitive turnaround times

 Serving vessels at all major global ports
 Email: yard@hellenika-bg.com
 Website: www.hellenika-bg.com

#ShipRepair #DryDock #BlackSeaShipping #MaritimeServices #MaritimeMaintenance #MarineEngineering #BWTS #EmergencyRepairs #HellenikaLLC

Name: Den Breejen Shipyard
Description: Through years of experience and embracing innovative developments, Den Breejen Shipyard has become an internationally operating shipyard, with focus on customers, on sustainability and quality.

Name: De Haas Maassluis B.V. (Shipyard)
Description:
Shipyard De Haas Maassluis specializes in the construction of new vessels as well as the complete maintenance, repairs and renovation of patrol vessels, crew tenders, wind farm vessels, SAR vessels, and other specialised professional vessels.

Well-trained specialists at De Haas Maassluis deliver top quality craftsmanship that meets your requirements. The shipyard has the know-how, experience and excellent facilities to perform maintenance and repairs efficiently and to build vessels that comply with the latest requirements in the fields of environment and sustainability. 

Within the renewable energy market innovation is of paramount importance. De Haas Maassluis has specialised in hybrid and full electric propulsion technologies. By applying the best and latest techniques and materials, we ensure that the vessels we build for our clients are extremely reliable and offer maximum deployment possibilities. Whatever your requirements are, we will guarantee a perfect sailing solution.

Founded in 1879 and situated in the heart of the in the Europort area De Haas Maassluis provides 24/7 services with a focus to the North-West European market. 

At 100 nautical miles from London Array, 75 miles from Den Helder and  200 miles from Gemini wind park we are Closer than you think!

Name: Dar es Salaam Merchant Group (DMG)
Description:
TRADING
-DMG is involved in trading of different items under our “NURU” brand. Currently we supply Instant Coffee Mix under the brand name “NURU Coffee Chapchap”, a refreshment with a balanced mix of Coffee, Sugar and Milk giving a mild Coffee taste favorable by all age groups. Our immediate plan is to introduce other products under “NURU” Brand.

PROJECT MANAGEMENT
-DMG is involved in project management especially in the fields that we operate such as ship building and repair, fisheries, food storage and processing.

CONSULTING
-Through our business consulting department, we have in-house experts who are conversant with the business fields that we are involved. In some high technical areas, we collaborate with our technical partners especially from Korea to offer high quality work to our customers.

Name: Lita Ocean
Description:
Lita Ocean was established in the 1970s and has since become one of the leading shipping companies in Singapore providing a diverse range of marine and shipyard services.

Our well-equipped waterfront yard, a fleet of more than 40 various types of vessels and an experienced workforce have served various governmental organizations, port authorities, international oil majors, offshore oil and gas companies, marine engineering and marine service providers.

Our business encompasses the following areas:
•	Owners and operators of tugs, barges, ferries, landing crafts and 
 floating cranes
•	Shipbuilding, repair and fabrication works
•	Ship operators and agents
•	Specialist handling of Class 1 explosive cargo and ammunition
•	Tank cleaning, gas freeing and hydro/grit blasting
•	Oil Spill Response and Deployment
•	Marine consultant services

We have a fleet of more than 50 various types of vessels available for charter for a diverse range of applications. They include Ro-Ro vessels, landing crafts, floating cranes, tugs, barges, launches, ferries, pilot boats, mooring boats and multipurpose work boats. Our marine services are ISO 9001: 2015 certified.

The business model of builder-owner-operator has provided us with many benefits that are passed on to our clients. Our knowledge gained from operating our own vessels gives us the edge to build boats that are practical, capable, contemporary Design & Comfort and cost-efficient in operations. Our control and emphasis on quality ensure that vessels leaving our yard are in top notch condition.  

Our reputation in this field is widely known for our 'Safe' and 'Efficient' operation models. We have achieved numerous awards and recognition over the years from the governmental and private organisations. 

Lita Ocean is strongly committed to serve and willing to go extra miles to gain client's satisfaction. In more coming years, we will continue to deliver our promise to carry out 'Safe & Sound' environment for all.

Name: Clúster Marítimo Naval de Cádiz
Description:
El Clúster Marítimo Naval de Cádiz es una asociación empresarial sin ánimo de lucro que desde 2015 trabaja en la defensa de los intereses de la industria naval andaluza.

Su objetivo es promover, impulsar, dinamizar y desarrollar el sector marítimo naval de Andalucía, desde las líneas estratégicas de innovación, internacionalización y diversificación, formación y capacitación y sostenibilidad.

Name: Asto Shipyard
Description: Asto Shipyard is gespecialiseerd in scheepsbouw, reparatie en onderhoud. Innovatie, Brabantse gastvrijheid en vakmanschap onder een één dak.

Name: Ship Design Group
Description:
SHIP DESIGN GROUP (SDG) is a company of naval architects, marine engineers and consultants.
SDG is offering a complete set of design and consultancy services, starting with the earlier design stages up to production information.
The company is able to supervise the ship during construction and to offer turn-key project solutions.
The core activity is represented by offshore support ships (Tugs, AHTS, Supply Vessels, Pipe Layers, etc.).
SHIP DESIGN GROUP Head Office is located in Romania. In 2011 a branch of the company was established in Aberdeen under the name of SHIP DESIGN UK.

Name: Padmos Shipyard
Description:
The Padmos Shipyard was created in 1930 and developed into the yard it is in 89 years. What started as an engine repair business has grown into a well-recognized name in the world of shipbuilding, with experience on all types of vessels: fishing, tugboats, workboats, as well as design, engineering and manufacturing of several types of winches. And besides, thanks to our partnership with Mitsubishi engine we are able to deliver you the engines you need. Located on three different places (Stellendam, Bruinisse (NL) and Kilmore Quay (IRL), we are able to offer an excellent service for construction, maintenance, renovation or conversion of your vessel.
For a few years now, Padmos has built several new ships with new design more environmental-friendly, like MDV-1 Immanuel (Ship of the Year 2015), a multi-purposed fishing boat, was the first step to this new logic. Five 19m vessels for Boulogne, two 22m vessels for Lorient whose the Marie-Lou and two new 30m vessels for Urk (NL). Key point in the development and construction of the new vessels is reduction of the fuel consumption. Four new vessels of 25m, one 16m scallop beamer and two 38m beamtrawlers will be delivered before the end of 2020.
Padmos keeps you fishing.

Name: Nuova Benyacht
Description:
For over 30 years, Nuova Benyacht has been a trusted provider of bespoke stainless steel, aluminium, and carbon fiber components for the superyacht industry. 

Based in Viareggio, we collaborate with leading Italian and European shipyards on the construction of yachts ranging from 24 to over 100+ meters. 

Our skilled team of craftsmen and engineers is committed to delivering high-quality, precision-made components, all with a focus on meticulous detail. With innovation at the core of our approach, we continuously provide cutting-edge solutions that enhance the craftsmanship and performance of every yacht we work on.

The company is divided into three specialised divisions, focusing on the engineering, production, and installation of:
Deck Steel Components: railings, flagpoles, aerial ladders, bollards, fairleads and more.
Carbon Fibre Products: sun awning system, swim ladders, stanchions, flagpoles and fender.
Custom Furniture: bar stools, chairs, tables, and more.

Each division brings quality craftsmanship and elegance to enhance every yacht.

Nuova Benyacht is partner of Confindustria Nautica.

Name: Astillero Andesa
Description: Somos uno de los principales astilleros del Perú, ubicado estratégicamente en la bahía de Caleta Tierra Colorada en el puerto de Paita, Piura. Gozamos de un clima cálido y seco, además de un mar calmo y profundo que brinda condiciones óptimas para el varado y desvarado de las embarcaciones. Dicho ambiente nos permite operar, sin interrupciones, los 365 días del año.

Name: Holland Yachting Group
Description:
The Dutch Superyacht Industry

Delivers the highest-quality superyachts featuring unique designs, which rank in the top 3 worldwide. The Holland Yachting Group represents this industry consisting of superyacht builders, design companies, system integrators, construction specialists, architects and marine equipment suppliers.

It’s our mission to strengthen the competitive position of the Dutch yachting industry in the global market and to foster international trade. We actively unite market leaders based in the Netherlands who excel in building world-class superyachts and have done so for over five decades.

Name: Chantier Naval Dubourdieu
Description:
Dubourdieu est un chantier naval artisanal situé sur le Bassin d’Arcachon. C’est le plus ancien chantier naval français en activité et sans interruption depuis sa création en 1800.

Succédant à 6 générations de Dubourdieu, Béatrice Martin et son époux Emmanuel ont repris le chantier naval en septembre 2000, succédant au dernier propriétaire Jean-Pierre Dubourdieu, afin de perpétuer le patrimoine et le savoir-faire de l’entreprise, tout en alliant tradition et modernité dans la conception des bateaux, construits à l’unité et sur-mesure dans les règles de l’art.

Labellisé EPV (Entreprise du Patrimoine Vivant) en 2011 et membre de la marque BA, le chantier naval continue de créer des modèles de bateaux prestigieux comme le célèbre Picnic Sport White Ocean en partenariat avec la maison de couture Courrèges ou encore la fabrication du superbe Picnic Open 10M.

Au-delà de la construction, Dubourdieu propose des services de maintenance et d’hivernage mais également la location de ses bateaux, été comme hiver,  permettant de vivre un moment d’exception sur le Bassin D’Arcachon, pour des événements privés ou professionnels.

Name: Acico Yachts - The Netherlands
Description:
Our strength

Acico Yachts is based in the pretty Dutch town of Enkhuizen, where ship and yacht building has been a tradition for decades. The company was originally founded as Dutch Yacht Builders in (2003). In May (2010) the shipyard was consolidated and re-branded, giving birth to Acico Yachts incorporating Dutch excellence, heritage and tradition. 

Our team of 60+ craftsmen transforms aluminium and steel into the finest sailing and motor yachts. While having our own in-house casco construction, mechanical department, carpenters, engineering, project management as well as naval architects, we are one of the few Dutch yards who still offer full expertise of yacht building under one roof.

Name: Dempo Shipbuilding & Engineering Pvt. Ltd.
Description: Dempo Shipbuilding has two state-of-the-technology shipyards in Goa, India. Located strategically a few kilometres upstream from the Arabian Sea in Goa on the West Coast of India, one is on the Zuari River (for vessels needing a deeper draught) at Undir, Bandora, and the other on the Mandovi River at Bainguinim, Old Goa. We are well equipped to undertake your shipbuilding, repairs, and refit projects.

Name: Thraki Yacht Painting
Description:
Thraki Yacht Painting is a leading yacht finishing/refinishing specialist based in Germany.
The quality we deliver is a product of our expertise and attention to detail.
From start to finish, we ensure everything is planned out and delivered according to your time frame.

Our motto is:"What doesn't look good to our own eyes, won't look good to your eyes,either"

A team of a highly trained professional workforce and in-house Project Senior managers are at your disposal throughout your project’s duration and after delivery.

Throughout the project our quality control members go above and beyond to verify the quality of the project from the first until the very last step.

Name: Ada Yacht Works
Description:
AdaYachtWorks shipyard specialises in the construction of custom steel and Aluminum yachts, applying state-of-the-art technologies and innovative ideas to traditional production techniques. Our service is prompt, efficient and reliable and we take pride in the attention to detail of our professional construction workforce and the innovation of our engineers and designers.

Our main objective is the development and improvement of production methods beyond even the highest expectations raising standards in luxury yacht building and creating and implementing new trends.

Personal attention to each project and flawless customer service providing absolute client satisfaction are our goals, and provide the best references for our work.

The shipyard's production facilities include an enclosed area of 3000 square metres.

Name: Nor-Tech Hi-Performance Boats
Description: Since 1991, Nor-Tech has set out to build exclusive products that are not available from production boat builders. Using proven techniques combined with the latest technology and materials we deliver unparalled performance. We also combine our innovative designs with features that bring ultimate comfort and practicality. The manufacturing facility encompasses over 45,000 sq. ft. (50,000 sq. ft. additional breaking ground Summer 2017) complete with a 20’ x 60’ downdraft paint booth, state of the art rig shop and in house upholstery departments.

Name: Viktor Lenac Shipyard
Description:
Markets are shrinking?
Competition is killing you?
Margins are squeezing?
Got to cut costs to the bone?
Still, your clients expect more for less?

Sure, it's tough.

And it won't get any easier!

Yet, only when it's dark enough one can see the stars.
So, we gotta be shining.

May our stories connect. Let's make a great one together!

Viktor Lenac is the leading repair, maintenance and conversion shipyard in the Mediterranean with more than 120 years in ship and offshore realms. Our facilities, technology and skilled workforce, make us a modern shipyard capable of completing the most demanding projects, on short deadlines and up to the highest standards. Our uncompromising commitment to quality is globally recognized, making our name a by-word for quality.
Ship repair is the core business with 80 repairs per year of all vessel types, providing the full range of ship repair services – from standard docking and steel works, hull and tank blasting, preparation and painting to highly specialized works on vessel mechanical and electrical systems.
 
Viktor Lenac was among ship conversion pioneers. Conversions of general cargo and tanker ships to car carriers for Norwegian Hoegh, were our first conversion projects in early 1970s, followed by a history of successful conversions of pipe/cable-laying ships and offshore platform and supply vessels.

Our offshore services range from engineering, procurement, fabrication, construction, and outfitting, to on-shore commissioning, load-out, sea fastening, hook-up, commissioning, assistance to start up, repairs and maintenance. We have built a total of 17 gas production and distribution platforms still in use in the north Adriatic Sea.

Our mission it to be here whenever our clients may need us and to do the job required. Our vision is to become the first choice of ship owners looking for a reliable shipyard in the Mediterranean. It’s not easy and we’re not a perfect company, but we constantly learn and grow better in delivering top quality, in a safe way, and on time.

Name: VOSTA LMG
Description:
VOSTA LMG Dredging Technology
World leader in advanced dredging systems

VOSTA LMG is a leading engineering and contracting company, serving the worldwide dredging industry. In addition to self-propelled and stationary dredgers, the company also markets various dredge component packages and offers engineering and contracting services. VOSTA LMG has offices The Netherlands, Germany, China, USA, India and Singapore. The office The Netherlands is the headquarter of VOSTA LMG.

VOSTA LMG aims to meet and exceed its clients’ needs by providing high-quality, competitive dredging technology. Its unique business model offers state-of-the-art solutions in dredging technology. The backbone of its services is its engineering capacity, with its 100% focus on the dredging industry. VOSTA LMG’s global presence and 145+ year history confirm the company’s position as a dedicated supplier of dredging equipment. For more information on projects and activities of VOSTA LMG Dredging Technology visit our website: www.vostalmg.com.

Operating without an owned shipyard, VOSTA LMG is flexible in her approach; offering services ranging from supplying a component package to project managing the process of building a dredge from start to finish in close cooperation with a partner shipyard anywhere in the world. In addition to engineering and contracting of custom-built and standard dredges, the product range includes cutting-, suction-, discharge-, automation- and coupling systems. Components such as cutter heads, underwater cutting wheels, dredge pumps, ball joints and automation packages complete the product line. VOSTA LMG also assists in the preparation of tender documents and offers consulting services and feasibility studies to dredging contractors.

Name: Phoenix Register of Shipping S.A
Description:
Phoenix Register of Shipping (PHRS) is a Classification Society acting as a Recognized Organization –Recognized Security Organization established in 2000 in Greece. PHRS operates in full compliance with the requirements of the International Code for the Recognized Organizations MSC. 349(92) and is accredited as per ISO 17020:2012 as Inspection Body type A as well as per ISO 9001:2015 for its internal processes.
The Organization’s headquarters are located in Greece and branch offices operate in key locations globally, such as United Arab Emirates, Nigeria, Ukraine, Turkey etc., employing a total of 130 people. Additionally, approximately 60 surveys stations have been established worldwide, covering all main points of activity, thus offering quality and consistent services in an effective manner 24/7.
PHRS operates in a paperless and digitized environment, which ensures complete traceability and transparency in all critical operations. The, awarded, fully digitized Management Information System (ArchimedesInfo) implements an automatic step-by-step procedure from surveys’ application to vessels’ certification, ensuring proper validation and multi-level verification during the whole process from start to finish. Furthermore, PHRS has proceeded to the issuance of digitally signed e-certificates as per IMO guidelines FAL.5/Circ.39/Rev.2, ensuring easy handling, sharing, storing and verifying the authenticity of certificates online.
PHRS is currently authorized to perform statutory surveys on behalf of twenty four (24) flag states as shown here https://www.phrs.gr/en/statutory/recognitions .
PH.R.S. provides a full range of classification related services (in accordance with IMO MSC.349(92): Code for Recognized Organizations (RO CODE), IMO Assembly Resolution A.739 (18), IMO Assembly Resolution A.789 (19) & the Annexes thereto) for all categories of vessels.

Consulenza, collaborando direttamente nella pianificazione valutando tutte le esigenze del cliente prima di poter progettare e costruire la sua barca. 
Progettazione, avvalendoci di validi ingegneri e progettisti che lavorano nella nostra factory ed altrettanti esterni tra i migliori ingegneri, architetti e designer navali specializzati nel settore che collaborano con noi.
Costruzione strutturale dello scafo e delle sovra strutture in carpenteria, la nostra officina utilizza le più recenti tecniche di costruzione, vanta artigiani esperti nella carpenteria metallica su disegno tecnico e apparecchiature specializzate.
Realizzazione finale dell’intero progetto con il montaggio motori, impianti, sistemi di navigazione, test, collaudi, certificazioni e allestimenti.

Il risultato finale quindi sono pezzi unici, scafi robusti sicuri ed efficienti costruiti artigianalmente con attenzione e precisione e una produzione 100% Made in Italy.
N.B. È un errore comune del settore pensare che le imbarcazioni personalizzate costruite in alluminio siano più costose delle imbarcazioni di produzione in serie realizzate con uno stampo. L'investimento richiesto in quegli stampi è enorme e poiché sono pensati per essere riprodotti in grandi quantità, è necessario un enorme budget di marketing. Tutto ciò si riflette nel prezzo finale e spesso rende una barca di serie più costosa di una personalizzata (Custom). 
Scopri di più, Contattaci !

Name: Flying Fish
Description:
At Flying Fish, we're on a mission to lead the way in sustainable shipping, with a strong focus on zero-emission fleet operations. Our consultancy services are tailored to support businesses in navigating the transition to eco-friendly maritime solutions.

Our key technology offerings include:
1) Our Hydrofoil System: A cutting-edge technology designed to enhance vessel performance while minimizing environmental impact.
2) The Watertaxi Operations System: A complete software package for efficient water taxi services.
3) Our innovative (hydrogen-)electric propulsion system: A robust solution aimed at reducing greenhouse gas emissions in the maritime sector.

By 2050, we envision a naval sector free from emissions, contributing significantly to global environmental efforts.

Our team is our greatest asset, comprised of skilled engineers from diverse fields including electrical and mechanical engineering, computer science, and aerospace engineering. Many of us have obtained our skills at Delft University of Technology and have been part of the TU Delft Solar Boat Team, where we created a solar-powered electric hydrofoil boat. Additionally, some team members have earned awards and doctoral degrees in engineering fields.

Our approach is simple yet effective. We kick off every project with a detailed analysis of our customer's needs, followed by a application of the V-model for systems engineering to devise a solution that's just right for them. Our engineering toolkit is rich and varied, ensuring we have the right tools for every challenge.

Our portfolio includes successful projects such as:
- A fully functional watertaxi operations system
- A complete powertrain design for a commercial hydrogen-electric boat
- A modular remote-controlled hydrofoil test platform for TU Delft
- A concept design for a new class of zero-emission ferries
Get in touch with us, and let's explore how we can help your maritime business step into a greener and more efficient future.

Name: ADRIA DOCKS d.o.o.
Description: Adria Docks provides services for the repair and maintenance of yachts, mega yachts and other vessels up to a length of 150m in floating docks. Name: Estaleiros Navais de Viana do Castelo, S.A.

Os Estaleiros Navais de Viana do Castelo, S.A. (ENVC) são uma empresa de construção e reparação naval de tamanho médio em actividade desde 1944, localizada na cidade de Viana do Castelo, na costa Atlântica no norte de Portugal. Ocupam uma área de 270.000 m2 e empregam aproximadamente 630 trabalhadores, sendo o maior Estaleiro de construção naval de Portugal e já um dos maiores da face ocidental da Europa.

Desde que iniciou a sua  actividade   já construiu mais de 200 navios de vários tipos : batelões, rebocadores, ferry-boats, navios de pesca, carga a granel, porta-contentores, transportadores de cimento, navios tanques, LPG, transportadores de produtos químicos e vasos de guerra.

• 𝗠𝗮𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗲 𝗔𝘂𝘁𝗼𝗺𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗦𝗲𝗿𝘃𝗶𝗰𝗲𝘀: Tank level gauging, overfill alarms, gas detection, fire alarms, nitrogen generators, ODME, oily water seperator, oil mist detector (OMD), UTI detectors, nitrogen production systems, and similar solutions. 

Languages spoken: Turkish, English, Italian.

Name: Centurion & Supreme Boats
Description:
Centurion has built high performance watersports towboats since 1976 from their headquarters in Merced, California. Centurion was the first to introduce a wakesurfing specific towboat and created the World Wake Surfing Championships, which celebrated its 20th anniversary in 2015. Innovation has always been the hallmark of Centurion boats. Now, thanks to new product, leadership and Correct Craft company culture, innovation is running deeper than ever, into a re-imagination of the Centurion brand. Watersports enthusiasts are embracing Centurion boats for the world’s best waves, wakes and ride, as well as ambitious design and inspired craftsmanship. Time to re-imagine your ride, in a Centurion.

Founded in 1968, Supreme has consistently fulfilled its mission to offer multifunctional family towboats that are value leaders and trendsetters in both design and performance. Supreme is the only affordable premium brand to offer world-class performance, style, simplicity, and strength built to help watersports fanatics maximize their fun on the water at an extreme value. Iedereen heeft wel een interieur. Iedereen heeft daar ook wel een gevoel, een idee bij. Soms heel uitgesproken. Soms alleen in ruwe contouren, in een bepaalde stijl of in een favoriete kleur. Name: ASL Marine Holdings Ltd
