ASL Marine Holdings Ltd. is a vertically-integrated marine services group principally engaged in shipbuilding, shiprepair and conversion, shipchartering, dredge engineering and other marine related services, catering to customers from Asia Pacific, South Asia, Europe, Australia and the Middle East.

Listed on Singapore Stock Exchange since 2003, ASL Marine has over the years grown into one of the region’s key players in the marine services sector.

Today, ASL Marine owns shipyards in Singapore and Indonesia (Batam), providing a comprehensive range of shipbuilding, shiprepair and conversion services spanning myriad sectors and industries. As at 30 June 2023, it has a vessel fleet of 213, providing shipchartering services to various industries, including marine infrastructure and construction, dredging, land reclamation and cargoes transportation. 

ASL Marine added VOSTA LMG International B.V. and several related subsidiaries (the “VOSTA LMG”) in 2012. The VOSTA LMG designs and manages the construction of dredgers, makes and supplies specialised dredging components, and owns several important patents.

Description:
DES Marine Engineering is a Szczecin-based company specializing in ship repairs, dockings, and worldwide riding & flying teams arrangements. We provide comprehensive overhauls of main and auxiliary engines as well as complete technical maintenance of floating units.

Our strength lies in a team of highly qualified engineers and superintendents with over 20 years of maritime industry experience. We are capable of organizing, supervising, and executing services at the highest professional standards. All our technicians hold valid seaman’s books, which allows us to perform most works during sea voyages – reducing docking needs and significantly lowering vessel operating costs.

 Engines Repairs & Overhauling

We service a wide range of two-stroke, four-stroke, and high-speed engines, including:

MAN B&W (all licenses – Holeby, STX, Hyundai, ZJMD, Niigata, etc.)
MaK (M20, M25, M32 & M43 types)
Wärtsilä (including ex Stork & NSD)
Daihatsu (including Anqing licensed)
Bergen Diesel (B-, C- & K-series)
Sulzer, Deutz, Yanmar, Himsen, Hyundai, NSD, Baudouin, Volvo Penta, SKL, Alfa Diesel and others

Engines repairs & overhauling

Dedicated in-house solutions: Power Management Systems, Shore Power Supply, Alarm Monitoring
Electrical installations, troubleshooting & retrofits (PMS & AMS systems)
Onboard testing & certification with Schneider and Hyundai Air Circuit Breaker testers

BWTS (Ballast Water Treatment Systems) maintenance

Scrubber welding & repairs (WPS approved)

Certified welding & piping works

Spare parts supply

 With extensive global references and proven reliability, DES Marine Engineering delivers cost-effective, safe, and innovative marine solutions worldwide.

Description:
Hersek Shipyard, located in Yalova, Turkey, specializes in ship repair, maintenance, and modernization for a wide range of vessels including chemical tankers (LPG/LNG), bulk carriers, general cargo vessels, and fishing vessels.

Since commencing operations in 2022, we have successfully completed over 200 projects for both local and international clients.

Our facilities include four slipways (up to 4,000 tons capacity), two operational piers, and modern workshops and hangars equipped with CNC machinery, heavy-duty cranes, and lifting equipment.

A new 330 m × 15 m pier will be operational in 2026, allowing us to accommodate larger vessels and shorten repair turnaround times.

At Hersek Shipyard, we combine competitive pricing, fast delivery, and class-approved workmanship to deliver reliable and high-quality services for every project.

 Quality Workmanship. High Standards. Trusted Services.

Name: Hodgdon Yachts
Description: Our goal at Hodgdon Yachts is to build the world's best sailing or motor yacht. It's that simple. And to us, building a world-class yacht is measured in how well design and aesthetics are balanced with practical issues of engineering and performance. Hodgdon vessels have earned the reputation of "heirloom boat" for more than their extraordinary looks. They also stand the test of time. At the foundation of every sailing and motor vessel we build, you'll find a consummate team of craftsmen, the industry's most advanced construction technology and a passion for excellence. Name: Floki Marine
Description:
Floki Marine is established as a ship maintenance company approach things differently than most of the peers in the industry.  Since our establishment, we strive to be people-oriented, inclusive of all our partners and integrated company from all aspects. 
We are fully dedicated on transparency in all our dealings and maintaining the highest trustworthiness. This makes our company reliable, respected and honest in the ship maintenance sector.
We integrate drydocking management, riding team services, supply services, workshop & prefabrication services in house rather than outsourcing to optimize vessels’ downtime during the operations or dry-dockings.
Floki Marine endeavour to put a value for carbon emission reduction based on environment protection. In this respect, we work on different technologies with our business partners such as Variable Frequency Drive, Alternative Marine Power, Frequency Convertors and Condition Based Monitoring in order to fulfil needs of ships and prepare 2030 carbon capture regulations.
  With worldwide network and business partners, Floki Marine is an integrated part of the global shipping industry, delivering quality, reliable and safe maintenance and technology solutions to clients all over the world.

Today it is a family-run business with three generations, the founder Fernando Amerio, his children Barbara and Rodolfo, and a third generation already operating.
In the early 90s, the Shipyard Permare, after being also retailer and manufacturer for other Italian shipyard, begins the construction of yachts under its own brand "Amer Yachts", that over the years will become a synonymous of quality.

Today Permare builds, in Viareggio, Amer Yachts up to 120 feet and offers in Sanremo and Imperia refit and aftersales services.
Over the past 4 decades, the shipyard has built a craft production considered a niche, over 100 yachts tailored to an Italian and foreign clientele, and in 2023 will party 50 years of activity starting Amer steel production.

Mission
•	To provide clients with bespoke, transparent, and cost-effective solutions tailored to their unique challenges.
•	To drive innovation and adopt cutting-edge technologies to stay ahead in the industry.
•	To foster an exceptionally friendly, collaborative, and inclusive working environment that encourages growth and creativity.
Vision
•	To continuously invest in human capital, nurturing talent and expertise to create a lasting impact.
•	To expand our global portfolio by offering world-class services that set industry benchmarks.
•	To lead the way in sustainable marine engineering solutions, contributing to a greener future for the shipping industry.

Il parco mezzi aziendale altamente attrezzato e dinamico ci consente di fornire ai nostri clienti una tempestiva assistenza su tutte le coste del Mar Mediterraneo anche nei periodi di crociera.
Al fine di rendere la propria offerta più competitiva e al tempo stesso per soddisfare le richieste del cliente, ATS ha cominciato a stringere partnerships commerciali con fornitori dislocati su tutti i porti di maggior interesse delle coste Italiane. Al momento l’azienda è fortemente impegnata ad estendere questo tipo di collaborazione anche ai fornitori esteri, in modo tale da creare un vero e proprio network mirato alla fornitura e all’approvvigionamento del materiale in loco.
ATS offre uno staff tecnico di ingegneri navali che opera in supporto sia alle nuove commesse che nelle opere di Refit

Description:
Wolfard & Wessels Werktuigbouw bv is an international operating company, specialized in providing innovative turn-key piping projects and supply of low cost pipe spools.
The turn key project consist of (3-D) engineering, production and outfitting of piping systems. 
Wolfard & Wessels Werktuigbouw in addition, is active in the field of repairs and conversions of (shipboard) piping installations. Flexibility and fast lead times can provide solutions on short notice for modifications to piping systems.

Wolfard & Wessels Werktuigbouw has an in-house team of designers and engineers, a large production facility of over 4000 m2, various site teams and an experienced staff, supplying project and logistics support to the various locations.

For clients of any pipe spool (large volumes or single pieces), Wolfard & Wessels Werktuigbouw supplies piping using the well known "Non-welding" principle. Pipe spools are supplied  to clients choice as complete or as partly-finished for clients to finalize in their production process.


SERVICES:
•	Turn-key projects; ships engine rooms and cargo handling installations 
•	Engineering of piping systems
•	Production of piping
•	Installation of piping systems
•	Repairs- / conversions of piping systems
•	Alignment of rotating equipment and pumps
•	Delivery of  equipment and piping (packages)
•	Commissioning

Based on environmental legislation, piping modifications for system such as:
- Ballast Water Treatment
- Scrubber system
- Double Wall LNG piping
- Fuel oil conversions

FIELDS OF OPERATION:
Using the organisations wide knowledge, due to the in-house engineering department, multiple fields of operation are served; 
•	Shipbuilding 
•	Luxury Yacht building (30+ meter)
•	Gas & Oil industry
•	Equipment industry: Gas- and diesel engines, Gearbox- and Unit builders
•	Power industry
•	Process industry
•	Process water industry

As of 2012, Wolfard & Wessels Werktuigbouw bv is ISO 9001:2015 certified

Description:
LECAMUS a une activité principale de réparation et de construction navale. Mais l’entreprise intervient également en maintenance industrielle et portuaire, en conception et fabrication d'ouvrages mécano-soudés, ainsi qu'en plasturgie.

LECAMUS est idéalement situé sur le pôle naval du Grand Port Maritime de La Rochelle avec accès privilégié aux installations portuaires : 
  - 2 cales sèches de 174x22 m et 107x14 m

LECAMUS dispose de son propre bureau d'études (CAO et maitrise d'œuvre) et de plus de 4500 m² d'ateliers équipés pour la chaudronnerie lourde, l'usinage de grande dimension et la mécanique.

Nos activités navales : 
  - En réparation navale, nous intervenons sur tous types de navires, de la réparation à flot à l’arrêt technique complet. Nos équipes sont mobiles sur la façade Atlantique.
  - En construction navale, activité en développement, nous pouvons réaliser des navires jusqu’à 20 m en acier ou aluminium. Nous réalisons en outre le RESIST: bateau innovant en PEHD, matériau sans entretien et résistant.

Nos activités industrielles et portuaires :
  - En portuaire, nous réalisons ou intervenons sur les ouvrages portuaires (ducs d’albe, passerelles, échelles, boucliers, …), les grues et le matériel de manutention portuaire, les saisissages de colis lourds sur cargos, la maintenance d’installations bord à quai.
  - En industrie, nous réalisons des ouvrages mécano-soudés spécifiques et réalisons la maintenance mécanique en industrie lourde.
  - Enfin, la plasturgie est essentiellement orientée vers la polyfusion de tuyauteries PEHD pour le naval, l'industrie et le TP.

Today C&C Marine and Repair’s facilities are over 80 acres with 3,200 linear feet of continuous waterfrontage along the Gulf Intracoastal Waterway (Algiers Canal). Name: CSSC-SDARI
Description:
Established in 1964, Shanghai Merchant Ship Design and Research Institute (SDARI), member of China State Shipbuilding Co. Ltd., (CSSC), stands out as one of China’s  largest merchant ship design institutes with the vastest variety of ship types, world's leading technical edge, the most innovative and stable technical team along with the largest market share in domestic China. SDARI today boasts a team of more than 600 employees with a full range of professions, providing services including Ship Design, Consultancy, Digital Operation Support and Marine Equipment.

SDARI provides R&D and detail design for various types of Merchant Vessels, Marine Resources Development Vessels and Equipment, Marine Scientific Research Vessels and Special Vessels, covering all-rounded technical services that range from Feasibility Study, Conceptual Design, Basic Design, Detail Design to Product Design. Focusing on the intelligence upgrade, energy saving and emission reduction, SDARI makes endless efforts on the launch of new ship types that face the future shipping and lead the market by means of technology development and 3D design.

Relying on the numerical tank, Smart Ship Innovation Laboratory and study of new energy technology, SDARI’s equipments and services cover Fan Duct, Fan Cap, SATRTM (SDARI Adapted Twisted Rudder), DOSS  (Digital Operation Support System) and data analysis service, FGSS (Fuel Gas Supply System) and Power Battery Pack as well.

A life dedicated to the construction of extraordinary boats is the destiny of Henri Wauquiez, who gave his name to our shipyard in 1965. To characterize a Wauquiez, there is no need for superlatives. Name: Colonna's Shipyard
Description:
We are Colonna's.

Colonna’s Shipyard, Inc. is a diversified industrial company, with multiple divisions and affiliates delivering the highest quality ship repair, machining, and steel fabrication services to both the commercial and government markets.

Colonna’s Shipyard, Inc. is located in the historic Berkley section of Norfolk, Virginia and is the oldest continuous family owned and operated private shipyard in the United States. Founded in 1875 by Charles J. Colonna, a 26 year old ship carpenter with limited resources, the early business was limited to pier-side repairs. Within 2 years, Charles had added his first marine railway powered by two horses that had a lift capacity of about 40 tons, and he was off and running.

Although over 140 years old, Colonna’s Shipyard continues to maintain its commitment to modernization, making the capital investments necessary for improvements in efficiency and productivity. Today, Colonna’s is a diverse industrial company with extensive capabilities in commercial and government ship repair, machining and large steel fabrication.

Colonna’s strength is our employees. We employ the best and the brightest in the shipyard industry and we are proud of all that they do. From welders and ship fitters to government contract specialists, we have the right people in place to make sure the job is completed to the highest standards.

Respect~ Pride ~ Truth ~ Family 

These are our CORE VALUES and the guidelines that make us a leader in our industry. We are pleased and confident in stating that our skilled employees are among the most respected experts in the ship repair industry.

Colonna’s Shipyard and our affiliates are pleased to be an Equal Opportunity Employer.

Description:
Yantai CIMC Raffles Offshore Limited (hereafter referred to as “CIMC Raffles”) is an integrated offshore builder capable of engineering, construction and commissioning of large offshore vessels. CIMC Raffles employs nearly 4,000 staff and another 8,000 sub-contracted workers.  We have 3 manufacturing facilities in Yantai, Haiyang and Longkou in Shandong Province, People’s Republic of China, occupying a total land area of 1.32 square kilometres.    

CIMC Raffles possesses comprehensive offshore engineering capabilities and is equipped with state-of-the-art facilities including the “Taisun”, the world’s largest gantry crane with a lifting capacity of 20,000 tonnes, a pedestal crane with a lifting capacity of 1,900 tonnes, a 300,000-tonne dry dock and a hydraulic press with capacity of 20,000 tonnes. As one of the largest offshore builders in China, CIMC Raffles specialises in semi-submersible platforms, jack-up platforms and special purpose offshore vessels.

  Our facilities enable us to build according to a unique construction methodology for semi-submersible platforms, where the deckboxes and lower hulls are built simultaneously on land and mated together using the “Taisun” crane. This way of construction improves efficiency, safety and quality. A total of 6 semi-submersible platforms have been mated successfully since November 2008.

Istanbul Shipyard is the Turkish Shipbuilding Industry's leading company with its corporate identity;  infrastructure and projects developed using the latest international standards. As a subsidiary of SNR Holding, Istanbul Shipyard has the justified pride of being the demanded shipyard on naval and off-shore vessels, as well as the commercial ones. Coupling with the Holding's other subsidiaries like SNR Shipyard and ABS Metal Factory, the annual steel processing capacity is 13.200 tons with 5 slipways. 

Please check www.istanbulshipyard.com for further details.

Name: Intermarine
Description:
Desde 1973, há uma premissa que marca cada uma das milhares de Intermarines já fabricadas: pautar-se pelo melhor de dois mundos. Valer-se da sabedoria e do traquejo que só o artesanal traz consigo e da inovação que apenas o contemporâneo é capaz de proporcionar. Por isso, a Intermarine conquistou e vem mantendo a posição de estaleiro líder no Brasil, pois esse é o jeito Intermarine de fazer embarcações. Sonhá- las, concebê-las e esculpi-las aqui, em nosso país, e pelas mãos de verdadeiros mestres que, há mais de quatro décadas, se dedicam a tornar realidade um sonho que vem embarcado desde a primeira Intermarine: construir os melhores barcos do mundo.

-------
Since 1973, there is a premise that marks each of the thousands of Intermarine crafts already manufactured: to be driven by the best of two worlds. We make use of the wisdom and skill that only the artisanal brings with it and of the innovation that only the contemporary is able to provide. Due to this, Intermarine conquered and has been maintaining the position of leading shipyard in Brazil, as this is the Intermarine way of making crafts. To envision them, to conceive them and to sculpt them here, in our country, and by the hands of true masters who, for more than four decades, have dedicated themselves to making a dream come true since the first Intermarine craft: to build the best crafts of the world.

Name: Westcon Yards AS
Description:
Westcon Yards AS is a modern shipyard with a main focus on offshore service, shipbuilding, rig and ship repair. We are located in Ølensvåg, Florø, Helgeland and Karmsund with a short distance to Haugesund, Stavanger and Bergen. 

Our vision is to be the preferred yard in the North Sea Basin. We have a dynamic, efficient and solution-oriented organization with a focus on the customer's needs.

Name: Brodosplit d.d.
Description:
The joint-stock company Brodosplit is at the head of a group of companies with a long shipbuilding tradition and is one of the most well-known European shipyards. It is located near the airport, the international passenger port, and the historical center of the City of Split. Its main activities include the construction of all types of merchant, passenger, and naval vessels, as well as special-purpose vessels and special steel structures.

Brodosplit Group, a member of DIV Group, develops, designs, and builds the most complex vessels and floating facilities as the main program, as well as the most complex steel structures for application in infrastructure, transport, and energy, in addition to process and general application.
   
Its goals include positioning Brodosplit in the niche market of building complex vessels and large structures (motor yachts, passenger ships, mobile floodgates of Venice, special purpose vessels) and the realization of projects assigned to it in the framework of a competitive offer on the global market (offshore and onshore).

The company's current production program is dominated by the construction of passenger vessels (cruises, luxury yachting travels), all with unlimited navigation areas, including polar regions. Brodosplit has positioned itself in the niche market of constructing polar expedition cruise vessels and passenger vessels the length of which ranges from 100 to 300 meters. When it comes to the construction of these vessels, Brodosplit ranks among the best shipbuilders in the global market. 

Its expert engineers, designers, and developers can meet all design and engineering requests of customers and clients using modern technologies and a variety of processes. These processes include, among other things, welding steel and other materials, offering architectural solutions for the interior, as well as assisting with automation and management of onboard systems, integration, and the use of process equipment.

Name: Luerssen Australia
Description: Luerssen Australia is a subsidiary of Lürssen. Lürssen is renowned worldwide for its high quality products as well as innovative technologies within the yacht and naval shipbuilding industries. The family-owned company, headquartered in Bremen, Germany, has been in operation for over 140 years and is now in its fourth generation of family-leadership. The mission of the company, founded in 1875, was to be a leader in quality and performance and this is still the driving force of the company today. It specialises in the design and manufacture of yachts, naval and coastguard vessels and provides extensive after-sales service, including repairs, refits, sustainment and global logistics services. In May 2017, in pursuit of the SEA 1180 contract and regional export opportunities, Lürssen founded a subsidiary company, Luerssen Australia. The company is intended to support Australia’s national sovereign shipbuilding strategy and operates from a new office in the Australian Marine Complex in Henderson, Western Australia.

Name: Starting Point
Description: Starting Point

Name: Royal Van der Leun
Description:
𝗦𝗽𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘀𝘁 𝗶𝗻 𝗲𝗹𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗿𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝘀𝘆𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗺𝘀 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗺𝗲𝘁𝗮𝗹𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗰𝗼𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗿𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻, 𝗱𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗴𝗶𝗻𝗴, 𝗼𝗳𝗳𝘀𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲, 𝘆𝗮𝗰𝗵𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗺𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗺𝗲 𝗶𝗻𝗱𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗶𝗲𝘀

Each division independently serves its own markets; together, they cooperate to form the strong and multifaceted foundation of Royal Van der Leun. 

Royal Van der Leun provides global reliability. Thanks to our strong international network with locations on several continents, we are able to provide custom support all over the world. The Royal Van der Leun group consists of:

Name: OMT - Odense Maritime Technology
Description:
We are the premium maritime consulting firm in Europe. HOW to deliver affordable maritime defence while creating maritime jobs in buyer’s countries is our focus.  
OMT was established in 2010 as a carve-out from the A.P. Møller Maersk shipyard in Denmark – Odense Steel shipyard. Together with our sister company Valcon, the premium operations consulting firm in Europe, we strive to deliver maritime footprints in the countries we operate in.

Name: Remontowa Shipbuilding S.A.
Description: REMONTOWA SHIPBUILDING S.A. is one of the leading companies belonging to the REMONTOWA HOLDING SA. Cooperation within HOLDING gives the ability to offer comprehensive technical solutions whose final products are fully equipped, modern vessels.

Name: Burger Boat Company
Description: Founded in 1863, Burger is one of the oldest and most respected custom yacht builders in America and has delivered yachts which can be seen in ports around the world. Burger Boat Company builds custom yachts, in aluminum and/or steel, up to 200'(61m) and is recognized worldwide for design, quality construction, reliability and unrivaled craftsmanship. Working with in-house designers and engineers, as well as highly acclaimed designers from around the world, Burger continues to raise the bar in quality, technology and innovation. Based at its state-of-the-art shipyard in Manitowoc, Wisconsin in the United States, Burger forges trusting relationships to achieve an owner or designer's vision through a collaborative process. Working with Burger unlocks the limitless opportunities of exploring adventure around the world in elegance, luxury and style that meets any owner's vision. The talented team at Burger also offers exceptional custom furniture, maintenance, refit and repair services.

Name: Cobalt Boats
Description:
At Cobalt, we've redefined the boating experience since day one, inspiring a sense of ownership synonymous with accomplishment. As America's boat-building experts, we pride ourselves on standard-setting performance, quality,  and luxury that transforms each purchase into a memorable journey – not just an acquisition.

Join us in shaping the future of boating, where every adventure is elevated, and every experience is extraordinary. Welcome to the world of Cobalt Boats – where the extraordinary is not just a destination but a way of life!  

#ExperienceExtraordinary

Name: UK Docks Marine Services
Description: UK Docks offers dry docks, afloat repair berths and specialist boat repair facilities throughout the UK and employs specialist service engineers for vessel repair, construction, conversion and engineering services to the marine, offshore and defence sectors throughout the world

Name: Wider Yachts
Description:
Wider Yachts is the first yachting company ever to have introduced a serial hybrid propulsion system on its superyachts in 2015. After years, its yachts are cruising with their completely satisfied Owners. No noise and vibrations while using the yachts, for hours, in a complete Zero Emission Mode.
Wider is continuing to invest, together with its most reliable Partners, in developing its exclusive technology. New yachts and superyachts are coming, all equipped with the latest technology and the best of its sexy and nice-looking models.

Name: Thecla Bodewes Shipyards
Description:
Thecla Bodewes Shipyards in the Netherlands is a family-owned business in the 7th generation with combined experience in shipbuilding of over 300 years. Our focus lies with delivering future proof Green Vessels using innovative sustainable solutions to decrease pollution and strive for Zero Emission. With the portfolio of over 100 realized cargo vessels, 18 diesel-electric and LNG-electric vessels and 15 years’ experience with Diesel-Electric propulsion systems our shipyard has demonstrable capability to deliver the vessels in time and to the highest standards, for the benefit of green-conscientious customers world-wide. 

We are specialists in building shallow draft pushers, low fuel consumption multipurpose vessels and state-of-the-art water injection dredgers.

Name: ARMON SHIPYARDS
Description:
Founded in 1963, ARMON Shipyards have been present in the shipbuilding industry for more than 55 years, being always at the edge of innovation and adapting itself to the evolution of the shipping industry with more than 950 vessels successfully delivered up to date.

Among our references we have built all types of Fishing Vessels, Tugboats, Oceanographic and Research, Ferries, High speed crafts, SAR, Pilot and Patrol boats, Cargo Vessels, Yachts and Yacht Support, Dredgers, Offshore Vessels, ROV, AHT and ERRV.

ARMON’s Group combine the power of six factories including three technical offices and one storage, cutting and pre-assembly steel/aluminium centre, giving support to the whole group and permitting ARMON Shipyards to develop tailor-made projects from basic design to final delivery of the vessel.

ASTILLEROS ARMON S.A. Founded in 1963 with over 34,000 square meters of installations. High production capacity shipyard with long experience in the construction of Fishing Vessels, Workboats and Tugboats.

AUXILIAR NAVAL DEL PRINCIPADO S.A. Founded in 1991 with over 10,000 square meters of installations. Experts in Building Hi-tech Aluminium Speedboats that require advanced manufacturing methods.

ASTILLEROS ARMON BURELA S.A. Founded on 1992 for vessels up to 80 meters in length. Specialised in the construction of Ferries and Yacht Support Vessels through ShadowCAT brand.

ASTILLEROS ARMON VIGO S.A. Founded on 1999 for vessels up to 120 meters in length. Wide experience in Oceanographic, Sea Research and Fishing Vessels.

ASTILLEROS ARMON GIJON S.A. Founded in 2011 with capacity for vessels up to 190 meters in length it is the biggest production facility of ARMON. 

CONFORMADO Y CORTE S.A. Production centre for cutting and pre-assembly steel and aluminium plates and profiles.

Name: CDK Technologies
Description:
CDK Technologies maitrise depuis 35 ans la mise en œuvre de son matériau de prédilection : le carbone pré-imprégné, matière haute performance qui envahit désormais les secteurs de pointe comme la défense ou l’aéronautique, mais aussi le  domaine  des  yachts de luxe.

CDK Technologies est une référence dans la fabrication de monocoques et multicoques de course au large, et reste à ce jour le chantier qui a construit le plus grand trimaran de course au monde, Banque Populaire V devenu Spindrift 2. En 2015 ET 2017, CDK Technologies confirme son statut de leader dans la construction de multicoques de grande taille, en mettant à l’eau les trimarans Ultimes MACIF 100 et BANQUE POPULAIRE IX.

Reconnu pour la qualité de ses constructions dans le domaine de la course au large, CDK Technologies a transféré ce savoir-faire dans la construction de de plateformes de yachts de luxe à voile.

En 2015, CDK Technologies a franchi une nouvelle étape dans sa diversification, en fabricant les pâles en carbone de l’hydrolienne Sabella D10, première hydrolienne connectée au réseau, et est devenu ainsi un acteur incontournable du marché en plein développement des Energies Marines Renouvelables.

Enfin, CDK Technologies est entrée en 2015 dans le cercle très fermé des sociétés capables de fabriquer des mâts en carbone d’exception, en livrant un mât de 42 mètres pour le Maxi trimaran Spindrift 2. 

2018 marquera une nouvelle étape de développement pour CDK Technologies, qui se lance dans la fabrication de foils autoclavés pour les maxi multicoques.  En parallèle, la filiale Keroman Technologies à Lorient se dote d’une étuve de 42mètres permettant de réaliser des pièces techniques et coques de bateaux de grande taille.

Les marchés industriels représentent 15% activités de la société.

Name: KERSHIP
Description:
KERSHIP is a joint venture founded in 2013 by PIRIOU and NAVAL GROUP, two experts in naval engineering, shipbuilding, military systems and services.
This partnership is based on the complementary skills and expertise of both companies:

- PIRIOU, 50 years of expertise in civil shipbuilding

- NAVAL GROUP, a world leader in naval defence markets

KERSHIP offers a range of vessels up to 95 m for law enforcement at sea: navies, coastguard services, customs services, scientific institutes, etc.

Thanks to the expertise of its parents companies, KERSHIP works with and supports navies and public services throughout the life cycle of their ships, from construction to delivery, including after-sales service and In-Service Support (ISS).

Name: Vanquish Yachts
Description:
Based in the Netherlands at the epicentre of the world’s premium yachting industry, Vanquish Yachts offers you something truly unique. Our high-end, high-performance motoryachts are built by hand using the very latest construction techniques.

These driver’s boats have a radical appearance and an elegant allure that sets them truly apart. Available in sizes from 11 to 115 feet, each Vanquish Yacht offers serious power and maximum manoeuvrability on the water. Crucially, every Vanquish is also an individual vessel in her own right, built to the specific requests of her owner. Forget the clichés about customisation….

At Vanquish Yachts we expect you to bring ideas to the table before we can design and build your boat. You can read more about our bespoke approach here.

Because Vanquish Yachts only creates boats for demanding individuals, we also insist on total quality and reliability, applying the latest engineering technologies and systems. Our slogan ‘Your version of extraordinary’ reflects the special boats we build and the very special clients we serve.

All Vanquish Yachts are capable of 40 knots, and those with a particular penchant for speed can order a 50+ knots version with even more powerful engines. We call these models the VQ Veloce after the Italian word for speed. Despite all these choices, most Vanquish Yachts owners have something in common…

They’ve seen a Vanquish at sea or in a marina and said ‘I need one of those too.’ Translating this initial wow factor into a yacht that matches your demands and desires is why we exist. It is the essence of our story.

An ingenious hull design will ensure you low fuel consumption, fast acceleration, superlative comfort, awesome agility with very little spray, and a long range. Made in sustainable and easy-to-maintain aluminium, Vanquish Yachts have a low cost of ownership and retain a high resale value which will easily justify your original outlay.

It’s time to invest in your pleasure… Make the call!

Name: SARP YACHTS
Description:
Sarp Yachts

THE SPIRIT OF SARP
 
We offer you style, high-tech quality and value at a fair price. Our yachts are built with meticulous attention to detail and respect for the great traditions of yacht building.  A yacht for yachtsmen.
 
DREAMS COME TRUE WITH SARP YACHT
 
Sarp Yacht was founded in Antalya which is the called heaven of Turkey. We believe that beautiful things can be created most naturally in a beautiful atmosphere.
 
Sarp Yacht belongs to the KANATLI Family who is also owner of ETI Group Companies.
 We have created one of the largest and most modern facilities in the Eastern Mediterranean, designed for the new-construction and refit of luxury yachts up to 88 m in length.

Name: Palumbo Superyachts Refit
Description: The leading Refit/Repair Network in the Med

Name: Yalova Shipyard
Description:
About Us

Welcome to Yalova Shipyard - A beacon of maritime excellence and innovation. Established in 2023 under the reputable Akar Shipping, we operate with a unique blend of shipyard and shipowner perspectives, driving us towards unparalleled service and quality.

What We Do

At Yalova Shipyard, we specialize in comprehensive ship maintenance, repair, and conversion works, and are steadily navigating towards including new construction in our expertise. Our facility is a testament to our commitment to the future, equipped with cutting-edge technology, a transparent ERP system for project management, and sustainability initiatives ranging from rainwater harvesting systems to solar power plants.

Our strategic location, coupled with space optimization and operational independence, positions us uniquely within the industry. We take pride in our experienced technical team and occupational safety crew, ensuring a secure and efficient service environment.

Our Vision

Our vision is to become the preferred partner in the maritime industry, recognized for our innovation, commitment to sustainability, and transparent, customer-centric approach. We aim to push the boundaries of what a modern shipyard can be, integrating tradition with technology, and sustainability with service excellence.

Connect with Us

Embark on a journey with Yalova Shipyard, where tradition meets innovation for maritime solutions. Connect with us for your ship maintenance, repair, and conversion needs, and stay tuned for exciting future developments in new constructions.

For inquiries and more details:
 +90 226 813 33 43
 marketing@yalovashipyard.net
 www.yalovashipyard.net

Name: YACHT LUXURY STYLE - YLS
Description:
Yacht Luxury Style nasce dalla constatazione di un team di esperti della necessità del mercato attuale di prodotti sempre più tecnologici, inattaccabili ed innovativi, che coniughino design e resistenza, per fornire ad una clientela di un certo livello, esigente ed attenta al dettaglio, degli accessori esclusivi e di alta qualità, nel settore nautico ma non solo, infatti la tecnologia da noi studiata e brevettata prevede l’utilizzo in ambiente marino come per temperature estreme.
Siamo sempre alla ricerca di nuove soluzioni e nuove idee, la nostra squadra continua a progettare, studiare e testare sistemi sempre più avanzati e innovativi.

Name: ASTIBAL
Description:
ASTILLERO PUERTO DE BALBOA (ASTIBAL) was built more than 100 years ago to provide repairs and maintenance services to vessels passing through the Panama Canal.

With 3 graving docks, ASTIBAL is the only shipyard with the capacity to dry dock Panamax vessels, anywhere between the US West Coast and Chile. This, together with its strategic  location at the entrance to the Panama Canal, give the best options to customers to reduce desviation from their trading the area

Name: Chalkis Shipyards
Description:
Chalkis Shipyards SA is a privately held company  offering drydocking, ship maintenance and refit services to international clients. 

Established at Avlis in the early seventies, the shipyard’s location is on the route of vessels travelling to and from the Black Sea as well as those travelling to and from the Suez Canal to the Western Mediterranean area. 

The shipyard offers comprehensive service for short or extensive dockings, ranging from basic steelwork and piping to the most complex electrical and mechanical works, as well as repair and refit services. 

Conveniently positioned in Chalkis, Chalkis Shipyards is  ISO-9001:2015 and OHSAS 18001:2007 certified and its facilities operate under the ISPS code. 

Its facilities include two floating docks, shore and mobile cranes and fully-equipped repair shops.

The company has weathered the Greek government’s debt crisis that has seen most large Greek shipyards face extreme hardship or even close down.

Name: Balk Shipyard
Description:
Balk Shipyard has been part of Dutch shipbuilding heritage since 1798, building a reputation for reliability and craftsmanship over more than two centuries. Located in Urk, The Netherlands, we are a trusted partner for superyachts between 30 and 65 meters, specialising in three core services: refit, rebuild and survey works.

What sets us apart is more than our facilities. It is how we work. Our approach is hands-on, personal and built on Dutch quality, ensuring that every project is delivered with care and attention to detail. Whether it’s a full rebuild, a complex refit, or crucial survey work, we combine engineering expertise with a focus on reliability to create results that last.

Our facilities in Urk are designed for world-class yacht service. We offer three climate-controlled halls with overhead cranes, a unique in-house lift system capable of handling yachts up to 65 meters, as well as dry berths and in-water berths for preparation, finishing and final outfitting.

Balk Shipyard is proud to hold the designation of “By royal appointment, purveyor to the royal court” (bij Koninklijke beschikking hofleverancier). This is a distinction awarded by the Dutch royal family that recognizes companies with a long-standing reputation for quality, integrity and service. For us, it is a mark of trust that reflects the values we bring to every project.

Looking for a shipyard you can rely on? Get in touch with our team today enquire@balkshipyard.com.

Built for every refit and rebuild. Trusted for every survey.

Name: Construction Navale Bordeaux
Description:
Created in 1987, Construction Navale Bordeaux is one of the company of Groupe Beneteau. 

Based in Bordeaux, on the banks of the Garonne River, just few miles away from the greatest vineyards, the shipyard is located on a 105 000 square meters lot with 56 000 square meters covered buildings. The Bordeaux shipyard has acquired an international reputation in qualitative building and for the finish of its boats with three major brands: 

- Lagoon, cruising catamarans world leader with a 38 to 78 feet range.
- EXCESS, catamarans which embody both sportsmanship and modernity.
- CNB yacht builders, specialist of semi-custom monohulls.

Master of all the shipbuilding trades and the knowledge of aluminum and composite materials, the shipyard is the symbol of the skilled French Expertise with more than 4 800 boats built. 

The mission of Construction Navale Bordeaux is summarized through a sentence written by founders Dieter Gust and Olivier Lafourcade:
“As confirmed sailors, we all know that our boats have to be fast, comfortable and safe: seaworthy. We build them based on our love of the sea and the constant aim of good quality work. We design them as if we were the future owners. As shipbuilders and sailors, it is part of our logic”.

Name: CMN NAVAL
Description: In the last eight decades, CMN NAVAL has delivered more than 3,500 vessels and is present in 48 navies worldwide. The group's facilities and shipyards are located in France, Germany and the United Kingdom. CMN NAVAL's products range from 15-meter high-speed interceptors to frigates, marine renewable energy, and nuclear power plant maintenance programs. In addition, CMN NAVAL offers a wide range of services including integrated logistics support, transfer of technology programs, refits & conversions, integration of combat systems, and training.

Name: RAW Resourcing
