Name: Sportsman Boats
Description:
Sportsman Boats’ journey began in a 20,000 sq. ft. leased space with 6 hard-working employees in 2011. Many hours went into crafting a new kind of boat company. Never about imitating or replicating, Sportsman Boats was forged to be an innovative, forward-thinking and technologically advanced boat builder.

The need for a true family-friendly center console boat was very apparent. A boat that was geared for those that love to fish, love a great-ride, crave sleek lines and most importantly, needed to have the comfort and safety for the family.

Sportsman Boats’ goal is to build high quality boats that offer amenities the whole family can enjoy. Comfortable yet versatile layouts that provided the ability to participate in many different activities. Adhere to the highest standards of boat building practice through NMMA certification programs. And listen to the feedback from our boat owners across the country to improve every step of the way and never feel stale or dated.

They have grown tremendously since shipping the first hull in 2012. The lineup has expanded to 2 lines of offshore center console boats and 2 lines of inshore bay boats.

Manufactured by professional craftsman in Summerville, South Carolina, our home.

Name: Kleven
Description:
Kleven shipyard is a part of Green Yard - Sustainable Shipyards.


Shipbulding - Offshore Energy - Expedition Yachts - Service vessels
- Retrofit - Recycling - Rig-Service

Name: Dok Pantai Lamongan - DPL
Description:
PT. Dok Pantai Lamongan (DPL) is a shipyard focusing on New Building and Ship Repair. We are here to serve the regional ship-repair market with emphasis on safety, quality and punctuality.

We are certified for ISO 9001, ISO 14001, OHSAS, SMK3.
Member of Iperindo (Indonesian shipyard association).

GENERAL SERVICE
Docking /undocking, New Building, electrical supply, fresh water supply, fire line, blasting & coating, hydrotest over water ballast tank, rudder maintenance, seachest works, propeller maintenance, replating, engine room valve maintenance, piping, anti corrosion coating, Ultrasonic Thickness (UT Test), Magnetic Penetrate Test (MPT Test), Repowering, and other services commonly required.

PROJECT MANAGEMENT
24 hours operational project management.

Name: Lusben Refitting Yards
Description:
Lusben, a division of Azimut|Benetti Group, is one of the leading refit hubs in the Mediterranean.
Since 1956, Lusben has  been transforming and upgrading mega and giga yachts, both motor and sailing, through a unique blend of craftsmanship, innovation and advanced technology.
With shipyards in Viareggio, Livorno and Varazze, and a sales office in Antibes, we serve the global fleet with integrated services and a customer-centric approach that creates lasting value at every stage of the yacht lifecycle.

Name: Fibrafort Boats
Description:
Fundada em 1990, em Itajaí, Santa Catarina, a Fibrafort é considerada a maior fabricante da américa do sul em unidades produzidas. Fabricando barcos de 18 a 42 pés, em uma área de 6.700m², já são mais de 16 mil barcos produzidos satisfazendo os consumidores de todo o mundo.

A Fibrafort também conta com a maior rede de revendas e assistência técnica do mercado nacional e está presente em 43 países, conquistando a cada dia novos mercados. O estaleiro soube aproveitar o conhecimento adquirido nas constantes pesquisas de satisfação com o consumidor, obtendo a diferenciação na qualidade e inovação dos acabamentos e acessórios nas lanchas Focker que possuem a mais alta qualidade técnica e design. Hoje a Fibrafort tem parceria com fornecedores exclusivos e matéria-prima de alto padrão e conhecimento de mercado.

Name: ARESA SHIPYARD
Description:
Experience: Innovation. Added value. They are the keys that have defined ARESA SHIPYARD since 1961, when under the name Astilleros Reunidos, the firm was incorporated in Arenys de Mar (Barcelona). The company is dedicated to the construction, repair and maintenance, services and marketing of all types of commercial vessels up to 60 metres in length in Aluminium and GRP / Fiberglass .

The ARESA SHIPYARD is a leader in the international shipping industry with over 30 years' experience in the international market, and in the production and application of added value to products. Proof of the company export capacity is provided by the fact that 90% of its production is sold on the international markets, and the company specialises in the implementation of government projects, such as military  or fishery plans .

ARESA SHIPYARD provides naval products and services to over 25 countries worldwide, and is present in the international sales network in four continents:Europe, South America, Africa and the Persian Gulf area. The company adaptability and versatility is one of the key reasons why its products and services are widely accepted in the several countries in which it operates. The company staff adapts processes and modus operandi to the cultures of each country or region in which it operates, so that the customer receives a product or service fully tailored to his needs.

Throughout its long history, ARESA SHIPYARD has focussed on offering its customers value-added services that improve the firm's products and set them apart from the rest. This comprehensive service focuses on the implementation of service, maintenance and spare parts centres in the destination country and full customized training plans and  courses .
  ARESA SHIPYARD since 1961
Naval construction of professional boats up to 60 meters in length
Passenger vessels | Defence and surveillance vessels | Service and Offshore Vessels | Fishing vessels | Yachts | Professional rhibs |

Name: Damen Maaskant
Description: Damen Maaskant is a family-owned, client-focused shipbuilder, specialised in the newbuild, maintenance, repair, refit & conversion of fishing vessels, workboats and expedition yachts. As part of the Damen Shipyards Group, we are expanding our current markets and setting sail into new ones on the international stage.

Name: De Vries Scheepsbouw Makkum
Description:
De Vries first opened the doors of the yard in Aalsmeer in 1906 and today is solely dedicated to custom-built superyachts. Client wishes are at the forefront of the process and the experienced after sales department ensure this relationship continues long after delivery. Some 375 highly skilled craftsmen launch an average of three superyachts per year, each up to 100m in length.

The yard in Makkum was added to the company in 2005. The workforce grew from 70 to 250 people over the years. Accommodating builds of up to 120-metres in length, the yard also oversees refits and Feadship maintenance.
In house disciplines at both yards include steel, aluminum, interior and exterior joinery, mechanical engineering and paintwork.

Next to the two outfitting yards, the De Vries Group includes various subsidiaries with locations all over the Netherlands.

Feadship
Feadship is widely recognised as the world leader in custom-built superyachts. Based in the Netherlands with roots dating back to 1849, Feadship is defined by unparalleled craftsmanship, setting the standard in every aspect of design, engineering and construction. Each bespoke superyacht is created in partnership with an owner who invests in a uniquely rewarding build experience.

Name: NAUTITECH Catamarans
Description:
L’architecture navale française faisant référence dans le monde entier, le chantier Nautitech a vu le jour sur la façade Atlantique, au creux même de ce plan d’eau, à La Rochelle dans un premier temps puis à Rochefort, sur les rives de la Charente qui se jette directement dans le Pertuis d’Antioche. Le chantier a ainsi pu profiter pleinement du développement des catamarans pour asseoir sa fabrication et la réputation que l’on lui connait aujourd’hui.
A ce jour, Nautitech, c’est 250 employés, 80 catamarans intégralement conçus et construits à Rochefort chaque année, 80% d’export dans le monde entier par le biais de plus de 50 agents revendeurs.

Name: Flensburger Shipyard
Description:
Shipbuilders of advanced tailor-made vessels.
Market leaders of RoRo vessels.
RoRo, ConRo, RoPax, Passenger ferries, Advanced offshore vessels, Naval vessels

Name: Pipavav Shipyard Limited
Description:
Pipavav Shipyard project was originally conceived and implemented bySKIL Infrastructure Limited (SKIL).In September 2007,Punj Lloyd Limited (PLL) acquired a substantial stake in the Company, and now, both SKIL and PLL are co-promoters of the company.
 
 The shipyard is being constructed on 84.99 hectares (equivalent to 210 acres or 849,000 square meters) of land, adjoining 800 meters of dedicated waterfront. PSL has access to additional land in a nearby parcel of approximately 572 acres. Since additional land is acquiring formal approval for being converted into a Special Economic Zone, PSL will have the added advantage of being able to carry out some of its activities through a highly tax-efficient SEZ unit.

A considerable part of the development activity has already been carried out. Infrastructure developed so far includes two large wet docks(wet basins) with a length of 680 meters each and widths of 65 meters and 60 meters. These wet basins are being converted into dry docks which will be used for construction and repair of ships and will be the largest in India and amongst the largest in the world.

The contract for the first of these dry docks was awarded in April 2007 toAFCONS Infrastructure Limited, one of India’s leading companies involved in executing large and complex civil engineering projects at home and abroad, with emphasis on jetties, docks, harbours, roads, bridges & special foundations. AFCONS is part of theShapoorji Pallonji construction conglomerate The first dry dock is scheduled for completion in Q3 2008.

Various sophisticated equipment is already in place such as IHI cranes, sky masters, gantry cranes, gas cutting automated self-propelled gas cutting equipment and hydraulic material handling equipment along with infrastructure utilities such as oxygen generation plant, pollution control facilities, LPG system and fire fighting systems.

Name: U4 Marine
Description:
U4 is an integrated marine-oriented design and manufacturing company that takes pride in creating high-end yachts under the U4 Marine brand and exquisite furniture under the U4 Interiors brand. Our headquarters are strategically located in Antalya Free Zone, one of the most coveted ports in the Mediterranean.

Our passion for delivering superior craftsmanship and exceptional precision sets us apart from the rest. At U4, we meticulously craft every product and deliver unparalleled services that exude elegance and sophistication. With every project, we channel our boundless passion for excellence, always striving to exceed expectations. Join us as we bring your dreams to life – “Creating with Passion” is what we do best.

Name: Grupo Gabadi
Description:
Knowledge and good work since 1989

For more than 25 years our name has been associated with experience and perfection in furnishing spaces, creating style and making life more comfortable in that environment as inhospitable as the sea sometimes is.

During these 25 years, Gabadi's presence has spread to places as diverse as: Australia, Mexico, Qatar, Dubai, Singapore, Canada, Colombia and, of course, Europe.
5 years ago we incorporated the Isonell Company into our group, which has the prestige of being the oldest company in Spain in the manufacture of PASSIVE PROTECTION PRODUCTS against fire according to the international IMO and MED regulations. Company that in recent years has developed the most advanced products in acoustic protection in order to comply with the new protection requirements for workers in the Sea. Innovation and Development has been one of our challenges in recent years. Allocating more than 5% of our budget in the last 5 years. We have developed more than 4 projects that have been a revulsion in our "core Bussines". We are the first company in the shipyard that has obtained approval for LNG Ship Repair. Furniture Manufacturing System with integration of Design, Calculation and Manufacturing (CAD, CAE, CAM). We are currently developing a Patented Modular Container Accommodation System that will reduce costs and delivery times in Offshore Artifacts. This system has been supported by the Spanish CDTI.

We have had the enormous honor of receiving various awards of a business nature, as a result of teamwork: Norcontrol Award for Quality, Business Excellence Award from the CEO Foundation, Favorite Sons of the City of Ferrol, Galician Naval Company with Greater R+ capacity D (Idom Engineering), etc. This represents a challenge for us to improve ourselves day by day in our work.

Name: SHIPTECH DRYDOCKS
Description:
Founded in 2010 and proudly reimagined in 2023, Shiptech Drydocks has emerged as a powerhouse in the heart of Dubai Maritime City. With a legacy built on over two decades of seasoned leadership and skilled manpower, we specialize in shipbuilding, drydocking, ship repairs, and vessel conversions—delivering precision, reliability, and innovation at every turn.

Our 2023 transformation marked a bold new chapter, reinforcing our commitment to cutting-edge maritime solutions and world-class service. Today, Shiptech Drydocks stands as a trusted name in the global maritime industry, known for turning complex challenges into seamless operations.

Discover our latest projects, innovations, and industry insights—your voyage with Shiptech begins here.

#shipyard #drydocking #shipbuilding #ship_repair #ship_conversion #dubai_maritime_city

Name: COMPAS Marine
Description:
Instalación de centros de cultivo acuícola.
Instalación y recuperación de sistemas de fondeo.
Instalación de emisarios y salmoductos.
Ingeniería de fondeos
Robótica submarina.
Estudios de oceanografía.
Inspección de líneas de fondeo limpieza de fondos.
Fondeo Submarino
Salvataje Marítimo de Naves
Salvataje.
Remoción de restos náufragos.
Reflotamiento de naves y artefactos sumergidos.
Contención y recuperación de derrames marítimos.
Reparaciones de fortuna de buques.

Name: Oresund Drydocks AB
Description:
Oresund Heavy Industries AB is the mother company of the subsidiary companies Oresund Drydocks AB and Oresund Steel Construction AB. The business group operates within the fields of ship repairs and reconstructions as well as the manufacturing of large, complex steel structures.

During the last few years, the business group has experienced a large growth. An important reason for this are the great investments made to be able to meet an increasing demand in our services.

The company offers leading competencies within its areas of operation; continually growing capacities; as well as a strategic location right by Oresund – one of the busiest shipping routes in the world.

Name: Platinum Marine Services
Description:
The company has been established in İstanbul and headoffice is located in the town of Tuzla, where is a rising star and a dense core for entire International Shipping World attracted for any kind of activities related to all kinds of craft designed for transportation on water.

In line with above mentioned vision, presently main activities of Platinum Marine Services are;, Ship Chandling and Supply Services for any kind of needs of our clients including genuine and second hand spare parts in all major Turkish Ports, Port Agency Services for Tuzla, Yalova and Bosporus Straights, Technical Services & Repair Activities, Consultancy & Supervision Services, providing Technical Resources and Outsourcing, Brokering Activities for new ship building, second hand sales including demolition, ship repair, dry-docking, conversion and prefabrication of onshore steel constructions.

Platinum Marine Services assures to be a customer focused, straightforward, friendly, highly committed, reliable, innovative company, that can provide tailor made solutions in quickest, economical way with premium quality of products and services in order to establish long term relations with all of its customers.

We serve excellence timely and economically…

Name: Zeelander Yachts
Description:
For admirers of extraordinary

Zeelander is a high-end boutique yacht brand specializing in sports cruisers up to 79 feet. Every Zeelander is made to order at the company’s state-of-the-art facility in the Netherlands. Limited yearly production ensures each vessel is crafted with exclusive care and attention, delivering a timeless work of art that embodies Zeelander’s rich heritage and contemporary style.

Zeelander’s journey started in 2002 when founder Sietse Koopmans set out on a mission to find the perfect day boat. One that represented the most refined form of taste and the art of living - but was also free of any noise and vibration.

Disappointed with the imagination of the market, Sietse poured his energy into making his vision a reality. Five years were invested in his relentless pursuit of perfection. Everything had to be curved, silent and with an exceptionally comfortable ride. In 2008, the Zeelander Z44 was born. And so a legacy of excellence began.

Name: Econowind
Description:
Econowind is fully dedicated to  wind-assisted ship propulsion. We offer foldable and autonomous units in different sizes to propel a variety of coastal vessels.

Benefits:
+ Reduce emission by using wind as renewable energy source
+ Meet Poseidon Principles (aer) and Energy Efficiency goals (EEDI/ EEXI)

Available systems:
+ Econowind Flatrack unit 
The Flatrack unit is based on ISO-fix corners and can quickly be placed and removed. Giving a flexible solution for a variety of vessels such as general cargo vessels or other vessels. The Flatrack system has the advantage to be moved with the hatch crane of the vessel, no additional harbour equipment is needed to move the flatrack system, which provides flexibility in use.

+ the eConowind-unit 
This award-winning unit is based on a 40 ft sea container and can quickly be placed and removed. Giving a flexible solution for a variety of vessels such as general cargo vessels, tankers or other vessels with room for one or two 40 ft sea container(s).

Name: SOCARENAM
Description:
D’une réputation acquise depuis près de 60 années d’expérience au service
d’une clientèle exigeante, SOCARENAM s’adapte en permanence pour
répondre aux besoins spécifiques des armateurs.

Plus de 300 navires, entièrement réalisés par SOCARENAM, sont sortis à ce
jour de nos ateliers.

Une équipe de plus de 250 personnes, composée d'ingénieurs, de techniciens
spécialisés, d’ouvriers qualifiés et agréés par les organismes de contrôle,
garantit à nos clients un savoir faire et une compétence reconnus dans le
monde maritime et fluvial et permet à la SOCARENAM d’avoir sa place parmi
les chantiers les plus performants sur le plan national et international.

Name: Bharati Shipyard Ltd
Description: Having six yards, five on the west coast of India, at Ghodbunder (Mumbai), Dabhol, Ratnagiri, Goa, and Mangalore, and one at Kolkata. Specilising in building OSVs, MSVs, PSVs, AHTS and Ice class ships. It is also building one of the most sophisticated and technologicaly advanced Jack up drilling rig.

Name: Jurong Shipyard
Description: A 100% subsidiary of SembCorp Marine

Name: Grand Large Yachting
Description:
Le groupe Grand Large Yachting rassemble des chantiers de construction de bateaux de plaisance, de bateaux à usage professionnel ainsi que différentes activités liées ;
	• Allures Yachting, Outremer Yachting, Garcia Yachts, RM Yachts, ORC sont des chantiers leaders sur la niche du bateau de grande croisière
	• Gunboat est une marque de catamarans de plaisance à très haute performance (technologie carbone-époxy) d'origine américaine, dont le groupe a opéré la relocalisation en France. 
	• Alumarine Shipyard construit des bateaux professionnels en aluminium (pilotine, vedettes de sauvetage, vedette de lamanage, transport à passagers, etc.)
	• Ocean Voyager construit des catamarans dédié à l'exploitation en promenades touristiques à la journée (day-charter)
	• Grand Large Services répond aux attentes de service des propriétaires de bateaux du groupe.
	• EFT est le premier centre de formation en France pour les navigateurs pour l'ensemble des compétences requises (ex. mécanique diesel, météo, sécurité, médecine en situation d'isolement, etc.) hormis la conduite du bateau.
	• Shoreteam et GL Yachting Asia (Sri Lanka) sont deux entités d'expertise et de construction composite.
	• Griffon Marine, fondé en 1848, est une menuiserie spécialisée en agencements nautiques.

Name: DIVING STATUS
Description:
DIVING STATUS is licensed and certified to perform commercial underwater and diving services including underwater ship repair, ship maintenance, classification society approved in-water survey, coastal marine survey and civil engineering operations, dredging and salvage operations. 
	The main goals of DIVING STATUS are safety in all aspects of the company’s operations, responsible partner in the environment and customer satisfaction.

Name: NEPTUN WERFT
Description:
NEPTUN WERFT has been part of the MEYER Group since 1997. Here in Rostock, we have delivered over 70 river cruise ships and various ferries and gas tankers since it was founded.

NEPTUN WERFT employs around 700 people, making it one of the most important employers in Rostock. We also have around 50 apprentices in six different professions.

Name: Astilleros BALENCIAGA S.A.
Description: Balenciaga Shipyard, is one of the better known privately owned shipyards in Spain. Following an intensive investment programme, the shipyard has expanded its repertoire of steel hull ships, up to 95m LOA, which now includes tug boats, offshore support vessels, fishing vessels, cargo vessels and product carriers.

Name: Navalshore
Description:
A Navalshore é realizada desde 2004 no Rio de Janeiro. Em 15 edições, é responsável pela exibição de mais de 3.000 marcas de fornecedores de produtos e serviços para a indústria naval do mundo inteiro, promovendo negócios e desenvolvimento parcerias. Um público total superior a 130.000 pessoas já passou pela feira, reunindo profissionais, empresários e representantes do poder público.
Paralelamente à feira, a cada edição são promovidos cursos, workshops e conferências, já tendo sido realizados mais de 420 destes eventos.
Mais importante feira do setor na América do Sul, é ponto de encontro obrigatório para empresas e profissionais que atuam no setor. É organizada pela revista Portos e Navios, sua principal provedora do conteúdo e referência editorial do setor naval no Brasil, fundada em 1958.

Name: Israel Shipyards Ltd
Description:
For over 65 years, Israel Shipyards has been a trusted name in the maritime defense and commercial sectors, offering cutting-edge solutions tailored to meet global demands. Located on the Mediterranean coastline, our shipyard designs builds and maintains vessels of unmatched durability and reliability. From advanced military patrol boats like the world-renowned SHALDAG series, OPVs, and SAAR-class corvettes to commercial vessels, we serve both governmental and private sector customers worldwide.

At the heart of Israel Shipyards is a team of professionals with a strong foundation in naval experience. Many of our employees are former Navy personnel, bringing firsthand operational knowledge and a deep commitment to excellence. This commitment ensures that every vessel we build meets the highest standards, optimized for real-world maritime security challenges, and instills trust and confidence in our products and services.

With a reputation for quality and innovation, Israel Shipyards has established itself as a leader in providing versatile vessels for navies, coastguards, and commercial fleets around the globe. Our solutions contribute to key maritime zones' security and economic development, particularly in Africa, Southeast Asia, and Europe. By combining advanced technology, operational insight, and strategic partnerships, we continue to support the evolving needs of the maritime community.

Name: De Antonio Yachts
Description:
De Antonio Yachts was born from the passion for the sea and design of its founders, from the interest to innovate and design boats with simple and vanguard lines, providing smart solutions that improve efficiency, usability and performance. 

A brand aimed at demanding boat owners looking for something new and different that exceeds their expectations and needs. Boats to live the sea with style, sportiness and comfort.

Our main objective is to maximize the space in both deck and interior. We work hard to adapt the boats to the actual needs of the customer in terms of use and functionality.

All the boats in our range are powered by hidden outboard engines, the revolutionary solution that offers only advantages to enjoy the navigation with the best performance, high security and minimum maintenance. 

Discover our range with 10 different models in a range from 8 to 14 meters lenghts.

Enjoy the sea with De Antonio Yachts, there is an exceptional boat waiting for you to live your best experiences.

Name: Estaleiro Rio Maguari
Description:
O Estaleiro Rio Maguari é líder de mercado na indústria naval brasileira para barcaças fluviais e offshore, empurradores, rebocadores, ATBs, guindastes flutuantes, terminais flutuantes e estruturas flutuantes em geral. Foi eleito pela quinta vez o melhor estaleiro do Brasil pela revista especializada “Maiores & Melhores do Transporte” em 2018, 2021, 2022 e 2023. Sua localização na foz do Rio Amazonas proporciona acesso privilegiado da Bacia Amazônica aos mais importantes mercados do mundo .

Rio Maguari Shipyard is market leader in the Brazilian shipbuilding industry for river and offshore barges (deck, tank and hopper barges), pushers, tugboats, ATBs, floating cranes, floating terminals and general floating structures. It was voted the best shipyard in Brazil by the specialized magazine “Biggest & Best in Transport” in 2018, 2021, 2022, 2023 and 2024. Its location in the mouth of Amazon River provides privileged access from the Amazon Basin, to the most important markets in the world.

Name: Value Maritime
Description:
Value Maritime is a young innovation-driven team of experienced engineers and financial experts who understand shipping and the need for new, simple, sustainable solutions that make commercial and financial sense.

Since 2017, Value Maritime’s technology has been helping shipowners and operators to achieve valuable emission reductions and financial savings.

“Our goal is to make the maritime industry more sustainable by developing valuable technological solutions that economically combat shipping emissions.”

We developed “Filtree”, a unique system that cleans both air and water from all ship types and includes an integrated carbon capture feature making today’s fleet (newbuild or retrofit) sustainable today and future proof for tomorrow.

Name: Sirius Design & Integration AS
Description: Sirius Design & Integration is an independent ship designer and system integrator of innovative and new green technology for the international maritime and marine industry.

Name: Bluegame
Description:
Built for the wild, and the wild at heart. 
The determination of a new type, of a new kind of product, is a process that not only flows from the creativity and soul of the designer but is also the result of an evolution of the environment in which the phenomenon takes place. 

The minivans would have remained vans if the car market had not been mature to favor function to form. Certainly, to be able to give life to a new concept, a demiurge is needed, with the skill to perceive the evolution of taste and costumes and give it a body in a form. Bleugame is achieving this result.

What are Bluegame yachts? Open boats? Fishermans? Fast commuters? Chase boats? Day cruisers? Walk around? They are a cultural, functional and morphological synthesis of different types of boats that merge into a form never seen before, the Sport Utility Boats, in the creation of undefined usability spaces. 

The "function that creates the organ", as it is said in an evolutionary tone, comes from my vision, from my culture and studies of architecture, from my experience as Olympic sailor, with many thousands of miles and hours on the waves.

LUCA SANTELLA
Founder of Bluegame

Name: Delta Marine
Description:
VALUE PROPOSITION

Delta Marine provides to its customers effective and reliable design, engineering and consultancy services in order to get a ship which guarantees the desired return on investment throughout her lifecycle. Ships with Delta Marine signature are considered as safe, robust, economical, comfortable, aesthetic and environment-friendly end products.

PRINCIPLES

Delta Marine has adopted following principles and protects them under every circumstance in every project.

- Customer satisfaction
- Professional ethics
- Respect to environment
- Innovative approach
- Continuous improvement
- Focus on solution

VISION

Delta Marine's vision is a World and future where environment-friendly approach and understanding of efficiency are propagated and easily applied in marine sector by continuously improving the engineering know-how and tools.

MISSION

Delta Marine's mission is, 

- creating ship designs which meet precisely the client’s requirements as well as existing national and international rules by using up to date technology and engineering know-how,

- contributing building of most efficient ships following art in engineering concept and respecting the basic requirements of environment, safety, ergonomics, aesthetic and comfort,

- providing effective solutions in critical engineering issues for maximum return on investment.

Name: BLRT Grupp
Description:
BLRT Grupp is one of the largest industrial holdings in the region of the Baltic Sea. Today it unites more than 50 subsidiaries and 4 joint ventures in Estonia, Latvia, Lithuania, Poland, Finland, Norway and Ukraine.  

 BLRT Grupp established itself as a leading choice in shipbuilding, ship repairing, steelwork manufacturing, metal product processing and sales and mechanical engineering. BLRT Grupp provides the highest quality services in gas production and sales and transport services.

Holding employs about 4000 specialists. Twice was awarded the title of the Best Company of Estonia and seven times was recognized as the most competitive industrial company in Estonia.

Name: Simatech Shipping and Forwarding L.L.C
Description:
Simatech Shipping was first established in 1992 as a feeder operator in Dubai. With a small, modest employee base, Simatech started operating between the Gulf Ports. Although still considered a relatively young firm in the Gulf, Simatech’s reputation as a professional and innovative service provider is recognized as setting a benchmark within the shipping industry. More than twenty years since inception, Simatech now employs more than 200 highly qualified staff in their offices in UAE, Singapore, India, Somalia, and North America, as well as operating more than sixteen vessels in sixteen different destinations within the Gulf, the Indian Sub-Continent, Far East and East Africa. Noted for having moved over 1,000,000 TEUs in 2012, Simatech remains one of the most dynamic feeder operators in the region.

Upholding the Simatech's motto of "challenge, innovation and team work," we owe our success to the professional and quality assured skills and commitment of our staff as well as our timely strategic alliance with other feeder operators and main lines within the shipping industry. Through the active Projects Department, Simatech is continuously working towards finding new, unique opportunities in all sectors of the shipping industry. Simatech has recently started its new Port Development and Management department that is actively involved with developing ports in Mogadishu as well as Umm Qasr.

Simatech is now considered amongst the market leaders in the feeder industry in the Gulf with an active sales and purchase and chartering program. Simatech’s Commercial team provides our customer base with a large variety of services including vessel management and chartering. Simatech’s strategy is set on flexibility and efficient services as well as professional customer care. Service excellence is at the top of our agenda.
Simatech's strategy is set on flexibility and efficient services as well as professional customer care. Service excellence is at the top of our agenda

Name: Colegio Oficial de Ingenieros Navales y Oceánicos
Description:
Es una Corporación de derecho público, con personalidad jurídica propia, y se rige por los Estatutos, aprobados por el Real Decreto 1747/1999.

Los aspectos más relevantes de sus Estatutos son los siguientes:

 · Requisito indispensable de colegiación obligatoria para el ejercicio de la profesión excepto cuando este ejercicio se desarrolle exclusivamente en el marco de una relación funcionarial al servicio de la Administración en sus diferentes ramas. 
 
 · Son fines fundamentales del COIN la ordenación del ejercicio de la profesión, la defensa de los intereses profesionales de los colegiados y el impulso, en estrecha colaboración con la AINE, de las técnicas propias de la profesión.

Name: Astondoa
Description:
Our ships are the result of 100 years of experience. To date, four generations have witnessed the production of Astondoa boats. Throughout the years, we have remained firmly committed to technology, and our foundation has been based on design and innovation.
Part of our philosophy is to make sure that everything meets the highest quality standards, which is why we perform every task in our shipyard. All the woodwork, mechanical, polyester and upholstery processes are carried out by our own staff.
Building an Astondoa boat requires passion and commitment. Every ship is completely designed according to the preferences and needs of each customer. Every ship is unique and custom-made with an attention to detail. Just like no two people are alike, no two Astondoas are alike either. 
After many years in the industry, we have focused our operations on what we do best: building custom-made yachts. We do not aim to build thousands of boats because we have already done that. The complete satisfaction of a limited number of demanding customers gives meaning to our work. Only people who want individuality, quality and exclusivity can value an Astondoa.

Name: SRC Group
Description:
At SRC group, we specialize in design, engineering, technical and interior refits in the maritime, offshore, cruise, and ferry industries. Being in the industry for more than 20 years, we aim to consistently exceed our customers’ expectations by executing complex and technically challenging projects with exceptional quality across the globe.

Within these 20 years, we have worked on more than 5000 projects across the globe, from small repairs to turnkey retrofits. We have regional offices in the USA, Italy, the Netherlands (Port of Rotterdam), Norway, Poland, and Estonia, where we are headquartered. Our specialties are ship repair & refit project management. This includes design & engineering,  technical refit, electrical refits, and interior refits. In addition, we have in-house expertise to perform complete EPCI projects.

Two main factors make SRC unique: Firstly, our international footprint means we can readily mobilize and provide technically challenging services across the globe even in the remotest of locations. Secondly, our strong commitment to quality ensures that we are delivering value to our customers already from the sales phase. Our preparation in the sales process is so comprehensive and detailed that it has been considered as the standard even among our competitors. 

Our long-term vision is to create a sustainable company that does its part in reducing greenhouse emissions in the offshore and maritime industry while also adapting ourselves to the future of autonomous shipping.

Name: Smart Engineering & Design Solutions (India) Private Limited
Description:
SEDS was established in the year 2007 by the promoters of G.T.R. Campbell Marine Consultants Ltd. (“GTRC”) after being encouraged by the success of their ‘Trader’ series (30,000 DWT Bulk Carriers, built among others, at CSL, Kochi). In the international shipbuilding industry, GTRC is well known as the designer who brought series production to commercial shipbuilding with their Freedom design providing the template for an unequaled 172 vessels (built between 1965 and 1978) and becoming an enduring icon of series ship production. GTRC was involved in design and construction of over 400 vessels in various Japanese shipyards in the 1960s to 1980s.

SEDS provides complete design solutions from concept to production of ocean going, coastal, inland, and naval vessels. Its Indian subsidiary, Smart Engineering & Design Solutions (India) Private Limited was incorporated in 2013.

Name: TAIS Shipyards
Description:
TAIS 

Turkish Defense Industry continues to work as a modern, rapidly developing and dynamic sector, providing excellent opportunities for business partners, investors and customers all over the World.

In this context, some  part of the projects awarded by the Undersecretariat for Defense Industries has been completed and some of which are still under construction.

All the potential strength in the state-owned and private sectors has been mobilized for the MILGEM Project. Excellent cooperation has been performed between the private sector and, in particular, the institutional information, experience, facilities and personnel of the Undersecretariat for Defense Industries and Naval Forces Command pertaining to program management, resource allocation, project management, design  and shipbuilding.

Developing the projects in accordance with the ship building plan, manufacturing, and delivery on time have been carried out within a budget able to compete with the foreign precedents.

The experience gained from these projects will  be used in other military ship projects as well as will create the opportunity to the private owned shipyards to expand to the foreign markets with their products with the standards  and certificates acquired.

A consortium named TAIS with the cooperation of  three shipyards ANADOLU Shipyard, SEDEF Shipyard and SEFİNE Shipyard has been established due to the desire of our shipyards to export their products to the international market in the coming years with the momentum of their superior  achievement level  in the defense industry projects.

Our shipyards, demonstrating  a great success with the government’s means and contributions, have the will to achieve greater successes to export our products with TAIS brand, beside providing all the requirements of our Navy.

We wish the new union established as TAIS in good will to our  community, navy and country.

Name: Maritime Montering
Description:
We bring comfort to life at sea.

Founded in 1981, Maritime Montering has delivered over 1,150 newbuild interior projects that sail worldwide with comfort crafted by our team. Today, we’re introducing next-generation accommodation to create unforgettable experiences at sea.

With 700+ employees across Europe and Asia, we serve our clients at key maritime hubs -  from fishing vessels to luxury yachts and naval ships, from refits to newbuilds, and from warm shores to Antarctic waters. Whatever the vessel, our interior solutions bring comfort to life at sea.

Name: Wight Shipyard Co
Description:
Wight Shipyard Co. is a specialist aluminium shipbuilder based on the Isle of Wight, UK.

We focus on the design, construction, and support of high-performance vessels across three core areas: Fast Ferries, Workboats, and Superyachts.

Our operations are backed by a highly skilled team and supported by a fully equipped onsite refit and repair facility, allowing us to deliver through-life service and technical support for a wide range of vessels.

Name: DUBAI SHIPBUILDING & ENGINEERING L.L.C
Description:
DUBAI SHIPBUILDING & ENGINEERING L.L.C. was established in 1997 as a support group in managing the docking and repair activities of various types of vessels of her parent company, Mubarak Marine.  Since then, Captain Mohammed Obaid Mubarak began to realize his simple vision – developing locally a high quality, cost effective and dependable Organization that will execute ship repair and conversion to cater to the growing needs of the Marine Industry within the Gulf.

 

 

A decade of activity in shipbuilding and repair propels the company to its new heights by being involved in the construction of more than 60 vessels and wide variety of marine related constructions.  Among the seagoing vessels handled by the company are: Accommodation Barges/ Cable Laying Barge, Anchor Handling Tug/  Supply Vessel, Offshore Supply Vessels, Tugboats, Workboats, Landing Crafts, Oil Pollution Control boats, General Cargo vessels, Oil tanker, Fishing boats, Crane Barges, Specialized Vessels and Steel Yacht.

Name: Pacific Marine Engineering L.L.C
Description:
Pacific Marine Engineering Workshop L.L.C was established in 1987. Since then, we have been a major provider of reliable and high-quality production and engineering services for the indigenous and international Ship owners and ship management companies operating within the UAE. Pacific Marine is an ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015 certified company, committed to operational excellence. We are driven by the primary objective of providing our clients with best service & we achieve this through our excellent combination of expertise, skill and innovation.
We cater to the needs of our clients in all related fields of ship building, dry docking and afloat ship repair, Steel & Piping, Mechanical, HVAC, Carpentry & Insulation, Scaffolding & Rigging and Cleaning.

Name: General Dynamics NASSCO-Norfolk
Description: General Dynamics NASSCO-Norfolk is the consolidation of two great ship repair yards that have operated in the Port of Hampton Roads, Virginia for more than 50 years. The former Metro Machine Corporation was founded in 1963, awarded its first Master Ship Repair Agreement (MSRA) contract with the U.S. Navy in 1966, moved to the Ligon Street yard in 1971, and was acquired by General Dynamics NASSCO in 2011. Since its inception, the Ligon Street workforce has worked on more than 450 ships. The former Earl Industries was founded in 1985, moved to the Harper Avenue yard in 2004, and was acquired by General Dynamics NASSCO in August, 2012. The Harper Avenue workforce has been maintaining and repairing aircraft carriers and ships of the Navy's amphibious fleet, including the LPD-17 Class of amphibious transport dock ships, since 2005. NASSCO-Norfolk’s aircraft carrier business expanded to the Bremerton, Washington in the Pacific Northwest in 2014..

Name: Young Maritime & Offshore NL
Description:
Young Professionals are the key to a future-proof and sustainable maritime sector. Young Martime & Offshore NL offers young professionals in the industry the opportunity to meet each other, learn from one another and get inspired. 

𝗪𝗵𝗮𝘁 𝗱𝗼 𝘄𝗲 𝗱𝗼? Young Maritime & Offshore NL is the platform of Young Professionals in the Dutch Maritime and Offshore Industry. We organize a number of knowledge and networking events throughout the year, with the goal of connecting Young Professionals in and to the sector. 

We also aim to connect with established professionals in order to learn from each other and expand our network. 

𝗪𝗮𝗻𝘁 𝘁𝗼 𝗷𝗼𝗶𝗻? Are you under the age of 35? Are you eager to learn, like to share your thoughts and experiences; and last but not least, do you work for one of the more than 400 Maritime & Offshore NL members? We would like to welcome you as a member! Sign up by mailing 𝘆𝗼𝘂𝗻𝗴@𝗺𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗺𝗲𝗼𝗳𝗳𝘀𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲.𝗻𝗹 or click the link below - https://www.maritimetechnology.nl/nl/ons-aanbod/young-maritime-offshore-nl/

All Young Professionals are welcome, from engineer to operation and sales and everything around it. Registration for Young Maritime & Offshore NL is free of charge and we will keep you up to date on events and activities.

Name: RBNA Sociedade Classificadora
Description:
Founded in 1982, RBNA is the oldest Brazilian Classification Society.

RBNA is an independent organization for risk management and business solutions with focus on quality, safety and environment. Our mission is to boost our customers' performances without jeopardizing men and the environment.

Our client's high quality standard is testified by our quality control system. For the industry sector, we use ISO standards. For the maritime sector, we use IMO regulations and RBNA Collection of Rules. By receiving a RBNA Certificate, our costumers make public a quality status recognized by governments, insurance companies and end-users.

Name: HATECKE
Description:
HATECKE is a leading provider for cargo life- and rescueboat systems and cruise vessel life- and tenderboats.

We put innovative developments into practice by applying state-of-the-art technology, by using the very latest materials and working in specialist teams to focus on every level of detail.

All lifesaving equipment is being produced solely in Drochtersen / Germany. 

After-sales activities will be covered by our own Hatecke Service branches located in Germany, Miami, Singapore, Valencia and Malaysia and accompanied by a world wide service network of 40 independent service stations.

Name: Norden Ship Design House
Description:
NORDEN plays a major role as a Ship Designing, Marine Engineering and Consulting service provider across the region.

Our mission is to provide the most efficient, high-quality and custom-built solutions for our clients and their businesses. Personal attention to the clients’ requirements, understanding their needs and business model and open communication are fundamental to this process. 

Our vission is to expand our operations globally by meeting all the shipbuilding market's needs and also to provide a fully-integrated service as an engineering and design company, Consultant, Sub- Contractor or even as a joint venture to International potential partners. We are seeking to be a leading service provider in the shipbuilding industry, adding a value to our customers business by sharing our expertise and experience with them.

Our main services are:
*Ship Design & Marine Engineering
*Engineering Consulting
*Integrating of own certified Software for cargo monitoring, stability and damage stability
*Providing of workforce for shipbuilding or shiprepair activities
*Marine Equipment Trading and Logistics
*3D Laser Scanning and Modelling

NORDEN is ready to assist you as a potential partner with vast experiance, who offers comprehensive and competitive business solutions for all your project requirements in excellent quality!

Name: JA Moody
Description:
JA Moody is a renowned provider of technical sales support and solutions for the U.S. Navy and commercial marine industry.

Our offerings encompass new product sales, featuring essential fluid control solutions for items such as valves, actuators, strainers, and pumps. Comprehensive service and solutions include light assembly and warehousing capabilities tailored for ship set storage.

Our staff include Navy veterans and we have more than 200+ years of experience. Count on us for expert guidance on the latest fluid control technologies and high-quality, American-made valves, controls, and instrumentation.

Name: Arcona Yachts
Description: Arcona Yachts AB

Name: V Marine
Description:
We are redefining coastal and marine tourism by developing next-generation floating infrastructure from our base in the Kingdom of Bahrain. As a leader in sustainable tourism solutions, we design and deliver bespoke floating resorts, overwater villas, restaurants, theaters, and leisure hubs that transform how people experience waterfront destinations.

Our creations combine architectural elegance with environmental sensitivity, delivering luxurious spaces that blend seamlessly with the surrounding seascape. Each floating unit is engineered for comfort, durability, and adaptability; offering turnkey solutions for island resorts, marina developments, and eco-conscious tourism projects.

From concept to completion, our multidisciplinary team of naval architects and engineers ensure every project meets the highest international standards. Certified by Tasneef, Lloyd’s Register, and RINA, we offer trusted innovation backed by marine classification compliance.

Join us in building the future of hospitality where tourism meets the water.

Name: Técnico Corporation
Description: Técnico Corporation is a customer-driven company that is proudly owned by its employees. Our focus is on providing marine and industrial services to a wide range of clients, including the U.S. government and commercial entities.

Name: MARINELEC TECHNOLOGIES
Description:
Our company has many years of experience and expertise in the design and manufacturing of maritime equipments, Marinelec Technologies proposes you a global offer to ensure all the safety functions aboard your ship: Alarm Monitoring Systems AMS, Fire detections, Level Measurement, Optical and acoustic signalling, Alarms-Bilge detection, Bridge Navigational Watch Alarm BNWAS, Telegraph, specific products on request.
 
We also develop energy management systems especially for energy saving like the analytical econometer and new technologies such as power line and wireless communication systems.

Name: Lazzara Yachts
Description:
Lazzara Yachts is a legendary American company with decades of yacht building experience, delivering innovation and uniqueness in every design. As an experienced shipyard we have complete control over each and every build and we emphasize quality over quantity. This translates into building a “limited” number of yachts, so you’ll not find a Lazzara in every harbor.

Lazzara offers Express (LSX), Sport (LSY), Motor (LMY), Ultra High Volume (UHV), and Catamaran (LPC) series yachts. Lazzara owners become part of an exclusive group who appreciate the individuality of their vessel and the super yacht quality that goes into each and every build.

Name: Karstensens Skibsværft A/S
Description: Karstensens Skibsværft A/S is a modern and efficient shipyard located at Vestre Strandvej 17, Skagen, Nordjylland, Denmark.
