Description:
Hersteller von Elektrobooten und leistungsstarken Elektro-Motoren. 

BOOTSHÄNDLER | SCHIFFSWERFT | WERKSTATT | MOTORSERVICE

Name: Mazu Yachts
Description:
Mazu Yachts has been designing and producing Superyachts and Tenders Since 2011. State of the art Shipyard facility of 7000 sq.m indoor and 3000 sq.m outdoor spaces accommodates carpentry shops, paint booths and conditioning systems for creating anti dust environment.
We at Mazu Yachts spend tremendous amount of time getting to know our customers, their needs and lifestyles on each project from scratch to completion for creating the best product which fulfills their needs and desires.

Name: AIFE Liferaft - Luso Safe Equipment
Description:
A LIFERAFT – Venda e Manutenção de Equipamento Náutico, S.A., com sede na Av. 24 de Julho, em Lisboa, está integrada no Grupo AIFE – LIFERAFT, tendo mantido a sua actividade sempre ligada aos meios marítimos.

Mais tarde, o Grupo AIFE – LIFERAFT alargou as suas áreas de actuação à fabricação de instrumentos náuticos, à representação e manufactura de Meios de SALVAÇÃO, que hoje representam o núcleo fundamental de actividade da LIFERAFT – Venda e Manutenção de Equipamento Náutico, S.A.

O Grupo AIFE – LIFERAFT foi pioneiro na criação em Portugal da primeira estação de serviço dedicada à revisão de toda a gama de equipamentos ligados ao salvamento marítimo (jangadas pneumáticas, coletes insufláveis e fatos hipotérmicos), tendo obtido, nesta específica área de actuação, um nível de conhecimento e especialização que constitui uma mais-valia para a LIFERAFT – Venda e Manutenção de Equipamento Náutico, S.A, ao nível dos mais elevados padrões de qualidade de serviço requeridos pelo sector.

No que concerne à oferta comercial de equipamentos, as jangadas pneumáticas por nós representadas são oriundas dos fabricantes com as melhores referências Internacionais.

De igual modo, também no domínio dos acessórios náuticos, alargamos o nosso âmbito de actividade, partindo para a representação de diversas marcas de reconhecido prestígio internacional.

Mais recentemente, prosseguindo o nosso compromisso com a inovação e a qualidade, num esforço contínuo de melhoria dos serviços disponibilizados ao mercado, edificámos um órgão de armazenagem (paiol) para sinais de socorro marítimo (pirotécnicos), sendo o Grupo AIFE – LIFERAFT, uma vez mais, a primeira empresa no nosso país a dar, sustentadamente, este importante passo.

Por isso é que a excelência da oferta comercial do Grupo AIFE – LIFERAFT, quer ao nível dos equipamentos disponibilizados, quer ao nível dos serviços prestados, tem merecido o reconhecimento unânime por parte dos diferentes agentes da actividade marítima.

Name: MBK Marine
Description:
MBK Marine was established in 2019 in ICAD-2 of Abu Dhabi under the vision and leadership of H.H. Sheikh Mohammed Bin Khalifa Bin Zayed Al Nahyan, with the goal of becoming a leading one-stop solution provider in the Marine, Oil & Gas, and Industrial Construction sectors across the GCC region.

Operating from a state-of-the-art shipyard facility, MBK Marine delivers a comprehensive range of services, including Shipbuilding, Ship Repairs & Modifications, Steel Fabrication, and Rig Repairs & Upgrades, all executed with a steadfast commitment to quality, safety, and innovation.

Driven by advanced infrastructure and a team of highly skilled professionals, MBK Marine is dedicated to exceeding client expectations through excellence, reliability, and customer-focused service. With a clear vision for growth and industry leadership, the company continues to strengthen its position as a trusted partner in the regional maritime and industrial landscape.

Name: Ultimate Boats
Description:
Ultimate Boats delivers advanced platforms across five mission families: Intercept & Tactical; Patrol & Security; Rescue & SAR; Offshore Energy & Port Services; Survey, Hydrography & Research. Configurable as RHIB, cabin or multi-mission variants, and crewed or USV, our craft feature three proprietary advantages: Moxham advanced hydrodynamic hull design; DANU a lightweight high-performance composite; and disciplined, integration-ready engineering.

Conceived by aerodynamicist John Moxham and informed by XB-70 Valkyrie fluid-dynamic principles, our multi-award-winning hull delivers high lift-to-drag efficiency, exceptional directional stability and intuitive high-speed handling, reducing fuel burn and CO₂ at matched transit speeds.

DANU is a hydrophobic, infusion-moulded composite with superior strength-to-weight versus conventional glass-fibre laminates. It resists osmosis, delivers exceptional impact resistance, limits fatigue and delamination, and extends service life while reducing maintenance. The material is closed-loop and endlessly reusable.

Each platform is purpose-designed, configuration-controlled and delivered with open power + data architectures for C4ISR integration. The result is faster, safer, lower-emission operations with verifiable performance and a lower total cost of ownership. We specialise in the design and manufacture of sub-24 m professional platforms for defence, security and commercial operators. Platforms are engineered to national and international codes and standards and integrate radar, EO/IR, communications and mission systems via open architectures.

Operational credibility includes deliveries of high-performance craft to specialist maritime units; crew-transfer vessels for offshore energy; research platforms for scientific organisations; rescue craft for emergency services; and USVs for sovereign forces. Trade press reports high-grip cornering, reduced slamming and year-round cabin utility, evidencing handling and seakeeping.

Name: SETAG Yachts
Description:
SETAG, the world’s leading design & refit specialists - redefining yachts through our expert-led bespoke refit service.

We believe that true luxury lies in the value of craftsmanship, which is why our reputation is founded on serious talent – a dedicated design and engineering resource that represents the best expertise in the business, with over 200 years of combined experience working on the world’s finest motor yachts – ranging from 30 to 150 feet. 

Our aim is to ensure your yacht reflects your own taste and personality: luxury redefined, refitted and remastered…by the original artists.

Name: ATAGEM DENİZCİLİK DIŞ TİC A.Ş.
Description:
Atagem group was established in 1993 in order to carry out all kinds of surface cleaning and preparation and paint applications in shipbuilding and industrial facilities.
Atagem Grup also is provided audit and consultancy services to the customers on all matters within its activity area with the best training, classification societies and expert and experienced staff certified by the Ministry of National Education
Atagem Grup is acted on occupational health and safety only not in compliance with the national legislation, also within OHSAS 18001 Occupational Health and Safety Management System principles.
ATAGEM has the ability to apply metalizing and tank coating processes with surface preparation, blasting, painting, fireproof painting applications not only in the maritime sector, also in the industry at home and abroad.
The company has become one of the leading companies in the field of projects carried out in Kazakhstan, Turkmenistan, Georgia and Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus by carrying out its activities abroad since the 2000s with the experience it acquired in the country.

Name: NOVAMARINE
Description:
“A Novamarine is simply a Novamarine”—unique, innovative, and peerless, recognized worldwide.

Since 1983, Novamarine has redefined the nautical world, transforming bold visions into tangible realities. With over 40 years of expertise, the brand is globally synonymous with excellence and pushing boundaries, turning every project into a masterpiece of unmatched performance.

Driven by a visionary team, Novamarine continuously redefines navigation, setting the standard in both civilian and military markets.

Crafted uniquely in its shipyards in Costa Smeralda, Sardinia, Novamarine vessels are entirely built in-house by a team of brilliant minds who share an unwavering passion for perfection, from design to the finest detail.

After more than 40 years of groundbreaking achievements, Novamarine continues to inspire and drive innovation, representing a vision of excellence without limits. 

Novamarine is listed on the Italian Stock Exchange (Euronext Growth Milan: NOVA)

Name: Sessa Marine Brasil - Intech Boating
Description:
Somos reconhecidos pelo nosso estilo dinâmico e inovador. Criamos e construímos embarcações exclusivas, que unem design sofisticado, tecnologia de ponta, alta performance e qualidade, sempre com o objetivo de proporcionar emoções únicas a quem embarca em uma Sessa Marine. Ícones de elegância e estilo, nossas embarcações refletem mais de 65 anos de tradição e excelência.

Desde 2011, nossa fábrica em Palhoça – SC é o único parque fabril da Sessa Marine fora da Itália. Com produção de embarcações que vão de 27 a 60 pés, a unidade brasileira conta com 20.000 m² e uma das equipes mais qualificadas do mercado náutico. Possuímos setores próprios de engenharia, laminação de cascos e peças em fibra de vidro, acabamento, montagem, metalurgia, marcenaria, modelagem, estofaria, elétrica e mecânica, além de um núcleo administrativo especializado e uma equipe própria de Assistência Técnica, garantindo suporte e atendimento a toda a rede de vendas nas Américas.

Name: IDBMARINE
Description: Implanté à Concarneau, IDB Marine est un chantier de construction navale dirigé par Denis BOURBIGOT (20 ans d'expériences maritimes réparties entre les bateaux de charter, les voiliers de courses au large, les chantiers de constructions navales), qui réalise les Maxi 650 et les Mojito.

Name: Amels B.V.
Description: Amels B.V. is a shipbuilding company based out of VLISSINGEN, Netherlands.

Name: Tesco Indomaritim
Description:
PT Tesco Indomaritim is a privately-owned Indonesian national shipbuilder and defence contractor. Tesco specialises in designing, constructing and supporting Commercial and Military vessels. We have celebrated over 50 years serving and dedicating our services to over 100 Defence and Commercial fleet operators around the globe. Our product ranges from crew boats, tug boats, landing crafts, fast patrol boats to missile boats.

As of FY2022, Tesco has delivered over 400 vessels and have pioneered repowering programs for the Indonesian Armed Forces fleet of Frigates, Corvettes, Mine Sweepers and LSTs. With over 20 years of ship repair and after sales support experience, we have a proven track record to service various types of vessels supported through over 10 branches and 2 yards across Indonesia.  

Tesco strives to place a strong focus in understanding our clients operational needs and our people are firmly dedicated to create optimum performances, short delivery times and low operational costs.

Name: LASAI | Solar Electric Boats
Description:
Somos fabricantes de barcos eléctrico-solares que navegan sin ruido ni emisiones. Combinan la última tecnología con el diseño más vanguardista.

Tenemos claro que existe otra forma de navegar. Sin ruido, ni emisiones. Con LASAl. Porque la tecnología solar y eléctrica de nuestros barcos nos convierten en una opción sostenible y respetuosa con el mar.

Navegar en calma, para llegar más lejos que nadie.

Name: Tec Wire - Engineered for Superyachts
Description:
Tec Wire has been supplying Carbon Fibre & Stainless-Steel exterior products to the superyacht industry for over 18 years.

Sun Awnings, Flagpoles, Swim Ladders and Railing Systems are just some of the Tec Wire products you can expect to find on iconic superyachts worldwide. They have all been designed, engineered and manufactured in-house by a talented and professional team noted for their skill, craftsmanship and experience in the superyacht sector.

Tec Wire thinks in solutions, engineers excellence and delivers the highest quality and finish, guaranteeing complete customer dedication and satisfaction.

Name: Record Certificação Naval
Description: A Record Certificação Naval iniciou suas atividades em meados de 2006, sendo reconhecida Delegação de competência que a Marinha do Brasil, através da Diretoria de Portos e Costas – DPC autoriza uma empresa a exercer a função de vistoriadora de embarcações  pela Marinha do Brasil como Entidade Certificadora para atuar em todo o País, representando a Autoridade Marítima Brasileira (MARINHA - DPC) para realizar as vistorias que garantirão que as embarcações por ela certificada estão seguras para a realização de transportes, seja de passageiros, carga, veiculos e outros. A importância de empresas deste ramo é de extrema relevância para o país, pois é a forma que a Marinha do Brasil consegue aumentar seu raio de ação na busca do aprimoramento das embarcações brasileiras, tornando assim a navegação mais segura, tanto para a embarcação quanto para os tripulantes e passageiros, tanto na navegação interior quanto na navegação de Mar-Aberto.

Name: Unique Yacht Wrapping
Description:
Unique Yacht Wrapping is a leading international Yacht and Superyacht finisher, specialising in the installation of advanced vinyl wrapping solutions to transform and protect your yacht.

Dedicated to the superyacht industry, our business continues to grow through our high level of professional knowledge and experienced support. We work closely alongside owners, yacht designers, captains, yacht brokers, build & refit managers and interior designers with exceptionally reliable and diligent personal service.

Whether your yacht is in need of a full exterior wrap or a complete interior refit using architectural films, Unique Yacht Wrapping will create a transformation that will not only impress but will last and be delivered to the highest quality.

Our highly trained and skilled fitters have vast experience in the marine and yachting industry and use only the best vinyl manufacturers to truly get the finish you desire.

Our services are available worldwide, with a presence in the UK, Mediterranean, Northern Europe, the USA and the Middle East.

Name: Marine Group Boat Works
Description:
Marine Group Boat Works is the Pacific Coast's premier full-service shipyard with locations along the San Diego Bay and in San Jose del Cabo.  Featured on The History Channel’s “Modern Marvels,” for its 665-ton Travelift , it services superyachts, commercial and government vessels up to 220 feet (68 m).  Both locations specialize in retrofits, conversions, hull extensions, centerboard service and mechanical repairs.  There are on-site workshops for electrical, carpentry and paint work along with ABS-certified welders and other highly skilled tradesmen.  

The San Diego superyacht refit facility is notable for its warranty work and is experienced working with reputable builds including Perini Navi, Feadship, Pichiotti, Royal Huisman, Delta and more.

In addition, the Los Cabos yard offers drystack storage for boats and tenders up to 33 feet (10 m), a marine supply store on site and in-water maintenance.  

Complimentary services for visiting captains and crew include concierge, office suites, Wi-Fi, galley and shower facilities, designated parking, a private helipad and more. 

For more information, visit www.marinegroupboatworks.com.

Name: Hijos De J. Barreras, S.A.
Description: Comprometerse con el futuro es confiar en nuestra capacidad para innovar y ser eficientes. Es aprovechar el pasado para no dejar de mejorar. En Barreras entendemos la calidad como un esfuerzo para satisfacer las expectativas de nuestros clientes y ser más competitivos. Es un empeño que incumbe a todo el personal de nuestra empresa y que nos ha convertido en una referencia mundial.

Name: SAVI srl
Description:
SAVI was established in 1950 and since then operates in the shipbuilding and ship repair, developing its activities in Italy and abroad, with specific reference to the refitting of entire areas of the ship, providing a  “turnkey” product, from the plants to the finishing of furniture.

SAVI is a modern and dynamic company that has been able to change in the years to adapt to the diverse and changing needs of the market and the increasingly challenging demands of our customers.

Since the early hull maintenance activities, such as sandblasting and painting, it moved to the insulation works and flooring, still today services provided by SAVI to its customers.

In the 90s, SAVI has opened a new business unit: stainless steel mainfacturing and the construction of plants and products for the catering areas of the ships,

acquiring the ability to make whole galleys, bar and buffet counters with the formula “turnkey” in compliance with USPHS standards.

Since 2006 SAVI has extended its field of activity to the furnishing for interior and can make public spaces, rooms, cabins, crew areas and open decks.

Starting from the demands and needs of the customer, SAVI can develop all phases of the project, from general arrangement plans, to renderings, to the shop drawings.

Strong of a team of qualified engineers and a highly specialized workshop and an experience built up over half a century of work, SAVI guarantees high quality and a proven timely execution of the work.

SAVI serves prestigious clients who use its services for large works and restyling of the ships

Name: Estaleiro Atlântico Sul - Hammbra do Brasil
SSH Maritime
Description:
Established in 2008 with offices located in Europe and the Middle East, Sovereign Sea Hermes is an international and full-service luxury yachting boutique company renowned for its dedicated team of experts ready to support, advise and assist clients in every aspect of the yachting experience including sales, purchase, charter, management, refit and construction.
Our experience and innovative team together with our worldwide contacts and relationships with builders, shipyards, co-brokers and industry professionals in Europe, the Middle East and U.S. are key to providing first class and unrivaled service to our clients. 
We design tailor-made projects around each client's needs and requirements considering his wishes and visions. We use our deep background and high professionalism for reaching unbelievable goals. 
We care and protect the privacy of each client by representing him in every activity related to the project, from concept to delivery up to the management of the vessel. 
Our clients enjoy and appreciate our work philosophy before, during and after the life-cycle of each project.

Name: Edorado
Description:
Edorado designs advanced hydrofoil systems for high-performance maritime applications.
From strategic operations and rapid response to clean transport and iconic tenders — our scalable platforms deliver speed, stability, and control across public, commercial and defense sectors.

Name: MEC REPAIRS
Description:
MEC Repairs es una compañía con cuatro divisiones que aprovechan sinergias entre sí para llevar a cabo trabajos con calidad, seguridad, velocidad y al precio correcto para garantizar al cliente una experiencia satisfactoria. 

Nuestro compromiso es ganar clientes para toda la vida, y no solo para el trabajo de hoy. 

Contamos con un slipway yard en el lado oeste de la entrada del Canal de Panamá, exactamente en el corregimiento de VERACRUZ, este astillero cuenta con 16,301 m2, 4 carriles, 4 posiciones para naves con más de 40 m, 2 posiciones para naves de 20m. 2 posiciones para naves de 70m, 1 mesa de transferencia. 

Servicios: carenaje estándar, restauración estructural, reparación de motores eléctricos, tratamiento de superficie, reparación mecánica, mantenimiento y reemplazo del sistema de propulsión, en fin, todo lo que su remolcador, yate, barcaza necesita en cuestión de reparación y mucho más. 

UNDERWATER SERVICES es la empresa de buceo comercial más completa de la región, certificada para hacer trabajos para la ACP lo cual resalta la calidad y seriedad de nuestras operaciones de buceo. Entre sus servicios están: inspecciones submarinas, reparaciones y limpiezas de casco en el Pacífico y el Atlántico. 


• Aflote: Es la división que se encarga de hacer reparaciones aflote ya sea en anclaje o muelles y en el Pacifico o Atlántico de Panama. Todos los trabajos son efectuados con calidad para ser aprobada por agencias clasificadoras IACS (ABS, BV, GL, Lloyds, NKK, etc…) NUESTRO ESLOGAN ON RIGHT, ON TIME, ON BUDGET

You can send us your Dry Docking Inquiries to sales@mecshipyards.com

Name: iYacht design & engineering
Description:
iYacht GmbH is a German yacht design and engineering studio with offices in Hamburg and Kiel.
Led by Udo A. Hafner, the studio has completed more than 400 projects over 20 years and currently employs a team of 11 engineers, designers, and naval architects.

iYacht is a one-stop solution for its clients, providing a comprehensive range of services, from initial sketches to CE marking. 

This is made possible thanks to the wide array of skills and expertise brought to the table by the in-house team. This approach allows iYacht to manage all aspects of its services internally, eliminating the need for outsourcing, leading to an impeccable quality of service and efficient project management, thus ensuring the realization of the client’s vision, always on time and within budget.

Name: Navimec Engine Service
Description: Navimec Engine Service is an independent service provider specializing in the maintenance and repair of diesel marine engines.

Name: Lamdo Yachts
Description:
Lamdo Yachts company is a polish manufacturer of exclusive Trawler yachts. The shipyard was founded in 2021 in Giżycko (Poland) by Błażej Predko who has been involved in yacht production in Poland for many years. The first motor yacht LY30+ left the producion hall in June 2022. 
The official premiere of LY 30+ took place during the POLBOAT Yachting Festival Gdynia in July 2022. The yacht was nominated in the  category “The most Beautiful motor yacht up to 11m in length”.

The company focus on solid workmanship, original design and cares about details. The equipment is based on the highest quality materials and accessories. Therefore, the first model in the new line of motor boats for Lamdo Yachts was designed by the world-famous designer Tony Castro.

Name: Kornerstone
Description:
Kornerstone Group of Companies was founded in 2014 by Mr. Biju Thomas, a Naval Architect with over 30 years of experience in the Marine & Offshore sectors. Before establishing Kornerstone, Mr. Biju Thomas spent 25 years at Lamprell, specializing in Marine Accommodation. His vast industry expertise has shaped Kornerstone’s vision and success.
Kornerstone began with Kornerstone Trading LLC and quickly expanded into Marine Accommodation Construction, focusing on turnkey upgrades and refurbishments of marine and offshore living quarters. This growth led to the creation of Kornerstone Ships & Boats Maintenance Services LLC, with offices in Dubai and a branch in Umm Al Quwain.
To meet growing regional demands, we recently established Kornerstone Ships Repair Maintenance Services LLC in Abu Dhabi, extending our services to offshore activities and reinforcing our presence in the market.

Name: MARSİS
Description:
Marsis is a manufacturer and designer of complete “External Fire Fighting Systems”. Marsis was founded in 2005 and located in particular plant, Istanbul, Turkey.

 

The system’s components are partly manufactured by Marsis and partly supplied from the companies who are trusted & proven of their quality in the marine market. All of the system’s technical calculations and drawings are prepared in-house by experienced engineers according to classification society rules and as per the customer’s specifications. Marsis provide approved system design and components from any of the marine classification societies

 

Marsis started to manufacture “Hydraulic Power Units” with “Electric Terminal Boxes” after 2008 for different purposes and a number of different applications.

 

Marsis aims to maintain full customer’s satisfaction by increasing service quality in both sales and after- sales service. Marsis provides best competitive performance systems for its customers.

Name: VCAT SA
Description:
A VCAT BOATS é sinônimo de qualidade, inovação e confiança. Há mais de 10 anos, permitimos aos brasileiros combinar a paixão em navegar com o entretenimento. Nossa qualidade e variedade entre as nossas embarcações estão presentes em muitos momentos especiais, seja navegando em rios ou mares, apreciando aquela vista de pôr do sol ou nascer do dia ou fazendo aquele churrasco com os amigos e familiares. Pesquisa e desenvolvimento está em nosso DNA, assim podemos garantir que sempre oferecemos o melhor e mais atual.

Somos o maior estaleiro da América Latina no nosso segmento, nossas embarcações estão presentes em mais de 20 estados brasileiros e países como Argentina, Uruguai e Paraguai. Atingimos a marca de mais 850 embarcações produzidas.

Juntos, criamos um lugar onde somos felizes, somos bem-sucedidos e inspiramos uns aos outros. Quem sabe, aqui, você possa encontrar o seu melhor espaço.

Name: MTG-Dolphin plc
Description:
Found in 1991 with main activity “ship repair of vessels”, MTG DOLPHIN Plc repairs between 40 and 53 vessels each year. In last 3 years 145 vessels have gone through different kinds of repair works.
Production and resource capacity of the yard contributes to building of vessels of up to 16 000 tons, as well as repairs of vessels of up to 60 000 tons, using two floating docks with carrying capacity of 18 000 and 8 500 tons; 70 cranes with lifting capacity of 250kg to 80tons; 4 pier spaces, a line for preliminary preparation of steel plates and steel profiles, workshops and platforms.

Name: Stormer
Description: Stormer Marine is a Dutch shipyard located in Hoorn that builds workboats for discerning professional clients worldwide. We at Stormer combine the Dutch shipbuilding craft with the latest technologies in marine design, engineering, build and propulsion. Applications include patrol, rescue, harbor duty, firefighting, surveillance, contracting, towing, survey  and transportation services.

Name: North Sea Offshore (NSO)
Description:
North Sea Offshore (NSO) provides premium turnkey interior accommodation solutions for the offshore, marine and passenger vessel markets in China.  Additionally, NSO is a leading manufacturer of aluminium helidecks and access systems for offshore, marine and onshore/rooftop applications.  Located in the heart of the shipbuilding industry in China, our highly skilled team of over 350 strong is capable of providing dynamic, timely and innovative services to suit your needs.  We work in partnership with some of the leading vessel owners, designers, suppliers, and shipyards in the shipbuilding industry.  Let us know how we can help!

Feel free to contact us at:  info@northsea-offshore.com

Name: NEFERTITI MARINE
Description:
Nefertiti was established in 1975 in Alexandria, Egypt, as a family-run business providing marine services and support. Over the years, the company expanded its scope to include ship design, shipbuilding, fabrication, maintenance and overhauling, as well as distributorship. In 2000, Nefertiti began operating its own building and repair facility (YARD K), followed by a strategic expansion into the industrial sector in 2010, offering mechanical works, pipework, welding, and fabrication services.

More information: https://nefertitimarine.com

Name: INC - Indústria Naval Catarinense
Description:
Localizada no litoral catarinense, a INC destaca-se pela excelência na construção e reforma de embarcações. Com anos de experiência, nossa equipe de profissionais altamente capacitados está empenhada em construir e reformar embarcações personalizadas que atendam às demandas mais exigentes do mercado. Desde embarcações pesqueiras até grandes navios de carga, nossa capacidade de inovação e adaptação nos permite oferecer soluções de alta qualidade, assegurando durabilidade e desempenho excepcionais em cada jornada pelos mares.

 

Nosso compromisso vai além da construção de embarcações. Somos especialistas em revitalização e retrofit, garantindo longevidade e segurança nas embarcações. Com tecnologias de última geração e técnicas avançadas estamos prontos para enfrentar novos desafios com renovada confiança. A indústria naval catarinense é reconhecida pela sua qualidade e inovação.

Name: S.G. "William Froude"
Description: The S.G. "William Froude" is the study association for Maritime Engineering & Naval Architecture at the Delft University of Technology. Froude provides the connection between the student, university and maritime industry by monitoring the level of education and organizing interesting excursions and lectures.

Name: Crown Electric Ships and Boats
Description:
As the UAE's first electric ship building company, Crown is a pioneer leisure yachting and naval defense, developing 100% electric, Al and autonomous boats that provide zero emissions, intelligent navigation, and threat detection to greatly enhance safety and operational optimization.

Crown’s strategic industry relationships and multiple government partnerships has solidified its as a pivotal frontrunner to shape the cutting-edge future of electric boats and meet the demands of a rapidly evolving market.

Crown is led by a visionary team distinguished across engineering, naval design, military service, entrepreneurship, and venture capital investing.

Name: Merré
Description:
Merré is a shipyard who builds ships from 12 to 80 meters in steel and/or aluminum material.

Merré is wellknown as the "multispecialist" in the worldwide shipbuilding industry.

Based on both the skills and the knowledge of its teams, as well as a modern organization, Merré keeps under his expertise the entire value chain for the ship construction from architecture to the construction, equipment, sale and after-sale.

Merré is also the only French shipyard specialist of dredging, cutter suction and trailing suction hopper dredging, Genflo dredging process and all dredging equipment.

Name: PARKOL MARINE ENGINEERING LTD
Description:
Parkol Marine Engineering Ltd. is a ship building and vessel repair company based in North Yorkshire with shipyards in Whitby and Middlesbrough. We offer a full range of marine engineering services to the fishing and workboat industries.
Services provided include overhauls, repair, modification and maintenance of vessels.
We also build new vessels ranging in size from 15m to 35m: trawlers, gill netters, seiners, crabbers, scallopers, feed carriers (to name a few).
Parkol has built 52 vessels since 1997 for clients all over the UK ranging from the Shetlands Islands, East and West Coast of Scotland, Cumbria, Yorkshire Coast, Pembrokeshire to Cornwall and Devon. In 2021 Parkol built its first export to Republic of Ireland and is building a second Irish vessel at the moment.
We have an in-house team providing the following services: steel and aluminium fabrication; mechanical and electrical engineering; hydraulics and pneumatics; painting, shot-blasting, hot zinc spraying.

Name: OCEANiST ENGINEERING
Description:
Oceanist Engineering is an agent/distributor of worldwide well-known Marine, Offshore and Yacht equipment manufacturers since 2001 in Turkish Shipbuilding and Shipping industry. 

Company focussed to give entirely the best service to our customers and partners with our well-educated Sales and Service engineers.

Name: Hvide Sande Shipyard
Description:
Hvide Sande Shipyard was founded in 1950 with a focus on building and repairing ships for the local community in and around Hvide Sande.

Since then the company has evolved and we now design, build and maintain many types of vessels for a wide range of international customers. 

In recent years, one of our focuses has been on hybrid and fully electric vessels. 

Our shipyard has state of the art manufacturing facilities including approx:
- 8,500 m² of covered production and maintenance facilities
- 16 slipway tracks
- 4 covered slipways
- Surface treatment sheds with heating and humidity control

This allows us to optimize production time and deliver professional workmanship on time, every time, all year round.

Name: Lehmann Marine GmbH
Description:
Lehmann Marine is a German technology leader in maritime LFP (Lithium Iron Phosphate) battery systems.
 
Founded in 2016 as the battery department within Becker Marine Systems GmbH and independent since 2022, we develop and manufacture advanced energy storage solutions.

Our mission: combine engineering excellence with sustainability and safety.
With more than 100 projects currently underway, Lehmann Marine is driving the electrification of shipping.

Our products:

• AQUBE – water-cooled, designed for demanding 2C operations such as peak shaving and emergency power. AQUBE ensures superior thermal performance and fast charge/discharge capability for high-power environments.

• CUBE – air-cooled, optimised for up to 1C applications. Its compact design and innovative cooling guarantee uniform temperature distribution and long cycle life – ideal for ferries, yachts, and workboats.

Both systems use inherently safe LFP cell technology, free from cobalt and nickel, supporting a sustainable supply chain and >90% recyclability. Type approvals from DNV, BV, LR, and RINA confirm compliance with the highest safety standards. Modular architecture enables scalability from a few kWh to several MWh, with voltages up to 1,000 VDC.

Since Sunlight Group acquired a majority stake in 2025, Lehmann Marine has scaled projects to multi-megawatt levels and expanded globally. Recent contracts include large installations for fish-farm vessels in Norway, retrofits for ferries, and solutions for hydrogen-powered ships and megayachts.

Lehmann Marine is more than a supplier – we are an enabler of maritime electrification. By combining proven technology, rapid innovation, and a commitment to safety, we help shipowners achieve zero-emission goals.

Name: Pearlsea Yachts
Description:
Pearlsea Yachts is a Croatian yachting brand. We manufacture, sale and charter unique and certified Open, Coupe or Flybridge motor yachts from 31ft to 56ft. Our cutting edge design and construction technology gives our yachts the following characteristics:

- Custom design solutions
- Top maritime specs
- Extreme luxury details
- Extra vessel safety

Pearlsea Yachts is a yacht charter agency in Croatia. We offer complete yacht charter/boat rental services from our charter base in marina Baška Voda, Makarska or nearby marinas upon client request.

We are capable of meeting all the demands of our customers' performance.Our group has been engaged in assembly,welding,metalworking, and piping, including assembly and prefabrication. Over the last 10 years, we have worked on all ships that have entered or were built in the following shipyards: Daewoo Mangalia Heavy Industries Shipyard, DAMEN Shipyard Galati, VARD Tulcea, and VARD Braila.New Building: Our company offers solutions for all aspects, including maintenance, manufacture, assembling, assembly, pre-assembly, improvement, and various kinds of changes for all types of industrial structures, ships, oil industrial, and civilian platform ventilation systems, as well as hot and cold water systems for ships. We are capable of meeting all performance requirements of our customers.Marine Repair and Maintenance: With our experience in this field of work, we can ensure the safe and efficient repair and maintenance of any ship. We offer fast assistance services in the local area or in any port.Pipefitting: We specialize in pipework (garments and installation) by executing the following types of installations from the platform-dock stage to the final stage, conducting pressure tests for each installation, including air tests, hydrotests, or oil tests.Our mission is to provide professional services in the best possible time for various shipbuilding projects. Our firm has earned the esteem of stable and trusted partners with the necessary expertise in performing complex assignments, boasting a team of highly skilled and active employees. 𝐖𝐞𝐥𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐀𝐫𝐚𝐛𝐢𝐚𝐧 𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐞 𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐚𝐧𝐲 (𝐀𝐌𝐂)

Any Time, Any Where, Benificial to the Clients;
Every Word, Every Action, Responsible to the Enterprise

Name: Maritime-Professionals.nl

Description: Silverback Marine hosts the nations largest inventory of in-stock workboats. We specialize in Design+Build of landing craft, workskiffs, truckable tugs, mini barges, and more.

Name: Thoma-Sea Marine Constructors LLC
Description:
Thoma-Sea Marine constructors was founded in 1990 by Robert Thomassie Sr. 
 Walter Thomassie is now at the helm of Thoma-Sea.  Our facilities include 2 new construction yards and 1 repair facility in the Port of Terrebonne located off the Houma Navigation Canal 1 mile south of the Intercoastal Waterway MM59. Naviwatt

Name: Betex
Description:
Betex Ltd. has founded on 1997, which represents various markets’ world wide known companies on Turkey and other countries on the world. We supply quality solutions to the companies on various markets with our product range.

Quality is indispensable for us and our customers. Therefore, our suppliers have lots of quality and approval certificates.

Name: RMS SHIP REPAIR
Description:
RMS Ship Repair is a leading dry-dock and ship repair management company, proudly located at our own dedicated berth in the heart of Tuzla, Istanbul. With decades of experience and exclusive representation agreements with select shipyards, we provide shipowners with trusted solutions for repair, maintenance, and dry-docking—throughout Turkey and select European ports.

Our core services include full-scale dry-dock and afloat repair management, where we handle shipyard selection, subcontractor coordination, and technical supervision—ensuring efficient outcomes aligned with owners' operational and budgetary priorities.

We also operate a fully equipped mechanical and electrical workshop staffed by seasoned chief engineers, marine engineers, electricians, and skilled technicians. Our workshop team specializes in overhauling and servicing:

Main engines (M/E), diesel generators (D/G), winches, cranes, steering gears

Hydraulic and pneumatic systems, pumps, fans, alternators, and electric motors

Deepwell cargo pumps and other critical components

We offer AFLOAT repair services across Turkey, including Bosphorus transits. It is common practice for us to dismantle equipment—such as crane booms, electric motors, or mechanical units—before passage and re-install them post-transit to eliminate vessel downtime.

In addition, we provide:

24/7 emergency technical assistance and consultancy

Underwater services and engine parts reconditioning

Technical supply coordination and dry-dock preparation

On-board repair and maintenance during port calls and waiting periods

Backed by a team of former chief engineers, technical managers, and maritime professionals, RMS ensures fast, compliant, and cost-effective solutions—on time and on your side.

Contact us today to discover how RMS can support your fleet with smart, timely, and reliable solutions.

Name: Shipyard Rotterdam
Description:
Shipyard Rotterdam is een zelfstandige werf in de haven van Rotterdam. De werf is de huiswerf van de KRVE Rotterdam Boatmen en is oorspronkelijk opgericht om de vloot van de KRVE te servicen en vernieuwen. De werf heeft de nodige ervaring in huis mede door het 125 jaar bestaan van de KRVE.
Wij vervaardigen in staal, aluminium en RVS. Of het nu gaat om geavanceerde werkschepen of luxe jachten, bij ons bent u aan het juiste adres. De schepen kunnen onder iedere gewenste classificatie worden gebouwd. Refits/casco reparaties en onderhoudswerkzaamheden behoren ook tot de mogelijkheden. De werf werkt 24/7 indien nodig en heeft kwaliteit en service hoog in het vaandel staan.

Name: Factorias Vulcano, S.A.
Description:
Since our Company was founded in 1919, it has continuously adapted to their surrounding circumstances, particularly to the market competitiveness. Through our advanced technology, we have achieved specialization in a segment of high value-added vessels: st.st. and epoxy chemicals and oil tankers, offshore construction and platform supply vessels, and 3D seismic vessels.

Our personnel are the most significant asset of our Company. We have a highly qualified and effective workforce, with high flexibility of adaptation to new technologies and methods of productive procedure. Name: Vismara Marine
Description:
A path towards excellence.

Vismara’s roots start with Perini Navi and fortified in 1990 with Baltic Yachts, for which it is still the reference point when it comes to conceptualisation and assistance in the Mediterranean.

Name: GROUPE CHANIC
Description:

Name: Relong Technology Co.,Ltd-Aquatic Weed Harvester

Name: Kortels

 Kortels. Who else?

Name: Dock Bras Estaleiros
FINSULATE USA
Description:
Thinking outside the paint box.
Classical anti fouling paints try to prevent the on-growth of marine
organisms which reduce boat speed and increase fuel consumption.
They dissolve slowly, release biocides and micro plastics, and require
regular re-coating. Finsulate’s environmentally friendly alternative
mimics sea urchins’ spines and creates a physical barrier to bio
fouling. Made of recycled nylon and water-based adhesive, Finsulate
does not release any pollutant in the water and can exceed its 5-year
warranty.
Learn More: https://youtu.be/B5hFxv_kxc0

Name: BirdyFish
Description:
BIRDYFISH, is a double monohull of 4.70m making the possibility of flying on the water accessible to the general public. With its two J-shaped foils, it allows sailing schools, or sailors who want to learn about foils, to fly easily and safely. 

BirdyFish was conceived as a learning boat, with a capacity to evolve towards a race mode. 

It's the first step, a point of accessibility to the future of sailing, flying...

Name: Occhilupo Yacht & Carbon
Description:
Occhilupo Yacht and Carbon a young company with great ambitions.
 
The company founded in 2019 by eight people with different backgrounds completing each other in professional experiences: a team made up of designers, planners, builders all united by the passion for the nautical world, a growing and constantly evolving market. 
Our mission is to produce unique boats approaching the luxury sport yachting market with a Made in Italy Product, using highly technological materials such as carbon and performing meticulous design calculations to improve the boat. 
The design has already taken place in all details: from the design to the simulations with specific software simulating the behaviour in the water, improving it boat step by step, achieving top performance in terms of speed, navigability. , seaworthiness and comfort on board. 

Certainly among our strengths are our transversal skills, not coming from the nautical sector without preconceptions and we are open to any form of change, bringing innovation in this business: wild and free. 

Speed and maneuverability of our boats, created to give emotions out of the ordinary. 

Care to the customer, every detail is treated for the owner in a maniacal and tailored way.

Name: Atlantic Marine Interiors
Description:
As a close-knit team we have boundless enthusiasm for every project we are involved in, no matter how large or small. From concept to completion you will find us, and our supply chain partners focussed, experienced and passionate about ensuring your project is a complete success.

Atlantic Marine Interiors takes pride in every project ensuring your interior is something you can be proud of. Our team will become part of your own extended project delivery team.

According to our clients, our differentiator is that we provide a dedicated team, giving their full attention to every aspect of the project from start to finish.

Name: Cheoy Lee Shipyards
Description:
Cheoy Lee Shipyards manages by the members of the Lo family, now 4th and 5th generation. Our history dates back well over a century to a humble beginning in 1870 at a building and repair yard for steam-powered craft at Po Tung Point in Shanghai. Run by the same family ever since. Cheoy Lee is proud of the generations of commitment to the founding principles of quality engineering and dependable products. 

The experience in composite construction benefits both commercial and yacht wings of Cheoy Lee. CL Yachts (previously Cheoy Lee Yachts) have also been constructed in steel and aluminum, an ability granted by shipyards wealth of experience gained from construction using these materials in the commercial division. Name: NAVALROCHA S.A.
Description:
Navalrocha Shipyard SA is a world-class ship repair facility located in the heart of Lisbon harbour on the north bank of the Tagus river and is one of the oldest infrastructures associated with the Naval Industry in the Tagus river estuary dating back to 1898.

Our modern yard is backed by decades of experience in maintenance and repair work on all types of vessels. The scale of our operation provides us with a strong competitive advantage with three dedicated drydocks and a further repair pier. This ensures every project receives our full attention with each client benefitting from priority treatment from a 70-strong workforce and a cluster of specialist marine service partners located on-site.
Navalrocha offers a series of unique benefits. Firstly, our strategic location in the sheltered Tagus Bay provides ideal ship repair and conversion conditions, with more than 300 days of sunshine every year. The climate is fair and mild with temperatures ranging between 23C-28C from March to October and between 14C-22C in winter months. 

Located in the heart of Lisbon, we are close to an International Airport Hub enabling quick embarkation and disembarkation of crew and contractors, we are also in vibrant and cosmopolitan surroundings.

We can offer cost-effective solutions to ship owners looking to avoid the congested Strait of Gibraltar or Mediterranean. Our location is also particularly attractive to ships operating in West and North African coasts with a ready supply of spare parts providing a significant advantage over competitors.

Navalrocha takes great pride in its engineering experience and expertise, with a strong track record delivering fast and efficient services at competitive prices.
All the activities that the company conducts are underpinned by a comprehensive and accredited Health and Safety System. Quality Management Systems are operated in accordance with ISO 9001:2015

Name: Deutsche Yachten
Description:
Superyacht Competence – Made in Germany

Die Tatsache, dass die größten Yachten der Welt seit vielen Jahren in Deutschland gebaut werden, zeigt, dass hier die maßgeblichen Faktoren zusammenpassen: die Ingenieurleistung, die Kapazität der Werften, die Infrastruktur und Qualität der Zulieferer und das Know-how der Werftarbeiter. Jeder, der in den Bauprozess einbezogen ist, weiß von der Komplexität einer großen Yacht und kennt die Herausforderung, die die Bewältigung eines dermaßen großen technischen Systems darstellt. Alle wissen, dass das Produkt umso besser wird, je besser das Teamwork funktioniert.
Die Arbeitsgruppe Deutsche Yachten fördert das Verständnis der Mitglieder füreinander und sorgt auf diese Weise für reibungslose Zusammenarbeit und die Entwicklung neuer Ideen. Das Ergebnis sind häufig neue, bessere Produkte und bessere Arbeitsabläufe. Die Gewinner dieses Prozesses sind die Kunden, denn in Deutschland werden Yachten von Menschen gebaut und ausgerüstet, die etwas davon verstehen und die, jeder in seinem Bereich, Experten und Spezialisten sind, denn Professionalität ist die Stärke der Mitglieder von Deutsche Yachten. Das Ergebnis dieser Arbeitsweise ist, dass alle Yachten aus Deutschland das gleiche Prädikat tragen: „Made in Germany“.

Name: McConaghy
Description:
Whether it’s building the world’s fastest racing yachts, a performance luxury yacht, a specialised component for a Formula One racing team, or developing solutions for architects, scientists and defence organisations, McConaghy has a proven track record of delivering on complex composite projects.
 
With manufacturing bases in Australia and China, & a design office in New Zealand, McConaghy now deploys its wealth of talent across a number of different divisions, extending the strong commercial platform that has allowed it to defy industry trends and continue to thrive even in the toughest economic conditions.
 
In 2006 the company expanded and opened a 2,500 square meter facility in China which has since grown to 7,500 square meter and produces yachts ranging from Mach 2 foiling moths and the Olympic Class Elliott 6m, to Volvo 70 and America’s Cup racers, luxury custom motor yachts and a range of industrial solutions and products including hovercrafts and their technically challenging carbon fibre propellers.
 
The company was further strengthened in early 2014 with the signing of an investment agreement with Hong Kong based Tiger Group Investments, a prominent commercial marine company led by keen yachtsman Graham Porter. The partnership with Tiger Group provides capital for investment in state-of-the-art facilities, machinery and equipment at McConaghy operations in China and Sydney.
 
McConaghy is privately owned by Mark Evans & Tiger Group Investments. The group has no debt, and owns all of its equipment. 

Strategy:
+  Unwavering commitment to high quality.
+  Automate to reduce costs & increase quality and precision.
+  Quality Engineering throughout entire process
+  Customer focus 

Our mission:
+  Be the best composite factory on the planet bring the overwhelming advantages of  to a wide-range of applications with cost effectiveness, high quality, precision, innovation in materials, design, prototyping, runs, and custom work.

Description:

Whether in the drydocks of Perama/OLP or at sea, NAFTOSOL is your one-stop partner for efficient, turnkey solutions with minimum downtime for your fleet. 

Let’s discuss how we can support your next project.

~ We keep your vessels trading,

Name: Lyon Shipyard, Inc.
Description:
Lyon Shipyard, Inc. proudly serves as a full service ship repair facility with over 90 years of continuous service to the U.S. Navy and Maritime Industry in the Mid-Atlantic Region. Located only minutes from downtown Norfolk, Lyon Shipyard is readily accessible by way of the eastern branch of the Elizabeth River.

As one of the leading marine contractors on the east coast, Lyon Shipyard is proud to provide our customers with high quality marine repair held to the highest standards of our quality assurance department.  We at Lyon Shipyard supply our customers with services including, but not limited to, marine electronics repair, barge repair, pier side repairs as well as hauling vessels out of the water for underwater repairs to equipment such as propellers, tailshafts, rudders, keel coolers and hull plating.
Location

Our location is convenient to the Chesapeake Bay, inland waterway, Atlantic Ocean, the U.S. Naval Base in Norfolk, and the Naval Amphibious Base at Little Creek, which allows us to provide fast and efficient service to our customers.

Lyon Shipyard prides itself on a rich and colorful history. Established in 1928 by George C. Lyon, Sr., through the acquisition of numerous facilities and equipment, our yard has grown in the ship repair industry for over 80 years. With roots that grow deep and strong, Lyon Shipyard has developed in its current location with the dedication and support of our loyal employees, and customers that return year after year for high quality repairs and maintenance they have come to expect from Lyon.

Depuis 1962, le chantier Sillinger, du nom de son fondateur Tibor Sillinger, est le spécialiste du bateau pneumatique pliable et semi-rigide à usage militaire et professionnel. 
Dès l’origine, Sillinger décide de développer des embarcations dédiées à des professionnels civils et militaires internationaux, réputés très exigeants.

Des embarcations dont les performances, la fiabilité et l’insubmersibilité seront les fondamentaux. La décision d’utiliser du tissu hypalon-néoprène en est l’expression la plus parlante. 

Au cours des années, dans une quête d’excellence, la marque au requin innove constamment et met en place un processus de création des plus rigoureux.

Chaque commande est supervisée par une équipe de techniciens qui veillent à la bonne exécution de la fabrication selon les besoins spécifiques du client.

Depuis 56 ans, Sillinger a su imposer ses valeurs et peut se targuer d’être aujourd’hui un acteur majeur auprès des forces d’intervention et de sécurité sur toutes les mers du globe.

In 1965 our enterprise became a company by following evolving ship repair technology and continuing the traditions that passed from a father to his son's.

After moving to Tuzla/İstanbul in 1991, our shipyard commenced docking service as well as maintenance and repairing by adding a Floating Dock with a lifting capacity of 3000 tonnes to its facilities in 1999, and increased its docking capacity to 5000 tonnes by renewing its Floating Dock in 2007.

Description:
Kalmar is a boatyard specialized in high quality wooden boat and interior construction, located in the city of Itajaí, in the south of Brazil. The wood/epoxy technique was introduced in the early 80’s by Lars Kreuger, the founder of the company, after having mastered the craft in the USA. After 30 years in the market, Kalmar has garnered a local and international reputation as one of the best boatyards specializing in wood construction.

Kalmar´s projects range from small dinghies and canoes to luxury mega yacht interiors, always with custom design and production. The modern boat building technique employed guarantees a durable and very strong boat. Luxury interiors with top quality finishing are delivered by a team of qualified craftsman and managers. Our belief is that any project is possible, any dream can become reality.

www.kalmar.com.br 
www.facebook.com/estaleirokalmar 
www.twitter.com/estaleirokalmar

Name: DK Fotinakis Ltd
Description:
DK Fotinakis, founded in 1962, specializes on ship repairs, engineering studies, and shipbuilding. With 60 years of experience and having completed over 1000 repairs, 400 studies, and numerous ship conversions and yacht buildings, DK Fotinakis is considered one of the leading companies in the ship-building and ship-repairing industry.

DK Fotinakis workforce consists of over 300, highly skilled employees, working hard to deliver optimal results for our clients. At DK Fotinakis, we strive to create a work environment that blends a family atmosphere with the highest professional standards. 

As a well-established company, we are known for our reliability. Our aim is to continue to “build relationShips”.

Name: ZHEJIANG SINOVAT QUANTCLOUD SHIP TECHNOLOGY CO.,LTD
Description:
We are a technology-driven enterprise specializing in the research, development, construction,
and service of new materials, new technologies, and new energy vessels. We have established
ship technology R&D centers in Japan, Shanghai and Zhoushan, and manufacturing bases in
Zhoushan (Zhejiang),Beihai (Guangxi), and Micronesia. In additiion, we have multiple technical
support centers worldwide.
We are committed to driving industry transformation through standardization and regulations,
guided by the "Four New" principles for vessels (new materials, new energy, new technologies,
and new business models) and the "Four Modernizations" for ship equipment (standardization,
integration, automation, and informatization).By establishing a standard system, implementing
full-process control and providing socialized services, we aim to build an innovative ecosystem
for Chinese and World's new materials shipbuilding industry and promote its high-quality development.

Name: Udupi Cochin Shipyard Limited
Description: Udupi Cochin Shipyard Limited (UCSL) was incorporated as ‘Tebma Engineering Private Limited’ on July 09, 1984 as a private non-government company. Subsequently, the Company became public and changed the name to ‘Tebma Shipyards Limited’. Cochin Shipyard Limited (CSL), the premier public sector shipyard in India, acquired the Company through an order of the Hon. NCLT, Chennai  and took over its management in September 2020, consequent to which the Company became a wholly owned subsidiary of CSL and a Government Company under the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013. Subsequently, on April 22, 2022 the name of the Company was changed from Tebma Shipyards Limited to Udupi Cochin Shipyard Limited.

Name: Torlak Shipyard
Description:
WWW.TORLAKSHIPYARD.COM

Torlak Family, has established its relationship with industry in the early 1900’s thereby building wooden vessels in Black Sea shores. By passing down its experience, Torlak Shipyard is continuing its service for the maritime industry successfully for over 100 years. 

The family founded their first company in 1970 at Golden Horn / Istanbul and carried forward their activities there until moving to its currently located region, Tuzla in 1983. Since 1983, Torlak Shipyard expedited its additional investments and technological developments in Tuzla, where is assigned as new Shipyard Area by the government.

Shipyard is serving for the maritime industry at the highest level with two newbuilding slipways and one of the biggest floating docks in the region and has succesfully constructed and delivered more than 60 
newbuilding projects in different types up to now.

Name: Steeler Yachts
Description:
Steeler Yachts is a Dutch shipyard renowned for crafting award-winning, customized motor yachts ranging from 15 to 45 meters. Founded in 2010, our mission is to bring each owner’s vision to life, through Dutch quality, innovative solutions, personal contact and customized creation. Every Steeler reflects the unique wishes of its owner, with our dedicated team guiding each step from first ideas to delivery and beyond. 

Our portfolio covers two main segments: Displacement yachts for long-range cruising in ultimate comfort, and Performance yachts for those who appreciate speed and sporty elegance. 

With a growing international fleet and a loyal community of owners, Steeler Yachts continues to push the boundaries of yacht building, creating yachts and experiences that are truly like no other.

Name: East Coast Repair & Fabrication, LLC.
Description: East Coast Repair and Fabrication (ECR) has been a leading force in the marine, industrial and commercial sectors since 1999. We have an established and proven track record with the United States Government and Commercial Ship Owners, and team with some of the most respected marine and industrial companies across the nation.

Name: WOSA Ltd
Description:
WOSA Yacht Refit & Survey is an international leader in the yacht refitting and marine surveying sector. With offices in Italy, the UK, Spain, and Monaco (Survey Office), the company offers high-quality services globally, meeting the needs of yacht owners, shipyards, and maritime operators.

Thanks to a highly qualified team and extensive experience, WOSA Yacht Refit & Survey is today a reference point in the yacht industry.

Name: Pierre Delion/ Architecture Navale
BASREC
Description: BASREC (Bahrain Ship Repairing and Engineering Company) is one of the Gulf’s most established and trusted ship repair and marine engineering facilities. Founded in 1962 and strategically located at Mina Salman Port, BASREC boasts over six decades of experience in vessel maintenance and engineering solutions. Its facilities include a newly commissioned floating dock (BASREC 2) with a capacity of 5,500 tons, 132 meters in length and 43 meters in width, along with extensive berth-side repair areas, modern workshops, and a dedicated Small Boat Repair Division. BASREC provides a comprehensive range of services including ship repair, steel fabrication, engine overhaul, blasting and painting, pipe fitting, and welding. With a strong reputation for efficiency, safety, and quality, BASREC continues to support the maritime industry across commercial, industrial, and governmental sectors in Bahrain and the wider region.

Name: Bellini Group
Description:
In 1960, Bellini Nautica was founded by Battista Bellini, a man with a strong passion for the sea and the art of navigation. He initiated the production of wooden boats bearing the Bellini signature, creating distinctive and refined models that soon became emblematic of quality and tradition. Over the years, the shipyard produced a significant number of boats, each representing a unique chapter in the history of the Bellini brand. Continuous innovation and a commitment to maintaining excellence led to the introduction of new models, each more advanced and refined than its predecessor, catering to the needs of an increasingly discerning clientele.

In 1982, a moment of great sorrow struck the company when founder Battista Bellini passed away. At the age of only 16, his son Romano Bellini took over the business and began his career. At that point, the production of Bellini boats was halted, and the shipyard focused on storage, sales, and restoration. Subsequently, the shipyard expanded significantly, adding 4 new warehouses, a water testing pool, and acquiring specialized expertise in restoration and painting processes.

In 2011, Battista Bellini initiated a path of digitalization, steering the company into the modern era and opening new opportunities for growth and development. In 2019, Bellini Nautica, led by Martina Bellini, collaborated with international artists such as Britto, Brainwash, Xavier Casalta, and Fabian Oefner, bringing art and creativity to the heart of the brand.

The year 2022 marked another significant chapter in the history of Bellini Nautica, with the company's IPO consolidating its position in the financial market. In 2023, Bellini Yacht was born, a true return to its origins. With new insights and acquired expertise, tradition and innovation come together as the pillars of the Group. Bellini Yacht is committed to writing new chapters in the history of the nautical world.

Name: Intermarine APAC Pte Ltd
Description:
At Intermarine APAC Pte. Ltd., our mission is to provide complete peace of mind to clients. With expertise and pragmatic delivery, we handle details for you. 

As part of Inter Marine Group, our global centers offer tailored service in Asia-Pacific. Skilled teams prioritises satisfaction, ensuring timely, budget-friendly, and quality completion.

Specialising in Shipping and Marine sectors, we offer services like marine crewing, shipyard repairs, spare parts procurement, and project management. 

Our Offshore and Energy expertise includes repair, subsea services, new builds, and wind projects. 

Our extensive labour network offers diverse first-class tradespeople across steel and pipe fabrication projects globally.. With global teams and key shipyards, we excel in the maritime industry, delivering exceptional results every time.

Name: Scheepswerf Slob
Description: New ships and conversions, specially construction of steel hulls for megayachts and outfitting with technical equipment. Maximum size up to 125m.

Name: PT. PACIFIC DHARMA SHIPYARD
Description: PT. PACIFIC DHARMA SHIPYARD since 2022 the shipyard in East Kalimantan (Samarinda) has been engaged in the field of shipbuilding, docking and repair with shipyard company facilities in terms of qualified and quality service.

Name: Guido de Groot Design
Description: Guido de Groot Design was launched in 1997 and is based in Leiden, the oldest university town in Holland. The award-winning studio employs eight designers of varying nationalities and specializes in innovative interiors and exteriors for both luxury motor and sailing yachts. Through the years, the Guido de Groot's design office has evolved to the point that it works with some of the most prestigious shipyards worldwide. Many of the projects combine interior and exterior design and include sailing yachts, fast motor cruisers and more sedate displacement yachts. The Guido de Groot philosophy is to create high-quality designs, both interior and exterior, that should be appreciated for their purity and harmony. This philosophy can be seen in the stunning yachts that glide out from the studio.

Name: Ellicott Dredges
Description:
Ellicott Dredges engineers and manufactures innovative dredges and dredging equipment, which are being used for infrastructure projects worldwide.

Ellicott is the world’s oldest and largest builder of small and medium-sized cutter suction dredges. We built all of the dredges used in the original construction of the Panama Canal and, since then, have focused on the world market for cutter dredges. Ellicott's dredges are used for sand mining, harbor and navigation maintenance, water reservoir restoration, river and channel dredging, beach restoration and erosion control, and environmental clean-ups to name a few.

We have designed and manufactured over 2000 dredges, more than any other manufacturer, and have served customers in over 100 countries. 

Ellicott engineering leverages the latest 3D modeling technology available to ensure that our design efforts are streamlined from concept through production. We utilize Finite Element Analysis techniques to eliminate the potential for design failures and expedite our time to market. Ellicott’s engineering staff draws from both a long history and a diverse background to bring sophisticated designs to the market which are easy to operate and maintain.

Name: Polarkonsult AS
Description:
Polarkonsult – Pioneering Maritime Innovation from Harstad

Polarkonsult is a forward-thinking engineering and consulting company specializing in maritime solutions that push boundaries and redefine industry standards. Headquartered in Harstad, at the heart of Northern Norway’s maritime heritage, we combine decades of experience with cutting-edge technology to deliver sustainable, future-ready solutions.

From ship design to energy optimization, Polarkonsult is shaping the future of maritime operations. Our expertise spans autonomous vessels, batter-electric systems, and aquaculture infrastructure, ensuring our clients remain ahead in a rapidly evolving industry. We’re not just solving today’s challenges; we’re anticipating tomorrow’s needs.

Our 3D design team is revolutionizing project visualization, bringing concepts to life with detailed models, virtual prototypes, and immersive simulations. Whether it's creating environmentally friendly ship designs or optimizing offshore energy solutions, we leverage the latest tools to deliver precise, innovative results.

As trusted partners to defense, aquaculture, and maritime industries, we also offer critical services like technical documentation, inspections, and certifications for lifting and fall protection equipment. Our focus on quality and compliance ensures reliability and safety across every project.

Polarkonsult isn’t just about delivering results—it’s about leading the way. We take pride in our Northern Norwegian roots, drawing inspiration from the region’s resilience and resourcefulness. With a passionate team of experts, we’re driving progress in sustainable shipping, shore power solutions, and beyond.

When you choose Polarkonsult, you’re choosing innovation, precision, and a commitment to excellence. We don’t just build solutions—we build the future.

Name: MPS - Modular Pontoon Systems
Description:
Modular Pontoon Systems is the exclusive manufacturer of MPS container pontoons as well sectional workboats and jack-ups. All MPS’s equipment is available for purchase or rental.

MPS container pontoons and other equipment is used in many industries such as dredging, civil construction and oil & gas.

MPS modular pontoons are Bureau Veritas certified for use on inland waters up to coastal areas. Its modular design, international transport standards and easy assembly allow applications in remote areas all over the world.

For over 15 years MPS has been offering turnkey solutions, with our experience and in-house engineering we are able to offer our best solution for your project within a short time.

Our stock of about 500 new and used container units allows us to ship and deliver your container pontoon, workboat or marine equipment rapidly with short lead time.

Our service team requires a crane and some basic tools to re-assemble the modular pontoon on your location. MPS provide also equipment like bollards, hydraulic winches, fairleads, timber deck protection, RoRo ramps, propulsion units, etc.

For more information please visit our website www.mpsbv.com

Name: Keppel Singmarine
Description:
Keppel Singmarine possesses a strong track record for reliable and versatile newbuild solutions. We have constructed some 400 ships of diverse types and sophistication levels for a global customer base.

Description: Prezenta pe piata din 2002, Heinen & Hopman Romania, subsidiara a companiei olandeze Heinen&Hopman B.V., oferă servicii complete de proiectare, instalare și mentenanță pentru sisteme de aer condiţionat, ventilaţie mecanica, încălzirie centralizata si instalaţii de răcire şi refrigerare (pe scurt “sisteme HVAC-R”),atat in industria navală și cat si in cea civila si industriala. Description: Founded in 1916 Cardama Shipyard is dedicated to build, repair and transform many types of vessels. Situated in Vigo, in the northwest of Spain, has a wide experience in the sector and facilities to build vessels of up to 100 metres length.

Name: Dubai Ship Building L.L.C.
Description:
DUBAI SHIPBUILDING & ENGINEERING L.L.C. was established in 1997 as a support group in managing the docking and repair activities of various types of vessels of her parent company, Mubarak Marine.  Since then, Captain Mohammed Obaid Mubarak began to realize his simple vision – developing locally a high quality, cost effective and dependable Organization that will execute ship repair and conversion to cater to the growing needs of the Marine Industry within the Gulf.
 
 
A decade of activity in shipbuilding and repair propels the company to its new heights by being involved in the construction of more than 60 vessels and wide variety of marine related constructions.  Among the seagoing vessels handled by the company are: Accommodation Barges/ Cable Laying Barge, Anchor Handling Tug/  Supply Vessel, Offshore Supply Vessels, Tugboats, Workboats, Landing Crafts, Oil Pollution Control boats, General Cargo vessels, Oil tanker, Fishing boats, Crane Barges, Specialized Vessels and Steel Yacht.
 
 
Year 2007-2008 are ‘golden’ years for DUBAI SHIPBUILDING & ENGINEERING, exactly a decade after its establishment.  New substantial projects were delivered and in the process of different stage of construction.  Among them are:
 
 
One (1) unit 95 metres, 318 persons capacity Accommodation Barge
 
Two (2) units 63.7 metres Anchor Handling Tug / Supply / Rescue / FIFI-1 vessel
 
One (1) unit, 5150 BHP, 64 metres Anchor Handling Tug / Supply / FIFI-1 vessel / Dynamic Positioning vessel
 
One (1) unit 48 metres, 5150 BHP, Anchor Handling Tug / FIFI-1 vessel / Dynamic Positioning vessel
 
One (1) unit 63.5 metres Multi-Purpose / Pleasure Craft
 
One (1) unit Catamaran type, 28 metres Oil Spill Response Vessel
 
 Twenty four (24) units of various sizes of floating pontoons

Our professional team offers to all customers a prompt and relaible after sales service.

Name: Solaris Yachts

Name: Unithai Shipyard and Engineering Ltd
Description:
Unithai Shipyard and Engineering Limited owns and operates the largest shipyard in Thailand.  The 688,000 sq m. facility is located in the deep-sea port of Laem Chabang on the eastern seaboard of the Gulf of Thailand.  

Unithai Shipyard was incorporated in 1990, providing a complete range of ship repair, modification and conversion, afloat repair, shipbuilding, heavy fabrication for power plants, onshore/offshore oil and gas industries to customers worldwide.

Our vision is to be one of the best shipyard in the world.  With care and responsiveness to our communities underpin our mission “to serve human well beings and create wealth at the same time.” 

For more details information, please visit www.unithai.com.

Name: AERIUS Marine
Description:
AERIUS Marine is a supplier for ship operating systems and technology worldwide and offers solutions for HVAC (heating, ventilation and air conditioning), refrigeration, piping as well as fire protection and fighting technology for all areas on board any types of ships, be it cruise ships, ferries, mega yachts or naval vessels.

For customized, innovative and substainable solutions as well as services, we offer competences from research and development, design and engineering, installation and assembly to the commissioning as part of a new build or a refit project. Even after the commissioning of systems, we support our customers by repair and maintenance services. We round off our portfolio with a unique service concept.

AERIUS Marine, headquartered in Hamburg (Germany), was established in 2016 as a result of the name change of the company Imtech Marine Schiffbau-/Dockbautechnik GmbH. Thus, the traditions of the once founded organization Rud. Otto Meyer (ROM) in 1858 continued.

Description: Leading Manufacturer of custom built Yacht Equipment. Based in Leiden, Akerboom supplies custom equipment solutions to yards in Aalsmeer, Kaag, Makkum and the rest of the Netherlands. Akerboom is a wordwide partner for service and refit of superyachts.

Alumarine Shipyard est spécialisé dans la construction de navires professionnels en aluminium depuis 1986.

Alumarine Shipyard travaille notamment pour les services portuaires, les stations de pilotage, les sauveteurs en mer, la sécurité civile, les compagnies maritimes, les armateurs fluviaux.

Alumarine Shipyard est une société du groupe Grand Large Yachting.

Name: Eureka Yachts
Description:
Eureka Yachts was founded by four Naval architects with a combined experience of more than 50 years in project management in the yacht building industry.

Past experience includes New Build projects up to 80m, large Refits and conversions, Pre-Purchase surveys, specifications and contracts, class and flag state compliance. The team are skilled in project management, design & engineering, budgeting and planning as well as operations management combined with quality control and in-depth analytical reporting.

Eureka Yachts work on behalf of Owners and yacht managers / Brokers to oversee the client’s project to ensure the finished yacht meets with the technical specification and satisfies the clients’ expectations.

Name: Marino Projects
Description:
MARINO is an international group of companies with 3,000 professionals worldwide. For 10 years we have been building all types of vessels, completing interior finishing, participating in industrial construction and massive infrastructure projects.

Marino Projects by MARINO have gained considerable domestic and international experience in ship outfitting and industrial construction. We pride ourselves in strict management control, strong work ethic and highly qualified workforce, guaranteeing that every project is finished to perfection.

With more than 400 projects completed around the globe, we have established ourselves as a company able to see beyond any obstacles and satisfy even the most demanding of clients.

Name: WARUNA NUSA SENTANA, PT
Description: WARUNA NUSA SENTANA, PT is a shipbuilding company based out of 10 Jl. Gadjah Mada, MEDAN, North Sumatra, Indonesia.

Name: NAOS Ship and Boat Design
Description:
NAOS Ship & Boat Design is an independent and privately-owned ship design company. With over 30 years of experience in the maritime industry, the company has built a portfolio of more than 80 ship designs, mostly ro-ro and ro-pax, luxury and mega yachts. Every new project has come to light from the encounter between an extensive experience in naval architecture and engineering, providing innovative, cost-effective, and sustainable solutions to shipbuilding.

NAOS Ship & Boat Design is headquartered in Trieste, Italy, in the heart of Europe, and has expanded its presence with offices in Spain, Sweden, and Croatia. The company boasts a talented team of 40 naval architects, marine engineers, and consultants who possess expertise in all core naval architecture and marine engineering specialties. NAOS is committed to providing comprehensive consultancy services to its partners and customers for ship new buildings, retrofit, and conversion projects. This includes a range of services such as initial design, basic design, structural calculations, hull classification drawings, structural workshop drawings, machinery classification drawings, and plant design.

Always striving to innovate, Naos has been successful in developing new ship concepts having fuel efficiency and emission reduction as target. With this in mind, Naos latest accomplishment, the Wing Sail Module - WSM - has taken shape: the WSM is a simple, modular, and fast-to-install Wind Assisted Ship Propulsion system, which has already been successfully tested and validated on a commercial ship, showcasing the company's commitment to creating sustainable and innovative solutions for the maritime industry.

Name: Esbjerg Shipyard A/S
Description:
Esbjerg Shipyard A/S is part of the Granly Group A/S, which is a collection of highly specialised companies with each their specific skills and field of work. We are able to meet demands within various industries, both onshore and offshore, including fishing, marine, construction, agriculture, heavy industry, etc. We have more than 50 experienced and reliable employees who are prepared to do their utmost to assist you.

Esbjerg Shipyard A/S provides everything within construction and plate machining in aluminium, stainless and black steel. Esbjerg Shipyard A/S also specialises in performing subcontracting tasks within the energy and wind industries.

Esbjerg have 2 docks to ships repair, conversion & longside jobs
