Description: Sea Master Consulting & Engineering es una empresa de ingeniería y consultoría naval, industrial  tecnológica. El objetivo de Sea Master C&E es ser una herramienta efectiva que ayude a sus clientes alcanzar sus objetivos industriales, añadiendo valor a los procesos a través de la tecnología más avanzada y un servicio de calidad. Sea Master C&E proporciona a sus clientes soluciones integrales para sus proyectos tanto tecnológicos como de ingeniería.
Location: El Puerto de Santa María, Cádiz

Name: Seable&Co.
Description:
In the realm of luxury yachting, Seable & Co specialises in crafting bespoke exterior spaces that epitomise comfort, relaxation and enjoyment on board. 
 
We believe that the essence of yachting is experienced in the vessel’s exterior, where there is a true connection with the sea and its natural surroundings.  
 
Founded in the Netherlands in 1982, our legacy is built on craftsmanship and innovation. With a wealth of in-house expertise, we take pride in engineering, crafting and installing complete exterior spaces, including furniture, pools, deck finishes, cap rails, flag masts and many more bespoke features. 
 
Our commitment to excellence extends to selecting resilient materials that withstand the challenges of outdoor exposure. By leveraging our extensive experience, the latest innovations, and a collaborative approach, we deliver fully personalised outdoor spaces. We strive to inspire and exceed the expectations of owners, representatives, designers and shipyards, transforming design visions into comfortable, luxurious outdoor spaces to be enjoyed whilst on board.

Name: Nerea Yacht
Description:
Nerea Yacht represents a true Factory Boat Boutique, built on extensive experience and exceptional craftsmanship. At the heart of Nerea is Il Sarto del Mare, who leads the company with an obsessive attention to detail and an unwavering dedication to artisanal excellence. Every stage of production is meticulously managed in-house, ensuring an uncompromising level of quality.

The NY24 marks the first step toward an extraordinary achievement, born from passionate research driven by a deep love for the sea, an endless devotion to Italian style, and the desire to craft a boat as if it were a work of art.

Following this philosophy, Nerea Yacht presents the NY40, a perfect fusion of elegance, sportiness, and cutting-edge design. With its sleek lines, high-performance capabilities, and unparalleled comfort, the NY40 is designed for those seeking an exclusive and dynamic experience at sea. Ideal for both relaxed cruising and thrilling adventures, it embodies the essence of bespoke Italian craftsmanship.

With a strong commitment to excellence, Nerea Yacht is expanding globally, bringing the originality and quality of Made in Italy to the world. Through its distinctive designs and unique artisanal expertise, the brand is redefining the standards of luxury yachting, offering international clients a truly sophisticated and exclusive experience.

Name: OCEANKING SA
Description: OOCEANKING Technical & Trading S.A. is a leading marine engineering and commercial group serving the Greek and International maritime community as well as the Greek public and industrial sector. The company is headquartered in Piraeus, Attica, Greece

Name: Heinrich Rönner Gruppe
Description:
Wir sind eine familiengeführte Unternehmensgruppe mit großer Verbundenheit zum Meer und der maritimen Wirtschaft.

Seit über 40 Jahren sind wir sehr erfolgreich am Markt tätig. Unser Leistungsspektrum reicht vom Yacht- und Schiffbau, dem Stahlwasserbau, dem schweren Stahlbau, dem Brückenbau und der Herstellung von hochwertigen Stahl- und Aluminiumkonstruktionen sowie der Be- und Verarbeitung von Edelstahl und dem Holzbau über Dienstleitungen wie dem Korrosionsschutz, der Transportlogistik zur See und an Land bis hin zum Handel.

In unseren Leistungsbereichen sehen wir uns als kreative Lösungsfinder. Unsere Aufgabe besteht darin, Großprojekte national sowie international zu verwirklichen. Mit 2.000 Mitarbeitern und 20 Betriebs- und Produktionsstätten liefern wir unseren Auftraggebern schlüsselfertige Ergebnisse aus einer Hand.

Neben der stetigen Weiterentwicklung hat sich die HEINRICH RÖNNER GRUPPE zum Ziel gesetzt, Menschen mit ihren persönlichen Stärken zu fördern und als qualifizierte Kräfte langfristig zu beschäftigen. So ist die Ausbildung der nächsten Generation zu einem festen Teil unserer Unternehmensphilosophie geworden.

Name: Codecasa Yachts
Description: Shipyards specializing in luxury yachts building.

Name: Svanehoj Singapore
Description:
As of October 1st, 2024, Hamworthy Pumps has officially changed its name to Svanehoj Singapore, uniting our organization under a single, unified brand. This strategic move reflects the commitment to strengthening our identity as one consolidated company and fostering a deeper sense of belonging across all teams.

With over 100 years in the pump industry, Hamworthy Pumps is renowned for its high-quality in-line pumps in the marine, offshore, and defense sectors. Now fully integrated and branded as Svanehøj, we continue to produce and sell the original Hamworthy Pumps products, preserving the legacy and reputation of our trusted brand. 

This strategic move does not imply any organizational changes, and Hamworthy Pumps remains a distinct product brand within Svanehøj's portfolio, maintaining its unique identity and market presence.

As a specialist in critical liquids, Svanehøj offers a wide range of solutions that support the energy transition in the hard-to-abate sectors: reliable, high-performance marine pumps, cutting-edge tank control systems, and integrated service solutions for pumps, compressors, and valves.

Together with ITT and under the Svanehøj banner, we are committed to accelerating growth, driving new commercial synergies, and, more than anything, sustaining our long-term contributions to powering a better future.

 We encourage all our followers to follow the Svanehøj company page to stay updated on how we work to develop a fast transition to a greener tomorrow  https://lnkd.in/d3hqEe4S

Name: SupTech Construction
Description:
Our headquarters is located in the maritime heart of The Netherlands, at maritime center GreenPort in Pernis. We have a team of highly reliable, responsible, hardworking and multi-skilled people with many years of shipping experience. This team and our well-equipped workshop are making SupTech Construction a company which offers the best solutions and excellent ship care services to ship owners. All works are performed according regulations and standards of all major International Classification Societies and National Maritime Authorities.

We value the latest technology, innovation, superior quality, best price, careful planning, punctual delivery time and priority to safety. This is resulting in having satisfied clients and being a dynamic player in ship repair fields.
SupTech Construction is specialized in executing all kinds of works in order to serve its customers worldwide. 

Our aim is to fulfil customers’ specific expectation in respect to quality and completion time in accordance with their requests.

Suptech Construction - Quality Assured

Name: LaNaval

Newbuilding & Repairing Shipyard.
Long traditional shipbuilding company located northern Spain focussed in the high tech newbuildings.
Main products: DREGERS , OFFSHORE Oil & Gas, OFFSHORE WIND, FERRIES & RoPax, Speacial Marine Transportation, Offshore Structures.

Name: RMK Yachts
Description:
RMK Yachts, a division of RMK Marine, stands as one of Turkey’s premier superyacht builders, renowned globally for its exceptional capabilities. Our shipyard, nestled in Istanbul which is a city steeped in centuries-old boat and shipbuilding heritage that benefits from resourceful facilities and industrial compounds.

As part of Koç Holding, Turkey’s largest private conglomerate, RMK Yachts takes immense pride in crafting masterpieces that grace waters worldwide. Our commitment to customer satisfaction, unwavering quality, and reliability makes RMK Yachts a symbol of excellence.

Our Journey
Founded in Istanbul, in 1978, our shipyard specializes in constructing boats from steel, aluminum, and composite materials. In 1997, we joined the Koç Group of Companies and rebranded as RMK Marine. Located in Tuzla, we excel in building, repairing, and maintaining commercial, naval vessels, and super yachts. We achieved “Industrial Quality Assurance” compliance, meeting the requirements for AQAP 2110 and ISO 9001 certification. Remarkably, RMK Marine is the sole private shipyard to attain AQAP 2110 status.

Crafting Excellence
Our success lies in merging meticulous working principles that is essential for navy shipbuilding along with the artistry of superyacht construction. RMK Yachts is celebrated for realizing prestigious and head-turning motor and sailing yachts.

At RMK Yachts, your dreams are our inspiration.

Name: Contest Yachts
Description:
Contest Yachts designs and builds luxury, semi-custom, performance sailing cruisers. A third-generation, family firm now more than 60 years old, our shipyard is on the edge of the Ijsselmeer in Medemblik, NL, and each yacht leaving the yard is fully certified by Lloyd’s Register, the world’s leading classification and compliance society.

All yachts in our 13- to 26-metre range are built to individual commission and are equally suited to coastal, offshore and bluewater exploration. Using the very best of materials, handcrafting and innovative technology, we work closely with every owner to design, build and deliver well-sorted, strong, light, sea-kindly, easily handled yachts that exactly meet personal requirements.

In 2023, the two new 15-metre models we premiered at the boot Düsseldorf exhibition have each been nominated for the industry’s top awards: the Contest 50CS for the European Yacht of the Year 2024 and the Contest 49CS for the British Yachting Awards 2023 – winners both to be announced in early 2024. The next new model is now also well on its way, the 19-metre Contest 63CS which will launch in spring 2024.

building dreams together.

Name: ASTILLEROS ASCON
Description: Astilleros Ascon designs and constructs vessels and naval artifacts. It has shifted from building ships for regional needs to becoming a significant shipyard. The company provides solutions in naval construction.

Name: Privilège Marine
Description: Depuis 1985, Privilège Marine propose des catamarans uniques, personnalisés, d'une qualité et d'une sécurité exceptionnelles, qui vous permettent de naviguer au large à travers les océans.
Location: Les Sables-d’Olonne, Pays de la Loire

Description:
We, Blue Marine Engineering and Consultants SP L.L.C. (BMEC) is a company geared up to provide specialist Marine & Offshore consultancy services to both local and international maritime & offshore community across the globe. We provide turnkey solutions in Design & Engineering which includes technical consultancy services in Naval Architecture, Offshore & Marine sector.

Name: DETEGASA
Description:
Detegasa designs, manufactures and markets high-tech waste and water treatment solutions for Navy, Marine & Offshore Industries, providing an integrated lifecycle support.

Detegasa was founded in 1985, after splitting from a holding group dating back to 1965.

With the years of experience and a sound history, Detegasa has turned into a world leading manufacturer of marine equipment, such as Incinerators, Sewage Treatment Plants, Oily Water Separators, Helicopter Refueling Systems and customized solutions.

Name: Princecraft
Description:
Our Mission: To create unparalleled experiences on the water for fishing and boating enthusiasts with "professionally rigged and ready" packages of aluminum fishing boats, pontoon boats and deck boats.

Our commitment is borne out of a deeply rooted heritage of unmatched craftsmanship, incomparable performance and the promise of years of trouble-free boating.

Name: Pato Marine
Description:
Pato Marine is an EU marine design company, established in 2021 in Romania, near Black Sea. It provide the following engineering services: 
- 3D Laser Scanning Survey
- Point Cloud processing
- Consulting in the field of 3d laser scanning and point cloud processing
- Consulting for the implementation of BWT and Scrubber systems. 

The team is formed up of naval architecture and ship systems engineers. Experience in ship design, on-site supervising the ship’s systems erection, on-board ship survey (classical way) or 3D laser scanning survey.

Applications:
Environment Compliance
- Ship Retrofits: BWTS, Scrubber, etc.
EEDI Ship Conversion: Waste Heat Recovery System, Dual-Fuel Conversion, Air Lubrication 
- Bulky equipment change: Sewage treatment plant
- Full Ship Reconversion: Tanker to FSO or FPSO, PSV to Yachts, various ships to floating Hotels, floating Museums or floating Hospitals, etc.
- Inspection: cargo volumes, deformations 
- Newbuild Ships: comparison (as-built vs design), proof of QA for shipowners, digitalization of training spaces (Virtual Reality)
- Research: ship hull scanning

Full involvement:
- 3D Laser Scanning Survey
- Point Cloud processing (raw scans done by us or delivered by client)
- Consulting in the field of 3d laser scanning and point cloud processing
- Consulting for the implementation of BWT and Scrubber systems
- Basic and detail engineering 

Why you should chose to work with PATO MARINE?
Our organigramme is extremely FIT, so the decisions will be made almost instant.
We know that the response time is mandatory in this activity,  and the ship's schedules are tight. 
We have the know how!
We are proactive!
We are ready for new challenges, hit our email inbox!

Name: Cigarette Racing
Description: Cigarette Racing was founded in South Florida, on Thunderboat Row by passionate offshore racer and businessman, Don Aronow. Since 1969, the World Champion Racing Team has defined performance boating with models such as the 38' Top Gun, 42' X, 515, 41' Nighthawk, 41' Nighthawk SD Edition, 42' Auroris, 42' Nighteagle, 52' Thunder and 59' Tirranna. Cigarette Racing has become a household name synonymous with performance and luxury. Cigarette’s pleasure boating and racing heritage has now entered a new wave of acceleration by continuing to dominate the docks of collectors and performance aficionados.

Name: NMC - Shipyard & Construction Company
Description:
NMC is an engineering and fabrication company specialised in maritime, on- and offshore and complex fabrication of client specific steel structures and vessels.

Operating from modern fabrication facilities with direct access to deep water located in The Netherlands (Rotterdam and Nieuw Lekkerland) and Croatia, and supported by a team of highly skilled and motivated engineers and craftsmen, NMC is able to deliver substantial structural fabrications and pipework manufacture in varying dimensions and material grades for various applications and markets.

Through diversification, delivered products and services range from turnkey sea going vessels and mega yacht hulls to offshore constructions, pipe systems and on-site installation, repair and maintenance projects. The main markets being served are the yacht industry, shipbuilding & repair and oil & energy industry.

NMC is an ISO 9001:2008 and SSC**(VCA**) certified company, with a broad experience in fabrication and welding according to class requirements (Lloyd’s, ABS, BV, DNV) and client specifications like EEMUA 158, NORSOK M101, AWS D1.1 and ASME IX.

Being a privately owned business, NMC focus is on continuity and long-term relationships, and therefore customers’ satisfaction level is being valued higher than anything; to achieve this, the main goal in every project is to deliver on time and within budget, with a strong commitment to quality and safety. This vision has resulted in a wide-ranging track-record of satisfied customers.

Name: Dentas Shipyard
Description:
Dentaş Tersanesi, Türkiye’nin en önemli gemi inşa merkezi olan Tuzla bölgesinde, 6.114 metrekaresi kapalı olmak üzere toplam 18.000 metrekare alana yayılan tesislerinde faaliyetlerini sürdürmektedir.

Yeni inşa ve bakım-onarım hizmeti veren Dentaş Tersanesi, bugüne kadar tamamladığı yeni inşa ve bakım-onarım projeleriyle geçmişten gelen deneyimini geleceğe taşımakta ve teknolojik gelişmeleri yakından takip ederek denizcilik sektörünün günümüz ihtiyaçlarına en doğru şekilde cevap vermektedir.

Dentaş Tersanesi, mühendis kadrosu ve Ar&Ge faaliyetleri ile her an daha da ileri taşıdığı üretim kalitesinin yanı sıra iş güvenliği ve çevre politikaları bakımından da çalışmalarını tamamlamış ve tesislerinde bu alanda da uluslararası standartları hayata geçirmiştir.

Name: Varivane Industries Ltd.
Description:
Varivane Industries is your one-stop shop for all your marine accommodation and specialist storage requirements.

We manufacture, design and supply all items from high end medical trolleys to specialist ammunition stowage’s, high spec. marine mattresses and a full range of bunks units, wardrobes and drawer units to fit any configuration and standard required.

With over 45 years’ experience supplying the UK Royal Navy and overseas Navies on platforms from OPV’s to Aircraft Carriers we also offer a consultancy services which means we can bring our vast experience and knowledge to bear on any project needs you may have.

Currently we are also supplying products and services on the Type 31 Frigate for Babcock and with BAE systems on the Type 26 Global Combat ship in the UK, Canada and Australia.

Please DM me if you have any projects or requirements we can be of assistance and help with.

Name: Shipyard Famagusta Cyprus
Description:
Shipyard Famagusta Cyprus is perfectly positioned to provide services for vessels operating in the Eastern Mediterranean, as well as being very close to the major east west trade routes. We offer all sorts of drydocking and marine services including but not limited to paint works, steel works, pipe works, conversions, mechanical works, electrical works and many more. Please check our website for detailed information or email us for a quote. 

We aim to provide Shipowner, operators and managers a high quality service experience. We offer you short lead times, and our dedicated technical teams will work hard to ensure your vessel suffers minimal downtime, but also meets the required standards needed to help keep you seaworthy.

Name: Sasga Yachts
Description:
La aventura Sasga Yachts remonta sus orígenes a 1978, cuando Juan Sastre Bernat fundó Astilleros Menorca para construir una gama de cruceros a partir de los tradicionales llaüts. En unas modestas instalaciones, la empresa creó los Menorquín Yachts e inició su expansión en el sector náutico internacional con un barco seguro y confortable, con una enorme estabilidad y un equipamiento inusual en esta gama de embarcaciones, de imagen clásica e intemporal. 

Años más tarde, en 2010, la familia Sastre retoma su pasión creando un barco completamente nuevo sin perder la esencia de sus llaüts menorquines que conquistaron el mundo. Los Sasga Yachts, con un diseño innovador, ofrecen un mejor confort, habitabilidad y estabilidad; así como también, más velocidad y eficiencia.

Name: Mancon International
Description:
Welcome to Mancon International—your trusted partner in dedicated recruitment solutions. With a commitment to excellence, integrity, and precision, we specialize in connecting top-tier talent with leading organizations across industries.

At Mancon International, we understand that the right people drive success. Whether you're an employer seeking skilled professionals or a candidate looking for the perfect career opportunity, our tailored recruitment services are designed to meet your unique needs.
Backed by industry expertise, a vast network, and a client-focused approach, we take pride in delivering seamless hiring experiences. Our mission is simple: to bridge the gap between talent and opportunity, ensuring long-term success for both businesses and individuals.
Explore our catalog to discover how Mancon International can elevate your recruitment journey. Partner with us—where dedication meets excellence.

Name: Vanton Yachts
Description:
To make a difference

 Vanton Yachts is a high qualified Dutch yacht builder, designing and building motor yachts of 40, 45 and 50 ft. The company was founded in 2021 by Ton van Rutten, architect and passionate motorboater,  who has  a highly developed skill for developing high-end designs and managing complex construction processen. 

Vanton’s yachts are aimed at adventurous experienced sailors, looking to explore coastal waters, lakes and rivers. People who often want to travel for longer periods of time and for whom exceptional comfort is key. This has been translated into a timeless motor yacht series with plenty of interior space, luxury and safety. Into a manoeuvrable motor yacht that is easy and safe to steer. One with a low clearence of 2.75 m¹, to ensure very few obstacles are encountered on the way to your destination.

 Vanton Yachts ist ein hochqualifizierter niederländischer Yachtbauer, der Motoryachten mit Längen von 40, 45 und 50 Fuß entwirft und baut. Das Unternehmen wurde 2021 von Ton van Rutten, Architekt und passionierter Motorbootfahrer, gegründet, der über ausgeprägte Fähigkeiten in der Entwicklung hochwertiger Designs und der Leitung komplexer Bauprozesse verfügt.

Die Yachten von Vanton richten sich an abenteuerlustige, erfahrene Segler, die Küstengewässer, Seen und Flüsse erkunden möchten. An alle, die gerne längere Reisen unternehmen und für die außergewöhnlicher Komfort oberste Priorität hat. Dies spiegelt sich in einer zeitlosen Motoryacht-Serie wider, die mit viel Platz im Innenraum, Luxus und Sicherheit überzeugt. Die wendige Motoryacht lässt sich einfach und sicher steuern. Dank ihrer geringen Durchfahrtshöhe von 2,75 m¹ begegnen Ihnen auf dem Weg zu Ihrem Ziel nur wenige Hindernisse.

All Vanton yachts are fully custom built.

Name: Lekker Boats
Description:
Lekker Boats: Born in Sydney, raised in Amsterdam

We build extraordinary aluminum boats in The Netherlands. They're extremely durable, fast and stylish at the same time. No maintenance is needed, just simply good weather. That's why two Dutchies started the company in 2013 in Sydney, Australia. These boats are sold all around the world. Take a look at our Lekker Boat models at www.lekkerboats.com

Name: Blokland Group
Description:
Blokland Group is an ambitious, family-owned group of companies with a shared drive for excellence.

Rooted in craftsmanship and powered by innovation, we deliver high-performance maritime solutions —from advanced cooling systems and conventional and electric propulsion to precision components and sustainable technologies that keep our customers moving forward.

Name: Adriatic42
Description: YOUR NEW YACHT AND CRUISE REFIT DESTINATION

Name: Tersan Havyard
Description: Gjennom generasjoner har godt handverk vært vårt varemerke. Våre løsninger reduserer utslipp og øker levetid på skip og utstyr - vi utfører ombygginger, reparasjoner og vedlikehold av alle skipstyper i innebygd tørrdokk.

Name: Sabre Yachts
Description:
Sabre Yachts - manufacturers of semi-custom downeast motoryachts and sailing yachts, crafted in Maine since 1970.

The Sabre Yachts lineup consists of six models, all with vee-hull designs and semi-custom stick-built interiors, and are available in Salon Express and Fly Bridge designs. Our award-winning yachts set the standard for nautical sensibility, traditional quality, and owner operation. Expertly designed for the experienced boater, Sabre offers industry-leading reliability and highly sophisticated control, coupled with classic lines and iconic woodworking, ensuring that our yachts make a statement in any harbor. 

For more than 45 years Sabre yachts have been manufactured in the towns of Raymond and Rockland, Maine, by 200+ crafts-people. The Sabre team proudly represents the state's centuries-old shipbuilding heritage, continuing traditions and applying cultural knowledge that have been passed down since the original Popham Colony was founded in 1607. Our crafts-people are the 'secret ingredient' to Sabre's success, and their talent and dedication result in the highest quality downeast style motoryachts on the market today. 

Sabre Yachts have been "Crafted in the Maine Tradition" since 1970 when the company’s founder, Roger Hewson, set out to build the finest possible 28-foot sailing yacht, using production-line methods and fiberglass technology. In 1989 Sabre created our first motoryacht, the  Sabre 36 “Fast Trawler,” and with that first success began our rapid rise to the top of the power market. Today, our six power models consist of  Salon Express and Fly Bridge styles, range from 38 to 58 feet in length, and offering cruise speeds of 25 knots and top end speeds in excess of 30 knots.

Name: Superyacht Builders Association (SYBAss)
Description:
SYBAss unites and represents the world’s leading builders of large yachts. Our main goals are:

Promotion
To facilitate communication between our members and their clients, and the wider industry.

Regulation
Cooperating with regulators to ensure that rules which impact superyachts take into account the unique nature of our industry.

Professionalism
Improving the processes and structures of the superyacht industry and providing members with a single professional body that allows common interests to be shared.

Name: URSA Shipyard
Description:
About Us
The waterfront site where the current shipyard sits has been in the Ergun family since the 1950’s. Originally the setting of their holiday home, the family took the opportunity to develop it into the Ursa Shipyard in 1983 after the area was rezoned in a government move to shift the growing commercial shipping industry out of the city centre.

In 2005, the current President, Sedat Ergun, took over the reins of the company and transformed the shipyard into the advanced technology facility it is today, dedicated to the construction and refit of the world’s finest superyachts. At the same time a new brand, Dunya Yachts, was born to compete with leading northern European shipyards in the construction of large yachts. Since modernisation, the yard has completed the build of the universally acclaimed 73m yacht Axioma and over the last 10 years established itself as the centre for refits for large yachts in Turkey with works completed to more than 25 yachts up to 72m in length.

Facilities 
The Dunya Shipyard has 18,000m² of climate-controlled sheds including the only covered, climate-controlled dry-dock in Turkey. With a 5,000-ton floating dock and 180 metres of quays for berthing, the shipyard is ideally equipped to undertake all types of refit and repair work.
•	30,000m2 	- Total area of shipyard
•	3,500m2 	- Area of onsite workshops
•	100m		- Able to accommodate yachts up to 100m LOA
•	5,000t		- Floating dry dock

Name: HID Global Site Services
Description:
HID Dredger owns a history of 33+ years dredger/vessel/equipment building experiences. 
With presence in 70+ countries, we helped 600+ projects worldwide by providing in-depth engineering knowledge and high performed dredgers. 
We offer sustainable global site services and lifetime technical support, to ensure a successful project and create infinite value for our global customers.

Name: Sunrise Yachts
Description:
Sunrise Yachts is an international yacht building company located in Antalya, Turkey. The company's international design, engineering, management teams combine their expertise with Turkey's skilled workforce to develop world class yacht projects. 

The company operates from one of the largest and most modern yacht building facilities in the Mediterranean, including a fully acclimatized, laboratory style paint hall (67m x 16m x 17m). The shipyard has its own full-fledged engineering office and houses most of its subcontractors on site. The company exhibits at leading yacht international yacht shows every year, including the Monaco Yacht Show.

Our mission is to offer high quality, competitive yacht building and refit solution to discriminating yachtsmen worldwide

Name: ARMEN Initiative
Description:
L'expertise navale bretonne au service de l'innovation.

Chez ARMEN Initiative, nous mettons notre expertise en construction navale au service de l’innovation, en offrant des bateaux sur-mesure réalisés exclusivement en PEHD. 

Que vous soyez un particulier, un professionnel ou une collectivité, nous concevons des embarcations adaptées à vos besoins spécifiques et pensons chaque projet pour qu'il soit performant, durable et respectueux de l'environnement.

ARMEN Initiative, c’est l’alliance parfaite entre qualité, innovation et écologie, pour vous offrir des bateaux pensés pour durer, avec une navigation fluide, sécurisée et sans compromis.

Contactez-nous pour discuter de votre projet !
 contact@armen-initiative.fr

Name: AISTER
Description:
We are a company specialized in marine aluminium sea works focused on Workboats, Maritime shipbuilding  and Marinas.

Our aims are, the best building quality and constantly innovation. Our customers gets the best from our team of 100 employees, who can offer ad-hoc solutions and specific projects. 

We give flexibility and can quickly adapt to the needs and opportunities of the market, thanks to our technical office consist of  industrial engineers, marine engineers and architects, backed by highly-qualified workshop staff such as welders who are certified by the main Classification Societies (Bureau Veritas, ISO 9001 & 14001).

We have been part of Vigo’s marine industry for 30 years and during this period, we have developed the following business lines:

- Aluminium shipyard: We work with the best engineers to meet our customer's need. We sell our own models: patrol, passenger, fireboats, search and rescue boats, workboats, pilots... and our customers include the Spanish Civil Guard, Maritime Safety and Military Emergency Unit.

- Marine industry works: In our 30 years of experience, we have delivered over 150 projects in areas such as marine interiors, thermal insulation, ship supply, aluminium superstructures and accommodation ladders for all types of vessels (seismics, scientific research, fishing and merchant vessels and luxury cruise liners).

- Marinas: We design and manufacture aluminium docks, gangways, fingers, breakwaters, cleats, bollards and service pedestals for marinas. We are market leaders with over 30.000 m of aluminium and concrete floating and fixed pontoons installed throughout the world.

Our work can be found in more than 30 countries: Throughout Spain in cities like Vigo, Barcelona, Valencia, Málaga, Ibiza, and Las Palmas de Gran Canaria, and internationally in countries such as Portugal, France, Italy, China, Greece, Dubai, Oman, Brazil and Cape Verde. Our products have been used in many different locations, meaning you can rely on AISTER to ensure compliance with the safety standards required in different countries throughout the world.

Name: NIT Naval Interior Team
Description:
PASSION - From planning, to building, and final execution outstanding solutions.
COMMITMENT - To work together to achieve unsurpassed results.
AMBITION - Total commitment to constant daily improvement

NIT provides turnkey project solutions for any type of vessels, from new building to refits. As a team, we work with clients to provide superior results.  Our team of professionals are committed to working with our core values:  client orientation, teamwork, professionalism, development, innovation, quality control, and internalizing HSE.

Together, we are ready to help owners, shipping companies, and shipyards with flawless project execution. Our project managers, purchasers, logistics team, site managers, installers, and factory technicians work together with our skilled network to assure that your project will be carried out in time, with required quality, and at the right cost on any project from public spaces, to accommodations to technical areas.

WE BUILD GREAT SPACES

Name: Monterey Boats
Description:
Founded by Charles & Jeff Marshall, partners and co-chairman of the company, Monterey Boats is one of the few marine manufacturing company’s remaining in the industry today that are not only family owned and operated, but also presided over by its original founders. Brothers Charles and Jeff Marshall began their journey in 1985 designing, developing, engineering and building superior boats, and are continuing to build their legacy today as one of the leading boat manufacturers in the industry today. 

Monterey Boats began from day one with a commitment to focus on quality, design and overall ease of maintenance, and has continued to stand firm in that commitment today. From the very first hull built to every boat built today, the owners, engineers and staff at Monterey Boats continue to believe that the Monterey name stands for more than boat manufacturing- they believe it’s a family and a way of life.

For more than 30 years, Monterey has proven to be a leader in the industry, continually raising the bar for class and style year after year. Monterey Boats has established itself as a true frontrunner when it comes to designing, developing, engineering, and building superior boats for the conscientious marine consumer.

At Monterey, every boat is hand crafted by skilled tradesman, designed by engineers, and built with the customer in mind, by more than 500 team members dedicated to producing the best boats on the water today. As a result, over the past three decades, Monterey has produced well over 40,000 boats and generated over 2.4 billion dollars in sales.  Every Monterey boat is also NMMA certified and backed by its exclusive MVP Lifetime Limited Warranty to assure the ultimate in customer confidence and satisfaction.

Name: MAKINEN
Description:
MAKINEN delivers turnkey marine interior projects in demanding shipbuilding environments, where schedules are fixed and execution needs to be precise. 

MAKINEN's expertise covers expedition vessel newbuild interiors, large-scale cabin refurbishments, and furniture production, coordinated as one delivery from planning through installation. MAKINEN has supported cruise lines and shipowners with turnkey interior deliveries since 1992. Today, the company operates globally with offices in Europe, North America, and Asia, allowing close cooperation with clients and project sites. In-house furniture and textile production is based in Lieto, Finland. 

With more than 65,000 refurbished cabins, seven expedition vessel interiors delivered, and over 65,000 sofas sailing onboard cruise ships, MAKINEN’s work is built on three generations of experience in marine interiors.

Name: Fujairah National Shipping
Description:
Part of the Fujairah National Group, Fujairah National Shipping (FNS) offers an unsurpassed range of services to ship owners, operators, charterers, managers and brokers, covering every sector and every need. From advanced big data analytics to inform operations, to traditional ship agency, crew management, warehousing and distribution.
FNS is based at the Port of Fujairah, the only multi-purpose port on the eastern seaboard of the United Arab Emirates and it offers easy access to international shipping routes. The port is the focus of continual investment, and its many natural assets, and geographic advantage, are matched only by FNS’ unrivalled range of services.

Name: VEKA Group
Description:
VEKA Group is a distinctive Dutch shipbuilder that has become an international player in the maritime industry in its 25 years of existence. Today we operate in diversified nautical markets and deliver a wide range of specialized vessels.

By taking over several shipyards in the Netherlands and abroad, VEKA has acquired far more than 25 years of experience in building high quality vessels. Always according to its own design, cost efficient, with passion and using in-house knowhow.

Name: HAI HA MARINE AND SHIP REPAIR SERVICE
Description: Hai Ha M&S is founded in 2015. From a company of only a few men steadily grows to its present scale with more than 30 dedicated craftsmen. From a very well equipped workshop and our dedicated workforce, trucks, portable welding machines, diving equipment, auxiliary equipment and 24/7 availability, we can provide for you the following services.

Name: Amer Yachts S.p.A.
Description:
Amer Yachts is a groundbreaking, independent Italian shipyard that masterfully fuses the art of yacht building with the horizon of innovation. Its award-winning fleet, featuring unique vessels from 24 to 75 metres, all stems from a single vision: to seamlessly weave together advanced technology, uncompromising craftsmanship and the company’s profound dedication to environmental stewardship. 
This commitment delivers pure pleasure and unparalleled satisfaction to every shipowner, ensuring each yacht embodies excellence. Every detail is meticulously optimized — from its precise engineering and elegant design to its commanding performance, unwavering manoeuvrability and safety. A meticulous approach that extends to a deep focus on mindful consumption, reflecting a pioneering Low-Impact Strategy.

Name: BREKO Shipbuilding & Repair / PSI Piping
Description:
BREKO (1974) en PSI (1998) zijn actief op de markt van de scheepvaart, offshore en industrie. Alle faciliteiten onder één dak!
Onze kracht ligt in de verregaande specialisatie die wij ons in de scheepsbouw en leidingsystemen hebben eigengemaakt. Dit vertaalt zich in het leveren van een "écht BREKO/PSI-SCHIP" met innovatieve, klantgerichte engineering en kwalitatief hoogwaardige oplossingen. Ook persoonlijke aandacht voor de klant staat hoog in het vaandel.

Wij beschikken over alle expertise, faciliteiten, producten en diensten op het gebied van onderhoud, reparatie, ombouw of nieuwbouw en kunnen deze werkzaamheden bij u aan boord of op een van onze scheepswerven uitvoeren.

Leg ons uw wensen voor en wij bieden u een passende oplossing waarbij u – onze klant – centraal staat. Wij verrichten onze werkzaamheden altijd in overleg met u: samen staan we sterk!

Name: JFA Yachts
Description:
New Building
Custom or semi-custom, the yachts built at JFA Yachts, sail the world over, proving every day their capacity to combine performance, reliability, comfort and refinement. From 70’ to 200’, JFA shipyard can access all materials and techniques. We are used to build Motor Yachts and Sailing Yachts, whether it is a Monohull or a Multihull. 

Refit
Exceptional infrastructures, strategically located in the center of the Atlantic coast of Europe with highly qualified craftsmen make JFA the ideal shipyard to handle the most important projects in terms of price, deadline and quality.

Name: OLCESE RICCI S.R.L.
Description:
Olcese Ricci is the world's most prestigious marine equipment brand. 
Our acclaimed reputation, high quality products and credibility are rooted in our employees' unique skills and pride in what they do. 
Our history began when the company was founded in the 1946. 
Olcese Ricci has come a long way from its early hand manufacture to today’s computer aided R&D and CNC manufacturing. 
Our mission remains to offer our customers the very best in accuracy and performance.

The handcraft production allows to create custom yacht, high quality and totally Made in Italy

From gliders to the prestigious boats made in wood, all plastic heat-formed boats, to modern cruisers in fibreglass.
Exclusive handcrafted italian yachts since 1961

Name: OMCI Shipmanagement Pvt.Ltd
Description: OMCI ship management, offers a service that integrates trust, sincerity, integrity, hard work and fair business practices. Supported by the optimal use of modern technology, our values enable us to provide the highest quality service to our customers.

Name: WESTERN BALTIC ENGINEERING
Description:
WESTERN BALTIC ENGINEERING – one of the leading ship design & engineering service providers in the Baltic region specialising in design and technical support for ship building, offshore & maritime industry solutions. Since 2003 company has successfully built a reputation of a reliable, flexible, innovative and ‘always on time’ partner with extensive ‘know-how’. Western Baltic Engineering is one of the strategic subsidiaries of Western Shipyard Group.

WBE employs 100 shipbuilding design constructors and engineers who have long term experience in the area of their professional activity. 

WBE services: 

Naval architecture services:
•	Hull classification drawings #hulldesign 
•	Structure strength calculations #structurecalculations 
•	Block assembling and building strategy drawings #blockassembly
•	Workshop drawings of ship’s hull construction #workshopdocumentation 
•	3D modeling #3D #3Dmodelling
•	Preparation of plate parts cutting cards and cutting routes’ programs #nesting
•	Preparation of sketches for profile parts‘ production and bending templates
•	Calculations of structures’ center gravity #marinecalculation #vesselcalculations
•	Preparation of materials and parts’ sheets #materiallist
•	Workshop documentation of hull piping #vesselpiping #pipeplan
•	Modeling and nesting of ship equipment and mechanisms #shipmechanics
•	Drawing of isometric cards #isometriccard
•	Reports of materials and preparation of data sheets #reports

WBE use the following software:

•	Ship Constructor, AVEVA MARIN, Nupas Cadmatic – for 3D hull structure modeling and piping workshop documentation.
•	RINOCEROS – for collation of hull surfaces and vessel visualization preparation.
•	NISA II - Structure strength calculations (using finite element method).
•	Dialog-Static – for calculation of the vessel’s stability.

Name: TINCASUR SUR, S.L.
Description:
Tincasur Sur es una empresa de servicios con una gran experiencia en los campos Naval, Industrial y OffShore, contando con dos divisiones, una dedicada a la Mecánica y otra a la Calderería.

Mecánica:

Nuestra dilatada experiencia, unida a un grupo de profesionales en continua formación y reciclaje, es la base de nuestra solidez y liderazgo en este campo, ofreciendo a nuestros clientes montajes completos de sistemas de propulsión de buques, overhauls de motores 2T/4T,  alineaciones láser, resinados, etc.
Somos servicio oficial de marcas tan importantes como MTU, Cummins, Detroit Diesel, Reintjes, Kaeser, Chockfast.

Calderería, tubería y soldadura:

Tincasur Sur asiste al cliente desde la confección del proyecto, estudiando el tipo de instalación más adecuada, hasta la puesta en marcha.
Disponemos de un amplio bagaje en el campo de la soldadura,contando con un Ingeniero Europeo en Soldadura, el cual realiza los procedimientos, mediante los cuales homologamos a nuestros soldadores, siendo aprobados por las diferentes Sociedades de Clasificación (LRS, DNV, BV, GL,...), Realizamos cualquier tipo de soldadura, CrMo, Acero, Inoxidable, Yolcabro, CuNiFe, Aluminio, Duplex, materiales disimilares, etc.

Somos empresa instaladora de la categoría EIP-2 y reparadora de la categoría ERP-2 de equipos a presión.

Estamos certificados por Bureau Veritas bajo las normas UNE-EN-ISO 9001-2000, UNE-EN-ISO 14001-2004, OHSAS 18001-2007 y en Marzo de 2012 nos homologamos en la norma  PECAL 2120.

Name: IHB ShipDesign AD
Description:
IHB ShipDesign is a Bulgarian company, a member of Industrial Holding Bulgaria (IHB). 
Our core business consists of high quality naval and marine design, engineering, and consultancy in shipbuilding and marine industry.
The IHB ShipDesign team is motivated by continuous design improvements and securing quality throughout the design, engineering, and shipbuilding process. 

Our team of Naval Architects and Marine Engineers combine experience and knowledge with enthusiasm, creativity, and dedication to develop and deliver the design and documentation needed to build a vessel.

At IHB ShipDesign we have a strong drive for optimizing ship performance. In our process of designing vessels, we combine innovative thinking and well-proven solutions. Our pride and recognition are linked to successful vessels.

Name: APCL Group
Description:
The APCL Group brings together A&P Group, Cammell Laird and Neway. 

A&P Group and Cammell Laird are the UK’s largest commercial ship building and repair operations. Neway Industrial Services delivers a range of painting and blasting services across the UK. 

The services we provide sustains the international defence and maritime community, underpinning the availability of naval fleets whilst maintaining the vital operations of the seaborne asset community. 

A&P and Cammell Laird continue their unwavering support of the Royal Navy, Royal Australian Navy, Royal Fleet Auxiliary and its commercial customers. 

Together, APCL Builds Customer Success.

Name: Bayards Yacht Structures
Description:
Bayards has established an exceptional reputation in the realm of luxury yacht construction, showcasing impeccable craftsmanship and a wealth of experience and expertise.

Our shipbuilding expertise encompasses the production of aluminum sailboat and superyacht hulls, superstructures, and complete cascos. 

Leveraging the unique characteristics of aluminum in the shipbuilding industry, we design structures that harmoniously blend aesthetics and engineering prowess.

We have established ourselves as specialists in building superstructures for the top superyacht manufacturers in the Netherlands.

Name: Guyana Port INC
Description:
Guyana Port Inc., established in 2019, grew from the idea of assessing the gap in the current market of being an oil producing nation. As of 2022, GPI boasts the only 2000 metric ton floating drydock in the country. The dock measure 80 meters in length, 16 meters breadth and can accommodate vessels with an even keel of 3 meters.

GPI is strategically located 16km down from the mouth of the Demerara river and offers a full range of general repair services including engineering, electrical, propulsion, accommodation upgrades, marine fitting, sand blasting and painting as well as outsourced procurement, testing, trials and class surveys and much more. The strategic location allows clients to benefit from an already established shipping route into and out of the country thus enjoying reduced time vessels are in and out of service. Additionally, with GPI’s considerable steel reserves it enables the company to manage major and minor emergency repair projects swiftly

Name: SOLAS MARINE SERVICES PRIVATE LIMITED
Description: SOLAS MARINE SERVICES PRIVATE LIMITED is a Marine Engineering Company based out registered office at Plot No C-7 and C-9, Phase I - A, Survey No 166, Verna Industrial Estate Of GIDC, Verna, Salcete, South Goa- 403722, Goa, India, Branch office at: Plot No. C-440/1, TTC Industrial Area, MIDC, Turbhe Navi, Mumbai, Maharashtra, India Tel: 9372674598.

Name: SilverCAT
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of SilverCAT – Your Ride Into The Future! -

As a proud member of the Gulf Craft family, SilverCAT is redefining boating experiences with our exceptional catamarans. Our vessels seamlessly blend elegance, innovation, and performance, offering a new dimension of luxury on the water.

Explore our world of premium catamarans, ranging from the sleek SilverCAT 34CC to the luxurious SilverCAT 46LUX. With a commitment to excellence, each SilverCAT boat is meticulously crafted to ensure an unparalleled journey for our discerning clientele.

Connect with us to discover a world of boating like never before. Visit our website to learn more about our models, and feel free to reach out to our team for any inquiries.

Name: Van Aalst Marine & Offshore
Description:
Van Aalst Group institutes around a group of independent companies that specialize in specific fields within the pneumatic cargo handling of machinery, equipment and its development, for transport and distribution to the Marine & Offshore and the Construction Industry worldwide.

Today, the companies have established to become a reference point thanks to the short communication lines and their highly skilled enthusiastic professionals whom dedicate themselves to deliver sustainable products that meet business specific processes.

Close collaboration and decade of surround field knowledge has led to great technological advances as a result of the customer driven approach and dedication.In favor with environmental regulations that reflects in the latest products, van Aalst Group works with determination to deliver environmental friendly solutions for now and in the future.

With the recently expanded Pneumatic R&D center van Aalst Group aims to establish the leading position in the current operating markets and to further explore new market opportunities.

Name: TeamCo Shipyard
Description:
TeamCo Shipyard is uw betrokken scheepsbouwpartner voor de binnenvaart en kleine zeevaart. Van nieuwbouw tot scheepsreparatie en van riviercruiseschip tot LNG-tanker: voor elk project en type schip kunt u bij ons terecht.

Vertel ons de wens voor uw schip. Wij denken met u mee, en koppelen uw wensen en doelstellingen aan technische oplossingen. We werken nauw samen met vaste partners en onderaannemers. Hierdoor staan we altijd garant voor de bouw van een kwalitatief excellent schip.

Ook garanderen we persoonlijke betrokkenheid gedurende het hele bouwproces. Want hoe groot het schip ook is dat we voor u bouwen, kleinschaligheid houden we altijd in ere. Zodat uw schip altijd aan alle verwachtingen voldoet. Of deze zelfs overstijgt.

--- ENGLISH ---

TeamCo Shipyard is your inland navigation and small seagoing vessels shipbuilding partner. From newbuilding and ships renovation, to river cruise ships and LNG tankers. We’ve got you.

Tell us your shipbuilding wish. We think along, and carefully match your ambitions to smart technical solutions. We work closely together with a select group of partners and subcontractors. As a result, we always guarantee a high-quality ship.

In addition, we guarantee personal involvement throughout the entire shipbuilding process. And continuously offer small scale service, no matter the size of your ship. That’s how we make sure your ship always meets or even transcends your expectations.

Description: As a custom yacht boutique, Filippetti Yachts focuses on delivering a select number of yachts with personalized luxury, cutting edge design, and superior quality, so as to satisfy even the most passionate seafarer. Our technology , enables  low cost automation with a precise interaction between  software , controller  and mechanical system.

Description: We are a family-run company leading in custom superyacht construction.

Name: SCO·HID (Qingdao) Marine Equipment Technology Co., Ltd
Description:
SCO-HID company has been focusing on designing and producing all kinds of dredging vessels for 36 years and operating in 55 countries. The quality of the products has been certified internationally. We provide competitive advantages to our global clients and covering market segment such as land reclamation, capital dredging, port development, sand mining, navigation channels restoration, beach reclamation, environmental dredging, lakes and reservoirs dredging and cleaning. 

We sincerely invite you to collaborate with us for your upcoming dredging project worldwide. 

Firstly, our company is a member of SCO (Shanghai Cooperation Organization). We can provide you with excellent vessel and dredging equipment quality and preferential prices based on our internal SCO policies. 

Secondly, when our shipyard joined the SCO Government Organization, it has passed a series of strict international inspections, hence the quality of the vessels has been guaranteed.

Thirdly, our company offers 12 months warranty and lifetime technical services to ensure your project a successful one, as long as you are using our vessels, we are here to support.

Choosing our dredging vessels & equipment is your best choice. We hope to carry hands with you for a better maritime future.

Name: Western Marine Shipyard Ltd.
Description:
Western Marine Shipyard, known as the leading shipbuilder of Bangladesh. The mother company Western Marine Services was initially formed by a group of marine professionals specialized in ship repairing & export of marine supplies. The major intention of the company’s founders was to develop a cluster of technological excellence to meet global demand of the maritime industry. Gradually the company developed as a shipbuilder with its own shipyard in the eastern bank of river Karnaphuli in Chittagong in the year 2000 over a land of 1.5 acres for building inland vessels.

Today Western Marine Shipyard is the leading shipbuilder in the country standing over 42 acres of land, modernized into a world-class shipyard consisting all sort of hi-tech & heavy tech machinery through an investment of Tk.300 crore. It is an employment source of 3500 manpower including skilled, semi-skilled labours. More than five hundred professionals are working in the shipyard including marine, mechanical, electrical engineers, naval architects & experts in other fields. The yard gained recognition so rapid that its fame spread all over the world at a short period, as a result, today they are constructing ocean-going vessels for Germany, Denmark, & Pakistan.

They have achieved remarkable international orders of shipbuilding in recent years, which are 8 MP vessels for Grona Shipping in Germany; 5 Ice-class Container Vessels for Stella Shipping in Denmark; 1 Floating Reception Vessel from LAMOR Corp. AB in Finland; 2 Passenger Vessels for Karachi Port Trust (KPT), Pakistan; & 1 Car Ferry for Hundested-Rørvig Færgefart in Denmark. Out of these foreign orders, they have successfully delivered eight 5200 DWT MPC vessels to Grona Shipping, one floating reception vessel to LAMOR & two passenger ships to KPT, one car ferry & one 41000DWT MPC ship.

They have built more than 60 ships for coastal & inland use & newbuilding of more than 30 ships are in progress which includes deep sea fishing trawlers, port utility vessels, tugs, inland container ships, inland tankers & passenger ships. Recently they have signed a contract for building one aluminium body passenger ship for Tanzania. This will be catamaran type designed ship with twin hull.

Name: ROM Boats
Description:
ROM Boats is a recent company born of a passion of its founder for motor recreational power boats and the premise of producing limited series numbered models - a ROM client has every right to have a unique boat, different from many others. 

The marketing and after-sales model is one of the distinguishing points of ROM. The relationship with our customers is always made between the factory and the final customer, which allows us to hear directly from our customers about their wants and needs and to make customization a true reality. On the other hand, all support, where and if necessary, is guaranteed by us anywhere in Europe.

For us it is absolutely essential to be able to respond to the client's functional and practical needs, without neglecting the aesthetic aspect of the boat. We combine innovative technologies with traditional and old craftsmanship, drawing on the vast experience of workers in a sector that was once very strong in Portugal and which needs urgent revitalization, so that the little know-how that still exists can be recovered. 

With this concern in mind, we installed our shipyard in Aveiro, a city with a great tradition in boat construction, recruiting people deprived to exercise their vocation and to apply the knowledge that still dominates. We also guarantee the transfer of this know-how to the new generations so that they will last in time and we will be able to reinvigorate this sector.

ROM boats are characterized by elegant and modern lines, unique and innovative design, topped by luxury finishes with exquisite materials not normally seen on boats. We combine innovative technologies (in the manufacture of molds and fiberglass) to traditional and old-fashioned craftsmanship (hand-made carpentry and upholstery).

Name: Vera Navis | Ship Design
Description:
Vera Navis is a design office providing naval architecture and marine engineering services.

Established in 2009 by three naval architects and a renowned company of Ship Design/Production specialized in CAD/CAE/CAM software. Vera Navis brought together different professionals from ship design offices and shipyards into a multidisciplinary team.

Today the team has grown to cover the main areas of Ship Design, having human resources specialized in state of art methodologies and tools.

We provide the full scope of ship design services, from concept to detail design as well as specialized engineering analysis of structures, systems and fluid flow.

Representing several leading ship design software we offer high level training and consultancy for shipyards and design offices in Europe.

Working in close relationship with our customers, we offer cost-effective solutions using integrated tools. Our clients are shipowners, shipyards and design offices looking for on-time, on-budget and on-quality deliveries with a high level of expertise and multidisciplinary integration.

Name: Marine Engineering Galati
Description:
MEGA story started in 2004, when raised the necessity of available engineering capacity within the DAMEN Group, and Schelde Naval Shipbuilding took the decision to set up a new engineering company in Galati, within the Damen Shipyard area, named MARINE ENGINEERING Galati, well known as MEGA.
The first team - six hull and piping engineers - started in April 2004 and was followed by other small teams at every five – six months.  In the next four years MEGA has grown in size, but  also in performance.
Following the DAMEN Group Top Management decision, in July 2008 MEGA took over almost half of the engineers of the Engineering Department of DAMEN Galati Shipyard and reached up to 65 employees.
Nowadays, MEGA is a modern engineering company specialized in engineering for shipbuilding, mainly providing detailed engineering packages for mechanical, structure, arrangements and outfitting, FEM, ILS and Data Engineering Support activities, performing also inclining tests, with almost 200 people, from which more than 90% are direct structure & steel outfitting or mechanical/ electrical/ HVAC engineers, Project Managers, Project Coordinators and Team Leaders, working in modern offices spaces, in 2 modern office buildings.

Name: SimFWD
Description:
SimFWD is a research, development and application company, providing engineering services in the transport and construction industries. The company focuses on computer aided engineering technologies such as FEM, CFD and Agent Based Modelling. SimFWD can provide turnkey solutions to complicated generic problems in a cost effective manner, eliminating the overheads normally associated with a dedicated engineering analysis group or department. SimFWD aims at helping customers develop product designs and processes by supplying them with customized engineering analysis and software solutions.

Our background in Computer-Aided Engineering (CAE), Finite Element Analysis (FEA) and Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) in the Maritime and Automotive industry has encouraged the development and application of simulation methods to solve the most demanding engineering problems. Software solutions from various partners, combined with the value-added service and support from our company will be the key catalyst for innovation and faster time to market for our client’s products.

LuxuryYachts.io is global platform connecting yacht owners, interior & exterior designers, naval architects, superyacht architects, brokers, yachting brands and the marine service providers.

Name: Naval Architect
Description:
We help you to manage information in your shipbuilding projects from concept design to commissioning. Our software maintains the overall picture during the entire project lifecycle, so you can plan reliably and efficiently keep track of the project status during the execution phase. We create the transparency you need to make sure that your projects are consistently delivered on time and within budget.

Our solution in a nutshell: We provide a central platform for creating and managing project data based on a digital ship model that project teams collaborate on in the cloud. This central model is the “Single Source of Truth” and contains all information about the ship: e.g. General Arrangement, 3D CAD model, planning status, weight calculation, specifications, component data, project history and any other information you define. It is continuously maintained throughout the ship’s life and is the essential source of information.

Are you interested in a product demonstration or want to try our software? Get in touch with us: info@naval-architect.io

Name: CCN - Cerri Cantieri Navali
Description:
CCN specializes in the construction of high performing fiberglass yachts and steel and aluminum Semi - displacement yachts ranging between 27 and 35 m in length. 
With its headquarter based in Carrara Avenza, at the border between Tuscany and Ligury – a strategic area for the traffic of mega yachts in the Tyrrhenian Sea - the shipyard extends over an area of more than 7,000 m². Recently, two new sheds have joined the existing production plant, for an average annual production of 4/5 new units ranging between 27 and 50 m.
CCN shipyard, which joined the Gavio Group in 2011, is going through a renewal process of its structure, image, and product thanks to a new brand (CCN - Cerri Cantieri Navali) and a wider
product range.
The 2 most successful series - the CCN 102’ Flyingsport and the CCN 86’ Flyingsport – were restyled, preserving their distinctive décor features but adding a more contemporary touch, and 2 new lines of steel and aluminium and/or all-aluminium yachts started to be built – the Navetta yachts between 24 and 35 m in length, designed by Studio Spadolini Design, and the ‘Phileas’ - 35 m Expedition yachts pencilled by Vallicelli. This will give CCN the opportunity to offer its international clientele a truly complete product range.
The “Fuoriserie” line marks CCN’s debut in the world of world-class bespoke projects - unique masterpieces that respond to the customers’ requirement for full customization - and further highlights the shipyard’s great versatility and its ability to meet the most diverse needs.

We handle a wide range of tasks including ship repair and shipyard operations. We know that time is important and therefore we know how vital importance it is to solve the tasks on time.  Our key people are from renowned dry-docks with 20+ years of experience at the different shipyards in UAE and abroad.

The goal for our ship repairing business is to be the excellent partner with ship owners. Our Ship Repair Department have full capacity to provide the ship repair service with high quality, in floating, quay and dry docking such as follows:

       *All types of fabrication/welding works etc

RAKTECH LLC specialises in providing engineering solutions to industrial customers in the region.

Availability 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year.

Name: Aircraft Carrier Industrial Base Coalition
Description:
The Aircraft Carrier Industrial Base Coalition (ACIBC) represents businesses that supply parts, equipment and services for the construction and maintenance of U.S. Navy aircraft carriers. Established in 2004, ACIBC seeks to preserve the strength of the aircraft carrier force and promote the value of the aircraft carrier industrial base as a vital part of the nation’s overall defense structure.

ACIBC businesses provide all the valves, wiring, steel, motors and thousands of other parts that make these ships the preeminent expression of U.S. military power—capable of delivering overwhelming warfighting force around the globe.

In total, more than 2,000 small, mid-sized and large businesses from 46 states, and 293 congressional districts, contribute parts, services and support to the construction and maintenance of U.S. Navy aircraft carriers.

Join ACIBC: https://www.acibc.org/join-acibc/

Our commercial products are used in a wide variety of industries from salvage and towing to transportation.  We offer very customizable platforms at a very reasonable cost.  All vessels we build are designed by highly trained professionals using state of the art software and 3D modeling techniques.

Name: HD Hyundai Mipo Co., Ltd.
Description: Greetings, HD Hyundai Mipo (HMD) founded in 1975 has secured its foothold as the world’s No. 1 dockyard dedicated to the construction of mid-sized vessels, based on abundant technology and experience. Equipped with an integrated information system for the entire manufacturing process and an advanced design and engineering system achieved based on relentless research and development (R&D), HMD boasts the industry’s best technology and productivity. It has the biggest share of the global market when it comes to petrochemical carriers, container ships, Conro, and asphalt carriers, and it has been selected as the World Class Product of Korea attesting to its competitiveness in the mid-sized ship construction sector. The company has been striving to gain a competitive edge through ceaseless change and innovation amidst the global economic recession and as latecomers are catching up. As a result, HMD has preemptively occupied the eco-friendly ship market based on the world’s top eco-ship technology and boosting its competitiveness in the high value-added special-purpose ship market that includes platform supply vessels (PSVs), combo vessels, open hatch general cargo (OHGC), juice carriers, refrigerated container carriers, ethylene gas carriers, etc. By meeting the demands in the rapidly changing shipping market and the diverse demands from customers, HMD has taken leadership in the global shipbuilding industry. As part of the efforts toward business diversification and technology export in 1999, HMD expanded into Vietnam and established Hyundai-Vietnam Shipyard (HVS). After commencing its business in the area of ship repair, HVS switch into shipbuilding in 2009 and has been garnering global attention with its remarkable growth. HMD, which has been contributing to national development and prosperity through the advancement of the shipbuilding industry, will continue to maintain its devotion to building unparalleled ships.

Name: Allstars Group
Description:
Allstars Group is a reliable and innovative engineering and consulting company established in 1983. Our head office is located in the city of Turku. In addition to this we have other offices in Finland in Rauma and Tampere. Other offices in Allstars Group network are located in Bulgaria and Poland. Together we employ directly over 100 employees and we have altogether over 200 experts' pool for our projects. The main engineering sectors we operate in are Marine, Offshore and Industrial sectors. We have over 35 years' experience of shipbuilding industry and other industries as well.

Allstars Group´s personnel consists of highly qualified and experienced engineers from various design fields. The service may cover a variety of engineering fields to form a comprehensive package, or it may consist of one particular design project, depending on your need. Work can be done either at your premises or at our office.

Our Services:
-	Shipbuilding engineering in all different sectors
-	Comprehensive project management 
-	Industrial Lay-out and plant design 
-	Steel construction design
-	Strength analyses
-	Piping and outfitting design
-	HVAC design
-	Interior design
-	Machinery and equipment design

Program software e.g.
AVEVA Marine/Plant, Tribon, CADMATIC, AutoCAD, CATIA, ANSYS, SolidWorks, Inventor and Vertex.
  
More information about our company, services and references, please visit our website!

Name: offshoreshipdesign.com
Description:
Company Profile 

We provide ship design, naval architecture, engineering support, structure design and analysis to a wide range of ship owner, marine consulting services to the offshore industries and shipyard.
Our Primary area of expertise is in conceptual, preliminary and contract design of Tanker,Bulk Carrier, Passenger Ship, Ro-Ro vessel, Pipelay Vessel, Tender Barge and Containership. We have extensive experience in newbuildings and conversions of Tanker to FPSO, Bulk Carrier, Ro-Ro and Tender Barge.
 
We can handle not only the traditional mono-hulls, but also drillship, Floating Production Storage and Offloading(FPSO),Semi-Submesible drilling Rigs and other offshore production platform.  
We use our own ship strength,motion and stability tools as well as commerical programs to do various standard ship strength,motion and stability calculation. 

Services:
1. Hull Basic Design Calculation
2. 3D-Modelling & Finite Element Analysis
3. Intact & Damage Stability Booklets.
4. Inclining Experiment,Lightship Survey &  Tonnage Calculation.
5. Longitudinal Strength Analysis
6. Offshore Structure design and Analysis 
7. Scantling Analysis
8. Updating and Conversion Design
9. Helideck,Crane Pedestal foundation,Winch Foundation,Engine Foundation ,Flare Tower structure and foundation anaysis.
10. Power Calculation
11. Review Drawings,Structure Analysis Report,
    Lightship Survey and Stability Report.

Name: Blokland Cooling & Propulsion
Description:
Based in the Netherlands and with roots dating back to 1962, Blokland Non Ferro has set a new standard in terms of craftmanship, engineering and construction.

The best solution for your application!
Our high-standard cooling and propulsion solutions are installed in many commercial shipping, pleasure crafts and industrial applications worldwide.

We have earned an excellent reputation when it comes to supporting our clients with outstanding cooling and propulsion solutions. We are not easily satisfied and go to great lengths to provide our clients with a solution that is as optimized and reliable as possible. Using all our expertise, craftmanship, high-quality machinery and the timeless effort of our dedicated employees. So, we redefined our mission: Blokland - Keep moving forward.

Name: Garcia Yachts
Description: For more than 40 years, Garcia Yachts has been building exceptional boats for the future and adventure in extreme environments. Character boats, protectors, reliable and powerful and whose quality finishes is currently recognized around the world. The experience and excellence of his boilermakers have been reported today by Garcia. This boat is the reference in the world of aluminum sailing dinghies.

Name: FMC Dockyard Limited
Description:
FMC Dockyard is a subsidiary of FMC Group, the maritime cluster, concentrated on providing complex solutions in the industry. Almost 20 years experience in marine industry help us to carry leading positions in the field.

Currently FMC Dockyard delivers vessels to fulfil different industries’ needs, including offshore works, harbor services, fishing industry, shipping duties, public transportation, dredging operations. Our business strategy is «Diversity for growth and innovation».

The present capacities for new shipbuilding capacity is up to 140 m/ 10000 DWT, for repair, maintenance and conversion – up to 150 m/ 12000 DWT.

Our key values are continuous development, safety, and environmental protection. We always emphasize on meeting customers’ demand and ensuring their satisfaction at all possible ways is our main objective.

We hope you will consider us as the best dockyard to build your vessels and also conduct repair/maintenance jobs.

Name: Bandar Abadi Shipyard
Description: PT. Bandar Abadi Shipyard was established for over a decade with expertise and experience in ship building, ship repairing, ship conversion and numerous steel fabrication works. The company is characterized by its willingness to scale up, ability to innovate, to strengthen its capabilities, and in implementing new ideas, technology, systems and processes to constantly provide an uncompromising service quality for the betterment of its customers.

Name: Voltari Electric
Description:
The Voltari Difference: we manufacture the world's fastest-accelerating electric performance workboats & recreational vessels with service-free motors & zero emissions, offering a reduced sound and thermal footprint, unmatched stealth properties, and maximized safety and comfort features. Voltari's vertically integrated shipyards fuse advanced hull design, high-kW electric propulsion, advanced battery manufacturing, and autonomy into one unified platform. 


Unleashing a new level of performance and freeing our waterways from pollution and noise.

Name: InnovMarine Inc.
Description:
InnovMarine provides trusted digital solutions to the marine industry. We integrate toolsets and optimize workflows to improve information flow and enhance standardization. Our practical software and training enhance data access and efficiency across the vessel lifecycle.

Design Faster – Through streamlined collaboration and reducing rework, we help you deliver accurate, high-quality designs—faster and with greater confidence.

Build Better – Improved planning means we help you reduce delays, improve coordination, and keep projects on track and on schedule.

Maintain Smarter - Modernize maintenance and repair teams with digital solutions to maximize ship availability and reduce maintenance costs.

Name: Ship Repair Facility and Japan Regional Maintenance Center (SRF-JRMC)
Description: Ship Repair Facility and Japan Regional Maintenance Center Yokosuka,  Det Sasebo, and Det Singapore is a US Navy ship repair and maintenance center responsible for maintaining the 22 ships of the Forward Deployed Naval Forces (FDNF) serving in the U.S. SEVENTH Fleet.

Name: TecnoPesca Argentina SA
Description:
TecnoPesca Argentina SA es una empresa con más de 23 años de historia en la Ciudad de Mar del Plata, en cuyo Puerto se inició en el rubro de servicios de calderería para buques pesqueros en un pequeño taller, en el año 1994.

Con mucho trabajo y buenos resultados del mismo, la empresa logró posicionarse como un referente dentro de los talleres navales de la Ciudad, y para la realización de trabajos de montajes industriales.

En el año 2005, la empresa incorpora un taller de mecanizados ubicado en el macrocentro de la Ciudad, en la calle Alvarado 3545, dónde se comenzó con la realización de trabajos de mecánica y reparaciones integrales de motores lentos y semilentos, cajas reductoras, bombas, cromado y mecanizado de piezas, y demás trabajos conexos.

Durante el año 2007 se realiza la botadura del primer buque construido en las instalaciones de TecnoPesca Argentina SA, B/P Vencedor, un pesquero arrastrero de 16 metros de eslora.

Para el año 2014, TecnoPesca Argentina logra dar un salto de magnitud en sus trabajos cuando se le es adjudicada la Parcela “28-A” del puerto de Mar del Plata, incorporando así un varadero con una capacidad de halaje de buques de hasta 650 Toneladas.

La puesta en valor de este espacio para estar operativo demoró 6 meses y dio pie a, entre los años 2015 y 2017, la construcción de una nave de 1000 mts2 para la instalación del taller de mecanizados, construcción de oficinas nuevas para la administración de la compañía y oficinas técnicas tanto para el varadero como para el taller de mecanizados.

Name: Gridin's Group
Description:
The Gridin’s Group - top-quality technical specialists for the integrated management and execution of various industrial projects.

The Company provides full-scope services in fabrication and installation of steel structures, renovation of offshore facilities, shipbuilding and ship repair.

Name: Työvene
Description: Uudenkaupungin Työvene (Uki Workboat) has extensive experience in designing and building boats and vessels for professional use. We deliver tailor-made turn key projects on time and to cost. Our over 220 deliveries have provided the company with knowledge of how to design and build vessels for demanding professional purposes. We know both aluminium and steel materials. Key personnel with decades of experience in shipbuilding and project management and good production facilities ensure that our customers receive a quality product.

Name: EVOMARINE INC
Description: EVO Marine Inc. is a turnkey contractor specializing in engineering, project management, refit & retrofitting solutions, shipbuilding, repairs and conversions for the Marine Industry.

Name: Shoft Shipyard
Description:
SHOFT is a private shipyard located in Gujarat, the state with the longest coast line in India and is Head Quartered in Thane (Mumbai)

SHOFT is equipped with state-of-the-art infrastructure and facilities required for building sophisticated vessels and has built a variety of ships across various segments such as Defence & Security, Offshore, Port Operations, Dredging, Cargo carriers, Inland and Coastal and some special projects. 

Construction Range, Products and Services of SHOFT include:
Cargo Vessels, Product / Bulk Carriers up to 10000 T DWT, Tugs, Launches, Passenger cum cargo Ferries, Pontoons, Barges, Fishing Vessels, Crane Barges and Dredgers. 
Offshore vessels of all types include, Supply Vessels, Construction Vessels, Accommodation Barges, DP2 vessels etc.
Construction of Naval auxiliary vessels such as FPVs, OPVs, TLRVs, Hydrographic Survey vessels and refit of FPVs, IBs etc. 

SHOFT is also associated with major Defence Public sector shipyards in the country in their construction of Frigates, Destroyers and Submarines.

SHOFT has to its credit an impeccable record of delivering quality ships in the Commercial as well as the Defence sectors, thus living up to its motto; 
“We Promise, We Deliver”

Name: Grupo FAED
Description: Industrial group.

Name: Talsma Shipyards
Description: Shipyard Talsma is a trusted address for shipbuilding, repair, maintenance, houseboats and industrial one-off projects

Name: Mylius Yachts
Description:
Since its founding in 2003, Mylius builds fast cruiser-racers, able to combine comfort, performance, quality, and style. 
The boats are built entirely in carbon sandwich, PVC foam core and epoxy resin, semi-custom mode, with the best care and attention to customers. 
Since 2011 Mylius Srl is 51% owned by Twinpack Group, leaders in packaging industry.

Name: Ghostworks Marine
Description:
GhostWork Marine was formed with the sole purpose of developing, designing, and manufacturing powered vessels with the most advanced construction methodologies available, incorporating hybrid composites,
fiber metal laminates, and common pre-peg carbon fiber construction. 
The Ghost Marine Team has over 20 years of experience in the marine space, with extensive expertise in high-performance shipbuilding. Our vessels have traveled in the most challenging sea states all over the globe, under the most arduous of conditions. We take great pride in what we do, and are privileged to work with some of the very best naval architects, shipyards, engineers, and designers in the world.

We invite you to join us as we build a sustainable marine transportation and defense network to explore and protect our waterways safely and securely for generations to come.

Name: Rivergate Marina & Shipyard
Description: This award-winning facility is one of Queensland’s premier superyacht refit and project management destinations.
