Also servicing Brisbane’s recreational boat owners, Rivergate offers accessible boat repairs, marine services, refuelling and all weather enclosed refit facilities in Brisbane’s Trade Coast precinct, popular with locals, south pacific mariners and superyacht crews.

Name: Pompe Garbarino S.p.A.
Description:
Pompe Garbarino S.p.A. is a leading manufacturer of centrifugal and positive displacement pumps for marine, naval, offshore and industrial fields.
Founded in 1932 by Paolo Garbarino, the Italian company has the world leadership in the cruise shipbuilding (more than 170 cruise vessels supplied until now) whilst, in the naval field, besides being the Official Supplier of the Italian Navy since 1950, Garbarino supplies also 33 foreign navies.
In the industrial field Garbarino pumps are used by well known engineering companies and installed in several kind of plants all over the world.

Name: Spartivento Group
Description:
Spartivento Group is a company specialized in nautical tourism - bareboat chartering of sailing boats and catamarans in the Mediterranean and the Caribbean, with departures from the bases of Portorosa and Trapani (Sicily), Tropea (Calabria), Salerno (Amalfi Coast) and Grenada (Caribbean and the Grenadine Islands). Founded in 2000, Spartivento is a leader in boat holidays in Southern Italy, with a fleet of over 45 boats Beneteau, Jeanneau and Lagoon.
Dealer of the main European shipyards, Spartivento Group is the official dealer in Southern Italy of the Beneteau Group sailing and motor, Lagoon catamarans, Monte Carlo motoryachts, Grady White outboard, Honda Marina and Highfield inflatables.
Following the twenty-year experience in charter and consolidated relationships with European nautical producers, Spartivento is also an investment company with Yacht Management Programs, to save on the purchase of a new sailboat or catamaran and to gain from its inclusion in the charter fleet , as well as the exclusive distributor for Italy of the SailTime circuit, the all-inclusive season ticket to sail without any worries on board a new sailboat.

Name: SACS TECNORIB
Description:
Founded in 1989, Sacs srl has set new trends over the years by inaugurating the era of luxury "maxi-rib" with the Strider range, which pair performance and safety with the comfort of a yacht. It has innovated the industry through the introduction of the REBEL line, featuring yachts ranging from 40 to 60 feet. Simultaneously, Tecnorib has played a pivotal role in solidifying the maxi-rib market thanks to a highly successful partnership spanning over 15 years with the esteemed brand, PIRELLI. 

The integration of the two entities, culminating in the formation of Sacs Tecnorib Spa in 2021, signifies the successful realization of our growth objectives in recent years and the bolstering of our footprint in international markets, setting the stage for the next future.

Name: MarineTeknik
Description:
ABOUT US 
Our offices are located in the heart of the passenger cruise ship industry in the USA and Poland. We specialize in providing marine industry electrical engineering installations and repair services. Over the years we have built an impeccable reputation by holding the highest possible standards in the industry. Our team of competent engineers, designers and technicians deliver complete responsibility for turnkey installations to our clients. 

SERVICE
MarineTeknik designs, supplies and installs complete electrical systems worldwide. Whether the installation entails new construction or restoration of an existing system, we are the company industry leaders trust with their projects. 

Our comprehensive team has the experience and capability to produce advanced systems and complete installations in accordance with current marine industry standards

Our Services
- Engineering
- Technical Design
- Project Management
- Installation
- Commissioning

Name: GARDEC
Description:
GARDEC is one of the largest shipyards along the Belgian coast. With a permanent team of 48 experienced and driven ship repairers, we solve technical problems and urgent damages on board ships every day. Gardec excels in diversity, we offer all services and solutions that our customers shipowners, shipping agents, port companies,... and this in the shortest possible time because we realize that a ship must be economically profitable. From this vision we are ready, 24 hours a day.

Besides service and repair, GARDEC also realizes complete new construction projects. Ranging from heavy metal construction, new construction of engine rooms, finishing of ships to industrial constructions ... The entire project process takes place in-house. From design on the drawing board to execution in our well-equipped modern workshops. Because of Gardec's direct location along the quay in the port of Zeebrugge, the transport possibilities for large workpieces to the sea and the hinterland are extremely simple.

Name: ROHR-IDRECO Dredge Systems BV
Description:
ROHR-IDRECO Dredge Systems designs and manufactures premium quality deep digging electric dredging vessels and equipment for the mining and dredging industries, and dam desiltation. 

Our innovative and sustainable dredgers combine over sixty years of experience with the most advanced control and automation systems. All our vessels are built to last according to the highest specifications, with a lifetime supply of parts and services being an integral part of our service.

With our European headquarters in the Netherlands and manufacturing facilities in Germany and the USA, we serve a global clientele.

Name: Navaltagus Reparação e Construção Naval
Description:
Navaltagus Shipyard has a diversified range of activities in the field of ship construction and repair. The company is experient and has a high qualified team, which allows to provide services of excellence according to customers requirements.

With facilities located in Seixal and in Lisbon, is possible to make repairs in dry-dockings and afloat. The shipyard team can service all ports of Portugal.

Contact us for more information. We would be pleased to give all the necessary information.

Name: Privilège Catamarans
Description:
Founded more than 30 years ago, Privilège offers luxury sailing and power catamarans measuring over 15 metres in length and is currently the sixth-biggest catamaran-builder in the world. The luxury catamarans under the Privilège brand stand for exceptional quality and robust seaworthiness. The diagonally cut saloon windows and revolutionary hull connection allow you to sail the oceans in absolute comfort. The sailing and power catamarans, which can measure more than 70 feet in length, offer up to 300 square metres of living space across multiple decks.

Each Privilège catamaran is custom-built at the exclusive request of the customer. The close collaboration between designer, interior architect and customer opens up potential for extensive customisation and ensures that every single catamaran that ultimately leaves the shipyard is a one-of-a-kind.
Location: Les Sables-d’Olonne, Pays de la Loire

Name: ERGOMATIC MARINE & INDUSTRIAL EQUIPMENT S.A.
Description:
ERGOMATIC is a well established company which is acknowledged for the high quality equipment provided and integrated automation solutions in marine and industrial field.

The company has grown rapidly, evolving as a worldwide supplier of all kind of valves and piping equipment, as well as automation components and solutions in pneumatic, Hydraulic and electronic systems.

With our own state of the art production facilities which contain up-to-date machinery, automation and calibration laboratories, as well as warehouses with large stock of products, led us to expand our activities.

ERGOMATIC is divided into three departments: Commercial, Technical & Construction, Consisting of well-trained and experienced personnel who stands out for the in depth expertise and technical knowledge for the products & services that our company deals with. 

‘’ERGOMATIC MARINE & INDUSTRIAL EQUIPMENT LTD’’ is certified by ABS with the latest ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management System.

Name: Heinen & Hopman UAE
Description: Heinen & Hopman Air Conditioning L. L. C. (formerly known as Carea Air Conditioning Services LLC. (CASP)), established in Dubai since 1988, offers complete and tailor-made HVAC systems for marine, offshore, oil & gas, renewables, yachts, navy & industrial. Our team of highly qualified industry professionals are able to handle any size of projects from small to large scale and follow the best practices in project management, such as PMBOK, offering world class HVAC products and solutions not only in the Middle East (Bahrain, Kuwait, Oman, Saudi-Arabia, and UAE) but worldwide. Company also have a dedicated team for maintenance, repair, overhaul and upgrade of HVAC &R systems onboard any type of client assets supported by inhouse compressor overhauling facility . Company provides one stop solution for clients HVAC &R needs starting from FEED all the way up to after sales and warranty.

Name: Everett Ship Repair
Description:
Everett Ship Repair, LLC is a full service shipyard specializing in the repair, maintenance and conversion of Navy craft, passenger vessels, Coast Guard ships, tugs, barges and fishing vessels. 

Located on the Everett waterfront in North Puget Sound we are group committed to the industry we serve. It is our goal to provide our customers with a high level of quality and value and will do what it takes to gain and maintain the trust of ship owners and operators who look to the Puget Sound to service their fleets.

Name: Baltic Operator
Description:
Baltic Operator is the shipbuilding company that manages the brand and experience of Gdańsk Shipyard and GSG Towers. We are experts in the fields of shipbuilding, offshore, wind energy and infrastructure. 

Baltic Operator. 
The power of tradition. 
The surge of modernity.

Name: Bulutlu Marine
Description:
Bulutlu Makine Sanayi ve Dış Ticaret A.S. is daughter company of Bulutlu Denizcilik Gözetim San. ve Tic. A.S and established in 2020, both known as Bulutlu Marine. 
Bulutlu Marine is involved in following activities;
•	Representation of well-known international equipment manufacturers in the territory of Turkey, Russia, Black Sea and Caspian Sea. 
•	Service, repair and troubleshooting for marine equipment, electrical systems, control systems and marine propulsion systems worldwide. 
•	Consultancy, project management and supervision services for new-building projects worldwide.

Name: Sitecna
Description: Sitecna es la empresa pionera en desarrollar construcciones flotantes en Chile. Actualmente posee tres divisiones: Sitecna Ferrosur, orientada a la construcción de artefactos navales en base a plataformas de hormigón armado; Sitecna Alumas orientada a la construcción de lanchas en aluminio naval soldado; y Sitecna Servicios orientada a brindar atención de post venta y nuevas necesidades en los proyectos en terreno. Sitecna S.A. cuenta también con Sitecna Teresita, en el cual ofrece su dique/gabarra como medio de remolque y superficie de trabajo.

Name: FOSEN YARD
Description:
Fosen Yards has since 1962 been in the ownership of the Bye family, but in 2007 7 investors took over the yard. In August 2008 the company was bought by Bergen Group and renamed Bergen Group Fosen.

In 2014 the shipyard was sold to Noryards and named Noryards Fosen.
In october 2015 the company was restarted and named Fosen Yard.

All together Fosen Yard can offer ship owners a large range of services, providing years of knowledge and experience in creating excellence for ship owners and their charterers/customers.

Name: SWEDE SHIP MARINE
Description: Building, repair and service of ships. Mainly working with ferries, pilot, SAR and military vessels.

Name: Aas Mek.Verksted AS
Description: Aas Mek Verksted AS is a modern and efficient shipyard with operations and engineering departments, workshops for steel and aluminium constructions, piping, internal work, electrical installation, floating dock and covered slipway for outfitting and repair work.

Name: VisionF Yachts
Description:
VisionF Yachts was founded in Istanbul in 2019 by Coşkun Bayraktar, who continued his contribution to maritime with the Tuzla International Boat Show Land and Sea Fairs he organized.

VisionF Yachts, developing the boats of dreams with a vision of the future, launched its first boat “VisionF 80” in November 2020. Tuzla Viaport Marina, which is an important place in maritime, is the headquarter.

VisionF Yachts continues its production at the VisionF Shipyard in Yalova.
Despite being an incipient at the boat building industry, VisionF is preparing to launch 2 more models thanks to its strong finance, and continues to work with its expert teams to become one of the most important boat builders of the future.

Name: Nordic Yards
Description:
Nordic Yards is one of the world's leading developers and manufacturers of technologically sophisticated and innovative maritime structures and complex offshore projects. In their nearly 70-year history the three shipyards in Wismar, Rostock-Warnemünde and Stralsund have developed, designed and delivered almost 2,475 shipbuilding projects.

The Wismar-based company combines innovative high-tech production with strict adherence to delivery dates and extensive experience with all aspects of shipbuilding and offshore standards. The strategic focus is on the development and manufacture of technologically sophisticated products and covers the following divisions:

•	Nordic Offshore Wind: complex offshore projects, offshore transformer platforms, foundations for offshore structures, installation and service vessels
•	Nordic Offshore Oil & Gas: oil rigs, offshore supply vessels
•	Nordic Arctic: Arctic ice-breaking and ice-going ships 
•	Nordic Ferries: RoRo and RoPax ferries

Name: Vertex Marine Ltd
Description:
At Vertex Marine Ltd, we’re proud to be the go-to specialists for marine and industrial welding, fabrication, and engineering services across the UK.

With over 40 years of combined management experience, our team has built a solid reputation for precision, reliability, and quality workmanship — delivering complex projects on time. From ship maintenance and dry dock support to on-site fabrication and emergency call-outs, we ensure minimal disruption and maximum performance for our clients.

 Based in the South East of England, we cover the entire coastline within a 3-hour response window and can mobilise nationwide for marine and industrial contracts.

Our services include:
 Coded Welding (MIG / TIG / Stick)
 Pipework Fabrication & Installation
 Sheet & Plate Fabrication
 Marine & Industrial Engineering
 Project Management & Dry Dock Assistance

We take pride in our craftsmanship, safety standards, and professional integrity — values that have made Vertex Marine a trusted partner to ports, shipyards, and industrial clients across the UK.

If you’re looking for skilled welding and fabrication with minimal downtime, get in touch with #TeamVertex today.

 info@vertexmarine.co.uk
 +44 (0) 1304 695922 | +44 (0) 7384 727346
 www.vertexmarine.co.uk

Name: PT. Samudra Marine Indonesia
Description: We are an integrated marine company with a strong focus in ship repair, shipbuilding and marine related services, serving customers from Indonesia and South-East Asia. Over the past 8 years, the company has developed into a market leading position of repairing medium size vessels and building tugboats & barges.  Protected in the Banten Bay from seasonal monsoonal winds, waves & currents, the shipyard is well positioned to serve the busy shipping lines of the major Indonesian cities & industrial centres such as Surabaya and Medan.

Name: Gebhard Electro
Description:
What we do!
75 years ago, Gebhard Electro was established and started as an installation company. Now, Gebhard Electro has developed itself into an electrical system integrator in the maritime and industrial market. We have our own engineer department, own production, own installation team and our own service team. We offer complete electrical solutions and subsystems. With our broad knowledge and experience, we are able to give advice and have an obsessive focus on customer satisfaction.

Our products
- System Integration
- Electrical Package 
- Drive Systems 
- Electric Motors
- Transformers
- Automation & Control 
- High voltage

Our services
- New Build
- Retrofit & Conversiosn
- 24-7 Service
- Preventive Maintenance
- Inspections
- Spare Parts
- Training

Name: Bluetech Finland
Description:
FIRST-CLASS MARINE ENGINEERING              

Bluetech Finland offers ship design from concept to production in all engineering disciplines, analysis and calculation services from ship theory to weight control, design coordination at all ship project stages, and production support at the shipbuilding site. The company has a unique combination of people with decades of experience as well as newcomers bringing fresh ideas to the industry. The competence portfolio of our employees is internationally recognized and esteemed. 

We have extensive experience in the design of a large variety of ship types. Several highly positive references relating to the design of ice class ships are testimony to our ability to offer state-of the-art icebreaking solutions. In addition, we have the knowledge and wide experience needed with floating hotels, homes, marinas, and other special floating structures. 

Headquartered in Helsinki, the group of companies currently employ more than 90 shipbuilding professionals. Additionally, we have offices in Turku, Ho Chi Minh City, and Goa. This is an arrangement that guarantees the very best in modern maritime engineering. Our ability to design, coordinate, analyze, and support production combined with passion, expertise, and vision help us see further, aim higher and make better, everything in one port. 

Our cargo ships marketed under the “Bluetech” brand are fast developing an international reputation for the world’s lowest fuel consumption per cargo unit in their class.

#sailormade

Name: Canadian Maritime Engineering Ltd. (CME)
Description: Welcome to Canadian Maritime Engineering Ltd., a Canadian leader specializing in custom engineering and advanced manufacturing. From its humble beginnings, in the Marine repair business, to now providing national manufacturing and repair services to include industries such Oil and Gas, Mining,Power Generation, Manufacturing and National Defense Industries. With regional manufacturing/repair facilities in Dartmouth NS and Victoria BC to the most recent addition in Port Alberni BC and its Facilities in Niagara Falls Ontario it can easily facilitate our customers and industry’s needs. Adding to these capabilities is our Specialty Coating and Crane services in Woodside NS along with Marine slips in Sambro NS and most recently North Sydney NS.

Name: MARSUN
Description:
Marsun is 43Year-Old shipbuilder and leader in the naval ship. 

Since 1980, Marsun delivered over 322 various types of vessels from 30 to 200 feet long to customers worldwide. These include Passenger Ferries, Motor Yachts, Sailing Yachts, Fast Patrol Craft, Research Vessels, Landing Craft, and Oil - Spill Recovery Vessels.

With experienced in-house engineering team, we can build a custom aluminium and steel vessel as owners' desires. And we provide ship repair service for all request, modification, conversion, and afloat repair.

Name: SHIP REPAIR ISTANBUL
Description:
SHIP REPAIR ISTANBUL was established to provide high quality, personalized services to meet the expectations of respected customers worldwide. Within the scope of shipbuilding and ship repair. Ship Repair Istanbul operates in the fields of dry-docking services, shipyard port & anchorage repairs, technical equipment, ship repair brokerage, repair consultancy and ship supervision.
As Ship Repair Istanbul, we plan and deliver the repair processes with our own teams at all ports, all anchorages and all shipyards in Turkey. 
- Dry Dock Management
- Main Engine Overhaul
- Diesel Generator Overhaul
- Steel Works 
- Pipe Works
- Light Steel Works 
- Mechanical Works
- Hatch Cover Works
- Cleaning Works
- BWTS Installation
-Technical Ship Supply
We are providing engineering services in Turkey and Europe. 
Our scopes are;
- Dry Dock supervision
- BWTS installation supervision
- Retrofit projects
- Ship Repair Projects

Name: Port Denia Superyacht Marina & Shipyard
Description:
Located in Denia, Costa Blanca, Spain, in the Western Mediterranean, Port Denia Superyacht Marina & Shipyard offers full yacht services, from refit and repairs to berthing. Just 45 miles from Ibiza and Formentera, our shipyard and marina enjoy over 300 sunny days a year and a well-protected harbor, making it an ideal superyacht destination. Strategically positioned between the Caribbean, Côte d’Azur, and Palma, it serves as a perfect base for owners and crew.

Our shipyard accommodates superyachts up to 1,200 tonnes, with a LOA up to 65m (213’3”) on the dry dock, and 135m (442’9”) in the water. Services include antifouling, painting (Awlgrip, Hempel, Propspeed), rigging, carpentry, interior design, metalwork, and engine services, among others. Our facilities feature a new 620-tonne travelift, a 150-tonne travelift, two 80m (262’6”) slipways, a 50,030 m² esplanade, and 2,000 m² of workshops and a parts store. With over 200 refit projects, we’ve worked on yachts from Benetti, Perini Navi, Alloy Yachts, Heesen, and Azimut. Our team is known for quality and attention to detail, ensuring that every project meets the highest standards. We are a CAT Marine Service Provider and also work with brands like Cathelco, Naiad Dynamics, and MTU. Additionally, we offer an OPEN SHIPYARD model, allowing you to personally select and manage the companies you wish to work with for your yacht’s refit and repair.

Our marina, just 50 meters from the city center, berths yachts up to 135m LOA and provides up to 2,000 AMP shore power. A safe and comfortable stay is ensured with 24/7 surveillance and full services. The harbor offers direct Mediterranean access with no bridges.

As part of Lloyd’s Register and Bureau Veritas networks, we comply with the highest international standards of quality and safety.

Whether for a short stopover, a seasonal base, or a refit, our team delivers top-level service tailored to your yacht’s needs.  Enjoy your stay in Denia, a picturesque Mediterranean city.

Name: HYDROMASTER
Description: Being the pioneer in steerable propulsion, Hydromaster offers 70 years of experience in the design and manufacturing of Z drive marine propulsion systems. Operating in the most challenging conditions and remote locations, our propulsion units provide exceptional reliability and a typical lifespan of  well over 20 years. Specific knowledge of this specialized area of marine engineering and exposure to a wide variety of applications and environments, has propelled Hydromaster to become the preferred supplier for steerable propulsion units  in the smaller power ranges.

Name: Refit International
Description:
HARDWARE | ENGINEERING | FABRICATION | HYDRAULICS | HARKEN ACCESS RAILS | 
LOAD TESTING | GLASS | UPHOLSTERY | REFIT

Name: SHM Shipcare Malaysia
Description:
SHM Shipcare Malaysia Sdn Bhd is a trusted provider of integrated maritime and offshore solutions, backed by three generations of expertise in the shipping industry. With an established presence across Peninsular and East Malaysia, we deliver a comprehensive range of authorised services and certified safety products to meet the critical needs of high-risk, high-performance sectors.

Our portfolio serves a wide spectrum of industries, including maritime and offshore operations, oil and gas, shipyards, disaster response, and specialised healthcare transport. We are committed to operational reliability, regulatory compliance, and service excellence supporting our clients with solutions that prioritise safety, efficiency, and long-term value.

Name: Selah Shipyard
Description:
Selah Shipyard was established at the private sector shipyard in Tuzla / Istanbul in 1982 by Selah Industries Inc which was a well known group in auto and machinery sectors since 1954.

Selah Shipyard covers 45000 sqm area and has two slipways, two fully equipped quays for ship repairs and outfitting, (CAD/CAM) systems, gantry cranes with 200 tons lifting capacity, modern machinery and various work shops.Our annual steel processing capacity is 100.000 tons.

Our main asset is our people. Our management team, engineers and workers, put Selah Shipyard to leading position in ship building and ship repair in Turkey.

Our integrated management system (IMS) comprised of applications of ISO 9001:2008 Quality Management System, ISO 14001:2004 Environmental Management System and OHSAS 18001:2007 Occupational Health and Safety Management System enables us to fulfill the requirements of our customers. Our well known reputation bases on quality and reliability of our performance. We deliver vessels not only for domestic market but also for export. We are the first and most experienced shipyard in the area succesfully conducted export transactions for years.

Name: Ambition Marine
Description:
Ambition Marine is an independent Marine Design and consultancy firm based in Mumbai, India. We specialize in delivering high quality Ship design and Engineering services to vessel Owners, Operators and Shipyards.

Our team of seasoned professionals brings extensive expertise in Ship design, Construction and Project Management. We provide a full spectrum of services across all project phases from Initial Design to Detailed Engineering.

Every phase is executed with a commitment to precision, efficiency, and technical excellence. At Ambition Marine, we aim to support our clients with innovative and reliable solutions that meet the highest standards of safety, functionality and performance.

Name: Sessa Marine
Description: The history of Sessa Marine is a perfect example of the Italian entrepreneurial culture, where entrepreneurship and technological approach allowed the company to achieve excellence. Recognized for features such as dynamism and innovation, Sessa Marine conceives and realizes exclusive boats that combine design and technology, quality, and style, without ever losing sight of its ultimate goal: producing "emotions" to anyone owning a Sessa Marine Yacht. Sessa Marine today offers three top-quality lines of open and fly vessels measuring from 24 to 68 feet. With a production of over 20,000 boats, the brand proudly boasts dealerships worldwide and operates from two manufacturing parks. One in Italy (Cividate al Piano), and another in Brazil (Intech Boating - Palhoça, Santa Catarina).

Name: Yachtalia
Description:
We distribute, install and service high-tech international products. Our teams travel everywhere in the world 24/7 to operate on all on-board systems (electric systems, automation, electronics, oleo dynamics, hydraulics, mechanic systems).
We provide engineering, organizational and logistic support in construction and refitting projects.
We carry out qualitative and functional inspections on new and pre-owned units.
Our Clients are builders, professionals and owners of the most prestigious yachts.

Name: Nessa Ship Management Pvt Ltd
Description:
Our company NESSA Ship management Pvt Ltd was incorporated on 27 Sept 2016 with a sole mission of being recognized as a premier ship management company active in a number of specialized and diverse shipping segments.

Our vision is to provide to a variety of customers, either directly or through Business Partners and Affiliated companies, ship management services which are: reliable, cost effective, meeting or exceeding customer requirement in accordance with all applicable quality, safety and environmental standards,    aimed at achieving zero incident and zero spill with continuous improvement

Name: AROS MARINE
Description:
We’ve been part of the maritime industry for 17 years, growing into a team of more than 700 professionals across 55 locations worldwide. Headquartered in Lithuania, with offices in Poland, the UK, Italy, Finland, France, and the USA, Aros Marine delivers end-to-end maritime solutions from newbuilds and refurbishments to interior outfitting, HVAC systems, design, engineering, furniture production, and turnkey project management.

We work with care, flexibility, and close attention to detail, shaping each project around the ship, the scope, and the people involved from the first idea to final delivery.

Name: Pertamina Shipping
Description: Pertamina shipping currently operated 156 Vessels (Tanker + LPG) throughout Indonesian archipelago to distribute oil & gas for household appliances and industries as well. They are chartered and owned vessel which specified characteristic related to Indonesian water. Pertamina shipping have established the road map to rejuvenate its owned vessel to become one of the major shipping company

Name: GONDAN Shipbuilders - Astilleros Gondán
Description: Established as a family company, GONDAN draws on our vast shipbuilding experience to optimize our business in all its different phases, from conceptual design to sea trials. Our success is based on faithfully fulfilling our commitments to our customers, strictly adhering to the agreed upon quality, conditions and delivery deadlines.

Name: Dufour
Description:
Dufour, in La Rochelle, is one of the few French yards exclusively dedicated to building sailing yachts. 

Dufour’s managers, designers and employees have an exclusive vocation for sailing, the only assurance of perfection.

This dedication also drives the specialists that Dufour has specially selected to distribute its yachts throughout the world.

At Dufour, listening to the wants, needs and expectations of the customer is second nature.

That’s why Dufour is able to offer so many yachting enthusiasts the ultimate escape.

Dufour Yachts models: 

310, 360, 382, 390, 412, 430, 460, 530, 56

Please also visit us on our Facebook, Twitter and Youtube channel.

We wish you a pleasant tour! 

Team Dufour Yachts

Name: Ferguson Marine (Port Glasgow) Limited
Description:
Ferguson Marine (Port Glasgow) Limited is Scotland's leading company in new build, refit and ship repair.

With an 11-acre water-front site is serviced by transport links including rail and the A8 trunk road, which leads to the M8 Motorway. Facilities include;

-Building Berth/Slipway 4000m2 (115m x 60m concrete reinforced building berth).
-Subsea/Offshore Fabrication Shed 1225m2.
-Main Fabrication Shed Bay 1-1100m2(L55m x W20m x H9m)/ Bay 2-2400m2(L120m x W20m x H9m)/ Bay 3-1950m2(L50m x W30m x H25m) 
-Pipe Fabrication Shop- 900m2
-Joinery Workshop- 800m2
-Hydraulic Workshop- 225m2
-Quayside Facilites- Berth 1 89m/ Berth 2 50m


With over 110 years of history, Ferguson Marine is renowned worldwide for delivering engineering services across a range of industry sectors. Whilst best known for our ship building capability, the company has delivered tailored solutions to support applications in materials handling, fluids distribution, system hydraulics, power distribution and management, and civil engineering.

Over the last century the experience and know-how in the design and build of special purpose vessels have been synonymous with building the Ferguson name. This inheritance of craftsmanship and proven performance is backed by a forward looking policy and technical ability which is the hallmark of Ferguson Marine. Our capabilities include: Extensive new-build shipbuilding experience in producing a wide range of vessel types including ferries, dredgers, patrol and research vessels – combining traditional knowledge with cutting edge design and construction methods. Repairs, refits and conversions of all types of vessels serving the marine, oil and gas and renewables markets. Comprehensive capabilities in all sectors covering design, engineering, fabrication, hydraulics, electrical, joinery and project management.

Name: Hindustan Shipyard Limited - India
Description: Hindustan Shipyard Limited, strategically located on the East Coast of the Indian peninsula, at Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, is the nation’s premier shipbuilding organization catering to the needs of shipbuilding, ship repairs, submarine construction and refits as well as design and construction of sophisticated state-of-the-art offshore and onshore structures. Direct sea access, excellent infrastructure, skilled work force, rich expertise garnered over the years in building 181 vessels and repairing 1967 vessels of various types enable HSL to offer competent services for the defence and maritime sectors. Considering the strategic requirements, the yard was brought under the administrative control of the Ministry of Defence on 22 Feb 2010. The Registered Office of the company is located in Visakhapatnam and has regional office at New Delhi.

Name: Schaefer Yachts
Description:
Referência nacional em lanchas de alto padrão, o estaleiro Schaefer Yachts foi fundado em 1992, em Palhoça (SC), movido pela paixão de seu proprietário Márcio Luz Schaefer. Sua experiência em construção de barcos e a intimidade com o mar tornou possível a construção de lanchas de luxo que primam pelo design, desempenho e todo um estilo de vida sobre as águas.
Logo nos primeiros anos foi dado início à produção da linha Phantom, que até hoje nomeia as embarcações do estaleiro catarinense. Hoje a Schaefer Yachts fabrica lanchas de até 83 pés e está presente em todo o litoral brasileiro e diversos países da América do Norte, América do Sul, Europa, África e Oriente Médio. São mais de 2 mil barcos navegando pelo mundo.

Name: Kraken Technology Group
Description: High-performance dual-use composite littoral platforms for defence and commercial application in the maritime industry. Open architecture control and autonomous systems development. Rapid prototyping and scalable manufacturing capabilities. Advanced powertrain design and integration.

Name: DESAN SHIPYARD
Description:
Our prime location in heart of Istanbul makes possible to be a dynamic player in the ship building and ship repair field with highly reliable, responsible, hardworking and multi-skilled team. Desan's team of experts have many years of shipping experience with well-equipped workshops. Desan Shipyard offers the best solutions and excellent professional ship care service to ship owners. 

All works are performed according to the rules and standards off all major International Classification Societies and National Maritime Authorities.

We value the latest technology, innovation, customer satisfaction, good quality, best price, good planning, punctual delivery time and priority to safety.

Name: HD Hyundai Marine Solution Europe B.V.
Description:
Founded in 2015, HD Hyundai Marine Solution Europe is a proud subsidiary of HD Hyundai Marine Solution (formerly known as Hyundai Heavy Industries), a global leader in engineering-based total service for the marine industry. As part of HD Hyundai, the world’s number one shipbuilding group, we operate at the forefront of the shipbuilding, engine & machinery, and electric systems sectors.

Our parent company, HD Hyundai Marine Solution, was established in 2016 through the integration of the shipbuilding, engine & machinery, and electrical service divisions—bringing together decades of experience dating back to 1972. In 2023, we entered a new chapter under the HD Hyundai brand, further accelerating our growth and commitment to delivering cutting-edge solutions.

With over 40 years of accumulated expertise, we offer innovative, future-focused services that enhance the value and performance of our clients’ assets. These include:
•	Eco-friendly retrofit solutions to meet global emission reduction regulations
•	Smart services powered by real-time ICT technologies
•	Power Plant Operation & Maintenance (O&M)
•	A strategic Key Account Management (KAM) approach for close client collaboration

In Europe, we proudly support and represent the HD Hyundai vision, driving engineering excellence and operational performance across the region. We are constantly expanding into new business areas while staying true to our core values of integrity, transparency, and customer trust.

At HD Hyundai Marine Solution Europe, we’re looking for exceptional talent to join us on our mission to become the world’s best engineering-based total service provider.

Name: Estaleiro Juruá
Description:
Localizado à margem direita do Rio Negro, em Iranduba-AM, ocupa uma de área de 194 mil m², o Estaleiro Juruá é especialista na construção de terminais portuários, embarcações de grande porte como empurradores, barcaças, embarcações de passageiros, e outros. 
Destaca-se ano após ano pela construção de um portifólio de obras relevantes. 
Abraçando projetos desafiadores e entregando soluções de engenharia que facilitam a logística na região norte do Brasil.

Name: Blohm+Voss B.V. & Co. KG
Description:
Seit Gründung im Jahr 1877 befindet sich Blohm+Voss im Herzen des Hamburger Hafens, dem drittgrößten Hafen Europas und einem wichtigen und angesehenen Zentrum für Schiffbauexpertise. Im Laufe der Jahre hat unsere Werft Schiffbaugeschichte geschrieben und Standards in Technologie und Design gesetzt. Heute sind wir auf den Neubau von Marineschiffen unter der Marke NVL spezialisiert. Unser Know-how im Bereich Yacht Refit steht Ihnen unter Lürssen Yacht Refit & Services zur Verfügung: https://de.linkedin.com/company/luerssen

Impressum: https://nvl.de/de/impressum
Datenschutz: https://nvl.de/de/datenschutz


Since the beginning in 1877, Blohm+Voss has been located in the heart of the port of Hamburg, Europe’s third-largest port and an important and respected centre of shipbuilding excellence. Over the years, our shipyard has forged shipbuilding history and set standards in technology and design. Today we specialise in the new build of naval vessels under the brand NVL. Our yacht refit expertise is available at Lürssen Yacht Refit & Services https://de.linkedin.com/company/luerssen

Legal notice: https://nvl.de/en/legal-notice
Privacy policy: https://nvl.de/en/privacy-policy

Name: West Sea - Viana Shipyard
Description: West Sea is a shipyard located in Viana do Castelo, North of Portugal. Created by the Martifer Group in 2013, the company is the current sub-concessionary of the lands and infrastructures of the former ENVC – Estaleiros Navais de Viana do Castelo.
Location: Viana do Castelo, Viana do Castelo

Name: Nautique Boat Company
Description: Nautique is celebrating its 100th anniversary of delivering excellence in the marine industry. A subsidiary of Correct Craft, Nautique has been on the waters of the world with a passion for innovation since 1925. Delivering the very best waterski, wakeboard and wakesurf boats on the market, Nautique continues to drive progression with their award-winning technology and dedication to building the highest-quality boats imaginable. New technology, performance innovations and attention to detail are the cornerstones of what makes the Nautique brand the industry leader. Through the Nautique Cares initiative, employees and athletes dedicate themselves to not only making a difference on the water, but to extend their support to people in need around the world. The world’s best ski boat, world’s best wake boat, and a company that cares. To learn more visit Nautique.com

Name: Fountaine Pajot
Description: Fountaine Pajot have been designers and boat builders since 1976. As keen sailors, our aim has been to develop unique expertise to create high-performing, seaworthy, innovative and comfortable sailing catamarans and Motor Yachts.

Name: NVL B.V. & Co. KG
Description:
Willkommen bei NVL, der Führungsgesellschaft der NVL Unternehmensgruppe. Die NVL ist eine inhabergeführte, unabhängige Werftengruppe mit vier renommierten Werftstandorten in Norddeutschland (Peene-Werft in Wolgast, Blohm+Voss in Hamburg, Norderwerft in Hamburg und Neue Jadewerft in Wilhelmshaven), zusätzlichen internationalen Standorten sowie weiteren maritimen
Unternehmen. Die NVL bietet ihren Kunden maßgeschneiderte, intelligente und kosteneffiziente Schiffbaulösungen sowie umfangreiche Services und unterstützt damit die Einsatzbereitschaft der Deutschen Marine und Navies weltweit. Flankiert werden die Neubauaktivitäten von Serviceleistungen über den gesamten Lebenszyklus eines Schiffes. Technologietransfers ermöglichen den Kunden darüber hinaus, lizenzierte Fertigungsleistungen auch im eigenen Land auszuführen. 

Impressum: https://nvl.de/de/impressum 
Datenschutz: https://nvl.de/de/datenschutz 


Welcome to NVL, the lead company of NVL of companies. NVL is a privately owned, independent group of shipyards with four renowned shipyards located in northern Germany (Peene-Werft in Wolgast, Blohm+Voss in Hamburg, Norderwerft in Hamburg and Neue Jadewerft in Wilhelmshaven), additional sites in Australia and Bulgaria as well as other related maritime companies. NVL offers its customers tailored, smart and cost-efficient shipbuilding solutions, thereby supporting the operational readiness of the German Navy and navies worldwide. The new build activities of the company are supplemented by comprehensive services covering the entire life cycle of the ship, as well as licensed manufacture at customer facilities worldwide under technology transfer arrangements. 

Legal notice: https://nvl.de/en/legal-notice
Privacy policy: https://nvl.de/en/privacy-policy

Name: Mac Laren
Description: Impulsionamos o futuro indústria naval, com construção, reparos e logística portuária eficiente e segura. Oferecemos soluções integradas para clientes, operadores e afretadores de embarcações e FPSOs, nacionais e internacionais. Utilizamos tecnologia de última geração, atuamos com excelência e executamos projetos em conformidade com as especificações contratuais, acrescentando valor como parceiros estratégicos.

Name: T. Mariotti S.p.A. - Shipyard
Description:
T.Mariotti Shipyard is a world leader in the field of Ultra Luxury Shipbuilding, its portfolio includes Cruiseships, Megayachts, Off-shore supply vessels.

Thanks to the experience at the most exclusive level of the Industry, Mariotti can achieve the allure and comfort required of a yacht with the technical complexity expected from a ship.

Founded in 1928 as a Genoa based firm of ship-repairs, combines since then a high degree of craftsmanship with a constant research on new materials, technologies, building techniques in compliance with latest regulations. 

All cruiseships built by Mariotti set new standards and received the best awards from leading independent rating organizations for their highest standard of environmental consciousness, comfort, safety and style. 

Mariotti belongs to Genova Industrie Navali Holding, a reliable naval pole in the Mediterranean able to fulfil every need of Ships and Yachts up to 465 mt through specialized Companies and their networks.

Name: ART SHIPYARD
Description:
Art Shipyard is the new shipyard of Besiktas Group a long established maritime company and market leader in the ship repair industry in Europe. 
It is located at the heart of the industry in Tuzla bay, which is the traditional ship repair hub of Turkey. Art Shipyard is the new generation shipyard where our international customers experience the “art of service” to its fullest through the high standards of engineering, safety and sustainability. 
We are competitive in terms of cost, time and quality, and highly qualified in providing our clients with the assistance and support they need in every step of the way.

Name: LTH-Baas
Description:
LTH-Baas is a professional marine turnkey provider. A leader in complex technical installations, engineering & design, shipbuilding outfitting, retrofits projects, repairs and implementation of decarbonization initiatives worldwide. 

Our goal is to provide you with quality and innovative technical solutions in a safe and lean environment for In Service and Drydock works.

Name: Alewijnse
Description:
Alewijnse has over 130 years of experience in providing tailored electrical and automation solutions. As a systems integrator that works in partnership with its customers, we supply a comprehensive range of technical solutions. These include electrical installations, power distribution, generation and propulsion systems, process automation, audio video & IT, safety & security, and navigation & communications.

Our company works on a large number of electrification and automation solutions in sectors that include yachting, naval & governmental, dredging, and offshore and industrial. In response to the ever-increasing need for sustainable operations, we strive to design and implement environmentally-friendly propulsion and energy-efficient systems for maritime and industrial partners that seek high levels of sustainability. 

As well as our head office in the Netherlands, we have branches in Romania, France and Vietnam. 

More information: https://www.alewijnse.com

Name: Bronswerk Group
Description:
BRONSWERK is a leader of HVAC-R systems for Naval/Military and Commercial Marine vessels, with offices around the world.

BRONSWERK Group manages the entire process, from design to commissioning, installation and in-service support.

BRONSWERK Group is recognized for its Naval HVAC system designs, system integration and Mil-Spec equipment manufacturing that comply with all international standards (LR NSR, ANEP 77, DEF STAN 59-411 and MAP 01-470) and meets the most demanding sea environments.

The company is relied on as an OEM in Naval equipment, with a full range of shock, vibration, and noise qualified equipment.
BRONSWERK is accredited ISO 9001:2015.

Name: Absolute Yachts SPA
Description:
Absolute Yachts was founded in 2002 with the goal to become an international reference for the quality manufacturing for pleasure powerboats.
 
Since then, our 40-years experienced designers and technicians have developed 23 models and manufactured more than 400 boats, sold over more than 20 countries worldwide.
 
Today, Absolute Yachts propose to the boat lovers a wide range of products, split into 3 categories:
 
flybridge motoryachts: 40' - 43' - 53' - 55' - 72'
 
sportyachts: 40' - 43' - 53' - 55' - 64' - 70'
 
sportline powerboats: 40'
 
Follow our development on LinkedIn!!!

Name: Goa Shipyard Limited
Description:
Goa Shipyard Limited (GSL) established in 1957, is a leading ISO 9001:2015, 14001:2015, 45001:2018 certified shipyard on the West Coast of India, functioning under the administrative control of Ministry of Defence, Govt. of India.

GSL is strategically located on the banks of river Zuari in Goa, a major international tourist destination of India , well connected by its international airport and major port enroute all important shipping lines.

Beginning as a small barge building yard, GSL has garnered reputation as one of the most sophisticated ship builders in the Country. For over four decades, GSL has designed, built and commissioned a wide range of sophisticated vessels for varied applications in the defence and commercial sectors with special expertise in building modern patrol vessels of Steel and Aluminium hull structure.

GSL’S inherent strengths are
	An ISO 9001:2015, 14001:2015, 45001:2018 Certified Company
	World class CAD/CAM facility for basic design, simulation and advanced outfitting
	Sate –of-art manufacturing facilities which includes four Slipways with a maximum weight of 3000 tonnes and 180m long Outfitting Jetty
	Unique distinction of implementing ERP for all functions
	Steel Preparation Shop for priming and cutting of steel,aluminium & non ferrous plates
	A work force of over 1600 skilled personnel and over 200 qualified engineers and naval architects
 
Services Offered

GSL offers a wide spectrum of services to its valued customers which include:
	Designing and building of variety of vessels
	Repair and modernization of vessels
	Technology transfer

Name: Incat Tasmania
Description:
Incat Tasmania is a global leader in aluminium shipbuilding, designing and constructing large, advanced passenger and vehicle ferries for operators around the world. Based in Hobart, Tasmania, Incat is Australia’s largest commercial shipyard and employs a workforce of more than 500 people.

Backed by more than four decades of shipbuilding experience, Incat has built a reputation for innovation, quality and performance. With nearly 100 vessels in operation around the world, Incat’s ships connect cities, islands, and communities, trusted by leading operators for their reliability and efficiency.

Today, Incat is leading the global transition to sustainable maritime transport, delivering the world’s most advanced aluminium electric shipbuilding program. This includes the world’s largest battery-electric ferry and multiple fully electric and hybrid-electric vessels currently in production. As a proud family-owned company, Incat continues to shape the future of ferry transportation from Tasmania to the world.

Name: Sefine Shipyard - Kariyer
Description: Sefine Tersanesi'nin en değerli varlığı, çalışanlarıdır.

Name: HAT-SAN Shipyard
Description:
A member of PEKAR GROUP, HAT-SAN SHIPYARD was established in 2006. HAT-SAN Shipyard located in Yalova, Turkey with more than 100.000 sqm area to "Co-operate Friendly". With experienced human resources, extraordinary capabilities and flexible solutions  HAT-SAN providing services for;

-NEW SHIP BUILDING
-SHIP CONVERSION
-SHIP REPAIR & DOCKING


HAT-SAN Shipyard continues to add new ones to its satisfied costumers from all around the World.

Name: Chantiers Navals de La Ciotat
Description:
As one of the world leaders in refitting and repairing mega yachts, LA CIOTAT SHIPYARDS is managed by the SEMIDEP-Ciotat Local Public Company (SPL).
Through large-scale structural investments in innovative development projects, LA CIOTAT SHIPYARDS aims to become the world’s leading shipyard for maintenance of Mega Yachts.

Name: ALMACO Group
Description: ALMACO Group, the leading system supplier for the global marine and offshore industries, was founded in 1998 and has offices in Brazil, China, Canada, Finland, France, Germany, Italy, USA and Singapore. ALMACO provides a complete range of solutions for Accommodations and Catering Systems for Newbuilding and Modernization projects for the marine and offshore industries around the world. These solutions incorporate all phases of the unit's lifecycle, from conceptualization and design, through complete turnkey deliveries and full lifecycle support. ALMACO's products and services address all needs for cruise ships, ferries, expedition vessels, accommodation vessels, offshore accommodation platforms and rigs.

Name: DREDGE YARD
Description:
Dredge Yard designs, builds, and supplies dredgers worldwide. Our dredgers are assembled and tested at our facility in Dordrecht, Netherlands, ensuring efficient, robust, and durable equipment at competitive prices.

We aim to optimize dredging in a way that is safe for people and the environment. Our focus is on creating reliable, durable, and highly efficient dredgers while keeping costs low for our clients and minimizing environmental impact.

We use the latest technologies in design, simulation, and manufacturing to constantly improve our dredging equipment.

Visit our website or contact our team to learn more about our products and services!

Name: Alia Yachts
Description: Alia is a premium yacht builder based in Antalya, Turkey. Each new build is a bespoke journey, pushing the boundaries of craftsmanship, technology and refinement to bring your vision of the ideal yacht to life. Pursuit of perfection is your uniquely personal evolution of the superyacht. From first vision to first voyage.

Name: Navalt
Description: Navalt stands for progressive, sustainable solutions for locomotion on water and to power up the future. We specialize in solar-powered boats, and hybrid vessels, and we have a platform for vessel performance analytics called Oceanix. Our vision is to preserve the nuances of nature with our technology. We look forward to seeing cleaner and quieter waters in the years to come. We are proud to say that we are the makers of India's first solar-ferry.

Name: Zamakona Yards
Description:
SHIPBUILDING
Be recognized in Europe for our specialized design in shipbuilding, capable to carry out high tech projects.

SHIPREPAIR
Be recognized as the company that delivers the best ship repair service to its customers in the shortest time possible, ensuring the highest standards of quality.



Zamakona Yards is one of Spain's main shipbuilding and ship repair groups. With more than 40 years of experience in the industry both in the Cantabrian Sea and in the Canary Islands, our group brings together more than 1.000 professionals who strive to provide our clients with the best service.

1972-. Pedro Garaygordóbil, our founding chairman, created Napesca in Las Palmas de Gran Canaria. Napesca was a workshop dealing in ship repairs, which at that stage had 12 employees and great expectations.

1978-. Aware of the continuing growth of the demand for new services, he founded Ircesa, a workshop for repairs and electrical installations.

1980-. Astilleros Zamakona, a shipyard in Bilbao, joined the group of companies. Today it is an international reference in new ship construction.

1987-. In order to guarantee the supply of parts and material - a fundamental requirement on an island - Asinaval was formed.

1988-. Repnaval, a ship repair yard, became part of the group, completing the range of services offered.

2006-. With the acquisition of Astilleros de Pasaia, Grupo Zamakona became one of the principal groups in shipbuilding and ship repairs in Spain.

Name: ASTIVIK SHIPYARD
Description:
ASTIVIK SHIPYARD was founded in 1972. Today, it is considered one of the principal
shipyards in the Caribbean. 
Since 2004 the owner of the shipyard is a USA Corp. We have an area of 67,384 sq. meters (221,076 sq. feet) and three floating docks, with a 700 ton dock and a 220 ton capacity dock that has a dockage system and lateral transference allowing us to do simultaneous work to seven vessels on dock, and also we have an area covered under roof of 2.155 sq. meters (7,070 sq feet) to carry out works under roof.
We have ISO 9001:2015 quality certification issued by BUREAU VERITAS, our facilities comply with the requirements of ISPS.

ASTIVIK SHIPYARD, fundada en el año 1972, es hoy en día considerado uno de los principales astilleros en el Caribe. Desde 2004, el mayor accionista del astillero es una corporación norteamericana.
Contamos con un área de 67.384, tres diques flotantes, un varadero de 220 toneladas, tres posiciones de varada y un puesto de varada con airbags especialmente diseñados para barcazas, más de 300 metros de muelle para trabajos a flote, equipos rodantes como grúas, cargadores y telehandlers. Adicionalmente, tenemos, 2155 metros cuadrados de área cubierta bajo techo. 
Contamos con la certificación de calidad ISO 9001:2015 otorgada por BUREAU VERITAS y nuestras instalaciones están certificadas por PBIP.

Name: Royal Bodewes
Description:
Royal Bodewes is a leading modern shipyard group
situated along the Winschoterdiep in Hoogezand, the
Netherlands. Since the foundation in 1812 the activities                               of Royal Bodewes have focused on
designing and building of ships in close contact with
shipowners based on the principles of quality, reliability
and flexibility.

Royal Bodewes is specialized in the building of
multipurpose general cargo ships in a range of 2.000 to
14.000 DWT. Special types such as oil tankers, paper
carriers, suppliers, LNG-carriers, cement tankers and
tugboats are also part of our competence. With our
own design team we are capable of developing not only
the vessel types mentioned above, but any vessel
require.

Name: Triton Submarines LLC
Description:
Based in Sebastian, Florida, Triton Submarines, LLC is the world leader in the design, engineering and manufacture of manned submersibles. Triton offers models ranging from 1-66 passengers, with depth ratings of 300-11,000 meters, each designed specifically for integration and operation aboard private motor yachts, cruise liners and other vessels.

Every Triton, except for the titanium hulled full ocean depth Triton 36,000/2, is equipped with a fully transparent passenger compartment providing an unmatched visual experience. The Triton team's 400 plus years of combined submersible experience make the company uniquely qualified to deliver a highly complex product that is safe, reliable, easy to operate and simple to maintain. 

All Triton submersibles are built to DNV-GL or ABS class as standard to ensure customer safety, and Triton's superlative 24/7 worldwide after-sales service ensures that customers stay operational in the field.

Since its inception in 2007, Triton has gained notoriety with several world firsts, including the first manned submersible dives in Antarctica, the first ever filming of a live giant squid (Discovery Channel/NHK, Japan, from a Triton 3300/3 at depths ranging from 600-930 meters), and the world's first submersible capable of repeated dives to the deepest point of the ocean (and certified for 'unlimited depth') - the Triton 36000/2. Used for science, research, filming and pleasure alike, Triton submersibles are the most capable vessels in their field.

Name: GUNBOAT
Description:
The World's Premier High Performance, Luxury, Cruising Catamarans

With the launch of the first Gunboat in 2001, Gunboat pioneered the high performance, luxury cruising catamaran segment. With rugged high-tech structures, breakthrough ocean-going designs, and luxurious interiors, word of our work spread quickly. Gunboats spanning 48ft - 90ft cruise and race in many parts of the world. The knowledge gained from working with premier designers, and years of refinement and innovation, push us to ever improve and evolve the market segment we created.

Name: Grand Bahama Shipyard Limited
Description:
GBSL was established in Freeport in the year 1999 as part of a larger plan to develop a maritime center on the island. The shipyard is located inside the port of Freeport, Grand Bahama, only 93 nm east of Miami, Florida. GBSL is capable of docking any type of seagoing vessel up to 300m in length. In order to service deep draft vessels or underwater propulsion system exchanges, a deep-water pier has been developed and is fully functioning with drafts of 14m.

The services provided are carried out through a coherent framework of measures developed to promote teamwork, planning, training and discipline to meet the highest standards of quality and HSE, which forms an integral part of the operation. Safety, health, welfare, quality control and environmental concerns are imperative in this operation, and all aspects of this is monitored closely by the executive team who is committed to a policy of effective management and sound business ethics. The yard is ISPS compliant and in full compliance with the requirements of ISO 9001, OHSAS 18001, and fully certified and operate an Environmental Management System in compliance with ISO 14001.

The above combined with a wide range of facilities, supported by modern management systems, allows Grand Bahama Shipyard to exceed the demanding standards of today’s shipyard clientele. Areas of expertise also include various disciplines such as project management, detailed planning and scheduling, steelwork, pipework, mechanical, hull treatment, electrical, and various solutions for any type of vessel and other pertinent services.

Name: Southern Wind Shipyard
Description:
Southern Wind: "The Perfect Balance" of luxury sailing.

We craft luxury carbon composite smart custom sailing yachts ranging from 25 to 35 meters, designed for those who seek the perfect balance between exceptional performance and timeless elegance.

Name: Trident BMC
Description: We are the marine outfitter, the technical provider, the offshore developer, the system integrator, and the energy savers. We have it all. And we are excited to make the very best of it, whether it´s an upgrade, a new building project, or a custom design solution.

Name: Multiplast - Groupe Carboman
Description:
Depuis 1981, Multiplast - Groupe Carboman dessine et réalise des multicoques et des monocoques en matériaux composites high-tech au palmarès inégalé (3 Route du Rhum, 3 Volvo Ocean Race, 6 Records de l’Atlantique, 2 Little America’s Cup…).
 
Multiplast est aujourd’hui l’un des leaders dans le domaine de la construction des bateaux de compétition ainsi que dans la mise en œuvre de matériaux composites haute performances pour les secteurs de l’Aéro et du Spatial, de la Défense, de l’industrie et du Bâtiment.

Name: ADA SHIPYARD
Description: ADA SHIPYARD has been operating in the shipbuilding and ship repair industry for over 15 years. It has delivered 14 vessels to Norway and repaired numerous vessels to the customers around the world.

Name: De Voogt Naval Architects
Description:
De Voogt Naval Architects is hét engineeringbureau dat exclusief voor Feadship het ontwerp (design), de engineering en de research & development van unieke, custom-built superjachten verzorgt. Ons kantoor is gevestigd in Hoofddorp. Er werken meer dan 150 medewerkers in de verschillende specialismen.

Wil jij ook deel uitmaken van dit gedreven en passievolle team, kijk dan op www.werkenbijfeadship.nl.

De Voogt is een specialistische organisatie die volop in beweging is en fungeert als het kenniscentrum voor de Feadship-organisaties. Daarom verkennen wij dagelijks nieuwe manieren van samenwerken en kennisdeling, waarbij we streven naar een buitengewone kwaliteit van ons product. 

Het ontwerp- en engineeringsproces valt niet in afgemeten vakjes in te delen. De kennis en expertise van onze medewerkers en onze teams reiken altijd verder dan nodig. Onze diensten integreren de kennis en ervaring van de verschillende afdelingen, die nodig zijn om deze unieke en complexe projecten uit te voeren. Onze specialismen zijn: 

• Design: creëert de ontwerpvoorstellen.
• Naval Architecture: zoekt alle technische zaken uit om de in het bestek omschreven eisen haalbaar te maken.
• Structural Engineering: berekent de scheepsbouwconstructie en werkt deze uit.
• Mechanical Engineering: ontwerpt alle installaties en technische ruimtes aan boord.
• Interior Engineering: maakt met technische tekeningen een vertaling van de interieur-wensen.
• Exterior Engineering: werkt het aanzicht van de unieke jachten in detail uit. 

Een team van Project Managers Design zorgt voor het management van alle lopende projecten. Daarnaast heeft De Voogt een afdeling Research & Development. Kortom, wij hebben alle expertise in huis om het totale ontwerp- en engineeringsproces van a tot z, en verder, uit te voeren.

Name: Trident Maritime Systems
Description:
Knowledge, Value and Agility 

Over 2,000 maritime professionals - engineers, project managers, designers, technicians, craftsmen, integrators and innovators in 19 countries are proud to be part of the Trident Maritime Systems family.

Our focus is bringing value through the best engineered solutions in marine interiors, distributed ship systems, electromechanical solutions, and automation and control. We serve shipbuilders and owners in the cruise, military, offshore oil + gas, and commercial ship markets.

Our global team delivers engineered maritime solutions, specializing in cryogenic insulation, marine outfitting, system integration, automation, hybrid propulsion, energy management, scrubber installation and environmental solutions. 

From the West Coast of the United States to the West Coast of Africa, from Sweden to South Korea - if there's a naval, cruise, commercial or oil & gas project in a shipyard, there’s a good chance Trident is working on it.

Name: TK Tuzla Shipyard
Description: TK Tuzla Shipyard is the largest ship repair facility in the Tuzla Bay. TK Tuzla Shipyard is one of the largest shipyard in Turkey and, throughout its history, it has been identified with remarkable naval work. Located in the Tuzla suburb of Istanbul, north east of the Sea of Marmara at the entrance to the Bosporus, we provide drydocking, repair and conversion services with fast turnaround times at competitive prices.

Name: Lumut Naval Shipyard Sdn Bhd
Description: A Shipbuilding and Shiprepair Company

Name: Fr. Fassmer GmbH & Co. KG
Description: Fassmer is a dynamic family-owned company in its fifth generation. The internationally successful company is active in six business areas. Shipbuilding, Lifeboats, Deck Equipment, Wind Power, Composite Technology and After-Sales Service. Our clients appriciate the close cooperation with research institutes, innovative inhouse design and engineering, modern production facilities and a worldwide service network.

Name: Incat Crowther
Description:
Incat Crowther is a diversified marine design business with offices in Sydney, Australia, Lafayette, Louisiana, USA and Romsey, United Kingdom. The company has a 35-year history with over 500 vessels in service to its designs. The company has a rich history of firsts, having developed the wave piercing catamaran and pioneering the use of catamaran passenger vessels in the tourism and commuter sectors. More recently, the company has been at the forefront of the use of catamaran hull forms in offshore vessels, as well as the continual evolution of monohull crew vessels with industry leading efficiency and performance. 
The company’s diverse product portfolio includes monohull, catamaran and trimaran hullforms serving a vast range of sectors, including commercial, recreational, military and passenger. Construction materials include composite, aluminium and steel construction, with the company possessing leading-edge engineering experience in all materials.
Incat Crowther offers a full range of services, ranging from preliminary design and operational studies through to full functional design packages including 3D systems design. The company has a world-class network of suppliers and shipyards which combine to provide the optimal outcome for a project with minimal technical risk.

Name: Moonen Yachts
Description: Moonen Yachts, a Dutch boutique shipyard, is dedicated to delivering exclusive and exceptional superyachts in the 34 to 40-metre size range. With a focus on upholding the finest tradition of Dutch yacht building, Moonen Yachts ensures an exclusive ownership experience by delivering only two yachts per year. With over 40 years of expertise in yacht construction, they have established a reputation for building top-quality long-range yachts with steel hulls and aluminum superstructures. Having delivered over 80 yachts worldwide, including renowned classics like the Moonen 84 and Moonen 97, as well as the modern Moonen Martinique, their craftsmanship and attention to detail is widely recognized. Moonen Yachts' passion lies in delivering exceptional yachts, providing excellent support and ensuring every detail is of the highest quality.

Name: OKEAN Yachts
Description:
A OKEAN surgiu para maximizar a conexão do ser humano com suas infinitas possibilidades. Desenvolvemos yachts únicos com um design disruptivo, colocando eficiência, encantamento e responsabilidade ambiental no mesmo patamar.

Open up your world!

Name: Foreship Ltd.
Description:
Foreship is part of RINA, a multinational engineering consultancy, inspection, and certification company. 

We are a highly respected ship design and engineering company, providing a broad range of services to the shipping industry since 2002. 

With over 100 naval architects, marine engineers, and sustainability experts worldwide, Foreship specializes in concept design, consultancy, and project management for high-profile newbuildings and challenging conversions, having successfully completed over 4,000 projects to date. 

Renowned for its practical approach to zero-emission technologies and solutions, the company is a leader in consultancy for the passenger vessel industry, focusing on alternative fuels, energy efficiency, and decarbonization pathways.

Name: Pendennis Shipyard
Description:
Pendennis operates a custom superyacht build and refit facility in Falmouth, UK, capable of undertaking substantial restoration and remodelling projects or routine class/flag refit works. Founded in 1988, the company has built over 30 bespoke projects and conducted refit works on a further 350 vessels. Over 550 highly skilled tradespeople and support staff are based at the Falmouth facility, from CAD teams to exterior outfitters, joiners, electricians, engineers, fabricators and specialist painters.

Three purpose-built construction halls (2 x 90m and 1 x 45m) and a flexible 150m undercover dry dock are supported by purpose-built modern workshops and offices. An enclosed non-tidal wet basin can accommodate yachts up to 100m LOA, designed to provide direct deep water seaward access to the yard for haul-out, and facilitating short refit works.

In 2019, the company opened the Pendennis Vilanova Technical Service Centre and 48-berth superyacht marina, just outside Barcelona. The facility focuses on small to medium size refit projects and brings Pendennis expertise to the heart of the Mediterranean.

Name: Palumbo SuperYachts
Description:
Palumbo Superyachts began to take root in 2008, when the Columbus Yachts brand was established, and in 2011 launched its first 54 metre superyacht, emblematically christened “Prima” (“the First”).

Currently, Palumbo Superyachts comprises a representative office in Monaco and a logistics network of five shipyards in the Mediterranean (Ancona, Malta, Marseille, Naples and Savona) operating just as many world-renowned brands: ISA Yachts, Columbus Yachts, Mondomarine, Extra Yachts and Palumbo SY Refit.

Name: Zodiac Nautic
Description: The inventor of the inflatable boat, ZODIAC NAUTIC is the world’s largest and most recognized manufacturer of rigid-inflatable boats, inflatable boats, life rafts and safety equipment with an extensive production, distribution and customer service operation throughout the world.

Name: MV WERFTEN
Description:
The shipyard group’s three sites in Wismar, Rostock and Stralsund in the German state of Mecklenburg-Vorpommern belong to the largest, most modern and most efficient shipbuilding facilities in Europe. With direct access to the Baltic Sea, weather-independent fabrication facilities and an effective transport and logistic infrastructure, the yards combine high-tech production with extensive shipbuilding expertise.

In their respectively 70-year history, the shipyards have designed, produced and fitted out around 2,500 sea-going newbuildings, e. g. two AIDA cruise vessels, Premicon river cruise vessels and Stena Line ferries. 

Nowadays, the company’s strategic focus is on the development and building of luxury cruise and river cruise vessels as well as megayachts. The company headquartered in Wismar is constantly investing in locations, new technologies as well as employee qualification to guarantee an excellent quality “made in MV”.

Name: Regal Boats
Description:
At Regal, we build memories. We build family. Our purpose is to “Honor God, and Enrich Lives”, because we believe in protecting the things that matter most

We are proud to be one of the largest family-owned and operated boat manufacturing companies in the world. With our manufacturing facility spanning 650,000 square feet and a workforce of up to 900 skilled team members, we have the capacity and expertise to produce top-quality boats ranging from 20 to 50 feet in length.

For more than 50 years, we’ve embodied the belief that all of our team members are part of the Regal family, and we’re always looking for new members to join the team.


Our Mission: With God’s help, we will develop an exceptional team dedicated to enriching lives and providing an awesome boating experience.

Our Values: With integrity and gratitude we are a relationship focused, excellence driven, ambitious team.

Name: Colombo Dockyard PLC
Description:
Colombo Dockyard PLC is Sri Lanka’s leading Ship Repair, Shipbuilding, Heavy Engineering and Offshore Engineering facility.  Conveniently located within the port of Colombo, the hub of all major shipping lanes connecting the West, the Middle East, the Far East, as well as Africa and Australia. Colombo Dockyard has a strategic advantage to conduct both dry dock and afloat operations.

We are a ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015 & ISO 45001:2018 certified company positioned as the most reliable, flexible, truly world class shipbuilder in South Asia having principal equity alliance with Onomichi Dockyard Company Ltd of Japan.

Name: CATANA GROUP
Description: CATANAGROUP

Name: MONTE CARLO YACHTS S.p.A.
Description:
MONTE CARLO YACHTS S.p.A. is a pioneering project in the Yachting World that breaks new ground. 

Genuinely Italian in its management, designers and artisanal skills, supported by the industrial strengths of French group Beneteau - the uncontested global leader in the production of sailboats, 2nd world boat manufacturer and among the 5 world power top players - Monte Carlo Yachts is dedicated to crafting timeless luxury yachts.

Name: PT Merak Bangun Samudera
Description:
Protecting the environment & ensuring safety & healty working condition.
Consistently providing high quality services to our customers requirements.

Name: BAVARIA YACHTS
Description: BAVARIA YACHTS is worldwide the most modern manufacturer of sailing yachts, motorboats and catamarans. A BAVARIA yacht is the product of the perfect interplay between its individual components. At its forefront is the immense knowhow on boat construction, the engineering ingenuity and design. Today, it is possible to realise the entire range of this knowledge with a high degree of precision and quality. A combination of the best materials, fixtures and fittings, the best craftsmanship and a committed workforce results in something that is the hallmark of every BAVARIA: the joy of yachting.

Name: Vuyk Engineering Rotterdam B.V.
Description:
Vuyk Engineering Rotterdam is the Independent Maritime Design House specialised in ship design, methods engineering, equipment design and temporary steel design. Our team of experienced engineers draws on over 45 years of engineering excellence. In the worldwide maritime sector, we stand out at solid yet innovative engineering solutions that form the foundation of complex projects.

Our approach and combination of specialisations enable us to deliver naval design and engineering solutions tailored to your needs. We provide bespoke designs that address your specific requirements, ensuring optimal performance and efficiency.

Choose Vuyk Engineering Rotterdam for your next maritime project and experience the difference that our innovative solutions, extensive experience and commitment to quality can make. We stand by our word, offering clear and prompt communication. Contact us today to discuss how we can help you achieve your project goals efficiently and cost-effectively.

Name: Astilleros de Mallorca - Refit and Repair Shipyard
Description: Founded in 1942, Astilleros de Mallorca is a fully equipped and specialised shipyard, offering a wide range of services,from refit and repair to technical expertise and advice, spares and equipment procurement and planned maintenance management. With 78.000m² of operational area in Palma, a hauling capacity of 1700t and an exterior berthing quay for vessels of up to 120mt., Astilleros de Mallorca meets all the required quality and safety requisites of the most important Classification Societies and Associations. An experienced management team with varied backgrounds, including naval architects and technical experts, backed by a team of highly specialised craftsmen is looking after our clients every need at every stage of the refit. Astilleros de Mallorca operates across 4 different sites, the main integrated shipyard, the adjacent STP yard, Port Tarraco service point and Freire's new build shipyard in Vigo. All 4 sites offer a variety of different facilities and equipment including travel lifts, keel pits, slipways, cranes and proprietary specialised workshops. Our manned offices in STP dispose with Project Management, Purchase and Invoicing Departments as well as dedicated piping, metal, mechanical, electrical & hydraulic workshops.

Name: Blue Water Autonomy Inc.
Description:
We’re building autonomous ships for the U.S. Navy and commercial customers. 

Our team has launched 100+ hardware products, built some of America’s most complex ships, and fielded millions of robots. Some of these are in use in your home, others on Ukraine’s battlefields. 

We don’t doubt that building ships with no human crew will be tough. We like tough.

Name: GLO MARINE
Description:
GLO MARINE stands as a specialized engineering and technical support company, uniquely positioned to deliver tailored projects specifically designed for the maritime and offshore energy sectors. We pride ourselves on our integrated and dynamic approach, making us the ideal partner for retrofit and conversion projects, where adaptability, cooperation, and inventive problem-solving are paramount.

Our primary expertise lies in the realm of vessel retrofits, particularly in the implementation of cutting-edge new technologies. As an end-to-end solutions provider, we oversee the entire project lifecycle, from the initial design and engineering phases to comprehensive project management and on-site support during conversions, retrofits, and repairs.

Name: Mulder Shipyard
Description:
Dear Visitor,

Welcome to Mulder Shipyard!

Mulder Shipyard is a family-owned shipyard in the Netherlands, employing more than 70 full-time workers over three locations in the Leiden area, and a fourth location in Enkhuizen.

At Mulder, our philosophy is to combine traditional craftsmanship with the latest technology, while always focusing on delivering superb quality, outstanding comfort and exceptional seaworthiness.

Mulder yachts are built from aluminium, are semi-displacement and can achieve top speeds up to 24 knots. Known throughout the industry for our signature designs, we advise, develop and build boats for experienced yacht owners up to 500 Gross Tons.

Feeling inspired? Take a look at our online fleet: an overview of Mulder yachts built over our long heritage (since 1938!).

For more information and to explore the options for your future Mulder yacht, get in touch with us today.

Nick Mulder

Name: Bering Yachts
Description:
For more than fifteen years, Bering Yachts has been creating, innovating, and delivering steel exploration yachts. Our only goal is to build boats that have a second-to-none level of luxury, capability, and safety. Built of steel and equipped with the best materials and equipment, Bering’s yachts provide maximum protection to our clients. Advanced naval architecture allows our vessels to carry absolutely everything that is necessary for prolonged travel. Functionality, simplicity, and elegance of Bering’s yachts represent a design that is both aesthetically pleasing and nautically correct.
We create boats that allow anyone who owns a Bering yacht to feel at home on the water. Our mission is to ensure that your comfort level onboard is higher than on land. With Bering you have freedom to go anywhere, worry-free.

Name: Seaplace
Description:
Seaplace is an Offshore Engineering and Ship Design office.
