Since its establishment in 1980, we have worked for both the civil and naval industries in numerous national and international successful projects which outstand for their innovative solutions of high added value.
Among our wide range of services we offer ship design engineering, offshore engineering and marine operations, ships inspection, technical support to shipping companies, fleet management and

Name: Buoyancy Consultants
Description:
We at Buoyancy Consultants shoulder the responsibility of completing offshore & ship design by providing quality basic & detail design engineering services for production, where the hull structure, outfit and systems are detailed to achieve a cost and time effective production cycle on 3D Platforms like Cadmatic, Aveva Marine, SmartMarine3D and Foran. Buoyancy Consultants support by constant design reviews and 3D model sharing with the customer so that the production is set in right direction.

Our Offshore and Ship Design Services Include:
1. Basic Design
2. Class Approvals
3. Detail Design
4. Production Information & Documentation
5. Retrofit Design Engineering for BWTS & EGCS
6. Onsite Support
7. Entire Project Management

Our unique 'Designed to Fit' concept is the most efficient high level design service at the most effective cost.

Buoyancy Consultants -  Making Your Project Float !

Name: Elkon Elektrik San. ve Tic. A.Ş.
Description:
elkon was established in 1980 to design, manufacture, integrate and commission low voltage electrical equipment and automation systems for the maritime industry. Although the engineering and production center of Elkon, a global and international brand, is in Turkey, its operation area is all over Europe.

Establishing ElkoNorge AS., which will provide Norwegian Sales and After-Sales service within the framework of the demands coming from Norway to Turkish and foreign shipyards, Elkon, together with its solution partners, provides warranty service within 24 hours in the region from Kristiansand on the south-west coast of Norway to Trondheim city in the northwest. offers the opportunity to Elkon, which plans to establish a sales and service network in the major shipbuilding countries of Europe in addition to its medium-term turnover, is an agile maritime electrical engineering and application company that generates 60-70% of its revenues from foreign sales.

Having completed more than 550 projects since its establishment, Elkon supplies electrical systems to the following ship types:

• Tugboat
• Push Boat
• Fishing Vessels
• Offshore Support Vessels
• Traditional and Hybrid Ferries
• Tankers.
• Yachts.
• Cargo Vessels
• Military Vessels
• Seismic Research Vessels

Elkon, which establishes Quality Management systems and maintains them effectively, has ISO 9000, ISO 14000 and ISO 18000 quality systems from NATO Facility Security Vulnerability and RINA.

elkon is a member of the German SCHOTTEL Industries GmbH.

Established in 1921, SCHOTTEL develops and manufactures azimuth propulsion and maneuvering systems and complete propulsion systems with power ratings up to 30 megawatts for ships of all types and sizes. SCHOTTEL's product portfolio consists of the development and manufacture of versatile propulsion and control systems; It covers all products and services throughout a ship's life cycle, right up to first-class after-sales service.

Name: Norse Shipyard
Description:
Norse Group has established with a years of experience by Norwegian and Turkish partnership.


Norse Group of Companies  aims to create difference with quality and reliability in the industry by gathering years of experience.

Name: CMN - Constructions Mécaniques de Normandie
Description:
A Cherbourg, depuis 1946, CMN maîtrise la complexité des projets les plus ambitieux et repousse les limites imposées par l'élément marin. CMN s'appuie sur des femmes et des hommes unis par la recherche de l'excellence, la transmission de savoir-faire uniques pour imaginer, concevoir, construire et commercialiser dans le monde entier les navires et services associés les plus innovants et les plus performants. 

CMN, acteur engagé de la transition énergétique, valorise le potentiel des océans au travers de sa filiale Hydroquest, leader de la filière hydrolienne.

Name: Kooiman Marine Group
Description:
Together we offer craftmanship

Versatile, all-round and customer orientated. These are the keywords of what Kooiman Marine Group is all about. Forming an umbrella of stand-alone operating companies. Each company serving its own customers with its specific knowledge. Together covering all aspects of the shipbuilding industry. 

Through the exchange of human resources, knowledge and materials within Kooiman Marine Group all partners get stronger what results in a constant high quality of work and customers benefiting of the diversity of disciplines, facilities and capabilities.
 
By the far-reaching pooling of knowledge and expertise the ships within Kooiman Marine Group hide no secrets. Dealing with craftsmanship we are able to take on any kind of work. From designing to the completion. From new building constructions to modifications and repairs. From harbour equipment to interior design. Overall Kooiman Marine Group can be your trusted partner.

Name: Amico & Co S.p.A.
Description:
Amico & Co is one of the world’s major super yacht repair and refit centres, with large yacht docking facilities, including a brand new 4000T ShipLift and multiple dry-dock solutions, such as a 102m covered graving dock inside the shipyard.

Unlike many yards Amico & Co specializes only in this work and has developed facilities at its main yard in Genoa in Northern Italy to meet the precise requirements of repair and refit. It runs a second yard in Loano.

Amico & Co can cater for all work whether the job is just to refresh the paintwork right through to a major conversion job that might take a year or more. The yard can handle any type and size of yacht including the latest generation of large sailboats and its specialty is working on classic and antique yachts where dedicated care is required. The aim of Amico & Co is to complete each project on time and on budget.

Amico & Co has a long experience of working to meet all Flag State and Class regulations, and interacts with important associations such as Confindustria, UCINA and ICOMIA (Confederation of Italian Industry, Italian Union of Shipyards and Yachting and International Council of Marine Industry Association) and was the first shipyard in Italy to attain the environmental management standard certificate ISO 14001.

Name: PT. WARUNA SHIPYARD INDONESIA
Description:
Galangan Kapal /shipyard adalah sebuah tempat diperairan yang fungsinya untuk melakukan proses pembangunan kapal (New Building) dan perbaikan kapal (ship repair) dan juga melakukan pemeliharaan (maintenance). Proses pembangunanya meliputi desain, pemasangan gading awal, pemasangan plat lambung, instalasi peralatan, pengecekan, test kelayakan, hingga klasifikasifikasi oleh Klass yang telah ditunjuk, sedangkan untuk proses perbaikan / pemeliharaan bisanya meliputi perbaikan konstruksi lambung, perbaikan propeller sterntube, perawatan main engine dan peralatan lainnya. 

PT. Waruna Shipyard Indonesia bergerak pada bisnis galangan bapal   (Building dan Repair)  yang  berdiri sejak tahun 1990. Dengan kemampuan dan pengalaman yang dimiliki dalam pembangunan dan  perbaikan Kapal, PT. Waruna Shipyard Indonesia  melakukan pembangunan dan perbaikan semua tipe Kapal mulai dari Kapal penumpang, Kapal pengangkut Container, Kapal pengangkut kendaraan hingga Kapal Tanker untuk Crude Oil, Kapal pengangkut semen dan tipe lainnya.
  
PT. Waruna Shipyard Indonesia mempersiapkan proses pelayanan dengan tenaga kerja yang kompeten di bidangnya, fasilitas yang memadai, peralatan, area kerja dan yang paling utama adalah memiliki komitmen untuk selalu memberikan pelayanan terbaik kepada setiap pelanggan PT. Waruna Shipyard Indonesiaagar terwujudnya (Costumor Statisfaction)

Name: Numarine Yachts
Description: Numarine is a Superyacht Explorer Builder based in Turkey.

Name: Odense Steel Shipyard Ltd.
Description:
The leading European Shipyard in building tall ships for the container industry - up to 13.000 TEU
Building other types as well: RO-RO's, Bulk Carriers and Wessels for the Royal Danish Navy.
In the future the Odense Steel Shipyard Ltd. will exist as: A smaller Shipyard (Lindø Shipyard) with focus on smaller special wessels and other constructions for the steel- and offshore industry, an Industry Service Unit to to support other manufactors and a Facility Unit to administrate all the common facilities.
The name of the overall company - still a part of the A. P. Moller Maersk Group - will then be Odense - Lindø Ltd.

Name: PGZ Stocznia Wojenna
HanseYachts AG
Description:
HanseYachts AG is a leading global manufacturer of sailing yachts and motor yachts 

Our 3 sailing yacht brands:

 Hanse
 Dehler
 Moody

Our 3 motor yacht brands:

 Fjord
 Sealine
 Ryck

Six brands with their own unique characters – united under the roof of HanseYachts AG. Each brand operates independently on the market, but benefits from the pooled development and production technology of one of the world’s leading yacht-builders.

The six brands under the umbrella of HanseYachts AG are sold to customers in more than 100 countries all over the world via a network of around 250 dealers.

HanseYachts was founded in 1990 as a brand-new, state-of-the-art shipyard. It drew upon the expertise of the old Greifswald boat and repair yard and, utilising both the extensive know-how and a tradition of shipbuilding craftsmanship stretching back many years, started to develop and build sailing yachts under the HANSE brand.

Name: Estaleiro São Miguel
Description:
In an area of approximately 20 thousand square meters, located at the Port of Gradim, in the municipality of São Gonçalo, Rio de Janeiro, the São Miguel Shipyard was implanted to provide construction and repair services to the Group fleet and third-party vessels.

In activity since the 1970s, this was the first facility to obtain environmental licensing approved by the State of Rio de Janeiro. The shipyard is responsible for almost the totality of construction, maintenance and upgrading projects for all Group maritime units. Every year, averages of 15 dry-dockings are managed by the shipyard.

New constructions over the last few years include 2 tugboats equipped with  12-ton Bollard Pull static traction capacity; one 1,800 TBP tank barg; 3 conversion projects and the jumborization of three 2,000 TBP barges, all with double-hull construction in the payload sections.

In the recent past, the São Miguel Shipyard was certified by the Brazilian Merchant Marine Fund (MMF) to provide construction services to third-party ship-owners. The first construction project approved within the framework of concession, initiated back in 2007, received financing from the MMF and the BNDES, acting as financial agent.

Name: Navantia Yachts
Description:
Navantia’s Yacht Repair Division, located in Cartagena, is a centre of reference in the Mediterranean for the repair of yachts and mega yachts. It is a shipyard with a tradition which dates back 300 years.

The complex has facilities which are able to meet the needs of the international market, including the most recent trends, such as the huge increase in the number of yachts over 60 and 80 m in length, and even those of more than 100 m in length.

For this, our shipyard includes:
● A Syncrolift of 150 metres in length and 20.5 metres in beam, which allows a boat to be dry docked in a few hours. There are also parking areas with space for up to 11 mega yachts to be moored simultaneously.
● A dry dock of 214 metres in length and 20.5 metres in beam, for large yachts.
● A 1,300-metre quay, with an average draught of 7.5 metres. It includes all services and an electrical supply of up to 2,000 amps.

These facilities are complemented by all the necessary services and our own excellent team, made up of highly qualified people.

Name: IMS Shipyard
Description:
IMS was founded in 1987 for the construction of aluminium passenger transport boats. Since 1992, refit & repair has been the shipyard’s primary activity.

Directed by Denis CARABIN, the company has been held by the French holding company NEPTEAM since 2011.

Since 2005, the shipyard has been the official Customer-Service base for several major internationally recognised yacht builders.

IMS Shipyard has established itself as a leading player in the industry, particularly appreciated for its professional attitude, the quality of its work, the relationships it establishes with its clients and its capacity to respect quotes and delivery dates.

In 2014, IMS Shipyard reaches a turning point in its history, expanding its offer and its accommodation capacity on its two sites IMS 300 and IMS 700, just 5 km distance apart.

With this extension on the IMS 700 site, the shipyard multiplies its total surface area and accommodation capacity by five.

Name: Hatteras Yachts
Description: A Hatteras Yacht does not aspire to offer a luxury. That is simply where we begin. It is beyond that point – and within the experience each voyage offers – that you begin to understand the true Hatteras difference. That difference, for over half a century, has allowed Hatteras to stand as the benchmark of quality and innovation to which all others aspire.

Name: Mazagon Dock Ltd
Description: Mazagon Dock Limited (MDL) is India’s prime shipyard. MDL manufactures warships and submarines for the Indian Navy, as well as offshore platforms and associated support vessels for offshore oil drilling. It also builds tankers, cargo bulk carriers and passenger ships and ferries.

Name: Concordia Damen Shipbuilding
Description:
Concordia Damen Shipbuilding has their own ideas about the shipping industry. Innovative thinking and an open-minded view have enabled the company to grow into to a well-known and reliable partner in shipbuilding, shipping and offshore projects.

The core business of Concordia Damen Shipbuilding is the design and building of new (sea-going)vessels with an innovative and economical character as key characteristics. The wishes and requirements of our clients are implemented in these designs and with hands-on management by ourselves it is possible to have these vessels built abroad. We also provide vessels as turn-key projects, completely managed by Concordia. This does not only guarantee a high level of quality but also a perfect combination of the clients wishes with the latest technology.

Years of hands-on experience, a solid knowledge base and a worldwide network of clients and suppliers makes Concordia Damen Shipbuilding the reliable partner for all types of maritime projects.

Name: EDR Antwerp Shipyard
Description:
EDR Antwerp Shipyard – Reclaiming the position as preferred shipyard in Europe and setting new standards of excellence in ship repair, maintenance and construction.

•	Ship Repair and maintenance
•	Technical Supplies
•	Spare Parts Distribution
•	Inland

Excelling in the shipyard industry, creating long-term partnerships with all our stakeholders, driven to increase value to their core business and reduce the environmental footprint in the shipping industry

EDR Antwerp Shipyard – a full service shipyard in the heart of Europe.

www.edr-antwerp.eu

Name: NOBISKRUG
Description:
NOBISKRUG hat seit der Gründung im Jahr 1905 weit über 750 Schiffe gebaut. Heutzutage ist die Rendsburger Traditionswerft auf Konstruktion und Bau luxuriöser, individuell angefertigter Superyachten ab 60 Metern Länge spezialisiert. Hier zählt NOBISKRUG zu einem der weltweit führenden Anbieter.

Im Bereich Reparatur, Instandhaltung und Umbau bietet NOBISKRUG zudem maßgeschneiderte Lösungen für Yachten sowie Marine-, Handels- und Behördenschiffe, und zwar sowohl an den deutschen Werftstandorten als auch weltweit bei Kunden vor Ort.

Name: Vard Electro
Description:
Vard Electro is a globally recognized company established in Norway in 1997 and provides vessel owners with reliable and sustainable solutions for the most demanding conditions. As a subsidiary of VARD group, we pride ourselves with a long history of shipbuilder experience, giving us a unique insight to develop quality solutions for all types of vessels. 

In 2013 we launched our SeaQ product line, which is based on generations of shipbuilder competence. We constantly seek to develop new, innovative, and flexible solutions with a green profile. Our strength lies in selecting, configuring, and testing the different components to address our customer's needs.

Vard Electro offers full-scale electrical engineering design, marine procurement, and integrated solutions for vessels in the marine industry. With the ability to operate as a specialized system integrator, we can provide everything from concept design to equipment purchase to equipment integration through the warranty period.

Name: VT Halter Marine
Description:
Halter Marine is a modern and progressive shipbuilder that uses cutting-edge technologies to design and build the world's highest quality maritime products. We offer shipbuilding, ship conversion and ship repair on a total turnkey basis.

With more than 60 years of shipbuilding excellence, this internationally acclaimed shipbuilder is noted for being the largest designer and builder of medium-sized ocean going vessels in the U.S. Our shipyards have delivered more than 2,600 vessels to commercial and government clients in 29 countries on five continents.

Delivering diversified high-tech maritime products to the U.S. and international markets, Halter Marine can meet even the most challenging design and construction schedules. It builds to the requirements of the U.S. Coast Guard, U.S. Navy, American Bureau of Shipping, Lloyds, Det Norske Veritas, IMO and other regulatory bodies and classification societies.

We have the capability to build medium size ships up to 50,000 DWT. We are the largest supplier of Army watercraft and provider of the Army's Logistic Support Vessel.

Halter Marine
900 Bayou Casotte Parkway
Pascagoula, MS 39581
Telephone: 228-696-6888
www.vthaltermarine.com

Name: Lloyd Werft Bremerhaven GmbH
Description:
This site presents the Lloyd Werft Bremerhaven GmbH and provides updates on relevant activities.

Lloyd Werft is located on a site covering more than 260,000 square metres in Bremerhaven’s Überseehafen on the German North Sea coast. 

Three large dry and floating docks as well as high-performance workshops and logistics sectors makes possible the building and conversion of ships which are more than 300 metres in length and draw up to 11 metres. 

We work according to the most stringent quality, safety and ecological assurance standards (DIN ISO 9001, ISO 14001 and ISO 18001 certifications).

For more details about our services please visit our web site www.lloydwerft.com

Name: Anadolu Shipyard
Description: Anadolu Shipyard designs and builds indigenous naval ships for Turkish navy and friendly international navies.

Name: Veth Propulsion by Twin Disc
Description:
Veth Propulsion by Twin Disc is a thruster manufacturer that guarantees quality, service, innovation and sustainability. Our customers can expect a personal, down-to-earth approach and a reliable image and great name recognition in the market. It is an originally Dutch company, based in Papendrecht, with 170 employees. Our employees make a difference and are proud to work for Veth Propulsion.

The sailing profile and specific wishes of customers are the starting point for our total solutions in the field of rudder propellers, bow thrusters, diesel engines and generator sets. Our customers can be found in market segments such as dredging, offshore, inland shipping, passenger shipping, tugboats and mega yachts. 

Since 2018 Veth Propulsion is part of the US trade company Twin Disc, Inc. where we have access to a global service and sales network. More info can also be found on www.twindisc.com

Name: Seatrium Singmarine Brasil
Description: Empresa multinacional na área de construção de Naval.

Name: Fleetway Inc.
Description:
With a strong foundation established over 40 years, Fleetway offers a comprehensive capability of engineering, technical, logistics, technical training, translation and management services. We have built an outstanding team of people, and partners, invested in the tools and earned an exemplary track record servicing our customers.

Our offices are located in Halifax, Nova Scotia, St. John’s, Newfoundland & Labrador, Ottawa, Ontario and Victoria, British Columbia.

We have built our reputation on customer focused solutions and providing service excellence and value to all our customers.

We uphold the highest standards of quality, safety and security, and are registered to the ISO 9001:20015 and 
ISO 14001: 20015 designations.

Fleetway Inc. is a proud member of the J.D. Irving, Limited Group of companies. JD Irving Limited is a family owned company with over 125 years of service in forestry, oil and gas, wholesale/retail operations, shipbuilding and transportation

Name: Penguin International Limited
Description:
Thursday, 5 January 2023
9:59 AM

Penguin International Limited is a publicly listed Singaporean homegrown company.

We specialise in the design, construction, ownership and operation of aluminium high-speed craft.

Since 1995, we have delivered more than 200 aluminium workboats, patrol craft and passenger ferries to ship owners around the world. These include our proprietary FLEX multi-role crewboats, armoured security boats and windfarm vessels, built under our self-funded stock vessel construction programme.

Our designs are jointly developed by our integrated shipbuilding and ship management teams in Singapore, backed by more than three decades of operational experience. We typically own and operate what we design and build. 

We also undertake owner-specific build-to-order, repair and conversion projects for a variety of high-speed craft.

Whether you are a ship owner or a charterer, you will enjoy peace of mind with the Penguin brand, which stands for integrity, professionalism and mutual respect.

Go ahead. FLEX YOUR FLEET today!

Name: AKYACHT
Description: AKYACHT is the ISO 9001 Lloyd's-certified,  SUPERYACHT SHIPYARD located in Turkey, with immense industry background and vision. The first breakthrough project for the shipyard was a spectacular 85m superyacht VICTORIOUS, the biggest superyacht ever built in Turkey.

Name: Bakker Sliedrecht
Description:
As society, we stand before major challenges in terms of significant emission reduction, growing energy demand, and increasing global infrastructure. Our customers are active in these demanding contexts with dredging and offshore operations and as frontrunners in the land-based energy transition. 

Bakker Sliedrecht enables them to focus on their core business by ensuring a reliable and efficient power supply so they can lead the transition towards a sustainable future. Our knowledge and expertise in system integration and automation capabilities help customers push boundaries and go beyond the conventional, giving them an edge in the challenging contexts in which they operate.

Bakker Sliedrecht provides innovative solutions for power and automation issues requiring high and specific demands like dynamic power requirements in high voltage ranges, low emission standards, and compact and redundant design criteria.

Name: GERMAN NAVAL YARDS
Description: GERMAN NAVAL YARDS specialises in the design and construction of large naval vessels such as frigates, corvettes and offshore patrol vesels. GERMAN NAVAL YARDS can look back on over 185 years of experience in shipbuilding. Originating from the former surface shipbuilding of Howaldtswerke-Deutsche Werft (HDW), the Kiel shipyard is part of the international shipyard group CMN NAVAL and thus continues the long shipbuilding tradition on the Kiel Fjord. The efficient infrastructure also includes the largest dry dock in the Baltic region (426 metres long) and a 900-tonne gantry crane.

Name: Pakistan Navy - Ship Building Dockyard
Description:
The Pakistan Navy (PN) Dockyard, since its inception in 1952, has been undertaking repair works, modernisation and rebuild of Pakistan Navy Ships, Submarines and Crafts. Pakistan Navy Dockyard is providing technical assistance, rebuild and repair of a wide range and diversity of equipment of PN Fleet and has undertaken fleet modernisation and up gradation programmes with success. PN Dockyard has developed the capability to undertake ambitious and indigenous construction projects like the production of Missiles Boats, Mines Counter Measure Vessel (MCMV) and AGOSTA 90-B Submarine.
It was engaged in more than a billion dollar project of MODP for construction of Agosta 90-B submarines with the help of France.

Submarine Construction in Pakistan Navy is a continuation of the naval construction efforts, which started in Pakistan Navy Dockyard in 1971 for self-reliance and indigenisation. It includes construction of floating docks, missile boats, X-Craft submarines and MCMVs. PN Dockyard had 30 years of repair & maintenance experience of DAPHNE and AGOSTA 70 submarines prior undertaking Meta construction project of AGOSTA-90B submarines in 1994.

Name: AMEL Yachts
Description:
For over 60 years, Chantiers AMEL in La Rochelle has been cultivating a rare passion: designing and building exceptional sailing yachts. Each vessel that leaves our workshops embodies a unique combination of craftsmanship, technical innovation and respect for the sea.

At AMEL, we believe that perfection comes from precision, patience and passion. Our teams of carpenters, electricians, engineers, riggers, upholsterers and others work hand in hand to offer much more than just a sailing yacht: a safe, elegant and sustainable sailing experience. 

Beyond performance, the AMEL spirit is above all a corporate culture based on transmission, rigour and a taste for a job well done. It is a collective expertise, nurtured by committed men and women who are proud to perpetuate a tradition of French excellence in the service of offshore yachting.

Each AMEL is the promise of a serene voyage, respectful of the elements, guided by a passion for the sea.

Name: Nodosa Group
Description:
Somos una compañía especializada en el Sector Naval e Industrial. Fundada hace más de cuarenta años, aunamos tradición, solidez y dinamismo, con las características propias de una empresa que mantiene un espíritu joven e innovador. Nuestra actividad naval, casi exclusivamente centrada en los buques de casco metálico, es el diseño, la construcción, transformación, reparación y mantenimiento de buques, tanto en grada como a flote, ya sean de fabricación propia o para terceros. Nuestra actividad industrial abarca sectores tan tradicionales como el granitero, maderero, el de extracción o el químico y tan vanguardistas como el eólico o el aeronáutico.

Podrá conocernos un poco mejor a través de nuestro vídeo corporativo: http://xurl.es/nodosagroup_esp



We are a specialised company in the Naval & Industrial Sector. Founded more than forty years ago, we combine tradition, strength and dynamism with the characteristics that are proper of a company that is dynamic and young in spirit. Our naval activity, almost exclusively focussed on metal hull vessels, comprises the design, construction, large transformation, maintenance and repair of vessels, both in dry dock and at sea, whether of our own manufacture or third parties. The wide range of our activities encompasses from the traditional granite, wood, mining and chemical sectors to the more innovative wind power and aeronautical industries.

You can know us a little better through our corporate video: http://xurl.es/nodosagroup_eng

Name: Dunya Yachts
Description:
About Dunya Yachts

Dunya Yachts is one of the largest megayacht facilities in Turkey with an area of 30,000m², consisting of 4 sheds capable of accommodating yachts up to 100m in length and includes the only fully climate-controlled dry dock in the region. A family owned and run yard, founded in 1983 and modernised to the highest standards in 2005, the state-of-the-art yacht building & refit facility is in the heart of Tuzla, less than an hour from the bustling, historic city of Istanbul. Dunya Yachts was the builder of the universally acclaimed 72 metre Axioma (ex-Red Square) and specialise in yacht refit, repair, servicing and new construction projects. In the last 10 years they have completed works to more than 25 superyachts, ranging in size up to 72m.
	
For further information:

www.dunyayachts.com

info@dunyayachts.com

Name: ICF Group
Description:
ICF Group is one of the market leaders in Asia for marine interior refurbishment. With more than 30 years of experience in ship interior refurbishment, we have a wealth of knowledge that covers the Cruise & Ferry, Oil & Gas, Offshore, New Builds and Super Yacht sectors.

We are an A-Z Company, a one stop solution in design, planning, engineering, construction and delivery of the highest standards; such as structural steelwork, piping, HVAC, electrical and logistics support - all coordinated from our Singapore based headquarters to any part of the world.

At ICF, we offer unparalleled knowledge and experience for completing projects on time and to budget. These skills combined with our customized interior maintenance and revitalization packages ensure that our clients are looked after at every step in our journey together - of expert designing, building beautiful interiors and timely delivery as We Build Your Dreams.

Name: TOTE Services
Description: TOTE Services is a leading U.S.-based vessel construction, ship management, and technical consulting company that is fully certified to comply with the Safety, Quality, and Environmental requirements of the ABS Guide for Marine Health, Safety, Quality, Environmental, and Energy Management.

Name: Palmer Johnson Yachts
Description:
The heritage of Palmer Johnson makes it unique. From humble beginnings as a wooden fishing boat builder more than 90 years ago, the company has emerged as a premier builder of luxury high performance yachts. 

Its secure foundation stems from a history of landmark achievements from championship sailing yachts to award winning megayachts. 

With the largest built aluminium US yacht, the first Explorer of its type, the first MCA compliant yacht, the first gas turbine powered vessels and notably, the "Fortuna" for the King of Spain, Palmer Johnson has a proud background incomparable to other Superyacht builders.

Name: Alicat Workboats Ltd
Description:
Alicat Workboats Ltd. are East Anglia's No.1 builders of aluminium boats. The company has designs of vessels that include the Alicat and Southboat range of Aluminium crew transfer vessels (CTV), wind farm service vessels (WFSV). The company also has a track record working with other design houses to develop, build and deliver vessels that meet any clients requirements from offshore crew transfer vessels through commuter ferries, police and patrol vessels

The company also offers a turnkey consultancy and project management service for the modification, refit and servicing of existing vessels.
Alicat operates arguably the UK's No.1 repair facility dedicated to the service and repair of small craft up to 40m. With a 200 tonne boat lift (mobile marine vessel lift) the facility is home to East Anglia's largest hoist. The facility has all major services onsite and is designed to maximize efficiency and minimize downtime, including:-

•	Marine Electrical
•	Fabrication
•	Stainless Steel Fabrication
•	Precision Engineering
•	Painters, joiners, shipwrights and stores
•	Specialist diesel engine services
•	200T Mobile Vessel Lift
•	6,500 square metres of hard standing areas
•	Fully equipped service vans for work in situ
•	Electrical shore supply and water
•	Aircraft style mobile steps for easy vessel access
•	Quay heading
•	184m of quayside with direct access to the North Sea

Alicat has two building berths and an enclosed dry dock with a total length of 35m, 9m beam and a draft of up to 2m. 

Please visit our website to find out more about Alicat Workboats. Alternatively, please contact us directly at Alicat Workboats with your enquiries and we will be happy to help.

Name: SEAir
Description:
SEAir is a French group pioneering hydrofoil technology for the next generation of naval platforms.
Our vessels fly above the water — faster, farther, and more stable — combining efficiency, discretion, and resilience for defense, sovereignty, transport, and yachting applications.

Born from a decade of research and real-world trials, SEAir has become a reference in manned and unmanned foiling vessels, from naval drones to high-performance and eco-conscious chase boats and tenders.
Our retractable foil systems and electronic flight controls drastically reduce fuel consumption, wake, and crew fatigue, while doubling range and maintaining high-speed stability in rough seas.

We operate at the crossroads of deeptech, naval architecture, and European defense innovation.
Our platforms are designed as modular systems, ready to host sensors, communication suites, and autonomous capabilities — enabling hybrid and unmanned operations for tomorrow’s fleets.

 Strategic programs
•	A €3M fundraising is underway to accelerate industrial deployment and European partnerships.
•	SEAir leads a European Defense consortium, funded by the European Defence Agency (€8M), to design, build and qualify a 12-meter dronized foiling vessel — a true operational breakthrough.
•	Continuous collaborations with European navies, research centers, industrial primes, and shipyards to extend performance and mission capabilities across sectors.

 Our vision
To make SEAir the global reference in foiling naval platforms, shaping a faster, farther, stealthier, and more stable future for mobility at sea — from defense operations to high-performance and eco-conscious chase boats and tenders.

Name: Galeon Yachts
Description:
Every Galeon yacht is a piece of handcrafted excellence and thanks to the unparalleled attention to detail, cutting edge technology and great designs the company has become one of the premier European boat builders. With over 30 years of experience in the business and thousands of satisfied customers from all around the world – you can be sure your next Galeon yacht will meet all your expectations.

Established in 1982, Galeon remains a privately owned company specializing in constructing luxury yacht and motorboats. With clear vision and steady growth we have reached employment of over 1 400 people working on 36 000 square meters of production and assembly halls, capable of taking on even the most ambitious projects.

Over the years Galeon yachts have gained recognition for their great designs, superb performance and uncanny level of craftsmanship. We strive to become synonymous with high quality, innovative features and perfect execution of our products. Our attention to detail and willingness to improve constantly pushes us forward.

Name: EISA Shipyard
Description:
In this yard, over 400 vessels were built and several types of ship and offshore repairs have been carried out. 

EISA is prepared to comply with offshore services due to its extense sea front area along with devices to support heavy loads.

The yard is capable to built ships up to 280m length and up to 150.000 deadweight tons. Huge and heavy units can be fabricated.

Name: St. Johns Ship Building, Inc.
Description:
St. Johns Ship Building, Inc. is a full service shipbuilding and marine repair company specializing in New Construction and Repair; such vessels include Landing Crafts, Barges, Offshore Service Vessels, Push Boats, Ocean Going Tugs, Tank Barges and CTVs to name a few. 

St. Johns has over 30 years combined experience,  900' of bulkhead waterfront including a 400' launch basin. The shipyard also has a 1,200 Ton Dry Dock, a 425' X 75' fabrication shop, as well as a complete carpentry, electrical and machine shop.

St. Johns' facility is located on 98 acres along the St. Johns River in Palatka, Florida (approximately 68 miles southwest of Jacksonville, FL)

Name: Chantiers et ateliers du Maroc (CAM)
RCMS Marine Brasil
Description: Electrical, automation, navigation and communication solutions company for maritime segment.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Rodman Boats
Description:
Fundado en 1974, el grupo Rodman, es la compañía más antigua de España en su sector de actividad. Su experiencia y trayectoria con más de 15.000 embarcaciones entregadas en todos los mares del mundo, le sitúan hoy como líder indiscutible en el sector de la construcción naval en diferentes materiales en nuestro país.
El Grupo Rodman presenta la oferta de producto más diversificada y versátil, convirtiéndose en el activo intangible donde reside su verdadero saber hacer. Altos estándares de calidad, máxima seguridad y la mejor navegabilidad,
esos son los atributos de la marca Rodman.
Las 3 divisiones de la compañía, buques de acero, náutica profesional y náutica de recreo encarnan la pluralidad de la oferta del Grupo Rodman.

Founded in 1974, the Rodman Group is Spain’s oldest company in its sector. Its experience and track record in the construction of over 15,000 vessels locateit as an indisputable leader in the Spanish boat-building sector.
The Rodman Group’s highly diversified and versatile product range encompasses the know-how that is its major intangible asset. The highest standards of quality, maximum safety and optimal sailing performance are
the marks of the Rodman brand.
The three divisions into which Rodman is divided –steel boats, professional sailing boats and pleasure craft-encapsulate the plurality of the company’s product range.

Name: Lagoon Catamarans
Description:
Lagoon is the world leader in the construction of cruising catamaran sailboats. Lagoon has built more than 6,000 catamarans since 1984 and has never stopped developing its offer with boats ranging from 40 to 78 feet in length. Lagoon’s intent is to offer comfortable and self-sufficient catamarans, produced in a sustainable way, equipped with the latest technologies, all for the satisfaction of today’s sailors.

Designed to offer a unique lifestyle on the water, Lagoon catamarans are the result of dreams of voyaging and a desire for freedom.

Lagoon is committed to sailing pleasure through simple and safe sail trimming. Its motto: generosity and friendliness.

Name: Marino Group
Description:
MARINO is an international group of companies with 3,000 professionals worldwide. For 10 years we have been building all types of vessels, completing interior finishing, participating in industrial construction and massive infrastructure projects. 

Marino Group by MARINO is the leader of shipbuilding, repair and industrial projects in the Baltic states, offering welding, ship-hull/metal construction assembly, painting, installation, HVAC systems, scaffolding assembly and/or disassembly services. 

Established in the international market as a reliable contractor, we have successfully completed projects in France, Germany, the Netherlands, England, Spain & all over Europe (from building yachts to assembling warships and major cruise ships).

Our professional management staff and highly qualified workers are directly employed at Marino Group, guaranteeing that every project we embark on will be completed to absolute precision on board.

Name: Everglades Boats
Description:
Everglades Boats is the premier builder of premium fishing boats with yacht-like appointments, ranging from 23 to 45 feet.  Everglades Boats is renowned for their impeccable appointments, superior fishabiity, and award-winning innovative designs.

Mission:  To build the safest, most comfortable, and best performing family fishing boats on the water.

Company Overview:  Manufactures of luxury family fishing boats.  Everglades Boats was founded by Bob and Stephen Dougherty, who revolutionized boat building by introducing their patented RAMCAP process in 1999, creating the finest unsinkable hulls in the industry.

Name: Intermarine UK Limited
Description:
Our business is founded on the principle of offering clients complete peace of mind. You can trust our technical expertise, our meticulous planning and our pragmatic approach to any and all projects.

As part of the Inter Marine Group, we have operational centres around the globe. Managed and operated by qualified, experienced teams, we understand current markets and technology as well as the industry's traditions and values. Our highly-skilled personnel put the customer first, completing projects both on time and within budget, ensuring quality and safety throughout.

Our areas of expertise include:

Shipping / Marine
• Shipyard & voyage repair
• Supplies of ships spare parts made in Europe, Japan, Korea and China
• Conversion & mobilisation
• Shipbuilding

Offshore / Energy
• Repair & maintenance
• Supplies of ships spare parts made in Europe, Japan, Korea and China
• Subsea & marine
• New build

Name: Tankoa Yachts
Description:
YTankoa Yachts is an Italian shipyard founded at the end of 2008. Known as a “boutique shipyard”, Tankoa specialises in building custom superyachts over 45 metres, each one tailored to the vision and lifestyle of its owner. This focused approach allows for exceptional craftsmanship, cutting-edge engineering, and meticulous attention to detail.
With over 20,000 square metres at its Genoa headquarters and a new 30,000-square-metre facility under development in Civitavecchia, Tankoa combines traditional Italian artistry with modern technology. Their team includes some of the most respected professionals in the industry, from design to construction, working closely with clients at every step.
What sets Tankoa apart is its dedication to delivering not just yachts, but truly personalised experiences at sea. Each project is a collaborative journey, where the client’s ideas and dreams shape a one of a kind masterpiece built to explore the world’s oceans. In a market often driven by scale, Tankoa chooses exclusivity, quality, and deep customer relationships. This is not just shipbuilding, it’s about turning passion into timeless works of floating art.

Name: Steerprop
Description:
Steerprop is a leading designer and manufacturer of propulsion systems for the most demanding applications and toughest conditions.

Since our founding in Finland in 2000, we have delivered purpose-built units for hundreds of vessels, including every third icebreaker in operation around the world.

Our unrivaled arctic experience and fit-for-purpose solutions are a testament to continuous development, steadfast dedication to meet our customers’ needs and our unwavering resolve to perform.

Name: Jeffboat LLC
Description:
Jeffboat, ACL's manufacturing division, is the nation's largest inland shipbuilder, spanning 68 acres on the Ohio River in Jeffersonville, Indiana.  As a leader in marine design and construction for over 70 years, Jeffboat continues to live up to its reputation for unmatched excellence in building superior quality barges.

Our comittment to innovation in engineering and manufacturing ensures that Jeffboat barges are built to perform, built to last, and built to meet your needs. 

To add Jeffboat quality to your fleet, contact John Nugent, Sales Director, 812.288.1831.

Name: Seatech Engineering
Description:
Seatech Engineering Ltd is a team of qualified and experienced marine engineers and naval architects, specialized in projects for maritime sector. With headquarters in Gdańsk and a branch in Rumia (Poland), the company has over 20 years of experience in the design industry.

Seatech focuses on high value - added projects of medium-sized vessels and offshore structures for various marine purposes i.e.:
• research ships,
• offshore vessels,
• LNG & FSRU units,
• fishing vessels,
• workboats,
• passanger ships,
• navy vessels.

Our engineers work on different design software e.g. ACAD, NAPA, Cadmatic, 3DExperience or Aveva.

The scope of our support includes design work for:
a) shipowners - feasibility study, initial design and basic design;
b) shipyard - basic design, detail design, supervision onsite and retrofits;
c) universities, research centers and foundations - R&D projects.

Thanks to a wide range of engineering competence, our qualified team of naval architects can handle a broad scope of design work and project management support such as:
a) Initial design
• ship theory,
• hydrostatics and stability,
• feasibility study,
• pre-contractual consultancy,
b) basic design
• naval architecture,
• hydrostatics and stability,
• structural design and analysis,
• vessel systems,
• accommodation,
• electrical system and automation,
c) detail design
• hull structure,
• systems coordination,
• steel outfitting,
• accommodation details,
• deck outfitting,
d) governance and aquisition
• project management,
• subcontracting support and brokerage,
• onsite supervision,
• R&D projects.

Name: Hicri Ercili Shipyard
Description:

Name: Izmir Shipyard
Description:
Based on its 25 years of expertise, Gozuyilmaz proudly presents a new brand Izmir Shipyard, which introduces a range of small to medium size workboats, utility crafts and patrol boats for commercial and governmental customers.


Thanks to our passion for the sea and sailing, we constantly invest in the highest quality standards, highly skilled people and environmentally friendly technologies & innovation!

Name: NAVIM GROUP
Description:
Navim Group, with its headquarters Navalimpianti Spa located in Ceranesi (Genova) and its branches strategically positioned in Italy and abroad, is a world-wide leader in the design and manufacturing of Marine Equipment for Passenger and Merchant ships, Navy, Offshore and Mega-yachts.
It provides lifesaving appliances, access and handling systesm, cargo access equipment, movable covers for swimming pools called skydome, shell doors, valves remote control systems, light & sound equipment and other special applications for the marine field.

Navim Group includes several companies and branches all over the world:
Navalimpianti Spa | Ceranesi (HQ)– Monfalcone – Genova
Navalimpianti USA  Inc. | Fort Lauderdale, USA
Navalimpianti Pula | Pula, Croatia
Navalimpianti China | Shangai, China
Navalimpianti Hong Kong 
Navalimpianti Singapore | Singapore
Navim Sweden | Goteborg 
Navim France | Saint Nazaire 
Tecnimpianti Spa  | Palermo – Livorno
Tecnimpianti Antwerp | Belgium
Plus the sister participated companies Go-Tec, EsiWelama, Improget Engineering. 
So far, Navim Group has supplied over 30.000 plants and systems all over the world and assists Owners and Shipyards with a complete range of solutions, from feasibility studies and conceptual design to complete “turnkey” systems, as well as a range of customized services through the operational life of the ship. Products and designs are currently updated  in order to offer optimal solutions, increased through the co-ordination of different technologies and in accordance to Shipyard, Owner and Certification Societies requirements.

Name: Astilleros Guadalquivir
Description:
Astilleros Guadalquivir es una empresa ubicada en la Zona Franca del Puerto de Sevilla dedicada a las reparaciones, el mantenimiento y a los reciclados navales, además de a la industria inshore.

Astilleros Guadalquivir is a company located in the Free Zone of the Port of Seville dedicated to repairs, maintenance and ship recycling, in addition to the inshore industry.

Name: Cantiere Navale Vittoria
Description:
Having built over 900 naval vessels since 1927, the Shipyard is now one of the most important companies in Italy – and is increasingly a reference point internationally – in design and building military and paramilitary vessels, as well as work and commercial ships of up to 100 meters. Total customization (E.T.O.), the latest technological innovation and top quality levels are the hallmarks of CNV built vessels; capable of working everywhere and anytime in all environmental and weather conditions. 

During our history we've won several tenders for the main Italian governmental organizations, such as Coastguard, Fire Brigades, Custom Police and Navy; as well as international bids in Malta, Cyprus, Libya, Croatia, Slovenia, Romania, Tunisia, Russia and Algeria. In the military and paramilitary field we can in fact provide several types of customized vessels for differ tactical use, such as patrol boats, fast interceptors, SAR vessels and peculiar solutions for heavy tasks and fast transport and landing. 

Beside Military and Paramilitary Vessels, Vittoria Shipyard has a long experience in manufacturing any kind of Work and Commercial Boat as tugs, fishing boats, dredgers, pontoons, supply vessels, cargo, passenger boats and many others tailor made solutions.     The above achievements are also thanks to the Shipyard’s Technical Department, which studies the units in concert with the best designer according to the ship to be built: in this way, the Shipyard can always count on the most solid and up-to-date expertise and knowhow. The heart of this continuous development process is the R&D Department that is daily engaged in anticipating future needs of the market, and is constantly in touch with universities and research centers to be updated on the latest innovations and research.

Name: Bertram Yachts
Description: Bertram, the celebrated sportfishing luxury yacht brand founded by legendary Richard Bertram in 1961.

Name: Mondomarine
Description:
MONDOMARINE’s story started in Savona-Italy in 1915, when “Cantieri Navali Campanella” shipyard was established and quickly became one of the major maintenance hubs for commercial ships in the Mediterranean Sea. 
In 1978, with new ownership, the shipyard began building superyachts under the “MONDOMARINE” brand.
Today MONDOMARINE sets the benchmark for excellence in bespoke shipbuilding and ship repairing.

Name: Navalria
Description:
Navalria is a shipyard specialising in the construction, repair and conversion of ships and vessels. With over 45 years of activity, the company has undergone several phases of significant market changes, having managed to survive the most diverse difficulties and adversities of the environment and, more specifically, of its sector of activity, the shipbuilding industry.
 
As a result, the company has established itself as a unit of strategic interest for the region where it is located – Aveiro – by maintaining the recognition of its customers.

Part of the Martifer Group since January 2008, Navalria has been changing management paradigms, now governing itself by fundamental priorities for the continuity of any organisation:
- A commitment to the development, retention and appreciation of people, with motivated and qualified staff, in order to achieve high levels of productivity, and;
- The quality of services provided to customers, for sustainable value creation, with tailor-made products and services, and the goal of exceeding their expectations, while respecting safety and social responsibility rules.

After many years exclusively engaged in ship repair, since 2009 Navalria has been complementing its repair activity with the construction and conversion/modernisation of ships and recreational, merchant, fishing and military vessels. It currently has several iconic constructions in its portfolio and is one of the leading shipyards in Portugal. The capacity demonstrated in all projects, combined with the flexibility of intra-group partnerships with Martifer and WestSea, has contributed to gaining the trust of our customers and ensuring the continuity and expansion of the shipbuilding business.

Name: Myklebust Verft
Description:
Eit fleksibelt verft

Med godt handverk og fokus på berekraft skaper vi verdiar for kundane våre. Vi tilbyr nybygg, ombygging, reparasjonar og vedlikehald med fasilitetar for dokking opp til 15.000 tonn og 420 meter med kai. The Dutch company aims at giving customers exactly the support they apply for. The dedicated client approach is based on the company’s high quality products combined with prompt service and technical support, available 24 hours a day.

Name: CRIST S.A.
Description:
The CRIST company was established in 1990 by shipbuilding engineers Ireneusz Ćwirko and Krzysztof Kulczycki, its sole owners.

Since the beginning, CRIST has been building and repairing sea-going ships and steel structures.   

Changes in the world economy and development trends in contemporary technique and technology of mining of natural resources, especially submarine ones, facilitated the company's participation in implementation of projects in the scope of specialistic coastal structures, sea transport, and vessels for mining of sea resources.

Thanks to the possessed know-how, constant increase in qualifications of the personnel, application of modern production equipment, and new manufacture technologies, our company has gained recognition not only in the group of world shipowners but also companies leading in civil and harbour engineering.

Name: Frauscher Bootswerft GmbH & Co KG
Description:
Over 90 years of innovation & tradition. Behind the sheer luxury of the yachts from Frauscher stands not only a wealth of technological know-how and innovative power, but 80 years of solid tradition in building fine boats. The growth of environmental awareness and the stricter legislation are helping electric boats to achieve new heights of popularity. Firmly in line with this trend the Gmunden boat builder has established itself as Europe’s biggest electric boat manufacturer. International acclaim has poured in for the Frauscher brand in particular for the superb sailing craft and motor boats it develops and produces. Criteria like the fast ride, incredible curving speeds and stability plus the generous spatial concept and the finest quality in the materials selection were all put through punishingly strenuous paces from stem to stern. 
The exceptional Frauscher yachts are an absolute peak in aesthetics, elegance & lifestyle providing the most memorable of pleasures afloat on all waters of the world.

Name: Zodiac Milpro International
Description:
Zodiac Milpro International is the global leader in the design and manufacture of military and professional RIBs and inflatable boats.

Zodiac Milpro has more than 20,000 boats in daily use by over 80 military forces across the globe. 

Zodiac Milpro is a comprehensive dedicated business for military and professional customers. Its autonomous management, dedicated design and engineering teams, commercial networks, and exclusive production facilities ensure consistent product delivery, product quality and the ability to develop custom mission-specific solutions for its most demanding clients.

Zodiac Milpro’s global network of trained specialists and approved service sites present in most parts of the world stand ready to give assistance and support to its products and customers.

Name: Maiora
Description:
With roots deeply embedded in the history of Italian yachting, Maiora has been a symbol of excellence in yacht craftsmanship for 50 years. A proud ambassador of the Made in Italy ethos, the brand combines timeless elegance with innovation, creating yachts that are not just vessels but an expression of a unique lifestyle.

Maiora yachts are defined by their sophisticated design, generous spaces, and customizable interiors, offering Owners the perfect balance of luxury and functionality. Every detail is meticulously crafted by a passionate and highly skilled team, ensuring that each yacht reflects the individuality and desires of those who choose it.

Embarking on a Maiora is an emotional journey, where elegance meets the Mediterranean lifestyle, harmony blends with innovation, and every moment on board becomes a celebration of the sea.

Maiora: Created for those who want to inhabit and live the sea.

Produzione e vendita imbarcazioni da diporto

Name: Vexus Boats, LLC.
Description: Unparalleled Quality, Performance, Innovation, Experience, and Personal Commitment. That's both the focus and heritage of Vexus Boats. With centuries of design, engineering, and manufacturing experience, we're launching a new chapter in boat building history. It's a steadfast purpose driven to exceed expectations and you'll see it mirrored in our daily dedication to the highest standards. Our all-new product line includes both fiberglass and aluminum designs as well as custom matched trailers - all built in our own facilities right here in Flippin, Arkansas.

Name: Atlas Shipyard
Description: ATLAS Shipyard is an experienced and well-organized shipbuilder specializing in the construction and repair of specialized vessels up to 30,000 DWT. Our transparent and traceable processes, supported by ISO-based management systems, are powered by dedicated teams working in harmony.

Description: Over the past 50 years, Diana Yacht Design has worked on more than 75 superyachts of up to 125 metres in length at 24 yards worldwide. As one of the leading design studios in the international yachting industry, DIANA offers an ideal synergy of innovative design, naval architecture and engineering, accommodating even the most challenging wishes.

Name: Concept Marine Group
Description:
Concept Yachts is a world-class and internationally mobile superyacht and marine contractor company. Often referred to as ‘a mobile ship yard’, our dedicated  teams of key shipyard contractors and composite specialists have supported projects for some of the world’s leading superyacht and marine brands.
With our multiple specialist contractor teams and our  drive for exacting standards, we can help you start  ‘Building on your ideas’.

Engineering our Future Together.

Name: Naval Yachts
Description:
Naval Yachts started its activity in 2008 as a designing and engineering center. The opening of a new boatyard in 2010 in Antalya, transformed Naval Yachts into a modern, technologically advanced yacht builder. The year 2010 started with the building of a 40m wooden sailing boat, MINALLI, which was sucessfully launched two years later, proving company's skills and compentence in both designing and building.

In present, Naval Yachts is known for its involvement in several yacht building projects, providing consultancy, engineering, architectural yacht design, interior and exterior design, yacht building and yacht refit.Reliability and accessibility are part of Naval Yachts's work philosophy, by offering customized cutting edge designs, superior finish, and customer satisfaction in every project.

Name: Tsuneishi Shipbuilding Co., Ltd.
Description:
For over a century since our founding in 1917, TSUNEISHI SHIPBUILDING has been engaged in the shipbuilding business.

TSUNEISHI SHIPBUILDING conducts business from three bases: the TSUNEISHI Factory (Fukuyama City, Hiroshima Prefecture, Japan); TSUNEISHI HEAVY INDUSTRIES (CEBU), Inc. (Cebu Island, the Philippines); TSUNEISHI GROUP (ZHOUSHAN) SHIPBUILDING, Inc. (Zhoushan City, China). Since our founding, we have aggressively expanded abroad. Driven by our unwavering and challenging spirit for shipbuilding, we have consistently evolved into the industry leader we are today.

With bulk carriers as our core product, we also have a lineup of container carriers and tankers to accommodate diverse market needs. In particular, our best-selling 82,000 DWT bulk carrier Kamsarmax which has been delivered more than 360 vessels, boasts the top global share in the type of vessels, and its registered trademark has been well recognized as the industry standard. 

TSUNEISHI SHIPBUILDING has flexibly managed the changes required to expand. With a perspective on the future, we will continue to amass all our technologies, fully devote ourselves to proposing and building cutting-edge vessels that accommodate the needs of the era and create new value. We will continue to lead the world with TSUNEISHI’s ships and services that exceed our customers’ expectations.

Name: Santierul Naval Constanta SA
Description: Santierul Naval Constanta SA is ranked among the largest newbuildings, shiprepairs and conversions yards in Europe, the world's first class shipbuilder for medium range products & chemical tankers.

Name: Nimbus Group AB (publ)
Description:
Nimbus Group AB (publ) Europe’s largest boat manufacturers of leisure boats for cruising, sport, family, and professional use.

Nimbus is one of the foremost and most respected boat builders in Europe. The name Nimbus has for decades, been synonymous with well-built boats which, due to their high quality, have ensured that the company has carved itself out a special reputation within the boating world. 

Nimbus head office with its permanent exhibition and full service marina is located at the Royal Gothenburg Yacht Harbour in Gothenburg on the west coast of Sweden. 

Our brands include Alukin, Aquador, Bella, Falcon, Flipper, Nimbus, and Paragon Yachts.

Through a diversified portfolio of brands, Nimbus Group offers end customers a wide range of recreational motorboats from one and the same supplier via its dealer network. Our brands are aimed at more experienced boat owners where all brands are associated with high quality, performance, functionality, and user-friendliness as well as a classic Scandinavian design.

Sustainability
Nimbus Group considers itself, as one of Europe’s largest boat manufacturers, responsible for sustainability and the environment. Nimbus Group also expects to see that consumers to a greater extent choose and leisure boats that are perceived as environmentally sustainable. We are also involved in a recycling project on fiberglass composite waste together with, among others, RISE with the task of strengthening Sweden’s ability to innovate and contribute to sustainable growth.

Nimbus Philosophy:
Comfort, Design, Quality and Safety
Whether you spend a few hours, a weekend or the whole summer on board a Nimbus, it’s an unforgettable experience. Nimbus offer exceptional comfort, innovative design, quality through genuine craftsmanship and are built according to the highest safety standards.

Welcome to the World of Nimbus.

Name: Citra Shipyard
Description:
PT Citra Shipyard Batam is a leading one-stop shipyard in Indonesia, providing comprehensive shipbuilding, repair, and modification solutions since 2006. With two strategically located facilities in Batam — 42 hectares in Kabil and 24 hectares in Kampung Becek — we serve both domestic and international clients across commercial, offshore, and defense sectors.

We specialize in building and servicing a wide range of vessels, including tugboats, barges, tankers, offshore supply vessels, ferries, crew boats, patrol boats, and naval crafts. Our team also provides advanced modification and conversion services, from fuel-efficiency upgrades to offshore and arctic adaptations.

Citra Shipyard is recognized for its commitment to quality, safety, and environmental responsibility, holding ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001 certifications. Each year, we deliver more than 100 newbuild projects and 50 major repair works, showcasing our efficiency and reliability.

Notable projects include the construction of Indonesian Navy patrol boats (PC-40, KAL-28, and Pari-class vessels), offshore patrol vessels for Bakamla, and international collaborations such as LNG transport barges for Nigeria’s energy sector.

With modern facilities, a skilled workforce, and strong track record, we continue to strengthen our reputation as a trusted partner in advancing Indonesia’s and the region’s maritime industry.

Name: Shipyard Staffing
Description:
Shipyard Staffing is a specialty marine staffing firm focused on providing skilled trade personnel to the ship construction and repair industry.

Formerly under Workrise, the Company is now under new (previous) ownership as of April 2022. Shipyard Staffing offers short-term, long-term and permanent placement to a wide array of clients, from Fortune 50 companies to small businesses.

Name: SYM NAVAL
Description:
Sym Naval is a company of naval technical services, naval consultancy and own shipyard for the construction, conversion, maintenance and repair of ships. 

It has facilities in Barcelona, Santo Domingo and Miami. 

It provides dry docking, wet docking and riding squads to assist merchant ships, cruise ships and large ships.
Location: Puerto Vilanova i la Geltrú, Barcelona

Name: TGE Marine Gas Engineering
Description:
THE GAS EXPERTS – Innovations for Greener Shipping
TGE Marine Gas Engineering is the leading liquefied gas systems’ provider, specialising in the design and engineering of cargo handling systems and tanks for any type of liquefied gas carriers, bunker ships and FSRUs.
Furthermore TGE Marine works under EPCS agreements on liquefied fuel gas systems for LNG, NH3 and future fuels.

Over 40 years of experience with more than 250 gas carrier and fuel gas systems contracted

Our Mission
We are the leading provider of clean and efficient gas handling and fuel gas systems for the marine industry. Our motivated and skilled team creates value together with our customers by developing plants of the highest standards, paving the way for a sustainable future.

Our Values
Keeping the Promise.
We are a reliable partner and show high integrity. We take responsibility for all our actions. Honesty, openness and transparency are the key to our strong working relationships.

For Greener Shipping.
We are committed to use nature's resources responsibly. 
It is our goal to enhance vessels with clean and efficient systems to reduce our ecological footprint.

Passion for Innovation.
We develop innovative solutions for our customers and deliver sustainable products of the highest quality. Our passion and experience enables us to discover new ways into the future.

All Aboard.
The greatest asset are the people who work in our crew.
Our collaboration is based on trust, fairness and respect. Diversity is our strength and basis for innovation.

Name: Iskra Shipyard
Description:
Iskra Shipyard is the leading ship repair yard on the eastern coast of the Adriatic sea, specialized in repairs of all types of vessels up to 90 m in LOA, and in new build vessels up to 60 meters LOA. 

Iskra Shipyard offers Repair, Refit, Conversion and New Build Supervision services, as well as complete Technical Management. We refit existing and fabricate new boat systems: propulsion systems, ship systems, steel and aluminium hulls.

The facility is spread on the total area of 110.000 sqm, including 45.000 sqm of workshops and 2.000 sqm in sheds for yachts up to 70 m LOA. The lifting capacities are 900-t yachtlift and 1.500 floating dock. Shiplift area of 10.000 sqm is suitable for up to 13 yacht positions at once. All of our work is performed and supervised according to the highest technical and quality control standards as set out by the BV ISO 9001:2015.

Name: Construcciones A. Maggiolo S.A.
Description:
La empresa Construcciones A. Maggiolo S.A. (CAMSA), fue inicialmente constituida en 1942, por Don Augusto Maggiolo Cavenecia, en la zona de Chucuito en el puerto del Callao. En sus inicios se construían pequeñas embarcaciones para la pesca artesanal, la mayoría de estas con madera. Hacia mediados de los años 50 la empresa experimenta un explosivo crecimiento junto con la pesca industrial peruana. En los años 60 se construyen más de 300 embarcaciones pesqueras de acero en dichas instalaciones.

A lo largo de los años con la flota pesquera en crecimiento, las actividades de CAMSA se orientaron en atender trabajos de mantenimiento de las naves, así como también los trabajos de construcciones, modernización y ampliaciones tanto de eslora y puntal en el sector pesquero. Debido a las crecientes necesidades que surgieron en la sociedad, El Astillero - Varadero A. Maggiolo S.A. incursionó también en el sector metalmecánico. 

Hacia el año 2009, la empresa decide efectuar la construcción de un nuevo astillero en la zona costera conocida como el fundo Oquendo, en un terreno de 48,000 m2 en el Callao. Con este proyecto se consigue ampliar las capacidades actuales de CAMSA, pues se aumentó de manera significativa la capacidad de construcción y reparación de barcos, aumentando su oferta para otros tipos de barcos más pesados y de mayor porte como son los atuneros, poteros y espineleros que acuden a Panamá o Chile para cubrir con sus requerimientos.

Name: HID DREDGERS & MARINE EQUIPMENT
Description:
HID is a professional & innovative dredger producer and scientific researcher. We have total of 6 large dredge factories and over 100 employees to enable large production and efficient productivity. The major breakthrough products we have researched and produced are - Dredging Equipment, Amphibious Multipurpose Dredger (Pioneer product in China), Environmentally Friendly Dredger, Sludge Solidification Equipment, Salt Mining Equipment and more. Many of our products have been protected by patents.

Our company covers an area of nearly 50,000 square meters. We have an R&D center and a total 16 R&D personnel. We have established regularly cooperative relationships with Jiangsu Ship Design & Research Institute, the Chinese Academy of Agricultural Sciences (CAAS), Nanjing Hydraulic Research Institute, Shanghai Ship Design Institute, and more. We own a variety of professional scientific research equipment and an experimental pool for R&D testing in the company, as well as client demonstrations of our products. Our products have been exported to 70+ countries including Russia, Egypt, UAE, Poland, Bangladesh, Malaysia, Maldives, Venezuela, North America, South America, India, Indonesia, Nigeria, and many more. They have enjoyed popularity around the world.

We are committed to innovative efforts to meet customer demand. We sincerely hope to cooperate with customers and merchants to jointly strive for mutual benefit, win-win-win situation and common development, and to create a brilliant future together!

The purpose of creating this company page is to connect with government bidders, dredging companies, consultants, and dredger users, and to meet more customers that may need our help and support. We want to share our company knowledge, experience, and expertise as a useful resource in the dredging field. Together, we can make the world a better place!

#hiddredging #chinadredger #sludgetreatment #environmentalcleaning #maritime #dredging #haohai dredging

Name: Inter Ocean Ship Repairs LLC
Description: Inter Ocean Ship Repairs LLC is a shipbuilding company based out of Workshop No.155, Dubai Maritime City, Dubai, United Arab Emirates.

Name: MURUETA Shipyards
Description:
ASTILLEROS DE MURUETA is a privately owned industrial group with more than 70 years of activity, dedicated to the design and construction of all kind of vessels. 

That enthusiasm remains intact today and is reinforced by the experience of having built more than 200 vessels since then and with the commitment and confidence that only the use of the most advanced technology and the most highly qualified work force can guarantee the achievement of the most efficient and optimum vessel for each owner.

Name: Stockholm Repairyard
Description:
Stockholm Repairyard (Stockholms Reparationsvarv AB) is a privately owned enterprise and was founded in 1992 (formerly GV Varv AB). We repair approximately 50 to 100 vessels every year in our shipyard. 
Our company provides all necessary services for our clients in ship repairing, maintenance works and conversions. We carry out steel works, pipe works, HP-washing, blasting, painting and Inerta ice-epoxi painting, interior works, electrical works, rudder, shafts and propeller works, engine overhauls and renewals. We also send riding squads to other ports if needed. We are fully equipped with docks, cranes and berths. Our dry docks are 180 m x 25 m and 100 m x 16,5 m. Cranes from 35 tons to 7,5 tons. Quay 100 m, depth 7 m. 

Stockholm Repairyard is located in Stockholm, at the east coast of Sweden centered in the Baltic sea and close to Arlanda airport. Stockholm Repairyard is an efficient and convenient alternative for shipping companies sailing in the Baltic sea. 

We work with all kinds of ships, general cargo, tankers, roro-vessels, tugboats, barges and passenger ships. For the government we repair coastguard vessels, transport ferries, navy ships and ice breakers. 

Don’t hesitate to contact us, welcome!

Name: BLUE KALİTE MÜHENDİSLİK VE SÖRVEY HİZMETLERİ
Description:
Genel Bilgi
BLUE NDT Quality and Inspection Inc. was established in Istanbul in 2017 with the aim of being a leader and pioneer in its sector.  Within the scope of TS EN ISO / IEC 17020 standard, it is accredited by TÜRKAK and continues its services as A Type Inspection Organization.

 At BLUE NDT, we exist to ensure that the materials and products we test, audit and approve for our customers are always safe, of good quality, compatible and fit for purpose.  We deliver this through our technical capability, innovative approach and motivated team committed to operational excellence.

 BLUE, which adopts the principle of constantly improving and renewing itself by increasing the variety of control and equipment with new project investments, is taking firm steps towards gaining a global identity by providing innovative, technological and high quality services to its customers operating in the national and international markets with its experienced and expert staff.

 Our services:
 > Non-Destructive Testing;
  - Ultrasonic Inspection
  - Radiographic Examination
  - Magnetic Particle Inspection
  - Liquid Penetrant Inspection
  - Visual Inspection

 > Destructive Testing;
  - Tensile Test
  - Bending Test
  - Impact Notch Test
  - Hardness Test
  - Macroscopic Examination
  - Microscopic Inspection
  - Chemical analysis
  - Corrosion Test
  - Z Quality Test

 > Consulting
  - TS EN ISO/IEC 17020 standard consultancy
  - TS EN 1090 standard consultancy
  - TS EN ISO 3834 standard consultancy

 > Underwater Control Services
  - Inspection of structures and facilities underwater and above water,
  - Detailed research, examination and evaluation,

Name: Hoppe Marine GmbH
Description:
Hoppe is a family owned group of companies with global presence and activities focused and dedicated to the maritime market. Passion for Technology has been the key of success in seven decades of permanent motivation to deliver customer-oriented products and services.

Starting with the business idea to deliver precise instruments and measuring equipment for seagoing vessels Hoppe Bordmesstechnik was founded in 1949 by the German engineer Hans Hugo Karl Hoppe. After 35 years characterized by many technical inventions and patents for on board measuring systems his colleague Jürgen Haas took over the company. Four years later Helmut Rohde joined the company and finally acquired the remaining shares in 1997.

Besides many years of organic growth, the Rohde family invested in further maritime markets to follow the globalization of the shipbuilding business. In 1997, Hoppe Korea was established, followed by Hoppe China in 2010, and Hoppe Singapore in 2017. In parallel, strategic investments where taken with the acquisitions of Meramont Automatyka (Poland), MAIHAK Marine (Germany), Flume Stabilization (USA) and INTERING ship stabilization systems (Germany). Combined with many new inventions and patents the fully independent family owned company has established a leading position in several maritime business areas.

The Passion for Technology is still unbroken and remains dedicated to quality, accuracy and reliability. In-house engineers design all Hoppe products in Germany with the full technical control over the portfolio. For shipyards, ship owners, ship managers, ship operators and ship designers Hoppe is well known in the market as reliable long-term partner that combines decades of engineering know how, sustainable on board experiences with continuous development of new technologies and innovations. Based on the strategic product- and service-focus approach Hoppe is a key player also in the digitalization process of the marine industry.

Our team of 17 skilled engineers and naval architects brings extensive knowledge and experience to every project. We deliver reliable, customized solutions tailored to each client’s unique needs and are equipped to handle time-sensitive challenges.

Why Choose VICUSdt?

+CFD Expertise: We excel in CFD simulations to optimize ship hydrodynamics and propulsion.

+Proven Track Record: With a history of 1,500+ global projects, we are trusted for delivering innovative, high-performance engineering solutions.

+Client-Focused Solutions: We collaborate closely with clients to address specific challenges, enhancing vessel efficiency, reducing costs, and improving performance.

Trust us to provide the expertise and innovation your vessels need to succeed in the demanding marine and offshore industries.

Name: Vestdavit
Description:
Vestdavit designs, supplies and supports tailor-made solutions for launching and recovering manned and unmanned craft in difficult conditions at sea. Our range of handling systems and davits are the first choice of navies, coastguards, seismic survey operators, pilot authorities and offshore operators who need to launch and recover craft while their vessels are at sea. 

Since 1982 Bergen-based Vestdavit has supplied over 2,200 davits and stern launch systems. We have proved ourselves over more than 30 years use in the North Sea and other harsh environments around the world. Self-tensioning and shock absorbing systems ensure crew safety and widen the operational window for users. 

Vestdavit’s key focus is on operational effectiveness, safety and the reliability of its equipment. Vestdavit is a team of committed people with different backgrounds and experience, all of whom are passionate about safe boat handling. When we work together with a client, we provide our expertise right through the product development process and follow that with a lifetime service commitment.

Gemi ve denizcilik kulübünün misyonu; öğrencileri sektör hakkında bilgilendirmek, bu sayede sektörle kaynaştırmak, akademik anlamda çalışmalar yapmak, sosyal sorumluluk projeleri ile bilinç oluşturmak ve bunların hepsini yaparken sosyalleşmeye önem vermektir.

Gemi ve Denizcilik kulübünün vizyonu; her zaman çağın ve bilimin peşinde sürekli üreten, ürettikçe paylaşan; öğrenmeyi, bilinç oluşturmayı, yalnızca bir öğrenci kulübü olmakla yetinmeyerek birlik olmayı ve fark yaratmayı kendine görev bilmektir.

Gemi ve Denizcilik kulübü; gerçekleştirdiği teknik gezilerle, akademik faaliyet ve sunumlarla, çeşitli ulusal yarışma ve bilim fuarlarında yer almasıyla Bursa Teknik Üniversitesi'nin prestijini arttırmaktadır.
