Name: Tristian Yachts
Description:
Only for Individualists
You need a premium sports yacht with a superior driving performance, stylish appearance and genuine comfort to enjoy fun on the water at its best. Above all your yacht must be fully custom-built and hand-crafted in the Netherlands to meet your bespoke wishes, special demands and quirky ideas. In other words… forget mainstream.

Our domain
Tristian Yachts builds custom premium yachts. With an eye for detail, a meticulous finish and high-quality Dutch construction quality, we always fulfil owners’ individual demands. The result is a unique and fully personalised yacht.

Perfectly balanced
To ensure owners the finest possible yachting experience we have dedicated enormous thought and energy into finding the perfect balance of speed, performance and comfort. This includes the steering position, which gives the helmsman a sense of complete control. Space strongly impacts your sense of comfort onboard, which is why the interior is more spacious than on other yachts in this category.

Fast and sustainable aluminium
Placing clients centre-stage in our business model means structuring our organisation around them and being as flexible as possible. This can only be achieved by a custom yard.

We prefer to build in aluminium in order to make our yachts more sustainable and lightweight. Aluminium also allows us to adapt the size and design to the individual wishes of the client. It won’t rust and retains its value exceptionally well.

Description:
More than any other single factor, it is our flexibility that keeps us competitive. No matter what your problem is, we will respond quickly with the people and equipment to take care of it.  It’s  our culture of rapid response that is going to get your vessel repaired fast.

We are flexible in our approach and innovative in our solutions.  On any given day of the year we may be working on inland tugs or barges, offshore ATB units, offshore construction / dive / seismic vessels, ocean ships, dredges, pumps, or winches.  Our network of vendors allows us to rapidly complete cleaning, gas freeing, disposal and repairs of any nature on any type of vessel.  Our team is ready to dispatch around the clock crews, of a few to scores, in a matter of hours or days as required.  With multiple locations, we can pool resources quickly to solve your problem.

 
Bludworth Marine directly services the Houston, Galveston, Orange and Texas Golden Triangle area daily and we have dispatched project management and work teams all along the Texas coast and as far away as Florida, NewYork, Maine, Nova Scotia, Central and South America.

Name: ATLANTICEAGLE SHIPBUILDING, LDA
Description:
More than 70 years serving Naval Industry

Mondego Shipyard (ENM) was found in September 1944.
Shipyard is located in Figueira da Foz, near the entrance of  Mondego river and Commercial Port.
In 1944 the shipyard had two slipways and workshops for wooden shipbuilding. Three years later was built the first fishing trawler, with 71.43 meters length.
Since then began a phase of expansion of shipyards, with the construction of two slipways for vessels up to 100 meters and a slope for the repair of ships.
In the '50s, the ENM signed up as the largest national builder of fishing boats, having built a number of coastal trawlers of 25.50 m, the biggest trawler with 51.0 m and also two large angling codfish vessels of 66.50 m.
Also during this decade was built the first ship for the Portuguese Navy - a patrol vessel with 52.90 m long, 3 Merchant Ships destined for a Dutch shipowner and 2 for Shell Oil.

Name: Advanced Integrated Technologies (AIT)
Description:
Advanced Integrated Technologies (AIT) is a Woman Owned Small Business. Although recently established, the management team has many years of experience in shipboard maintenance and modernization.  The company's leadership is anchored by its founder Mr. Carl Spraberry who is well known in the industry through the advocacy organization he co-founded in 2002, the American Maritime Modernization Association. His background in maritime maintenance spans 30 years of active duty military and civilian positions managing shipboard repair and alterations. 

Located conveniently in the Norfolk Industrial Park at 2427 Ingleside Road in Norfolk; AIT is centered around the major military bases and shipyards. With over 30,000 square feet of offices and warehouse, there are ample facilities to accomplish any industrial requirement.

Procedures and processes are ISO 9001-2000 compliant, and our quality standards are defined by our customers' input and complete satisfaction. Additionally, AIT's Quality Assurance program has recently been approved by VSRA.
We assemble the right team of experienced craftsmen for your job with qualified technicians capable of performing cross trade work and years of experience in ship repair. This model maximizes labor efficiency, while providing an excellent value for your money. Our production capabilities support a full spectrum of repair, overhaul, alteration and maintenance for virtually every shipboard system. Our management team understands the complex requirements of government contract management and coupled with our quality assurance processes, safety and environmental adherence all projects exceed the most stringent of government regulations. Excellent service, competitive pricing and meticulous attention to detail are what makes AIT a leader in the industry.

Name: Hanwha Ocean Polska
Description:
Założona w 1973 roku firma Hanwha Ocean, wcześniej znana jako Daewoo Shipbuilding and Marine Engineering (DSME), w ciągu ostatniego pół wieku stała się światowym liderem w dziedzinie budowy statków i inżynierii morskiej. Zlokalizowana na wyspie Geoje w południowokoreańskim regionie Gyeongsangnam-do, nasza firma osiągnęła status światowej klasy dzięki stałemu rozwojowi zaawansowanych technologii i innowacyjności. Nasza dedykacja do ciągłego rozwoju konsekwentnie otwiera nowe możliwości biznesowe i jest widoczne w naszej zdolności do konstruowania różnorodnych okrętów i statków, w tym statków komercyjnych, platform morskich i okrętów wojennych, w tym okrętów podwodnych.

Dzięki ponad 40-letniemu doświadczeniu, Hanwha Ocean wyróżnia się bogatą historią i doświadczeniem w budowie okrętów podwodnych. Nasze zaangażowanie w koreański program okrętów podwodnych (KSS) rozpoczęło się od budowy okrętów podwodnych KSS-I dla koreańskiej marynarki wojennej w 1983 roku. Od tego czasu odegraliśmy kluczową rolę w projektach KSS-II i KSS-III, a także w licznych projektach remontów i modernizacji okrętów podwodnych. Jako wyznaczony wykonawca nowej generacji 3600-tonowych okrętów podwodnych KSS-III dla Koreańskiej Marynarki Wojennej, stale demonstrujemy naszą zdolność do niezależnego projektowania i konstruowania okrętów podwodnych zgodnie z najwyższymi standardami.

Name: Vinç-Ser & 101 Shipyard
Description:
Shipyard 101, denizcilik ve ağır sanayi sektörlerinde vinç sistemleri ve mekanik çözümler alanında uzmanlaşmış, mühendislik odaklı bir hizmet firmasıdır. Tersane vinçleri, gemi vinçleri ve mobil vinçler başta olmak üzere; hidrolik, pnömatik ve mekanik sistemlerin bakım, onarım, revizyon ve modernizasyon süreçlerinde uçtan uca çözümler sunar.

Sahip olduğumuz teknik bilgi, saha tecrübesi ve disiplinli çalışma anlayışıyla; operasyonel güvenliği artıran, arıza sürelerini minimize eden ve ekipman ömrünü uzatan uygulamalar geliştiriyoruz. Her projeye özel analiz yaklaşımımız sayesinde, ağır iş koşullarında maksimum performans ve sürdürülebilirlik sağlıyoruz.

Shipyard 101, kalite, güvenlik ve mühendislik standartlarından ödün vermeden; müşterilerine hızlı, doğru ve kalıcı çözümler sunmayı ilke edinmiştir. Ağır işler için güçlü mühendislik anlayışıyla, deniz endüstrisinin güvenilir çözüm ortağı olmayı sürdürmektedir.

Name: NAVIS DESIGN & ENGINEERING
Description:
Navis Design and Engineering is established by three naval architects and marine engineers. The owners are in the industry since 1997. All of the partners started working in one of the leading design companies of Turkey after the graduation and over the last 10 years worked as the design group managers of the company. 

We have been into nearly all kind of design and shipbuilding business. Starting with the market boom of Oil/Chemical Tankers, we started building for European owners such as Unifleet from Netherlands, Herning from Denmark, Petrogas from Spain and such companies from Sweden, Germany, France and others. In this market boom we worked in the design of  more than 150 ships, mostly chemical Tankers, but also container vessels, general cargo vessels, tugs, navy supply vessels, landing crafts and passenger boats from concept to delivery documents. 

Beyond these, we have done project management for new building vessels, procurement jobs for the shipyards and expertizes for the banks, conversion projects.

As Navis Design and Engineering, we're giving consultancy services to shipyards for their newbuildings, preparing concept designs and bid packages for shipowners and shipyards for new quotations (from tankers to general cargos, barges, pontoons, research vessels, patrol vessels etc), all kind of engineering calculations varying from intact/damaged stability to launching calculations, inclining tests, delivery manuals of the ships as well as procurement (workshop drawings, nestings, 3D pipe modelling, isometric pipe modelling, material lists, project management and cost estimation).

Name: Ventura
Description:
Com 41 anos de mercado, o Estaleiro Ventura é líder no segmento de embarcações de 18 a 55 pés.

Foi a marca que inspirou a reformulação estética no mercado nacional de lanchas, tornando-se uma das mais bem conceituadas marcas de embarcações já produzidas no Brasil.

Com mais de 15.000 unidades vendidas, o estaleiro mantém sua excelência na produção de embarcações de 18 a 55 pés.

Com fábricas localizadas no Polo Industrial de Manaus/AM e em Capitólio/MG, a Ventura também conta com sede comercial em São Paulo/SP, totalizando mais de 51.000 m² de área construída, além de revendas espalhadas por todo o território nacional.

Nessas unidades, uma equipe de profissionais em sintonia com o que há de mais moderno no mundo produz não apenas barcos, mas também quadriciclos, UTVs, motos e motos aquáticas elétricas, todos reconhecidos por sua inovação, tecnologia, requinte e design inconfundíveis.

Em 2012, a Ventura lançou a V410 Premium. Projetado pela Yamaha Motors Company, esse barco é fabricado na Europa, na Ásia e, agora, no Brasil, pela Ventura Marine.

A parceria entre Yamaha e Ventura inclui visitas periódicas da equipe de engenharia japonesa para acompanhar todo o processo de produção dos barcos.

Para fabricar a V410 Premium, a Ventura construiu uma nova fábrica com 5.000 metros quadrados, desenvolvida de acordo com as diretrizes da Yamaha, assegurando o padrão de qualidade japonês.

Name: Bekkers Yachts
Description:
Bekkers Yachts AZUR 45HT is designed by superyacht award winning René van der Velden and built by a dedicated team with decades of experience within the superyacht industry. The result: a non-concession weekender with the superyacht feel and detailing.

Built for very special owners that want to be exclusive, outstanding and want to enjoy their time on the water with family and friends. This kind of exclusivity and drive for delivering the highest quality is only possible if you fully focus on a small amount of projects and give your heart and soul and listen to the clients wishes. Within the range of yachts 40 feet up to 60 feet this philosophy almost doesn’t exist. Bekkers yachts wants to do things different. No mass production, no fiberglass hull, no restrictions. We want to introduce the exclusiveness, aim for perfection, clients wishes and non-concessions from the superyacht industry within the aluminum dayboat & weekender market. For those who not only loves yachts and water but also the art and craftsmanship of building a yacht and creating something special and be different every time you enter a port. That’s why we say a Bekkers Yacht is ‘’Built for the exceptional’’.

Name: Slippurinn DNG
Description:
Slippurinn Akureyri is a premier Icelandic shipyard comprising four key divisions. The company’s headquarters are in Akureyri, but it also has a production facility/office in southern Iceland and a sales office in Norway.

The Ship Service Division specializes in elevating structures and ship maintenance, handling tasks like steelwork, machine repairs, carpentry, sand/water blasting, and painting. The company provides extensive services to the fishing industry, including vessel design, renovation, and maintenance. It also features a well-stocked parts and tool store.

The Aquaculture Division focuses on various land-based projects, expanding Slippurinn Akureyri’s expertise beyond maritime services.

The DNG Jigging Reels Division produces advanced jigging reels, further diversifying the company’s portfolio within the fishing industry. When it comes to Jigging Reels, DNG is an industry veteran and a pioneer of one of the most advanced reels on the market.

The DNG Processing Solutions Division designs and manufactures fish processing equipment under the DNG brand, delivering a full range of products and projects for land—and sea-based fish processing.

Name: Piikkio Works Oy
Description: Piikkio Works Oy is a company 100 % owned by Meyer Turku Oy. Focusing in the manufacture of modular cabins and bathroom units, we supply cabin and bathroom modules for cruise ships built at the Meyer Turku shipyard. Our head office is located in Piikkiö, Kaarina, Finland, where we employ approximately 140 employees.

Name: STI Engineering BV
Description:
We are STI. A team of inspired people who understand the art of engineering and love to go the extra mile for their customers. We give the best advice, unburden our customers and always strive to be the best in the work we do.

PIPING & SYSTEMS:
STI designs, routes and draws piping systems for renowned Mega Yacht Builders, commercial shipping industry and for process industry. Examples are complete engine room lay outs, complete piping-, ducting- and cable tray lay-outs for hull and superstructure of ships and yachts as well as of piping systems for process installations. STI Engineering offers the required specialist’s skills and know how for:
• System Schematics (e.g. Lloyd’s)
• HVAC installations

An efficient and cost-saving design starts with skilled and well trained engineers combined with state of the art CAD software. STI offers both of these. We cover the complete spectrum of Naval, Commercial, Special & Offshore, Superyacht and Cruise Ship refits, rebuilds and new builds.

Name: H ALDHAEN BOATS WLL
Description: H ALDHAEN BOATS is one of the foremost pioneers for marine products industry in the GCC. The company is into building state-of-the-art commercial, sports-fishing, pleasure and special-purpose military / patrol boats and crafts to cater to the wide range of boat lovers and users all over the globe. We build on a Bahraini family’s longstanding history of more than 38 years in the marine industry, supplying to boat owners and operators in the Gulf regions and across the world.

Name: Brunswick Portugal
Description:
Brunswick Portugal is a recreational boat builder, that belongs to Brunswick Corporation, based out of Vila Nova de Cerveira, Portugal. 
Next Never Rests!

Name: ISOICO
Description:
Iran shipbuilding and offshore industries complex has been located in 37 kilometers west of Bandar-Abbas ,It has been constructed with the purpose of designing, construction and repair of various types of vessels and offshore structures.

ISOICO has produced Iran's first ocean liner ship named "Iran-Arak". It was launched in Hormozgan southern city port in 2009. It weighs over 7000 tons and is able to carry over 30,000 tons of cargo or 2,200 TEU.[3] Iran-Arak can accelerate to 32 knots (59.3 km/h) and is able to sail 25 days non-stop.[4][5] The vessel, which has cost $50 million to construct, is 185 meters (607 ft) long, 30 meters (98.4 ft) wide, has 10 meters (32.8 ft) of draft and uses more than 16.7 MW to reach 21.5 knots (39.8 km/h).[3]
"Iran-Shahr-e Kord" is identical to "Iran-Arak" and both ships are produced by ISOICO for Iran Shipping Lines.[6][7] On Sept 11, 2011 Iran launched a third ship named "Iran-Kashan".

Name: MODX Catamarans
Description:
Enter in a new era of yachting with the MODX 70, the first 100% renewable energies cruising catamaran, packed with innovations and technologies. 
This new 70' cruising catamaran is the first vessel combining two complementary and innovative propulsion systems: an automated, inflatable wings on retractable masts system and an electric propulsion system fitted with variable pitch propellers for hydrogeneration.
The MODX series leverages 10 years of experience in technology development and implementation in the field of renewable energies, sustainability, and performances in sailing.
 
Contribute to a sustainable new yachting experience achieving full autonomy and zero CO2 emissions in both coastal and offshore cruising.
 
 
Our innovative and committed business model is strongly rooted in the notion of "business for good", from the design, the production and all the way to the marketing models. The MODX70 will hit the market at the Cannes boat show (Sept 2022) in three different owner configurations. Aligned with its core values, the MODX 70 will allow the development of a new concept of ‘eco-tourism’ charter, providing the platform for a responsible yachting experience while actively contributing to ocean preservation programs.
 
MODX, Winner of the 2022 i-Nov7 competition - Sustainable and intelligent mobility.
 
Learn more on the MODX70 on modx-catamarans.com.

Name: Chantier de l'Arsenal
Description:
Chantier de l'Arsenal - Designer & builder of new-generation catamarans

Based in La Rochelle, Chantier de l'Arsenal designs and builds hybrid-powered catamarans for day charter, passenger shipping and private cruises. Thanks to its unique One Shape process, the company integrates all the know-how required to build its vessels: design, engineering, cutting, infusion, assembly, fitting out and finishing.

We work closely with shipowners, captains and operators to design boats that are seaworthy, economical, comfortable and adapted to each sailing program. Our boats are custom-built, with a focus on responsible innovation and local production.

 A unique in-house production facility: the Atelier One Shape, to be inaugurated in 2024, comprises 2,500 m² of production space and custom-built equipment for complete control of all construction stages.

 Eco-responsible commitment: mixed propulsion, recycled materials, noise reduction and energy optimization.

 Our on-board brands:
* DAY 1 Catamarans: a fleet of maxi catamarans for tourist operations in the Mediterranean, French overseas territories and Europe.
* Yacht Concept: our integrated naval design office.

Located in La Rochelle, at the heart of the Atlantic coast's nautical ecosystem.

Name: Transbulk International Shipping LLC
Description:
Transbulk built up a network of highly professional shipping agents network worldwide and enjoys excellent working relations with agents from India, Singapore, Thailand, Vietnam, China, Italy, and Turkey.

Transbulk is an elite ship operator in the global and middle east Dry-bulk market. We are moving millions of tons of Dry-bulk cargo across the globe for several leading trading and manufacturing groups.

Transbulk has built up an excellent reputation among leading ship owners in the middle east, moving huge quantities of bulk cargoes worldwide, and has built a good rapport with leading ship owners and Commodity traders worldwide. Also, Transbulk is regularly chartering ships from Leading Owners World Wide.

Transbulk has managed to survive the 2009 crash of the dry-bulk market, through a variety of risk management strategies and policies the company strictly followed. Transbulk has experienced and dedicated operations and posts fixture/pre fixture team.

We remained a strong conduit in pursuing overall expansion within the Arab region especially UAE.

Name: Croatian Register of Shipping
Description:
CRS is independent, non-profit public institution oriented towards common welfare.  Together with respectable shipowners, CRS has been involved in shipping and shipbuilding industry since 1949. The organisational knowledge has been passed on to over 80 mechanical engineers, naval architects, scientists, and structural and material specialists who are at clients’ disposal today.
CRS is a member of International Association of Classification Societies (IACS), a top leading group of classification societies which cover 90% of the world's cargo carrying tonnage. It has been granted authorisation for different aspects of statutory certification such as surveys, approvals and certification services, by all the most important Flag State administrations.

Name: Germania Shipyard Agency GmbH
Description: Established in 1996 in Hamburg Germania Shipyard Agency represents at the moment over 25 of the leading shiprepair and newbuilding Shipyards as well as several experienced afloat workshops all around the World

Name: Propulsion Controls Engineering (PCE)
Description:
PCE boasts a wealth of experience in successfully executing major system overhauls across numerous ports throughout the world on virtually every class of ship currently in operation. Our specialization in ship repair, conversion, and modernization encompasses a comprehensive range of services, including the repair of rotating machinery and pumps, electric motor services (including motor rewinding) and generator repairs, both small and large diesel engine maintenance, governance and control systems upkeep, hydraulic system servicing, and proficient pipe and structural welding. Additionally, our offerings extend to fabrication, valve repair, a full-service parts counter, and the repair of diesel fuel injection equipment. 

Services:
• Electric Motor Repair
• Diesel Repair
• Control Systems
• Boiler Accessories
• Evaporators, Heat Exchangers, Coolers, Condensers
• Deck Equipment/Hydraulics
• Structural System Fabrication, Installation & Repair
• Piping System Fabrication, Installation & Repair
• Rotating Machinery & Pumps
• Valves & Valve Operators
• Machine Shop

Versatile, reliable and able to provide rapid response. PCE has been servicing the maritime market (U.S. Navy, government, commercial and private sector) offering turnkey solutions for nearly 50 years. Established in San Diego, CA, PCE has continued to grow both in size and capability -  opening offices in Bremerton, WA, Everett, WA and Oahu, HI. We take great pride in responding promptly with on-site teams of experienced technicians and skilled tradesmen. We routinely travel throughout the United States and around the world providing repair and troubleshooting services.

PCE Differentiators
•	+40 years of Naval & Commercial experience
•	100% Customer Satisfaction Guarantee 
•	Versatile, Reliable and Rapid Response
•	Lowest warranty return rate in the industry 
•	Uphold high safety performance
•	Consistently meet and exceed industry standards of environmental stewardship

Name: Meercat Boats
Description:
Meercat Boats design and build high-quality CONVENTIONAL and ROAD TRANSPORTABLE workboats.

Meercat Boats' road-transportable version, with its unique sectional design, enables each hull to be easily transported to remote and inland regions and reconnected to form a single-hulled vessel with a solid, strong working deck. They are fully operational within one hour of launching.

- Mono, twin and triple hulled units up to 8.7 metres wide
- High quality of manufacture - 8mm Lloyds Grade A steel
- Road transportable up to 4.8 metres wide (each hull)
- Fast mob/demob - one hour from truck to operational
- Shallow draft (0.9m depth whilst carrying a 20 tonne load)
- Extremely manoeuvrable (turning in own length even at low speeds)
- Solid, strong, stable working platform
- Choice of crane, engine and overall specification
- Coding to minimum of UK MCA Workboat Code of Practice

The multi-role vessels are suited to a range of operations, including aquaculture, civil engineering, port servicing, wind farm support and oil spill response. 

Meercat Boats are designed and built in Hythe, near Southampton, UK. Meercat Boats' large, well-equipped facilities include two 15-ton gantry cranes, a 14m x 4m plasma cutting table, an aluminium welding bay, water trial facilities, 1000 ton ship lift, 40 ton boat hoist and a design studio; enabling all aspects of the build and design process to be handled in-house and on-site.

Meercat Boats offers assistance with financing, contract and part-exchange, so don't delay in discovering how these vessels can enhance your fleet and help your business to grow.

Name: Reborn Yachts
Description: Established and located in The Netherlands, Reborn Yachts designs and builds tailor-made boats of high-end quality. Reborn is driven by a team of experienced boat builders who define themselves by using only the best materials, the latest technical features and the endless possibilities in design.

Name: GFS - Green Foiling Spain
Description:
Green Foiling Spain (GFS) is an innovative student-led initiative comprising over 30 dedicated team members from 5 different schools within the Universidad Politécnica de Madrid (UPM). The team is pioneering a revolutionary boat concept, the first of its kind in Spain, which integrates hydrofoils with an automated flight control system, all powered by a hydrogen fuel cell.

The primary mission of GFS is to harness, nurture, and amplify the unique skills and talents of each team member. Through collaborative efforts, the team not only gains hands-on experience but also hone their problem-solving and teamwork abilities. As they design and construct this state-of-the-art vessel, they are also championing research, fostering innovation, and preparing the next generation to tackle the challenges of the future with confidence and expertise

Name: Team Italia Marine S.r.l. - Part of Rolls Royce
Description:
Team Italia Marine delivers integrated Navigation, Steering, Communication & Security Systems for Mega Yachts. 
Highly innovative and competitive companies all around the world have been developing and distributing the technologies used in the shipbuilding sector today. Their products are standalone devices dedicated to navigation, telecommunication, safety or data transmission. 
The challenge that TEAM Italia Marine has been faced with every day for twenty years is optimizing the functional integration of these single devices and making them simple to use at sea.

TEAM Italia Marine’s approach to this problem is to offer an integrated system solution called I-Bridge, which provides for ease of use, speed of response, and more safety at sea. TEAM Italia Marine focuses not only on the technical aspects of integration, but also on the ergonomics and the look that makes their consoles unique and exclusive, but at the same time complying with safety at sea requirements. 
The I-Bridge integrated solution offers TEAM Italia Marine’s clients a simple yet sophisticated product that combines both state-of the-art technical and electronic know-how.

Moreover, TEAM Italia has created an innovative solution called I-Chart.
I-Chart has  been developed with   the   idea  of creating a professional  tool with  a user-friendly interface     for      Owners      and       a      technical nautical-requirements system for Captains. This has been  achieved  by   combining  the   cruising experience of the best Captains in the industry with TEAM Italia Marine's technical and  electronic know-how in order  to create a safe, reliable, user-friendly system which is  also  ergonomic and  elegantly designed. Additionally,  I-Chart includes   an  infotainment section  and  internet  access.

For more information info@team-italia.it

Name: Faroboats
Description:
The World’s First Fully Self-Sustainable 
Solution for Leisure Boating.

The Faro5 Solar Set is the first fully autonomous, 100% sustainable boating solution that combines the unique elegance of the Faro5 Runabout with a custom designed, Solar Charging Dock, complete with integrated raising winch.

The outstanding properties of the rare Cryptomeria wood enveloping its deck are but one example of how sophistication, elegance and premium materials can still embrace the planet.

We are a Portuguese small company that designs and produces sustainable solutions for exploration and leisure boating. Our boats and docks are designed by Portuguese naval designers, built in several European locations, and sold everywhere in the World. And we all share a passion for the sea, or we would not be Portuguese.

Name: Anvera Yacht
Description:
We have had a passion for the sea for many years and we know what it means to be changed by an experience. We wanted to project our experiences into the future and do something that nobody had ever done before. We have created the Anvera style to let you discover the sea the way you like it. Our boats are designed to give you something different. Something that allows you to have everything you want: they are beautiful and functional, fast and efficient. With your Anvera boat you have the freedom to enjoy your own private beach in the middle of the sea.

LG Srl was founded in 2002 and builds on the experiences born from years of work in leading companies in the sector and on the study of extreme technologies in sports competitions. Then Luca Ferrari, Giancarlo Galeone and Gilberto Grassi decided to pool their own experiences to create something innovative. Thus, Anvera was born, from love for the sea and lots of knowledge.
For us Made in Italy is not just a label, but a real method, the Italian know-how that emerges in every detail: in our boats’ lines, in shaping the materials and in the desire to go a bit further every day. For this reason, the entire production process is internal to our company: from the design to the choice of fabrics, up to the carbon fibre manufacture process.

Experience is necessary to take advantage of all the features of carbon fiber, especially if it is a strategic component of design and production. Since the establishment of our first racing catamaran in 1991 we have come a long way, investing in moulding equipment and in training of our teams: we do manufacture our own carbon fiber ourselves.

Name: GYHİB - Gemi Yat ve Hizmetleri İhracatçıları Birliği
Description:
Gemi Yat ve Hizmetleri İhracatçıları Birliği, Türkiye İhracatçılar Meclisi ve İstanbul İhracatçı Birlikleri Genel Sekreterliği çatısı altında faaliyet göstermektedir.

29 Nisan 2010 tarihinde Gemi ve Yat İhracatçıları Birliği olarak faaliyet göstermeye başlayan Birliğin unvanı, 25 Ocak 2018 tarihinde yürürlüğe giren 2007/10 sayılı Tebliğ ile  "Gemi Yat ve Hizmetleri İhracatçıları Birliği" olarak değişmiştir.

Türkiye'de, gemi ve yat inşası ile denizcilik yan sanayi ürünlerini  iştigal sahasında bulunduran tek ihracatçı birliği olan GYHİB, 1300'ün üzerinde ihracatçı üye firması ile Türkiye'nin gemi ve yat sektörlerinde uluslararası bilinirliğini artırmak, ihracatçı firmaların devlet desteklerinden faydalanmalarını sağlamak, üye firmalarına uluslararası bağlantılar sağlamak, ihracatın önündeki engellerin kaldırılmasını sağlamak amacıyla birçok faaliyet gerçekleştirmektedir.

 - Reduce risks

To achieve these goals we work with a team of shipbuilding professionals. They know the processes and understand the challenges faced within the shipbuilding industry. Shipbuilder Sense is an artificial intelligence tool to migrate your existing documents into an intelligent knowledge network.

Please feel free to contact us: https://shipbuilder.nl/about-shipbuilder/

Name: Antwerp Underwater Solutions
Description: We know there is more to life than planes, trains and automobiles. We like to consider ourselves as a no-nonsens company. If you have a vessel we keep it sailing. Simple as that. We are there when you need us. Underwater and with solutions.

Name: Adaptive Marine Solutions
Description:
Adaptive Marine Solutions Inc. is built on a simple belief; that any problem can be solved and any project made successful through a deep understanding of the client needs, a willingness to adapt and innovate to meet those needs. 
    Be it a design project, support to a new build, a repair project, or anything between, this proven method allows us to create an adaptive marine solution for every client project.

Name: ODC Marine
Description:
ODC Marine is a French-owned shipyard specializing in the design and construction of aluminum passenger vessels and workboats (10 to 35 meters). Established in 2006 in Dalian, China, the company has delivered more than 80 units across five continents for public authorities, transportation operators, maritime agencies, and private shipowners.

The shipyard is recognized for its innovative and sustainable marine solutions, including hybrid and electric propulsion systems designed to meet the growing demand for efficient, reliable, and environmentally responsible maritime transport.

Core expertise:
• Passenger vessels and sightseeing boats
• Workboats and service units
• Hybrid and electric propulsion systems
• Range of aluminum vessels from 10 to 35 meters
• Turnkey project delivery, commissioning, and long-term after-sales support

With an international team of 70 professionals, ODC Marine has built a strong reputation based on technical innovation, operational reliability, construction efficiency, and high-quality aluminum shipbuilding.

The company’s mission is to design and build vessels that are efficient, durable, and future-ready, delivering long-term value to operators and communities worldwide.

Name: DIMS 2024
Description:
Dive into the world of maritime excellence at the DOSTAS International Maritime Seminar 2024 (DIMS 2024), set to unfold its sails on August 16-17, 2024, in the vibrant city of Cochin, India. Emerging as the fourth installment after the resounding success of DIMS 2022, this event pledges to be a pinnacle in India's maritime calendar, embodying unparalleled depth and breadth in both exhibition and discourse.

Under the guiding beacon of the theme, “Navigating the future of Indian Maritime Industry,” DIMS 2024 aspires to chart a course towards innovation, sustainability, and prosperity within the maritime landscape of India. Since its maiden voyage in 2018, DIMS has remained steadfast in its commitment to convene maritime aficionados from across the globe, fostering a dynamic arena for idea exchange, networking, and consensus-building on issues vital to the evolution of India's maritime sector.

Embark on this transformative journey alongside over 500 distinguished attendees, 40 esteemed speakers, and a diverse array of exhibitors, including policymakers, industry titans, and visionary trailblazers. Whether you seek to share your insights, explore new horizons, or forge invaluable connections, DIMS 2024 beckons you to join hands in shaping the future of India’s maritime realm. Welcome aboard to DIMS 2024 – where excellence meets the horizon!

 August 16-17. 2024
   Le Méridien Kochi

For more information visit 
 https://www.dims-dostas.org/ 
 convenor-dims24@outlook.com

Name: Remontowa Electrical Solutions Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Remontowa Electrical Solutions Sp. z o. o. is a Poland based major supplier of technical solutions related to ship’s electricity and automation. On daily basis we cooperate with world’s biggest Ship Owners as field electro-service support.

Our global service is available 24/7 to perform any required repairs at sea or during a short port stays. All of our service workers are approved for fitting electrical equipment onboard and are familiar with safety regulations and quality standards. After years of practise we can state that there is no problem that cannot be solved. 

What do we offer?
- Complex “turnkey” projects related not only to electrical solutions, but also to steel constructions, piping works, furnishings, etc.
- New or modernization of SWITCHBOARDS – Main, Emergency, Auxiliary, Lighting (from prototype arrangements to installation and commissioning)
- New or modernization of CONSOLES – Bridge, Machinery Control Room (from prototype arrangements to installation and commissioning)
- New or modernization of SYSTEMS – Control, Monitoring, Navigation (from prototype arrangements to installation and commissioning)
- Global service 24/7 enable to perform any required repairs and new/modernized equipment installation at sea
- Repair plan elaboration / repair scheduling
- Self tests, equipment tests, audits, diagnostics, verification of actual devices functionality
- EX installations
- High Voltage installations
- Hull electrical equipment alternation
- Custom galley furniture production

Name: FIM - Fabbrica Italiana Motoscafi
Description:
Attraverso l’esperienza di professionisti italiani, realizziamo yacht unici ed esclusivi, che rispecchiano le caratteristiche di maggior pregio del mondo nautico, in una sintesi di lusso e dinamismo.
Seguiamo ogni fase di lavorazione: dal progetto iniziale alla costruzione, dalla customizzazione all’allestimento, unendo tecnologia, flessibilità, passione e attenzione verso il cliente.  
Orgogliosi delle nostre radici italiane, con la nostra attività abbracciamo tutta l’Europa, cercando di diffondere gli standard di qualità e bellezza tipici del Made in Italy e ammirati in tutto il mondo.

Le nostre imbarcazioni nascono dalla collaborazione tra professionisti specialisti del settore.
Corrado Piccinelli e Manuela Barcella operano da anni al servizio della nautica per i maggiori brand italiani del settore.
Sfruttando l’esperienza raccolta, hanno deciso ora di dare concretezza al sogno di realizzare la propria linea di imbarcazioni.
Paolo Ferragni contribuisce al progetto in qualità di direttore tecnico: unendo ingegneria, architettura e design, ogni sua creazione è una sintesi di eleganza e funzionalità.

Name: BSY Engineering
Description:
Welcome to BS Engineering, a dynamic offshore and marine engineering firm founded in September 2023. With a passion for innovation and a commitment to excellence, we specialize in detail engineering and ship repair engineering, making us a trusted partner in the maritime industry additionally working on R&D design concepts.

Our Expertise:

At BSY Engineering, we pride ourselves on our core strengths in structural, piping, electrical, HVAC, mechanical, accommodation and naval calculations. Our dedicated team of 20 highly skilled professionals brings a wealth of experience and knowledge to every project, ensuring that we deliver exceptional solutions tailored to your unique needs.

Description: ULJANIK Group is a modern, efficient, production-business group ready to respond in the shortest time possible and with the best of quality to all the demands of the world shipbuilding market. Name: HOL Ship Service AS
Description:
HOL Ship Service act as owners’ partner and will support your fleet to deliver according to best practice. 

We can assist owners’ to plan activities in a cost and time efficient way. All planned activities will be implemented and monitored to receive the best service results with regards to reducing time for service and the need of spear parts.

- New building project

Naval Architecture in Shipbuilding and Offshore Industry
Modifications, upgrades and various custom made steel constructions & designs, basic design, strength calculations

Name: K-Ren
Description:
La K-REN est une housse sur mesure de protection de la coque des bateaux de plaisance contre le fouling (organismes vivants, salissures).
Sa technologie anti-UV protège de la prolifération des micro-organismes sur la coque et permet d'éviter un carénage annuel coûteux, polluant et chronophage.
Opter pour une K-REN c'est économiser 5 ans de carénage, réduire l'usure de son bateau et protéger l'environnement !

Name: Newthex
Description:
We are a leader in the design, assembly and installation of high-quality doors, hatches and elevators for all superyacht and naval applications. Our products can be found on many of the world’s finest superyachts as well as on board naval, commercial and offshore vessels.

Working with designers, owners and yards allows us to ensure that each vessel has the access solutions that meet its exact needs. The depth of our in-house design and engineering expertise allows us to offer both a wide range of standard products and fully-customised systems where required. Our products can be fabricated in steel, aluminium and composite materials.

Name: UAB Uolus
Description:
UAB Uolus provide black steel and stainless-steel and aluminium welders prcs. 121, 131, 135, 136, 138 and 141. Key services:
- Hull inspection optimisation
- Engineering assessment
- Risk mitigation & repair
- Project Management & Project Engineering
- General Naval Architecture support

Specialisation areas:
- Project development: Specialist marine support to early stage project development
- Hull RBI: Hull Risk Based Inspection development, management, review & optimisation
- FMECA: Failure Modes Effects & Criticality Analysis for risk management of hull structures
- Engineering assessments: Using first principles, Class Rules, calculations & Finite Element Analysis (FEA)
- Digital twins: Definition, development & management of data & analysis digital twins
- Condition monitoring: Hull condition / structural health monitoring
- 3D CAD: Modelling of hull structures
- Repairs: Development of repair details & drawing workpacks for welded & composite repairs

Name: Pro Pipe&Steel Solution
Description:
Pro Pipe&Steel Solution olarak, denizcilik sektörünün kalbi olan gemi inşaatı ve bakım alanında, "güvenilir, kaliteli, işin başında çelik, teçhiz, borulama ve hidrolik sistemler çözüm adresi" olma vizyonuyla hareket ediyoruz. Kurulduğumuz günden bu yana, sektördeki tecrübemizi ve uzmanlığımızı, projelerinizin her aşamasında sizlere değer katmak için kullanıyoruz.

Gemi inşasının temel taşı olan çelik konstrüksiyon işlerinden, geminin operasyonel kabiliyetini belirleyen teçhiz ve donatım süreçlerine; akışkanların güvenli ve verimli bir şekilde iletilmesini sağlayan kritik borulama sistemlerinden, gemi makinelerinin ve ekipmanlarının hassas kontrolünü mümkün kılan hidrolik sistemlere kadar geniş bir yelpazede kapsamlı çözümler sunuyoruz.

"İşin başında" olmak bizim için sadece bir slogan değil, bir çalışma prensibidir. Projenizin en başından itibaren, ihtiyaçlarınızı doğru analiz ederek, en uygun mühendislik çözümlerini geliştirir, kaliteli malzeme seçimi ve titiz işçilikle hayata geçiririz. Güvenilirlik ve kalite, sunduğumuz her hizmetin ve tamamladığımız her projenin temelini oluşturur.

Deneyimli mühendis kadromuz ve alanında uzman teknik ekibimizle, sadece malzeme tedariki veya montaj hizmeti sunmanın ötesine geçerek, projenizin her aşamasında size özel, entegre çözümler üretiyoruz. Denizcilik sektörünün zorlu koşullarına dayanıklı, uzun ömürlü ve verimli sistemler kurmayı hedeflerken, zamanında teslimat ve müşteri memnuniyetini en üst düzeyde tutmayı ilke ediniyoruz.

Pro Pipe&Steel Solution, gemi inşaatı ve bakım projelerinizde güvenebileceğiniz, yenilikçi ve sonuç odaklı bir iş ortağınızdır. Sektördeki en güncel teknolojileri ve standartları takip ederek, projelerinizi başarıya ulaştırmak için buradayız.

The conferences, and meetings of the STG, as well as assemblies of its committees, cover a wide programme of lectures on the most recent developments and findings in theoretical science and practical work. At the same time, our meetings help the members to establish and maintain contacts with their colleagues. The STG has approximately 1800 members, natives and foreigners, about 130 of them are companies, organizations and authorities. Membership (Mitgliedschaft)
