- Floating Crane Availability up to 150 tons
- SPMT Availability for Heavy Lifting Operations
- 3 sets of CNC sheet metal cutting machines.
- Available Land Side for Hatch Cover Laying up to 20.200 m²

Name: Bilgin Yachts
Description: A family-run business for over five generations, Bilgin Yachts is a boutique shipyard building high-end customized superyachts from 50 up to 120 metres in the greater area of Istanbul of Turkey. With over 750 highly skilled craftsmen, the shipyard operates in five facilities covering 79,450 square-metre area and focuses on building steel-aluminium structures. Today a SYBAss member, Bilgin Yachts is among the first 20 yacht builders around the world. Besides having custom yachts, the shipyard also offers after-sales, yacht winterisation, and maintenance services while accepting refit projects.  http://www.bilginyacht.com/

Name: Estaleiro Jurong Aracruz Ltda
Description:
Jurong é um estaleiro full service dedicado à construção naval, transformação e reparação de equipamentos offshore.

O Grupo Jurong é líder mundial em construção de Semi-submersível de perfuração para águas profundas, em construção de jack-up's e possui ainda em seu currículo o maior número de conversões realizadas até hoje. 
É um dos únicos estaleiros com tradição de construção de unidades Offshore no modo "Lump Sum" (preço global).

O Estaleiro Jurong Aracruz - EJA chega ao Espírito Santo para realizar uma modalidade de negócios inédita do Estado. Com o avanço da exploração do petróleo na camada pré-sal, as expectativas de investimentos em infraestrutura naval tornam necessária a criação de um estaleiro apropriado para suprir as demandas dessa indústria, que exige tecnologia de ponta e produtos de qualidade para a realização de projetos ousados.

A estrutura oferecida pelo EJA estará preparada para atender não só as demandas da Petrobras, mas as exigências do mercado mundial, na fabricação de embarcações e jaquetas (estruturas básicas das plataformas de petróleo), gerando negócios para fornecedores locais, emprego e renda para trabalhadores locais e divisas para o Espírito Santo.

Name: Vedam Design
Description:
Design Services : 
Ship Design | Production Design | Conversion & Retrofit Design | Decarbonization Studies | Site Supervision |  LNG-FSRU Projects | Dredgers |
Engineering Analysis  (FEM, CFD, Hydrodynamics, Mooring) | Marine Consulting | 3D Scanning | IHM | BWTS / SCUBBER Retrofits | ESD Studies

Digital Solutions:
Digital Inspection | PD Twin | CarbonBoard | EasyRest| Custom-made Software Solutions 
 
INDIA | NETHERLANDS | SINGAPORE | UAE

VEDAM is an ISO 9001:2015 certified company, established in 2007 with the vision to provide innovative design & technical solutions to Ship Owners, Shipyards, and the offshore industry. Vedam brings a modern approach to engineering challenges and for the last 17 years, has successfully provided innovative solutions for 2500+ projects covering Vessel conversions, Retrofits, new design, Shipyard Support, Site inspections & Supervision. 

Vedam’s R&D team works in extensive collaboration with international domain experts. The team has developed a few LNG concepts along with European LNG experts and Indian LNG operators to support the Asian gas-based energy consumption demand. Vedam is among the very few design companies internationally to have designed and built gas-propelled tankers, 15 of them are successfully operating in Africa.

The team has developed indigenous designs for short sea, coastal, and Inland Vessels along with Government authorities, Shipowners, and premium academic institutes. 

Vedam has developed a series of Dredgers – inhouse design and complete equipment package customized with locally produced equipment. Two dredgers are recently built and delivered to one of the biggest dredging companies.

Vedam has been felicitated with multiple awards and have contributed in numerous conferences. Vedam team is available at all times to support with customized service offerings.

Name: Vallianz PT USP
Description: Established since 2006, PT. United Sindo Perkasa shipyard (PT USP) is owned by Vallianz Holdings Ltd located in Kabil Industry Zone of Batam in Indonesia. Our shipyard serves as a marine base for vessel docking, repair and maintenance works and our operations possess strong in-house fabrication and engineering capabilities such as ship building, ship conversion, ship repair, machining works, piping repairs and installation and mechanical repair of marine equipment.

Name: OCEA Construction navale
Description:
Created in 1987, the OCEA group is specialized in design, building, marketing and support of aluminum vessels up to 90 m. Today, with more than +500 employees and 4 production sites in France, a subsidiary in Guadeloupe and one in the Philippines, OCEA is a privileged partner for all your projects in aluminium shipbuilding and industry. OCEA can deliver 15 to 25 vessels annually. 95% of the turnover of OCEA is made for export.

Thanks to a mastered strategy of innovation, internal means of design and an organization dedicated to the management of projects, OCEA is now able to propose a competitive global offer on clearly identified markets:
 
- OCEA naval
      Development and building of aluminium vessels, monohulls or catamarans, with fitting-out and performances specifically adapted to their exploitation:
                 -	Maritime Safety and Security
                 -	Transoceanic Yachts
                 -	Maritime Territory Administration
                 -	Maritime Transport and Mobility

- OCEA industries
      Development and building of marinas and complex aluminium elements:
                 -	Sub-contracting of aluminium elements
                 -	Elliptical and max section tank ends
Location: Les Sables-d'Olonne, Pays de la Loire

Name: Tenerife Shipyards
Description:
At Tenerife Shipyards, we offer our clients a wide range of services for offshore fabrication and maritime sector needs.

With a strategic location in the main Ports of the Canary Islands, Tenerife Shipyards count on in-house engineering integrated with automated fabrication shops to deliver accurate and cost-efficient services to our client’s demands. 

Household Rules:

- If you have any doubt, please don't hesitate to contact us.
- Be kind, treat others in the way you would like to be treated.
- We reserve the rigth to remove offensive comments.

Tenerife Shipyards a company owned by Hidramar Group.
Location: Santa Cruz de Tenerife, Canary Islands

Name: GICAN
Description:
Le GICAN, Groupement des Industries de Construction et Activités Navales, fédère 300 industriels de la filière maritime française. Il réunit les chantiers navals, systémiers, équipementiers, sous-traitants, sociétés d’ingénierie, architectes navals et toutes les entreprises qui concourent à la construction navale civile et à ses équipements, à la construction navale de défense, de sûreté et de sécurité, aux  énergies marines renouvelables, à  la valorisation et à la protection des océans et aux infrastructures côtières et portuaires.

GICAN, the French Naval Industry Association, brings together 300 manufacturers in the French maritime sector. It unites shipyards, systems integrators, equipment manufacturers, subcontractors, engineering companies, naval architects and all companies involved in civil shipbuilding and its equipment, defence, safety and security shipbuilding, marine renewable energies, the development and protection of the oceans, and coastal and port infrastructure.

Name: Hanwha Philly Shipyard
Description: Trusted U.S. shipbuilder, challenging and redefining sustainable maritime solutions.

Name: Cranchi Yachts
Description:
Cantiere Nautico Cranchi S.p.A. is a family-owned company, officially founded in 1870, although Giovanni Cranchi built his first boat years before that.
The company was originally located on the shores of Lake Como, today, Cranchi builds its yachts in a huge, modern facility in Piantedo. 
In 2006 the company went public, but it is still run by 4th generation Aldo Cranchi, with at least five 5th generation Cranchis are now working for the brand.
All CRANCHI yachts and sport boats are built in one of the most technologically sophisticated boatyards in the world, and it is evident when onboard that attention to detail and superior old world craftsmanship have gone into building their products.

Name: Next Yacht Group
Description: Next Yacht Group: home to the iconic Italian shipyards AB Yachts and Maiora, renowned for their excellence in luxury yacht design and craftsmanship.

Name: RH Marine
Description:
RH Marine is a leading system integrator and innovator of electrical and automation systems in the maritime industry, and delivers tailored solutions for complex Naval ships and Yachts. Our in-house capabilities include: project management, consultancy, system design, engineering, commissioning, installation, site management, training and service support.

RH Marine supports and advises the customer from the design phase through the entire life cycle of the ship. This end to end approach allows for optimal configuration for the operational goals, and minimization of the life cycle costs.

We ensure safe, sustainable, comfortable and cost efficient continuity of operations for our customers by integrating smart and cost effective solutions since 1860.

We explore the potential of green and intelligent, unmanned ships by continuously innovating electrical and automation solutions in co-creation with key customers.

RH Marine is a brand of VINCI Energies.

Name: Baltic Yachts Oy Ab Ltd
Description: Baltic Yachts is today a well-known builder of high performance sailing boats that are exclusive, tailor-made dream yachts of high quality material. We build custom yachts up to 200+ feet, and our business vision is to be one of the leading boat building companies in the world.

Name: Ontario Shipyards
Description:
Ontario Shipyards is a wholly Canadian-owned company operating three of the largest ship construction and repair facilities in Canada.  Founded in 1987, Ontario Shipyards has grown into the largest Canadian ship repair and construction company on the Great Lakes.  We are a trusted partner of the Canadian Coast Guard and the Canadian flagged commercial fleet.  

Operating the largest number of dry dock assets in Canada, Our shipyards in Hamilton, St. Catharines, and Thunder Bay offer a wide array of vessel life cycle services from new builds, repair, maintenance, conversions, and vessel recycling.

Name: Brunswick Boat Group
Description: Brunswick Boat Group is defining, creating, and innovating the future of recreational boating. Our passion is to bring friends and families together on the water to create everlasting memories. With advanced design, technology and innovation, our boats deliver a lifestyle unlike any other.

Name: Royal Van Lent Shipyard
Description:
Situated on Kaag Island, Royal Van Lent yard has roots dating back to 1849. Yacht construction started in earnest eighty years ago when motor and sailing yachts were built out of wood. Royal Van Lent rapidly expanded into the construction of steel and aluminium, and is now solely dedicated to custom-built motoryachts.

Around 300 highly skilled craftsmen work across every discipline of modern superyacht construction, and are responsible for an average of two launchings a year. First-class facilities include two dry docks and two slipways of up to 100m in length. In addition to providing premium quality, Royal Van Lent takes great pride in maintaining a personal relationship with owners. Its waterfront restaurant plays a key part in this approach.

The Amsterdam yard is the second facility operated by Royal Van Lent, which will also continue to operate its Kaag Island yard at full capacity. The two premises will share the same management team and corporate culture, with approximately 450 skilled employees from across the spectrum of outfitting and refit activities moving between the facilities as needed. This fourth Feadship facility in the Netherlands will now build and refit Feadships of up to 160 metres in length.

Name: X-Yachts
Description:
This is X-Yachts...
X-Yachts are built on a deep relation to and understanding of performance, design and the demands of the sea.

We want to be leading the industry, based on innovation and world class craftsmanship thus promising our customers superior sailing pleasure whether racing or cruising.

It is our aim to attract and retain highly skilled employees and managers - and to create an X-Yachts community of passionate sailors and owners, raising our enjoyment of sailing to new heights.

Name: SIMA PERÚ
Description:
Bienvenidos a SIMA PERÚ, somos una empresa peruana, líder en la construcción de proyectos en la Industria Naval y Metalmecánica. 

Contamos con tres Centros de Operación ubicados estratégicamente en los principales puertos marítimos del Callao, Chimbote e Iquitos. Nuestras certificaciones internacionales de calidad ISO 9001, seguridad y salud ocupacional OHSAS 18001, y protección del medio ambiente, ISO 14000 garantizan la calidad de nuestros productos y servicios.

Trabajamos para contribuir con la Defensa Nacional y el desarrollo socio-económico y tecnológico del país, así como brindando nuestros servicios para proyectos de gran envergadura tanto en industria naval como en metalmecánica, a nivel  nacional e internacional.

Name: Baglietto Yachts
Description:
The concept of leadership has always characterized Baglietto since the very beginning, when in 1854 Pietro Baglietto started to build small wooden boats in the back-yard of his house. Starting from there, the brand has always been a synonym of innovation, a true creative and technical genius spirit, promoting engineering research and development.

A new chapter begun for Baglietto, when it was acquired by Gavio Group in 2012, with the aim to prove once again the place of Baglietto among major international shipbuilder yards.

In order to reach this goal, significant investments and reconstructions have been carried out. These in particular were focused on widening the yard°s infrastructures. As of today the shipyard occupies an area of 35.000 square m and the completion of two new covered plants for the building of motor-yachts up to 65-meter in length and two piers allowing the mooring of motor-yachts up to 70-meter in length have just been completed.

Name: Monaco Marine
Description:
Monaco Marine is a network of refit and maintenance shipyards for super and megayachts up to 180m+. Our expertise, know-how and ability to manage huge refit projects allow us to reach the highest quality standards available on the market. 
Over 3,000 yachts undergo refit, repair or wintering at Monaco Marine shipyards every year. Thanks to our seven yacht facilities from Beaulieu-sur-mer to Marseille, our private marina in Monaco and a unique mobile shipyard programme, Monaco Marine commits its expertise and contractors for refit and maintenance projects all around the world. 
With our specific mobile shipyard programme, our clients can now alternate technical pit stops and huge refits to keep state of the art wherever they are around the world.
After 25 years’ experience, Monaco Marine provides the best support for owners, captains, and crew along the year and has gained a loyalty rate of 80 per cent from its customers, which is its best reward for the work done on many prestigious yachts. 
Working with passion, providing the best tools, staying state of the art, innovating for tomorrow and always keeping customers’ satisfaction in mind, that’s our everyday life.

Name: Hidramar Shipyards
Description:
Hidramar Shipyards aims to be the partner of choice for technical assistance in shipyards services and rig support. We have been delivering tailor-made solutions for the main players in the offshore, marine and energy industry for more than 3 decades, satisfying our customer's needs, and proving technological leadership, based on a solid people-oriented organization.

We aim to safely provide the highest quality services and at the same time reduce downtimes for our clients. 
To achieve this, we effectively, efficiently and safely combine our extraordinarily skilled and experienced employees, the most advanced technology available and excellent port facilities.
Location: Las Palmas de Gran Canaria, Canary Islands

Name: Helsinki Shipyard
Description:
Helsinki Shipyard specializes in shipbuilding technology and building of special vessels for demanding conditions and routes. 

The shipyard has a long tradition and unmatched expertise in designing and building of icebreakers and other high ice-class vessels for operations in cold environment. In addition to the arctic know-how, our specialization covers also passenger ferries and cruise vessels. 

Helsinki Shipyard continues its operation in the vivid heart of Finland’s capital, city of Helsinki. The shipyard has been in Hietalahti already nearly 160 years. Helsinki Shipyard is a brand name. The legal entity is DNY Finland Oy, which is a Group Davie company.

The customer is our passion. We always focus on finding the best solutions for our customers. We understand that our customers have their jobs to be done. 

We focus on continuous product development. We follow the markets and new regulations. We understand the meaning of schedules agreed with the customer

Name: ISA YACHTS
Description:
ISA Yachts builds Italy’s finest luxury yachts for successful, individual owners who trust them to deliver the highest standards of value, flexibility and finesse. 

At the shipyard in Ancona, ISA Yachts have developed a unique approach to yacht building.  Based on innovative, highly efficient logistics, their expert technical team applies rigorous quality control. All processes are guided by project management that is extremely client-focused.  This commitment to the highest standards allows ISA Yachts to develop trusted relationships with owners who value their transparency, flexibility and dedication.  ISA Yachts understand how owning a yacht provides a sanctuary of incomparable leisure and relaxation, and take great pride in building yachts that deliver years of contentment and satisfaction.

ISA Yachts are uncompromising in their search for efficient and reliable processes that result in the highest standards.  Their methodology for managing sub contractor partners ensures accuracy of specification, purchasing, engineering, production and delivery, and results in higher reliability for their customers.  Naval architecture is developed in close cooperation with the Maritime Research Institute Netherlands (MARIN) where all new ISA Yachts' hulls are tank tested, resulting in high levels of efficiency and superior seakeeping.  Health and safety is also taken extremely seriously for their employees, sub contractors and guests. The shipyard is one of the first in  Italy to establish formal systems and is compliant with international standard OHSAS 1800.2007, and certified by Bureau Veritas.

To stand by their ethics and demonstrate their confidence in yacht building, every project comes with a two year warranty period, double the industry average. In addition to their industry-leading warranty, ISA Yachts provide a complimentary wintering service for two years from launch.

ISA Yachts, Trusted To Deliver.

For further information www.isayachts.com

Name: TSUNEISHI GROUP
Description:
Since 1903, Tsuneishi Group has contributed not only to develop the world economy but also to sustain the local community by providing services and products in 5 business fields, shipbuilding, shipping, environmental, energy, and services.


[ Corporate Philosophy ]

Developing stable businesses to ensure the happiness of employees


[ Code of Conduct ]

Tsuneishi Group's forward-looking, bold actions and open-mindedness support both our customers and the local community, while fulfilling the dreams of our employees.

- Stability and Growth 
  We promise to provide our customers with products and services that give them satisfaction, to build closer relationship, and to challenge ourselves to be the best with what we do.

- Importance of a person of ability 
  We, staff members consider ourselves as a part of a large family who promise to work, study and grow together. 

- A member of the society 
  We promise to contribute our humble efforts to the revitalization and prosperity of local economies, behaving in good faith as a member of a global society. 


[ The Tsuneishi Spirit ]

We set ‘Festival Event Type’ company as our ideal company model in order to ensure all employees are involved in the running of the company. With this, we aim be a corporation which achieves the highest level of customer satisfaction and the profitability in the world. Tsuneishi Group employees share the following guidelines as ‘Tsuneishi Spirit’ in order to fulfill this goal.

 1: Have Vision!
 2: Aim for the Top!
 3: Stand United!
 4: Be Proactive!
 5: Be Considerate and Kind!

Name: Lisnave Estaleiros Navais S.A.
Description:
Lisnave is a Ship Repair Yard located in Setubal - Portugal and is equiped with 6 drydocks, 9 repair berths and occupies an area of 1 500 000 m².
Lisnave Shipyard is ideally located for vessels trading or passing through Atlantic and Mediterranean waters and offers a global range of services for vessels of all sizes.
The yard is fully equipped with all of the necessary workshops, services and facilities to carry out the wide range of tasks required of a ship repairer. The yard has ample craneage, staging, transporters for moving large sections of steel structures, dockside arms, painting and blasting equipment, air compressors, pumps and lighting units plus supplies of compressed air, gas, electricity and water. 
Office facilities are available for project management teams,  owners' superintendents, surveyors, inspectors and consultants.

Name: Rossinavi
Description:
From its roots as Cantiere Rossi to its evolution into Rossinavi, founded by the Rossi family, the transformation wasn't merely a name change but a profound shift in philosophy. Rossinavi seamlessly blends theory and practice, rooted in a deep appreciation for history while relentlessly pursuing innovation. Initially specialising in carpentry and repairs in the 1980s, the transition saw a deepening focus on ship construction, marked by technical refinement and innovation. In the early 2000s, Rossinavi entered the luxury yacht market with motor vessels between 40 and 70 meters, emphasising the Made-in-Italy excellence and bespoke craftsmanship. Central to their approach is building relationships with clients, ensuring each vessel reflects the owner's desires. Rossinavi's ethos revolves around full custom, where open dialogue and meticulous attention to detail enrich the construction process, fostering a deep connection between owner and craft.
In the 2020s, Rossinavi continues to push boundaries with its BluE line, prioritising sustainability and environmental responsibility. Inspired by phytoplankton, these vessels aim to revolutionise the concept of cruising, minimising carbon emissions while maximising energy efficiency.
Today, Rossinavi stands as a beacon of innovation and excellence in the world of yachting, continuously evolving to meet the demands of the future. With a steadfast commitment to craftsmanship and sustainability, Rossinavi charts a course towards a unique future shaped by its unwavering dedication and expertise.

Name: Vigor Marine Group
Description: With five shipyards, eight dry docks, and more than 15,000 feet of pier space on or near U.S. Naval bases, at historic shipyards, and the home of the Alaskan Marine Highway System, our 2,500 dedicated employees across five states – from the Pacific Northwest to San Diego to Norfolk – personify the values of our company.

Name: APCL Cammell Laird Shiprepairers & Shipbuilders Limited
Description:
Cammell Laird, part of the APCL Group, is one of the most illustrious names in the global maritime industry.

Cammell Laird’s Birkenhead facility, on the banks of the River Mersey, expands across 130 acres and includes four dry docks, a large modular construction hall and extensive covered workshops.

The business has played a strategic role in UK shipbuilding for the past 200 years, with recent projects including the RRS Sir David Attenborough and block builds for the Aircraft Carrier Alliance and critical units of the Astute class of nuclear submarines.

Today Cammell Laird and the wider APCL Group are delivering units for HMS Belfast Ship 3 and HMS Birmingham Ship 4 of the new Type 26 class of frigates. These programmes are being delivered on behalf of BAE.

Cammell Laird is delighted to be building the first Mersey Ferry to be delivered in 60 years.

Cammell Laird has continued to develop its capability in the marine sector and is a world leader specialising in military ship refit, commercial ship repair, upgrade and conversions. The APCL Group of companies is proud to maintain 100 per cent of the Royal Fleet Auxiliary flotilla.

All of the activities that the company conducts are underpinned by its Work Safe Home Safe programme which incorporates a comprehensive and accredited Health and Safety System OHSAS 18001:2007. Quality Management Systems are operated in accordance with ISO9001:2008, and Environmental Management System 14001:2004.

Cammell Laird is part of the APCL Group which also brings together A&P Group and Neway.

Visit www.cammell-laird.co.uk for more information.

Name: APCL A&P Group Limited
Description:
A&P, part of the APCL Group, is a global marine engineering business which operates six dry docks across two strategic locations in the UK and delivers engineering excellence to the commercial marine, defence and renewable sectors.

One of the largest commercial ship repair, conversion and marine specialists of its kind in the UK, A&P Group operates two sites at A&P Falmouth and A&P Tyne to provide:

• Drydockings, ship repair and conversion
• Specialist fabrication
• Mobilisation and demobilisation
• Refits, modifications and upgrades
• Port Services including cruise, towage and cargo handling.
All facilities combine a rich heritage of marine engineering skills and experience, providing ship owners and energy companies with all the precision skills needed to complete the most demanding projects.

Today A&P and the wider APCL Group are delivering units for the Dreadnought class of nuclear submarines and units for HMS Belfast Ship 3 and HMS Birmingham Ship 4 of the new Type 26 class of frigates. These programmes are being delivered on behalf of BAE.

A&P Group has continued to develop its capability in the marine sector and is a world leader specialising in military ship refit, commercial ship repair, upgrade and conversions. The APCL Group of companies is proud to maintain 100 per cent of the Royal Fleet Auxiliary flotilla.

A&P Group's ultimate priority is to maintain a safety culture which protects its workforce, suppliers and visitors, which is underpinned by its Work Safe Home Safe programme.

A&P has worked collaboratively with Lloyds Register to achieve ISO 9001:2008, ISO 14001: 2004 and OHSAS 18001:2007. A&P has also been certified BS 11000 for collaborative working and has secured Cyber Essentials Plus Accreditation.

A&P Group is part of the APCL Group which also brings together Atlantic & Peninsula Australia, Cammell Laird and Neway.

Name: Deltamarin
Description:
Deltamarin Group has 30 years of experience in providing ship design, offshore engineering and construction support services for marine and offshore industries worldwide.

Our expertise covers fit-for-purpose designs in all ship types and offshore vessels. We handle all design disciplines and phases in newbuilding and conversion projects. We are dedicated to delivering services throughout a vessel’s lifecycle – from concept development and engineering to project management during shipbuilding and commissioning. For operating vessels, we offer a wide range of services to maintain the fleet in excellent condition, or even upgrade it to the next level.

We have 400 experts in Finland, Poland, China and Croatia. Ship owners and operators, shipyards, oil companies, offshore contractors and marine suppliers are all our esteemed clients.

Deltamarin is part of China Merchants Group, a Fortune Global 500 corporation.

Name: Strategic Marine
Description:
Strategic Marine is a leading shipbuilder with an international outlook and an established reputation for producing quality, high performance commercial & governmental vessels for markets across the globe.

Strategic Marine has built and delivered over 600 vessels made of both aluminium and steel for a variety of clients in the maritime, offshore, tourism and naval defence sectors. Aluminium is Strategic Marine’s specialty. Strategic Marine’s solid reputation for building high-performance vessels, historically focused on aluminium, has also become associated with steel-based construction over the last few years.

Beyond shipbuilding, the company offers Service and Maintenance, Fabrication and Engineering, and Marine Logistics services.

The company is expanding on its position as a leading global shipbuilder by consolidating and strengthening its position in the European wind farm vessel and workboat sectors of the market. This comes off the back of several successful recent newbuild contracts for the European market over the last few years.

Strategic Marine is committed to delivering high quality products and pride ourselves in providing the first-class service that our clients deserve.

Our Values:
INTEGRITY & ACCOUNTABILITY
PROFESSIONALISM
OWNERSHIP FOR SAFETY & ENVIRONMENT
TEAMWORK
STAKEHOLDER FOCUS

Name: Baku Shipyard LLC
Description:
President of Azerbaijan Ilham Aliyev laid the foundation stone for Baku Shipyard on 19 March 2010 and officiated its
inauguration on 20 September 2013

Main activity of the Baku Shipyard consists of the construction of a variety of vessels ranging from offshore support vessels, general cargo vessels, tug boats, crane vessels, specialized vessels and passengers vessels to tankers. The yard also undertakes ship repair and conversion of such vessels.

The developed yard has the following facilities:

    Floating Dry dock 168m x 50m (clear width 40m)
    300m x 30m Finger Pier
    450 m of Quay berthing space with 25 ton level luffing crane
    275m x 80m of new building berth
    323m x 136m transfer slab for repair

Steel Fabrication, Pipe Fabrication, Mechanical and Electrical workshop housing the most modern steel fabrication panel line, CNC cutting machines, Shot blasting and priming machine, Frame Bending machine Pipe bending machines, lathe machine, Milling machine, Beveling machine, Profile cutting machine.

Blasting and Painting Hall equipped with full abrasive recovery system, dehumidifier, silo and blast and paint machines.

The yard has a capacity to produce 25,000 tons throughput per annum of steel works for new buildings and able to undertake 80 -100 vessels repairs of various types.

Currently Baku Shipyard LLC employs about 1500 local workers and forecast workforce.

Name: Garden Reach Shipbuilders & Engineers Ltd.
Description: Established in 1884, Garden Reach Shipbuilders & Engineers Ltd. (GRSE), a premier warship building company in India, operates under the administrative control of the Ministry of Defence. It began as a modest workshop, servicing vessels for the River Steam Navigation Company, before being nationalized by the Government of India in 1960. GRSE's illustrious history includes building India's first indigenous warship, the INS Ajay, for the Indian Navy in 1961. Over the years, it has constructed a diverse range of vessels, including the first Indian export warship for Mauritius, a Fast Patrol Vessel for Seychelles, and an Ocean-Going Cargo & Passenger Ferry Vessel for Guyana. Recognized as a Miniratna Category I Company in 2006, GRSE has delivered over 790 platforms, including 109 warships, to the Indian Navy, Indian Coast Guard, and friendly foreign countries. Its portfolio spans frigates, corvettes, fleet tankers, and more. Beyond shipbuilding and repair, GRSE is involved in engine production, engineering activities, and manufacturing deck machinery items, portable steel bridges, and marine pumps. Notable achievements include awards for designing silent ships and offshore patrol vessels, along with recognition as the Best Performing Defence Shipyard in India for four consecutive years. With modernized infrastructure and concurrent capacity for 20 ships, GRSE continues its pursuit of excellence and quality in shipbuilding.

Name: Premier Marine Engineering Services LLC
Description:
Nestled at the heart of Dubai Maritime City (DMC), Premier Marine Shipyards is the most prominent and comprehensive ship repair and shipbuilding facility in the region. With over two decades of committed service, the company has established itself as the leading provider in ship repair, shipbuilding, retrofitting, and conversion projects. With 2,000+ skilled professionals, Premier Marine Shipyards is the largest and most qualified offshore yard facility in the region, ensuring that every project and every customer is handled with expertise and precision. 
The company’s recent expansions are specifically designed to meet the growing demands of its clients and the region. Through a pivotal joint venture with AD Ports, a cutting-edge floating dock facility accommodating vessels up to 117 meters in length and featuring a 500-meter dedicated jetty was launched in 2023 under the brand of Safeen Dry Docks. Furthermore, a new slipway facility at Rafa Port in Umm Al Quwain expands the company’s ability to service large barges up to 120 meters in length and includes a 200-meter quay wall.
The combined capability of the three shipyards has benefited clients in the region with increased options and reduced turnaround times as is evident from the chock-a-block bookings. 
Premier Marine’s commitment to innovation directly benefits their clients through enhanced capabilities and advanced solutions. The Floating Desalination Barges Project (Metito 1,2,3), which set a Guinness World Record, exemplifies their cutting-edge approach. This project not only demonstrates the company’s engineering expertise but also offers scalable solutions to global water challenges, providing clients with pioneering technologies and services that address real-world needs.
Our commitment to quality, efficiency, environment, health & safety standards is seen in our ISO 9001-2015, ISO 14001-2015, & ISO 45001-2018 certifications.

pmesdxb@premiermarine.ae
+971 4 425 4111

Name: Cantiere del Pardo S.p.A.
Description:
Cantiere del Pardo

The history of Cantiere del Pardo began in Bologna in 1973. Their ambitious objective was to produce regatta boats that combined the best possible performance with elegant and innovative design. Today’s Grand Soleil’s timeless style with 50 years of history have left its mark on a fundamental chapter in the history of modern sailing. For years, Cantiere del Pardo has been creating yachts with care and passion, each one unique, thus establishing the company as one of the top producers worldwide. Because the Grand Soleil yachts are an icon of 'made in Italy' style.

Since 1973, when it was founded, Cantiere del Pardo has produced more than 3.900 boats. It occupies a covered 40.000 square meter surface and is split into three macro-departments: millwork, using cutting-edge technology and processes; carpentry, based on tradition and the manual skills of its work force; and assembly, where everything is put together carefully up to final testing in the large test tank.

Name: Nautor Swan
Description: For close to half a century, Nautor Swan has been the true sailor's choice, designing and building luxurious, high performance yachts in Northern Finland.   The value of a Swan is derived from the company's strong heritage, skilled craftsmen and pursuit of excellence in every aspect of the build. From the design process to production, the best quality materials and innovative technology are used to deliver the most elegant and safest sailing yachts in the world.

Name: ABG Shipyard Ltd
Description:
•	India’s largest private sector ship-building company

•       Established manufacturer and service provider of a variety of ships, including bulk carriers, interceptor        boats, diving support vessels, anchor handling supply ships, dynamic positioning vessels, anchor handling tugs etc.

•	Worldwide client base including Europe, Middle East and South East Asia and have built 165 vessels till        date for Domestic and International customers

•	The Shipyard, certified by DNV for ISI 9001 – 2008, has won the All India Trophy for Highest Exporter,        from the Government of India, for five consecutive years

•	ABG Shipyard has received “Shipyard of the Year” award from Lloyd’s List for Middle East & Indian        Subcontinent region and “Shipbuilding Company of the Year” award from Indian Maritime Gateway for the        year 2010

•	ABG has also won Dun & Bradstreet “Ship Building Company of the Year” Award, 2012

•	Company has two manufacturing facilities- Surat & Dahej and repair facilities at Goa

•	Company is qualified to build all kinds of Defence vessels under the purview of Ministry of Defence

Name: Palumbo Shipyards
Description:
Palumbo was founded in 1967 and started its activity as small carpentry to support the local market of ship repair. Nowadays the group is a major player in the Mediterranean sea and in the Atlantic ocean.
It operates with 7 shipyards located in Naples, Messina, Malta, Marseille, Tenerife, Ancona and a commercial office in Monaco. 

Palumbo is a leader for ship repair, conversion, refitting, offshore, new build and is certified ISO 30000:2009,  ISO 9001:1998, ISO 14000:2005. It have been declared also compliant with the organizational and management model OHSAS 18001.
In 2014, obtained the certification for the maintenance and repair of LNG carriers specializing in the transportation of liquefied natural gas from the GTT (Gaztransport & Technigaz).

Name: OZATA SHIPYARD
Description:
ÖZATA Tersanecilik ve Gemi İnşa Şirketi (ÖZATA Shipbuilding) was founded in 1985 in Tuzla, Istanbul to perform steel sheet processing and piping works of newly constructed and rebuilt ships.
Özata Shipyard continued its activities in a large number of shipyards at Tuzla region until 2002 and has become an experienced and preferred organization in its field.

In 2002, our founder Özdemir Ataseven made the required investments in Altınova area in Tuzla with the purpose of using his experience and knowledge in shipbuilding, and has brought Özata Shipyard to these days.

Founded on a 60,000 sqm area with all opportunities, Özata Shipyard has built fully-equipped  yachts, mega yachts, passenger boats, Sar Boats for special purposes and carbon fiber body catamaran ferries.
With an annual processing capacity of 20,000 tons of steel , Özata Shipyard is capable of building ships up to 30.000 DWT in world class with its experienced workers and employees.
Özata Shipyard's biggest goal is to make leading initiatives for its country and industry, and continues its projects with its innovations and innovative structure.
Özata Shipyard Opportunities and Technical Capacity
Özata Shipyard is capable of producing carbon fiber,  which could be produced in limited number of countries in the world, and only in Özata Shipyard in our country for now. And as a requirement of this production, it has wood processing shops, fiber cutting shops, carbon fiber storages, 2000 sqm factory with air conditioning system and indoor area production facility with total 10.000 sqm.

Name: Rauma Marine Constructions Oy
Description:
RMC (Rauma Marine Contructions) has created a completely new starting point for the continuation of the long shipbuilding tradition in Rauma, dating back to the 1500's. Over the years Rauma shipyard and maritime cluster has gained extensive experience in building and servicing car & passenger ferries and specialized vessels such as icebreakers and naval vessels. The outlook for small and medium sized vessels looks good for the foreseeable future. 

RMC aims to continue the strong shipbuilding tradition in Rauma with a new project-oriented and partner network approach. RMC acts as the project manager in combining top Finnish marine cluster know-how and products for every project. 

The story of excellence continues...

Name: Prestige Yachts
Description:
PRESTIGE perfects and reinvents an industrial savoir-faire honed by decades of experiences at sea and inherited from the JEANNEAU shipyard. PRESTIGE was born nearly 30 years ago with the desire to create exceptional boats, designed for exceptional customers, for those who aspire to live out their dreams.

Now, the PRESTIGE  range is available in two distinct model lines:  
> Flybridge
> S-Line

The PRESTIGE  signature
A strong identity and timeless lines.

SPBI, S.A. AU CAPITAL DE 51 541 628€
RCS LA ROCHE-SUR-YON N° 491 372 702
34 RUE ERIC TABARLY 
85170 DOMPIERRE-SUR-YON

Name: De Wave Group
Description: De Wave Group is a global contractor in cruise ship and yacht, delivering turnkey solutions from new builds to refits and worldwide after-sales support.

Name: Mengi Yay Yachts
Description:
Mengi Yay is one of the most long-established yacht building companies in Turkey with the experience since 1964.  Company was established by Ramazan Mengi in Ayvansaray as a small workshop. After Muzaffer Yay became partner with Ramazan Mengi in 1985 and they combined their surnames, Mengi Yay was established as our company name

The adventure began in Ayvansaray with 3 meters of boat construction, continued moving to Nuh Industrial Site Cooperative establishment in Tuzla in 1984. The company began constructions of steel boats in 2006 and nowadays building mega yachts in their own yard hangars. Successes of Mengi Yay were confirmed in 2011, 2012 and 2015 with the Yacht and Boat Construction award of Gold Anchor Maritime Success Awards and İstanbul Exporters’ Union (İEU) Turkey Third awards.

Name: Chantier Naval Couach - CNC
Description:
Couach est un acteur pionnier dans la construction de navires professionnels et de plaisance, comme dans les services navals. De 11 à 50 mètres, le chantier conçoit, construit et suit les bateaux les plus exceptionnels, avec l’excellence comme seule standard. A travers l’innovation technologique, la transformation énergétique, et une offre globale de services à l’international, Couach ambitionne de vous faire vivre la mer autrement.

Couach is a world-renowned French shipbuilder with a broad spectrum of products tailored to Clients’ expectations, from high volume series serial production to uniquely designed and built full-custom boats. With hulls ranging from 11m up to 50m, Established in the Arcachon Bay, the French shipyard has been building since 1897 the finest boats with an outstanding level of quality and engineering.
Couach designs, builds and provides maintenance of its seaworthy boats, built in the highest quality. The French yard also provides a global offer of international services, from training, technical support, after sales and maintenance.

Name: Eastern Shipbuilding Group, Inc.
Description: Eastern Shipbuilding Group, Inc. (ESG) is an American owned and operated shipbuilder with three shipyards on the Florida Gulf Coast. They build world class vessels for national defense and commercial clients, including the U.S. Coast Guard’s Heritage Class Offshore Patrol Cutters and the U.S. Army Corps’ new MCHD. ESG is the largest private sector employer in Northwest Florida and is a 2017 recipient of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security Small Business of the Year award. With a portfolio of over 350 vessels and Defense Contract Management Agency (DCMA) and Defense Contract Audit Agency (DCAA) certified systems, ESG is known as one of the most diverse vessel construction companies in the country.

Name: WINDELO - Catamaran
Description: Windelo sailors seek adventures and discoveries. Continents come closer together as we explore the world without giving up the comfort of life on board. With ecology at the heart of our company, we build light and spacious boats that offer the best performance.

Name: Navantia UK
Description:
Navantia UK is a new force in British industry, supporting the UK’s defence, security and energy transition ambitions. We’re doing this by creating state-of-the-art sovereign defence capabilities, investing in the UK to modernise industrial facilities, and bolstering the nation's energy security.

Established in 2022, Navantia UK is a subsidiary of Navantia SA, a Spanish state-owned company with over 300 years of naval shipbuilding history.

In January 2025, Navantia UK completed the acquisition of Harland & Wolff and its four historic facilities in Belfast, Appledore, Methil, and Arnish.

By combining Harland & Wolff’s proud heritage and facilities with Navantia’s global expertise, Navantia UK is well-positioned to strengthen Britain’s defence, maritime and energy industrial capabilities, supporting jobs and economic growth across the UK.

Name: Salt Ship Design AS
Description:
Salt Ship Design AS is an independent ship design company located in Leirvik at Stord island, Norway. 
Our team of engineers and naval architects are well experienced from the industry and covers all disciplines of ship design including stability, hydrodynamics, seakeeping etc. 

Our services includes feasability studies, initial design, tender processes, detail engineering etc. 

See our web pages for further information; www.saltship.com.

Name: Metal Shark Boats
Description:
Metal Shark is a diversified shipbuilder specializing in the design and construction of welded aluminum and steel vessels from 16’ to over 300’ for defense, law enforcement, and commercial operators. Key customers include the United States Marine Corps, Navy, Coast Guard, Air Force, Army, foreign militaries, law enforcement agencies, fire departments, passenger vessel operators, pilot associations, towboat operators, and other clients worldwide. With three fully self-contained shipbuilding facilities in Alabama and Louisiana USA plus a dedicated engineering facility in Croatia, Metal Shark’s 500+ employees produce over 200 vessels per year with a proud and proven track record of high quality, on time deliveries.  www.metalsharkboats.com

For more information, visit the company’s website at www.metalsharkboats.com, email sales@metalsharkboats.com or call (337) 364-0777.

Name: DETROIT BRASIL
Description: Localizada no litoral de Santa Catarina na cidade de Itajaí, a Detroit oferece o que há de melhor no mercado da indústria naval no país. Estrategicamente, a empresa é localizada às margens do rio Itajaí em uma área de 120.000 m2, a 13 km dos portos de Itajaí e Navegantes. A empresa é responsável pela construção de mais de 100 embarcações de serviço nos últimos 19 anos, consolidando sua posição hoje como um dos principais estaleiros de construção e reparo naval das Américas.

Name: Van der Valk Shipyard
Description: Van der Valk Shipyard has been constructing both steel and aluminium motor yachts since 1967. The family-owned shipyard is located in Waalwijk, The Netherlands, with founder Wim van der Valk still a driving force behind the company. The yards offers their semi-custom series of motor yachts, with the layout, interior and style of yacht offered as “custom-built” according to clients special needs and wishes.

Name: Holland Shipyards Group
Description: Holland Shipyards Group leads the way in providing sustainable solutions for the maritime industry. We have successfully delivered over 35 electric and hybrid vessels, and we are actively pursuing other innovative and sustainable applications such as the utilization of hydrogen fuel, harnessing wind energy for vessel propulsion, and the construction of 3D-printed vessels. Our expertise extends beyond constructing new ships to include repairs and conversions. Additionally, we offer accommodation modules for rent and provide comprehensive chartering services, rounding out our extensive portfolio.

Name: Silent Yachts
Description: Founded in 2016 with roots dating back to 2009, Silent Yachts pioneers fully electric, solar-powered catamarans. As a leading electric catamaran shipyard, we blend cutting-edge solar technology with eco-friendly innovation. Our 60, 80, and 120 Explorer series offer silent, sustainable cruising with the comfort of motor yachts, all crafted with Italian excellence in Fano.

Name: Turkish Shipbuilders’ Association (GISBIR)
Description:
Turkish Shipbuilders’ Association (GISBIR) was established by shipyard owners on 07.07.1971 in Istanbul. Improving the Turkish shipbuilding industry, helping the Turkish shipyards to take place in world market, finding solutions for common problems of shipyards through relevant authority, representing the Turkish Shipbuilding Industry in national and international areas are among the missions of GISBIR.

As of 2018, GISBIR has 97 members.

GISBIR is one of the oldest non-governmental organization in Turkey and the sole representative of the Turkish ship and yacht building, repairing and maintaining industry and in relations with national and international authorities, associations and organizations.

Name: ABEKING & RASMUSSEN Schiffs- und Yachtwerft SE
Description: Finest customized Motoryachts & leader in SWATH and Minehunting technology world wide.

Name: De Jong's Pijpleidingfabriek B.V.
Description:
DE SPECIALIST IN PIJPLEIDINGEN:
De Jong’s Pijpleidingfabriek produceert en installeert met veel expertise elke dag pijpleidingsystemen voor de maritieme sector t.b.v Baggerbouw, zeevaart, binnenvaart en jachtenbouw zoals hopper- en cutter-zuigers, containerschepen, sleepboten, chemicaliëntankers en luxe jachten. Zij kiezen voor het familiebedrijf uit Sliedrecht, omdat het al sinds 1951 de specialist is op dit gebied.

ADVIES EN ONTWERP:
Met een deskundig team van engineers lukt het De Jong’s pijpleidingfabriek uw aanvraag volgens de geldende eisen goed in kaart te brengen en een product op maat te leveren. De pijpleidingspecialist heeft ruime ervaring op het gebied van advies en ontwerp tot prefabricage en montage. Het familiebedrijf levert diverse projecten op, zoals laad-lossystemen, lens-ballastsystemen, en bijvoorbeeld voortstuwingsinstallaties voor de maritieme sector. 

GEAVANCEERDE WERKPLAATS:
De Jong’s Pijpleidingfabriek beschikt over een moderne en geavanceerde werkplaats waar de prefabricage van alle pijpleidingwerkzaamheden uitgevoerd kunnen worden. Compleet prefab van pijpen:
-	De pijpen samenstellen van standaard lasfittingen.
-	Diameters van ø6mm t/m +- ø1600mm.
-	Segmentbochten en baggerbochten en -pijpen.
-	Elektrisch, MIG of TIG lassen (afhankelijk van de toepassing).
-	Onder elke gewenste keuringsinstantie.
-	CNC-gestuurd doorn buigen:  
Wij beschikken over 2 stuks doorn buigmachines t/m ø60.3 uitwendig met een buigradius van 2D.
Wij beschikken over 1 stuk doorn buigmachine t/m ø168.3 uitwendig met een buigradius 1,5D, 2D of 2,5D.

DESKUNDIG TEAM VAN MONTEURS:
Een deskundig team van monteurs, dat werkt onder de leiding van een projectleider, draagt er zorg voor dat alle werkzaamheden veilig en adequaat uitgevoerd worden.

Name: ELICA Yachts & Refit
Description:
ELICA Yachts si occupa di vendita di yachts second-hand, mettendo a disposizione degli armatori la propria esperienza e professionalità per offrire ai propri clienti una barca perfetta, sicura e affidabile, ma soprattutto capace di interpretare la personalità e lo stile di vita di chi considera il mare un lusso tutto da vivere. 
Elica Yachts è in grado di offrire un’ampia scelta di yachts dei migliori brand, con un elevato livello di servizi e garanzie. L'acquisto di uno yacht usato Elica Yachts è una scelta consapevole che consente all’armatore di navigare su una barca senza tempo, ottimizzare le proprie spese e vivere il mare con tutta la tranquillità di un’imbarcazione certificata, garantita e sicura.
Ogni yacht appartenente alla Certified preowned yacht selection di Elica Yachts, viene sottoposto ad un processo di riqualificazione e controllo integrale al fine di fornire una qualità in linea con i più elevati standard. L’imbarcazione è controllata, ricondizionata e garantita 12 mesi per lasciare tutto il piacere di navigare su una barca come nuova.

Il gruppo ELICA è presente in Sardegna a Olbia.

Name: North Atlantic Ship Repair
Description: North Atlantic Ship Repair (operating as Boston Ship Repair) is a full-service shipyard in Boston’s Seaport, specializing in vessel maintenance, repair, and overhaul since 1995. With a deep-water graving dock and direct sea access, we service commercial, government, and cruise ships of all sizes. Our team delivers safe, on-time, and budget-conscious solutions, with a focus on quality, reliability, and long-term client partnerships.

Name: Underwater Lights Limited
Description:
We are the founders (1991) and only manufacturers of the Original Underwater Lights brand.  Peter Urquhart, President of Underwater Lights Limited, is proud of the fact that the company designs and manufactures all of the underwater and conventional lights at its U.K factory, enabling it to have full control of production. 

Products based on cutting edge R+D make it the ‘must-have’ brand for top shipyards. Producing over 15,000 lights to cope with the harshest environments, services range from design, lighting plans to control systems. Crafted from extreme pressure tested materials, all Underwater Lights are Lloyds approved. Underwater Lights has built an enviable reputation within the Marine Industry via a full global distribution system and unrivaled aftersales care.

Underwater Lights Limited is mainly recognized for its underwater lights, but it has been involved in interior and exterior light designs for yachts such as M.Y Solemar, M.Y. Anna, M.Y. Palladium, M.Y. Serque and S.Y Hemisphere. All received prestigious awards.

Our past experience and knowledge of project lighting designs and manufacturing lights for the yachts mentioned above has led the company to create quality and practical luminaires for land and marine applications.

Name: BERCO design
Description:
Berco c'est la rencontre entre un passionné de la mer et diverses personnes talentueuses... Des collaborations fertiles sur des projets innovants pour transformer des bribes de rêves en réalité.

Sensibles au monde qui nous entoure, et conscients des impacts de notre métier, nous oeuvrons pour imaginer les bateaux de demain. Un subtil équilibre entre performance, élégence, harmonie et innovation.

Name: PBM Group
Description:
Top specialists in marine engines and engine control systems we provide services and genuine spares to our clients wherever and whenever they may need us. Our global coverage is supported through our bases in Croatia, Bulgaria, China, Lithuania, Romania, Slovakia and Turkey. 

We found our relationships with clients and partners on quality, responsiveness and responsibility. 

As Woodward Authorized Independent Service Facility, 
Regulateurs Europa Authorized Distributor,

we listen, we learn, we deliver and keep your engines running!

Name: Holland Houseboat
Description:
Holland Houseboat is een product van Stamhuis. Stamhuis is een innovatief bouwbedrijf. Bijna 100 jaar geleden werd het opgericht door de gebroeders Stamhuis. Met Henk Stamhuis aan het roer groeide het bedrijf uit tot de grootste retailbouwer van de Benelux, met vestigingen in Nederland, België en Duitsland. Stamhuis gelooft in een 100% voorbereiding van een project door eerst virtueel te bouwen.  We zijn vooruitstrevend en willen elke dag beter worden voor onze klanten. 

Met trots presenteren we een Houseboat van hoge kwaliteit met een onderscheidend ontwerp. Mooie vloeiende lijnen optimaal gecombineerd met praktisch gebruikgemak. Het goed doordacht onderhoudsvrij ontwerp en de complete uitrusting garanderen comfortabel genieten tijdens alle weersomstandigheden.  

Een vaarbewijs is niet nodig om met de boot te mogen varen. Er mag zonder vergunning of ligplaats aangemeerd worden.  

De Holland Houseboat is de perfecte investering voor iedereen die wil genieten van comfort en beleving op en aan het water.

Name: SB Yacht Design
Description: Based in the Arcachon Basin and La Rochelle, we are passionate about creating vessels that combine aesthetics, functionality, and performance. Our naval architecture firm, SB Yacht Design, offers design, conception, engineering, and project management consulting services. Our teams of engineers and naval architects specialize in eco-design and CFD analysis (computational fluid dynamics). Concerned about future challenges, we have focused our recent R&D efforts on developing boats with minimal environmental impact. Our design process is based on an approach where every detail is carefully considered, and we value the balance between artistic creativity and the specific demands of the maritime world. Intent is a crucial aspect of our service. We believe a vessel should be more than just a means of transport on the water; it should embody a unique and unforgettable experience.

Name: Navise Yachts
Description: Navise Yacht was established in 2020 to provide production consultancy and technical advisory services to customers who wish to have a luxury yacht. Alongside consultancy services, the company currently offers aluminum hull and superstructure craftsmanship, insulation and piping craftsmanship with its established team. With a focus on understanding customer requirements accurately, making swift decisions, and maintaining a quality-oriented approach in both consultancy and manufacturing, Navise Yacht provides a unique experience to its clients.

Name: Witsen Marine
Description: Witsen Marine is onderdeel van Nautisch Centrum Nicolaas Witsen en Bootschappen Watersport. Wij zijn een bijzonder ervaren specialist met een rijke historie. Al sinds 1853 houden wij ons bezig met de reparatie en nieuwbouw van schepen. Inmiddels zijn wij een modern bedrijf met een solide reputatie en een eigen jachtbouwerij. Witsen Marine richt zich op een unieke markt, die van de luxe RIBS.

Name: SALTECH Consultants AB
Description:
With headquarters in Stockholm, SALTECH Consultants AB, provides consulting services for the maritime industry, serving both the domestic and international sectors. SALTECH brings a flexible approach to consulting services, acting as a technical link between the ship owner and the shipyard.

As experts in ship newbuildings and conversions SALTECH is involved in every stage from an early technical-economical feasibility study to building supervision. Our skills include all aspects as ship design and ship system design, technical specification, tender documents, maker/contractor suggestions, technical advice during negotiations, project management, design approval and building supervision. E.g, we are on-site at the shipyard handling client contact, providing technical support, supervising harbour tests and sea trials.

Name: ICON Drydock and Marine Services
Description:
WHO WE ARE?

The company is established on the foundations of over 14 years experiences.

ICON DRYDOCK&MARINE SERVICE with the goal to provide efficient solutions to clients and partners, covering a wide range of marine services and forming solid strategic alliances in the shipping market whilst maintaining an action-oriented management culture.

Located inTuzla/İstanbul at the main hub of ship repair center, in Turkey, ICON employs a team of qualified naval architects, marine engineers and consultants who provide clients with comprehensive, effective service, combining wide-ranging experience with modern technology.

The founders of ICON have over 14 years of experience in the shipping business, including 10 years of technical&marketing management in major shipyards. We have an excellent reputation in providing quality services and reliability, trustworthiness and dedication. ICON works closely with an impressive list of principals serving clients based around the globe as we strive to enhance our reputation in a competitive marketplace.

Name: Yachting Expertise
Description:
In 2015 Gianluca Fenucci and Antonio Longobardi, followed by Lorenzo Barbini in 2017, started developing Yachting Expertise merging knowledge to project, build and refit yachts at the higher standards.
Following a long & intense experiences in the yachting industry that started in the mid 80s at CRN a mix-match of partners in 2001 followed the dream of Gianluca Fenucci, who was the spark and leaded the creation of ISA Yachts shipyard, closely supported by Antonio Longobardi who was developing and leading the technical department, delivering over 32 yachts such as Okto, Mary Jean II, Kolaha, the 47 mt concept with the famous stairs from the swimming platform to the flighbridge.

Name: Talleres Blanchadell
Description: Empresa familiar datada desde al menos 1860. Nos dedicamos a la fabricación, reparación, instalación y mantenimiento de embarcaciones. Construimos en aluminio debido a las ventajas que da en el mar respecto a otros materiales. Oficina técnica propia con diseño de embarcaciones tanto para recreo, pesca, servicios marítimos, acuicultura, pasaje y vigilancia. También fabricamos maquinaria naval y equipos propulsivos.

Name: Jacobs Bros Boat Builders
Description: Based in Cape Town, South Africa, Jacobs Bros is renowned for building quality, custom, leisure and expedition aluminium yachts. In over 35 years, Jacobs Bros has built more than 20 yachts, which have explored the Amazon River, Polynesia, the South Atlantic, Antarctica and the Arctic, and circumnavigated the planet.

Name: VARENYA MARITIME SERVICES PRIVATE LIMITED
Description: VARENYA MARITIME SERVICES PRIVATE LIMITED is a shipbuilding company based out of Vadodara, India.

Name: Groupe Beneteau Italia
Description:
Located in Monfalcone, Groupe Beneteau Italia is the Italian shipyard of Groupe Beneteau, global market leader in the nautical industry. It is renowned for its expertise in building boats over 60 feet. 

After more than a decade of growth and development in the production of large luxury yachts for the Monte Carlo Yachts brand, the shipyard is now evolving towards multi-brand production of power and sailing boats, becoming one of Groupe Beneteau's poles of excellence for large units. 

Relying on the expertise of its staff and state-of-the-art facilities, Groupe Beneteau Italia builds high-quality power and sailing boats, produces and improves its prototypes and provides innovative solutions. 

Relying on Groupe Beneteau standards, Groupe Beneteau Italia is committed to creating a unique experience for customers with every boat it builds, providing comfort, safety and well-being on board. 

Today, more than 200 employees work at the Monfalcone shipyard. The Beneteau Italia Group is committed to investing in and developing its talents. 

They all share the same goal: to enhance the quality and performance of their products, and put their desire for excellence, their passion and their pride to work every day.

Name: Aguacarbon
Description:
AguaCarbon was born within Neotecmar, an Italian company operating nationally and internationally in the nautical industry.
Carbon objects are our specialty for the leisure boating industry.

Sea is our passion, innovation is our guide, and we create products based on these two principles to shape a new way to live the sea.
Our philosophy is based on extreme attention to detail, in order to deliver products with a refined and highly functional design.

Combining creativity and innovative engineering, we create a perfect balance of aesthetics and functionality.
Designed using the most innovative technologies to make the Italian-made nautical industry excel, Aguacarbon accessories are the epitome of authenticity.

Name: NISI Yachts
Description:
The pinnacle of Casual Opulence, NISI stands solitary in her class. NISI Yachts infuses legendary styling and unsurpassed engineering, with naval architecture by Setzer Design Group. NISI Yachts is the first in the world to build to RINA Charter Class + MCA (MGN280) commercial standards for yachts under 100 feet in length.

The inaugural NISI 2400 was honored with the award for "Best Design" by the International Superyacht Society, "The Year's Best" by Yachting Magazine, and named a Robb Report "Best of the Best" winner.

NISI Collection ranges from 58 to 86 feet (17 to 26 meters) in length. NISI Custom builds are tailored from 98 to 145 feet (30 to 44 meters).

Additional information on NISI can be experienced at http://www.nisiyachts.com.

Name: Iberian Offshore
Description:
IBERIAN OFFSHORE 
Our teams are poised and ready to work with you, to provide the best results for your marine and offshore projects. Iberian Offshore can adapt its skilled and experienced workforce to meet your business needs no matter the size of the project. We pride on delivering you results within the agreed time frame. Whether it's working on repairs, conversions, refits, new buildings or anything else marine and offshore, we look forward to executing your challenges.

Name: Progetto Elica
Description:
Progetto Elica (PE) is an Italian Company, located near Milan , that specializes in the design and production of custome-made propellers (both fully submerged and surface piercing), shaft lines and rudders for boats up to 140 feet in lenght.

Because of the long experience and very high skill level of our staff, we can design and produce both customized propellers and replicas of already existing propellers.

At PE, we employ a combination of advanced technologies (CAD/CAE design,CAM machining, computerized pitch gauge, dynamic balancing ), skilled craftmanship and expertise in the finishing processes of our custom-made propellers. 

Our production process is tightly controlled at every step, in order to supply high quality propellers, delivering optimal performances relative to the specifications of every single boat.

EUROHULL has direct and unrestricted access to the sea with seafront 55m for dry docking small ships with floating crane and launching barge. We offer in-house technical and operational management, supervised by an experienced team with expertise in shipbuilding and ship repair.

Innovation is a key pillar for Eurohull in order to be able to provide high quality services in the field of floating structures. For this purpose we have invested in an internal Research & Development department which has the mission to optimize technological means and methods through the continuous improvement of our offered services. We also invest in long-term partnerships with external research and technological institutions that are pioneers in our field of activity.

In addition, we place particular emphasis on the capabilities of robotic technology, as with its assistance we are able to carry out even the most demanding tasks with exceptional precision and saving of time.

Siden 1887 har R&M Group levert høy kvalitet og pålitelighet, og vi er kjent som eksperter i den maritime industrien.

Vi jobber med et stort nettverk av verft, skipseiere, operatører og arkitekter, og gjennomfører prosjekter på alle typer skip og installasjoner – inkludert offshore fartøy, cruiseskip, ferger, ekspedisjonsskip og mye mer. 
Vi dekker alle områder ombord, som passasjerområder, mannskapsrom og forsyningsområder.

Våre tjenester inkluderer:

Produkter fra våre egne fabrikker
Rådgivning og prosjektledelse
Installasjon i nybygg
Reparasjon og vedlikehold av skip i drift
Planlegging og installasjon av termisk og akustisk isolasjon
Produksjon av innredning som vegger, gulv, tak, dører, sanitærrom, ferdigkabiner og møbler
Alle våre løsninger er laget for å møte de strenge kravene i den maritime industrien, med fokus på presisjon og kvalitet i alle ledd. Vi er godt kjent med prosessene på verft, og våre kunder setter pris på vår erfaring og fleksibilitet. Vi takler utfordringer som stramme tidsplaner og komplekse oppgaver på en effektiv måte.

Name: Werkina Werkendam
Description:
Werkina Werkendam is gevestigd in een modern bedrijfspand aan de Werkendamse Biesboschhaven waar reders en schippers zich kunnen laten informeren over de laatste stand van zaken in de maritieme elektrotechniek.
 
Werkina is een van de meest ervaren en meest succesvolle scheepsinstallatiebedrijven in de regio. Het geheim van ons succes? We zijn eigenwijs genoeg om op gezette tijden tegen de stroom in te zwemmen en slim genoeg om te weten wanneer het tij is gekeerd en het tijd is voor een koerswijziging. En soms geven we zelf een nieuwe richting aan, zoals in 1995, toen we een nieuwe totaaloplossing voor de elektrische aandrijving en besturing van scheepsroeren ontwikkelden. Ons Data Besturings Systeem (DBS) met touch screen bediening kwam in 1996 op de markt en werd al snel de nieuwe standaard voor scheepsbesturingen. Sindsdien staan we in de scheepvaartsector bekend als innovatief, creatief en trendsettend.
 
Integraal ontwerpen, engineeren en assembleren
Werkina verzorgt het ontwerp, de engineering en de bouw van complete elektrische installaties voor uiteenlopende maritieme toepassingen, maar wij werden groot als toeleverancier van de binnenscheepvaart. Naast elektrische stuurmachines en motorbedieningen installeert Werkina al decennia lang nautische apparatuur, AC/luchtbehandeling, tankmeting, alarmering- en entertainmentsystemen. Gedurende de gehele ontwikkelingsgeschiedenis kwamen wij steeds opnieuw met verrassende innovaties op de proppen, zoals het modulaire power management systeem voor schepen W-ROP.
 
W-PROP
Werkina’s modulaire power management voor elektrische voortstuwing bespaart zowel ruimte als gewicht, onderhoud(skosten), brandstof en natuurlijk uitstoot van CO2, SOX en NOX! 
 
Gecertificeerd
Werkina werkt uitsluitend met materialen die hun betrouwbaarheid hebben bewezen. En niet te vergeten: met gekwalificeerde mensen in een CCR gecertificeerd, NEN-EN-ISO 9001:2008 gecertificeerd, SBB opleidingsbedrijf.

Name: Van Plaggen Boats
Description:
Van Plaggen is redefining boatbuilding.
What once started with refitting old lifeboats has evolved into an innovative approach with 3D printing at its core. By combining 3D printing technology with circular materials, we create electric boats that are produced quickly, flexibly and sustainably.

Because each design is developed entirely digitally and we are not bound by traditional molds or cutting packages, we can move faster from design to production. This allows for maximum design freedom and an efficient production process.

Van Plaggen is rooted in Dutch craftsmanship and built on innovation. We prove that modern engineering, customization and sustainability do not exclude one another but instead strengthen each other. In doing so, we show what the future of boatbuilding looks like today.

Description:
AWO Offshore Structures is a newly established company in Galati, Romania, which offers a variety of services in basic design, structural analysis, engineering solutions and consulting in shipbuilding and offshore field. Our team of experienced naval engineers and architects aims to provide the best consulting services in structural analysis, by initial scantling evaluation ship hull, and structural numerical assessments of strength, buckling, fatigue and vibration of the ship hull and offshore marine equipment's.
Ship and offshore structures became more complex because of the structure discontinuity and complex loading conditions, for example. An extended structure analysis is required by Classification Societies (IACS, BV, ABS, DNV) and by ship owners in order to prove the structure integrity.  Moreover, these structural analysis are performed before and during the project which requires reduced time for modeling and analysis.

Our participation in the creation of a new ship can be different - from a fundamental design concept to the development of a complete package of working design documentation with the organization of production and subsequent design support for construction work.

One of the strongest sides of Tetida Marine Ltd is the provision of services for the development of detailed engineering and production documentation for the construction of various types of new and refit of existing ships using 3D modelling technologies.

In other words, we accept orders both for the full cycle of design work on the vessel, with the sequential passage of all design stages of development, starting with the preliminary design, and for individual design and design activities.

Skipsservice utgjør en betydelig og vektlagt del av virksomheten til LOS-gruppen, og den lokale forankringen har gitt en sterk eierskapsfølelse og motivasjon blant våre ansatte i LOS Marine.
Som medlem i NMEC-klyngen i Rubbestadneset har vi tett samarbeid med Wärtsilä og andre dyktige aktører, slik at vi kan gi kundene våre best mulig totalservice på deres fartøy.
LOS-gruppen har mange års erfaring med skipsservice gjennom LOS Elektros utstrakte samarbeid med Wärtsiläs skipsserviceavdeling på Rubbestadneset. LOS Marines virksomhet startet med overtakelsen av denne avdelingen sommeren 2014, og selskapet har som mål å videreføre aktiviteten og styrke Rubbestadneset som geografisk knutepunkt for skipsservicetjenester i Norge.
Skipsservice vil utgjøre en betydelig og vektlagt del av virksomheten til LOS-gruppen, og den lokale forankringen har gitt en sterk eierskapsfølelse og motivasjon blant våre ansatte i LOS Marine.
LOS Marine vil fortsette det gode samarbeidet med Wärtsilä og andre dyktige aktører, slik at vi kan gi kundene våre best mulig totalservice på deres fartøyer.

Description: Fondata nel 1997 da Nicola Gragnano, "Comin Srl" è una storica azienda operante a livello globale nel settore degli allestimenti navali e industriali, con sede a Monfalcone, rinomato hub per le più grandi navi da crociera. Nel corso degli anni si è specializzata nello sviluppo di sistemi HVAC di altissimo livello. Oggi, in collaborazione con il consorzio TUB TECNOSHIPS, costituisce una realtà leader nella fornitura di soluzioni complete, in grado di soddisfare tutte le esigenze dei clienti. Dalla progettazione del sistema all'installazione e alla costruzione dei componenti, l'azienda garantisce la completa soddisfazione del cliente. Nella sua atmosfera dinamica e stimolante, Comin promuove un ambiente familiare che valorizza e sostiene i propri dipendenti. Di conseguenza, l’azienda è costantemente alla ricerca di nuove persone di talento da inserire nel suo team dedicato.

Name: Cámara de la Industria Naval Argentina
Description:
CINA es una Cámara de empresas argentinas que se dedican a la provisión de productos y servicios para la industria naval y afines.
Fue fundada en 1964.
Está conformada por más de 60 empresas entre Astilleros, Talleres y Proveedores de productos y servicios para la construcción y mantenimiento de Buques, Puertos, Bollas y Plataformas Off-shore.
La Industria Naval en la Argentina forma y genera miles de puestos de trabajo entre Ingenieros, Técnicos y Operarios en todo el país donde haya mar o ríos navegables.
 
 
Nuestro compromiso es conformar un País Industrial, con Flota y buques que enarbolen la bandera argentina.
 
Nuestros Objetivos son los siguientes:
Encaminar a la Industria Naval para su continuo crecimiento y desarrollo.
Asumir la representación y defensa de sus integrantes.
Colaborar con las empresas para facilitar el acceso al crédito.
Ser el puente que una y facilite la comunicación entre empresarios, astilleros, trabajadores, sindicatos, universidades y gobiernos.
Dar a conocer a los mercados externos y a los gobiernos las cualidades, habilidades y capacidades de los miembros de esta cámara.
Defender los intereses de las empresas pyme y su papel en el desarrollo económico y tecnológico de nuestro país y de Latino-américa.
Promover la integración y complementariedad con empresas latinoamericanas para mejorar la competitividad regional hacia el mercado mundial.
Facilitar a sus miembros capacitaciones e información de la industria para su desarrollo.
Promover la complementariedad entre empresas-miembro para mejorar su competitividad.

Name: CANTIERI MAGAZZÙ
Description:
CANTIERI MAGAZZÙ is a leading player in the luxury maxi-RIB sector, with a tradition of excellence that dates back over 60 years to Alfredo Magazzù and his “Alicudi” motorsailer, of which over 140 units were built. Key products include the patents and design of the “Monostab” (a single hull stabilised by a special fin system, 36 m, 350 passengers, speed 35 knots) for CANTIERI RODRIQUEZ, the design of a 21 m motor-yacht for CANTIERI BAGLIETTO and the more recent design of the “Surfing TRIS 75”, a 75 m “Fast Ferry” carrying 600 passengers and 150 cars at a speed of 50 knots. In the aeronautical field, the Yard has undertaken various R&D projects for a new seaplane model in collaboration with AERITALIA and DORNIER.

CANTIERI MAGAZZÙ’s maxi-RIBs enjoy a reputation for high quality, innovation, sophisticated design and seaworthiness, as well as being admired as jewels of the art of boatbuilding, with a focus on fine detailing and customer satisfaction. The range currently includes the M-GT, MX-11, MX-13, MX-14, M-16, MX-16 and M-18 models, with lengths ranging from 9 to 18 metres.
CANTIERI MAGAZZÙ is committed to safeguarding the marine environment. The M-16 and MX-16 were designed with sustainability in mind, using eco-friendly materials and construction techniques that reduce environmental impact. The engines comply with the strictest emissions standards, guaranteeing outstanding performance with reduced environmental impact.

Name: Effebi Spa
Description:
Effebi spa (effebivtr.it), commercial and patrol craft builder, is known for its flexible approach to customer requests matched with 30 years of expertise in composite boatbuilding up to 50 meters.
Headquartered in Tuscany, Italy, Effebi is run by the Balducci family since 1983.Today it is an undisputed global name in the shipping sector, leading the field in the processing of fiberglass and composite materials using advanced technologies. 
The company specialises in 15-50 metre boats, with the Effebi brand representing the commercial and patrol craft sector and the renowned Mangusta, Mangusta Oceano and Mangusta GranSport brand producing luxury maxi open yachts and displacement yachts.
Effebi works out of a number of different premises in the Massarosa, Massa and Carrara-Avenza area, covering a total of around 72.500 square metres (indoor and outdoor). All the production facilities are fitted with specific state-of-the-art equipment and systems which ensure products are always of the highest quality.

A highly specialised team of Effebi experts is always on hand to advise clients on the best technical solutions for their project and to guarantee the quality during every stage of the process from the design to the finished product through the various stages of construction: mock-up engineering, mould manufacturing, lamination, infusion, assembling and final fairing. The entire production process passes through a tight and experienced quality control to ensure the highest standards required by the International Classification Authorities and above all to match the customer satisfaction in observing a policy of total environmental respect.
