Name: Star MarinePro Denmark
Description:
Star MarinePro is driven by one big goal "We always want to provide the best technical solution to the marine and offshore industries".

For our clients, we coordinate, manage and supervise all projects in order to optimize benefit of China’s shipping know-how and infrastructure.
During the last 20 years, Star MarinePro has quickly developed from a marine parts and product trading company to a full-service technical provider: From newbuilding, conversion and dry dockings to many different areas.

Our hub is in Copenhagen and Shanghai, with branch offices in major shipping hubs around China. Wherever you are from, will maintain the asset value of your vessels as economically as possible. We ensure that the projects under our management are kept in optimal condition in terms of safety, technical, progress schedule, and commercially  – and make sure that all rules and regulations and complied with. 

Star MarinePro offers a comprehensive range of ship management services that we tailor to each vessel owner's needs. These include technical and engineering services, new building supervision, insurance, independent surveys, docking superintendent, audits etc.

We are dedicated to providing you first-class service with a wealth of knowledge and experience. Equally important, we want to be judged by our three core values: transparency, commitment and integrity.

Name: SPTsa
Description:
SPTmi was established in 1948 in Marseille, France and has since expanded with subsidiaries in Brest (France), La Seyne sur Mer (France)and Cape Town.
 Its subsidiary located in Cape Town, SPTsa (South Africa), is the group’s center dedicated for its marine and offshore activities. It is specialized in providing turnkey solutions for accommodation and living quarters, maintenance, outfitting, repairs, major conversions and upgrades in the marine and offshore industry.

SPTsa has developed capacity to carry out projects onshore at shipyards or offshore while in operation, enabling prompt and efficient service to a growing customer base at various locations worldwide.

The company focuses on providing an excellent service to clients whilst maintaining security standards that comply with relevant regulations and applicable specifications of marine and regulatory authorities.

Name: La Pasteca
Description:
Somos una empresa local con proyección internacional, líder en el abastecimiento de insumos navales. Estamos orientados en satisfacer las necesidades de la industria naval en toda su dimensión. Nuestro trabajo se encuentra divido en 3 grandes áreas: abastecimiento de insumos y repuestos, fabricación de aberturas navales y desguace de grandes buques.
Tenemos un amplio stock de elementos de fondeo(anclas, cadenas, grilletería en general), cubierta (cabrestante, defensas), sala de máquinas (motores y equipos de refrigeración) y artes de pesca, lo que nos permite ofrecer entrega inmediata.
Somos la única empresa en todo el país destinada a la fabricación de aberturas navales. Las ventanas y los ojos de buey que fabricamos se ajustan a normas internacionales; sus planos han sido aprobados por el RINA y varios lotes han sido certificados por la NKK.
En relación a los desguaces, contamos con la experiencia de 13 buques desguazados en los últimos años, en los puertos de Mar del Plata, Tigre y Coronel Rosales.
Formamos parte de la Cámara de la Industria Naval de Mar del Plata, de la Federación de la Industria Naval Argentina (FINA) y hemos participado en numerosas misiones comerciales a Brasil y Paraguay.
Location: Mar del Plata, Buenos Aires Province

Name: SCHRAVEN BV
Description:
Schraven BV is a trading company that is mainly focused on the maritime sector or related to it. Schraven BV was founded in 1980 in Huissen (near Arnhem). What started as a sole proprietorship has grown over time into a healthy company that currently employs approximately 30 specialized and motivated people.

From the start, Schraven BV has specialized in the sale, service and repair of rudder propellers. These rudder propellers, from different brands such as Schottel, Jastram, HRP and Rolls Royce Aquamaster, are available as deck mounting (navigator units), bottom mounting and transom mounting. They are also available as a tunnel (bow thruster) or as a retractable tunnel (bow thruster), entirely according to the customer's wishes.

Schraven BV has an extensive range of parts and complete installations for various rudder propellers together with the various Schottel versions SRP 30, SRP 50, SRP 75, SRP 100, SRP 131, SRP 150, SRP 225, SRP 300 and SRP 500.

Schraven BV has the it has its own design and drawing department, modern machinery and motivated employees. These make it possible to design, construct and assemble complete installations according to the customer's wishes.

Thanks to the large stock, which results in a fast delivery time, knowledge and good service, Schraven BV has proven to be a solid and reliable partner for the ever-increasing number of national and international customers.

For the delivery of engines, generator sets, winches, hydraulic (deck) cranes, workboats, patrol boats, bow thrusters, ferries, (coupling) pontoons, hydraulic/diesel aggregates, etc., please contact our affiliated company SCHRAVEN TRADING.

For a complete overview of our delivery program or for specific wishes, please contact one of our employees by e-mail or telephone

Name: Clean2Anywhere
Description:
We initiate inspiring experiments with waste to accelerate towards a circular and inclusive society. Together with you. 

Waste is a major global issue. The solution seems simple: stop throwing things away! This requires behavioral changes and an economy that reuses and rethinks materials sustainably. Therefore, we start experiments to inspire and stimulate you to take your own steps on the clean road to a circular society. Building 17th century ships from waste plastic is one of them.

This circular society asks for an inclusive way of working: we have to do this together. From multinationals, SMB and government to individual volunteers. Young and old, from all layers of the society. In our experiments we create unique, pluriform communities: people who are looking to take action in a meaningful way and seek for personal growth within the new circular world.

Name: Back Cove Yachts
Description:
Back Cove Yachts are single-engine downeast style motoryachts designed with practical elegance and nautical sensibility, and proudly manufactured in the State of Maine. 

From the spoon shaped bow to the gently sloped transom, the design elements of a Back Cove yacht speak to Maine's centuries-old maritime tradition and shipbuilding culture. Below the classic surface, Back Cove's are at the forefront of modern innovation, with the latest in propulsion technology and bow & stern thruster docking systems. Back Cove Yachts are the perfect balance of comfort and luxury with all the easy-maintenance benefits of composite parts and a single engine. Ranging from 34 to 41 feet in length, Back Cove's four-model lineup offers the perfect cruising yacht in any size. 

Back Cove's modern 240,000 square foot facility in Rockland, Maine, is home to 200+ of the finest boat-builders the state has to offer. Dedicated, talented, and passionate, our team of crafts-people sets the standard for sophisticated construction and seaworthy products. Continuing a shipbuilding tradition that spans more than four centuries, the Back Cove team is made up of the best and brightest Maine boat-builders leading the trade with their traditional workmanship and proudly representing their deeply-rooted cultural heritage.

Name: NEcOLEAP
Description:
NEcOLEAP is a pioneering research and development project led by Meyer Turku. With a focus on innovative and sustainable technology solutions, NEcOLEAP's main goals are to develop a climate-neutral cruise ship concept by 2025, and to achieve carbon-neutral shipbuilding by 2030.

Supported by Business Finland and in collaboration with over 100 Finnish ecosystem partners – including companies, universities, and research institutes – NEcOLEAP aims to secure the future competitiveness of the Finnish shipbuilding industry. The R&D topics focus on four key areas: the ship itself, shipbuilding, smart technologies, and future drivers. The cost estimate of the project is approximately EUR 160 million.

Name: Weka Marine
Description:
WEKA has been manufacturing marine products since 1957. The core business is boxcoolers which are used for inland waterways and sea-going vessels. Weka offers a range of materials for different applications. This is for economical as well as for environmental reasons.
 
Boxcoolers are used for cooling of diesel engines between 3 and 30,000 kW. Boxcoolers have several advantages compared to conventional cooling methods: lower weight and price, easier maintenance, higher reliability - especially in dirty or contaminated water.
 
WEKA has taken the boxcooler principle to new hights of performance. Recent application and technology development has resulted in a product which competes successfully with conventional cooling for diesel engines in almost any application.

Maxi Dolphin builds power and sailing yacht and what characterises the shipyard is the use of innovative high-tech materials, such as Kevlar or carbon fibre, and state-of-the-art production methods applied by a team of experts, who lovingly create each boat with a passion and dedication to the job that are rarely seen nowadays. Name: NAVELSYS
Description:
Navelsys, 20 yıllık mühendislik deneyimiyle askeri, ticari ve yat projelerine anahtar teslim elektrik sistemleri uygulama yeteneğine sahip, yenilikçi ve dinamik bir şirkettir. 2024 yılında kurulan Navelsys, elektrik ve otomasyon sistemlerinde uzmanlaşmış profesyonel kadrosuyla sektörde fark yaratmayı hedeflemektedir. Kuruluşumuzdan bu yana, müşterilerimize en yenilikçi ve güvenilir çözümleri sunarak sektördeki güçlü konumumuzu korumaktayız.

 

Navelsys olarak, askeri projelerden ticari gemilere ve lüks yatlara kadar geniş bir yelpazede anahtar teslim projeler gerçekleştirmekteyiz. Projelerinizin her aşamasında yanınızda olarak, en yüksek mühendislik standartlarına uygun, verimli ve uzun ömürlü sistemler sunuyoruz. Müşteri memnuniyetini en üst düzeyde tutarak, her projeye özel çözümler geliştirmek temel ilkemizdir.

 

Elektrik mühendisliği, pano ve konsol imalatı, otomasyon, montaj ve teknik servis hizmetlerimizle, projelerinizi başarıya ulaştırmak için tüm detayları titizlikle ele alıyoruz. Yüksek kaliteli mühendislik çözümlerimizle, sadece bugün değil, gelecekte de yanınızda olmayı taahhüt ediyoruz.

Name: DM Marine -Deck Machines Spares&Service
Description: At DM Marine, we specialize in providing high-quality spare parts and service solutions for deck machines on ships. Our extensive range includes essential components for all brands of windlasses, moorings, cranes, steering gear systems, and rudders. Additionally, we offer reliable solutions for hatch covers, ensuring your vessel operates smoothly and efficiently.

Name: Ship Motion Group
Description:
Ship Motion Group is focusing on motion-related products and luxury customization in vessels. We specialize in highly technical products and systems for yachts and commercial vessels. Founders and driving force of Ship Motion Group are Jan Bruggeman and Wouter Kloppenburg. They head a team of highly trained professionals with extensive experience in the design, production and installation of motion-related items. 
 
Start to finish approach
Our start to finish approach sets Ship Motion Group apart. We are usually involved with a vessel from the design phase up to the last service interval. Our service and support guarantee optimal performance from our products during their lifetime. Ship Motion Group is your partner for ultimate vessel performance.

Name: PT Noahtu Shipyard
Description: PT. Noahtu Shipyard was established in 1980 to carter to expanding shipbuilding and ship repair business. Our prime location in Bandar Lampung, Indonesia is ideal to server both domestic and international clients. Our graving dock facility of 205-meter in length has been in operations since 2017 and is able to accomodate ship up to 40.000 DWT. On-site, we have full-service workshops to ensure quality and fast turnaround time.

Name: FLOW Ship Design
Description:
Flow Ship Design is an independent ship design company, located in Pula, Croatia. Our main goal is to deliver innovative design and engineering solutions.

The company was established in 2018, (by four Naval Architects), based on a long experience and competence in the shipyards. Comprehensive design and first hand production experience and background in built and delivered vessels, of various ship types, leads to optimal design solutions in the best shipbuilding practice.

Flow ship design delivers innovative designs with customer specific requirements. The close cooperation with the customer is a key factor in the design process.

The company specialization covers various types of vessels, including all the phases of the ship design process as well as Research and Development.

Research and development are central to the business strategy program. The experience in research projects results in an improved ship design which provide higher performance and more value for our customers.

Name: Friesland Kabel GmbH
Description:
Die Friesland-Kabel GmbH verfügt über das größte Schiffskabellager Deutschlands, gleichzeitig ist auch ein Großteil unserer Produkte für die Bereiche On-/Offshore, Industrie, Datentechnik und Standardkabel ab Lager verfügbar.

Im Jahr 2007 gegründet - Heute ist unser Unternehmen im Vertrieb maritimer Schiffskabel und bei kundenindividuellen Fullservice-Logistikleistungen deutschlandweit marktführend. Zu unseren Kunden zählen namhafte Werften und Elektroinstallationsbetriebe. Die Friesland-Kabel GmbH ist vom Bundesamt für Ausrüstung, Informationstechnik und Nutzung der Bundeswehr (BAAINBw) als zugelassene Verkaufsstelle für militärische Kabel der VG-Norm 95218 der Bundeswehr zertifiziert, welche ab Lager verfügbar sind. Darüber hinaus werden weltweit Kabel und Leitungen für die Bereiche On-/Offshore, Industrie und Datentechnik sowie Standardkabel vertrieben. Seit 2019 gehört die Friesland-Kabel GmbH zur Faber Group.

Unser hochmodernes Logistikzentrum mit Bürofläche in der Hansestadt Wismar wurde 2019 eröffnet. Auf 10.000 m² Fläche befinden sich zwei Lagerhallen. Halle 1 ist mit modernen Kabelwickelmaschinen ausgestattet. Hier werden bei Verlegetemperatur die Kabel und Leitungen nach kundenindividuellen Anforderungen geschnitten, getapt, gelabelt und konfektioniert. In Halle 2 befinden sich 10 Hochregalreihen mit Platz für ca. 2.500 Palettenstellplätze.

Etwa 5.000 Artikel aus den Bereichen maritime Schiffskabel (zivil und militärisch) sowie Kabel und Leitungen für On-/Offshore-Anwendungen, Industrie und Datentechnik sind an unserem Logistikstandort permanent verfügbar und können von unseren Kunden jederzeit abgerufen werden. Die Lieferung erfolgt weltweit je nach Bedarf just in time oder time to time – alternativ kann die Ware auch bei uns im Logistikzentrum abgeholt werden. Darüber hinaus bieten wir individuelle Logistikdienstleistungen wie Schneiden, Tapen und Labeln oder Konfektionierung von Kabeln und Leitungen nach Kundenwunsch und Ziehlisten an.

Name: Chesva
Description: We specialise in welding and piping, interior and exterior, decking, carpentry and labour supply. Organised, punctual and always bringing a creative spark to any project.

Name: Absheiron Marine LLP

Absheiron Marine LLC is a trusted name in global marine and offshore consultancy, offering expert solutions to improve safety, efficiency, and environmental compliance across the maritime industry. With years of professional experience, we deliver customized services that help our clients stay ahead in an ever-evolving sector.

Our Core Services Include:

Marine Engineering – Enhancing vessel performance through expert design, propulsion optimization, and structural solutions.

Environmental Compliance Solutions – Supporting sustainable operations with VFDs, Ballast Water Treatment Systems (BWTS), and scrubber installations.

Ship Repair & Retrofit Services – Providing reliable repair and upgrade services to meet technical and regulatory standards.

Global Supply Chain Management – Offering fast and dependable procurement of marine equipment and spares worldwide.

Import, Export & Trading – Managing seamless logistics, freight forwarding, and documentation for international trade.

Crew Travel Management – Organizing complete travel solutions for crew members, including visa assistance and emergency services.

At Absheiron Marine, we are committed to delivering high-quality, client-focused solutions backed by innovation and industry expertise. Our goal is to become your reliable partner in navigating the challenges of modern maritime operations.

Name: MBK Marine Industries LLC
Description:
MBK Marine Industries L.L.C was established in 2019 in Abu Dhabi by H.H. Sheikh Mohammed Bin Khalifa Bin Zayed Al Nahyan with a vision to become a leading provider of one-stop-shop solutions in the Marine, Oil & Gas, and Industrial Construction sectors in the GCC region. 

The company operates a Shipyard that offers a wide range of services, including Shipbuilding, Repairs & Modifications, Steel Fabrication, Rig Repairs and Modifications, etc. with a focus on maintaining the highest levels of quality and safety. 

Equipped with cutting-edge facilities and led by a team of highly skilled professionals, MBKMI is dedicated to providing exceptional service to clients. Through the commitment to excellence and client satisfaction, MBKMI is positioned for continued growth and is set to make a significant impact in the industries it serves.

Name: Seawind Catamarans Europe
Description:
Seawind Catamarans Turkiye ( Seawind Deniz Araçları Sanayi ve Ticaret AŞ ) is the new manufacturing location of Seawind Catamarans.

The company is established in 2022, in order to manufacture Seawind’s popular bluewater cruising cats and also serve European customer base as a technical service and commissioning center.

Combining Turkiye’s great potential and heritage in boatbuilding with an ambitious and hardworking team, we are dedicated to manufacturing the top quality bluewater sailing catamarans of Seawind.

Seawind Catamarans Türkiye ( Seawind Deniz Araçları Sanayi ve Ticaret AŞ) Avustralya’nın ünlü okyanus sınıfı yelkenli katamaran üreticisi Seawind firmasının Türkiye’deki üretim lokasyonudur.

2022 yılında kurulan tesis, Seawind marka katamaranları üretmenin yanısıra, Avrupa pazarına yönelik teknik servis ve donatı hizmetleri vermeyi hedeflemektedir.

Türkiye’nin tekne üretim konusundaki potansiyelini, çalışkan ve azimli bir çalışma ekibi ile birleştirerek, Seawind’in en üst kalite yelkenli katamaranlarını üretiyoruz.

Name: FOURE LAGADEC Marine
Description:
𝗙𝗼𝘂𝗿𝗲́ 𝗟𝗮𝗴𝗮𝗱𝗲𝗰 𝗠𝗮𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗲 𝗰𝗼𝗻𝗰̧𝗼𝗶𝘁, 𝗳𝗮𝗯𝗿𝗶𝗾𝘂𝗲 𝗲𝘁 𝗺𝗼𝗱𝗲𝗿𝗻𝗶𝘀𝗲 𝗱𝗲𝘀 𝗲́𝗾𝘂𝗶𝗽𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀 𝗽𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗹’𝗶𝗻𝗱𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗶𝗲 𝗻𝗮𝘃𝗮𝗹𝗲 𝗽𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝗱𝗮𝗻𝘀 𝗹𝗲 𝗺𝗼𝗻𝗱𝗲. 

Héritier du savoir-faire d’ACH Engineering, l’entreprise a évolué au travers de son activité de maintenance des équipements livrés. 

𝗟’𝗲𝘅𝗽𝗲́𝗿𝗶𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗮𝘂 𝘀𝗲𝗿𝘃𝗶𝗰𝗲 𝗱𝗲 𝗹’𝗶𝗻𝗻𝗼𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻.
Son expertise en maintenance complexe d’équipements, sur des navires civils ou militaires, a permis à l’entreprise de développer un savoir-faire spécifique tant en conception qu’en fabrication. 
Aujourd'hui, Fouré Lagadec Marine s'affirme en tant que concepteur et équipementier de qualité pour l'industrie navale en proposant notamment des gammes de stabilisateurs anti-roulis et des systèmes anti-dérives adaptés aux enjeux de performance et d’environnement.
Les compétences de nos bureaux d’études en mécanique, hydrodynamique, automatisme et hydraulique font de Fouré Lagadec Marine un partenaire de référence.
La priorité pour nos équipes est de proposer un service complet, réactif et efficace à nos clients : fourniture de pièces détachées, intervention sur site, gestion d’obsolescence ou encore préparation d’arrêt technique complexes. 
Nous continuons à accompagner les armateurs et les marines militaires pour assurer une disponibilité maximum des équipements ACH et Fouré Lagadec,quel que soit leur âge.

Fouré Lagadec Marine fête ses 20 ans en 2023 avec un carnet de commandes courant jusqu’en 2027 et de belles perspectives sur de nouveaux projets.

Step by step we expand our service portfolio, which includes R&D, maintenance engineering standards and part catalogue; we support Group IT&IM and participate in on-line and off-line market communications. We aim to meet our client’s expectations on quality, time and costs. Our vision is to become a highly competitive ship design and support agent to provide a wide range of customised engineering and digital services.

Name: Officine Mazzer Srl
Description:
Produced in small, medium and large series, for over thirty years, the Officine Mazzer components are created to meet every construction need and aesthetics, both for pleasure boats and over 24 meters vessels. Press brakes and shears, robots, polishing and grinding wheels for lapping and polishing mirror, lathes and milling machines, TIG and MIG welding. Mazzer, thanks to its by high tech machines, can guarantee accessories of all shapes and sizes, even in the case of materials such as stainless steel AISI 316 L, a metal so resistant that there are no commercial extruded profiles, or the selection of particular aluminum alloys or titanium. Completely customizable, Officine Mazzer achievements are distinguished by the care given to surfaces, able to deal with an aggressive environment like the sea, the ideal solution for safety and elegance in all conditions.
Very flexible company always adapting to customer demands providing unique and customized solutions

Description:
Founded in 1965, NAVIGAIR based in Cannes and La Ciotat has been a MTU and ZF Official Service Dealer for more than 25 years, Alfa Laval Distributor and is also the exclusive Distributor of Northern Lights for France.

NAVIGAIR is used to bring close assistance to all his customer wherever they are and is able to provide all kind of maintenance and engineering repairs for propulsion engines & generators.

Our team of 30 people comprised of technical managers highly qualified and of factory-trained experienced technicians give to NAVIGAIR the ability to attend to all aspects of yachts and Megayachts propulsion care, maintenance of generator sets and power system refit projects.

Name: Navinco Ltd
Description:
Established in 1992, we are a Naval Architecture and Marine Engineering Bureau. Our almost full time involvement with Mega Yachts, Naval/Coast Guard Crafts and Special Purpose Crafts commenced in 1999. 

Our company’s activities are presented at http://www.navinco.gr and amongst others include design, construction and re-construction of mega yachts including project management and construction supervision, mega yacht pre-purchase condition surveys, evaluation surveys as well as design and construction of naval and special service crafts.

One of our recent projects, the rebuilding of the 46m Feadship “Ancallia” won the Best Rebuilt Yacht Award at the 2015 World Superyacht Awards (http://worldsuperyachtawards.com/2015-winners/).

 Navinco has executed a number of mega yacht reconstruction, refit and re-engining projects and has undertaken five new building projetcs, two 39 meter, 22 knots fire fighting vessels for the Greek Ministry of Interior, as well as three 29 meter, 28 knots fire fighting vessels for Neorion Shipyards.

Name: BLUE MARIN SURVEY
Description:
Denizcilik sektörünün farklı kesimlerinden gelen insan kaynağımız ve kırk yılı aşan deneyimimizin sinerjisini kullanarak denizlerimizdeki teknelerin güvenle seyir yapabilmelerine katkı sağlamak amacıyla yola çıktık.

Askeri ve ticari bahriyeden edindiğimiz deneyimle;

Yüksek teknolojileri kullanma alışkanlığımız,

Uluslararası alanda çeşitli ülkelerin liman otoriteleriyle sürdürdüğümüz denetim kaynaklı ilişkilerimiz,

Zorlu tabiat koşullarında görev yapmış olmanın sonucu olarak, tekne kullanıcılarına karşı geliştirdiğimiz empati duygusu,

Gemi işletiminin kendine özgü şartlarında karşımıza çıkan teknik problemleri tespit etme ve çözme yeteneğimiz,

Tersanecilik sektöründen edindiğimiz deneyimle;

Teknelerin tüm yaşam döngüsünde karşılaşılabilecek sorunların kök nedenlerine erişebilme yeteneğimiz,

Kaliteli ürünlerin/teknelerin ortaya çıkarılabilmesi amacıyla mükemmeli arama alışkanlığımız,

Montaj ile başlayıp kabul testleri ile sonuçlanan süreçte tekne sistemlerinin performans değerlendirmelerine yönelik profesyonelliğimiz,

Güvenli bir tekne üretimi için gerekli olan klas kurallarına ve uluslararası standartlara olan hakimiyetimiz,

Görevli olarak bulunduğumuz yurt dışı tersanelerinde elde ettiğimiz deneyimlerimiz ve aldığımız eğitimlerimiz,

İdeal tekne sörveyinin gerçekleştirilmesine yönelik kontrol ve test yöntemleri ile ilgili profesyonelliğimiz,

Yatçılık ve yelkencilik eğitimi sektöründen edindiğimiz deneyimle;

Uluslararası sertifikaya sahip eğitmenlerimizin operasyonel ihtiyaçlar konusundaki danışmanlığı,

Danışmanlarımızın yelkencilik ve yatçılık konusundaki profesyonelliği, vermeyi vaat ettiğimiz hizmetlerin en güçlü teminatıdır.

Her şeyin üzerinde tuttuğumuz "dürüstlük ve güvenilirlik" ilkemiz ile denizde can ve mal güvenliğine verdiğimiz hayati önem, bizi daima farklı ve güçlü kılmaktadır.

Name: ShipBuilding Industry Magazine
Description: Global yards, engineers and fleet managers read ShipBuilding Industry (SBI) magazine’s coverage of highspec vessels built around the world. Like shipbuilding suppliers & co-makers, SBI crosses borders to provide news on technology solutions for new builds, conversions and repairs in both commercial & non-commercial vessels. With a clean design and high-quality production, SBI stands out with its use of strong photography. The trade journal’s international editors talk to the key players and visit vessels and yards. The magazine offers wider coverage via its digital edition, which is accessed via the dedicated website www.shipbuilding-industry.eu.

Name: Kraken Marine Industries
Description:
Established in 2017 KRAKEN MARINE INDUSTRIES are builders of Professional FRP Tactical vessels, Patrol boats, Speed boats, Professional Fishermans, Workboats and Naval / Military Interceptors in sizes from 5m up to 24m. Kraken Marine’s vessels also have an enviable and unmatched reputation for exceptional seakeeping abilities and designed boats must operate in all weather conditions.

Kraken Marine employ 10 staff encompassing the full range of boat building skills. We have our own full time engineers, designers, electricians, composite, shipwrights, mechanics, metal fabricators and welders. All our work is carried out in house and we do not use outside contractors. This means we have full control of production capability and quality. Our FRP laminators have up to 15 years experience in laminating and laying up hulls and the majority of staff are long serving, loyal and highly experienced. We have a small but motivated and talented team with the experience necessary for any project.

Name: Falcon SuperYachts
Description:
Inspired by adventure, crafted in elegance since 1988.  Falcon Yachts draws inspiration from the past in order to update today’s brand image and embrace the owners of yesterday, like those of tomorrow, with the aims to define the “future tradition” of the newly developed yacht models.  

Clear lines, strength, elegance, and symmetrical balance are the key style elements for the latest range of Falcon yachts now developed in an upscale segment from 40 to 52 mt.

Name: CLC Composites
Description:
We design, develop and manufacture composite components for several markets.
We are a multidisciplinary team with more than 13 years of experience on the composite industry.
We work for the yachting industry, agricultural industry and several other markets that requiere special developments of composite components. 
Comitment, profesionalism and high standards  are our basics.

Name: Latitude Yachts
Description:
Latitude Yachts is a world-class shipyard based in Latvia, specializing in the design and construction of custom luxury multihulls and superyachts with cutting - edge composite engineering and futuristic design.

What sets us apart is a unique capability unmatched anywhere in the world — there is no size limit to the yachts and catamarans we can build. From advanced engineering to final delivery, we turn ambitious visions into reality, creating vessels that combine striking aesthetics, exceptional performance, and uncompromising craftsmanship.

Since its founding, the shipyard has delivered some of the most remarkable yachts in the world, including the iconic Galaxy of Happiness.

The current project is LANIAKEA — an 88-foot luxury power catamaran redefining elegance and efficiency.

With each project carrying the name Latitude, we proudly showcase Latvia’s excellence in yacht building to the global stage, reinforcing our position as one of the most advanced and visionary shipyards in the world.

Name: HEOL COMPOSITES
Description:
Heol Composites is an expert in the fabrication of hollow parts with reinforced mechanical properties in a single-stage process. We have perfectly mastered autoclave 7 bars curing, pre-preg carbon/epoxy, in female molds in aluminum or infused carbon. We have patented an industrial process that allows us to manufacture the parts in one go (without additional machining), and parts with complicated structures, hollow but reinforced with longitudinal stringers, extremely resistant and above all incredibly light.

We are known in the competitive sailing sector since 2002 for our carbon parts, regularly getting to the podium in the most prestigious inshore and offshore races. Skippers and teams confirm that our advanced technology and our reliability have contributed to their greatest victories. Our spars (rigging elements such as masts, booms, spinnaker poles, bowsprits, spreaders, mainsail battens), our appendages (submerged elements, such as lifting rudders, keel fins, daggerboards, and foils with adjustable flaps), and our internal structural parts have mechanical specifications which are optimized for competition. We have markedly participated in making the famous boats fly (GC32, TF35, 60' IMOCAS, ULTIMS, AC45, Mini 6.50...).

Our knowledge, which developed in the highly demanding context of competitive sailing, is adapted to industrial and aeronautical applications and to automotive racing. We design technical solutions for niche segments, where the lightness of carbon combined with its resistance allows us to go higher, faster, and be stronger.

Name: CSBC Corporation, Taiwan
Description: CSBC Corporation engages in building, manufacturing, and repairing various ships and onshore equipment in Taiwan and internationally. It offers bulk, cement, and product carriers; and container ships, reefer vessels, tankers, tug boats, and naval ships, as well as oil drilling rigs. The company also provides ship repair services; and offshore engineering services, such as manufacture, installation, assembly, and shipping of domestic and international ship unloaders, as well as level luffing cranes. In addition, it manufactures marine hardware comprising rudder and stern frames, and lashing bridges; and offers ship coating, anti-corrosion coating on large steel structures, surface treatment, and professional coating services. The company was formerly known as China Shipbuilding Corporation and changed its name to CSBC Corporation in March 2007. CSBC Corporation was incorporated in 1973 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

Name: Karver Systems
Description:
Driven by a common passion for sailing, a team of engineers and naval architects associated with manufacturers have created Karver Systems. A few years later, Karver has been improving sailboat performance at both Grand Prix and recreational levels outfitting every day sailors from Optimists to Superyachts.

Located in Honfleur (Normandy, France), the company earned its credits supplying Code sail furlers, locking systems and lashing blocks to round the world solo racers, Volvo VOR70 teams, ORMA Trimaran in addition to America’s Cup Syndicates. Within a few years, Karver has been involved in many sailing victories including the 33rd America’s Cup, 2008 Volvo Ocean Race, IMOCA 60 Barcelona World Race 2011, and several Mini Transat. In 2009, the Maxi Trimaran Banque Populaire V sets a new Atlantic Sailing Record in 3 days, 15 hours, 25 mn and 48 second at average speed of 32.94 knots, with Karver solutions onboard.

Throughout the years, Karver applied its experience gained in supplying racing gear to Superyacht and cruising boats making sailing safer and easier.

Yüksek kalitedeki işlerini müşteri isteklerine ve beklentilerine uygun şekilde gerçekleştirmek suretiyle, Gisan Altınova Tersanesi kendisini müşteri memnuniyetine adamıştır. Bunu etkin şekilde düzenlenmiş olan ve uluslararası düzeyde gereksinimleri temel alan Kalite Yönetim Sistemi vasıtasıyla gerçekleştirmektedir.

Son senelerde kaliteli iş bitirme ve iyi uygulamalarla çalışma esasını giderek geliştiren, ISO 9001, ISO 14001 ve OHSAS 18001 Kalite Belgelerine sahip Gisan Altınova Tersanesi’nin, her tipte yeni gemi inşasını yapabilecek ve her tip gemiyi onarabilecek imkân kabiliyeti bulunmaktadır.

Name: CUBEDIN
Description:
Everchanging demands across the maritime domain means that ships must become more flexible if they are to keep pace with evolving requirements. Ships that take decades to design and build quickly become obsolete within the modern operating environment.

As a result, modularity must become a central concept in future ship design. And to support this, standardised systems have been created. Not only does this swift recalibration increase efficiency within national navies but a standardised, shared systems allows naval powers within military alliances greater availability of warships to meet a range of global operations.

CUBEDIN provides flexibility with a smart, cost-effective solution to support modern modular ship design.

CUBEDIN was established in 2022 as a pioneering new venture in ship design and modular technology. It was formed between OMT, a premium maritime consulting firm with a strong heritage in containership and frigate design, and Systematic which develops world-leading software solutions across the defence, healthcare and renewables industries. This combination provides a formidable offering to the maritime industry where shipbuilding and design is faster, more cost-effective and provides adaptable, multi-role vessels.

Name: Flexboat Náutica
Description:
No final do ano de 1988, o empresário carioca já radicado em São Paulo Jaime José Alves Filho foi buscar na Itália e na França a tecnologia e as mais modernas matérias-primas para fabricar os melhores barcos infláveis do Brasil.

Nasce então em 1990 a FLEXBOAT CONSTRUÇÕES NÁUTICAS LTDA, com sua fábrica e sede na cidade de Atibaia a 60 km de São Paulo em uma área de 25.000m2 de frente para a Rod. Fernão Dias. A cidade de Atibaia foi escolhida por estar em um entroncamento rodoviário importante com fácil acesso aos principais mercados náuticos do Brasil, SP, RJ, MG e os Estados do Sul.

De lá para cá já se vão mai de 25 anos de muito trabalho e dedicação. Neste período a FLEXBOAT construiu uma marca de referência e qualidade que se tornou SINÔNIMO de barcos infláveis.

Desde o início a FLEXBOAT sempre utilizou o Hypalon (tecido especial a base de borracha e neoprene, importando da França) para a confecção dos flutuadores. Este material confere ao barco características de segurança, resistência e durabilidade incomparáveis que, juntamente com outras matérias-primas de primeira qualidade e um time de profissionais altamente treinados e qualificados, fazem do FLEXBOAT o melhor barco inflável produzido no Brasil.

Inicialmente produzindo barcos pequenos de até 12 pés de comprimento, a linha da Flexboat cresceu e se desenvolveu até a produção do SR 1000, o maior e mais moderno barco inflável produzido no Brasil, com seus imponentes 34 pés. Até hoje já foram  mais de 15.000 barcos produzidos e vendidos no Brasil, EUA, Caribe e alguns países da Europa para a satisfação de seus clientes.

Em 2005, a FLEXBOAT iniciou o desenvolvimento de barcos para uso militar e se tornou a principal fornecedora deste tipo de embarcação para as forças de defesa do Brasil. Polícia Federal, Marinha do Brasil, Bombeiros, Defesa Civil, IBAMA, Polícia Ambiental estão entre os clientes da FLEXBOAT.

Name: Olympic Marine S.A.

In a safe harbor in the outskirts of Athens, Olympic Marine features fixed and floating berth slips that can accommodate boats, sailboats, yachts, multihull vessels and catamarans up to 70 meters and 3.8 m draft, as well as dry boat storage facilities, and everything else a boat owner desires.

Set in a natural, protected cove in the east of Athens, its berthing services and amenities include:

680 fixed dock and floating pontoon berths that can accommodate any boat up to 70m length and 3.8m draft 
Hard standing boat storage for up to 700 boats and up to 250 tons
A covered park for trailer boats 
Retrieving and launching services 
Lifting services with modern travel lifts
A refueling station with high quality branded fuel

Complementing its berthing services, Olympic Marine offers the full range of marina services so that you can moor with safety.

Olympic Marine boasts a series of safety and security features, as well as all complimentary services expected from a modern international marina, including:

Electronic access control system to the docks 
24/7 private security
24/7 fresh (drinking) water and electricity 
Trailer boat ramp
Parking lot
Waste oil and sludge collection tanks and pumping equipment 
Sewage pumping equipment 
Fire stations
Free Wi-Fi

In addition, at the Olympic Marine you can also find:
Bar-Restaurant

Name: Future Foiling SRL
Description:
FUTUR-E combina la tecnologia dell'industria nautica, del design automobilistico e dell'aviazione con un sistema cinematico integrato di ispirazione automobilistica, simile alle sospensioni delle auto di Formula 1. In particolare, il cinematismo gestisce in sincronia, con attuatori elettroidraulici, il movimento dei foil con dinamica indipendente, sotto il controllo di un'unica centralina, dotata di giroscopio, che predispone ogni elemento.

La cinematica meccanica è plug and play, può essere installata indifferentemente su uno dei 4 foil in dotazione, non ha ingombri all'interno dello scafo, rendendo accessibile la manutenzione anche quando la barca viene varata in acqua. La maneggevolezza è molto simile a quella di una comoda auto sportiva.

FUTUR-E è una Eco Boat: la sua struttura è costruita con fibre al 100% riciclate. Anche i foil e i timoni sono realizzati in fibra di carbonio. I motori elettrici garantiscono una modalità a emissioni zero.

Name: ATLAS SHIPYARDS
Description:
ATLAS SHIPYARDS S.A. specializes in all ranges of marine services. We guarantee success by investing in extensive knowhow and expertise, up-to-date technology, new strategies, experienced management and highly trained personnel.

Quality & Tradition
Our state-of-the-art equipment and modern facilities combined with skillful employees, allow us to efficiently respond to diverse requests; such as engineering and electronic repairs and installation, propeller repairs and balancing, osmosis treatment and several surface preparation techniques. Office space, meeting rooms, internet and a wide range of other service facilities are available for your convenience during refit permanence. In addition, yacht and marine services, repair, spare parts and material spots are all located in the surrounding district of Perama. 

The shipyard has 1,000 square meters of land and 20,000 square meters waterfront. The vast dimensions of the hauling dock, our shipyard premises and the construction of the new section completed in 2007 by one of the greatest Greek Construction Companies, in combination with the high - end 500 ton Travel Lift, give us the ability to accept, lift and service a wide range of ships and all types of yachts and Mega yachts up to 70 meters long.

History
In 1913, the company's founders, Katsoulakis and Vertopoulos successfully established the shipyard in luxury ship-buildings, manufacturing and repairs. Since 2007, the combined efforts of Theologos Katsoulakis, Andreas Vertopoulos and Kyriakos Kaiseroglou, three ambitious men active in the market, have kept the tradition of ATLAS SHIPYARDS S.A. alive and striving.

Long tradition in manufacturing, building and repairs, technical experience and know-how, combined with robust, high-end shipyard construction, we can guarantee service quality and security for your property.

YD Engineering and Consulting Ltd. Co. was established in early 2020 by Birol Okyar with the aim of providing high-quality engineering and consulting services to the marine and shipbuilding industry.

The company was founded upon the vision of bringing together over 20 years of solid and diverse experience gained at leading shipyards, uniting a team of dedicated professionals who are passionate about delivering excellence in every project.

Guided by our motto — “Reliable support for building your dreams” — we are committed to upholding the highest standards of engineering ethics, integrity, and technical excellence. At YD Engineering and Consulting, our clients can be confident that we will always act with professionalism, precision, and a deep understanding of the maritime sector’s evolving needs.

Name: Akdeniz Shipyard
Description:
Akdeniz Shipyard was established in 2007, in the southern part of Turkey by Ceyhan-Yumurtalık region. 

Akdeniz Shipyard is the only shipyard located in Free Zone area in south of Turkey which has activities in both new building , repair & maintenance and construction of industrial plants.

Having a total area of 210.000 m2, within the private sector, Akdeniz Shipyard holds the distinction of being the largest shipyard of Turkey and Eastern Mediterranean in terms of area and capacity.

The services to be provided in the shipyard are listed below:

- Shipbuilding services: The company is able to build a wide portfolio of ships consisting of dry cargo ships, chemical tankers, off shore supply vessels, shallow draft tugboats, multi tags, landing crafts, multi cats, fishing vessels, pontoon barges, bunker barges, ships with individual design, yachts and boats and military vessels. 

- Ship repair and maintenance services (R&M): All types of vessels could be served for their R&M requirements such as cleaning, scraping, painting, engine overhaul and general services such as providing electricity, fresh water, heat & steam, etc. 

The shipyard has acquired a 820 tons capacity Travel Lift, making the investment biggest Travel Lift in Turkey and only the 10th biggest in the world, in terms of capacity. 

- Ship conversion services: The shipyard could provide ship conversion services, i.e. changing the structure/configuration of vessels in order to enable them to carry out a different purpose such as conversion of chemical tankers to bulk carriers. 

AKDENİZ Shipyard was awarded by ISO 9001:2008 – ISO 14001:2004 and ISO 18001:2007 certificates.

Name: KND Naval Design
Description:
KND Naval Design is the leading naval architectural practice  of its kind in South Africa.  The organization is based in Cape Town, SA.  Founded in 1984, the company’s prime focus was to become a world-class research and development facility, both locally and internationally.    This objective, already achieved, continues to be our driving force.
 
KND NAVAL DESIGN  brings the power and diversity of 21st century information technology and delivery to our clients:  
              
Corporate, private individuals and governments.
 
Our range of professional services and end-to-end business solutions are designed to help you define and implement your organization's or department’s required strategy, quickly and predictably ...  with minimal risk.
 
Our holistic approach crucially includes the full scope of addressing our clients requirements, both current and future.
 
 This includes the following  but is not exhaustive:
 
•    assessing our clients’ needs and desires
 
•    evaluating climate, operational conditions and specific circumstances
 
•    plus calculating targeted applications such as dynamics vs costs
 
•    evaluating the ‘like-to-have’ features versus the ‘reality’
 
•    conceptualizing out-of-the-box solutions, our speciality
 
•    agreeing  written brief incorporating all relevant factors including
  performance predictions and economical data for example
 
•    incorporating international regulations  (ISO, ABS and SOLAS)
 
•    implementing design stages - preliminary and final
 
•    utilizing state-of-the art Robotics  - 5 AXIS CNC

Name: ScanMarine AB
Description:
ScanMarine is an exclusive interior outfitting, turnkey contractor, for the worldwide marine shipbuilding and offshore industry.

ScanMarine clients are ship owners and shipyards around the world. We can carry out both minor and major new-buildings, conversion and refurbishment contracts for all type of vessels and offshore living quarters.

Our strength is to push through even with the tightest project schedule and still finish on time with a quality product. This is possible due to our excellent projects management skills including all activities from planning & design in our office to coordination of building activities onboard during installation period.

Our ISO 9001/ISO 14001 by DNV certified Quality and Environmental Management System ensures the quality and efficiency of our operations, as well as the Environmental awareness.

Name: NAVITEAM
Description:
Naviteam œuvre depuis plusieurs années dans l’application de peintures haut de gamme destinées aux bateaux de luxe.

Soucieux de s’adapter pour le mieux aux contraintes de chaque projet, Naviteam répond de façon personnalisée tant sur le plan technique, organisationnel, ou budgétaire. Naviteam vous apportera une solution globale, clé en main à chaque projet de peinture.

Naviteam est aujourd'hui expert dans les applications haut de gamme de peinture sur Yacht et Mégayacht, ainsi que dans les applications de peintures marines industrielles. Capable d’intervenir sur des unités de toutes tailles en France ou à l’étranger, la rigueur et le professionnalisme des équipes en fait un partenaire idéal pour mener à bien les projets les plus complexes.

Naviteam propose des solutions complètes, les opérations annexes à la peinture peuvent être gérées et managées par nos équipes. Cela comprend la mise en place d’échafaudage, le confinement, l’éclairage, la ventilation, la gestion des énergies.

Naviteam à pour ambition de conforter son statut d’expert dans l’application de peinture sur bateaux de luxe et de développer significativement son activité de peinture sur bateaux de Professionnels.

Name: CS Serviços Marítimos
Description:
Fundada em fevereiro de 2011 com a Razão Social de JAF Serviços Marítimos Ltda., e em janeiro de 2017 seus sócios resolveram mudar o nome da razão social para CS Serviços Marítimos Ltda, onde C é de Costa e S é de Soares, referente aos sobrenomes dos sócios da empresa.

A CS é especializada nas atividades de Plano de Sinalização Náutica, Locação de Boias de Sinalização Náutica, Estudos e Projetos de Engenharia Marítima e Submarina, Confecção de Planos para Serviços Marítimos diversos, Consultoria e Assessoria Marítima, Projetos e Locação de Âncoras e Amarras para fundeio de Plataformas e Navios Sonda, Serviços Técnicos de Marine Survey, Hidrografia, Geotécnica e Geofísica Marinha, Lançamento e Enterramento de Cabos e Dutos Submarinos. 

Em nossa visão, uma operação bem planejada deve ser precedida de todos os estudos técnicos e autorizações necessárias, para que seja desenvolvida sem interrupções, de maneira econômica e dentro do risco aceitável.
CS é credenciada junto a Marinha do Brasil, inscrita na DHN (Diretoria de Hidrografia e Navegação) / CAMR (Centro Almirante Moraes Rego), para prestar os serviços instalação, manutenção preventiva e corretiva e remoção de sinalização náutica.

Description:

Name: Sea River Nautic Products
Description: SEA RIVER is a 100% Brazilian company that emerged in 1990. When the need for a company specialized in nautical safety equipment for Brazil was noticed. For many years SEA RIVER worked focused on the safety segment, in 2009 it started to diversify, reaching the entire nautical line and some other specific segments. We currently supply the largest nautical companies, armed forces, shipyards and various distributors throughout Brazil. We are committed to always working with Ethics, respect for our partners and guaranteeing the quality of our products. Our domestic or imported products are accepted by all regulatory bodies in the sector (including DPC) in accordance with NORMAM 5. “0118 - MATERIALS EMPLOYMENT WITH CERTIFICATES FOR FOREIGN GOVERNMENT CERTIFICATES a) Material that is of foreign origin may be used , provided that the International Conventions, Codes and Resolutions, ratified by Brazil in the International Maritime Organization (IMO), demand to be of the “approved” type. The “Homologation Certificate” must explicitly state the rules on which they are based; the issuing Maritime Authority is a member of the International Maritime Organization (IMO), provided it is issued in English (preferably), French or Spanish; The Certificate will not be accepted if there are indications that the material does not meet its intended purpose. b) Those interested in the use of inflatable foreign lifesaving equipment in Brazilian flag vessels, must observe if there is accreditation in at least one Inflatable Lifesaving Equipment Maintenance Station in Brazil in accordance with this standard. The issue of Homologation Certificates by the DPC can only occur when the prototype is subjected to the tests provided for by the national manufacturer and has followed the same system. Source: DPC website https://www.dpc.mar.mil.br/normam/N_05/normam05.pdf ”Case

Name: Karnafuly Shipbuilders Limited
Description:
Karnafuly Ship Builders Limited was established in 1994 for repair and construction of ships. The yard is comprised of 8 (Eight) acres of land with 2 (two) slipways each of 560 feet length and a fully equipped Marine workshop. It has a marketing office in Singapore and United States with drawing-design features dealt by G B Marine (Singapore) Limited.

It is situated on the southern bank of the river of Karnaphuly, Chittagong. It is the largest privately owned ship builder/shipyard in Bangladesh having capacity to dock 2 vessels upto 350 feet in length at a time. The shipyard is supported by diesel powered winch to operate both the slipways. Since Karnafuly ship builder’s started its operation, 27 ships like Ocean Going Tugboats, Fishing trawlers, Tankers, Pontoon and water bus etc. were newly built and more than 400 ships of various types repaired and renovated.

Recently this shipyard has remarkably reconstructed a 15000 DWT, 10000 BHP tanker named M.T. Banglar Shourabh of Bangladesh Shipping Corporation (BSC). This tanker was exploded seriously while undergoing tank cleaning and was about to sink. Karnafuly Ship Builders Limited has promptly salvaged the ship, then the ship was towed to Chittagong Port where she was cut into two pieces and reconstructed with about 700 tonnes of steel. The vessel is being operated in full swing. Karnafuly Ship Builders Limited has proved its excellence in marine engineering and ship building in Bangladesh.

To meet the demand of present day for new construction, the management of KSBL has formed a company named KARNAFULY SHIPYARD (PVT.) LIMITED with the intention of 100% export oriented ship construction. The management and technical persons will remain same as KSBL.

Name: Scheepswerf Poppen
Description:
Scheepswerf Poppen is een familiebedrijf dat zijn oorsprong kent in 1946 in het Groningse Winsum en via de Lemmer sinds 1963 gevestigd is in het dorp Zwartsluis in de ‘Kop van Overijssel’. Het vakmanschap is inmiddels overgedragen aan de vierde generatie scheepsbouwers.

Wij willen graag een betrouwbare partner zijn die de ondernemers begrijpt en ondersteunt om een van de belangrijkste investeringen van de ondernemer optimaal te kunnen laten varen. 

Want een constante stroom aan technologische  innovaties, wet- en regelgeving en een veranderende vraag en aanbod vanuit de markt, vragen veel van onze klanten om te kunnen blijven concurreren en ondernemen. 

Wilt u weten wat wij voor u kunnen betekenen als scheepswerf? Neem contact met ons op, of laat u informeren op deze website door de werkzaamheden die wij voor u kunnen uitvoeren of de reeds uitgevoerde projecten.

Name: SICOI SRL Società Benefit
Description:
La SICOI è nata nel 1980 raccogliendo gli input di mercato derivanti dall’attuazione delle nuove leggi in tema di risparmio energetico nel settore civile ed industriale. Negli anni l'azienda è notevolmente cresciuta sia per fatturato che per qualità del servizio fornito ed oggi è azienda leader in Italia ed all'estero nel settore della progettazione e della realizzazione di lavori e servizi integrati per l’industria.
Con uno staff tecnico e commerciale altamente qualificato l’azienda è in grado di rispondere con efficienza alle esigenze del mercato nazionale ed internazionale. L'esperienza maturata permette alla SICOI di fornire un servizio professionale completo e tale da garantire al cliente la risoluzione di qualsiasi necessità attraverso una struttura affidabile, versatile e disponibile.
Dopo oltre 40 anni di esperienza in siti chimici, petrolchimici, geotermici, elettrici e civili e nei più importanti cantieri navali, la SICOI ha raggiunto un’alta professionalità in lavori di isolamento termoacustico e nel noleggio in opera di ponteggi industriali. Accanto a tali specializzazioni sono nate altre importanti esperienze che rendono l’azienda capace di fornire un service completo, grazie al know how raggiunto nei lavori di bonifiche, verniciature, sabbiature ed edilizia.

Name: HiTech
Description:
Hi-Tech; 1990 yılında, 2.5 dönüm kapalı, 4 dönüm açık bir inşa alanına, toplamda 6.5 dönüm arazi üzerine saç kesim ile sanayide inşa edilen çelik konstrüksiyonların montaj öncesi koruma boyalarını ve kesim işlemlerini sağlamak amacıyla kurulmuştur.  
Piyasa talepleri doğrultusunda ve kendi bünyemizde kullanılmak üzere günlük ortalama 7,000 m2 raspa, boya işlemi ve saç kalınlığına bağlı olarak 3,000 m2 saç kesim makinesi kapasitesiyle çalışmalarımızı devam ettirmekteyiz.
Kurulduğumuz 1990 yılı içerisinde dikişsiz çelik boru ve aksamlarını ithal edip sorunsuz bir şekilde satışını gerçekleştirmeye de başlayan Hi-Tech, sektörde hızlıca yükselmeye başlamıştır.
Hi-Tech, 1995 senesinde kendi bünyesine kattığı uzman kadrosuyla “Gemi İnşa Hizmeti” de vermeye başlamıştır. Sektörde hızlıca yükselen Hi-Tech, günümüzde 100’den fazla gemiyi inşa etmiş, inşa sürecinde sahibi olduğu raspa boya fabrikası ve stoklu boruları sayesinde sektöründe öncü olmayı başarmıştır.
Hi-Tech, 2020 yılından itibaren başladığı gemi sacı, Hollanda profili, levha sac, galvanizli sac, baklavalı sac, kösebent çeşitleri, lama çeşitleri, NPU – NPI profilleri, H profilleri ve hammaddeleri hem yurt içinden hem de yurt dışından ithal etme hizmetine güçlenerek devam etmektedir. Ülkemizdeki deniz sanayicilerine kaliteden ödün vermeyen müşteri odaklı satış hizmet politikasıyla yılda +17 bin ton sac sağlayarak sektörde adını bu alanda da duyurmayı başarmıştır. 
Rekabet ortamında kendisini yenilemeyi ilke edinmiş olan Hi-Tech; her işi konusunda uzman kadrosu ile başararak yeni projelerine aynı temel anlayış ile devam etmektedir. Kurulduğu günden beri yenilikçi projelere imza atan Hi-Tech, müşteri memnuniyetini maksimize etmek amacıyla yüksek kalitedeki üretim ve hizmet anlayışını daha hızlı ve daha az maliyetle gerçeğe dönüştürmeyi ana hedeflerinden biri olarak konumlandırmıştır.


İletişim için; info@haytekgemi.com

Name: REC BOAT HOLDINGS, LLC

In 2014, the legacy expanded globally when Groupe Beneteau—one of the world’s largest boat manufacturers—acquired the facility. Today, Rec Boat Holdings, LLC proudly builds Four Winns, Wellcraft, and Scarab boats, continuing to “Bring Dreams to Water” from the heart of Northern Michigan.

Name: Deha Marine
Description:
Deha Marine is a specialized supplier offering insulation, outfitting, and technical procurement solutions for the shipbuilding, maritime, and broader industrial sectors. Representing quality, trust, and sustainability in the field, we provide MED/IMO-certified materials, high-performance construction chemicals, ceramic fiber insulation products, and marine furnishing solutions. Understanding the unique demands of both maritime and industrial applications, Deha Marine delivers not only products but also efficiency, safety, and comfort. Headquartered in Istanbul and backed by a flexible logistics infrastructure, we are a reliable partner for both local and international projects.

1. Marine Insulation
Deha Marine specializes in the supply of MED/IMO-certified marine insulation materials designed for fire resistance, thermal and acoustic performance. Our product portfolio includes ceramic fiber insulation and construction chemicals tailored for shipbuilding applications. We support both new build and maintenance projects with reliable, high-quality solutions that meet international standards.

2. Marine Furnishing
We offer MED/IMO-certified production of marine mattresses, seats, and curtains. In addition, Deha Marine provides marine flooring applications and certified covering materials suitable for passenger and crew areas. Our outfitting solutions are designed to enhance safety, durability, and comfort in both newbuild and retrofit projects. 

3. Industrial Supply & Raw Materials
Beyond the maritime domain, Deha Marine delivers a wide range of technical materials, equipment, and raw materials for industrial and shipbuilding applications. We ensure our products meet global standards and provide clients with a reliable and sustainable supply chain

Name: BAYONNE DRYDOCK & REPAIR CORP.
Description:
Our Mission is to be recognized as the Drydock and Repair Facility of choice for our Customers through value-added, quality business methods delivered with practiced professionalism, efficiency, and effort, while listening to and meeting the needs of our customers and employees, with the utmost regard for the safety of individuals, equipment and the protection of the environment.

Bayonne Drydock & Repair Corp. operates a full service ship repair yard located in the Port Jersey area of New York/New Jersey harbor. Conveniently situated just miles from the Verrazano Bridge, the Bayonne facility has no aerial draft restrictions and is ideal for both commercial and government vessels. Our graving dock measures 1092′ x 148′, with a dock floor load capacity of 99,000 tons. Complementing the yard’s full service machine, pipe and valve shops is a professional staff of experienced marine fabrication and repair craftsmen. Available 24-hours a day, Bayonne Drydock offers high quality, expert service on any standard or specialized job, particularly in an emergency.

Name: COMARBEL
Description:
English below

La COMARBEL est une société de services aux bateaux électriques. Basée à Marseille, la COMARBEL opère dans quatre secteurs : intégration de solutions électriques sur bateaux en bois et du patrimoine, la location-vente de bateaux électriques, le conseil en activités maritimes et portuaires et la gestion de flotte de bateaux électriques ou patrimoniaux. L'objectif de COMARBEL est de promouvoir une navigation élégante et décarbonée. La philosophie de l'entreprise est de respecter l'environnement autant que l'esthétique et le patrimoine naval. 

COMARBEL is a service provider for the electric boat industry based in Marseille (Fr). COMARBEL operates in four sectors: electric retrofit for wooden boats, electric boat construction, consultancy in maritime and port activities and luxury charters. COMARBEL’s aim is to promote carbon free and beautiful boats. The philosophy of the company is to respect the environment as much as the aesthetic and the history of boats.

Name: JBS-Yachting B.V.
Description:
Bij JBS Yachting geloven we dat het proces van het bouwen van een droomjacht voor iedereen een plezierige ervaring moet zijn. Onze passie voor maritieme techniek drijft ons om dit proces niet alleen spannend, maar ook toegankelijk en leuk te maken. Daarom delen we onze diepgaande kennis en ervaring met elkaar, betrekken we de juiste specialisten en zorgen we voor open en duidelijke communicatie met onze klanten.

Hoe we dit doen? Door een persoonlijke benadering te hanteren waarbij we nauw samenwerken met onze klanten, luisteren naar hun wensen en ervoor zorgen dat zij zich betrokken voelen in elke stap van het bouwproces. We geloven dat heldere communicatie de sleutel is tot een succesvolle samenwerking en dat het delen van onze passie voor jachten deze ervaring nog waardevoller maakt.

Als toonaangevend jachtbouwer hebben we een indrukwekkend portfolio opgebouwd van elegante en luxueuze recreatiejachten, commerciële vaartuigen en unieke merkjachten. Elk vaartuig dat we bouwen, weerspiegelt onze toewijding aan vakmanschap en innovatie, altijd met oog voor detail en de hoogste standaarden van luxe en comfort. Bij JBS Yachting realiseren we niet zomaar boten; we creëren onvergetelijke ervaringen op het water.

Name: Speich S.r.l.
Description: SPEICH company was born in Genoa in 1938. We used our knowledge in the field of optical processing for patent and produce the first clear view screen system. For several years the production of clear view screens was the main activity of the company.  In 1959, following the request of one of the most ancient italian shipyards, we designed the first wiper specifically made for the marine environment. The business has grown focusing its specialization according to strict criteria of reliability and durability. The great production flexibility and experience were the reason for a good success of SPEICH systems  also in the international area. Since 1995, in addition to the production for professional use, we developed a windscreen wipers line called “SPEICH Nautic” for small and medium pleasure boats that can be easily customized while installing. In the same year the company began to provide wiper systems for railway applications. Since 2003, the company operates with a quality system according to the ISO 9001 rule. In 2010 the company designed and developed an innovative wiper control system, called DCS, based on the CAN bus communication within all the equipments involved in a wiper system. Today SPEICH exports 70% of its production to 25 countries, is NATO and other navies official supplier.

Name: Society of Naval Architecture Students
Description:

Tech. program in Naval Architecture and Shipbuilding at the Department of Ship Technology, CUSAT. It is one of the first professional student bodies in universities across the country. With a legacy spanning over 45 years, SNAS remains a cornerstone of the department's techno-cultural and social activities.

Under the mentorship of esteemed faculty and alumni of the department, SNAS organizes a diverse array of seminars, workshops and competitions, that stand out for their quality, cutting-edge Insights, and impactful contributions to academic and extra-curricular development. Its unwavering commitment to excellence fosters Innovation, collaboration, and professional growth among its members, ensuring that SNAS continues to thrive as a vibrant and influential student body.

Name: Kusch Yachts
Description:
For almost 40 years Kusch Yachts have been professional partners in designing and constructing mega-yachts.

Our company was founded in 1981 by Claus Kusch (1944 – 2004) who delivered his first yacht, Lady Georgina (ex. Katalina) in 1982. From that time on Kusch Yachts have been placing orders for a range of international clients with several shipyards.

Twelve years ago Claus Kusch found the congenial and reliable partner he was looking for. This was Peters Werft located in Wewelsfleth, Germany - a shipyard that follows a 140-year-old tradition. Since then this competent affiliate has opened up new ways of transforming the bold Ideas of Kusch Yachts into reality.

Today, Kusch is active in all areas of mega-yacht construction, including repair and re-fitting. These mega-yachts are literally dreams come true.  Kusch Yachts are world famous for their high-end and quality yachts – tailor-made in Germany.

The wishes of the client are the core of our business. Our job is to bring them to the surface even when they are submerged. For this a basis of trust and complete discretion are essential.

The result of our wealth of experience and craftsmanship is guaranteed to heighten your senses, stir your emotions and give you one of the greatest thrills life can offer. Every aspect of our yachts is meticulously crafted – from the high-quality, state-of-the-art exteriors that immediately catch the eye to lavishly appointed interiors with all of the amenities that provide the comfort to enjoy and make the most of your lifestyle.

Name: SHIP & BOAT S.r.l.
Description:
In SHIP & BOAT, everything we do is aimed to satisfy the needs of our customers. The know-how acquired over the years together with our trained and competent professionals, guarantees a high quality and technologically innovative design service.

Who we are

SHIP & BOAT born from the synergy of the experience of 2 naval architect who worked in the major classification registers, assimilating experience in the shipbuilding design and construction field. Now our team is made up of professionals (engineers, architects and draftsmen) able to satisfy the demands of the naval industry: from 3D ship design to shipowner's consultancy, from engineering calculation to construction supervision.

What we do

SHIP & BOAT provides multiple flexible and high quality services by offering engineering capacity to shipowners and shipyards starting from the initial conceptual design phase, following the basic design and ending with detailed design. We also deal with the management of ships, administrative procedures for registration and updating with the flag authorities and is representative of the following flags: Saint Vincent and The Granadines, Palau and Sierra Leone.
The competence of our team and its limited dimensions gives everyone the opportunity to participate and contribute to decisions during the design or management process and adapts more quickly and easily to the necessary changes or new initiatives or solutions. We do not invest only in our team, but also in software. Some of the programs we use are: AutoCad, Inventor, Rhinoceros, Orca3D, ShipConstructor, PIAS and Naviswork.

Description:
Since 1971, Claus Bruns has been dedicated to the exclusive and high-quality furnishing of yachts and is known for its outstanding quality. In the manufactory, the individual production of upholstery, cushions and textiles for the interior and exterior takes place, in which design and functionality are perfectly matched. Experienced craftsmanship and innovative creations from fabrics and leather, ensure the highest quality.

Individuality is the trump card on every yacht. In cooperation with world-renowned designers, a custom-fit concept is created for your yacht, which is perfectly adapted to your wishes and conditions at sea. For example, manufactured decorative cushions are equipped with special weights to stay in place in heavy seas. Of course, the cushions are water-repellent, UV-resistant and have a high form stability.

The luxurious, noble ambience of a yacht also needs high-quality furniture. Claus Bruns varies skillfully with different styles, whether clear, modern design or traditional Chesterfield furniture. With the own development "Tapchan" and other Solitaire furniture, Bruns offers you a first-class solution.

In our in-house upholstery, your favorite pieces are being restored with a trained eye for details. One of the most exclusive ways to refine your fabrics is offered by our embroidery service. In this way, unique textiles are created that emphasize the character of a yacht. We also take care of the furnishing of your crew or guest rooms, e.g. with high-quality embroidery on bathrobes, clothing and bed covers.

The Bruns team supports you in all stages of a project, from the idea to the realization. With the "Cushion Handout", your crew has all the important information on board for the correct placement of the cushions as well as for their care. The 24-hour emergency service underlines the all-round service and supports you with replacement materials as well as complete labeling.

Name: Jupiter Marine International
Description:
With over 35 years of boat building experience, the Jupiter Team is committed to building the finest, most technologically advanced offshore sportfishing boats available today. Every Jupiter is individually built to the exacting specifications of the sportsman who demands the very best in offshore performance, styling and reliability.

Jupiter was founded in 1989 in Jupiter, Florida and named after that prestigious coastal community. In 2007, Jupiter relocated to its current facility on the gulf coast of Florida to once again expand its production line in anticipation of its Express line of vessels. This 50,000 sq.ft. facility allows Jupiter the space needed for three lines of production, mold storage, paint booth and expanded office space.

If you are looking for the finest sportfishing boat this planet has to offer "one with great looks, fantastic seaworthiness, speed, quality construction, and a resale value second to none" take a ride on a Jupiter.

Jupiter boats are certified by the National Marine Manufacturers Association (NMMA), and the boat's construction techniques meet or exceed the standards established by the American Boat and Yacht Council (ABYC) and the U.S. Coast Guard.

Jupiter's outstanding performance is due primarily to its exclusive "Posi-Stern" hull pad design. This unique feature creates a variable dynamic stern lift that increases efficiency by providing a perfect running angle at all times, resulting in higher speeds, sharper turns, increased fuel economy and a smoother ride with no loss of visibility from the helm.

Name: Bayou Metal Supply & Manufacturing, LLC
Description:
Bayou Metal Supply & Manufacturing, LLC opened its doors in 2004 as a local
distributor of aluminum plate and extrusions with a commitment to providing the best service, a diverse inventory, and competitive pricing to customers in Louisiana and throughout the Gulf Coast.

Since our modest inception, the company’s strong faith in God and visionary leadership, with direct input from our customer base, has pursued an aggressive course of product line expansion into stainless steel and many other specialty metals.

Bayou Metal Supply & Manufacturing is ISO 9001:2015 certified. We continue to
expand the value-added services we offer to our customers. Our capabilities include two (2) CNC Routers processing up to 8′ x 40′ aluminum sheet and plate and a third with a 10’ x 40’ table. We have three AccurPress press breaks that include a 30’ break and two 12’ breaks. Over time we have advanced our fabrication to include Friction Stir Welding, Machine Shop, Welding, Precision saw cutting, shearing and on-site quality testing facility.

Metal service centers provide customers with readily available aluminum, stainless steel, and other metals inventory and processing. Bayou Metal Supply & Manufacturing meets customer needs of available inventory and stands above our competition by providing reliable, efficient, and timely delivery, flexible minimum order size, and unsurpassed quality control. We focus on inventory management and materials management in the marine and related industries.

Our decentralized management business model empowers our sales force to excel in their areas of expertise so that they can adapt and respond quickly to specific regional, market, and industry conditions. Bayou Metal Supply & Manufacturing employees provide excellent service to our customers, many of whom are also fellow community members and neighbors. We strive to provide quick turnaround, with the highest quality and services, saving time, labor, and expense for our customers.

Description:
Mission statement: We want to deliver the maritime industry with high quality shading solutions that are always a perfect fit to customer demands. We listen, perform and are reliable.
Our core values are reliability, co-operation and the love for making something beautiful. 

Products and turn-key shading solutions:

Awning systems with carbon uprights and awning sails:
We have various standard cylindrical, tapered and curved uprights but can also  any shape of carbon upright following the designer’s intent.
These uprights can be executed with lighting, powered via a wired or wireless power supply.

Slide-out and retractable awnings:
The retractable awnings have a carbon spoiler shaped to fit nicely in the yacht’s structure and uses fabric as a shade. We can also deliver complete custom carbon slide-out systems. Both systems are completely tested and commissioned in the workshop

Louvre systems:
Turn-key cassette systems with aluminium or composite rotating louvres with composite fashion pieces to nicely connect it to the yacht’s structure

Parasols:
We offer full custom carbon parasols but also offer semi-custom options

Other products that combine carbon uprights and fabric (e.g. projection screens)
 
We are actively using the available knowledge and experience inside the company and the feedback from clients to continue to improve existing products and develop new.

Sol-Mates B.V. is a Dutch limited liability company started by 5 entrepreneurs with a different but proven track-record in the yachting industry. There is a background in composites, metal constructions, special engineering, 3D engineering and project management. With our knowledge and experience, together with our joint network, we strive to be the trustworthy partner for high-end, bespoke shading solutions (removable awnings, slide-outs and retractable, louvres, parasols etc.).

Description:
Zenoro Marine Generators

Zenoro secures an optimum in on-board power supply. Our custom-built power solutions for niche marine applications are best in class. All our product lines and service solutions – whether for new build, refit or service – are tailored to your needs and demands.

Our portfolio includes Zenoro Essential, Zenoro Premium, Zenoro Hybrid and Zenoro Commercial: generators in the range of 55 ekW at 50 Hz up to 300 ekW at 60 Hz. Each product line has a different focus in design and selection of components, without ever compromising the quality.

All Zenoro generators are designed and built in-house in Ravenstein, The Netherlands. After sales services are supported via the distributors and dealer network, from our headquarters in Ravenstein, or from our local establishments in France: Antibes and Pontchâteau.

Name: Cecar Nautica
Description:
Cecar Nautica è il cantiere nautico di Antimo Ceregini, fondata dal lui nel 1967, con costanza e lungimiranza è divenuta negli anni una delle realtà più solide nel diporto genovese.
Cecar è un vero e proprio punto di riferimento, essendo il nostro, un centro multiservizi per le barche di ogni tipo. Da oltre 50 anni collaboriamo con i più prestigiosi marchi della nautica italiana ed estera, per garantire ai nostri clienti, le migliori soluzioni, risparmiando.

La nostra MARINA di 54 posti barca è dotata di fingers di ultima generazione, utenze in banchina, zona ristoro, servizi igienici e docce, a disposizione del cliente.
La sua posizione, nella zona più ridossata della marina aeroporto, assieme alla nostra cura e passione, fanno della Cecar Nautica il luogo più sicuro dove ormeggiare la vostra barca tutto l’anno. A fronte dei sempre più frequenti eventi meteorologici straordinari, con noi potete dormire sonni tranquilli, saremo sempre vigili.

Dealer e Service ufficiale HONDA MARINE e SELVA per la provincia di Genova, la nostra officina è preparata per riparare, manutenzionare ed installare ogni tipo di motore marino. La professionalità e l’esperienza dei nostri tecnici, saprà sempre risolvere ogni problema.
Vendita diretta fuoribordo Honda Marine e Selva, siamo venditori autorizzati di ricambi multimarca per motori marini.
Il cantiere, con un area di oltre 1500mq, può alare imbarcazioni fino a 15mt. Specializzati in riparazioni di danni strutturali e cicli antiosmosi, da sempre a Genova siamo famosi per la qualità e il risparmio nella pulizia e il trattamento antivegetativo delle carene (vi consigliamo di prenotare con largo anticipo sul calendario).
La nostra Gru è sempre attiva, alaggi e vari da e per camion/carrello, sospensioni e controlli certificati di sicurezza, sono all’ordine del giorno.
Garantiamo inoltre installazione accessori, manutenzioni ordinarie e straordinarie, allestimento strumenti.

Since founding the company, I’ve been dedicated to designing boats that simply work. As the saying goes: "Perfection is achieved when there's nothing left to add."
The BlackJon, our best-selling model, is a perfect example – a reliable, straightforward boat with excellent value for money. Made from high-density polyethylene (HDPE), it is unsinkable and built to last. Our boats outlive conventional workboats, and they’re 100% recyclable. We offer a 5-year warranty on the hull.

All of our boats are proudly built in the Netherlands, by a skilled team of craftsmen focused on quality and custom solutions. Whether you're looking for a tough Jonboat, a high-speed V-hull, or a specialized craft tailored to your unique needs, we’ve got you covered.

Feel free to contact me directly to learn more, schedule a visit, or discuss how we can provide the perfect boat for your operations.
