Royal Deck is  one of Europe’s leading specialists for producing and installing decks on Super Yachts in Teak as well as in alternative wood species or composite products. 
As part of these projects Royal Deck installs cap rails, stairs and special joinery works. 

The most important International Super Yacht builders are our main clients. We handle for these leading shipyards new build as well as refit projects. Our quality, reliability and flexibility are famous and almost unique.

Royal Deck has premises in The Netherlands; Krimpen aan de Lek (head office), Zaandam (workshop) and in Italy; (Livorno (office & workshop). 

Beside these locations our teams move freely and without restrictions throughout whole Europe and even further if required. 

Successful projects were already completed in the Netherlands, Germany, Russia, United Kingdom, France, Spain, Italy, Croatia, Greece, Malta, Turkey, Qatar and Taiwan.
Location: Krimpen aan de Lek, South Holland

Name: Cantieri Navali Austin Parker
Description:
It was at the end of the ‘90s that the Austin Parker shipyard grasped the potential for developing a line of yachts in the style of the traditional lobster boats used by the fishermen of Maine (USA) in the tough conditions of the Atlantic Ocean.

The yard thus became the first in Italy to invest in this project, creating a distinctive yacht concept that immediately set a trend amongst owners, increasingly attracted by an old-fashioned style with a sense of solidity, strength and reliability, immune to passing trends. 
n 2008 the Austin Parker brand was acquired by a group of entrepreneurs with strong yachting traditions, and through the formation of a new company and under the direction of talented managers, it underwent a major relaunch in impressive style. Within just a few years, with the stylistic contribution of one of Italy’s most famous designers, Fulvio De Simoni, the yard created a completely new line of yachts to consolidate a brand capable of meeting owners’ needs, and achieved outstanding customer satisfaction levels from the very first craft built.

And it is its design strategy that has made the key difference, enabling the Austin Parker boatyard to stand out on a competitive, selective, increasingly globalised market. A style suited to universal taste, popular on the new international markets for pleasure craft. 

The yard’s range currently comprises 6 models of yacht from 36 to 74 feet, craft of genuine value, with  sophisticated design, skilled construction, choice components, comfort, performance, environment-friendliness and an unmistakable style immune to time and fashions.

Name: MCPS
Description:
MCPS specialise in sacrificial, ICCP and MGPS anodes for the Shipping, Port and Offshore.  We can offer technical assistance with anode designs as part of our service providing client with peace of mind that the Hulls, Quay walls and Jacket foundations are fully protected from corrosion.   MCPS hold DNV ’Type approval’ certification for sacrificial anodes and only supply raw materials of western origin.  

MCPS offers Sacrificial Anodes, ICCP, MGPS, Hydro Sonic Anti Fouling, Cathodic protection design, corrosion inspection and testing,  all carried out by NACE qualified CP Engineers.

Name: JC NAVALIPS
Description:
JC Navalips is the Global Leader in manufacturing the highest quality requirement Ni-Al Bronze products, with over 50 years of successful history.

Originally founded in 1974 as a joint venture between LIPS (NL) and AESA (Spain), we started our journey as Navalips, specializing in the production of propellers for the maritime industry. On top of our marine propulsion expertise, we have long track record in energy sector components, from hydro power impellers to oil&gas bronze components.

In 2003, Wärtsilä acquired 50% ownership of LIPS, thereby becoming the majority stakeholder in Navalips. Two years later, in 2005, Wärtsilä purchased the remaining 50% shares, making Navalips a wholly owned subsidiary of Wärtsilä.

In 2008, our manufacturing facility in Cantabria underwent a significant expansion, doubling its production capacity. This expansion not only strengthened our presence in the market but also allowed us to cater to the growing global demand for our high-quality propellers.

In 2022, Javier Cavada acquired the Wärtsilä plant, ensuring its continuity and operational excellence. Under the new ownership, the facility was renamed JC Navalips, and is developing an expansion plan. We proudly maintain a global supply agreement with Wärtsilä, leveraging their expertise and resources to continue delivering exceptional propeller solutions to our valued customers worldwide.

At JC Navalips we are committed to upholding the legacy of excellence and innovation that has been the hallmark of our company. Our experienced team of professionals, state-of-the-art manufacturing processes, and relentless focus on quality allow us to meet and exceed the expectations of our Customers.

Name: NAVESO Design & Consulting
Description: Ship Design and Marine Engineering

Name: Dockyard and Engineering Works Ltd. Bangladesh Navy
Description:
As a country with hundreds of rivers running through its veins, it’s no wonder Bangladesh has ship building skills in its blood. Dockyard and Engineering Works ltd. (DEW) began their humble journey as ‘Narayanganj Dockyard Limited’, as the first ever of the Indian Sub-Continent, on 1926. And after an eventful journey of three different regimes including British Colonial, East Pakistan and finally independent Bangladesh, it has shunned its skills of shipbuilding for more than a century. Now under the expert hands of Bangladesh Navy from 2006, it has seen immense growth and success going forward.
Built over 21.78 acers of land area with a riverfront of 900 ft. It is capable to dock vessels up to 1500 ton (light weight) of 88.4m (290ft) length. The production capacity of the yard is 2070 tons steelworks per year. It has 27,220 sq. m. of open area and 3,000 sq. m. enclosed area for shipbuilding. 26% space is kept free for greenery to make it an environment friendly green industry.
DEW ltd. specialized in constructing modern ships & craft for military, govt. organizations and for private owners including Patrol Craft, Inshore patrol Boat, Fast patrol Boat, Gun Boat, Landing Craft Tanks, Tug, Oil Tanker, Passenger Ferry, Ro-Ro Ferry, Survey Vessel, Coaster, Composite High Speed Boat, Aluminum Speed Boat, Bay Crossing Barge, Self-propelled Cargo Berge, Pontoon etc. We also provide Refit and Repair, Engineering and Manufacturing support of ships, craft and machinery components.
The country's first warship was built at DEW Ltd, Narayanganj in 1972. In 2012, DEW built a first of its kind water jet powered Aluminum boat for Bangladesh Coast Guard.
Our valued clients are including Bangladesh Army,(BN), (BCG), (BIWTA), (BIWTC), (CPA), (MPA) and many other Private Organizations.
DEW ltd. is an ISO 9001:2015 certified company, and maintains the philosophy of Total Quality Management (TQM) to ensure highest quality and support of our products and services to our valued clients.

Name: AYCAN DENİZCİLİK | AYCAN MARITIME
Description:
Biz AYCAN Denizcilik.
SAYGI & AİLE & DÜRÜSTLÜK 
Öz değerlerimiz ve prensiplerimiz bizi alanımızda özel kılmaktadır.

Name: Tokyo Marine
Description: Tokyo Marine is a shipbuilding company based out of 9005 Overlook Blvd, Brentwood, Tennessee, United States.

Name: VMWD Verband Maritime Wirtschaft Deutschland
Description:
Der VMWD ist der aus BVWW und DBSV heraus neu gegründete Verband Maritime Wirtschaft Deutschland e.V.. Er ist international sichtbar und übernimmt die Vertretung der Interessen der maritimen Wirtschaft gegenüber den deutschen sowie europäischen Vertretern der Politik, ihren Gremien, Behörden und Institutionen.
Unser Ziel ist Wassersport für alle Menschen zugänglich zu machen, attraktive maritime Berufsperspektiven zu schaffen und eine Branche zu etablieren, die in Politik, Bildung und Öffentlichkeit wahrgenommen wird. Dabei verstehen wir uns als Impulsgeber, Gütesiegel und Sprachrohr für die gesamte maritime Wirtschaft.
Wir sind Netzwerk, Lobbyverband und Branchenvertretung in einer Organisation.
Wir unterstützen unsere Mitglieder beim Ausbau und der Fortführung ihres Geschäftes. So setzen wir uns beispielsweise dafür ein, dass Jobs in der maritimen Wirtschaft zu Wunschberufen
künftiger Generationen werden. Wir schaffen es, eine Brücke zwischen Innovation und Tradition zu schlagen und kümmern uns um die Belange aller Betriebe, Zusammenschlüsse und Einzelunternehmer aus der maritimen Wirtschaft – unabhängig von ihrer Größe und Wirtschaftskraft.
Zugleich stärken wir unsere Mitglieder durch praxisnahe Services: Juristische Beratung, Normungs- und Zertifizierungsarbeit, Unterstützung bei Messeauftritten,Kommunikationsberatung und branchenspezifische Aus- und Fortbildung zählen zu unserem Angebot. Als Full-Service-Kompetenzzentrum bringen wir Hersteller, Handel, Dienstleister und Verbände an einen Tisch und schaffen eine Plattform, auf der Kooperation, Fortschritt und gemeinsame Interessen wachsen können.
Durch unsere regelmäßigen und umfassenden Marktbeobachtungen, Studien und Mitgliederbefragungen sind wir DIE Informationsquelle für potenzielle Investoren, Politik, Gesellschaft und die Medien.

Name: LS Consultoria Naval
Description:
Empresa de Consultoria Naval que oferece serviços especializados para a indústria marítima. 
Assessoramento de Empresas e investidores, auxiliando na melhoria de seus resultados financeiros, redução de custos, e aumento do desempenho operacional.
Oferecemos serviços para cumprimento de normas técnicas e exigências legais exigidas pela Autoridade Marítima e demais legislações ligadas ao setor naval.

Name: JML Shipyard Agency
Description:
JML Shipyard Agency is a family owned company that was started by Jens and Markus Larsson (JML) in Fjällbacka, Sweden 2011. With over 30 years of experience in the marine business and a lot of contacts all over the world, they were convinced that they could offer a product as a shipyard agent that would be attractive for both shipyards worldwide and shipowners in the Scandinavian market. 

The goal from the beginning, which still applies, is to have a close and personal relationship with all stakeholders and, through a vast experience of the business, assist owners and managers towards a successful repair, conversion or new building project. 

This approach has been successful and there are now four employees in the company with a vast number of references worldwide.

Name: GTF Finland Oy
Description: GTF Finland Oy is part of a family business GTF Freese (Germany) with over 100 years of experience in flooring and surface treatment works. Our Finnish business unit provides the complete own brand of products' range of IMO-approved Marine Floorings for interior and exterior floors. We are offering innovative flooring solutions as full turn-key delivery under one roof for cruise ships, river cruisers, navy vessels, yachts, ferries, and the offshore industry.

Name: Scheepswerf en Machinefabriek 't Ambacht B.V.
Description: Scheepswerf ’t Ambacht beschikt over een ervaren team van professionals waarmee altijd naar de snelste en de goedkoopste oplossing voor de klant wordt gezocht. De term ‘thuis in de binnenvaart” past daarom ook perfect bij Scheepswerf ’t Ambacht omdat wij als team met korte lijnen en goed overleg tussen de klant werken, brengen we elke klus naar een goed resultaat.

Name: Oonincx Scheepsonderhoud
Description:
Oonincx Scheepsonderhoud BV (OSO) is een zeer divers bedrijf gericht op technisch onderhoud van binnenvaartschepen, scheepsafbouw en metaalbewerking. Het bedrijf is opgericht in 1991 en heeft zich in de loop der jaren verder ontwikkeld, van specialist op het gebied van binnenvaartschepen tot leverancier van uiteenlopende producten. Ons team kenmerkt zich door hun vakmanschap, professionaliteit en service gericht werken.

Onze werkplaats bevindt zich in Werkendam. Hier worden o.a. allerlei soorten staalconstructies geproduceerd en geassembleerd. Technisch onderhoud aan schepen vindt plaats waar nodig. OSO werkt ook als onderaannemer en/of als projectleider, in samenwerking met de diverse scheepsbouwers, aan de afbouw van binnenvaartschepen.

Onderhoud en reparatie
Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in technisch onderhoud en reparatie van binnenvaartschepen en metaalbewerking in de breedste zin van het woord. Onze opdrachten lopen uiteen van kleine reparaties tot groot onderhoud en revisie in zowel binnen- als buitenland. Wij zijn vertrouwd met de diverse lastechnieken en werken met een vast team van gecertificeerde lassers die hun vak verstaan. We beschikken over een geavanceerd en modern machinepark voor onder meer knippen, kanten, walsen en bewerken.

Verkoop, fabricage en onderhoud van pompen
Door jarenlange ervaring in de scheepsonderhoud, kunnen we tevens een juiste pompoplossing bieden met een scherpe prijs en een snelle levering. Daarnaast zijn wij fabrikant voor ladingpompen voor tankbinnenvaart en industrie. We repareren alle merken, zowel op locatie als in onze eigen werkplaats. Oonincx pompen kan het pakket complementeren met afsluiters, slangen en koppelingen. Het huren van pompen en bijbehorende slangen en toebehoren, voor één dag of voor een langere periode, behoort ook tot de mogelijkheden.

Name: Scanwipers
Description:
Scanwipers A/S manufactures an extensive range of marine wipers as well as a wide range of Atex wipers for hazardous environments.
Our cutting edge, innovative and highly efficient development and production facilities in Denmark ensure up-to-date solutions of the highest quality.
Our modern and automated production facilities ensures fast and reliable delivery.
Our advanced storage and logistic facilities ensure day-to-day delivery of spare parts.

Name: SAFINA
Description:
Safina is a world leader intelligence naval researcher which leads customers to success in the provision of niche shipping solutions to Shipowners or to Governments.

Safina gives you a complete service.
- Design
- Engineering
- New Building & Repair
- Consulting & Economic Analyst
- Workboats & Tug 
- Dredgers & Equipments

- Fishing Vessels

- Defence & Special Vessels

Name: MacKinnon & Olding, a Crosbie Member Company
Description: MacKinnon & Olding, a Crosbie Member Company (M&O), is one of Eastern Canada's trusted providers of onshore industrial services to the marine sector. With more than 30 years of experience, we deliver 5 key services including, scaffolding, surface preparation, painting/coatings, insulation and flooring.

Name: Dock Marine Europe
Description: Dock Marine Europe is a supplier of modular docks for a variety of water activities. From sailing to kayaking, to creating jet ski docks, visitor moorings and floating work platforms, our expertise enables us to offer unique water access solutions using our five types of dock: - Floating Docks: RotoDock - Floating Cubes: SunnyDock - Jet Ski Docks: Jet Port Plus , Jet Port Max and Multi Port - Drive-On Docks: Boat Lift and FlexiPort - Floating Docks: EasyFloat - Wooden Docks: NBC Marine All of these products have their own specific features and can be customized using a wide range of anchoring systems, gangways, railings and accessories. But it is the modular nature of our docks that really makes Dock Marine Europe stand out. It is this modular system that enables us to meet every special request and find solutions for every body of water and every project. You can find all of our products at www.dockmarine-europe.com. Please do not hesitate to get in contact for further information.

Name: Western Shipyard BLRT group
Description: "AB "Vakarų laivų gamykla" was established in 1969, privatized by the Estonian BLRT Grupp Concern in 2001. In 2003 metais VLRĮ was reorganized into AB "Vakarų laivų gamykla" company group with 23 companies.

Name: Swissway Marine Holland B.V.
Description: Swissway delivers series products of (hydraulic) boarding equipment by dealers in The Netherlands, France, Sweden and Slovenia to yacht builders all over Europe. The quality, communication and after sales of Swissway are beased on Dutch philosophy and experience.

Name: STEERER
Description:
STEERER (Structuring Towards Zero Emission Waterborne Transport) will coordinate the establishment and communication of a Strategic Research and Innovation Agenda and an Implementation Plan towards zero-emission waterborne transport, in cooperation with all key stakeholders needed to facilitate the transformation to clean waterborne transport. In the definition of STEERER, as well as cutting green house gas emissions, all harmful environmental emissions, water pollution and noise emissions have to be eliminated. STEERER’s mission is to bring the various initiatives and sectors’ stakeholders together to join forces for a combined effort with the maximum impact for the climate, people’s health and
Europe’s economy.
STEERER is coordinated by the Waterborne Technology Platform, counting with participation of a total of seven partners from six EU countries.
In sum, STEERER aims to:
- Jointly set emission targets towards 2050 (including targets for 2025 and 2030)
- Develop a Strategic Research and Innovation Agenda to be able to reach these targets in time
- Develop an Implementation Plan to reach the targets in due course, while staying competitive and offering a valid business case;
- Developing and implementing a communication campaign, aimed at broader awareness of the waterborne transport sector and its commitment towards zero-emission transport.

Name: ESMA International B.V.
Description: At ESMA we specialize in problem-solving, material sourcing, and providing top-notch services to the ship repair, shipbuilding, offshore, and Oil & Gas industries worldwide. With 56 years of experience and a strong global network, our independent and creative approach ensures we deliver the best solutions for our clients.

Name: LIDO
Description:
Lido Marine celebrates 37 years in business, starting from interior outfitting, industrial insulation and ventilation systems installation in Norway, 
Today Lido Marine is a holding with subsidiaries in Norway, Spain, Lithuania, Romania and runs projects all over the Europe, specializing in turnkey maritime interior solutions for commercial vessels.

Name: NHD BOATS
Description: A NHD Boats chega ao mercado trazendo tudo o que a HD tem de bom, porém, com uma completa evolução nas suas linhas, modernizando seus modelos e primando pelo conforto, segurança e design. Somos a inovação do mercado náutico, com a primeira lancha da categoria a possuir OPEN DECK.

Name: Fabiani Yacht
Description:
Fabiani Yacht has a mission: to build boats for a new conception of navigation, with technical solutions to allow a generational leap in the field of pleasure boating.

Yacht with refined mechanics, powers, yields, and components of the highest level. No stylistic compromise detracts from the best engineering techniques, even for reliability and performance.

Our team offers models and innovations to improve the entire nautical sector: from the conception and design of yachts on-site, through launching at sea, daily safety, up to essential components such as respect for the environment, savings, energy but also comfort, unmistakable style and the removal of architectural barriers.

We have hybrid yachts, so that the boats can sail, as well as with diesel engines, also with fully electric propulsion with solar and wind energy. The boats can also access many protected marine areas, in absolute silence, without any fuel costs.

Name: KAEFER Oy

Name: Handelskade
Description:
As a maritime contractor we offer turn-key shipbuilding projects. We operate in the field of dry cargo merchant vessels for inland, coastal and deepsea shipping. But, due to our style of working, we are open for any floating alternative as long as we trust we can handle it.

Your wish is our command. We are not standard. We don’t have standard designs. You don’t have to order a series, although it helps pricewise.

We take care of the full project including ship design, equipment and steel procurement, building supervision, delivery and warranty.

Our added value is that we build ships, but do not have our own Yards. We are free to choose. We are not ballasted with a large overhead. We compare prices, capacities and capabilities of Yards around the world. We will offer you the best price in combination with the best suitable quality and delivery time, not as a broker, but as a Contractor, adding our quality standard to the standard offered by the Yard.

A Dutch reliable Contractor offering you a turn-key project with warranty.

That is what you want.

That is what we offer.

Name: GOIOT
Description:
GOIOT know-how for quality aluminium, stainless and plastics parts for marine applications is renowned since 1928.
We design and manufacture standard or custom hatches, portlights, doors, glazing, steering systems and multiple accessories for the boating industry.

Name: Pure Yachts
Description:
Pure Yachts is a new German shipyard building high-end performance aluminium sailing boats from 42 to 50 feet.

Imprint & Data Protection:
https://www.pure.yachts/imprint-data-protection

Name: Diomar Ltd. | Technical - Shipping Co.
Description:
We are a Shipbuilding and Marine Engineering company based in Voula,Attica and we work mainly with dredging companies worldwide. We build work-boats for dredging like multicats, pusher boats, floating cranes, shallow draft hydrographic vessels, barges of many types. Through the years we have build numerous ships of various designs in accordance to customer requirements and for special purposes.  
Our Supply dpt. is highly experienced and can handle all kinds of requests. Sourcing machineries and parts from European, Asian and USA manufacturers is one of our specialties. We are well known  for our prompt replies, technical problem solving, guaranteed quality, favorable delivery times and unbeatable prices!  We can offer you engine spare parts, electrical and hydraulic spare parts, machineries and all kind of replacement or consumable parts. Hydraulic deck equipment and custom made winches or HPU (hydraulic power unites) are within our scope of supply. 
Diomar Ltd. has its own line of production for Pick Points & Adapters which are interchangeable to the original items standing out for their hardness and durability. Stocked quantity is always a must in order to provide in an emergency situation. A sample is also available upon request, free of charge!

Name: Skid Piping B.V
Description:
Skid Piping B.V. is gespecialiseerd in het leveren van PREFAB PIPING pakketten, het bedrijf beschikt over CNC bestuurde doornbuigmachines.

Wij leveren de volgende producten en diensten: 
 
* PRODUCTEN:                                                       MATERIALEN:
* ENGINEERING                                                        * STALEN BUIZEN / KOKERS
* PREFAB PIPING                                                      * RVS BUIZEN / KOKERS
* PIPINGMODULES                                                    * CUNIFER

* WALSEN van BUIZEN, SPIRALEN en KOKERS     * ALUMINIUM

Skid Piping beschikt over snelle CNC bestuurde doornbuigmachines waardoor wij u kunnen voorzien

KWALITEIT/ERVARING:

MARKTEN:

Wij hebben een jarenlange ervaring met het produceren van een uitgebreide 
ranges of PIPING systemen.

Name: Zephyr Boats
Description:
Zephyr Boats es una joven empresa ampurdanesa de embarcaciones que se basa en la experiencia y la creatividad de Romà Pueyo, que hace veinte años que trabaja en el sector del diseño y la construcción de lanchas y veleros.
La nueva Zephyr800 es el primer paso de una emocionante investigación basada en el amor por el mar, la cultura mediterránea y el sueño de crear una embarcación adaptada a los nuevos valores de nuestra sociedad.

Un diseño único de estilo moderno y con soluciones innovadoras que aportan grandes mejoras en la experiencia de navegar. Más comodidad, más espacio y más sostenible.

**
Zephyr Boats is a young Empordà boat company based on the experience and creativity of Romà Pueyo, who has been working in the design and construction of boats and sailboats for twenty years.

The new Zephyr800 is the first step of an exciting research based on the love for the sea, the Mediterranean culture and the dream of creating a boat adapted to the needs of the 21st century. 

A unique design with a modern style but with an air of nostalgia and innovative solutions that bring great improvements to the sailing experience. More comfort, more space, more sustainable, an experience of the sea like you have never imagined.

Name: Prolance Marine Flooring
Description:
Prolance Marine Flooring is a full-service supplier of the maritime sector in de field of marine paneling and ship interiors. It can be combined with other services we provider: surveys, consulting, designing and periodic maintenance.
 
Within the shipping industry, it is important that the products and services meet the highest standards. Therefore, we only work with suppliers who provide products that are IMO and MED certificated.
 
We realize that in the maritime sector there are no regular working days and times. That is why we are extremely flexible in performing our job. This added with the fact that we can supply many products directly from our stock and our ability to perform the task on location abroad, makes us disinctive in this area.

Name: Central Industry Group
Description:
CIG is an innovation-driven, technologically advanced industrial conglomerate engaged in shipbuilding, constructional design and production for complex architectural projects and the renewable energy industry worldwide. Founded in 1972, CIG has been a trusted partner for the international shipbuilding industry. Our expertise in 3D steel forming is unsurpassed; it enables us to provide our customers with steel constructional design and products tailored to their requirements. Constant innovation, competitive high quality, and cost-efficient manufacturing and logistics ensure that we are able to always keep our promise: we add value to our customers’ business.

Our in-house expertise for engineering and manufacturing enables us to make products tailored to your requirements, from customised turnkey vessels to complex steel structures and industrial components. Everything built by CIG meets an uncompromising standard regarding technology, safety and quality at the lowest possible cost of ownership. Our combined knowledge and skills, together with a passion for 3D steel construction, gives you the competitive edge that you are looking for.

The client will always be central to our actions. We are passionate, empathetic and always at your disposal. The way we structure our organization and projects ensures that our clients are always involved, without having to carry the weight of the work. Just as when we started more than 40 years ago - with respect for the technological progress since then - our existence still depends on the degree to which we add value for our clients. 

Let’s build your future ships together!

Name: Sea & Lake Boats
Description:
Sea&Lake Boats is the official dealer of Highfieldboats, Honda Marine, Jeannneau and Zodiac Nautica in Albania and Kosovo. 

With 27,000 boats delivered globally since the brand’s beginning in 2011, Highfield Boats is now the world’s number one in the RIB tender sector and a global player in the 5 meter + sector. 

Honda Marine distributes a full line of four-stroke marine engines ranging from 2 to 250 horsepower.  Honda Marine is proud to be part of Honda’s Power Products division since 1953, Honda has manufactured over 100 million power products worldwide.

The inventor of the inflatable boat, ZODIAC NAUTIC is the world’s largest and most recognized manufacturer of rigid-inflatable boats, inflatable boats, life rafts and safety equipment. 

Extraordinary quality, value and timeless beauty starting since  1957 by Henri Jeanneau's passion.
Motorboats ranges are Cap Camarat, Merry Fischer, Merry Fisher Marlin, NC and Leader. The sailing ranges are Sun Fast, Sun Odyssey and Jeanneau Yachts.

Name: INNOVATION YACHTS
Description:
Welcome to INNOVATION YACHTS, your partner for conception, planning and construction of high quality, personalised and sustainable, high performance  yachts.

Our, currently unique, future-oriented yacht building concept is based on the use of the highest quality composite materials.

Volcanic fibers in combination with balsa materials and epoxy, which are harmless to health, embody our basic materials. These guarantee you modern, high-performance design and future-oriented solutions, also for interior fittings, on-board technology and comfort. In addition they ensure lasting value and the greatest possible safety at sea.

With over 20 years of experience in extreme sailing projects as well as blue water sailing, we offer you the expertise that will make your yacht build project an experience tailored to your needs.

Enjoy unforgettable days on board your INNOVATION YACHT!

Name: SOPROMAR - Centro Náutico
Description:
Initially founded in 1976, Sopromar is today a complex designed to provide its clients with the widest range of services and facilities in the nautical environment. 

Our specialized and dedicated teams are able to perform all the necessary services for the maintenance and conservation of our clients' boats. 

Besides the cranes with capacities of 35, 50 and 300 tons, a crane of 25 tons, a lifting platform up to 30 meters high, we have recently expanded our area of operation to the Catamarans, with the acquisition of a CrocLift machine. 


We have our own departments of Mechanics, Electronics and Electricity, Painting, Polishing, Naval Locksmith, Lathe and Milling, Fiberglass, Floats, Refrigeration and Air Conditioning, and we also have a network of reliable partners for the services of Rigging, Carpentry and Vessel Commissioning.

Description:
Entreprise Française fondée en 2013, Platypus Craft est spécialisée dans le Design, le Développement et la Commercialisation d'engins nautiques semi submersibles

Nos marchés cibles sont le Loisir et l’environnement: 

- nous sommes le premier acteur -aux côtés de notre partenaire CDO Innov- proposant des engins capables de nettoyer les littoraux côtiers de ses déchets flottants, entre 2 eaux ou posés au fond des eaux.  

- côté loisir des particuliers peuvent acheter un platypus qui peut être réalisé sur mesure mais nous ciblons principalement le marché de la location. Notre objectif est clairement de nous positionner comme une marque reconnue sur le segment des engins nautiques innovants et nous affirmer comme acteur incontournable du marché mondial de la plaisance.

4 facteurs distinguent le concept Platypus:

- le concept platypus offre des qualités de navigation de surface équivalentes à un "vrai" bateau
- il autorise également d'un simple clic de naviguer en mode semi submersible et en pleine eau, une première mondiale
- la construction en aluminium et le savoir faire de CDO Innov permettent de proposer un engin unique d'une qualité et d'une robustesse exceptionnelle en usage plaisance et de répondre au cahier des charges des professionnels les plus exigeants
- nous sommes les premiers à investiguer ce mode de navigation hybride surface / semi submersible et à ce titre avons constamment innové dans l'optique d'une fiabilité et d'une sécurité totale. Nous sommes fiers d'avoir sorti en ce début d'année 2019 la version de série dénommée BLUE OCEAN dessinée par VPLP qui rassemble les solutions les plus éprouvées et les plus fiables.

Vous pouvez découvrir le résultat de ces années de travail ici:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k-WR3xf825k

Name: Monachus Yachts
Description:
Since 2006, Monachus boats have been produced in our production plant located near the city of Split in Croatia.
In order to set priorities in terms of design and construction, members of the Monachus design team relied on their first-hand cruising experience in a variety of weather conditions. Special attention is paid to stability and buoyancy, followed by ergonomics and general design.
In the production of Monachus boats, traditional and reliable production methods are used, with the use of modern materials. The semi-custom construction allows for a personal touch, and each Monachus boat represents its owner.
The current line includes models: Pharos 43, Issa 45, Issa 45 Fly, Monachus 70, Monachus 70 Fly.
The interior for all models is made according to the customer's choice. Hull geometry with a deep V-profile and carefully adjusted hydrodynamic properties allow Monachus vessels to perform well in all cruising styles - planing, semi-displacement and displacement. As a result, the owner can choose from a wide range of cruising styles.
Trust is our motto, and the priority is to deliver the best possible product!

Our mission is to build a quality and reliable ship that will provide an uninterrupted connection with the sea. To achieve this, we use state-of-the-art materials and the latest technology, optimizing the production process and thus ensuring a favorable price.

Our vision is simplicity, quality of work and ability to sail.

James created Off Piste Marine to embody the spirit of venturing beyond the ordinary. As James puts it, "My love for adventure and the unexplored is my passion. The name Off Piste Marine reflects exactly where I hope our vessels will venture."

Drawing on James’s extensive experience as a diver, pilot, and yacht captain, Off Piste Marine focuses on simplicity, reliability, and modularity in its designs. The company caters to commercial, military, and leisure sectors, ensuring its boats are capable of operating in extreme environments, from tropical heat to Arctic cold. Off Piste Marine emphasises quality, accessibility, and personalised service, incorporating feedback from users to continuously improve its products.

At Off Piste Marine, we believe in pushing the limits of what’s possible. The Endurance is not just a boat; it’s a testament to the spirit of adventure, built for those who dare to explore the unknown.

Visit our website for more details.

Vi har mere end 70 års erfaring indenfor bådebyggeri og vedligeholdelse.
Hos os er rådgivning en tillidssag.
Vi tilbyder kvalitet til konkurrencedygtige priser.
Vi sparer dig for meget, ved at udføre den optimale løsning første gang.

Vi udfører alle former for reparationer på alle typer både.

Skal du have udført en specialopgave til industrien eller hjemmet i træ, glasfiber, komposit, rustfri stål, stål eller aluminium, så tilbyder Walsteds udvikling af prototyper, fremstilling af enkeltstyks produktioner og seriefremstilling af produkter, hvor design og funktion skal være unikt.

Vi oparbejder modeller samt formstøber i glasfiber, og skaber løsninger efter kundens ønske og i absolut højeste kvalitet. Vi er med andre ord klar til at tage imod udfordringer.

Vore 15 faglærte medarbejderes mangeårige erfaring betyder, at vi har et stærkt team af specialiserede bådebyggere, snedkere, lærlinge samt en smedeafdeling med speciale i rustfri stål, der løser mange varierede opgaver.

Vi tilbyder vinter opbevaring af både, udendørs og indendørs i lukkede haller på værftets areal, eller i haller i området.  Vi kan tilbyde optagning af både op til 38 tons med hydraulisk boat mover og traktor. Underleverandør hentes ind ved større opgaver.

Description:
Jukova Corporation Oy is a Finnish company with origins and roots in Junnilan Konepaja ja Valimo Oy (Jukova Oy) founded in 1958. The company, first as a family business manufacturing aluminium fittings and faucets, has grown up to an international company that provides solutions for passenger transport industry and other industries. One of the main reasons for the company's success has been the close co-operation with its customers.

Jukova Corporation Oy provides turn-key deliveries or easy-to-install solutions for the leisure boating, street furniture (Jukova Brands), rolling stock (Décorian) and marine (Meridian) industries. The company has an efficient in-house 3D design department and the personnel also administer project supervision. The company has an own in-house aluminum foundry organized under the Jukova Brands business area.

In projects where large system deliveries are involved, Jukova Corporation Oy is ready to take the overall responsibility from the early steps of design until the finished product is ready mounted in its place. The company's aim is to serve customers with high quality, continuous product development and flexibility - today and tomorrow.

Name: Sicmi Sea Style
Description: Seguendo il suo innato amore per il mare e la navigazione, Pasquale Di Napoli fonda nel 2004 Sicmi Sea Style, impresa di Massafra operante nel settore della realizzazione di superyacht. L'azienda basa la sua philosophy sull’idea di portare nel settore nautico il modus operandi del “costruire italiano”, un concetto che sposa l’attenzione per i dettagli e la propensione ai continui aggiornamenti tecnologici e qualitativi tipica delle realtà industriali. Questa prospettiva ha permesso di inserirsi a pieno titolo in un mercato dove è proprio l’Italia uno degli attori principali, dato che il 45% della produzione mondiale di yacht nasce proprio nel Bel Paese, e di essere  il costruttore dei principali player italiani operanti a livello internazionale, una realtà di eccellenza aprendosi a numerosi collaborazioni con clienti nazionali leader nella costruzione e commercializzazione di yacht di lusso.  Sicmi Sea Style oggi è attenzione per i dettagli, aggiornamento continuo delle Certificazioni, sicurezza e rispetto dell’ambiente, sperimentazione delle più innovative tecnologie e  implementazione dei servizi da offrire ai clienti. A ciò si aggiunge una organizzazione solida. Sicmi Sea Style è infatti strutturata per coprire tutte le fasi del processo produttivo. Nei cantieri di Piombino, circa 100 addetti si occupano dei diversi step: dalla costruzione al taglio, dalla realizzazione dello scafo e alle sovrastrutture in acciaio o in lega leggera,  rispettando gli standard qualitativi e tecnici dei superyacht compresa la steel preparation e la raddrizzatura.  La qualità delle strutture, la competenza di chi opera e la valorizzazione del Made in Italy nella nautica di lusso mondiale, rendono Sicmi Sea Style un partner affidabile, pronto a soddisfare le esigenze costruttive e progettuali dei migliori cantieri internazionali con uno stile inconfondibile rispettando tutti i parametri di funzionalità e fattibilità ai quali un’imbarcazione non può rinunciare.

Name: SB MARINE OFFSHORE AND MARINE CONSULTANTS
Description:
SB MARINE is a Marine and Offshore Structure Consultant based in Mumbai and Kolkata, India.

Mr. Chakrabarti has over 25 years of experience in the Marine and Offshore related fields in India and abroad. Previously he has worked in leading Indian shipyard ABG Shipyard Ltd and then in Zentech India Offshore as an officer In-charge.

He started SB Marine in year 2005, initially marketing exclusively well known structural software in offshore industry ‘SACS’ and then switch over to Design and Engineering Consultancy services for the Offshore and Marine Industry.

At present we are well known one of the leading marine design, engineering and technical consulting company in the industry.

Name: ADAYACHT.COM
Description:
Ada Yacht operates mainly in custom steel boat building and aluminum yacht building sector in Turkey since 1981. The company added yacht charter and yacht brokerage departments to its body in the year 2001. Besides steel and aluminium boat construction, we also offer second hand boat sales.Here, our customers may find second hand traditional wooden Turkish gullets for sale and second hand yachts for sale in Turkey. In our yacht charter department, we offer gulets for hire and boats for rent in Turkey and Aegean Sea. 

Ada Yacht has been building steel hull boats, aluminum superstructure motor-yachts or complete aluminum boats, steel trawlers, steel gulets, steel or fully aluminum pilot boats, crew boats and work boats for more than 34 years. The company has built over 55 steel or aluminum boats between 18 - 70 meters.


Ada Yacht has been building many types of vessels with different optional equipments and size like: Mooring Boat, MotorBarge, TugBoat, Fast Aluminum Workboat, High Speed Patrol Boats, Jack Up Platforms, Crew Boat, Multitug, Fishing Boats, Pusher Boat, Dredgers, Fish Farm Boats, Steel Utility Boat and Agent Supply Vessels.

Name: Riverco Oy
Description:
Since 1965, the Riverco group, and Riverco Ltd, has been best known as a marine engineering, ship building and ship repair company that serves the cruise industry and shipyards in the Americas, Far East and Europe.

Riverco provides full turnkey solutions for cabin, public and machinery areas, galleys and pantries, spas, open deck and pool areas for new buildings, conversions and refurbishments. Riverco’s solutions also include piping systems, electrical installations, steel and aluminum structures and general maintenance and repairs for the cruise and shipbuilding industry. A full range of services includes consulting, design and engineering, material deliveries, manufacturing and installation.

One of our special areas of expertise is to complete even major conversion and refurbishment works on board during the normal traffic, or during even the shortest docking periods.

We proudly present our long list of satisfied customers and references from nearly 5.000 completed, cost-efficient and top-quality projects. We have performed interior, deck outfitting and machinery projects for all the major ship owners in the industry, including Disney Cruise Line, RCCL, CCL, NCL, Star Cruises, and Celebrity Cruises, and our project totals have been anything from zero to dozens of millions over the decades.

Furthermore, the Riverco group works with steel and aluminum to build small and medium-sized ships and boats, such as tugs, work boats and yachts with luxurious interiors, in our own shipyard in Finland. The Parainen shipyard offers also docking services to coastal ships.

Riverco has several workshops for manufacturing interior modules and furniture, piping and ducting, electrical components, steel and aluminum structures, as well as machinery parts. Our educated, experienced, friendly and motivated team is proud to serve you and co-operate with all our customers globally, understanding the requirements of ship operations.

Norderwerft has been part of the port of Hamburg for over 100 years. Within NVL, Norderwerft is an important repair shipyard and focuses on conversions, modernisations, upgrades as well as the maintenance of naval vessels and merchant ships of up to 200 metres in length. Con oltre trent’anni di esperienza nei principali cantieri italiani, tra cui quelli del Gruppo Ferretti, siamo un punto di riferimento nella cantieristica nautica per l’elevata competenza tecnica, l’affidabilità operativa e la rapidità d’intervento.

 Impianti idrici e sanitari

Name: CDE Danish Marine Design ApS
Description:
Danish Marine Design was founded in 1988 and is specialized in delivering "state of the art" ship and yacht design.
The Design team behind CDE Danish Marine Design has many years of experience in the design of sailboats, motorboats and commercial boats of all sizes as well as optimization of existing designs.

CDE Danish Marine Design uses professional design tools such as Solid Works, AutoCAD and Rhinoceros and is experienced in both 2D and 3D design tools as well as several specially developed programs, such as RFEM for  Fenite Element calculations, Wolfson Units to Velocity Prediction, Orca3D, Fast Ship and Speed and Power Estimation.
Both new designs and optimizations of existing designs are calculated and analysed carefully to achieve the best balance between durability, weight and design.

CDE Danish Marine Design has over the years specialized in consultancy in CE-certification as well as general consulting in the marine business.

Name: Bloemsma Van Breemen Shipyard
Description:
Bloemsma Van Breemen Shipyard has built a wide variety of customised super yachts.  The yard is capable of building both sailing and motor yachts of premium quality and has constructed many different designs.  As the yard has no standard mode of operation, there is the flexibility to adapt to different Classification and safety requirements.  Among deliveries were the 48 m Reymond Langton Design 'Flying Eagle' motor yacht, the 27 m De Vries Lentsch Design motor yacht ‘Griffioen’ and the 41 m Dubois Design sailing yacht ‘Valquest’. 

The yard is proud to have delivered in 2011 their first commercial vessel, a high speed catamaran for the windfarm industry designed to carry up to 50 people. The 27 m Windcat 101, which has a Det Norske Veritas ‘Passenger’ notation is designed to support windfarms further offshore (300 M).

The yard has invested heavily in its building facilities, with floor heated halls, which offer the capacity to build vessels up to 75 m in length.

Currently building a 44 m Pieter Beeldsnijder Design motor yacht for delivery to her new Owner in 2013.

As İzter Ship Repair, rather than contracting a shipyard for the full scope of the works, we prefer to hire yearly basis longterm slots for drydocks and a lay-by-berth space within a suitable yards . While standard dry-docking works are generally ordered to the hired shipyard, our dedicated sub-contractors are directly engaged to non-docking related works such as steel, piping, engine, machinery, electrical, hydraulic, radio-navigation and other specific works.

Having long-term agreements with reliable yards, workshops, subcontractors and various suppliers in Tuzla, Yalova and İzmir regions of Turkey, our approach to dry-docking and repairs projects are customized to achieve; highest quality of work-done, most economical budget and cost control and full transparency and shortest time.

Name: Department of Ship Technology
Description: This Department is one of the pioneers in the field of Naval Architecture education in this country and was established with an aim to create a new and dynamic generation of Naval Architects to meet the requirements of the Indian Shipbuilding Industry, Ship Classification Societies, R&D organizations, Indian Navy, and related organizations With this in view, a B.Tech. program in Naval Architecture and Ship Building was started in 1975.This Department maintains active collaboration and interaction with IIT's, foreign Universities, shipyards and other industries. These organizations have been generous in extending their facilities and expertise to impart training to our students. The fruitful collaboration of this Department with Rostock University, Germany dates back to 1978 and remains as an important milestone in the development of this Department. The curriculum was drawn up and updated in consultation with experts from various academic institutions and industries. This has brought the course curriculum in conformity with international standards. The Ministry of Surface Transport, Govt. of India approved the B.Tech.(NA&SB) courses course for the M.O.T. Certificate Examination, thus enabling the B.Tech. graduates to venture into the field of Marine Engineering also. The Indian Navy has recognized this department as a center for the higher education of their officers. The Department has a highly qualified and dedicated faculty, an excellent library, computer center, laboratories and workshops. The faculty have over 100 research publications to their credit. The quality of education imparted and the resulting professional competence of the graduates enabled the Department to achieve a unique record of 100 percent placement of its graduates in India and abroad. The intake of students is kept low to enable them get personal attention in their studies, professional training and career development.

To meet the growing demand for local need for sea transportation, PT Dumas has expanded the main activities and facilities.

In 1989 the company built a Graving Dock facility with a capacity of 8000 DWT, a 150 m quay, and acquire more machines and equipment to speed up and improve production. Since 2002, PT Dumas Tanjung Perak Shipyards has been expanding the international market by signing an contract with DAMEN Shipyard, Gorinchem the Netherlands to built Marine Disaster Prevention Vessel for the Department of Coast Guard, Directorate of Sea Transportation.

Currently PT. Dumas has a total of 27.600 sqm area for production, spread in two location. One location is at Jl. Nilam Barat 12 (9.950 sqm) and Jl. Nilam Barat 24-26 (17.650 sqm). PT. Dumas also expanded the operation by building a new production yard in Sampang, Madura with a total area of 25 hectares. The first stage will cover an area of 12 hectares which will become operational by 2011.

PT. Dumas build ships for international as well as domestic clients. PT. Dumas has worked and continues to provide repair services for the governments, to name a few TNI-AL, PT. Pertamina, PT. Pelabuhan Indonesia, PT. ASDP, as well as local private companies.

1.	ME LINER SCANNING – We use our specialized electronic tool to carry out ME LDM, without the need to demob or open the head. The measurement per unit takes about 20 minutes and we complete a 6 unit, 600 bore engine in about 2-2.5 hrs on an average.
 
2.	DIESEL ENGINE WORKS– we have a specialized team to carry out overhauls, unit decarb repairs, crankshaft replacements, and other maintenance of diesel engines. The engines we have worked on include both ME and AE with makers like MAN, B&W, Wartsila, Caterpillar, Cummins, Daihatsu and so on.
 
3.	BWTS and SCRUBBER RETROFIT - We provide complete design, engineering, installation services for the BWTS and Scrubber retrofits.
 
4.	BLASTING AND PAINTING – We have teams to carry out maintenance and blasting and painting on board your vessel while at anchor or during sailing. We have our own UHP machines, DH units and sand blasting equipment as well.
 
5.	TANK CLEANING – We provide tank cleaning services in Fujairah / KFK / Dubai for vessels.
 
6.	INSULATION AND CLADDING – We provide Insulation and Cladding services.
 
7.	RIDING TEAMS - We provide highly Skilled riding squads for Marine and Offshore industry to carry out various jobs like engine overhaul, steel work, blasting  and painting , other mechanical works and general maintenance.
 
8.	SPARES AND EQUIPMENT - Marine and offshore Spares and Equipment, supply of spares, equipment and general consumables, including new and second-hand spares / equipment

Well, the customer always comes first: like Ronald was able to realise his dream, Van der Heijden Yachts will do merely anything to make yours come true!

Name: NDTest - your vessel, our expertise, safer seas
Description:

We help to ensure the structural integrity and safety of vessels by detecting defects, corrosion, and other issues without causing any damage to the vessel's structure:
 Ultrasonic thickness measurement (UTM) of ship’s hull construction
 Assessment of coating condition
 Access solutions using rope techniques (Rope access)
 Non-destructive testing (NDT) methods:
   Visual testing (VT)
   Penetrant testing (PT)
   Magnetic testing (MT)
   Eddy current testing (ET)
   Ultrasonic testing (UT)

NDTest also offers the assistance of our experts during project implementation:
 Proficient steelwork oversight during dry docking
 Efficient project management for new construction or conversion projects
 QA&QC management, project process control, and thorough documentation management

Name: Marinteknik Shipbuilders (S) Pte Ltd
Description:
Established since 1984, Marinteknik Shipbuilders (S) Pte Ltd is a global leading designer and builder of quality high speed vessels. As the first yard in the world to pioneer the use of special profiled aluminum extrusions for construction for lighter, stronger and better performing vessels, Marinteknik has demonstrated success in building over 200 vessels such as passenger ferries, fast crew boats, FSIVs and full electric boats concept, with speeds ranging from 18 knots to 60 knots for customers globally. 

Strategically located in the western part Singapore, our shipyard occupies a total area of 23,000 square meters and a water frontage of 128 meters that features a U-shaped seawall for berthing and up slipping of vessels. With strong emphasis on safety and quality, Marinteknik is ISO 9001, ISO 45001 and BIZ Safe Star accredited, and is well equipped with overhead cranes and fully outfitted covered workshops to manage both ship repairs and building of new vessels. In addition, for scalability, we are also supported by our shipyard in Batam, Indonesia, that is focused on mild steel vessels such as tug boats and barges.

De werf van Altena Yachting beschikt over 5 hallen variërend van cascohal, spuithal, twee productiehallen en een winterstallingshal voor de stalling van jachten. Om deze jachten binnen te zetten heeft Altena Yachting 
een 80 ton Roodberg bootlift en een 55 ton hydraulische botenkar in eigen beheer.

Onder het dak van Altena Yachting bevindt zich Altena Marine één van de grootste watersportwinkel in omstreken. Hier kunt u terecht voor al uw watersportartikelen of voor advies over diverse producten.
Bij een jachtwerf kan natuurlijk geen haven missen en ook dit hebben we bij Altena Yachting. De haven beschikt over circa 30 ligplaatsen waar tevens ook de gebruikte verkoopjachten liggen van Altena Yachtbrokers.

تعهد ما ارائه کیفیت برتر، رعایت ایمنی و استانداردهای بینالمللی و تحویل بهموقع پروژهها در تمامی مراحل است.

Description:

Desde nuestras instalaciones en Puerto Real (Cádiz, España) diseñamos, fabricamos y ponemos en marcha sistemas eléctricos fiables para astilleros, armadores y clientes industriales: distribución de potencia, automatización y control, iluminación, sistemas de seguridad y monitorización.

Nuestro equipo técnico combina la experiencia en campo con herramientas avanzadas de cálculo y diseño para ofrecer soluciones completas, desde la ingeniería básica y de detalle hasta la puesta en marcha a bordo.

Servicios principales

   • Ingeniería y consultoría eléctrica para proyectos navales, offshore e industriales.

   • Diseño y fabricación de cuadros eléctricos, MCCs y centros de control de motores.

   • Instalaciones eléctricas en taller y a bordo (nuevas construcciones, refit, conversiones).

   • Sistemas de automatización, control y monitorización (SCADA, alarmas, integración).

   • Mantenimiento, diagnóstico de averías y modernización de instalaciones existentes.

Trabajamos como socio tecnológico de largo plazo para empresas de ingeniería, astilleros y armadores, ayudándoles a ejecutar proyectos seguros, eficientes y fiables en entornos exigentes.

Síguenos para conocer más sobre nuestros proyectos, capacidades eléctricas y oportunidades de colaboración.

Description:
The company was founded in 1950 by the experience of the forefather and founder Giacinto Calistri who, from the very beginning, started a workshop building parts and whole machinery for the mechanical-textile industry. Over the years, he designed and manufactured machinery for its customers relating to the most disparate sectors and high precision clogs and gears.

The founder Giacinto was then joined by his sons, Claudio, Sauro and Roberto and under their direction during the booming years of the Ansaldo-Breda group, now part of HITACHI has opened new development sectors to diversify the offer to its customers , from third party parts machines and processing for the railway sector to the building of equipment for food industry.

With the new generation, the third, linked to the names of the offsprings Federico and Paolo, the company has finally landed in the nautical sector, initially with the production of small components such as hinges and latches of various types, then it started to design and build complex and finished products such as watertight fire doors, exterior doors garage handling, folding ladders, hauling devices for tenders and jet skis and many other devices integrated in the yacht design and conquering the favours of the customers.

The high level of specialisation has allowed the company to collaborate and later become a loyal partner of some of the most important shipbuilding companies of yachts and mega-yachts.

Currently the company is based in a warehouse of about 1000 square meters and occupies a workforce of 24 people. The constant updating of our CNC machines and the high specialisation of personnel allows us to supply everyday different custom made quality products. Since 2016, the company has also incorporated the design and assembly of advanced electrical panels for its movements and plans now the expansion with the acquisition of new spaces for the light metal fabrication and assembling of the hauling systems and gangway.
Location: Serravalle Pistoiese - Loc. Ponte Stella, Pistoia

Name: MAR.CO Marine Costruzioni
Description:
MAR.CO Marine Costruzioni è un'azienda nautica italiana a conduzione familiare con sede a Muggiò (MB), a nord di Milano.

Da oltre quaranta anni i nostri gommoni dal design unico e dalla qualità inimitabile sono riconosciuti da tutti gli appassionati di nautica per essere sinonimo di esclusività, lusso ed eleganza.

Fondata nel 1974 da Mario Zamuner e guidata ora dai figli Mauro e Marco, la missione di MAR.CO è mettere esperienza e passione al servizio di chi, come noi, ama vivere il mare senza compromessi tra prestazioni e design, tra comfort ed estetica.

Orgogliosi della nostra natura artigianale nel solco della tradizione manufatturiera del made in Italy, da sempre produciamo i nostri gommoni solo su ordinazione ed in quantità limitata, in modo tale da garantirti la massima cura per ogni dettaglio, il più livello di qualità ed una personalizzazione completa secondo i tuoi desideri.

Come nessuna altra azienda, in MAR.CO ti offriamo la possibilità di personalizzare la tua barca in ogni singolo dettaglio, da poppa a prua, secondo le tue necessità e preferenze. In questo modo, siamo fieri di poter affermare che ogni singolo gommone che produciamo a Muggiò è unico: non esistono due MAR.CO identici.

Perchè in MAR.CO crediamo fortemente che la tua vacanza sia importante: insieme possiamo renderla unica.

All products are supplied withexhaustive technical documentation about use and maintenance to hand out to the employees in order to reduce the risks posed by the their use.

Description:
Coating Consultancy van Klaveren is headed by Leo van Klaveren, an experienced and fully certified coating engineer who has contributed his experiences from more than 100 Superyacht paint projects ranging from prestigious new build projects to complicated re-fit projects in the Netherlands, Germany, Southern Europe and America the last 10 years.

Coating Consultancy van Klaveren’s goal is to work according the KISS principle. KISS is an acronym for "Keep it Simple, Stupid" as a principle introduced by the U.S. Navy in 1960. The KISS principle states that most systems work best if they are kept simple rather than made complicated; therefore, simplicity should be a key goal and unnecessary complexity should be avoided.

Coating Consultancy van Klaveren has a team of Netherlands based inspectors/surveyors. Each member of our team has the following recognized professional qualifications;

Name: Vienna Model Basin | Schiffbautechnische Versuchsanstalt in Wien
Description:
VIENNA MODEL BASIN is a competence centre and service provider for the maritime sector and for all areas related to ship technologies. Based on over a century of experience in hydrodynamic and nautical development it is our aim to make our experience and know-how available to the maritime industry. Our mission is to supply the necessary facilities, equipment, and best trained staff in order to satisfy the customer's requirements with regard to quality, efficiency, and time. 

We provide an array of services including following tests and analyses: Resistance, Propulsion, EEDI, Manoeuvering, Seakeeping, Safe-Return-to-Port, Escort Tugboat Manoeuvres, Open-Top-Containership, Stockholm Agreement and Propeller Tests, Wind Tunnel, Weather Criterion, Cavitation, CFD and Numerical Analyses. Our team of highly skilled professionals works collaboratively to deliver tailored solutions that meet the unique needs of each client. By combining in-depth experimental testing with computational fluid dynamics (CFD) and simulation capabilities, VIENNA MODEL BASIN provides a complete solution for optimizing vessel design, propulsion efficiency, and operational performance.

At the heart of VIENNA MODEL BASIN is its renowned over-200-meter towing tank, equipped with advanced linear drive systems and measurement technology, ensuring the highest precision in testing and experimental hydrodynamics. Complementing the towing tank is a high-performance wind tunnel, a cavitation tunnel, as well as numerical and outdoor model testing facilities. Together, these resources allow VIENNA MODEL BASIN to conduct comprehensive testing and analysis across a broad range of applications.

Dedicated to remaining at the forefront of hydrodynamic research, we actively engage in collaborative projects with academia, industry, and government agencies. These research initiatives contribute to advancing maritime knowledge, supporting economic growth, and addressing the challenges facing modern shipbuilding.

Name: Marine and Yacht Management
Description:
Marine & Yacht Management company is a highly mobile team of professionals that provide a range of shipyard project services to our clients. Marine & Yacht Management is comprised of a principle management team with extensive combined experience and network of 20 professional maritime and yacht experts operating in 15 countries.
 
We focus on full time project management at the shipyard level for the duration of the project with every project manager assigned specifically to and only to your project. Your project manager has the responsibility for delivering your project completed as agreed, in a pristine hand over quality condition on time and on budget or better. Every project manager has a minimum 10 years previous shipyard managerial experience built on a technical trade’s background each based full time at leading international yacht building centre’s. Our project managers also have the capacity to drive any project as the Client’s Technical Consultant and Client Representative using our own management package if the project is a semi custom production yacht. Because we have geared our services to operate internationally our clients benefit by our lower cost structure, our flexibility to operate in a wider selection of suitable yards that provides very competitive pricing.
 
All project managers while working autonomously operate within the guidelines and principles set down by Marine Yacht Management. Working with our system that has been pre programmed to the specifics of your project, it is continually monitored and audited as support backup for our people on the ground. 
 
Please refer to SERVICES for reviewing the range of projects we provide management and consultant services to assist you achieve your objective.

Name: Gelen Marine
Description:
Gelen Marine is an international marine consultancy specialising in technical services associated with new building of ships.  Our clients include ship owners, ship managers and ship yards building all over the world. 

We offer our clients technical services relating to the entire ship building process, from conception to delivery.  We assist with any stage of this process, from development of your specification and requirements, to carrying out your plan approval, to providing on-site construction supervision and project management.  We can provide any level of construction supervision that you require from individual supervisors to complete managed supervision teams.  

Our multi-disciplined shipbuilding engineers have a wide and varied experience of all types of vessel new construction.  Their specialised backgrounds in shipbuilding and ship repair give them important and unique insight into potential construction problem areas, so that we believe they form some of the best plan approval and site supervision teams available in the marine market today.

Our experience and in-depth knowledge of the shipbuilding industry and shipbuilding process, allows us to additionally provide general technical consultancy services related to new ship building and deliveries, including shipyard selection and capability assessments, expert witness reporting, trouble shooting and technical translation services.

Name: Center of Maritime Technologies gGmbH
Description:
Center of Maritime Technologies (CMT) is a non-profit limited liabilities companies (gGmbH) with the mission to strengthen the competitiveness of the maritime industry and Germany as a business centre. 
The role of CMT is to strengthen maritime research, development and innovation by initiating and monitoring projects, providing research advice, disseminating expertise and results, conducting technical research in defines domains and exploiting synergies between different industrial sectors. CMT is a renowned research centre that conducts its own technical research in strategic fields with a medium to long-term perspective and offers extensive experience, networks and resources to support and consult on a broad range of ventures. 
Since 2020, CMT gGmbH has been a subsidiary of the German Shipbuilding and Ocean Industries Association (Verband für Schiffbau und Meerestechnik e.V.), the political and economic representative body of the German maritime industry, the maritime and inland waterway shipyards as well as suppliers and service providers. The company is the direct successor organisation of Center of Maritime Technologies e.V., which was founded in 2002 and has been involved in more than 60 publicly funded, mostly European research projects and about 50 privately financed R & D agreements.
CMT's know-how covers lightweight structures and new materials, production technologies, ship concepts and life cycle aspects for maritime applications. In addition, the organisation has extensive experience in coordinating major projects as well disseminating, analysing and establishing research and development cooperation.

3,200 m² enclosed production area

Annual steel-processing capacity: 3,000 tons

Name: Justeker - Nautica
Description:
JustEker, un brand che nasce dalla grande passione per Moda – Motori – Nautica di un ragazzo giovane, Luca, che dopo gli studi, ha cominciato a fare esperienza presso un noto maglificio di alta moda, utilizzando macchinari tecnologicamente molto evoluti potendo seguire tutta la filiera che va dalla scelta del filato fino alla realizzazione del capo finito. Comincia così a concretizzarsi il lavoro che da anni sta maturando nelle idee di Luca. Questo è solo il primo passo di un percorso che si preannuncia molto lungo fatto di dedizione al lavoro, passione e innovazione

Name: Ruijtenberg Shipyard
Description:
Inland shipping is where things are built, worked on, and lived with. Day in, day out, goods are transported across Europe’s waterways. No delays, no downtime, it all comes down to reliability, continuity, and craftsmanship. The strength to build, think along, and push forward where others stop, that’s the strength of Ruijtenberg Shipyard.

For over 100 years, our yard on the Maasdijk has been a place where inland vessels are extended, upgraded, or maintained. And we do this with people who understand ship technology, from international service and slipway work to tailor-made wheelhouses. We combine modern craftsmanship with solutions that truly work, for today and for the future.

Our mission is clear: we are the One Stop Shop for inland shipping. One partner for everything involved, from the first idea to the final bolt. With all disciplines in-house, we keep control, direction, and most importantly, the momentum. It’s faster, more efficient, and simply better.

We’re more than just a slipway or workshop. We’re a full-service partner for the inland shipping industry:

Slipway operations – with a 110-meter slipway for repairs and refits

Wheelhouses and radar masts – fully custom-built with in-house production

24/7 technical service – electrical, mechanical, hydraulics, carpentry, and much more

International support – on-site, wherever and whenever needed

Machine building & construction – 40 years of experience in tailor-made solutions

We’re hands-on professionals with an eye on the future. Whether it's smart installations, redesigned components, or applications beyond shipping, we move with the market. A dedicated team is ready to think along with you. Meanwhile, we invest in skilled workers, young talent, and strong long-term partnerships.

Our foundation is solid. Our focus is forward. And our way of working is simple: get it done.

Name: Erasmus Mundus Joint Master Degree SEAS 4.0
Description:
Sustainable Ship and Shipping 4.0 (SEAS 4.0) is a year-and-half-long (90 ECTS) integrated, international, innovative, and methodologically diversified course to award a double Master Degree. It is taught in English and jointly designed by SEAS 4.0 Consortium Universities: University of Napoli Federico II, University of A Coruna and University of Zagreb.

The development of the SEAS 4.0 Master Programme has been inspired by an emerging necessity to enlarge and improve the knowledge of Naval Architecture and Marine Engineering curricula with elements of Ship Management, Infologistics and Sustainability concepts in the frame of Industry 4.0. Such elements will be required skills for future Ship Designers, Marine Engineers and Ship Managers.

SEAS 4.0 is tailored for students who hold a minimum of 240 ECTS in Naval Architecture and Marine Engineering or other relevant technical degrees (mechanical, civil, aerospace, etc). SEAS 4.0 offers them a possibility to extend their knowledge and skills within a multidisciplinary team.

SEAS 4.0 is based on a holistic approach to higher education of new experts ready to work in an increasingly digitalized, automated, and globally mobile environment.

Name: TRINGALI S.r.l. Shipyard
Description:
The Tringali Shipyard is one of the leading ship repair, maintenance and conversion companies of Italy, strategically located in the port of Augusta at the center of the main shipping routes and expanding markets in the Mediterranean and beyond, where it has been operating since 1942.
Tringali S.r.l.  boasts a success story for national, international, commercial and government customers, relying on 52 permanent members of staff, to which more than 60 external workers and subcontractors may be added during peak periods  of work, ensuring that ships leave the yard at maximum efficiency and class-compliant. Over the last 5 years more than 750 repair and maintenance job orders have been carried out in our slipways, floating dock and on floating ships in port, with the guarantee of meeting the agreed budget and schedule

Il Cantiere Navale Tringali è uno dei più importanti cantieri di riparazione, manutenzione e trasformazione Italiani, strategicamente localizzato nel porto di Augusta (Italia) al centro delle principali rotte marittime e dei mercati in espansione nel Mediterraneo e oltre, dove opera dal 1942.
La Tringali srl vanta una storia di successo per clienti nazionali, internazionali, commerciali e governativi,  potendo contare su un organico proprio di 52 persone, alle quali durante i picchi di lavoro possono aggiungersene più di 60 tra risorse esterne e subappaltatori, garantendo che la nave lasci il cantiere al massimo dell’efficienza e in conformità alla classe. Negli ultimi 5 anni sono state più di 750 le commesse di riparazione effettuate nei nostri scali di alaggio, nel nostro bacino e gli interventi su navi galleggianti in porto, con un continuo aumento di nuovi clienti che hanno deciso di affidarci la loro flotta.

#shiprepair  #shipmanteinance #shipyard #shipping #shipindustry

Name: SAVAL | Marine Valves
Description:

RANGE OF VALVES: Globe valves, Gate valves, Check valves, Quick closing, Safety valves, Butterfly valves, Mud box, Strainers, Storm valves, Scuppers and Fire valves.

All these valves can be supplied with handwheel or driven with Hydraulic, Pneumatic or Electric actuators in accordance with customer requirements.

We can also supply Hydraulic, Pneumatic or Electric remote control with our patented equipment & software. Additionally, we can carry out the commissioning of this equipment.

SAVAL VALVES has available any kind of certification by the mainly classifications societies as BV, DNV, LLOYDS REGISTER, RINA, ABS, GL.

SHOCK TEST certificates are available in accordance with N.A.T.O rule MIL-DTL-901E for following valves: Globe Valves, Gate valves, Check valves, Safety valves, Quick closing valves, Butterfly valves and Ball valves.

Name: Befoil
Description:
Befoil est une entreprise française qui conçoit des bateaux à foils en particulier pour les écoles de voiles et les débutants. Notre ambition est d’offrir à tous le plaisir de voler sur l’eau avec un bateau simple d’utilisation et sécurisant. 

Befoil a été conçu par le cabinet d'architecture navale VPLP, c’est un bateau d’un usage facile même pour les débutants grâce à ses 4 foils et ailettes latérales en forme de T. Il dispose d’une plate-forme stable et de foils auto-régulés.

Befoil est fabriqué à partir de matériaux 100% recyclables à faible coût tels que l'aluminium et le thermoplastique qui nous permettent de proposer un prix compétitif.

Befoil est un bateau hybride qui peut être utilisé à la fois pour apprendre à naviguer mais il sera aussi très apprécié de navigateurs expérimentés avides de sensations. 


Befoil is a French company making foiling boats for sailing schools and beginners. Our objective is to make everyone fly over the water. Our foiling boats are easy and safe to sail.

Thanks to its 4 T-shaped foils and winglets at the side -  befoil, designed especially for sailing schools by a naval architectural firm VPLP, becomes an easy foiling boat even for beginners. It has a stable platform and self-regulated foils. 

Befoil is made from low-cost 100% recyclable materials such as aluminum and thermoplastic that allow us to keep accessible price.

Befoil is a hybrid boat that can be used both as a classical catamaran to learn sailing and then to foil.

Name: Jamestown Metal Marine Sales, Inc.
Description:
Our company founder, the late Edward W. Hazard Jr., understood the importance of quality design and production.  After leaving the Navy in 1946, Ed decided to first enter the marine industry.  Gaining years of experience in this highly specialized field, Ed founded Jamestown in 1973. Ed built the company from the ground up, in response to what he identified as an industry-wide need for a company that would be equipped to partner with owners and shipbuilders in order to deliver superior marine accommodation solutions, on time and on budget.  In 1986, Ed’s son Richard assumed the role of company president.  Richard took his father’s vision and not only made it a reality, he made it his own, by expanding the company’s offerings to include Electrical, HVAC & Pipe.

From our earliest days, Jamestown has been a reliable, trustworthy resource to those outfitters and owners who sought joiner accommodations around the world.  Our extensive experience has enabled us to not only become experts in joiner solutions, but also in additional areas such as Electrical, Piping and HVAC. This expertise, combined with our core commitment to value engineering, make us a premier provider of turnkey marine and offshore solutions.  A brief overview of our offerings can be seen below:

Description:

Name: NOVAMARINE MONACO
Description:
Novamarine brand, synonym for state-of-the-art and high-quality, was one of the World first brand to build ribs with a rigid hull. Over the years, Novamarine has achieved outstanding results in the supply of military and professional ribs to the World’s biggest organisation as the Navy Seals, the UK Navy, coast guard and fire fighters.

The entire production is carried out next to the SNO Marine Center facilities in Olbia, one of the biggest shipyard for service, winter storage and brokerage of the Mediterranean. Today, after years dedicated to research and development, Novamarine manufactures unequalled high-level vessels.

New construction methods,  modern vacuum infusion technology, innovative foam filled tubes, accurate choice of materials, care for details, advanced technologies and high-quality craftsmanship. These are the distinctive features of the firm which allow to produce bold boats with new lines.

Entirely custom, Novamarine vessels are designed and “tailor-made” according to the specific requirements of the buyer, besides the type of use of the boat. The majority of the components are hand-made by a skilled staff and the result is that every piece and accessory has a unique and specific shape, completely different from the one already available on the market. This allows our customer to have an exclusive boat that reflects their taste and character.

Novamarine compliance with the requirements concerning the management systems of high-quality standards and its relentless work were officially acknowledged with the attainment of the most renowned and important international certificates: RINAMIL, certification ISO 9001:2008, IQ NET, CISQ, CE. 

Novamarine produces 4 different lines:

· Black Shiver: chase boats up to 26m for Super Yachts, ideal also for long trips
· RH Line : the original RIB from 8 to 12m
· HD Line: semi-professional Heavy Duty boats
· Tender: tender for Yacht garages

Our commitment to excellence is reflected in our numerous certifications, which include: ISO 9001:2015: Quality Management. ISO 45001:2018: Occupational Health and Safety. ISO 14001:2015: Environmental management. Lloyd's Register Approved Service Supplier: Excellence in the provision of subsea services. ADCI: International Society of Diving Contractors. Oil Spil Responder and OSR LESMAR: Oil spill response. SLOM LESMAR: Cleanup operations. SICEP LESMAR: Quality and reliability in subsea services. RINA, Achiles Repro, Enap Membership, ABS Recognized Service Supplier, Bureau Veritas, Class NK Certificate of Approval and Approval of Service Suppliers DNV: Commitment to excellence and continuous improvement.
