Name: Blue Parrot Offshore
Description:
Blue Parrot Offshore (BPO) is a privately owned company founded in 2015 in Cádiz, specializing in heavy steel fabrication, offshore infrastructure, and shipbuilding and repair. Our strength lies in a solid Project Management approach and a strong safety and QHSE culture embedded in every phase.

Our leadership team brings over 70 years of combined experience in offshore construction and conversion, with a particular focus on vessel conversions: structural modifications, equipment installation, and accommodation extensions delivered with efficiency and precision.

We operate from our workshop and offices in the Bay of Cádiz, where we design, pre-assemble, and fabricate steel solutions for offshore and naval projects. When a project requires quay access, large laydown areas, or direct work alongside the vessel, we execute the works at various port facilities in Cádiz and the surrounding area, in coordination with our local partners.

This combination of an in-house workshop and access to port infrastructure allows us to provide an agile response, with heavy fabrication capacity and operational proximity to vessels and offshore assets.

We have worked with leading companies such as Saipem, Wärtsilä, and Carnival, delivering innovative solutions in offshore wind, oil & gas, and maritime modernisation, and distinguishing ourselves through our agility, flexibility, and transparency.

At Blue Parrot Offshore, we believe in accelerating the energy transition by building the critical infrastructure of tomorrow and ensuring safety every step of the way.

Follow us to discover our projects and our commitment to a sustainable energy future.

#OffshoreEnergy #EnergyTransition #Safety #Innovation #Offshore

Name: AIRCOAT
Description:
AIRCOAT is a RESEARCH AND INNOVATION PROJECT funded by the European Commission within Horizon 2020.

The Air Induced friction Reducing ship COATing (AIRCOAT) project aims to develops a passive air lubrication technology inspired by the Salvinia effect. 

Applying the AIRCOAT technology to ship-hull surfaces will produce a thin permanent air layer, when submerged in water. This will reduces the overall frictional resistance while acting as a physical barrier between water and the hull surface. 

In addition to reducing energy consumption, the air barrier will inhibit the attachment of maritime organisms (biofouling). The AIRCOAT technology has the potential to reduce energy consumption and emissions of waterborne transport, making it more sustainable.

Our consortium is composed of:
FRAUNHOFER GESELLSCHAFT ZUR FOERDERUNG DER ANGEWANDTEN FORSCHUNG E.V. (Germany)
KARLSRUHER INSTITUT FUER TECHNOLOGIE (Germany)
HOCHSCHULE BREMEN, UNIVERSITY OF APPLIED SCIENCES BREMEN (Germany)
HAMBURGISCHE SCHIFFBAU-VERSUCHSANSTALT GmbH (Germany)
PPG COATINGS EUROPE BV (Netherlands)

Name: Nordhavn Yachts
Description:
Nordhavn Yachts is the world recognized leader in the semi-custom adventure motoryacht category. Manufactured by Pacific Asian Enterprises, Inc., (PAE) based out of Dana Point, CA, the Nordhavn brand has more global circumnavigations and ocean crossings to its name than all other motoryacht manufacturers combined. Naval Architect Jeff Leishman has designed every single Nordhavn, the first one being a 46-footer in 1989. Since then, 30 different models have been created and 625* hulls ranging in length from 35 to 120 feet have been delivered to buyers from all over the world.

PAE was founded in 1978 by Dan Streech and Jim Leishman, along with Joe Meglen, who retired and sold his share of the company in 2005; Streech and Jim Leishman were later joined by Jim’s brother Jeff Leishman as a principle. The company started out manufacturing the world class cruising sailing yacht brand Mason, of which 500 43- to 64-foot sailboats were delivered. For six years, PAE designed and built both sail and motor yachts, but in 1995 retired the Mason brand to focus on the Nordhavn line. Nordhavn employs approximately 50 employees within seven offices located worldwide: in Dana Point, CA; Anacortes, WA; North Palm Beach, FL; East Greenwich, RI; Southampton, UK; Brisbane, AUS; Mugla, Turkey.

Nordhavns have a storied history including a world record for fastest global circumnavigation by a production power boat achieved by a Nordhavn 40 in 2001-02. Other feats include the successful convoy of 18 motoryachts (16 of them Nordhavns) across the Atlantic Ocean from Florida to Gibraltar in 2004, as well as yachts that have achieved the highest latitudes on record, and a Nordhavn 57 that voyaged through the NW Passage. 

Design Awards:
-2018 IY&A Awards–N96 (winner)
-2019 World Superyacht Award–N100 (nominee)
-2019 ISS Awards–N100 (finalist)
-2021 IY&A Awards–N41 (winner)
-2023 IY&A Awards–N80 (nominee; winners announced May 2023)
 
*as of 2/2023

Name: Shipsonic
Description:
Shipsonic develops, tests and installs ultrasonic antifouling systems for commercial marine, offshore, fishery and industry. Our track record proves that our systems are highly effective.

The working of ultrasonic marine growth prevention is very simple: any object, immersed in sea water, that vibrates in the ultrasonic frequency range, and with enough sound pressure, will not be fouled. Larvae of fouling organisms do not settle on objects in ultrasonic vibration.

Advantages of Shipsonic Ultrasonic Antifouling:
    - One time, simple installation
    - Plug and play commissioning
    - Dry installation; no dry docking needed
    - Maintenance free
    - Reduce fouling costs

Name: Cantieri Capelli
Description:
Established in 1974, the Capelli Boatyard at Spinadesco (Cremona, Northern Italy) has since become one of the leading manufacturers of small- to medium-sized boats. It was Davide Capelli’s love for the River Po, together with his limitless creativity, that gave him the impetus to set up a new business. He started out by building flat-keel riverboats out of fiberglass, and was soon joined by his young son, Umberto, who concentrated on designing and building new types of canoe intended for use in competitions.

The turning point came at the Genoa Boat Show in 1986, when the Capelli Boatyard unveiled the first 4.7 meter Fisherman – it was rapturously received.

In 1992, the company diversified its manufacturing to produce a line of fiberglass-keel inflatable boats which have gone on to win a substantial share of the market.

The boatyard currently manufactures 16 different models of fiberglass boat and 29 different inflatable boats.The success of the ever-evolving Capelli Boatyard can be attributed to two principal factors: the consistent quality of the boats themselves and the forward-looking organizational structure of the company.

Name: Sun Concept - Solar Boats
Description:
About us:
Sun Concept - Solar Boat Builders is a start-up business based on the concept of Sea Economy focused on the development and construction of electric solar boats. Our vision is to become a world reference in solar boat serial models development and our mission is to become a top reference in up to 12m long solar boats and to develop a multi niche offer covering from leisure to tourism and professional boats.

Our first models are the SunSailer 7.0 solar boats. These are specially developed to operate in protected waters with high natural value.

These 7 m long boats are designed with a fiber glass displacement hull with a behaviour similar to a sailboat and are equipped with solar panels, batteries and electric motors that allow a maximum autonomy (unlimited in the sun, up to 8 hours without sun) and move at 5-knot cruise speed without a single drop or fuel. Designed to be harmonious and have the least possible impact on ecosystems without disturbing the river or bed and margins or the birds. Perfect for sheltered waters such as estuaries, deltas, rivers, lakes, lakes, dams and canals.

Optimized to be affordable to public and private entities. Very adaptable, it can be used for tourism and leisure as well as for transport, taxi, environmental monitoring and patrolling in sensitive areas. Very silent, takes up to 12 passengers with the highest safety and convenience.

Developed and built in Portugal (Olhão, Algarve).

For more information:
www.sunconcept.pt

Name: Centraalstaal
Description:
Headquartered in the Netherlands, Centraalstaal supplies aluminium and steel building kits to the shipbuilding industry worldwide. The kits consist of highly accurate pre-cut and pre-formed plates, frames and profiles. The exceptional quality of the building kit means that you could ultimately save 25% on the total construction time of the hull. 

Centraalstaal building kits are used in a wide variety of applications, ranging from super yachts, offshore supply vessels, ferries, patrol boats, suppliers, tugs, container vessels and bulk carriers to 3D cladding systems and bridges. The production process is such that kits and components are produced to an exceptionally high degree of accuracy. With efficient assembly on-site. 

Centraalstaal also offers shape fairing and complex surface modelling. This leads to highly accurate production data for the realisation of building kits that are a perfect fit.

Name: HanseYachts Sp. z o.o
Description:
Początki działalności polskiego oddziału sięgają 1995 roku – znanego początkowo pod nazwą Technologie Tworzyw Sztucznych (TTS), wówczas odbywała się tu produkcja elementów konstrukcji jachtów takich jak kadłuby, pokłady, podłogi. Ważnym krokiem w rozwoju firmy było jej wejście do HanseYachts Kapitalgruppe w 2006 roku. Ciągły wzrost zapotrzebowania na nasze produkty spowodował, że w 2008 roku zakład został przeniesiony do nowej lokalizacji na terenie Goleniowskiego Parku Przemysłowego w Łozienicy. Została tutaj otwarta specjalnie przystosowana nowoczesna hala produkcyjna do produkcji laminatów. Dzięki temu nasi pracownicy wykonują pracę w bezpiecznych warunkach przy jednoczesnej dbałości o środowisko naturalne. Ostatnie lata naszej działalności to nieustanny rozwój. W Łozienicy powstały dwa magazyny, rozbudowane zostało laboratorium, pracownia projektowa.
W 2015 roku wybudowaliśmy także drugą, a w 2021 kolejną halę produkcyjną, w których prowadzone są prace montażowe związane z ostatecznym wyposażaniem jachtów gotowych do sprzedaży. Obecnie wykonujemy laminowanie, okuwanie jachtów, a także montowanie instalacji wodnych, elektrycznych i gazowych, silników, wyposażenia nawigacyjnego i sterującego oraz innego wyposażenia niezbędnego na każdym jachcie. Należy podkreślić, że aktualnie w Łozienicy produkujemy w całości sześć modeli jachtów, co oznacza, że są one gotowe, aby trafić bezpośrednio do klienta lub dealera. Dynamika rozwoju oraz duże zainteresowanie produktem przekłada się m.in. na znaczny wzrost zatrudnienia.
Rok 2022 to dla nas kolejny przełom, ponieważ jako wieloletni członek grupy HanseYachts zmieniliśmy nazwę przedsiębiorstwa i jesteśmy HanseYachts Sp. z o. o. co podkreśla naszą przynależność do grupy.

Established in 1926, Century Boats is an American Boat Builder of Modern Sport Classic, Performance, Fishing, Cruising, and Wake boats.

Name: Headway Technology Co.,Ltd
Description:
Headway Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise that takes technological innovation as the purpose, specializes in professional R&D, production and sales of high-tech marine accessories and provides worldwide professional after-sales service.

Since its foundation, Headway has planned the development vision of “Create high-tech marine equipments and a national brand”.  Over the past eight years, Headway staff have created and innovated satisfying products for customers by virtue of their own wisdoms and efforts, always maintained a high level of enthusiasm for customers, partners and new technologies, sought for self-improvement, helped customers to achieve their goals, and promoted the social progress on the forging-ahead road.  Adhering to dedication and innovation entrepreneurial spirits, Headway sailed through wind and waves to make progress continuously, attracted a large number of upright, honest, and unremitting high-quality talents with courage in meeting the challenges by dint of its mature management and perfect systems, and determined to install the high-tech marine equipments made in China onboard every vessel of the world.

Headquartered in Qingdao, China, Headway has set up an independent R&D center and production base in Qingdao Hi-tech Park, established one subsidiary company in Shanghai, and branch offices Guangzhou, Shenzhen, Dalian, Zhoushan, Shanhaiguan, Nantong, Huangdao and other cities, established more than 120 service stations in 56 countries and areas around the world, and formed a unique complete and large-scale global service system. 

OceanGuard BWMS (Ballast Water Management System) is a high-tech marine product independently developed and produced by Headway, which is the first non-European brand to obtain DNV Type Approval in the world and the first BWMS owning CCS and DNV Type Approvals in the world; Meanwhile, Headway is the first BWMS manufacturer to win full-scale DNV Type Approval and OceanGuard BWMS is one of the first BWMSs to win USCG-AMS Certificates; At present, OceanGuard BWMS seized the global market quickly and with scales by dint of its high technology, compact structure, small size and low power consumption.  Voyage Data Recorder, another mature product that Headway owns completely independent intellectual property right, was successfully applied to the ships around the world with its high technology, unique Vxworks operating system, and approvals of world authoritative Classification Societies.  The high-power LED lighting products researched and developed by Headway always take the lead in the world, and the products are exported to Australia, Germany, South Korea and etc.  The ECDIS (electronic chart display and information system) and BNWAS (bridge navigation watch alarm system) have entered the batch production stage.  The company will continue to uphold the scientific and technological innovation spirit to launch a range of products, including radar, GPS, speed log, depth sounder, compass and etc.

From initial development till now, Headway endured great hardships in pioneer work, overcame all obstacles, went through many tries and tests, actively absorbed industry experience, and accumulated powerful strengths by virtue of constantly creative technologies and gradually mature and sound management. Surviving from severe competition, Headway will stand out to make its contribution to marine equipments industry in China.

No ano 2001 depois de grandes estudos de mercado e com uma grande visão de futuro, a empresa decide expandir fronteiras e atingir um mercado em total expansão, como é o mercado Brasileiro, e desde então KRAUSE Boats esta trabalhando com uma filial em Palhoça - SC ao comando do Sr. Maximilian Krause , oferecendo nossa qualidade, garantia e segurança.
Hoje a nossa empresa, exporta a vários paises e é considerada como uma das melhor no MERCOSUL, no que diz respeito ao produto final, acabamento, atendimento pós vendas  e o mais importante para KRAUSE Boats , é a SEGURANÇA e  o RESPALDO das nossas embarcações.

Name: Dockyard & Engineering Works Ltd.
Description: DEW Ltd is an important strategic and national maritime industry of Bangladesh. It was established in 1922. Later on, due to various reasons during late nineties, the industry started incurring severe losses and consequently was laid off at the end of 2002. Thereafter, on 07 December, 2006 DEW Ltd was handed over to Bangladesh Navy (BN) under the Ministry of Defense (MOD) with existing and obsolete machineries and workshops on 21.78 acres of land. During the lay off period the yard has almost losses her capability. However, presently DEW Ltd has begun its production by all out effort under BN management. Now DEW Ltd regains international standard and its new building capability.

Name: VSY Yachts
Description:
Since 2004 VSY has been engaged in building mega-yachts of over 60 metres and is by now widely recognized as builders of the highest caliber at an international level.
Based in Italy’s focal yacht building area, Viareggio, VSY combines master craftsmanship and cutting-edge know-how with the Italian flair that characterize the area in which they operate.
Winner of prestigious international awards for their yachts such as Sealyon (ex Candyscape II), RoMa and Stella Maris, VSY has also obtained several prizes for their commitment in tracing new routes for the sector. At VSY the best expression of luxury and comfort is in fact achieved in the respect of the marine environment on all fronts, obtaining strict and prestigious Certifications.
VSY is respected as an ethical construction specialist with a vision of sustainability for the wider practice of yacht building. Using recyclable materials in build, VSY integrate new innovations in water treatment and emission reduction, green anchoring systems and effective ways of producing performance for minimum energy to push this green initiative forward. Their flagship, Stella Maris, in particular has become “the Godmother of the Environment” and a representative of the global fleet’s advancements in regards to eco-friendly technology and construction methods.

Not only is VSY pushing the evolution of ecologically sound construction of larger yachts, but promoting relationships with international committees to create further environmental stability in the whole superyacht industry.

Name: Port of San Diego Ship Repair Association
Description:
Established in 1982 to increase industry cooperation and cohesiveness and create greater public awareness and understanding of the industry’s issues, the Port of San Diego Ship Repair Association represents more than 150 San Diego-area companies engaged in ship repair, conversion, overhaul and modernization. Approximately 70 percent of the work performed is on United States Navy and Defense Contracts.

Association member companies provide a full range of services, from maintenance, conversion, overhaul and ship repair, to specialized crafts such as welding, industrial painting, pipefitting, shipfitting, electrical work, sand blasting, carpentry and rigging, to name just a few. Member companies often join forces on major projects in order to share labor and resources for the most timely, efficient completion of jobs. All work is performed to the highest quality standards (many of the member companies are ISO Certified for quality and environmental protection), with priorities placed on employee and customer safety, protection of the environment, employee training and advancement opportunities and customer satisfaction.

In addition to the crucial services provided for the Navy fleet and commercial vessels, Association member companies add more than 14,000 jobs to the San Diego economy, both directly and through subcontractors and suppliers. These well-paying jobs go to a diverse cross section of the region’s population and contribute hundreds of millions of dollars in revenue to the local economy each year.

Name: NAUTILUS
Description:
The NAUTILUS project aims at developing, evaluating and validating a highly efficient power generation system fuelled by Liquefied Natural Gas (LNG) for long-haul passenger ships. 

A novel energy technology will be applied on a cruise ship. The system will take care of all heat and power needs of the cruise vessel. 

The suggested technology will offer lower emissions, higher efficiency, improved dynamic capability, fuel flexibility, modularity and lower maintenance due to fewer moving parts.

The to be developed system has potential to cut greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions by 50% and all other diesel engine exhaust gas emission components almost entirely.  

The NAUTILUS energy system will make cruising more sustainable and compliant with IMO 2030.

NAUTILUS project has received funding from the European Union’s Horizon 2020 research and innovation program under grant agreement No 861647.

Project coordinated by DLR Deutsches Zentrum für Luft – und Raumfahrt

Whole consortium: 
•	Carnival Maritime
•	DLR Institute of Engineering Thermodynamics 
•	Ecole Polytechnique Fédérale de Lausanne
•	GRANT Garant
•	Chantiers de l'Atlantique
•	Lloyd’s Register EMEA
•	Lunds Universitet
•	MAN Energy Solutions

•	Rijksuniversiteit Groningen
•	SOLIDPower SA
•	SOLIDPower SPA
•	Technische Universiteit Delft
•	Teknologian tutkimuskeskus VTT

The NAUTILUS is H2020 project funded by the European Union’s Horizon 2020 research and innovation program under grant agreement No 861647.

Name: University of Michigan Electric Boat
Description:
The University of Michigan Electric Boat (UMEB) team is an entirely student-led project team seeking to develop the next generation of engineers through leadership and sustainable technologies. Each year our team designs, builds, and races an electric-powered boat to compete and represent the University of Michigan on the national stage at our collegiate competition, Promoting Electric Propulsion (PEP), and professional events, such as the Lake of the Ozarks (LOTO) Shootout. UMEB is also competing on the world stage as we attempt to set new limits in electric straight line speed and circle track records.  

In 2020, during our first year competing in the Promoting Electric Propulsion college event, our team placed 2nd overall. We iterated on the original design until spring 2023, and then we shifted gears to go after world water speed records with a new boat design. During summer 2024, UMEB unveiled our next generation electric race boat, TiDE, at the Boyne Thunder Poker Run, and also showcased the project to much larger crowds at the 2024 LOTO Shootout.

In spring 2025, we took TiDE down to Mercury Racing's test facility, Lake X, in Florida where we made significant progress towards our first water test. Then about a month later, we made our first successful water test back in Michigan with TiDE. In subsequent testing, we made good progress, but had a mechanical failure with our motors. However, we worked the entire summer to get new motors and were able to integrate them a week before the 2025 LOTO Shootout at the end of summer 2025. We competed and won the electric class at this event, becoming the first college team to ever compete and win in the Shootout's 37 year history. 

Now in fall 2025, we are designing a brand new electric D-Stock hydroplane to return to PEP for the first time since 2023, and are in the early design phase of our next record breaking project, which will be optimized for both straight line speed and circle track records.

Description:
At Navalty, we specialize in the full spectrum of boat and yacht design from visionary concepts to final manufacturing drawings ready for shipyards. Our mission is simple yet bold: to redefine maritime design where innovation meets performance.

Navalty’s approach combines creativity, precision, and technology. We leverage cutting-edge tools for 3D modeling, CFD simulations, hydrodynamics, and structural engineering, delivering results that balance aesthetics with high-performance naval architecture.

Our clients range from elite yacht owners and studios outsourcing design to shipyards and maritime authorities seeking world-class solutions. With every project, we aim to create vessels that embody modern elegance, superior performance, and long-lasting value.

Our Services Include:

Yacht & Boat Concept Design

Naval Architecture & 3D Modeling

CFD & Hydrodynamic Simulations

Engineering & Manufacturing Drawings

Shipyard Collaboration & Support

At Navalty, we believe in designing beyond the ordinary. Each vessel we create is a statement of innovation, luxury, and engineering excellence. By merging bold creativity with advanced maritime science, we ensure that every design reflects the future of yachting.

Navalty — Where Innovation Meets Performance.

Name: Winterbothams
Description:
Founded in 1985, Winterbothams Ltd has established a reputation for delivering the best in marine surveying and yacht consultancy. Our company combines decades of expertise with an acute appreciation of clients’ needs and expectations. This experience is complemented with a continuing dedication to deliver surveying and consulting with proficiency and precision.

Always providing transparent and unbiased representation for clients of all types, Winterbothams offers an integral advisory service that continues throughout the lifespan of a yacht. Consequently, we have developed long standing relationships with a global client base of owners, captains, engineers, law firms, insurance companies and shipyards.

As well as pre-purchase surveys, services also include, new construction technical supervision, refit technical supervision, plan appraisals, specification writing, valuations, expert witness work and arbitration.  

The company has nine full time surveyors with a combined experience of well over 100 years, from varying commercial, military, yachting, seagoing, classification, naval architecture and marine engineering backgrounds  Additionally we have access to experienced associates with  expertise in such specialist disciplines as electrical engineering, hydraulic engineering, refrigeration etc should the job in question so require it.  This broad and diverse background means our overall industry-wide knowledge and capability is exceptional. We are well placed to provide you and your client with a service second to none.

It has floating dry dock of upto 20,000 TLC (60000 DWT), portal rail cranes, power stations, DG sets, workshops and machining centres with capital investment of about Rs. 228 crore.  It has about 300 employees. It belongs to the ABG Group of Companies. It has repaired over 585 vessels and 14 oil rigs since operations started in Jan. 1996. It is listed on the Bombay Stock Exchange. most of the prominent classification societies like IRS, ABS, LRS and BV are having offices in Goa.

Name: Smart Design 2006 LLC
Description:
Smart Design 2006 OOD – Ship Design & Engineering Excellence

For over 19 years, Smart Design 2006 has been delivering world-class ship design services, combining innovation, precision, and technical expertise. With headquarters in Varna, Bulgaria  and a branch office in Las Vegas, Nevada, USA , we support global projects and provide comprehensive design solutions for the maritime industry.

We are proud to have successfully completed 80+ New Building Projects and 60+ Retrofit Projects, delivering high-end engineering services to clients worldwide.

 Our Core Services

Pre-project research & feasibility studies – concept design and early-stage development

Preliminary & Class Approval design stages

3D Ship Modeling & Equipment Positioning

3D Pipe Routing for all ship systems

HVAC routing and arrangements

Full pipe prefabrication drawings – isometric, spool, installation & coordination drawings

3D Hull Design – nesting, cutting information, prefabrication drawings & reports

3D Structural Modeling – foundations, platforms, hatch covers, ladders, doors & more

Accommodation layouts and detailed 3D installation drawings

3D Laser Scanning & Point Cloud Processing for retrofit, modernization & as-built documentation

Specialized design projects – Ballast Water Treatment Systems, Scrubber Systems

Documentation for ship repair, refitting & conversion

Design of launching facilities

 Software Expertise

Our team operates with cutting-edge engineering software, including:
AVEVA Marine, NUPAS Cadmatic, PDMS, ANSYS, FORAN, Rhinoceros, Plant 3D, AutoCAD, and more.

 Our Mission

At Smart Design 2006, our mission is to innovate and inspire, delivering sustainable, high-quality ship design services while building strong international partnerships. Through creativity, precision, and collaboration, we help our clients navigate the future of the maritime industry.

 Let's collaborate!
We are always open to new partnerships and exciting projects.

Name: Qualified Collective
Description:
Qualified Collective – Uniting The Undeniable Professionals

Qualified Collective, with interior engineering as its core, was forged from two high achievers in the industry: the teams of Klarify (Netherlands) and Boutique Concepts (Spain). Each of them with their own strengths, united to achieve the next level in engineering quality, short and dependable lead times and setting the standard for expertise and crystal clear communication.

The go-to-address for both client and freelancer: due to our 20+ years of experience, we know the professionals in our market. The yards, design teams, interior outfitters and freelancers. With projects growing in size rapidly, the demand for highly skilled professionals was never higher. Those same professionals often prefer to work freelance, yet the projects no longer just require skilled individuals, but organised teams instead.

We specialise in Interior Engineering, Luxury Interior Consultancy and Exterior Design and have the team to satisfy a client’s needs.

Message to our future colleagues: working freelance and having the luxury of 500-1200 hour contracts, annually? Being independent, yet part of a team? We provide the opportunity and share the benefits.

Message to our future clients: why use your time and resources on trying to find the best individuals to build your in-house project team? Consider yourself to be a client rather than an employer and raise the bar of your engineering.

Our offices are located in Dordrecht (Netherlands) and Valencia (Spain).

Get in touch with us: www.qualifiedcollective.com

Aandacht voor kwaliteit en schoonheid bracht in de loop der jaren diverse bekroningen en een hechte, internationale klantenkring. De Boarnstream is bouwer van de Boarncruiser (in lengte variërend van 10 tot 30 m en gebouwd in vier verschillende ranges), importeur van Marex (Noorse polyester schepen van 6 tot 12 m), jachtmakelaar en totale yachtservice verlener.

Ons streven is om u als watersportliefhebber zorgeloos van uw vrije tijd op het water te laten genieten. Als geen ander begrijpen wij de meerwaarde van een schip. Sinds 1964 hebben wij al onze kennis en ervaring keer op keer tot zijn recht laten komen. Hierdoor zijn wij ook bijzonder goed in staat vooruit te plannen en u te helpen met het maken van de juiste keuzes op dit prachtig en bijzonder vakgebied. Dagelijks werken wij er met veel plezier aan om uw droom te realiseren.



Boarnstream Yachting is een handelsnaam van Jachtwerf de Boarnstream BV en Boarnstream Yachts BV

Cantieri Estensi - Yachts
Description:
Cantieri Estensi was founded in 1995 with the ambition of building boats featuring never-ending charm and able to stand any sea condition.
More than 500 boats, roaming between the 14 different models produced today, have been built since 1996.
Cantieri Estensi’s story began with the production of Queentime, a precious motosailor produced in 80 models in two different versions.
Starting from 2000 the shipyard specialized in the model Goldstar, proving Cantieri Estensi as one of the leader Italian brands in the production of lobster boats, redesigned in a Mediterranean way by simplifying their lines, creating modern and timeless boats.
The Maine series saw the light in 2006 and opened a new development way based on maturity and modernity of the product: prestigious and exclusive boats, with semi-displacement hulls and speed ranging between 8 and 18 knots.
The new production site, where all the models all built, was opened in 2009.
The new flagship, the 640 Maine, was launched in the Spring of 2011; it is a symbol of the most modern and functional way of saying and living on bard.
In 2015 Cantieri Estensi was taken over by a new partnership having a precise aim: preserve tradition and increase the prestige and quality of its boats, relying on Made in Italy excellence

Name: MIL Shipping
Description:
MIL was established in 2006 by the brothers Erik and Harald Askvig. The company, through a joint venture, acted as the offshore and fishery newbuilding projects arm of the Fearnley group until 2019. Today MIL Shipping is a stand-alone shipbrokering company with significant expertise in Newbuilding projects, supported also by Chartering and SnP services, complementing projects with analysis, consultancy and market intelligence. 
The brokers in MIL operate on a world-wide basis and are located in Oslo, Hareid and Istanbul.
Our main focus is on specialised vessels or offshore constructions, typically within Offshore Energy segments, Aquaculture, Fisheries and Passenger vessels.
MIL has brokered construction contracts at shipyards in all major shipbuilding markets, including but not limited to Norway, Spain, Turkey, and the Far East.

Name: SUD MOTEURS ATLANTIQUE
Description:
Crée en 1994, la société SUD MOTEURS ATLANTIQUE est spécialisée dans le domaine de la maintenance et réparation de moteurs diesel ainsi que de lignes de propulsions dans le domaine naval ou industriel.
Dotée d’un atelier de 1000 m2, notre agence de Brest, dirigée par Philippe Guenego, compte une vingtaine de salariés et se situe sur le port de commerce. Nous gérons également l’atelier situé dans le bassin de Radoub à Fort de France en Martinique ainsi qu'a Fort de France à La Réunion et intervenons dans le monde entier. 

Doté d’un pole usinage, nous intervenons sur tout type de moteurs diesel de 2 et 4 temps et leurs périphériques tels que les pompes, réfrigérants, embrayages  ainsi que les arbres porte-hélices et réducteurs de vitesse. 

Certifiés ISO 9001 par Bureau Veritas, IMES , distributeurs Bosh et représentants Baudoin, notre savoir-faire et expériences sont reconnus par un agrément accordé par des constructeurs d’envergure mondiale tels qu' Anglo Belgian Corporation.

Name: Dekotel Coating Oy
Description:
DEKOTEL - Decorative Materials for Cruise Ship Interiors Since 2004

At Dekotel, we specialize in producing high-quality, IMO-certified decorative materials that combine durability, safety, and limitless design possibilities for interiors. For 20 years, we’ve been pioneering sustainable, lightweight, and visually stunning surface solutions that transform the most demanding environments—from cruise ships to hotels, spas, restaurants, and other vibrant spaces.

Our mission is simple yet powerful: to make any design vision come to life through materials that excel in both form and function. Whether it’s capturing intricate patterns, colors, or textures, our advanced decorative coatings bring a new level of realism and immersion to interior design. Dekotel’s industry-first innovations, like our Metal Coating with 3D surfaces, enhance not only the visual appeal of spaces but also invite touch and elevate the material experience.

At DEKOTEL, sustainability and safety drive our innovations, delivering future-proof solutions that meet the highest standards for cruise ship interiors. We don’t just provide materials—we offer tailored solutions that truly transform spaces. Our design team collaborates closely with architects, designers, and builders to meet rigorous technical and safety standards, helping clients achieve stunning results with long-lasting performance.

DEKOTEL materials are engineered to reduce ship weight, minimize combustible components, and optimize installation efficiency—making them ideal for both new projects and retrofits. With DEKOTEL, you’re not just selecting materials; you’re partnering with a company committed to innovative, future-proof solutions that enrich spaces and meet the highest standards of quality and sustainability.

Description:

The field of activity for national and international projects mainly include shipbuilding for all kind of vessels and a large treasure of experiences with super and mega yachts, as well as the offshore wind energy.

Name: Standard Ship Repair
Description:
Standard Ship Repair (SSR), previously Standard Inspection Services, was founded in 2016. We specialize in Ship Building and Ship Repair. We also provide services to Building Construction, Aerospace, Bridge, Pipeline, Manufacturing and Fabrication industries for government and commercial entities. SSR has NDT Level II and Level III inspectors certified to ASNT Standards. We have NAVSEA and ASME approved NDT procedures in VT, PT, MT, and UT. Our NDT Level III previously worked for one of the Master Ship Repair Companies (MSR) in San Diego as a Weld Engineer/ NDT Examiner. With our Level III Services we can audit your company to ensure compliance with various codes and standards. We can assist in welding procedure development, welding personnel management, and NDT procedure/personnel development. We believe highly trained welders and personnel is where quality starts.
      One of our main advantages we offer to Navy Welding Contractors is that we know what it takes to perform a welding job from start to finish. We have inspectors who can assist from start to end to make sure a work specification is being followed. We understand what it takes to comply with NAVSEA Standard Items and how to invoke or delete line items that aren't properly called out in the work specification.  We have vast knowledge of the fabrication documents to make ensure compliance and add quality.

Another major difference that makes us stand out is our ability to assist welding companies to start their own NDT departments. We will assist in Procedure Writing, Training and Certification for your company. We feel by assisting our customer to be as efficient as they can while having the best quality possible, it will ultimately drive the relationship closer. Standard Ship Repair prides itself on its professionalism, knowledge, efficiency and customer service. We believe these values are what make us the right choice for your company!

Name: Kenco
Description:
Na een succesvolle carrière bij Electronautic, richtte Peter Kendjian Kenco op in 1995 als “Kenco Maritieme Elektronica”. Vanaf het begin in 1995 verzorgt Kenco elektrische en elektronische installaties op schepen tot 30 m. lengte. Van tijd tot tijd bedient Kenco ook kustvaartklanten met schepen van meer dan 100 m. lengte.

Onze opdrachtgevers zijn meestal professionele bedrijven, zoals rederijen, scheepswerven, havens en servicebedrijven. Sporadisch bedienen we ook particuliere opdrachtgevers. Sinds de oprichting heeft Kenco vele opdrachtgevers bediend in binnen- en buitenland en in heel diverse projecten.

Vanaf begin 2019 zetten Peter en Frank samen de schouders onder Kenco. Daardoor groeide Kenco zeer sterk. Ook op veel andere vlakken werd aanmerkelijke vooruitgang geboekt. 2019 markeerde het eerste jaar van het plan om Kenco significant te laten groeien naar een bedrijf dat permanent 25 medewerkers aan het werk heeft.

De in 2019 gestarte sterke groei zette zicht voort in 2020: ondanks de Corona-perikelen groeide de omzet en de aantallen klanten en projecten verder door. Wij mogen terugkijken op een mooi 2020, met opnieuw een mooie stap in onze ontwikkelingen.

Kenco is dè specialist op het gebied van elektrische en hybride voortstuwing met grotere vermogens. Het gaat hier om beroepsmatig gebruikte schepen met een benodigd vermogen van minstens 50kW tot 600kW. Dergelijke voortstuwingssystemen draaien dan op accupakketten vanaf 144V.

Naast de levering, montage, aansluiting en in bedrijf stellen van dergelijke voortstuwingsoplossingen, kan Kenco ook de engineeringkant voor haar rekening nemen.

Ook kan Kenco project management van dergelijke projecten verzorgen, ook voor projecten waar meerdere partijen bij betrokken zijn, zoals bijv. scheepswerven, timmerbedrijven, enz.

Daarnaast is Kenco dè specialist voor het ombouwen van recreatieve boten en schepen met een diesel- of benzinemotor naar volledig elektrische of hybride voortstuwing.

Name: DESPIERRES - Atelier bois & océan
Description:
Le chantier DESPIERRES, créé en 1976 par Daniel Despierres, a été racheté par Nicolas Chanteloup en 2016.
L'activité du chantier se divise en trois grandes parties : la rénovation de bateaux du patrimoine, l'aménagement de bateaux et la construction navale (en CP Epoxy).

En France, les chantiers de charpente marine traditionnelle sont de plus en plus rares ; le chantier DESPIERRES est une des dernières adresses de la région. Aussi, le métier de charpentier de marine est maintenant reconnu comme un métier d'art. Notre entreprise jouit donc d'un savoir-faire précieux et d'un certain prestige. 

En 2018 le chantier DESPIERRES a obtenu le label Entreprise du Patrimoine Vivant : une reconnaissance des savoir-faire de l’entreprise. Le chantier a ainsi rejoint un réseau de 15000 entreprises françaises distinguées pour leurs savoir-faire artisanaux et industriels d’excellence. L'entreprise fait désormais partie d’une véritable vitrine du savoir-faire français pour les clients du monde entier

Name: SUNBO INDUSTRIES CO., LTD.
Description:
SUNBO is a specialized company in the shipbuilding business sector and has been mainly working with Korean major shipyards such as Hyundai Heavy Industry, Samsung Heavy Industry, and Daewoo Shipbuilding and Marine Engineering in many projects.

From 2000s, SUNBO started to join in LNG related business and has delivered many LNG related systems such as LNG Fuel Gas Supply System, Partial Reliquefaction System, Boil-off Gas Compressor System, and Regasification Module by collaborating with its clients. Especially, regarding the LNG Fuel Gas Supply System for LNG Fueled Ship, SUNBO has delivered several types of LNG Fuel Gas Supply System such as ME-GI, X-DF, and Four stroke engine FGSS and has provided EPCC services to its clients.

Currently, SUNBO focuses on LNG related shipbuilding business and tries to enhance its capability and capacity to become the worldwide player and satisfy its clients' needs.

Name: Marine Management System (MMS)
Description:
MMS: Gemi İnşa Sektörü için Tam Kapsamlı Yönetim Sistemi

MMS, gemi inşa sektöründe faaliyet gösteren işletmeler için geliştirilmiş, kapsamlı bir yönetim sistemidir. Özel olarak gemi inşa sektörünün kendine özgü ihtiyaçlarına yönelik modüller sunmaktadır.

Temel Özellikler

Kapsamlı Modül Yapısı: MMS, üretim takip, dizayn doküman yönetimi, finans yönetimi, insan kaynakları yönetimi, proje yönetimi, kalite ve garanti yönetimi, müşteri temsilciliği, toplantı yönetimi, alt firma takibi, depo yönetimi ve satın alma yönetimi gibi modüller sunmaktadır.
Esneklik: MMS, işletmelerin ihtiyaçlarına göre uyarlanabilen esnek bir yapıya sahiptir.
Güvenilirlik: MMS, yüksek güvenlik standartlarına sahip bir sistemdir.
Performans: MMS, yüksek performanslı bir sistemdir.

Faydalar

Verimlilik Artışı: MMS, işletmelerin iş süreçlerini optimize ederek verimliliği artırmaktadır.
Mali Kontrol: MMS, işletmelerin mali süreçlerini kontrol ederek finansal riskleri azaltmaktadır.
İş Sürekliliği: MMS, işletmelerin iş sürekliliğini sağlayarak kesintilerin önüne geçmektedir.
Rekabet Avantajı: MMS, işletmelere rekabet avantajı sağlayarak pazar payını artırmaktadır.

Sunulan modüller:

ERP: Finans, muhasebe, üretim, satın alma, depolama, insan kaynakları ve diğer süreçleri tek bir platformda yönetir.
CRM: Müşteri ilişkileri yönetimini (CRM) etkin bir şekilde gerçekleştirir.
BI: Verilerden anlamlı bilgiler elde edilmesini ve iş kararlarının daha doğru bir şekilde alınmasını sağlar.

Gemi inşa sektörüne özel modüller:

Dizayn Doküman Yönetimi: Tasarım dokümanlarının yönetimini kolaylaştırır.
Proje Yönetimi: Proje yönetimi süreçlerini optimize eder.
Kalite ve Garanti Yönetimi: Kalite standartları ve garanti koşullarının yönetimini kolaylaştırır.
Müşteri Temsilciliği: Müşteri talepleri ve şikayetlerinin yönetimini kolaylaştırır.

Sonuç olarak, MMS gemi inşa sektöründeki işletmelerin verimliliğini, rekabet gücünü ve iş sürekliliğini artıran bir yönetim sistemidir.

Naval Architecture & Marine Engineering
Feasibility Studies & Performance Analysis

Propulsion Systems & Engine Room Layout
Structural & Systems Design
Certification, Flag & Class Compliance (EC/IMO)
Technical Supervision & Construction Surveys

While our core expertise lies in the chemical and product tanker segments, our activities also span crude oil tankers, dry bulk carriers, container vessels, and a range of niche markets such as molten sulphur and hydrochloric acid tankers.

What sets us apart is our ability to combine broad international reach with in-depth local expertise. This unique foothold enables us to connect European and Asian markets and provide our clients with opportunities that are otherwise difficult to access.

Our services cover the full scope of modern shipbroking:
	•	Spot chartering (deep sea/short sea)

In 2021, Petticrows relocated to Cascais, Portugal, a village with a rich history in the world of Dragon sailing. Portugal has a long and successful maritime heritage, beginning a new chapter for Petticrows in this friendly environment.

Being at one of the world’s best regatta locations allows Petticrows to efficiently develop high-performance boats. If you are looking for a winning package, come test your next Dragon with us. Pedro Rebelo de Andrade and the rest of our team are waiting to welcome you.

Iniziando come piccola azienda commerciale nel 1972, INDEMAR è diventata ormai un punto di riferimento per l'industria italiana ed europea. Questo successo è merito della passione, della determinazione e dell'intuito della Direzione Aziendale e di tutti i suoi collaboratori.

INDEMAR è nata nel 1972 come azienda commerciale di componenti per la nautica e l’industria del veicolo industriale, rappresentando i due marchi storici Morse Controls e Borg Warner Automotive

Ancora oggi questi marchi fanno parte del nostro catalogo, sviluppatosi nel tempo con l’aggiunta di altri importanti marchi internazionali. Nel corso degli anni INDEMAR ha vissuto un periodo di straordinaria crescita. La passione, l'impegno e il nostro lavoro, la competenza tecnica e la capacità di innovare, ci hanno fatto raggiungere importanti obiettivi nella produzione e distribuzione di componenti per l’industria della nautica e delle macchine industriali. Questi risultati ci impegnano a diventare ancor più competitivi sia nella tradizionale commercializzazione di prodotti esteri sia nella più recente attività produttiva. INDEMAR ha dato al proprio gruppo una struttura che permette di investire adeguatamente in ciascuna delle nostre tre attività: produzione propria, destinata al settore delle macchine industriali ed agricole, distribuzione di prodotti per la nautica e distribuzione di prodotti per i veicoli industriali e le macchine operatrici. INDEMAR è stata tra le prime ad offrire le nuove generazioni di silenziatori, sistemi di depurazione gas di scarico, e motori a gas che combinano esigenze di lunga e difficile operatività agli attuali requisiti di abbattimento delle emissioni, conscia che la protezione ambientale è un altro terreno su cui i fornitori devono confrontarsi.

Tot ver buiten de grenzen van Vinkeveen is het vakmanschap, de kwaliteit en betrouwbaarheid, plus de vriendelijkheid van de scheepsbouwers van Kok bekend.

De liefde voor het bouwen van houten schepen is door de eeuwen heen gebleven, maar ook voor de bouw van stalen schepen, desgewenst ook naar uw eigen ontwerp, en het onderhoud van houten, stalen en polyester schepen bent u bij Scheepswerf Achterbos Th.Kok BV aan het juiste adres. Dat geldt ook voor het aanpassen van uw schip, of het realiseren van uitbreidingen.

De huidige generatie Kok loopt voorop bij de ontwikkelingen van elektro- en hybridevaren en de werf heeft een uitgebreide expertise opgebouwd in het hybride aanpassen van bestaande (diesel-) motoren met een extra elektromotor en in de bouw van fluisterstille elektrosloepen. Daarnaast is het bedrijf gespecialiseerd in het aanpassen van bestaande schepen naar een elektrische aandrijving.

Daarmee bouwt Scheepswerf Achterbos Th.Kok BV zijn eigen toekomst!

Name: MAKAI Power Catamarans
Description:
About MAKAI Power Catamarans

MAKAI Power catamarans is dedicated to manufacturing high-quality, luxury power catamarans that focus on performance, ride comfort, ample space, protection, and superior sea handling, all while maintaining a luxurious appeal. Managed by a diverse global team with over 30 years of collective experience in manufacturing across Europe, Asia, Australia, and New Zealand, MAKAI emphasizes fuel efficiency and innovation. Founded in 2019 by seasoned industry professionals Krešimir Sečak and Shane Grover, MAKAI Yachts is committed to producing specially designed motor catamarans that cater to the discerning tastes of modern sailors.

With the Makai M37, the company aims to lead the power catamaran segment into a new era of innovation and excellence. The founders' extensive international experience in the boating industry, from hands-on boat building to leadership roles in renowned companies, culminated in the creation of the Makai M37. Collaborating with renowned Italian yacht designer Emanuele Rossi, they have set new standards in the power catamaran market.

The Makai M37's unique layout and spacious design have captivated the yachting world. Built by experienced craftsmen in Split, Croatia, at the doorstep of the world’s largest charter market, the M37 embodies an innovative approach to power catamarans. The M37 offers a luxurious experience akin to much larger yachts. The cockpit, comparable to the upper deck of a 50-foot motor yacht, features a full-width stern platform, a semi-enclosed cockpit for ample shade and protection, two separate seating areas that accommodate up to 12, and a large sunbed. Inside, the M37 boasts elegant interiors with two spacious cabins, each with an en-suite head. The master cabin has a queen-sized bed and the guest cabin has a double bed and an additional third bed, making it ideal for both private owners and charter services.

Name: TECNAV
Description:
Tecnav Group | Naval & Yachting Industry

Marketing | Production | Operations | Sales
 mail@tecnav.net

Tecnav Group operates in the Naval and Yachting Industry with a fully integrated approach across the entire value chain: production, sales & purchases (S&P), marketing & business development, project and operations management for new-build and pre-owned vessels.

Active since the 1980s, Tecnav combines industrial expertise, operational execution and commercial strategy, supporting shipyards, owners, investors and international partners in complex, high-performance marine environments.

Tecnav is International Distributor for Moonride Yachts, producing motor yachts from 40’ to 120’, built on the heritage and know-how of the Rodriquez family, historically linked to leading shipyards in military, commercial and pleasure vessel construction.

Tecnav is also Exclusive Dealer for SPX RIBs in Italy (Lazio) and Malta, offering high-performance inflatable boats, 100% Made in Italy, recognized as a benchmark in the RHIB and Maxi RHIB segment for quality, design and performance.

In addition, Tecnav acts as International Distributor for Top Tenders, delivering custom-made inflatable boats and RHIBs, 100% Made in Italy, renowned for design excellence, seaworthiness and build quality.

Alongside commercial and distribution activities, Tecnav provides specialized expertise in project management, supply chain and business development, built on over 20 years of experience in the naval, yachting, defence and EPC sectors, operating across international markets.

The company supports CEOs, COOs, owners and investors during critical project phases, including delayed or distressed programs, supply chain disruptions, cost overruns, supplier crises and turnaround situations. Tecnav integrates project execution, procurement leadership and commercial alignment, operating at the intersection of technical delivery, supplier management and business objectives.

 Offices in Rome & Malta |

Name: THALASSA NAUTIC
Description:
THALASSA NAUTIC est fort de son expérience dans le nautisme depuis 10 ans et moi-même depuis 25 ans. J’ai acquis énormément de données, de rencontres, de partenaires que je peux mettre à votre profit.
Vous avez une idée, venez avec vos interrogations, je viendrais avec mes solutions. Quelles que soient les difficultés rencontrées, sur l’opportunité, la faisabilité d’une option, la solution existe. Vos exigences seront satisfaites, ce sera fonctionnel en alliant un design cohérent avec le bateau.
Vous désirez vendre un bateau d’occasion. Je ferai en sorte de vous mettre en relation avec les bons interlocuteurs.
Depuis 25 ans je suis des formations comme les métiers de la mer de Palavas, mécanicien bateaux à l’AFPA, des stages chez Jeanneau, chez AGL Marine sur les vernis et laques EPIFANES, un poste chez Nauti-Cap en tant que technicien en réparation polyester, pose d’accessoires, les sous traitances chez Nauti-Cap, Chemins d’Océans et maintenant Outremer m’ont conduit à travailler le polyester, l’époxy, l’application de peinture au rouleau, au pistolet et tous ceux qui concernent la réparation, l’entretien de bateau de plaisance sans oublier ma propre clientèle depuis 10 ans.
Pour toutes demandes prenez contact et nous étudierons votre projet ensemble.
Originaire de St Malo, famille aguerrie aux métiers de la mer, marins pêcheurs, Marine Nationale ou marchande, mes expériences en régates, challenges de la baie d’Aigues Morte, trophée Lacaze, championnat de France Surprises, trophée Occitanie, bénévole au Yacht-Club de LA GRANDE MOTTE pour encadrer le championnat du monde des Nacra 17, les qualifications au J O, championnat de monde des Tornado, des l’Open Bic, la minimax 6.50 et Figaro.
Jumelé à mon métier cela m’a amené à faire des préparations pour des régatiers tel que des mini 6.50, la « mini transat La Boulangère », Figaro pour la transat AG2R, en Class 40 pour la Jacques Vabre.
Pour toutes demandes prenez contact et nous étudierons votre projet ensemble.

Name: Verenigde Scheepswerf Heusden
Description:
The Verenigde Scheepswerf Heusden (VSH) was founded in February 2007 to support the IHC Merwede yards due to the extraordinary need for section building. Because of the available slibways (2x) at VSH, IHC Merwede yards also started outsourcing ship hulls to VSH. VSH has experience and technical knowledge to install components in the ship structures. Since its establishment, the VSH has built numerous sections and blocks, pontoons for cutter suction dredgers and launched three medium-sized trailing suction hopper dredgers. All sections, pontoons and hulls are fitted with pre-outfit (pipelines, cable cars and various components) and painted. VSH builds for IHC Merwede but also for third parties. 

VSH is located at the former shipyard area of Verolme Shipyard Heusden and the yard has a history over 100 years of shipbuilding. Many former Verolme employees are now working within the Verenigde Scheepswerf Heusden. The yard employees have a wide knowledge in the field of shipbuilding. VSH is characterized by a relatively flat organization with “short lines”.

For more information, visit our website www.shipyard-vsh.com.

Name: Hudson Yacht Group - HH Catamarans
Description:
Founded in 2007, the Hudson Yacht Group has become a leader in the shipbuilding industry with an expertise in utilizing carbon fiber construction to conceive, design, engineer and produce a full range of sailing and power boats that deliver unparalleled performance and luxury. With in-house design and engineering departments, two state-of-the-art production facilities and a team of the industry's best professionals, the Hudson Yacht Group is expanding and looking for new members to join our award winning team.

HH Catamarans was formed in early 2012 and set about developing a new brand, something extraordinary. In the years since, "HH" has become the pinnacle of performance cruising catamarans with boats that blur the lines between pure racing performance and unrivaled cruising luxury. 

In 2018, HH unveiled the HH66 and was awarded "Overall Boat of the Year" by Sailing World Magazine and "Best Boat" by SAIL Magazine. The HH55 continued the trend in 2018, winning Cruising World Magazine’s "Boat of the Year" in the multihull category. The HH50 then won "Boat of the Year" again in 2021, and with three new yachts launching soon, expectations are high for this trend to continue.

The Hudson Yacht Group product line also covers a full spectrum of sea fairing vessels from IRC race boats, sporty trimarans and club racers, to luxury performance power catamarans suited to world cruising. Other brands include the Hudson Powercat, the XM80, HH42 and Airplay Trimarans.

The Hudson Yacht Group brings their clients dreams to fruition and then supports them after-sale with global support. Please visit our website to learn more and join us as we expand into new sectors of the shipbuilding industry.

Name: HERO LIFERAFT
Description:
HERO LIFE-SAVING EQUIPMENT is part of an European group, active in the shipping business for over 40 years and a worldwide respected production factory of inflatable liferafts. The group has branch offices in Belgium, France, Spain and Shanghai. Our company is specialized in the design, certification and manufacturing of equipment for the marine industry. The headquarter is based in Barcelona, where general services of strategy, design, engineering, approval and quality control are located.
In 2019, we decide to launch our own range of liferafts under the brand name ”HERO”. Liferafts are designed, developed and engineered in UE, according to European knowledge and technical expertise.All materials used, are studied and chosen because of their capacities offer the best protection possible under severe weather conditions, while creating the highest comfort inside the liferaft. Each model is designed according to well defined specifications and technically meeting the most stringent requirements. Our liferafts are M.M.F (Marine Marchande Française) approved by RINA classification office and Spanish approved (D.G.M.M).
Our production plant is ISO 9001 certified, and thus ensuring permanent quality control over production and materials used. An internal quality control process, consisting of more than 100 checkpoints, was developed to maintain the highest possible standards. From our suppliers, we demand permanent verification over their own supply chain in order to coop with the compliance of our requirements and guidelines. RINA, third party certification services, is mandated to certify and permanently control the entire production chain.
We believe that preserving our oceans is crucial for our future and that of our children. We are working hard to improve safety at sea with respect to our environment. We support organizations, associations, NGO and private initiatives on their programs to protect our oceans.

Shipyards Monsin & Andenne
Batia Mosa, a shipbuilding and repair facility with over 100 years of industry experience. Our shipyard specializes in constructing high-quality vessels, providing extensive modification services, and delivering efficient repairs to ensure optimal vessel performance.

ECO-Solutions:
Proper aftertreatment installation and service, along with regular DPF cleaning, is essential for vessels to meet emission regulations and operate at peak efficiency. With the increasing focus on environmental sustainability, ship owners and operators must ensure that their vessels are equipped with reliable and efficient aftertreatment systems, such as diesel particulate filters (DPF) and Selective catalytic reduction (SCR), to reduce harmful emissions. Regular maintenance and cleaning of these systems are also crucial to prevent costly downtime and ensure compliance with environmental regulations.

Energy 2050:
Batia Mosa Energy 2050, a leading provider of cutting-edge decarbonization technology for inland waterway transportation. Our mission is to help our clients reduce their carbon emissions and transition to a more sustainable and environmentally-friendly mode of transportation.
As a company, we are committed to innovation, sustainability, and excellence. Our team of experts is dedicated to designing and producing innovative decarbonization solutions that are specifically tailored to meet the needs of the inland waterway transportation industry.
Our technology is fully aligned with the goals of the Green Deal goals for 2035 and 2050, ensuring that our clients meet all regulatory requirements and contribute to a more sustainable future. We are proud to be at the forefront of the decarbonization movement and to help our clients stay ahead of the competition in this rapidly evolving industry.

Our solution is used by the Classification Societies: Lloyd's Register, CCS, Korean Register, Türk Loydu, USCG. 100+ World marine and industry leaders trust ShaftDesigner for many years: Wärtsilä, MAN, SKF, Samsung Heavy Industries, General Dynamics Nassco, BAE Systems, Thales Australia, Schottel, Grundfos, ZF, Centa, Thordon, Brunvoll, Berg Propulsion and many more. 

IMT has 30 years of experience in marine engineering. Strong scientific background including professors and PhDs. 50+ scientific articles and studies were published.

Our experienced engineering team is capable of providing the excellent calculation and consulting service in shaft design, shaft alignment, torsional, whirling and axial vibration. We provide onsite and online trainings.

Our services:
• All kind of ship theory calculations
• Marine propulsion shafting design
• Shaft alignment design

• Online shaft alignment consulting
• Hull deflections calculation
• CFD analysis of propeller hydrodynamic loads
• Bracket bearing stiffness calculation
• Torsional, whirling, axial vibration analysis

Name: K-SHIPS S.R.L.
Description:
Although established in 2005, our history predates 1930 with our founder, Matteo Garrè. Who had experience in the shipyarding field, which to this day remains vital to our business identity. He then became a “ship owner” in the 60s with his first ship named, “KARACHI”. Seeing that it turned out to be very profitable and quite lucky, this vessel later inspired our tradition to name all our ships with the letter ‘K’ — foreseeing our company’s name, K-Ships.

In 2005, Matteo Garrè’s son, Ferdinando Garrè, and Engineer Francesco Russo met to discuss an ambitious partnership. An “in-house” ship management company, dedicated exclusively to operating a fleet of Oil and Chemical Tankers. Karina, Kachemire, and Ianuk were the first 3 vessels we managed. Since then K-Ships has managed several ships, our current 4 being Greta K, Nike, Aethalia, and Korsaro, and have expanded towards dry cargo ships.

A final Key component that makes K-Ships stand out is our naval architectural background, which was brought to us by our Co-Founder and now CEO, Engineer Francesco Russo. Who consequently played an important role in combining our two offices. While the Genova office, the company's headquarters, focuses on the commercial side of things, our office in Messina Strait specializes in naval engineering and design. This dynamic has significantly fortified and expanded our technical management department, providing us with the capability to deliver different and more niche services to our vessels as well as the market.

Name: DOMANI YACHTS
Description:
A few years ago, DOMANI was founded after building a prototype in a small yard in Antwerp, a city with a long and proud maritime history. After spending many hours drawing and shaping, the first yacht was created, named S28. With her new shape & look, the S28 turned out to be a head turner. Together with Dutch naval architect Peter Bosgraaf and Flemish designer Jonathan Anthierens, a 3D model was designed and moulds were made of what would become the new DOMANI S30 Sportyacht.

DOMANI Yachts introduced the new S30 Sportyacht at the Duesseldorf Boat Show in January 2018 and she was well appreciated by the many visitors and the international nautical press. Nominated for ‘HISWA boat of the Year’ and as a reward to all the hard work, the S30 was nominated for the prestigious ‘European Yacht of the Year Award’, exceptional and an honor for a new brand. The EYOTY Award is the most important and influential boat builder prize worldwide; often referred to as the ‘Oscar’ of sailing. In October 2018, in Port Ginesta in Spain, the DOMANI S30 was extensively tested by a jury of respected professional journalists. The S30 was driven to the limit and performed extremely well in winds up to 25 knots; seaworthiness proven.

Soon after, DOMANI introduced the S32 Lounge. From the twin steering position the DOMANI S32 Lounge remains true to its DOMANI spirit of combining sportiness, performance and elegant design. The lower super structure leads to an even more roadster kind of appearance. The S32 Lounge offers the best focus on leisure of any daysailer and the helmsman’s interaction with the guests is guaranteed.

Experiencing a DOMANI daysailor feels like writing your own story. Skillfully built and personally selected, every S30 Sportyacht, S30 Club or S32 Lounge is made to order, reflecting her owners’ personality.

As an ISO 9001:2015 certified organization with a Financial Rating of IAR iSME 2 (High Credit Worthiness), we are proud to uphold the highest standards of service and reliability. 

Our registrations with MSME and NSIC further validates our company’s stability and credibility.

At M/s Patel Engineering Works, we are dedicated to delivering outstanding results and forging lasting partnerships in the maritime sector. Join us as we navigate towards a future of in shipbuilding and repairs in India.

That's why we offer the best electrically driven thrusters for your situation.

Deep within our company’s core pulsates a firm commitment to excellence and sustainability—a living, breathing force that goes beyond more dedication. Name: Island Packet Yachts
Description:
Island Packet Yachts have long been known for their excellence and value. Island Packet began in 1979 with the vision of Naval Architect, Bob Johnson. He started off modestly, building a 27-footer, but he had big dreams. He built the company into an industry powerhouse, focused on superior quality and safety, as well as comfort and livability. The exclusive Full Foil Keel he developed has provided a benchmark of stability, seaworthiness, and performance.

 Under new ownership since January 2017,  the vision for the future is in full swing with the introduction of new Island Packet Yachts 349 and 439 Models. “Our goal is to provide innovation and customization that has never before been available at Island Packet” said Darrell Allen. That drive towards modernization has lead to the Island Packet Yachts 349 being named Cruising World’s 2019 Domestic Boat of the Year. The revolution has continued, with our 439 model winning Cruising World’s 2021 Best Full Size Cruiser of the Year.

We are no longer a production boat company. Our goal is not to build our boats to a price point, instead, we build the best boat possible at a great value. We do not build hundreds of boats each year. Our team of master craftsmen treats each yacht as a custom piece of art. As a result, the market is not flooded with used models, and Island Packet Yachts’ retains their value in a manner unrivaled by other brands. When you start with the highest quality components, those components wear well over time, and our owners are known for meticulous and diligent care of their boats.

Please visit us at www.IPY.com for more information!

We possess the specialist knowledge and experience required to serve as a valuable marine partner at every stage of a ship design and marine engineering project – from planning and design through to the launch of the vessel.

Our expertise covers the full life cycle of the vessel: From the very first lines on paper in the design phase to construction, maintenance, repair, and of course conversions that extend the operational life of the ship. In addition, our services include documentation, authority drawings, safety regulations as well as various approvals under existing laws.

With valuable, hands-on shipbuilding experience our team of highly qualified employees is capable of handling all types of conversion projects and rebuildings regardless of the scale and scope of the job - from small conversions to large turnkey projects.

ShipCon also conducts ship inspections, surveys, and various measurements on behalf of e.g. shipowners, potential buyers/charterers, financial institutions, and insurance companies.

Name: Breakingwave Services
Description:
Breakingwave Services is providing engineering services in marine engineering and naval architecture with a strong focus on:
-	Naval Architecture: Stability, Inclining test, Surveys,  hull shape, propulsion, lightweight.…
-	Vessel stability, intact and damage (including probabilistic) with Napa
-	Structural Engineering: Finite element analysis, Ultimate Limit State, Accidental Limit State, Fatigue Limit State
-	Hydrodynamics: seakeeping (accelerations and motions), wave loads, towing operations
-	Mooring and anchoring: Mooring system proposal, Mooring calculations
 
We are 5 engineers and we have two draftmen working for us part time.

We are performing our calculations and analysis using the following software we have in house:
-	HYDROSTAR, from the BUREAU VERITAS: Seakeeping (RAO’s, drift forces…), hydrodynamics, wave loads
-	NAPA: Hull form and stability
-	VERISTAR STABILITY, from the BUREAU VERITAS: Stability
-	VERISTAR HULL(powered by FEMAP & NASTRAN), RDM 6 and MARS for structural calculations
-	ARIANE, from the BUREAU VERITAS: Mooring and berthing analysis
-	ORCAFLEX: Vessel and mooring line dynamics, marine operations, seakeeping
-	RHINO/ORCA3D: 3D CAD
-	AUTOCAD: 2D CAD

Name: Madera Ribs
Description:
MADERA RIBS are virtually indestructible high-speed boats, built in Holland and made for professionals. All over the world our RIBs exceed customer expectations and have proven to be the best solution for heavy-duty jobs.

Our semicustom RIBs are all built from standard sized hulls, which vary between 8 and 15 meters. These hulls are all PROVEN DESIGNS, which will assure the high performance for every RIB we deliver. The outfitting of each hull is tailor-made and matched with the wants and needs of any customer. You choose it, we build it!

From day one MADERA RIBS has been specialized in building extra long RIBs, reaching up to 15 meters. All built for HEAVY DUTY purposes, specifically designed for military missions and HIGH SPEED rescue operations in the roughest environments.  Our Madera MR-1250 with 4x 300 HP is POWERFUL and fast. But still, even for a rookie pilot it’s EASY TO HANDLE. You don’t have to be an expert to steer a Madera, but an optional training package is never an additional luxury.

A big difference is the higher freeboard; this makes you feel IN and not ON the RIB. This is resulting in a HIGHER PAYLOAD, SAVETY and MANOUVRABILITY, especially in extreme conditions
 
MADERA RIBS means LOW MAINTENANCE and always easy to service and repair. In the last decade MADERA RIBS has delivered hundreds of RIBs, all of them fully tried-and-tested and constructed differently then other conventional RIB. Only the best materials and parts are used and virtually all MADERA RIBS built, are still operations today. That’s why MADERA RIBS are often called VIRTUALLY INDESTRUCTIBLE and always ready for the job.

We attach great importance to NEW CONCEPTS, like the Fast Container Carrier, and NEW SYSTEMS, like the newly developed ballistic protection system that will change your RIB into tank on the water. Within seconds it ensures you and your team a safe passage, even under hostile fire. We focus on INNOVATIONS and build you a RIB that's ready for the future!

Name: Cargomarine Corporation
Description:
CARGOMARINE CORPORATION's roots can be traced back to the beginnings of REYES & LIM COMPANY, INC. (RLC). RLC is a Philippine corporation founded in 1960 by Jose M. Reyes and Bienvenido L. Lim who graduated from the United States Merchant Marine Academy at Kings Point, New York. The Company started as ship operators, managers, ship building consultants, shipbrokers and ship agents for over 50 years. The early years were devoted to naval architecture, marine engineering and ocean transport system economies. Its business activity ranged from owning LPG and LAG tankers to management of ocean vessels such as, cape-size bulk carriers in the Philippines.
The first ship owned by RLC was the American built dry cargo steamer Timber Coast acquired in 1967. In 1968, RLC commissioned the clean product tanker Alkene chartered to MOBIL trading U.S. Pacific Trust Territories. This was followed by the new building LPG Tanker Alkene designed and built by RLC on coa to ESSO. The vessel hereafter served MOBIL, CALTEX & PETRON.

In 1975, RLC established its fully-owned subsidiary, CARGOMARINE CORPORATION, as owner of LPG carriers fully managed by RLC. CARGOMARINE acquired initially the LPG tankers Alkene, Butane and Banak followed by the LPG carrier Biya which started on a coa to Petron in 1990. The LPG carrier Bisugo started a period charter to SHELL in 1994. In 1999, the company launched its 3,500 cbm new-building, the LPG carrier Bangos that started a period charter to SHELL on the same year. The LPG Carrier Bisugo together with LPG tankers Bacalaw and Banak were re-chartered to PETRON since 2004 and 2006. 

Under a new ownership and management control in November 2008 represented by Mr. Oscar B. Saavedra, CARGOMARINE CORPORATION assumed the full ship owning and ship management from RLC. The Bisugo, Bacalaw and Banak were continuously chartered by PETRON until they were eventually sold to SMCSL in 2006. 

In February 2012 & May 2012, Cargomarine Corp. took over the management of Phil National Lines Inc. (PNL) owned oil tankers Phil Cebu, Phil Mindanao, Phil Visayas, Phil Bacolod & M/T Bariles and Tugs Phil Bataan, Phil Laguna, Phil Bohol, Phil Leyte, Phil Samar. Later, additional vessels, tugs, cranes barges own by affiliate PNL and Fastguys Logistics Corp. (FLC) were included in the management, namely M/T Modesto, D/V Tamban, D/B Kanduli, C/B Buaya, C/B Pating, C/B Barracuda, M/T FS2, M/T Espada, M/T Balyena and others. 

CMC was issued a Document of Compliance (ISM) by the Maritime Industry Authority in compliance with MARINA MC 143 IMO's International Safety Management Code. The Company has been certified ISO 9001:2008 by SGS in June 2015 and transition to ISO 9001:2015 by SGS in February 2018.

Neptunus Shipbuilders & Recyclers stands as a leader in India’s ship recycling and maritime innovation sector, delivering sustainable, safe, and efficient solutions. The company specializes in eco-friendly ship dismantling, steel rerolling, and coastal shipbuilding, creating value across the maritime supply chain. Leveraging India’s vast 7,500-kilometer coastline, Neptunus benefits from strategic access to global shipping routes, enhancing its operational efficiency and competitiveness.

With a steadfast commitment to sustainability, Neptunus adheres to stringent European Union standards for environmentally responsible recycling practices. By meeting these rigorous standards, the company ensures its operations safeguard ecosystems while promoting the circular economy through the responsible reuse of ship materials. Strategically located near key maritime hubs, Neptunus optimizes logistics and strengthens India’s position in the global maritime sector.

With a steadfast focus on sustainability, Neptunus combines technological innovation, safety-first operations, and environmental sustainability to drive innovation and foster economic development. The company generates employment, boosts regional industries, and develops skilled workers in India’s key maritime regions, contributing significantly to local economies. These initiatives underscore Neptunus’ role in advancing industrial growth while maintaining sustainable operations.

Through its Triple Bottom Line (TBL) approach, Neptunus integrates economic, environmental, and social priorities. It drives economic growth by creating jobs and supporting industries, ensures environmental sustainability by adhering to EU recycling standards, and invests in training, safety, and community welfare. By setting a benchmark for sustainable practices, Neptunus exemplifies the transformative potential of India’s maritime sector.

Laser scanning as a tool is used in a wide range of industries starting from Oil and gas to medical and heritage. 3D Verifier AS is a Laser scanning, As built Modeling, 3D Visualization and 3D services company aimed at providing innovative and progressive solutions to our clients. Applications:
Building Information Modeling or BIM
As built 3D Model
Point cloud
As built verification, Scan to model analyses
Coordinate measurement for DPS and sensitive equipment

Case Studies: Few of our previous projects include
1.) Norshore Atlantic- Laser scanning and 3D modeling, QA/QC reports and Creating Virtual model of the complex ship shaped drilling vessel. Location : Indonesia
2.) Nordnorsk Museum- Laser Scanning, delivering hull cross section lines and mesh model of heritage boats. Location: Norway
3.) Catamaran: Scanning, as built modeling and hull cross section lines of a catamaran. Location: Russia

Apart from these 3D Verifier has been involved in other projects which included delivering panoramic images, virtual tours and other engineering solutions.

3D Verifier believes in not only staying with the trend but ahead of it. Apart from laser scanning, our areas of interest includes 3D Visualization, 360 Panorama and panoramic virtual tours, Virtual reality and Augmented reality.

Name: Shipyard De Hoop
Description:
Shipyard De Hoop is a Dutch shipbuilder with a rich history dating back to the late 19th century. The shipyard is located in Tolkamer, near Lobith, and is known for constructing high-quality vessels for inland shipping, seafaring, offshore, and passenger transport. Over the years, De Hoop has distinguished itself by combining traditional craftsmanship with modern technology and innovative designs. The shipyard has had multiple locations and international collaborations and has earned a worldwide reputation for custom-built ships for renowned shipping companies. To this day, the shipyard in Tolkamer remains active with a broader range of projects, including the construction of aluminum yachts, rebuilding damaged ships, and refit projects for all kind of vessels. In cooperation with various partners, both new builds and renovation works are carried out for national and international clients.

For more information: https://nl.wikipedia.org/wiki/Scheepswerf_De_Hoop
