Name: Fipol Marine
Description:
Fipol has decided to take a leading role in marine industry with one major goal; create standards. Since the end of 2007, as Fipol marine department we’ve been giving our all knowledge of GRP, all know-how in latest production methods and all energy, to manufacture the ideal motor boat range for those who dreams a new taste of life style. After a very well organized and effective market research progress, regarding to respond the most important question in boat building business which is of course - what to build ?; we as Fipol Marine has reached a decision to start our production with a boat that’s believed to be a dazzling model of her kind, a Downeast Cruiser.
Downeast Cruiser boats, in general, are sea-kindly and safe in all kinds of weather. Stability is inherent in a design that includes a skeg to protect the underbody, propeller, steering gear, and drive train. It's simply a very comfortable ride. When fishermen began switching from sail to power, the Downeast hull configuration evolved from a true displacement hull to a longer, wider, semi-displacement hull. Downeast Cruiser style boats have been produced by a limited number of boat builders for nearly more than a century, by using various building methods but with may be the only common feeling, passion for sea. 
LARUS is the line name of our project. Because of the location of our factory site, the sun shine city Antalya, and of course the magnificent nature around this beautiful city, we had our inspiration from this region. Mediterranean Sea Gull is a one of the unique seabirds of the region and belong the family of gulls which means LARUS in Latin Language.

BUILD - San Marine specializes in the construction of Customized Marine Fleets meticulously designed to meet and exceed the stringent requirements of the Clients, Class and the Indian Flag. OWN & OPERATE - What sets San Marine apart is not just the construction of its own fleet but also maintaining ownership and operation of these fleet in the Indian Waters. TRADE - Our comprehensive fleet finds diverse applications, benefiting Exploration & Production Companies, Port Construction Companies, Seismic Survey Companies, Dredging Companies, Foreign Navies, Drilling Rig Companies, and both Indian and International Shipping Companies.

- Oil & Gas Exploration
- Construction & Production Industry

Gepatenteerde systemen: innovatieve vloersystemen die wereldwijd hun waarde bewijzen.
Maatwerk in aluminium en RVS: van trappen en masten tot liferafts en wingstations.
Flexibiliteit: wij bewegen mee met de werf en leveren wat nodig is.
Betrouwbaarheid: korte lijnen, duidelijke afspraken en topkwaliteit.

Onze missie is helder: continu doorgroeien, ons vakmanschap borgen en jonge talenten aan ons team verbinden. Samen zorgen we ervoor dat luxe jachten niet alleen technisch perfect functioneren, maar ook tot in detail de finishing touch krijgen die ze verdienen.

Problem Solvers: Challenges are inevitable in any project, but we thrive on finding solutions. Our team is adept at troubleshooting issues, mitigating risks, and keeping projects moving forward, even in the face of adversity.
Timely Intervention: We understand that time is of the essence in shipyard projects. Whether your project is off track, behind schedule, or over budget, we're the ones you can count on to intervene swiftly and effectively.

Project Oversight: From inception to completion, we provide comprehensive project oversight to ensure that all aspects of the project are executed seamlessly.

Name: Selinat, Lda
Description:
A SELINAT é uma empresa portuguesa com sede em Setúbal no estaleiro da LISNAVE, as suas principais atividades são a manutenção e reparação naval. Contamos com os melhores técnicos nas principais áreas de atuação:

- Eletricidade; 
- Instrumentação
- Manutenção e bobinagem de motores elétricos
- Serralharia
- Mecânica, nomeadamente manobras de motores elétricos, thrusters e azimutes.

A nossa missão:
Prestar Serviços de Qualidade, dentro dos prazos estabelecidos de forma eficaz e em ligação direta com o cliente.

A SELINAT conta com técnicos especializados com uma vasta experiência nas suas áreas de intervenção, uma equipa coesa e com elevada capacidade de resposta aos desafios colocados.

O nosso principal cliente é a LISNAVE, onde temos um posicionamento estratégico de proximidade, no entanto a nossa equipa presta serviços em qualquer porto do país ao nível da reparação naval e infraestruturas.

A nossa História

A empresa foi criada em janeiro de 2007, com a finalidade de prestar serviços na área da reparação e construção naval em parceria com a Lisnave. 
Os trabalhadores da Selinat são, na sua maioria, oriundos da ENI (Eletricidade Naval e Industrial), a qual foi durante os anos 70, 80 e 90 a maior prestadora de serviços nas áreas de Eletrónica, Instrumentação e Eletricidade Naval e Industrial do país.

Name: X-Yachts Deutschland
Description:
Willkommen bei X-Yachts Deutschland.

Christoph Barth ist ein erfahrener Fahrten- und Regattasegler und seit 1997 für den Vertrieb von X-Yachts in Deutschland verantwortlich. Mit über 25 Jahren Erfahrung steht er für fundierte dänisch-deutsche X-Yachts Expertise sowie persönliche Beratung auf höchstem Niveau. Vom Standort Flensburg / Marina Sonwik aus begleitet er Kundinnen und Kunden kompetent beim Kauf neuer wie auch gebrauchter X-Yachten und bietet darüber hinaus ein umfassendes Serviceangebot für X-Yachts Eigner.

Seit 2017 arbeitet auch sein Sohn Nicolas Barth im Unternehmen. Nicolas ist seit seiner Kindheit auf dem Wasser zu Hause und seit 2017 Teil von X-Yachts Deutschland. Als aktiver Regattasegler einer X-79 seit seinem 14. Lebensjahr verbindet er fundierte praktische Segelerfahrung mit großer Leidenschaft für die Marke X-Yachts.

X-Yachts entwickelt Yachten in den Linien X Cruising, X Racing und Pure X Range – konzipiert für leistungs- ebenso wie komfortorientierte Segler. Zeitgemäßes Design, hochwertige Materialien und moderne Technologie bilden dabei die Grundlage. Besonderen Wert legen wir auf Sicherheit, Qualität und einfache Handhabung, um ein ausgewogenes und genussvolles Segelerlebnis zu gewährleisten.
Persönliche, vertrauensvolle und kompetente Beratung ist für uns selbstverständlich. 

Besuchen Sie uns gern in unserem Büro an der Flensburger Förde in der Marina Sonwik und lernen Sie X-Yachts aus erster Hand kennen.

Name: Shaky Isles Coffee
Description:
In the beginning of 2008, New Zealand wasn’t as we know it now. 

Well caffeinated yes, but maybe not from coffee company’s that reflected the path New Zealand was on in making exceptional coffee for the world.  Flat whites. Flat, and white – we are nothing if not literal. North Island. South Island. Bless.
By the end of 2008 it had Shaky Isles. More than literal.

Shaky Isles is about making coffee with the same kind of unhinged focus New Zealander’s have for rugby, so we can enjoy it with the same kind of aloof concern we have for things like ballroom dancing or National Dog shows.

It’s our roasting technology that produces smooth and consistent coffee blends – giving us strength and robustness, and most importantly, flavour profiles that do not get roasted away. The impossibility of having both strength and complexity is what defines Shaky Isles Coffee. Duality. Having your cake and eating it too. Both sides of the coin. Bird in the hand and two in the bush. Wolf in wolf’s clothing. 

STOCKISTS

Our roastery is in Auckland, but because we know if you don’t live in Auckland you probably hate it, we’ve made Shaky Isles coffee disponible(s) in 200gm bags in your favourite supermarkets all over New Zealand. So Yay, no more shit supermarket coffee!
At your local supermarket (or ask nicely if not available and they will get it in for you):
Countdown
New World
Fresh Choice
Super Value
Four Square 

And keep your eye out all over the motu for Shaky Isles coffee served at cafes, restaurants and bars with impeccable judgement on mostly everything, but especially coffee.

Shaky Isles 
We're a little land always showing the world we’re made of something bigger. We’re down-to-earth intellectuals, unfashionably stylish, chilled and fizzing at the bung.
We’re brewed different.
You are too.

Impressum: https://nvl.de/de/impressum
Datenschutz: https://nvl.de/de/datenschutz


Founded in 1947, Neue Jadewerft is located in the deep-water and tide-free harbour of Wilhelmshaven with some of the shortest routes from the main trade lanes in the North Sea to the shipyard. As part of NVL, our shipyard specialises in repairs, refit, overhaul and maintenance of large naval vessels up to 160 metres in length. We also provide comprehensive services for civil ships such as tankers, tugs and passenger ships. With our qualified and experienced team of shipbuilders, we stand for high quality at fair prices, flexibility and 24/7 service geared fully towards our customers.

Name: Elektro - Plus
Description:
General Information

Elektro-Plus is a ship service company in marine industry: including offshore, oil and gas, wind support ships.

The spectrum of our activities includes working on fishing boats, military vessels, tankers and others. In our business history we have encountered many different challenges in the field of removing electrical equipment failures, modernization or renewal ship electrical subsystems.

We build, overhaul, or refit ships.

Thanks to our work experience in ship repairs and maintenance we had the required specialists to enter the area of shipbuilding. Most of projects included rebuild of ship from another class to an multipurpose offshore vessel, which now serve on North Sea.  Sometimes the task was bigger, we have build completely new units. From empty hull to fully functional ships.

We work not only for ships.

Our customers are not only from marine industry. Sometimes we cooperate with other companies at shore. Together with Aggreko we worked at G7 summit in Germany, we aid them in installation of windfarms in the Pomeranian district, Poland.

Our new workshop is equipped with highly specialised diagnostic stations for inspection, repair and recertification of electrical machinery and equipment. Work is always performed with accordance to the requirements of classification society.

We also have design office – our constructors can design electrical subsystems for ships, including main switchboards, distribution boards, automation, control and monitoring systems. We also carry out all the required calculations for vessels – power demand, energy balances, etc.

Description:
ENPLO is a boutique marine consulting firm combining Naval Architects, Marine Lawyers, and Cyber Security Experts to deliver Compliance. Security. Assurance. We help builders, operators, defence teams, and offshore contractors move faster with audit-ready deliverables that regulators and boards accept.

What we do

Naval Architecture (≤24 m): RIBs, workboats, police craft; Workboat Code & Police Code; stability & structural analysis; owner’s manuals.

CE Inspection & Consultancy: CE/RCD conformity (Modules A1, B, G), technical files, inspections, notified-body liaison.

NATO / STANAG Compliance: STANAG 1297/4569 (ballistic), 4370 (AECTP env., shock, vibration, salt-fog), 4549 (naval shock), 1449 (survival equipment), 1106/4154 (interoperable comms/electrical).

Marine Civils & Offshore: transportation & stability analysis, towing arrangements, mooring, T&I engineering, method statements.

Marine Cybersecurity & Compliance: ship & yacht cyber audits, offshore cyber resilience, UR E26/E27 compliance, IMO cyber risk management.

Naval Architecture & Design: concept → detail design, 3D CAD, weight & stability packages, class & flag submissions.

Where we work
Based in the UK and Emirates. Serving clients globally.

Get in touch
Book a discovery call or request a scoped plan within 48 hours.

Description:
Inoferro uses Dutch craftsmanship to design, build, produce and install a wide range of stainless steel ship components of absolute top quality. If it can be made from stainless steel, from the most attractive interior to huge exterior constructions , Inoferro offers the solution. We will seize any opportunity to lift the stainless steel fixtures and fittings on your yacht to the highest possible level.

Every project differs and requires another approach. This is why Inoferro choose to be flexible and think and act along with the customer’s wishes. You don’t have a fully engineered drawing? No problem. A sketch, photo or example might be enough for us to help you out. Instead of seeing it as a problem we see this as a challenge.

And it makes it possible for us to maybe help you in the right direction. Together we have the same goal: delivering a perfect custom made product.
The superyacht and shipbuilding industry is full of deadlines, goals and targets. That’s why it’s so important to have reliable suppliers. Inoferro is one of those suppliers.
We thank our success to our vision. We do believe in high reliability in combination with high quality. Our wide-ranging workshop and machinery gives us the tools to construct and finish every product within our own workspace. This is making us independent of other companies which gives a positive effect on the processing and delivery time. Inoferro’s workshop even has a DNV GL shop-approval which gives us the opportunity to deliver products with 3.2 certificates which is necessary for off-shore and submersible products.

Description:

Our flagship vessel, the KIAN-1, propelled by a Jet Propulsion System achieved an impressive speed of 38 knots and can accommodate up to 25 passengers. Since then, KIAN  have established themselves as a go-to choice for specialized applications where speed, displacement, and load capacity are of paramount importance.

Description:

Our brands; Yanmar Marine Engines, Rehlko (Kohler) Marine Generators, Opacmare, Sleipner, ABT Trac, Harken, Spinlock, Castoldi, Veco Climma, Glendinning, Centek, Dintra, Max Prop, R&D Marine, Velvet Drive, Harken Industrial, S-storm.

Denpar Makina was founded in 1995 by four partners joining their experiences in boatbuilding and technical expertise. Since day one its "customer-first" approach to doing business combined with its resolute and serious attitude has gained it a trustworthy reputation in the industry. In every business Denpar's number one priority is customer satisfaction. The company's outlook to customer relations comprises addressing their needs and requests in a reliable and timely manner. Hence our customers' positive opinion of our product and service quality constitutes our greatest asset.

Consisting of YANMAR diesel engines and KOHLER diesel generators in the beginning, our product line has expanded in harmony with the evolving requirements of the yacht building industry. Today, various product lines such as stabilizers, water jets, air conditioning units, sail winches, pasarellas and doors, freshwater makers, underwater lights, custom propellers and advanced vessel monitoring systems take their place in our catalogue.

Denpar's perpetual self-improvement philosophy has benefited all of its team members. Since 1995, both through personnel trainings and service seminars, the company has always sought to make progress to better serve its customers. Our service team has stayed up-to-date with the certification and qualifications necessary to maintain and diagnose today's ever-advancing technologies. 

Denpar acknowledges this "customer-first" approach as a fundamental part of its business model and is determined to continue its operations as such. Remember; sailing is no joke... And we take our business seriously.

Name: Huckins Yacht
Description:
Huckins Yacht Corporation is an 85-year-old custom yacht-building company based in Jacksonville, Florida. It’s recognized as one of the oldest continuously family-owned boat builders in the United States.  Cindy Purcell, granddaughter of Huckins founder Frank Pembroke Huckins, operates the company.  

Huckins lives by its mission – “One at a time. One of a kind.” – and uses this philosophy to guide the design and construction of its custom motor yachts. 

You can see it in every Huckins on the water today. The world-class design and craftsmanship. The innumerable opportunities for individual expression. The classic lines, belying a level of performance attainable only with ultra-modern materials and engineering. This is what goes into our yachts. This is what should go into yours.

Name: Ship Install
Description:
Montage, reparatie en onderhoud aan uw jacht
Al 19 jaar verzorgt Ship Install de bouw en afbouw van plezierjachten en beroepsvaartuigen. Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in het complete onderhoud van vaartuigen en bieden onze klanten graag een uitstekende storingsdienst. Ook verzorgen wij refits. Van airco tot centrale verwarming, van GPS tot sanitaire voorzieningen en van navigatie tot satelliettelefonie: Ship Install verzorgt het graag voor u!

Service en kwaliteit met maritieme A-merken
Onze medewerkers zijn goed opgeleid en helpen u graag met een snelle en secure installatie. Wij verzorgen het onderhoud van uw jacht, in Heusden of bij u op locatie. Bovendien bieden wij u graag onze uitstekende service door heel Europa! Wij zijn gecertificeerd dealer van een groot aantal maritieme A merken: Webasto, Raymarine, Mastervolt, FirePro, Whisperpower, Cruisair, Simrad, B&G, Flir, Post Marine Heating en Garmin. Waar u ons ook voor inschakelt: wij rusten uw schip volledig uit, lossen het probleem voortvarend op en leveren vakwerk. 

Al uw systemen bij één partij
Wij ontzorgen u graag! Ship Install zorgt ervoor dat u uw jacht geheel bij één partij kunt laten onderhouden. Wij hebben brede kennis en onze ervaren medewerkers kunnen vrijwel alle denkbare werkzaamheden aan uw jacht uitvoeren. Op deze manier kunnen wij snel schakelen en leren wij u en uw jacht uitstekend kennen.

Bezoek onze website, of neem telefonisch of per mail contact met ons op voor de uiteenlopende mogelijkheden. Ook voor het maken van een vrijblijvende offerte staan wij uiteraard graag voor u klaar.

De eigenaar is ingenieur Sjouke Sipkema die bekend staat als een zeer ervaren schroefontwerper in diverse markten als megajachtbouw, snelvarende schepen maar ook markten als binnenvaart en visserij. Hij ontwierp de afgelopen 15 jaar meer dan 5.000 scheepsschroeven.

Voor Sip Marine heeft hij de nieuwste generatie schroefontwerp-programma ontwikkeld: SIPPROP. Met dit programma is het niet alleen mogelijk om schroeven te ontwerpen maar ook te analyseren en te optimaliseren in de conditie waarin de schroef onder het schip functioneert. Het resultaat van deze geoptimaliseerde schroeven bestaat uit geluidreducties van meer dan 10 dB. Vanaf zomer 2012 is het mogelijk om een werkende schroef mee te modelleren in een CFD-berekening. Hiermee wordt de vierde generatie schroef een feit.

Naast schroeven ontwikkelt Sip Marine ook zelf een totaal voortstuwingspakket in samenwerking met competitieve partners.

- Station de carburant automate 24/24
- Maintenance coque et moteur réalisé par notre Centre de Service MERCURY MARINE
- Zone de calage d’entretien et de lavage
- Magasin d’accastillage BIGSHIP
- Vente de bateaux neufs et d’occasion
- Location de bateaux
- Parking privé PMR, Douches et WC gratuit
- Espace convivialité avec boissons et zones d'ombrage
- Pontons flottants répartis sur + de 200 m de quai
Après 20 ans d'expérience, notre réflexion est axée sur un développement constant d'un pôle nautique de qualité, respectueux de l'environnement. La recherche constante de ce que peut attendre un plaisancier basée sur le sens comme garantie d’efficacité est le principal socle de notre démarche.
Notre philosophie : Pratiquer le bateau en toute liberté, sans contraintes, une promenade en mer improvisée, partir à l’aventure,
le plaisir de profiter de son bateau en toute simplicité.

Name: Cantiere Nautico Feltrinelli
Description:
Cantiere Nautico Feltrinelli è uno storico cantiere navale sul Lago di Garda; forte dei suoi oltre cent’anni di esperienza e tradizione, offre oggi ai suoi clienti un’ampia gamma di servizi: dalla vendita di imbarcazioni di lusso, ai servizi di boat charter, rimessaggio e di officina. 

Fa parte del cantiere anche il Nautic Resort San Carlo, un complesso cottage ed appartamenti immersi nel verde degli uliveti e affacciati sul lago. Progettato e realizzato nell’ottica dell'ecosostenibilità, il resort offre ai suoi ospiti ogni tipo di ogni comfort e comodità. 

Dal 2003, la passione per la velocità, l’adrenalina e il design, condivise con i colleghi austriaci del cantiere Frauscher, costruttori di Barche sportive di lusso, pongono le basi della solida collaborazione che da vent’anni ormai lega la due famiglie Feltrinelli e Frauscher.  Con Frauscher Italia il cantiere diventa importatore esclusivo della gamma Frauscher in Italia.

La storia del cantiere risale al 1919 quando, dopo secoli di tradizione di costruzioni nautiche, sotto la guida di Egidio Feltrinelli viene fondato il “Cantiere Nautico Feltrinelli” che diventa rapidamente un riferimento per il settore.

Gli scafi Feltrinelli iniziano a partecipare alle diverse competizioni motonautiche dell’epoca insieme a nomi come Riva, Baglietto, Poncelet, Mostes, Laros, Jonhson, Vidoli, Timossi, Picchiotti, Savoia Marchetti…

Intorno al 1930 il poeta D’Annunzio si affida al cantiere per fare restaurare la sua MAS 96, oggi visibile nel Vittoriale degli Italiani a Gardone Riviera e gli commissiona motoscafi da competizione che affida al suo luogotenente Cav. Edmondo Turci.

 Alla fine della Seconda Guerra Mondiale la produzione prosegue però in modo limitato solo su ordinazione fino al 1965 quando uno dei figli di Dino, decide di interrompere la produzione di scafi. L’avvento della vetroresina e il comodo accesso al lago suggeriscono a Fausto di dedicarsi alla manutenzione ed al commercio delle unità da diporto.

Name: Propulsion Engineering
Description:
Propulsion Engineering provides advice and expertise for naval propulsion, headed by two engineers, recognized experts in naval propulsion in Naval Group (ex DCNS) and the French Navy, with a 25 years long experience and a large competence network which allows us to meet the expectations of our customers.

The field of work is dedicated to thermal engines and associated components (gearboxes, shaft bearings, propellers…) for naval propulsion (yachting, merchant ships, ferries…) and also power generators for marine or industrial (power plant, nuclear plant, train, etc.) applications with services ranging:

- One-off expertise: borescope inspection, vibration analysis, exhaust gas analysis for an attractive price

- Technical Experts as specialist advisors for litigation

- On-line monitoring system thanks to our revolutionary real-time diagnostic tools which are guarantees of significant costs benefits for reliability, efficiency, consumption and gas emissions. As a real innovation, using speed sensors, our Vibox puts into practice the science of acyclisms for the benefit of the health diagnosis of thermal engines and all rotating machines. Initially developed for Formula 1 engines, this technology offers to the maritime industry the way to navigate in all serenity, preserving the material and planning the interventions only necessary.

However, our Vibox is able to offer a vibration diagnosis using accelerometric sensors.
But because our reason for existing is innovation, our technology adds a real-time diagnosis of the vibratory state translated into mechanical health indicators.
No need to wait for the vibration analysis report to rule on the health of a rotating machine, thus reducing the tests necessary to deal with a technical fact.

Based in the Côte d'Azur, member of the Riviera Yachting Network and the Pôle Mer Méditerranée, we are working with the most famous actors of the maritime, yachting and energy industries.

We speak French, English and Italian.

Il prodotto entry-level è rappresentato da Luxi33, natante di 11 metri, un concentrato di tradizione, stile e tecnologia. “Luxi” in sardo significa “luce”, un nome scelto dal Cantiere per esaltare la luminosità della barca garantita dalle ampie vetrate laterali. La luce del sole diventa l’elemento primario: grazie ai pannelli fotovoltaici installati sull’hard top consente la ricarica dei banchi batterie utilizzati per la propulsione e le utenze di bordo.
Luxi33 nasce per soddisfare ogni desiderio dell’armatore, un gioiello artigianale custom made, completamente flessibile e adattabile nella struttura di bordo, nella motorizzazione e negli allestimenti interni.

Cantiere Savona ha grandi progetti, una linea intera di prodotto con a capo l’ammiraglia Luxi95, su cui verrà installata la rivoluzionaria tecnologia SYT (Solar Yacht Technology).

Name: DRAGADOS OFFSHORE DE MEXICO SA DE CV
Code Kilo
Description:
Code Kilo is a Joint Industrial Project which gathers all the most important shipbuilders in Europe. Code Kilo aims at developing new open standards and an innovative and flexible open connected platform implementing them. 

Currently, the maritime supplier market is over fragmented between the IoT providers, the platform solutions providers and the application enablers. Such industry fragmentation has led to system fragmentation, where every component has already been conceived with its own communication standard and protocol.  The absence of common standards for data transfer, therefore hinders the further development of a more competitive and effective industry, since it gives rise to  difficulties and costs for integrators and clients.

To overcome this situation, new standards are needed. Such standards will be conceived to enable the connection of vessels to an on shore (cloud) environment which will allow the maritime industry to collect, secure, buffer, transport and pre-process operational data coming from a vessel. The maritime sector will thus be able to promote an overall standardization of the IoT language and increase its competiveness and  efficiency through the cooperation among its players. 

Open standards will enable the exchangeability of applications and services and will contribute to define a single and therefore more cost effective solution. Openness and accessibility will promote a sustainable community of shipyards, vessel operators and suppliers with one shared goal. 

Code Kilo is promoted by EuroYards and its members and will last 12 months.

From the infinite precision used in working the aged mahogany, to the highly complex construction of the hull, the varnishing, upholstering and application of fine inlays, each process involves the meticulous handiwork of highly skilled craftspeople. As a result, when it finally leaves the yard, each boat is the product of up to 5,500 hours – about nine months – of work. The result takes the form of ageless and precious rarities.

SERVICE COMPETENCE IS JUST HALF THE STORY. THE OTHER HALF IS LOVE.
No one knows better the care that a boat needs than the specialists who have expended time and quality-focused construction skills to create it. So it makes sense, whatever happens, to entrust a Pedrazzini boat to Pedrazzini. In Bäch on Lake Zurich, it will undergo comprehensive, expert and above all caring service to do justice to its timeless beauty. Storage on hard standing is available on request. And of course, Pedrazzini will also take care of appropriate transport.

Our first models are the SunSailer 7.0 solar boats. These are specially developed to operate in protected waters with high natural value.

These 7 m long boats are designed with a fiber glass displacement hull with a behaviour similar to a sailboat and are equipped with solar panels, batteries and electric motors that allow a maximum autonomy (unlimited in the sun, up to 8 hours without sun) and move at 5-knot cruise speed without a single drop or fuel. Designed to be harmonious and have the least possible impact on ecosystems without disturbing the river or bed and margins or the birds. Perfect for sheltered waters such as estuaries, deltas, rivers, lakes, lakes, dams and canals.

Optimized to be affordable to public and private entities. Very adaptable, it can be used for tourism and leisure as well as for transport, taxi, environmental monitoring and patrolling in sensitive areas. Very silent, takes up to 12 passengers with the highest safety and convenience.

Name: Merma Marine
Description:
Unveiling Merma Marine

At Merma Marine, we don't just build boats; we craft maritime experiences. With a founder boasting 17 years of dedicated boat building experience, and the last decade specializing in serial composite boat production using advanced vacuum infusion techniques, we are a beacon of innovation on the open waters.

Navigating the Future

In July 2023, we set sail on a new venture, focusing exclusively on serial composite yacht construction. Our flagship project, Merma -ID113, is the embodiment of our commitment to excellence. With two more captivating projects in the works, we're reshaping the landscape of yacht design and manufacturing.

Pioneering Composite Expertise

Beyond yacht building, we're at the forefront of composite manufacturing. Our skilled team produces top-tier composite parts using a blend of e-glass, carbon fiber, epoxy, and vinyl ester resin. Merma Marine is also the trusted partner for other companies and projects, delivering bespoke composite solutions that stand up to the rigors of the sea.

Your Composite Journey Starts Here

At Merma Marine, we go beyond the build. We're your comprehensive partner, offering technical consultancy services for composite production. Whether you're a seasoned industry player or a newcomer, we guide you through the intricacies of materials and processes, ensuring your project sails to success.

Setting Sail with Purpose

Name: Deniz Endüstrisi A.Ş. Çiçek Tersanesi
Description:
Cicek family and Celal Cicek's shipbuilding history starts from 1960's under the name of GAYE Ltd. but Naval architect and MSC. marine engineer Celal Cicek  established Deniz Industry Co. / Cicek Shipyard in July 1 1977. The shipyard was located in Halic - Balat, İstanbul. The first ship we constructed in this shipyard was a coaster of 3.250dwt named "Coskun Yagci". We also built two  sister ships having  the same tonnage in this yard in Haliç.

In 1979, company applied for land in Tuzla following the announcement of the Tuzla Private Sector Shipyard Area. We commenced ship construction at this site in 1981.

By the end of 1982, company had  started on the  construction of product tanker of 3.250dwt named “Doğan Kaman” and of  a chemical tanker of 3.250dwt named “Orse”. The design work was undertaken by naval architect and marine engineer Celal Çiçek.

At that time, “Orse” was the first chemical tanker to be built in Turkey.

In 1982, company started construction of a 5.700dwt  bulkcarrier, named “Kazim Kolotoglu”, which was the biggest ship company had  constructed at  that time. Again, she was completely our own design and was delivered in 1984.  

Towards the governments decision of subsidising the purchase of second hand vessels from abroad hence 1985, all the Turkish shipyards as well as ours were left without domestic demand and proceeded constructing vessels  in smaller sizes and different types and left to perform conversions and repairs.

In those difficult days, our banks did not provide any Letters of Guarantee  for shipbuilding due to lack of knowledge of the shipbuilding industry. Therefore we could not deliver any letter of guarantees for foreign shipping companies.

Our shipyard maintained its activities  for several years by carrying out ship repair work and by building smaller vessels including tugs- tankers -chemical tankers and bulk carriers. This continued until  2003...

Name: Naval Coating, Inc
Description:
Historically, our primary customer has been the warships of the United States Navy. Our tireless technicians blast, clean, preserve and apply specialized protective coatings to the entire exterior hull of these mighty ships, as well as cleaning and coating all exposed topside equipment, structures, and fittings. This requires the use of many specialized coatings and paints to maintain the operating condition of sensitive radars and other sensors and to maintain the ship’s "Stealth" characteristics. Additionally, NCI's dedicated staff will completely paint and preserve all manner of interior spaces within the hull of these warships, ranging from engineering spaces to the crew's living quarters and messing facilities. We can also support the needs of any industrial or commercial customer, brining this same expertise and commitment to whatever your project is, no matter how big or how small – when you see Navy Blue and Gold on site, you know the job is being done RIGHT! 

*Naval Coating, Inc. would like to announce that we are now a certified Disabled Veteran Business Enterprise (DVBE) through the State of California, Certification ID 2002754.* We anticipate certification shortly as a Service Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business (SDVOSB).

Committed to environmental sustainability, the company designs vessels constructed with eco-friendly aluminum and incorporates sustainable decking and interior materials. Their approach integrates Life Cycle Assessment (LCA) principles to minimize emissions and environmental impact throughout the yacht’s lifespan.

Each catamaran is equipped with cutting-edge hybrid propulsion systems, offering both diesel and electric options, ensuring silent and emission-free operation at lower speeds. Advanced solar panel systems allow for energy-efficient operation while at anchor or in harbor, further enhancing sustainability.

Cosmopolitan Yachts prioritizes comfort, safety, and versatility, creating vessels capable of exploring the world's most remote destinations. By harmonizing innovative technology with refined craftsmanship, Cosmopolitan Yachts delivers a future-forward yachting experience without compromising on luxury or performance.

Name: Forschungsvereinigung Schiffbau und Meerestechnik e.V. (FSM)
Description: Der Verein wurde 1965 in Hamburg als Forschungszentrum des Deutschen Schiffbaus e.V. (FDS) gegründet und durchlief 2003 die erste Umstrukturierung und Umbenennung in Center of Maritime Technologies e.V. (CMT). Im Jahr 2020 hat die unter dem Dach des Verbandes für Schiffbau und Meerestechnik e.V. (VSM) neu gegründete Center of Maritime Technologies gGmbH (CMT gGmbH) den Bereich Forschung übernommen. Der Verein wurde in Forschungsvereinigung Schiffbau und Meerestechnik e.V. (FSM) umbenannt und koordiniert weiterhin Vorhaben der Industriellen Gemeinschaftsforschung im Bereich maritimer Technologien. Der intensive fachliche Austausch zwischen dem FSM, dem VSM und der CMT gGmbH sowie den Mitgliedern beider Vereine ermöglicht hierbei einen stets aktuellen Einblick in die Herausforderungen der Branche und den Technologietransfer der Ergebnisse aus Forschungsprojekten in die Wirtschaft.

The latest technology is incorporated with GENERAL SHIPPING's philosophy, by using its own, update modern and highly suitable equipment and in combination with the skilled personnel, giving to GENERAL SHIPPING SA the ability, to execute internal Gritblasting/Painting works (TANKCOATING), under optimal and controlled climatically condition. Name: Sapphire Yachts and Marine Services Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Sapphire Yachts & Marine Services Pvt. Ltd was established with the primary aim of providing management and maintenance solutions to ship owners. The company commenced operations with turnkey management of large sized super-yachts and mega-yachts and soon acquired one of its sub-contracting companies specializing in ship repair since 1999. As a result, SYMS now boasts of having more than a decade of experience in the maritime field. The company is headed by highly experienced and qualified officers and technicians from the Navy, Coast Guard and Merchant Marine and can boast of being one of the fastest growing companies in the field. The company is currently undertaking full refit of minor vessels inside the Naval Dockyard, Mumbai. The company is ISO 9001: 2009 certified conforming to the stringent standards of American Bureau of Shipping and is registered with Mumbai Port Trust. The key clients include Indian Navy, Great Eastern Shipping Co., Great Offshore, Sanghi Infrastructure, MEARSK, DSK Shipping, WARTSILLA, ISPAT Heavy Industries, HDIL and Galleon Shipping, to name a few. Our services include all engineering, electrical, underwater hull, shaft and propulsion system repairs along with complete upkeep and maintenance of minor vessels including private yachts. 

The company has two marine workshops in Dockyard Road, Mumbai, which are fully equipped to meet the current operations. A large sized workshop is being commissioned very soon to cater to the rapid increase in the volume of work. This workshop will cater for all major engine, hull, shafting and electronic systems repairs along with testing and tuning facilities for major systems. The workshop will be fully equipped with international standard state of the art testing and maintenance equipment.

Individuality is the heart of our service and our luxurious motor yachts. It is not only the choice of the wood interior or the upholstery materials that is important, which reflect your essential aspects and your personality and lifestyle in the yacht. You will have the opportunity to meet our designers, learn about our manufacturing techniques and see for yourself the quality that has put the Sunseeker brand in a league of its own. We are also at your side during the construction process and accompany you during all construction phases.

During the time you spend with us, we pay a lot of attention to your preferences and details you don't like, and together we discuss how we can not only meet your expectations, but exceed them. Only when you are satisfied with the planning do we hand over the details to our executive staff and build your personal, luxurious Sunseeker Motoryacht according to your exact specifications.

Name: Release Boatworks
Description:
Our boats offer fishing-friendly designs like low gunwales for the easy handling of billfish beside the boat, a clean wake at trolling speeds, multiple livewells and fishboxes placed where they make sense, not as an afterthought. The cockpit sole has the perfect amount of camber (curve) to drain water to the scuppers quickly, while the tackle center holds enough terminal gear for a week’s worth of charter fishing. Then there’s the expert placement of the fighting chair, icemaker, refrigeration, storage and engine access, and this is just in the cockpit.

But the best fishing designs are meaningless unless the boat is simply gorgeous. At Release Boatworks, that means a traditional curved shear line, tumblehome and sharp entry. Everything must fit perfectly and then be finished to a high-gloss shine. The result is the classic look that serious anglers and boating aficionados expect from a custom boatbuilder.

Description:

At Faurby Yacht, we are dedicated to continue a proud tradition of our craftsmanship, which has consequently became the thing that we are known for. We select all materials and components carefully: raw teak planks are cut, abraded, polished and moulded entirely from scratch.

Our yachts are always built in close collaboration with the owners, who have the possibility to customize the details according to their specific needs. This means that all Faurby Yachts are different and carry the personal touch of their owners. You won’t see one of our yachts everyday either: since 1976 we have built approximately 10 pieces a year. 

Since 2018, Faurby Yacht is a part of True Boat Builders, who also manufactures Nordship and Nordic Cruiser.

Name: TUTEKA Turun Teräskaluste Oy
Description:
With over 70 year’s of experience we as a shipbuilders’ subcontractor manufacture various items, especially fixed and free-standing furnishings for cabins, restaurants, stairwells and other public spaces on ships. Our strengths lie in jobs demanding great expertise and challenging executions that require in-depth experience. You’ll find us a reliable partner for small serial items and large-scale projects alike.

Construction-related projects form another of our core competence areas. As a subcontractor for Finnish construction firms we have demonstrated our ability to come up with exceptional solutions. Stone, glass, wood and metal are all familiar materials for us, ones through which we can turn the visions of architects and designers into beautiful reality.

Our collaboration with architects has taught us to value courage and to be demanding of ourselves. Each successfully completed assignment has added to our greatest asset – our competence. We believe in expertise and high quality.

Demanding projects require particular attention to production design, which in turn calls for solid expertise and experience. We use the best available software in our work and can provide all the necessary drawings upon request, including visualisations.

Name: Marine Technics
Description: Marine Technics is an repair company based in Oudewater, the Netherlands.  We serve all major brands of medium speed engines, all around the globe.

Name: MÜPRO Maritim
Description:
MÜPRO Maritim, with its headquarters located in Hamburg, is an international manufacturing and trading company for support systems for solving almost all fastening tasks in shipbuilding. In addition to our products tailored to the needs of the shipbuilding industry, we offer a range of variable products, which you can order in modified versions to meet your requirements.
Our primary goal is to offer functional products of highest quality. A highly-qualified personnel is at your disposal for technical advice and drafts - the best guarantee that our customers benefit from our know-how and receive a high quality service.

Metalnox es una empresa fundada en 1987. Diseñamos y fabricamos componentes de alta calidad en los sectores Industrial y Naval. Metalnox se ha destacado por su calidad de servicio, estabilidad empresarial y compromiso con la mejora continua.

Metalnox is a company that was founded in 1987. We design and manufacture high quality components in the Industry & Naval Sectors. Metalnox has stood out for its quality service, business stability and commitment to improving every day.

Name: Salthammer Båtbyggeri AS
Description:
Salthammer Båtbyggeri AS ble startet opp i 1896 som L. H. Salthammer Båtbyggeri og har lange tradisjoner innen skipsbygging og bygging av stålkonstruksjoner. Salthammergruppen består i dag av Salthammer Båtbyggeri AS, Salthammer Tresfjord AS og Hanson Sjøtransport AS.

Slik vi fremstår i dag utgjør vi en effektiv, fullstendig og vel kvalifisert produksjonslinje for fabrikasjon og sammenstilling av tunge stålkomponenter. Dette innebærer deleproduksjon, maskinering, valsing, knekking, montering og sveising. Vi har kompetanse på alle områder inkludert inspeksjon og NDT. Vår beliggenhet legger til rette for effektiv frakt med egen slepebåt og lektere.

Vår forretningsfilosofi er basert på lokale tradisjoner for høy forretningsetikk, ærlighet og stolthet over å levere gode produkter. Våre kvalifikasjoner, kapasiteter og fokus på kvalitet til rett tid har gjort oss til en robust partner i markedet som står sterkt gjennom utfordrende tider med svake markeder.

Name: B2 MARINE
Description:
Mêlant tradition et modernité, le chantier B2 Marine est un fabricant de bateaux à moteur et voiliers transportables. Depuis sa création en 1986, le constructeur français s’est toujours appuyé sur les compétences et le savoir-faire de ses équipes de compagnons pour proposer des unités robustes, performantes et polyvalentes.

Du moulage au montage, en passant par la stratification et le carlinguage, toutes les étapes du processus de fabrication des navires B2 Marine sont réalisées dans l’usine située à quelques kilomètres de Bordeaux.

B2 Marine propose des équipements innovants et sécurisants pour les plaisanciers, en collaboration étroite avec ses fournisseurs français, de proximité et compétents.

- Global Ship repairs

We work 24/7 I on short notice I worldwide

Name: FireSeal Marine & Offshore
Description:
It started with one of the most safety-critical jobs imaginable: An assignment from the Swedish Government to develop a system for fire sealing at Sweden’s nuclear power plants.

Today, our fire sealing system has been on guard for more than 40 years wherever fires must never be allowed to spread: offshore platforms, FPSOs, and oil tankers, as well as cargo vessels and container ships. With approvals for all of the most common deck and bulkhead applications.

Our system has become a favorite of installers and buyers because of our dedication to making it easy to work with and easy to make safe installations. And when it doesn’t take long to do it right, it is also cost effective. That’s why FireSeal has an impressive reference list from some of the world’s largest shipyards.

Name: Amelia Shipyard
Description:
We operate fabrication yards and dockage facilities in south central Louisiana. 
Our Amelia facility 01 is a 6-acre gravel packed Industrial Site located in Amelia, LA on Bayou Boeuf near the intersection of the Intracoastal Canal (ICW) suitable for vessels of any size or air draft capable of achieving a bottom draft of less than 15’ (4.5m). This facility includes office space, waterfront services, and bulkheaded waterfront dock with easy, unobstructed access to the Bayou Chene, Avoca Island Cutoff and the Gulf of Mexico. We are 2 miles from US Hwy. 90 (Interstate 49 Corridor).
Our site features:
•	1,000 ft (305 m) of heavy industrial Intracoastal Waterfront with a controlled depth of at least 15’ (4.5m)
•	Total area: 519,865 ft² (48,297 m²) of high strength gravel packed lay down / storage yard.
•	Dock space for repairs, mobilizations, & demobilizations with shore power and water connections.
•	Machine shop services including steel and aluminum fabrication & welding.
•	Mechanical, structural, electrical, electronic, control, & joiner system services.
•	Planned 12,000 sq. ft. (1,115 sq. m.) on-site warehouse.
•	Tool Room, Office space, restrooms, break room, & conference room.
•	Painting, Sandblasting, and Hydro blasting services.
•	Cranes, Cherry pickers, & Forklifts.
•	Tug Services
•	Barge repairs and barge ballasting.
•	Fuel storage, Gas freeing & Tank Cleaning service.
•	USCG & Classification society services.
•	Security Fencing, Cameras, & Living Quarters
We offer short- or long-term storage available in mostly fresh water and storm safe port. Facilities are manned, gated, lighted and have surveillance cameras.
•	Market & show vessels to perspective buyers.
•	Kept on shore power with HVAC running.
•	Daily bilge, rope & security checks.
•	Machinery & systems ran regularly.

Name: V2 Group
Description:
At V2 Group, we are revolutionizing the nautical industry by combining cutting-edge technology, large-format additive manufacturing (LFAM), and a strong commitment to sustainability. With operations in Palma de Mallorca and Barcelona, we provide innovative solutions for boat manufacturing and component production for the maritime and other industrial sectors.

Our business is structured into two main verticals:

 V2 Boats – Focused on the design, manufacturing, and commercialization of boats, leveraging 3D printing technology and sustainable materials to deliver innovative, efficient, and environmentally friendly solutions.

 V2 Printworks – Specializing in the production of components, structures, and molds using large-format additive manufacturing (LFAM). We provide tailored solutions for the nautical industry and other sectors looking for efficiency, precision, and waste reduction in their production processes.

 Recent milestone: We have developed Europe’s first monolithic 3D-printed catamaran, a 6-meter-long vessel, 100% electric and made with 90% recyclable materials, setting a new benchmark for sustainable boat manufacturing.

At V2 Group, we are committed to innovation, efficiency, and sustainability, shaping the future of navigation. 

 Connect with us and be part of the change.

 Visit us at: www.v2group.eu

Name: Profile Boats
Description: Profile Boats continues to push the boundaries of aluminium pontoon quality and design. Behind every Profile Boat is over 20 years of aluminium pontoon boat building experience and a burning desire to produce the highest quality boat of its type. Designed initially as a safer beach launching vessel, the Profile range has developed to provide craft from family recreation, to serious dive and fishing boats, as well as commercial charter vessels. The inherent safety of the unique pontoon design offers superior stability and makes all Profile Boats virtually unsinkable.

Name: Warren Yachts
Description:
In an area of the world where the Pacific is vast and challenging, knowing the waters and how to get from one place to another, quickly and safely, is in the Australian DNA. It was here, as a teenager, Dave Warren began building fast boats: first, ocean racing sailboats then big, fast catamarans, always innovative one-offs, always beautifully shaped in fibre-glass and always winners. Seeking perfection in every line, squeezing every fraction of a knot from hull shape and length and engineering solutions out of need and sheer determination, set him apart.

In 1995, Warren Yachts, having gained a reputation as a builder whose passion and ethics were as desirable as their extraordinary products, was positioned on the leading edge of a new wave. It is here the company felt most comfortable as the gurus of high speed, high style and wildly inventive engineering solutions. Warren yachts defined the Super Sport Yacht years before the class would gain recognition and acceptance. The Warren Super Nova was a new breed. She had the first retractable hardtop in the category. Her lines were smoother and sleeker, unlike her more boxy counterparts, and the quality was extraordinary. The focus on fit, finish and material selection was true custom build throughout. The Europeans who were now manufacturing fibreglass Sport Yachts were not in the same league. The company strived for perfection and understood that there were no short cuts, that there were no unsolvable engineering problems and there
was no reason to build less than a perfect yacht.

2013 Warren Yachts now owned by Think Yachts Asia, has restructured the company with its very successful S77 and S87 sports yachts. Warren Yachts continues to uphold the traditions, values, and quality that made Warren Yachts the most sought after and respected yacht brand in the world.

Name: Mestral Marine Works S.L.
Description:
We are dedicated to the construction and repair of sailing boats. Our team is technically prepared to develop and manage the construction, refit, improvement and maintenance of any type of pleasure boat as well as custom manufacturing of parts.
We want to develop the sailboat manufacturing process by combining high quality construction and close collaboration with skippers in order to offer a unique experience. We implement innovative solutions in order to improve our boat’s performances.
In Mestral Marine Works, we work flexibly; the shipyard is configured according to the needs and specifications of each boat. This allows us to range from repair orders to larger construction projects .

Name: H+P Stahl- und Maschinenbau GmbH
Description:
Wir sind ein zertifizierter Schweißfachbetrieb (DIN EN 1090-1 bis -3), der sich auf die Konstruktion und Fertigung von hochwertigen Komponenten für den Schiffbau sowie für den Stahl- und Maschinenbau spezialisiert hat.


Mit einem hohen Maß an technischer Kompetenz und Flexibilität entwickeln und produzieren wir maßgeschneiderte Lösungen – vom Einzelstück bis zur komplexen Baugruppe. Unsere besondere Stärke liegt in der Umsetzung kundenspezifischer Sonderanfertigungen, die höchsten Anforderungen an Qualität und Präzision gerecht werden.


Als Partner von Werften, Anlagenbauern und Industrieunternehmen liefern wir termintreu, lösungsorientiert und in zertifizierter Ausführung – alles aus einer Hand, von der Konstruktion bis zur fertigen Schweißbaugruppe.

Name: PT Galangan Samudera Madura
Description: PT Galangan Samudera Madura (GSM) was established in 2016. The company has a wide range of services, including steel and wood shipbuilding, repairs and maintenance of shipbuilding, and the manufacture of floating tools.

Name: Hysucat
Description:
Hysucat brings over 20 years of boatbuilding excellence to create fast, comfortable and fuel-efficient pleasure and commercial vessels using renown hydrofoil technology. 

The inventor of the Hysucat patented concept is Professor (emeritus) Karl-Gunter Hoppe, who earned a PhD in naval architecture and taught fluid mechanics at the University of Stellenbosch in South Africa. 

Malan Conradie, a former student who collaborated with Hoppe, is the creator of today’s Hysucat brand. He’s recognized as one of the world’s most innovative boat designers in the specialty of hydrofoil technology. Conradie had developed and produced more than 1,300 hydrofoil supported catamaran vessels to date, ranging from 21 to 52 feet.

The Hysucat design used in centre console, fast RIBs and water transport boats offers the best features of a monohull and a catamaran combined.

Name: Kasifa Holding Sdn Bhd
Description:
Kasifa Holding Sdn. Bhd. was incorporate on 5th September 1979 .The establishment of the company was to seek opportunities in the areas of shipping and trading in the local and international markets. 

Kasifa Holding currently provides ship chandelling and stevedoring activities to some of the vessels that calls at Penang Port. We are regular supplies of provisions and  provide stevedoring services to numerous vessels. As we are able to maintain our rates because of long term suppliers, we consider our prices to be very competitive. We are currently the main stevedore contractor for Yang Ming Line from Taiwan an also STX Pan Ocean Line from Korea.

We are also exporters/importers of timber base products. Our majority source of products are origin from Myanmar to markets such as Bangladesh and India. The activities that are provided in our timber exports are inspections of timber, participating directly with government agencies tender, shipping and finally arrangements of delivery of goods. In order to cater our buyers need, we have also shipped timber and logs from East Malaysia.

Kasifa Holding is currently active in the granite base industry as an exporter and importer. Our current buyers are from Italy, Spain, Portugal, China, Taiwan and some importation for the Malaysian market. Our trading of granite and marble includes selling these items in blocks and also tiles depending on the consignments. We have in the past actively participated to supply granite and marble for local Malaysian government funded projects too.

Despite the above trading commodities, the company has established the trading  in other raw commodities such as coal, diesel, cement, clinker, bitumen, sugar and other raw commodities both for local and international market.

Name: Naval Steel New s.r.l
Description:
Naval Steel New srl was founded in 2017 and although our head quarters are based in Pozzallo, Sicily, our clients are spread over Europe and America. We are now one of the most well known Sicilian companies that designs and manufactures stainless steel, for shipbuilding groups.
At Naval Steel New srl, we specialise in the design, installation and repair, in stainless steel, of catering areas and cabins for sophisticated cruise ships, ferries, super yachts and offshore platforms. Our main sites of work, for new buildings and refitting works,  are based in Europe. Furthermore, we also carry out service during navigation in the North Sea, US Coasts and the Caribbean. Our clients include some of the major cruise operators in the business.

Name: Three Angle Marine Ltd
Description: Three Angle Marine Limited (TAML) is a leading shipbuilder in Bangladesh that specializes in new building and repair of various types of vessels for inland and coastal regions. The company was established in January 2010, and it has a fully-equipped shipyard covering 132 acres, including a highly skilled workforce of naval architects and engineers. TAML is dedicated to delivering exceptional quality and value to its clients, and it demonstrates its commitment to innovation and sustainability by obtaining the  ISO 9001:2015 certification while practicing responsible shipbuilding. TAML has an impressive track record of delivering over 100 self-propelled vessels in the past 14 years, making it a reputable company in the industry. The company has a growing list of ongoing projects, which includes Car cum Passenger Ferry, Fire Fighting Tug Boats, Modern Inland Passenger Vessels, Coastal Sea Trucks, and Coastal Oil Tankers. At Three Angle Marine Limited, customer satisfaction is of utmost importance. The company's flexible, high-performance approach and commitment to perfection have become its trademark. TAML continuously improves its technology and processes to meet the evolving needs of its clients. The company provides reliable shipbuilding services for new projects and repair and maintenance services. TAML understands the unique challenges and requirements of government contracts. The company's team of experienced professionals has extensive knowledge of local and international regulations and standards, and it is fully equipped to handle large-scale projects. TAML's commitment to quality, safety, and affordability ensures that every project it undertakes is delivered on time, within budget, and to the highest standards. TAML's commitment to the local community and environment is evident in its sustainable shipbuilding practices and the support of local suppliers and businesses.

Name: Yacht Builders Academy
Description:
Yacht Builders Academy (YBA) is een samenwerkingsverband van ondernemers, overheid en onderwijs in Noordwest-Nederland. Het hoofddoel van deze samenwerking is het bevorderen van instroom in de Maritieme Techniek. Daarnaast vormt dit sterke bedrijvennetwerk van YBA-partners een effectief kenniscentrum. YBA biedt actuele, uitdagende en innovatieve praktijkopleidingen die aansluiten op de behoeften van bedrijven en de toenemende vraag naar passend opgeleide medewerkers. 
De belangrijkste doelen van Yacht Builders Academy zijn:
•	Het versterken van de samenwerking tussen het onderwijs (po, vmbo, mbo, hbo) en het maritieme bedrijfsleven 
•	Het ontwikkelen en actualiseren van het opleidingsaanbod voor zowel studenten als werkenden 
•	Het opstellen en uitvoeren van een gezamenlijke marketingstrategie die is gericht op werving van (aspirant) studenten 
•	Het stimuleren en promoten van innovatief vakmanschap en het uitdragen van een passie voor het vak
Vanuit Yacht Builders Academy worden unieke opleidingen geboden aan zowel jongeren als volwassenen. Deze opleidingen zijn ontwikkeld met kennis en ervaring van vakmensen uit de watersport(industrie) en de scheeps- en jachtbouwsector. Om aansluiting te vinden met de praktijk worden opdrachten gedeeltelijk in de eigen werkomgeving van de student of cursist uitgevoerd. Ook de theorie richt zich voor zover mogelijk op specifieke situaties uit de scheeps- en jachtbouw.
De partners van Yacht Builders Academy investeren samen in uitstekend opgeleide vakmensen die klaar zijn voor de toekomst. Met voldoende goed opgeleid personeel, op verschillende opleidings- en bedrijfslocaties in Noordwest-Nederland, zorgen we ervoor dat de watersport(industrie) en jacht- en scheepsbouw internationaal een sterke positie behouden. 

www.yachtbuildersacademy.com	Voor meer informatie over Yacht Builders Academy
yba@rocfriesepoort.nl	o.v.v. YBA O&C | Voor de meest actuele informatie over cursussen en opleidingen

Name: GRUPO HUMPHREY DO BRASIL
Description:
O GRUPO HUMPHREY DO BRASIL foi fundado em 2004 com o objetivo de acoplar os parceiros comerciais no objetivo de melhor atender os clientes, agregando valor a sua mão de obra e atendendo o mesmo com melhor qualidade e com um aporte maior de equipamentos e máquinas e motores, atualmente contamos com parceiros que tem grande experiência no mercado de prestações de serviços industriais e navais, atendendo a empresas de grande porte.

Este ano (2014) as empresas Máquinas e motores serviços industriais e navais e a Wchristian Empreendimentos se associaram ao grupo agregando valor e qualidade ao mesmo.

Atualmente desenvolvemos soluções efetivas para projetos críticos, estando capacitados a realizar com excelência em qualidade obras convencionais e de engenharia, naval e industrial, e serviços especializados de projeto, construção, montagem e manutenção, prestação de serviços e locações de equipamentos.

Temos como nossos principais clientes a PETROBRAS, Mendes Júnior, Construtora Norberto Odebrecht, Iesa, Santos Barbosa e Brasfells, operamos em sede própria, de parceiros comerciais e na base de clientes para atender as mais diversas necessidades do mercado onshore e offshore e industrial. Além de sermos especializados em hidrojateamento e pintura naval/industrial, temos qualificação em reparos, caldeiraria, elétrica de força e controle e automações. (embarcações, subestações, ROV e Trustter).

Em resumo: Prestações de serviço de hidrojateamento, jato abrasivo, pintura naval e industrial, fabricação e prestação de serviços no seguimento óleo e gás com foco em elétrica, usinagem, caldeiraria, mobilização, ferramentas para ROV e equipamentos oceanográficos.

Name: Revival Superyacht Interiors
Description:
Revival is a specialist in bespoke upholstery and interior solutions for superyachts. With more than 30 years of expertise, we deliver tailor-made refits and new builds that combine craftsmanship, premium materials and attention to detail.

Based in Mallorca, one of Europe’s leading refit hubs, we support captains, project managers and shipyards worldwide, offering a full range of services: upholstery, covers & awnings, carpets, decoration accessories and design.

Our commitment is to precision, quality and on-time delivery — ensuring every project reflects the luxury and uniqueness that superyacht owners expect.

Name: roma interieurbouw
Description:
Marron Yacht Exteriors is a young but well introduced company in the Yacht building Industry.

With a team of 15 professionals and close contacts with external craftsmen Marron Yacht Exteriors specializes in all aspects of yacht carpentry.

Marron was founded in 1997,  by MARco and RONald Schumacher, brothers and co-owners who are still active on the work floor on a daily base.
Throughout the years Marron has gained trust and confidence with shipyards such as Oceanco, Moonen, Hakvoort, Icon and Holland Jachtbouw. But also in the smaller Dutch segment we are still active. Companies like Saffier, Maril, Jan van Gent, Antaris and Swan, are also familiar with our products. 

Marron has a skilled and enthusiastic team of workers (some of our people have been with us from the start) and a well equipped workshop out of which we can deliver:
-	Teak Decks
-	Capping rails
-	Ceilings
-	Gratings
-	Various exterior furniture 

Marron can offer Craftsmanship, Flexibility and Efficiency and what we are trying to achieve and maintain is a sustainable and informal work relation with all of our customers.

We do as we promise, we deliver on time and for the agreed price.

Name: Bluestrom

EcoDeck is compliant with SOLAS and IMO regulations, maintains its properties throughout its life, and is non-skid, easy to repair, and low-maintenance.

Produced with renewable, solvent-free resins, EcoDeck is available in prefabricated panels using CNC techniques and can be bonded to various substructures. At the end of its lifecycle, it can be recycled for new products.

Name: Nakatani Shipbuilding Co., Ltd.
Description:
The world that the Japanese shipbuilding industry finds itself in today is increasingly competitive. Fierce trading in South Korea and China means that maintaining the lead in today's market requires continual innovation and flexibility.

Nakatani Ship Building Company represents the cutting edge of 21st century ship design with the development of new technology one of our priorities.

Currently electric propulsion is in use around the world in passenger boats, icebreakers and submarines. Recent marked improvements in the control of electric machinery however, has widened the range of vessels in which it can be used. Working to reduce the life-cycle cost of chemical tanker vessels, The Nakatani Shipbuilding Company has developed an electric propulsion, domestic chemical tanker in collaboration with university ship research departments.

Buttock flow is adopted, and many original ideas and new technology are included into the stern.
The first vessel of its kind in Japan, the electric propulsion, domestic chemical tanker "SENSHO" was launched on the Sea of Japan on June 11th 2002.

The screws are attached vertically to the hull, its simple structure high lighting the vessel's efficient design characteristics.

The space required for the engine room has been reduced by one third allowing the bow to be narrowed and the center of buoyancy to be moved to the stern.

Accordingly, the vessel's water resistance is reduced significantly to the smart ship form.
Propulsive efficiency is 20% greater than in standard vessels and carbon dioxide and sulfurous oxide emissions have been reduced by 20 and 40% respectively. The improved propulsive efficiency of the vessel results in significantly reduced maintenance costs.

Fundada em 2003 com o objectivo de responder às necessidades de um mercado que exige profissionalismo, segurança e rigor nas intervenções, rapidamente se diferenciou pela sua atitude de elevado rigor e competência.

A nossa filosofia assenta no mais elevado serviço com recurso à tecnologia mais avançada na área do mergulho, Offshore, Engenharia Civil, trabalho em alturas, espaços confinados e intervenções remotas através dos nossos veículos operados remotamente (ROV). realizando com o mais alto profissionalismo qualquer desafio nestas áreas.

Na Multisub SA trabalhamos em estreita parceria com nossos clientes, fazendo dos seus projectos a nossa maior prioridade, como resultado somos hoje uma empresa de referência, onde os nossos clientes apreciam a nossa capacidade de resposta, profissionalismo e dedicação qualquer que seja o seu projecto, respeitando sempre a segurança dos nossos profissionais, clientes e o meio ambiente.

O que nos diferencia são os excelentes profissionais que colaboram connosco que ao longo de vários anos foram adquirindo o conhecimento e as experiências necessárias para conseguir enfrentar qualquer desafio com a maior eficiência, seja no mar ou em terra.

Os nossos departamentos de Engenharia e de Mergulho Profissional seguem rigorosamente as normas decretadas pela IMCA e ADC no que diz respeito aos equipamentos, operações e acima de tudo no que diz respeito à segurança.

A Multisub SA encontra-se em processo de certificação pela BV pelas normas ISO 9001 e ISO 18001 pois para nós a segurança é o aspecto fundamental para o sucesso dos trabalhos. Consideramos a segurança dos nossos profissionais, subcontratados, clientes, fornecedores e todos os outros com quem trabalhamos como prioridade. Todos os nossos equipamentos são inspeccionados regularmente pelos nosso departamento de manutenção para garantir a segurança total das nossas operações.

Description: The company has always striven to find increasingly more functional solutions, a policy that paid off in 1989 with the creation of the “SCANNER” project on a national scale. Name: Cerberus Blue Systems
Description:
Modular buoy systems with sensors for aquaculture and environmental monitoring

Cerberus develops uniform, low-threshold buoy systems (BLUE systems) for coastal and inland waters that link biological growth, such as algae, mussels, or sponges, with parameters such as temperature, light, salinity, or wave action and make them analyzable via a digital platform. The BLUE systems enable global comparability, lower barriers to entry, and provide reliable data for approval procedures, environmental assessments, and digital twins. Combined with satellite imagery, this creates a data-based foundation for predictive models and a deeper understanding of marine ecosystems. The systems are to be used, among other things, in testing cultivation methods for marine organisms, in biodiversity research, and in preparing ecological assessments. In this way, they actively contribute to shaping a sustainable blue economy.

We push the limits and utilize/mature the latest tech, and go direct to zero emissions.

Name: Tecklenborg, Kegel GmbH
Description:
Unser Unternehmen wurde im Jahr 1928 durch Fritz Tecklenborg (1888-1964) in Bremerhaven gegründet.

Ein Team von langjährig erfahrenen Spezialisten für Takelarbeiten findet auch für Ihre individuelle Anforderung/Anwendung die optimale Lösung. So gehören das Takeln von Segelschiffen jeder Größe, die Konzeption und Herstellung von Hebegeschirren, das Wechseln und Prüfen von Drahtseilen mit Hauptsitz in Bremerhaven zu unserem täglichen Geschäft. 

Des Weiteren befindet sich in unmittelbarer Nähe der Wismarer Werft unsere Taklerei.  Seit der Eröffnung unserer Niederlassung in Wismar im Jahr 1992 hat sich diese zu einem für uns bedeutenden Standort entwickelt der Fähig ist alle bereits genannten Tätigkeiten ebenfalls mit höchsten Qualitätsansprüchen zu bewältigen. 

Als eines der führenden Im- und Export Unternehmen für Edelstahlseile in Europa können wir jedem Kundenwunsch auch mit kurzfristigen Lieferzeiten gerecht werden. Dabei ist die Konfektionierung, die Testierung sowie unsere kompetente Beratung Garant für Qualität.

Verlassen Sie sich auf unsere erfahrenen Experten, wenn es um die Sicherheit in Ihrem Kletterwald geht. Wir statten seit vielen Jahren Kletterwälder und Hochseilgärten europaweit aus. Die Umsetzung entsprechend der Normen und Vorgaben von Klassifikationen ist immer Grundbestandteil unserer Arbeiten. 

Seit über 90 Jahren gelten wir weltweit als Experten für Taklerei, Montage von Stahlseilen, Hebegeschirre, Traversen, Testierungen bis 250 to, Prüfung von Anschlagmitteln und Schiffsüberführungen. 

Wir sind ein ISO 9001 zertifizierter Fachbetrieb.

Name: eWAVE project
Description:
eWAVE project: Efficient HV-electric modular battery and distribution systems for sustainable WAterborne VEssels

The maritime sector faces challenges in transitioning to sustainable, all-electric vessels. Key obstacles include low energy density in current battery systems, safety concerns, and the need for durable, sustainable materials. Economic viability also remains a significant barrier for widespread adoption. 

To address these issues, the EU-funded eWAVE project brings together 18 experts from research, technology, and shipbuilding to advance high-voltage (HV) technology for electric vessels. 

By developing high-energy-density batteries, scalable modular systems, and an integrated safety concept, eWAVE aims to enhance the sustainability, safety, and efficiency of maritime transport. The project will also explore circularity through bio-based materials and recycling, supporting the EU’s goal of reducing the environmental footprint of shipping.

Powstał w 1993 roku jako wynik dążeń środowiska przemysłu okrętowego do stworzenia formy organizacyjnej kontaktów stoczni i wytwórców wyposażenia, a także innych instytucji związanych z przemysłem. Inicjatorem powstania Związku Pracodawców FORUM OKRĘTOWEGO był nestor polskiego przemysłu okrętowego prof. Jerzy Wojciech Doerffer – pierwszy Prezes stowarzyszenia.
   
FORUM OKRĘTOWE jest członkiem organizacji SEA Europe (dawniej CESA) zrzeszającej stocznie i producentów wyposażenia okrętowego z Europy a także Turcji. Jest również członkiem Polskiej Konfederacji Pracodawców Prywatnych LEWIATAN.
   
Celem statutowym FORUM OKRĘTOWEGO jest wpływanie na tworzenie pomyślnych warunków rozwoju polskiego przemysłu okrętowego, organizowanie różnych form współpracy pomiędzy członkami, a także ochrona ich interesów i reprezentowanie zarówno w kraju jak i zagranicą.
Firmy zrzeszone w Związku Pracodawców FORUM OKRĘTOWE zawsze reprezentują wysoki poziom zawodowy i łącznie posiadają ogromny potencjał intelektualny. Członkami FORUM OKRĘTOWEGO są stocznie produkcyjne i remontowe, dostawcy usług, kooperanci i producenci wyposażenia okrętowego, a także inne firmy i instytucje aktywne w branży przemysłu stoczniowego. Można wśród nich wyróżnić wyższe uczelnie, ośrodki badawczo rozwojowe, firmy projektowe, towarzystwa klasyfikacyjne, banki i kancelarie prawne.
 
FORUM OKRĘTOWE łączy nadzieja i przekonanie, że razem możemy więcej, że działając wspólnie i w porozumieniu osiągamy w biznesie sukces, że zapewniamy stabilną, ciekawą i satysfakcjonującą pracę wielu tysiącom osób.

Zakres działania:
- ochrona praw i reprezentowanie interesów członków,
- reprezentowanie polskiego przemysłu okrętowego wobec organizacji rządowych i stowarzyszeń międzynarodowych.

Name: FUTURE 4.0 PLUS project
Description:
►We are witnessing the new significant transformation of manufacturing industry, the fourth industrial revolution and new digital age called Industry 4.0. The shipbuilding industry and its related supply chain in Adriatic-Ionian region (EUSAIR) is facing great challenges and changes, being undeveloped and left behind with the urgent need to new technology brush ups. Shipyards are affected by the transformation of the entire value chain process involved in manufacturing industry with the effects on production, intercompany relations and human capital development.
►The solution is to implement new technologies brought by the Industry 4.0 (innovation, advanced technologies, computerization, robotics processes, automation, digitalization...) by encouraging sustainable and better management of our “blue “resources (Blue Economy).
►The main objective of FUTURE 4.0 project is to design a shared strategy to innovate companies approach to training through a special designed education in today's digital age (Smart Learning Model).
►The base for designing a suitable Industry 4.0 Smart Learning Model is using the known technique to help manage front part of innovation process (Technological Road-mapping) and using new strategic planning tools to help envision various futures and creating more vibrant organizations (Foresight tools) to be tested with Universities, companies, R&I actors and stakeholders in each territory applying Triple Helix Approach - the set of interactions between academia, industry and governments. The results will be the foundation for designing of a knowledge, competence and skills training/learning hub - FUTURE 4.0 platform. 

This social media account has been produced with the financial assistance of the European Union. Its contents are the sole responsibility of the FUTURE 4.0 PLUS project partners and do not necessarily reflect the position of the European Union and/or ADRION programme authorities.
Location: Adriatic Ionian Region (Italy, Croatia, Albania, Greece)

Since 1973 the thrill and joy of sailing and the ambition only to work with quality have been the driving forces which have created the myth about Luffe Yachts. As an employee Oluf Jørgensen started building elegant Dragons in wood and he continued on his own with the production of the skerrycruiser Ylva.

The interest for these slim, fast-sailing boats made Oluf Jørgensen further develop this into a new concept, which could offer the sailing family the desired space below deck. In 1979 Oluf Jørgensen thus created the Luffe 37 which today forms a considerable part of the basis for one of the most successful shipyards in Denmark.

In 1983 the Luffe 44 was introduced, the fastest boat in Sjælland Rundt Race (the Danish boat race around the island of Zealand) that year as well as in 1984 and 1985. Since then, Luffe Yachts has produced Luffe Yachts measuring 40, 43, 45, 46, 48 and 54 feet. All yachts have been constructed with regard to each buyers individual desires for accomodation and detailed arrangements.

Name: ABECOON
Description:
Associação Brasileira da Engenharia da Construção Onshore, Offshore e Naval

No dia 1 de março de 2016, técnicos e engenheiros com grande experiência na área de construção pesada no seguimento de Energia, de Óleo & Gás e construção naval, decidiram criar a ABECOON.

A iniciativa tem como objetivo principal a união do maior número de profissionais da especialidade no Brasil, visando obter maior representatividade e suportar a sociedade brasileira nas grandes questões relacionadas ao conhecimento e a ética da construção pesada neste seguimento e em outros correlatos.

Este imenso grupo de profissionais especializados, buscará através da sinergia e do conhecimento dos seus associados, expressar um claro posicionamento técnico, mas crítico e sugestivo sobre políticas e ações adotadas por autoridades do governo e/ou executivos de empresas estatais e/ou partidos ou qualquer membro da sociedade brasileira.

A associação, atuará também como facilitadora entre os associados e empresas, promovendo treinamentos técnicos e de gestão interpessoal entre as diversas especializações do segmento. 

A associação, manterá um site como principal ferramenta no desenvolvimento profissional dos seus associados. Este site, além de grande acervo técnico das áreas de especialidade será um canal de comunicação online com especialistas cadastrados. 

A associação, promoverá palestras de nível internacional, além da criação de um banco de currículos facilitando as empresas do setor e outras especializadas em recursos humanos a identificar os profissionais necessários, bem como abrir espaço para divulgação de oportunidades. 

Formatação online de um ambiente que permita aos profissionais a troca de experiência através de consultas técnicas para o dia a dia entre os associados sem custos e de um Blog para permitir a divulgação de textos com informações técnicas e de gestão.

Estabelecimento com baixos custos de convênios de saúde entre outros.

All models are created as highly capable fast powerboats for tomorrow's defense and law enforcement duties.
