Name: Dutch Steel Works
Description:
Bedrijf
Innovatieve snij- en plottechnieken, efficiënte productiemethoden en flexibiliteit. Dat maakt Dutch Steel Works tot een onderscheidend snijbedrijf. Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in snijpakketten voor scheeps- en constructiebouw. 

Dutch Steel Works is onderdeel van de Neptune Groep, maar opereert sinds 2009 als zelfstandig staalsnijbedrijf. 
Optimaal productie proces, korte levertijd en passende aantrekkelijke prijzen zijn begrippen die aansluiten bij onze onderneming. Wij kunnen 24/7 produceren en zijn in staat kleine opdrachten in het lopende productieproces te voegen. 

Elke vorm die u nodig heeft wordt op vakkundige wijze uit staalplaat materiaal gesneden. We kunnen op de plasmamachine platen verwerken met een dikte van 2 tot en met 50 millimeter. De diverse voorraad plaatmaterialen zijn voorzien van een 3.2 certificaten en deze kunnen een maximale afmeting hebben van 12.300 bij 3.000 millimeter. Onze plasmamachine heeft de mogelijkheid om schuin te snijden tot 45 graden.

Tevens hebben wij een geringe hoeveelheid plaat materiaal Grade A in de sigma op voorraad. Dit kunnen wij per direct in zetten waardoor op korte termijn aan vragen kan worden voldaan. 
In overleg met de opdrachtgevers zijn wij in staat grote projecten te verwerken volgens de klant gevraagde planning en inkoop en uitlevering conform afgesproken data. Een grote diversiteit van materialen, werken en projecten is voor ons gewoon. 
Dutch Steel Works is een toeleverancier van hoogwaardig kwalitatief snijwerk.

Name: Sarnico Classic Boats
Description:
Sarnico Classic Boats was founded with a specific objective: keeping the Italian artisanal boat tradition alive. Care for details and innate creativity have always been the defining characteristics of boats built in Italy and over the years Riva has established itself as one of the main representatives all around the world.
Sarnico, where it all started; Classic, the unique charm of time; Boats, simply our boats.
The reliability of our boats is guaranteed by the extensive experience of people who have worked at Riva and for the many satellite businesses that developed around it. Today, as tradition dictates, each single component is assembled observing the highest standards by our craftsmen, who have worked for years at Riva’s shipyard and in the workshops and laboratories that have flourished in the surrounding areas. Their extensive experience derives from the fact that they were the first to build these boats and have the ability to source and replicate accessories identical to those used originally and have dedicated a lifetime to the construction of these boats. At the same time, they are joined by younger people willing to learn how to work with wood and discover the secrets of these masters to keep their knowledge alive and preserve some of the best-known boats, which have become icons of the maritime world worldwide.

Name: Ship Solventions Nederland
Description:
Ship Solventions Nederland is een bedrijf wat zich met name richt op het oplossen van vraagstukken en het innovatief denken in de scheepsbouw. In een tijd waarin groen denken de tendens is en er vele veranderingen zullen plaatsvinden met betrekking tot scheepsontwerpen denken we graag met u mee in het vinden van de juiste oplossingen voor uw vraagstukken. 

Het bedrijf is opgericht door Ing. Han van Vliet en Gert-Jan Koppelaar. Zij hebben elkaar ontmoet tijdens de deeltijd HBO studie scheepsbouw. 
Han heeft in het verleden zowel de MBO als de HBO studie werktuigbouw afgerond. Hij is hierna werkzaam geweest binnen bedrijven die zich bezig houden met de overslag van bulkgoederen.
Gert-Jan heeft inmiddels meer dan 10 jaar een binnenvaartonderneming en is al verschillende jaren bestuurslid van een ledengroep binnen BLN. Hierdoor heeft hij kennis van de actuele zaken die er spelen op gebied van vergroening digitalisering en regelgeving in de binnenvaart.
Door de praktische en theoretische kennis van elkaar te koppelen zijn we een sterk team wat uw vraagstukken kan oplossen.

Name: UniCoRp WLL
Description:
Unicorp W.L.L brings in a collective span of above 20 years in the area of Ship Building & Repair in the kingdom of Bahrain.. Headquartered out of Sitra Industrial Yard, the company caters to all kinds of repairs to small and mid-size ships of all ranges fromTugs, Platforms, Barges, Maintenance of Ship Internals and Dredgers. The process involves complete renewals of steel structures on the vessels. 

Equipped with a facility of over 8000 m2 inclusive of a 75m along side Berth Jetty in length and a span of 25m in width, a draft of approximately 6m to 9m, the jetty is equipped to cater to all ranges of small and mid size vessels. As of date, Unicorp WLL is officially categorized as a 'Port' in the Kingdom of Bahrain, as per the standardization of General Organization of Ports.

The Company In-house design, provides standard design projects as well as tailor made constructions to suit practical requirements for customers. All upgrades and repairs are engineered for maximum utility within customers time frame and budget. Vessel modifications and refits are handled with prompt attention as per norms of environmental and global concerns

The Company employs a workforce of over 150 personnels, specializing in trades such as Welders, Platers, Mechanics, Pipe Fitters, Draftsman, Fire & Safety officers. All of the above trade personnels are coded and certified by classification societies such as ABS, DNV & BVQ standards.

The Company caters its services to a large number of local, regional and international ship owners. Unicorp, WLL has successfully handled repairs of all sizes, ranging from Tugboats, Supply Vessels, Barges, multi sizes of Rigs & Offshore Rigs, LPG's & LNG's, Dredgers, Super tankers & Cargo vessels of 500,000 DWT & above. In addition, Unicorp, WLL is also an In-house Contractor at ASRY (Arab Ship Repair Yard) in the Kingdom of Bahrain.

As of date, Unicorp, WLL is certified as an ISO:9001:2008 company by Bureau Veritas.

Description:
shipbuilding commercial vessels

Sasebo Heavy Industries, located in the most western part of Japan, is one of Japan’s oldest shipyards. Established in 1889 as one of the shiprepair and shipbuilding yards of the Imperial Navy, it was given into civilian hands in 1946. Part of its well-known history is the delivery of the “Nissho Maru” in 1962, the world’s largest tanker to that time.

Today the company is active in both newbuilding and shiprepair, of both commercial and naval vessels. The main repair dock can accommodate ships up to 400,000 dwt.

Büyük mühendislik  projelerini hayata geçirmeye devam eden firmamız kurulduğundan itibaren Tuzla Tersaneler bölgesinde bir çok projeyi yürütmektedir.

Üstlendiği taahhütleri zamanında ve  beklenen kalite seviyelerinin üzerinde  tamamlayarak  sektöründe ciddi bir saygınlığa ulaşmaya hedefleyen Barça Yatçılık’ın bugünkü konumuna gelmesinde,  personelinin deneyim ve profesyonelliği ile yönetim kadrosunun geliştirmiş olduğu strateji ve  organizasyonel başarısı etkili olmuştur.

Barça Yatçılık tüm taahhüt ve yatırım projelerinde modern yönetim teknikleri kullanmayı, piyasada  kendini kanıtlamış, kalitesi belgelenmiş malzeme ve işçiliği tercih ederek projelerini zamanında  tamamlamayı temel politikası olarak benimsemektedir.

Description:
MariTeam Yachting is a full-service watersports company located in the north of the Netherlands. Positioned within the luxury motoryacht segment, MariTeam focuses on the sale and brokerage of trawlers and cruisers, especially the brands Grand Banks, Palm Beach, Selene and Breedendam.

MariTeam Yachting provides a complete range of services and support in the field of yacht management, all under one roof. We take care of everything from maintenance to finance and insurance, and everything in-between. This includes winter storage and valuations, as well as arranging the transport of your yacht anywhere within Europe (or even beyond). MariTeam helps you with all work and regulations related to your yacht, in a reliable and professional way. All that’s left for you to do is enjoy the sailing.

MariTeam Yachting is helmed by Albert Gerritsma and Gert van Barneveld. In addition to their work for MariTeam, Albert and Gert are exclusive yacht consultants for Grand Banks Yachts and Palm Beach Motor Yachts in Europe.

Name: System Electric Pty Ltd
Description:
System Electric was first incorporated in Western Australia in October 2002, and commenced business at the new Australian Marine complex in Henderson, twenty four kilometres south of Perth.

After just three successful years in Australia, System Electric ventured into Asia and successfully established an operation in Tuas, Singapore (System Electric (S) Pte Ltd) which was later followed in 2007 by an operation in Vung Tau, Vietnam (System Electric (VN) Co., Ltd).

From the early days of designing and installing electrical systems for Motor Yachts and Naval Patrol Craft, System Electric now provides a range of turnkey solutions that includes electrical design and drafting, electrical & instrumentation installation, electrical repairs / refits and maintenance and commissioning services to many of the vessel and rig operators throughout the Australasian Oil & Gas Market.

With a seasoned team of professionals supporting all its Oil & Gas activities, System Electric prides itself in delivering quality “competitively priced” services to all its customers in a timely fashion.

Name: Loukis Piping
Description:
Loukis Piping was established in 1981 and specializes in design, fabrication, and installation of piping networks in marine and industrial systems. 

During our interrupted operation since 1981, we have undertaken a broad range of applications; from typical day-to-day ship repairs, to demanding new buildings and retrofits resulting to invaluable experience of 40 years and technical knowledge. Our state-of-the-art equipment, our experienced personnel, and our standards for high quality and on-time delivery have gained the long-term trust of the largest companies in the Greek and International Shipping Industry. 

Our highly skilled personnel can design, fabricate, and install all piping systems of a vessel (Fuel Oil, Lubrication Oil, Sea Water, Fresh Water, Ballast Water Treatment Systems etc) using a wide variety of materials (Carbon Steel, Stainless Steel, Copper-Nickel, Copper, Aluminum, Aluminum Brass, Inconel, PE, PP, PVC).  Our workshop can perform pressure tests for the tightness of the spools we fabricate, using contemporary means, such as pumps and boosters and for pressure up to 300 bar. 

The high quality of our services is certified according to ISO 9001:2015.

His experience ranges with yachts from 30m to over 110m projects involving many different shipyards, designers and cultures.

Description:
e-Link Commuting's (or eLC’s) mission is to transform human and package mobility around major waterways using design, sustainable energy, and technology. eLC is united by its goal of building small-scale, fully electric, shuttle boats that can easily be deployed in major waterways around the world.

Our vision is to introduce a ferry/water taxi shuttle model that can easily be deployed in major waterways around the world by ensuring our vessel design meets major ship classifications and regulatory requirements. eLC has forged relationships with ferry/water taxi operators, suppliers and technology partners to ensure our solution can be functional in the respective economic locations targeted.

Name: Rosewest (Cape Cod)
Description:
Our philosophy :
Since its creation in 2004, the Rosewest shipyard has been deeply committed to combining exceptional expertise with the latest design and manufacturing techniques. 
Models such as the iconic Cape Cod 896 exemplify the “best of both worlds” fusion of craftsmanship and technology. Our single goal is to allow each of our boat owners to experience instant pleasure and unique sensations.

In 2022 Rosewest launches the Cape Cod 767, a sportier boat to invite your guests onto the trapeze. Whilst this most recent addition breaks away from the more classic boats produced by Rosewest, it can’t deny its DNA steeped in excellence and stunning finish.
The CC767 offers a fresh perspective on the performance and elegance of a day-boat or weekender and provides greater autonomy in transport, launching, etc.

We focus on producing excellence which is why we assemble only a handful of boats each year.
We always devote the time and resources necessary to ensure that each boat meets 100% of your expectations.

We don’t only build boats, we will build your boat!

Our team at the service of technology :
Over the years, Rosewest has been able to bring together a loyal team with a perfect mastery of the different technologies implemented on your boat.

We sail from classic to the most high-tech.  
We work closely with prestigious partners such as Harken, Spinlock, Selden, and Facnor, to ensure the highest quality fittings are used. Together, we keep abreast of the latest innovations and improvements.
At the shipyard in Bordeaux, our future customers come to configure their future boat on a virtual reality configurator, a unique experience before a sea trial on the Arcachon basin.

Today we are proud to work together, giving it our all!
Our challenge: is to offer you the most beautiful emotions aboard extraordinary boats.

Description:
UW VERTROUWDE, VAKKUNDIGE LEVERANCIER VAN TECHNISCHE PRODUCTEN

U vindt bij Lethe Handelmij Nieuwburg altijd het juiste product voor uw toepassing. Meestal uit voorraad, vrijwel altijd binnen 24 uur geleverd. Dankzij een inmiddels meer dan 110-jarige geschiedenis als specialist in technische producten voor scheepsbouw, baggerindustrie, offshore en on shore petrochemie, bouw en industrie vinden wij voor iedere toepassing de juiste oplossing.

Naast de levering van een ruim assortiment rubber en pakkingsmaterialen kunt u bij Lethe Handelmij Nieuwburg ook terecht voor het laten assembleren van hoge- en lagedrukslangen. Deze slangen worden door ons getest en voorzien van het vereiste certificaat.

EIGEN PRODUCTIE

U kunt altijd bij ons terecht voor maatwerk, onze werkplaatsen zijn ingericht met moderne flash cutters en stansmachines. Dankzij de aansturing door een AutoCAD tekenprogramma kunnen wij u gespecialiseerde ‘customized’ oplossingen bieden. Met onze eigen productie kunnen wij niet alleen maatwerk leveren maar ook snel en flexibel inspelen op uw wensen en behoeften.

We zijn ISO 9001-2008 gecertificeerd en u kunt dus rekenen op een constant hoog kwaliteitsniveau. 

Bel ons wanneer u snel uw producten nodig heeft, wij zijn 24/7 bereikbaar. 
Gebruik daarvoor onze servicelijn +31 0180-530530.

Description:
Vader Gerard en zoon Leffert zijn de drijvende krachten achter Scheepsbouw Kroes, Gerard vestigde de werf in 1978  in de Zwettehaven in Leeuwarden. Leffert groeide letterlijk op tussen de schepen in aanbouw. Gerard is de ontwerper en heeft de Spikersloep lijn ontworpen. Een ontwerp na jaren lange ervaringen met het nieuw -en verbouwen van klassieke schepen.

De Spiker 750, is gebouwd van alumium en sluit qua lijn en vormgeving aan op de kleinere modellen. De sloep is door het gebruik van alumium licht in gewicht en zeer solide. De 7.50 biedt veel ruimte en mogelijkheden. Zo beschikt deze sloep standaard over veel grote opbergruimtes, hydraulische besturing inclusief een stuurwiel en is er slaapgelegenheid voor 2 tot 4 personen. Het is mogelijk deze uit te breiden met een kooktoestel, spoelbak, dekdouche en/of chemisch toilet.

Name: Xplor Boatworks
Description:
Born from an idea for a film project out of a garage in Columbia, South Carolina, Xplor Boatworks was a thing before it was a thing. Owner, Frankie Marion, wanted to build a boat for a film project called the Xplor Project. He needed a skiff that would allow him to traverse across the vast Louisiana Delta unaided for an entire month. This skiff needed to have enough storage to carry gear for multiple people, be agile enough to get into the deepest pockets of the marsh and be built well enough to withstand everything the team would throw at it. The trip was not only a success in that Frankie was able to complete the film project, but also that the boat exceeded expectations. Upon returning to the dock, Frankie had several requests for boats, just like the one he had built for his expedition. Thus, Xplor Boatworks was born. 

Now, Xplor Boatworks is a team effort. Manufacturing three models of boats and continuing to grow as a boat building company, Xplor’s values remain the same. Our boats are built to the highest of standards and use innovative new technology. Being infused with a fully cored construction, our boats are truly built to GO ANYWHERE, GO EVERYWHERE. No detail is left unnoticed throughout the build process. We are continuously innovating and working with our owners to build boats that suit every need.

Name: MV MARINE S.R.L.
Description:
La Motonautica Vesuviana nasce nel 1994 dalla passione che il suo fondatore, l’ing. Vincenzo Nappo, nutre per il mare e per i battelli pneumatici. L’esperienza maturata in anni di navigazione e di pratica del campeggio nautico, diventano il trampolino di lancio per la concezione di un battello che racchiudesse in se le migliori risposte alle esigenze degli appassionati. Così nel 1998, fu progettato e realizzato il primo prototipo, l’MV 700 che fin da subito si distinse per funzionalità e per ottime doti di navigazione.

La filosofia aziendale perseguita dalla Motonautica Vesuviana, oggi Mv Marine, è stata, fin dall’inizio, la progettazione e la realizzazione dell’intero ciclo produttivo all’interno dell’azienda, spaziando dal progetto, ai modelli, agli stampi, ai manufatti in VTR, alle parti gommate, per finire con la tappezzeria. Ingegnerizzando da sempre i processi costruttivi, mantenendo alti gli standard qualitativi.

Questa filosofia ha consentito alla MV di acquisire un know how che spazia in più settori, dalla progettazione di carene CAD-CAM 3D ad elevati rendimenti, alla laminazione dei materiali compositi, realizzati in Infusione ed RTM, agli impianti etc.

Grazie al connubio di tutte queste conoscenze acquisite negli anni, l’ufficio tecnico della MV progetta e realizza battelli belli e funzionali, che possono pesare fino al 30% in meno della media, riducendo consumi ed emissioni, a vantaggio del costo di esercizio e dell’ambiente. Forti della passione, delle conoscenze acquisite e non meno dall’entusiasmo dei clienti, l’MV sta tracciando una nuova rotta nel modo di concepire il gommone del futuro.

Name: Minerva Náutica | UFRJ
Description:
A Minerva Náutica é a equipe de competição universitária de nautidesign da Escola Politécnica da UFRJ, fundada em 2014 por estudantes da graduação de Engenharia Naval e Oceânica. É dedicada ao projeto e à construção de nautimodelos, principalmente, rebocadores radiocontrolados em escala reduzida, e busca promover uma integração entre as áreas robótica e naval, desenvolvendo suas atividades no LabOceano, um dos maiores laboratórios de hidrodinâmica do mundo. Em 2016 foi campeã do Desafio Universitário De Nautidesign (DUNA) e, em 2017, a primeira equipe de competição da América Latina a participar da International Robotc Sailing Regatta (SailBot), conquistando a quinta colocação geral com o veleiro autônomo Glória.

Objetivos: criar um espaço que funcione como ponte entre o conhecimento teórico adquirido em sala de aula e a realidade prática de trabalho em projetos de engenharia para os estudantes de graduação envolvidos nele; desenvolver e testar novas tecnologias em associação com o laboratório de tecnologia oceânica. 


A equipe é dividida em quatro áreas – Naval, Eletrônica, Mecânica e Gestão. A Naval é responsável pelo projeto da embarcação, sistema propulsivo e desenvolvimento do modelo de casco. A Mecânica é responsável por toda parte de projeto e construção das peças relacionadas à transmissão de movimento dos motores para os propulsores. A Eletrônica é responsável pelo desenvolvimento de sistema de proteção para o circuito dos motores, configuração dos ESCs, montagem e isolamento do sistema elétrico das embarcações, configuração dos controles e inovações elétricas ou eletrônicas para projetos futuros. E a área de Gestão é subdividida em outras três: Financeiro, Logística e Marketing.

Name: KATTUM YACHTS
Description:
Kattum Yachts fue fundada ,a finales de 2022, por tres jóvenes de la Región de Murcia apasionados por el mar. 

Kattum Yachts se creó para darle un nuevo enfoque a las embarcaciones de recreo tipo catamarán con propulsión fueraborda. Este concepto de embarcación, es un concepto muy poco extendido, y que ofrece al usuario una capacidad de cubierta muy superior a las embarcaciones monocasco y una estabilidad superior. 

En Kattum primamos el exterior al interior. Este aumento de capacidad de cubierta y estabilidad, provocan que nuestras embarcaciones sean mucho más adecuadas para el uso de las mismas para el disfrute de día que las embarcaciones monocasco. 

Tenemos dos modelos de catamaranes el K28 y el K38.

* K28:
Es una embarcación tipo catamarán fueraborda con unas dimensiones de 7,98 metros de eslora de casco, por lo que es una embarcación que no tiene que pagar el impuesto de matriculación y 9,10 metros de eslora total. En cuanto a la manga, dispone de 3,4 metros de manga, lo que le permite ocupar el mismo amarre que una embarcación de sus medidas del tipo monocasco.
 
Esta embarcación dispone de una amplia cubierta preparada para el disfrute de día. En su proa encontramos un amplio solárium y en la zona de popa una zona de asientos con mesa tambien convertible en solárium.
 
Los pasillo laterales se caracterizan por su amplitud y dispone de un pequeño aseo en el interior de la consola.
 
La embarcación está preparada para instalar motores desde una pareja de 150 CV hasta una pareja de 300 CV.

*K38:
Esta embarcación mantiene el concepto del K28 pero con ciertos matices debido a la diferencia en sus dimensiones. Esta embarcación, cuenta con una eslora total de 11,10 metros y una manga de 4,25m.
 
Es una embarcación de recreo con carácter deportivo ideal para sacarle el máximo partido gracias a su amplia bañera totalmente aprovechada en su exterior con espacios modulares y en el interior con dos camarotes y dos aseos totalmente independientes.

Onze Missie

Een systeem dat is gebaseerd op vele jaren uitzendervaring en dat continue wordt getest en aangepast aan nieuwe ontwikkelingen. Wij doen onze uiterste best om een optimale samenwerking voor alle partijen te realiseren.

U kunt op ons rekenen als een partij en/of zakenpartner die haar verantwoordelijkheid neemt.  Wij zijn een organisatie met oog voor maatschappelijk verantwoord ondernemen, daar liggen onze ambities.

Mocht u verdere informatie van Port Montage B.V. willen hebben , dan nodigen wij u graag uit om met ons contact op te nemen,  bij ons op bezoek te komen of op termijn een van onze presentaties te bezoeken.
Bij die gelegenheden kunnen wij u zoveel mogelijk niet alleen over ons bedrijf, maar ook over onze uitzendkrachten en onze manier van werken vertellen.

Als u verdere vragen heeft kunt u via de website contact met ons opnemen.

Name: Novurania of America, Inc.
Description:
Novurania has been bringing pioneering ideas to the water for over sixty years through innovative concepts, sophisticated styling, unsurpassed quality, and proven engineering designs. 

With beginnings in the mid-1950’s, Novurania began as a rubber-coated fabric company, manufacturing inflatable products for Italian armed forces. This innovation quickly became valuable in the inflatable boat market as a high-quality alternative to traditional PVC-tubed inflatable boats. 
In 1989, as Novurania of America, Inc., the company built its first fiberglass hull in the USA and rapidly gained attention as a first-class producer of reliable tenders in the yachting industry. 

Novurania has since built its impeccable reputation by hand-building one vessel at a time to the precise specifications of highly discerning clientele. 
As the leading manufacturer of luxury yacht tenders, innovation is apparent in every model of our comprehensive line of boats. Leading the industry through innovation has always been paramount at Novurania.
We have a passion for detail in the boats we produce and know that this is a passion appreciated by our knowledgeable and sophisticated owners. 

As a vertically integrated company, we design, manufacture, and assemble each boat individually while ensuring integration of only the highest quality materials and building processes. We continue to innovate, traveling worldwide for smart design ideas, and progressive state-of-the-art equipment to keep Novurania at the leading edge of engineering and design.

It is this spirit that makes Novurania the most sought-after luxury tender manufacturing company in the industry today. We do not just build a boat. We live them, build them, test them, improve them, and we do this continuously – day after day. 
It is not just about building boats, it is what we love to do. Because of this, Novurania will always be the Superior Choice.

Name: HAPPY SHIPYARD S.A
Description:
Happy Shipyard S.A. is a premier shipbuilding and repair company offering comprehensive technical services to the maritime industry. With a team of highly skilled professionals, we are committed to delivering exceptional ship repair, maintenance, and management solutions that keep vessels operating efficiently and safely.

Our core values of excellence, innovation, and reliability have helped us become a trusted partner for shipowners and operators worldwide.

Our Services:
Technical Management:
We provide expert management of vessels, including maintenance planning, performance optimization, and compliance with international maritime standards.

Ship Repair & Maintenance:
Our services cover a wide range of repairs, from steel and hatch cover systems to mechanical and electrical overhauls. Whether it's diesel generators (DG), marine engines (ME), coolers, pumps, compressors, or turbines, our team ensures fast, efficient, and high-quality repairs.

Dry-Docking:
Specializing in dry-docking services, we offer some of the fastest and most affordable solutions in Turkey. We understand the importance of minimizing downtime, and our experienced team works tirelessly to ensure vessels are back in service quickly.

ISM Compliance & Surveys:
We assist with Class-Flag-P&I surveys and ensure full ISM compliance, helping our clients maintain the highest standards of safety and operational efficiency. We also prepare vessels for Port State Control (PSC) inspections across key regions, ensuring smooth operations.

At Happy Shipyard S.A., we are dedicated to supporting the maritime industry with expert repair, technical assistance, and proactive management solutions. Our goal is to provide cost-effective, high-quality services that exceed our clients' expectations.

Varatti Boats is the towboat division of Floe Craft, part of Floe International, Inc., a Minnesota manufacturer founded in 1983. Floe International operates four facilities in Hoyt Lakes, McGregor, and Cambridge, with nearly 400,000 square feet of production capacity dedicated to boats, trailers, and shoreline recreational products.

The Varatti team is based in Cambridge, Minnesota, in a 150,000-square-foot facility where engineers, technicians, and craftsmen design and build every boat. Our workforce reflects Minnesota’s strong lake culture and reputation for precision manufacturing.

Our passion to invent a better way drives everything we do so you can have a more enjoyable and rewarding experience.

We are a company built on continuous improvement, lean manufacturing, and an uncompromising commitment to quality. Every stage of production is designed for consistency and accountability, from vacuum infusion composites to automated manufacturing systems. This approach has produced decades of product innovation and a patent portfolio that reinforces our role as a design-driven manufacturer.

Varatti Boats is an ABYC standardized, NMMA certified builder. Safety, compliance, and long-term reliability are at the core of our operations. As part of Floe International, we share resources and expertise with a company that has set industry standards in docks, lifts, trailers, and marine innovation for more than four decades.

Providing products that make life easier and more enjoyable.

Name: dTHOR
Description:
The project “Digital Ship Structural Health Monitoring” (dTHOR) will develop a system based on innovative utilization of large amounts of load and response measurements from robust and advanced sensors, a digital framework complying with recognised open standards for data exchange, and hybrid analysis and modeling which combines physics-based and data-driven models. dTHOR will consolidate end-users' military operational requirements based on improved battle damage and structural integrity assessment, reduced hydro-acoustic signatures, and more accurate operation of weapon systems.

This consortium coordinated by SINTEF is composed of 34 other partners from 11 countries: 
 Norway: Jotne, Light Structures, SINTEF Ocean
 Belgium: SEA Europe
 France: Naval Group, Commissiariat à l'Energie Atomique et aux Energies Alternatives, Ecole Nationale Supérieure d'Arts et Métiers, Safran, Sirehna, Testia

 Greece: ISD, Ethnicon Metsovion Polytechnion, Ethniko Kai Kapodistriako Panepistimio Athinon, Ethniko Kentro Erevnas Kai Technologikis Anaptyxis, HERON, Intracom Defense AE, Panepistimio Patron
 Italy: CETENA, Consiglio Nazionale delle Ricerche, Politechnico di Milano
 Netherlands: MARIN, DAMEN, Ministry of Defense, RNL Aerospace, TU Delft

Name: VFA Land & Sea
Description:
VFA Land and Sea BV is a sister company of VFA Solutions BV and was established to provide sales and engineering services for specialised market segments such as the super yacht industry and luxury residences.

Our mission is to provide clean air solutions to these markets and the idea was established in 2018 when Will Faimatea and Patrick Voorn discovered that most (Heating Ventilation Air Conditions) HVAC system specifications focused only on temperature and lacked any specifics on air quality. “When Patrick and I looked further into the HVAC sector in 2018 we felt that clean air solutions would benefit all people”  says Will Faimatea. Together with the VFA Solutions founder Eliane Khoury,  VFA Land and Sea was borne in 2019 to provide clean air to luxury marine and residential markets.

Since COVID-19 the VFA products have been highly sought after for greatly improving air quality. The products have been supported by The Prince of The Netherlands and awarded a grant to help reduce the spread of Covid-19. This includes fine dust particles as well as pathogens ( virus, bacteria, fungi, protozoa ). Exposure to Fine Dust can have detrimental health effects and has been known to lead to coughing, chest tightness, shortness of breath, irritation of the eyes/nose/throat, and can trigger asthma, bronchitis, and other respiratory problems. Scientific studies have also linked exposure to an increased risk for heart attack, stroke, certain cancers, and birth defects.

Fine dust is especially dangerous for people with heart and lung diseases, older adults, and children, but it has also been proven to affect healthy people. So it’s more than just filtering bacteria and viruses.

Name: GANZ Danubius Group
Description:
The Ganz Danubius Shipyard is the heritage of the Hungarian shipbuilding tradition, associated with the establishment of the first shipyard in Hungary in 1835 on the island of Óbuda, as one of the greatest accomplishments of Count Széchényi István in introducing shipbuilding industry and promoting safe and regulated fluvial transportation on the River Danube. The achievements of the Óbuda Shipyard, and the succeeding Shipyards and Factories, soon developed to become one of the major forefronts of the European Engineering, Fluvial and Marine Shipbuilding, and Industrial Technology. During almost two centuries, a wide range of fluvial and marine ship vessels were designed and built by Ganz Danubius representing the recognized Hungarian innovation, quality and reliability on the international market. Thousands of these ships were delivered to the Soviet Union, Central & Eastern Europe, Africa, Middle East, South America and Asia. Hundreds of portal and floating cranes are still operating and in service to the satisfaction of the owners, operators and crew. 
The Hungarian state-owned Ganz Danubius Shipyards and Crane Factory was succeeded by the private-owned Ganz Danubius Group in 1995 dedicated to offer professional ships and special purpose vessels for clients, while maintaining the values of Hungarian shipbuilding tradition.   
Activities and Services:
1. Engineering: Design, technical documentation, approval and field engineering
2. Turn-key new-building projects: Ships, Floating Cranes, Portal Cranes, Port Wharf Cranes, Ship Un-loaders, Container Cranes for Ports and Railways, Special Shipyard Heavy Duty Cranes, Floating Excavators, Pushers, Dredgers, Barges, Split Hopper Barges, Special Purpose Vessels and Steel Structures. Ganz Danubius experts manage the project from concept plans to commissioning.
3. After sales support, Spare Parts and Components
4. Repair, Modernization and Conversion of Floating and Portal Cranes, and Ships

Name: 3mar
Description:
3mar developes and produces efficient, compact, reliable shore charging connection and automooring solutions to support the maritime industry to transfer towards environmentally sustainable future. The company was established in 2020 when automatic charging connection device business was demerged from Mobimar Ltd into a separate independent entity.

Our charging connecting device Nector is designed to be installed on the side of the loading ramp automatically adjusting to the water level variations. No need for vertical compensation makes the device very simple and compact. It does not require heavy foundation which reduces the civil works,  often a big expense and at the responsibility of the community, to a fraction.

Our automooring solution is designed to be located on the vessel side and is based instead of vacuum suction technology on permanent magnets that can be turned on and off. Being onboard it does not require communication between the vessel and the shore side and the counterpart on the shore side is just a steelplate leaving the whole pier a free for other use. Because of permanent magnet technology it does not need energy to maintain the holding force.

(DSEL) is a sister concern of Prantik Group (www.prantik.net) which was established in 1998 with a primary aim to perform ship repair, salvage operation, ship survey, underwater survey, load test, NDT test etc. Later in May 2008, the company entered in shipbuilding by forming a new company naming DESH Shipbuilding & Engineering Ltd. to cater the booming international & local market demand. For the last two years the company was engaged in infrastructure development and by this time it is ready with two weather proof production sheds and latest state of the art equipments. The shipyard is now completely ready to build Aluminum ship of any size, which includes pilot vessel, offshore supply vessel, pleasure boat, cruise ship, patrol boat, ambulance ship and others within stipulated timeframe at the lowest cost.
Where speed and economy is the prime aim of the shippers across the globe DSEL is pioneering in this sector in Bangladesh as there is no other company engaged in building such specialized ships. 
The shipyard has  the PQR (procedure qualification record) approved from  Bureau Veritus (France) to follow the ASME (American Society of Mechanical Engineers) code and AWS (American Welding Society) code, which will ensure a quality work of highest Ship Building Standard. 
It is to be mentioned here that Prantik was the Pioneer in Bangladesh in building first Ocean Going Vessel, namely Barge PRANTIK under class Germanischer Lloyd in 2002.

Name: Rostock Ship Machinery Conference
Description:
Through its compact, carefully selected program, the conference conveys the latest knowledge on the development, manufacture and operation of ship machinery systems.

Leading shipping companies, renowned manufacturers and service providers, insurance company and classification societies will inform you about:

    > political framework conditions
    > challenges from the perspective of shipowners
    > new ship and system developments
    > alternative propulsion systems
    > CO2-free & CO2-neutral fuels
    > efficient, safe and environmentally friendly ship engine systems
    > retrofitting, as a sustainable way to decarbonisation in shipping
    > heavy damage and its prevention

The conference is organised in cooperation between MET GmbH, Fraunhofer IGP and FVTR GmbH.

Name: BDR Ship Repair
Description:
BDR Ship Repair is a Turkey-based marine engineering and service company, providing reliable onboard repair, maintenance, and inspection solutions to vessels in port, at anchorage, and even while underway. Strategically located in Istanbul, we operate extensively in key maritime zones such as Tuzla, Yalova, Çanakkale, Ambarlı, and Zeyport, with the capability to mobilize internationally through our certified and travel-ready technical teams.

Our services cover a wide range of shipboard operations including engine room and deck machinery repairs, pipe fabrication and renewal, steel construction and welding, hydraulic system maintenance, bow thruster and propulsion repairs, and LSA/FFE inspections and certifications. We also offer SOLAS and IMO compliance services, tank and cargo hold cleaning, and voyage repairs — ensuring operational continuity under all circumstances.

What sets us apart is our team: highly trained professionals holding valid STCW certificates, Seaman Books, and international passports. This allows us to respond swiftly and effectively not only in Turkish ports but also to vessels operating offshore or in foreign harbors. All works are performed in line with international class society standards and maritime safety regulations.

At BDR Ship Repair, our priority is to ensure safety, minimize vessel downtime, and provide transparent, timely service. We approach every project with operational precision, delivering consistent quality with a strong focus on long-term reliability. We don’t just offer technical assistance — we build lasting partnerships based on trust, expertise, and performance.

Driven by our motto “Trusted Repairs, Wherever You Sail”, we are proud to support vessels worldwide with dependable solutions and dedicated service.

Name: STAL Complex Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Firma STAL Complex rozpoczęła działalność w 2005 roku na terenie Stoczni Wojennej w Gdyni. Dzięki bezpośredniemu dostępowi do morza, od ponad 18 lat dostarcza produkty ze stali i aluminium.
Głównym obszarem działalności przedsiębiorstwa jest produkcja autonomicznych, w pełni wyposażonych jednostek do obsługi farm rybnych. Obecnie STAL Complex może pochwalić się zrealizowaniem 104 barek oraz 19 katamaranów, które są wykorzystywane do obsługi farm rybnych.
Wśród oferowanych usług znajdują się także:
•	przebudowa i modyfikacja jednostek pływających dla potrzeb armatorów,
•	naprawy i remonty (zgodnie z technologią wskazaną przez klienta i inspektora klasyfikacyjnego),
•	przeróbki kontenerów (do wymagań klienta, np. przemysłowe z agregatami i kompresorami, a także socjalne),
•	produkcja wszelkiego rodzaju konstrukcji stalowych i aluminiowych.
Spawacze zatrudnieni w STAL Complex posiadają certyfikaty potwierdzające ich kwalifikacje w metodach 141, 136, 138, 131 i 121. Posiadamy duże doświadczenie i własne procedury spawalnicze dla połączeń spawanych w zakresie: 
- dla aluminium – 3-40mm,
- dla stali – 3-80mm.
Nasze produkty cechują się wysoką jakością, potwierdzoną licznymi certyfikatami:
•	PN-EN ISO 9712 NDT (VT, PT, MT),
•	WPS/WPQT (FCAW/DNV/2009),
•	BS OHSAS 18001:2007,
•	AAA Bisonde,
•	PN-EN 1090 (ZKP dla elementów konstrukcyjnych ze stali i aluminium na poziomach EXC1, EXC2 i EXC3).
Spółka posiada również koncesję MSWiA na obsługę jednostek wojskowych, co jest kolejnym dowodem na nasze wysokie standardy w zakresie bezpieczeństwa i jakości świadczonych usług.
Nasz zespół składa się z wykwalifikowanych specjalistów, którzy gwarantują najwyższą jakość wykonywanych usług. Chętnie podejmujemy się nowych wyzwań, co pozwala na ciągły rozwój i doskonalenie się w dziedzinie okrętownictwa.
Zachęcamy potencjalnych kontrahentów do zapoznania się z naszą ofertą na stronie internetowej (https://www.stalcomplex.pl/pl/) oraz bezpośredniego kontaktu z nami (biuro@stalcomplex.pl).

Name: Breman Shipping Installation
Description:
Shipping installation, in the widest sense of the word, is what Breman Shipping Installation B.V. from Genemuiden is all about. With 29 permanent employees we specialize in the installation of Heating, Ventilation, Aircosystems, Refrigeration, Sanitary Systems and engineering on board of all kinds of ships. The business was founded in 1964 by Mr. Tiem Breman; in the seventies he took over an installation company that had a permanent customer in shipyard Peters. That is how the contact with shipping arose.

In 2005, Mr. Breman’s son, Mr. Harold Breman took over the company. Since then he has been in charge of the day-to-day business. Over the years, the company has developed more and more and continually expanded the range of products and services, in order to serve the current - and potential - customers every time with the required professionalism.

Name: Rapido Trimarans
Description:
Rapido aims to build the best ocean cruising trimarans in the world.

The concept behind the Rapido Trimaran was developed by owners Paul Koch and Richard Eyre. 

World class multihull designers, Morelli & Melvin then did the detailed design before the Rapido went into production under a highly experienced team that had built more than1,500 trimarans between them.

Trimarans are safe, powerful and fun.

Trimarans enable you to discover places that others simply cannot reach. WIth retractable daggerboards and rudders, the draft of the Rapido 60 is reduced to just 0.75m (30") allowing easy access to super shallow waters, especially around islands.

On each side of the Rapido 60 are spacious nets measuring 6.3m (20') x 3m (9') which provide an enormous space to play or lounge upon when the fish are not biting.

In terms of safety, even in the storms of the southern oceans, trimarans are safe, easy to handle and faster on all points of sail due to their wide beam and light weight. In 2008, for example, Francis Joyon on "IDEC SPORT" was the first person to sail solo on a trimaran, non-stop, around the world. Joyon took just 57 days - 21 days faster than the fastest monohull. The current trimaran record is 40 days.
Location: Nha Be District, Ho Chi Minh City

Name: NODE
Description:
NODE is a multidisciplinary student team from the Institute for Advanced Architecture of Catalonia (IAAC), founded by ex-IAAC faculty Marita Georganta as a means to encourage architecture students to apply their creativity in engineering. With backgrounds in architecture, design, and engineering, we explore the intersection of digital fabrication, marine autonomy, and robotic systems. 

NODE's first project is ASKET, an autonomous surface vessel (ASV), participating in the Njord 2025 Autonomous Ship Championship. ASKET features a custom 3D-printed hull, real-time sensor fusion, and adaptive robotic control. While rooted in architecture, our team is driven by the belief that anyone can build advanced technology when tools, knowledge, and resources are openly shared.

We’re making every part of our process open-source—from design files to software—to enable learning, experimentation, and collaboration across disciplines. This project is for students, educators, makers, and resourceful teams with big ideas and limited means—anyone ready to dive into autonomy and proudly say: “I built that.”

Name: GeMaX - German Maritime Export Initiative
Description:
Put your project on a solid base

Ship newbuilding, retrofitting, conversion or offshore projects all have one thing in common: Apart from a convincing concept and design they require a solid long-term financing solution that is consistent with market conditions and a good fit for the project. A successful design, on the other hand, depends on reliable equipment and components which guarantee safe and efficient operation.

German financing and German equipment meet these challenges.

To bring these two key elements together, a strong group of prominent German marine equipment suppliers and the German KFW-IPEX bank have teamed up to form the German Maritime EXport Initiative, or GeMaX, which provides a platform for both, maritime equipment and equipment-based project financing.

“Powered by VSM” means that a project team within VSM, the German Shipbuilding and Ocean Industries Association (Verband für Schiffbau und Meerestechnik), is actively developing opportunities for shipbuilding and offshore projects, coordinating projects and assisting international contractors in sourcing equipment and financing.

German content MaXimisation will allow you as a contractor to benefit from reliable equipment and a solid, custom-tailored financing solution.
Max your volume of German products & services
to get better project financing terms

Ensar Gemi ve Yan Sanayi Anonim Şirketi, gemilerde kullanılmakta olan yangına dayanıklı panel, kapı, ıslak kabin ile bu ürünlerin aksesuarlarını üretmektedir.

Müşteri talep ve beklentilerini en iyi şekilde karşılamak, kaliteyi sürekli arttırmak, vaktinde ürün teslimi ve bunların sürekliliği, Ensar'ın ilkelerindendir.

1983 yılında Özkan GÖKSAL tarafından kurulan Ensar, 12 yıl boyunca gemi inşaatı ve donatımı alanında taahhüt işleri yapmıştır.

1995 yılında, Türkiye’de bir ilk olarak, yangına dayanıklı panel ve kapı üretimine başlamış, süreç içerisinde ürün kalitesini arttırarak piyasanın güvenini kazanmış, pazar payını arttırmıştır.

Ensar ürünleri, uluslararası akredite olan bir laboratuarda test edilmiş ve uluslararası belgelendirme kuruluşları tarafından onaylanarak sertifikalandırmıştır. Ürünler, AB’ye uygunluk belgelerine (EC) de sahiptir.

Ensar,  yılda 9.000 adet kapı, 360.000 m2 panel, 2.400 adet ıslak kabin üretebilecek kapasitededir.

Bugüne kadar yüzlerce gemi, Ensar’ın panel, kapı ve kabinleriyle donatılmıştır. Bu gemiler içinde, her türlü yolcu gemileri, yatlar, yük gemileri, römorkörler ve askeri gemiler vardır. Ayrıca, Ensar’ın geniş referans listesinde off shore platformları da yer almaktadır.

Müşteri memnuniyetini ilke edinen Ensar, bu alandaki hassasiyetini ISO 9001 Kalite Yönetim Sistemi ile çalışarak pekiştirmektedir.

The quality of fabricated items is checked by certified experts highly proficient in 3-D inspection and measurements with the use of electronic equipment.
 
Loksa Shipyard Ltd. has its own laboratory for X-ray, ultrasonic and magnetic powder inspection. Loksa Shipyard Ltd. products meet the highest international standards in shipbuilding. We have the Certificate of Quality confirmed by Lloyd’s Register, ISO 9001-2000. All our welders have ABS and Germanicher Lloyd certificates

Name: Naval Technology Bulgaria EOOD
Description:
Naval Technology Bulgaria is a subsidiary of NVL. 

NVL stands for Naval Vessels Lürssen and is an independent, privately owned group of renowned northern German shipyards and related companies, formerly known as Lürssen Defence.

The group is headquartered in Bremen, Germany, and has a strong heritage. Together, the shipyards of NVL Group have completed more than 1,000 naval and coastguard vessels since their beginnings in the late 1870s, and have built and repaired ships for both the German Navy and fleets in over 50 countries. In addition to designing and manufacturing naval vessels and coastguard vessels, NVL Group also provides extensive lifetime support through NVL Services. NVL Group's reputation for high quality stems from long-standing shipbuilding expertise, outstanding engineering skills, a carefully selected supplier network and the commitment devoted to each and every ship.

In July 2021, NVL’s predecessor Lürssen founded the subsidiary Naval Technology Bulgaria for engineering in Bulgaria. The company operates from the port city of Varna, directly on the Black Sea. 

We take pride in our strong heritage and continuously strive to remain pioneers of innovative solutions while combining high quality and affordability. In June 2022, the Quality Management System of Naval Technology Bulgaria was certified by ISO 9001:2015.

Name: CUL-Masten
Description:
Hersteller von einzigartigen Carbonmasten für Regatta- und Freizeitsegler.

Carbon Ultra Light Masten
Beste Segelbedingungen, das perfekte Boot: Was könnte das Freizeitvergnügen noch weiter steigern? High-Tech-Ausrüstung aus bestmöglichem Material.

CUL-Masten aus der Oberbayerischen Stadt Weilheim ist der zuverlässige Partner bei der Verwirklichung besonderer Seglerträume. CUL-Masten fertigt High-Tech-Masten, Großbäume, Spinnakerbäume und Gennakerbäume aus Carbon. Dabei sind oft individuelle Lösungen gefragt. Vor allem in diesem Fall ist CUL-Masten der richtige Ansprechpartner: Die Produktion ist maßgeschneidert und somit wird jedes Teil auf das einzelne Boot und auf die gegebenen Anforderungen angepasst.

Eigene Formen – Eigene Ideen
Ein Mast aus Carbon, der von CUL-Masten hergestellt wurde, hat ein besonderes Erkennungsmerkmal. CUL-Masten werden mit integrierter Göhl (Mastnut) gefertigt. Diese wird während des Formenprozesses nahtlos eingearbeitet und erhöht damit die Festigkeit des Carbonmasts deutlich.

Darüber hinaus legt CUL-Masten besonderen Wert auf Individualität, Leichtigkeit bei allen Anbauteilen und Bedienungsfreundlichkeit.

Carbon – Eine kleine Entscheidungshilfe
Haben Sie gewusst, wie das Material Carbon die Leistung Ihres Bootes verändert?
Es verleiht dem Mast deutlich bessere dynamische Eigenschaften. Praktisch zeigt sich ein besserer Vortrieb durch die höhere Steifigkeit und vor allem das schnelle Rückstellverhalten. Das Stampfen in der Welle wird reduziert und das Boot lässt sich mit dem Carbonmast wunderbar weich segeln. Der Mast erzeugt durch sein geringeres Gewicht ein wesentlich höheres aufrichtendes Moment. Es ergibt sich ein unvergleichliches Segelgefühl!

CUL-Masten bietet mehr
Die Produktpalette beschränkt sich nicht nur auf Masten und Bäume. Auch zukunftsweisendes stehendes Gut aus synthetischer Faser, wie Carbon, Dyneema, Vectran oder PBO, sowie konventionelles aus Draht und Rod bietet CUL-Masten an.

Name: PROUD TO BE A MARINER
Description:
We Mariners are proud of our profession and it’s time for the world to be proud of us!
- Marex Media

Today’s Mariner moves the world. Energy, oil, steel, grain, garments, fabricated or finished products; nearly every manner of goods that make up our everyday lives have, before reaching us, invariably seen some part of their journey on a ship, operated by Mariners. 

In the course of his duties, the contemporary Mariner braves nature’s challenges whilst using cutting edge technology to reach his destination, carrying goods and life’s goodness to serve mankind.

A Mariner is a highly skilled and capable person who performs multiple tasks under a scarcity of resources and extreme pressure, managing assets worth millions of dollars. At a young age a Mariner shoulders more responsibility than the CEO’s of most companies.

Naturally, the Mariner’s emoluments today are impressive. Their salaries are amongst those of the highest-paid professionals.
All in all, the Mariner works to provide our modern civilization with the most economical form of transportation and at the least amount of harm to the environment. It is these highly qualified individuals who are responsible for transporting 90% of the goods that the common man uses in his daily life, unaware of the Mariner’s role in the supply chain.
We need to be proud of our Mariners who perform a laudable feat by any stretch!

Name: Super Yacht Pit Stop Pte Ltd
Description:
Super Yacht Pit Stop was formed to fill a gap in Super Yacht refit services in South East Asia. The team of experienced individuals from Europe, America and Australia have come together to bring their white boat knowledge and expertise to an already established commercial shipbuilding hub. Currently operating in Batam, Indonesia which is 45 mins by ferry from Singapore. 

SYPS' first project is underway. The extensive refit of the magnificent 40.3 meter (132 foot) Super Yacht 'Opal C' which was built by Oceanfast (Austal) in Fremantle, Western Australia and designed by the famous Jon Bannenberg and engineered by Phil Curran. Sam Sorgiovanni of Sorgiovanni Designs, who worked on the initial design of Opal C during his time at Oceanfast has been commissioned to update the interior and exterior design and styling of Opal C. She will be ready for charter in late 2018 and available for corporate charter, sunset cruises, weddings, weekend and extended charters. 

Charter Details:
Opal C’s  luxury accommodation can sleep 12 guests, 1 master suite, 2 VIP suites, 2 double suites (two of these can be converted to twin or triple accommodation) all with en suite bathrooms. Her rotating dining table allows guests to dine indoors in air conditioned comfort and as the day cools, with a flick of a button, you can be dining alfresco. Relax in one of the many outdoor areas, cool off in the jacuzzi and enjoy adventures a plenty with 2 quad ski’s, sea bobs and numerous other toys. Be transported ashore by Sealegs which will take you from the boat to the beach without getting your feet wet. Under the command of Captain Fanch David, your every need will be taken care of.

Don’t miss this opportunity to register your expression of interest in refit, new build or charter services with Super Yacht Pit Stop.

Name: Bass Products (Closed)
Description:
***CLOSED Bass Products is no longer operating as of 2018*** Bass was founded in 1970 as a retail mail order company specializing in marine lighting. In 1978, we entered the electrical panel business with a high-grade line of aluminum panels featuring a sleeker look, as well as advanced graphics and engineering. As we took a step back in the 1980’s, we realized we should focus on our strengths. We then phased out marine lighting and focused our efforts solely on electrical panels for power distribution on boats and specialty vehicles. This change of focus helped us put forth a series of innovations in panel category. But even with those innovations, there was room to grow.

In 2001, Bass Products became a subsidiary of Plainville Electrical Products, Co. (PEPCO) and moved to PEPCO’s 40,000-sq-ft manufacturing facility in Bristol, CT. PEPCO, a premier designer and manufacturer of electrical switchboards for military and industrial applications, instantly elevated Bass’ technical capabilities.
Attention-----As of 2018 Bass products has closed and is no longer in operation. Thank you to all our customers over the years. 

Today we are a full-service engineering and manufacturing firm that offers complete electrical solutions for any boat – from a 20’ day sailor to a Virginia Class submarine, and everything in between. Our team of strategic thinkers and engineers stands ready to bring any vision to life.

Name: Verband der Sportboot- und Schiffbau-Sachverständigen e.V.
Description:
Der VBS e.V. ist ein eigenständiger Verband von anerkannten Boots- und Schiffbausachverständigen, die größtenteils in Deutschland, zum Teil aber auch im Ausland ansässig sind. Die Mitglieder des VBS sind durch den Verband anerkannte Sachverständige, die ein Aufnahmeverfahren durchlaufen haben, das definierte Qualitätskriterien, wie z. B. eine fundierte Berufsausbildung und umfangreiche Sachkenntnisse zugrunde legt. Viele unserer Sachverständigen sind zudem nach ISO 17024 zertifiziert und/oder öffentlich bestellt und vereidigt. Der VBS Verhaltenskodex, an dem sich unsere Mitglieder orientieren, entspricht internationalen Maßstäben.

Über den VBS können Kunden auf ein flächendeckendes Netz an qualifizierten und unabhängigen Sachverständigen zurückzugreifen, die ihre langjährige Erfahrung auf verschiedenen Gebieten für Sportboote, Motorboote, Yachten und Schiffbau anbieten. Die Organisation besteht aus rund 40 Sachverständigen, die ihre Sachkunde vorab nachweisen müssen und die es sich zum Ziel gemacht haben, diese kontinuierlich durch Fortbildungsmaßnahmen zu pflegen und zu erweitern.

Der VBS e.V. ist eine Fachvereinigung innerhalb des Bundesverbandes Wassersportwirtschaft e.V.

Nous comprenons que tout dommage à un navire est gênant. C’est pourquoi le chantier naval Sous Massa veille à ce que les clients bénéficient d’un service rapide, sûr et fiable. Qu’il s’agisse d’un dommage causé par une collision, un incendie ou à cause d’un équipement défectueux, nous avons l’expérience et les connaissances nécessaires pour le réparer.

Nous avons travaillé avec plusieurs sociétés de certification, de nombreux souscripteurs et compagnies d’assurance. Et nos ressources humaines sont composées d’ingénieurs et de techniciens hautement qualifiés pour assurer une qualité irréprochable.

Nous sommes fiers d’être un leader et une avant-garde du mouvement vert dont nos clients bénéficient régulièrement. Ces efforts sont menés par nos ingénieurs et professionnels du secteur qui intègre la durabilité dans la conception, la construction et l’exploitation des structures et des équipements. Avec un personnel hautement qualifié, un parc d’outils et de machines bien équipé, nous veillons à ce que les clients bénéficient d’un service rapide et fiable afin qu’ils puissent se mettre en route le plus rapidement possible.

ONDERHOUD  |  REPARATIE  |  STALLING  |  VERKOOP |  ACCESSOIRES

ONDERHOUD EN REPARATIE
Voor onderhoud en reparatie aan uw polyester of stalen boot, diesel scheepsmotor en allerhande buitenboordmotoren kunt u rekenen op ervaring en deskundigheid van Provoost Maritiem. Wij zijn specialist in onderhoud en reparatie van boten en motoren.

Onze kennis en werkzaamheden lopen uiteen van pleziervaart tot beroepsvaart. Ook op het gebied van elektronica, hydrauliek en metaalbewerkingen kunnen wij u van dienst zijn.

Provoost Maritiem is geen standaard scheepsonderhoud en scheepsreparatie bedrijf. Met oog voor detail en met een warm hart realiseren wij onderhoud en reparatie aan boten en motoren voor onze klanten in onze werkplaats of bij u op locatie!

STALLING
Op ons afgesloten buitenterrein hebben wij ruimte voor botenstalling van boten tot 20 ton. Wij zijn ook gemakkelijk te bereiken via het water. Tijdens de stallingsperiode kunt u gebruik maken van onze diensten met betrekking tot reparaties en onderhoud aan uw boot of motor.

VERKOOP
Wij verkopen inboard- en buitenboordmotoren, daarnaast geven we advies bij de aan- of verkoop van uw boot. Doordat wij aangesloten zijn bij de HISWA, gebruiken wij de HISWA Algemene Voorwaarden en koopovereenkomsten. Daarmee bieden we extra zekerheid en is het voor alle partijen duidelijk wat men kan verwachten. Zodat uw droomjacht geen nachtmerrie wordt.

Advies of hulp nodig?

Description: Tomir Pietkiewicz Hull Structures provides services mainly to Shipbuilding, Shipping and Offshore Industries. Name: Port Royale
Description:
Who we are?

Port Royale is a company that supports yacht-centered businesses bringing their projects to safe haven. In other words, Port Royale strives for the successful and beyond-the-expectations execution of the projects of its clients. 

“On behalf of Heesen Yachts, I would recommend Port Royale as an engineering partner. They have a solid background in engineering and “delivery in time” is written in their engineering DNA.” – Jos Verbruggen - Manager Shipbuilding Engineering – Heesen Yachts

How do we do it?

We do that from a comprehensive understanding of the design, construction and operation of the ship and applying our insights to ensure each phase is performed satisfactorily and taking into account the global picture.

What do we do?

Our services are directed to designers, engineering companies, builders and owners.

For designers (Concept / Basic Design):
- Drafting of Technical General Arrangements (TGA)
- Evaluation of designs and TGAs with regards to Class and Flag requirements, construction of structures and optimization of spaces
- Weight calculations
- Intact and damaged stability calculations 
- GT calculations
- Review of system drawings
- Review of General Construction drawings
- Local and global strength calculations

For engineering companies (Detail design / workshop drawings):
- Project management (coordination of work in-house or subcontracted)
- Budgeting and forecasting / hour control
- Weight estimations and weight reports
- Class and Flag correspondence, approval of plans and certification process
- Review and approval of purchasing contracts
- Production support
- Drafting and engineering work

For Builders (Production):
- Troubleshooting possible setbacks
- Support when information on workshop drawings is insufficient, unclear or incorrect
- Assistance with Class and Flag survey

For Owners:
- Project management
- Selection of shipyards
- Review and approval of engineering drawings
- Counselling

Name: "Balkan" Shipyard OJSC
Description:
"Shipbuilding and repairing yard "Balkan" open joint-stock company in Turkmenbashy city is the first step of our country in the field of manufacture and repairing of the shipyard, as well as an important contribution to the development of national economy and field of a sea and river transportation of country.

The total area of the factory is 166 000 m2. The production capacity of the shipyard allows processing 10 000 tons of steel per year. Thanks to modern technological equipment and automation system that corresponds to international requirements, it is possible to manufacture 4-6 ships. This production facility has all resources to process 2 000 tons of steel and conduct repairing works of 20-30 ships.

The shipyard is equipped with a system for round-trip operation and relocation of ships up to 10 000 ton lifting capacity in order to lower newly built and repaired ships to water and lift it from there for repairs.

84-ton capacity wheeled wharf crane, 42, 64, 80-ton capacity tracker cranes are used for various production works. Ship designing, project management, logistics, repairing, production, technical maintenance, quality and labour safety departments are working in coordination at the plant management.

Kuruluşumuzdan itibaren müşterilerimize güvenilir ve kesintisiz hizmet sağlamayı amaçlıyor; gelişen teknolojiye ve sektör ihtiyaçlarına hızla uyum sağlayarak kendimizi sürekli geliştirmeye özen gösteriyoruz.

Her biri alanında deneyimli teknisyenlerden oluşan ekibimizle Türkiye genelinde 7/24 destek sunarak turbocharger performansını iyileştirmeye ve sistemlerin verimliliğini artırmaya odaklanıyoruz. Bizim için müşterilerimizin operasyonel sürekliliğini sağlamak, işimizin en önemli parçasıdır.

Çözüm Turbo olarak, kalite, güven ve profesyonellik ilkelerinden ödün vermeden sektörümüze değer katmayı; uzun vadeli iş ortaklıkları ve sürdürülebilir çözümlerle geleceğe yönelik adımlar atmayı hedefliyoruz.

Janousek also owns Stämpfli Racing Boats, another manufacturer of rowing boats which was acquired in 1991.  Stämpfli was founded in 1896 and is the oldest operating rowing boat manufacturer in the world. 

Janousek and Stämpfli manufacture singles, doubles, coxless pairs, coxless fours and quads, bow and stern-coxed fours and quads), and sectional eights. 

Janousek and Stämpfli boats have been used at all levels of competition including World Rowing Championships and Olympic Games.

Name: MARINE HSE
Description:
Education and knowledge is the most effective resource available to us to keep people safe. 
 
Established in 2017, MARINE HSE provides a health, safety and environmental resource base for the entire marine construction industry in South Africa. 

A project specific guide for marine construction has been developed for this very purpose; the MARINE HSE Pocketbook. Visit our website for more information on the Pocketbook. 
 
MARINE HSE also provides a wealth of resources to aid in your day-to-day operations. On marinehse.co.za, you will be able to freely access:
 
•	Periodic safety briefs
•	Internal and submitted HSE articles 
•	Applicable legislation and codes including relevant updates 
•	Templates
•	TNPA permits and port specifications
•	Local and international incident investigations and outcomes 
•	Provincial and national marine construction incident statistics

Community involvement is critical to the well being of all persons working within marine construction.
 
We encourage all clients, contractors and individuals to get involved in submitting their templates, articles, incident reports and HSE statistics (incidents and statistics published anonymously). This will help to create one central database that everyone can learn and benefit from, to uplift the entire industry's standards.  
 
We are safer in our common and shared knowledge.
 
We are ultimately, safer together.

Description:
Firma zajmuje się produkcją łodzi z laminatu oraz z dnem aluminiowym. Wykonujemy łodzie własnej marki Sting oraz norweskiej marki Nordkapp, która niedawno obchodziła swoje 50-lecie istnienia. Oba produkty sprzedawane są głównie na rynek norweski. Firma Mirage Boats skupia się wyłącznie na wprowadzaniu nowych modeli, aktualizacji obecnych oraz produkcji łodzi, które projektowane, promowane i sprzedawane są w Norwegii. Posiadamy także siatkę dealerską obejmującą całą Europę.

Obecnie produkujemy ok 1200 łodzi rocznie a ilość ta dynamicznie rośnie. Z roku na rok łodzie te są coraz bardziej zaawansowane technicznie oraz lepsze jakościowo. Na bieżąco aktualizujemy technologie i nasze standardy jakościowe, aby możliwie najlepiej wyeliminować ewentualne problemy podczas użytkowania naszych produktów na wodzie.

Zatrudniamy obecnie ponad 200 osób w kilku działach. Nasz główny trzon produkcji to działy produkcji laminatów i montażu łodzi - tu zatrudniamy największą liczbę osób. Posiadamy także  działy mniej liczne takie jak dział cięcia, malowania, stolarnia, modelarnia. Dużą rolę spełnia u nas także magazyn, logistycy oraz dział transportu. Nad wszystkim zaś czuwa administracja oraz kierownicy poszczególnych działów. Wszyscy tworzymy zgrany zespół uzupełniający kompetencje innych, dlatego jesteśmy w stanie dostarczać tak dopracowane produkty naszym partnerom w Norwegii a oni z kolei wymagającym klientom.

Osią naszych priorytetów jest jakość i profesjonalizm dlatego innowacje w firmie Mirage Boats są powszednie i wdrażane niemal na bieżąco. Naszym celem jest wydajna i zoptymalizowana produkcja. Podnosimy sobie poprzeczkę wysoko, badamy, testujemy różne rozwiązania, wyciągamy wnioski i wprowadzamy ulepszenia. Gro naszych pomysłów przyniosła wymierne korzyści dla przedsiębiorstwa i przede wszystkim dla klientów końcowych.

Our expertise includes the use of industry-standard simulation, modeling, and design optimization tools. At the heart of our work is a passion for maritime innovation, a commitment to excellence, and a deep understanding of the principles that drive successful vessel and offshore structure design.

Name: SLP Maritime
Description:
SLP Maritime (Services, Logistics and Personnel LLC) is a cruise refit, maintenance and marine services company specialised in onboard projects for the global cruise industry.

From our workshop in Puerto Real, Cádiz (Spain) we support cruise lines and marine contractors with qualified teams, cost-effective solutions and end-to-end project coordination, both during dry-dock periods and while vessels are in operation.

Our main scopes of work include:

   • Steel & Piping Works: Fabrication and installation of steel structures, supports and piping (all materials) for hotel, technical and machinery spaces. 

   • Chipping & Painting / Demolition: Surface preparation, chipping, grit blasting, coating and controlled demolition for refits and area reconfigurations. 

   • Carpentry & Joinery: Interior and exterior carpentry, including saunas, solariums, wooden structures and teak decks for guest and crew areas. 

   • Resin & Flooring Solutions: Resin flooring systems and repairs, especially in crew and back-of-house areas where durability and hygiene are critical. 

   • Accommodation & Outfitting: Complete outfitting works with B15 ceiling and wall panels, doors, partitions and integrated services, both for newbuilds and refurbishments. 

How we work:

We combine planning, logistics, supervision and onboard execution, working either directly for cruise lines or in alliance with specialised partners to deliver consistent quality under tight schedules.
Our teams have completed projects for major brands across the cruise sector, supporting cabin refits, public areas, crew spaces and technical areas in multiple fleets. 

Follow SLP Maritime for updates on cruise refits, onboard projects and marine services worldwide. 

#SLPMaritime #CruiseRefit #MarineServices #CruiseIndustry

          Специалисты компании, объединившие свои усилия на благо развития флота, уже имеют за плечами опыт научно-исследовательской, проектно-конструкторской и судоремонтной деятельности, большой опыт осуществления подводно-технических работ (ремонт гидротехнических сооружений: мостов, дамб, пирсов; ремонт подводной части судна), а также большие наработки в области продаж и поставок эффективного судового оборудования и оборудования для антикоррозионной защиты. 
          Коллектив компании ООО «РУССКАЯ ВЕРФЬ» состоит из высококвалифицированных инженеров, научных работников и профессиональных рабочих и водолазов.
          Один из учредителей компании ООО «РУССКАЯ ВЕРФЬ» является членом Клуба лидеров, инициативу создания которого поддержал Президент Российской Федерации Владимир Владимирович Путин.
           Компания имеет опыт работы по сертификации судов и судового оборудования на соответствие требованиям Российского Речного и Морского Регистра. Работы выполняются по заказам ведущих судоходных компаний, судоремонтных заводов, рыбопромышленных предприятий и проектно-конструкторским бюро. ООО «РУССКАЯ ВЕРФЬ» обладает техническим и производственным потенциалом, обеспечивающим решение самых сложных задач по созданию самоходных и несамоходных судов с применением передовых технологий. 
          Мы проектируем и строим  буксиры различного назначения, плавучие доки, экологически чистые суда на электротяге, оснащая их вспомогательным оборудованием отечественного производства. Также компания осуществляет подводно-технические и судовые водолазные работы, обеспечение строительных работ вблизи акваторий. 
          Компания принимает активное участие в создании инновационных решений для улучшения экологии.

Our highly motivated and qualified engineers solve your questions about structural strength, Multiphysics, fluid structure interaction, fatigue strength as well as dynamic and vibration. 

Our expertise includes:
•	Linear and nonlinear structural strength
•	Vibrational analyses
•	Dynamic and kinetic
•	Shock simulations and numerical representation of explosions
•	Collisions, grounding and stranding
•	Fatigue strength
•	Fitness for purpose and crack propagation
•	Thermal analyses
•	Coupling of thermal and mechanical loads
•	Fire tests
•	Seeking simulations and determination of hydrodynamic loads
•	Hydrostatic calculations
•	Ocean loadings on offshore structures
•	Simulations of heavy lifting, lashing and transport 

Please feel free to get in contact to our engineers for an individual consulting for your technical application.

Name: INCONE60Green
Description:
The INCONE60 Green project, officially launched on 01.01.2024, is a pioneering initiative aimed at transforming small port operations and logistics through sustainability and cutting-edge technology. Running for 36 months until 31.12.2026, the project addresses disparities in digitalization among small seaports in the South Baltic region, enhancing their competitiveness and efficiency.

A key focus is the development of SeaTech, a universal IT system for digitalizing port operations and improving stakeholder communication. Integrated within SeaTech is SeaWay, an intelligent software solution for estimating transport-related costs, calculating environmental benefits, and facilitating interactions between ports and vessel owners. Additionally, the project will introduce SeaStat, an online database providing harmonized maritime statistics to support data-driven decision-making and strategic planning for small ports.

By improving digitalization, reducing manual processes, and fostering sustainability, INCONE60 Green will create new job opportunities, enhance investment attractiveness, and contribute to the socio-economic revitalization of the South Baltic coastal regions.

Belgian and German marine and interior design and production quality achieve these attributes: Durable, Reliable and Innovative – combined with our tax-free production location in the United Arab Emirates, our vessels become Affordable, which result in High Resale Value for our customers.

The range from 22 to 42 feet mainly includes fishing boats for commercial and private fishing, whereas the range from 48 feet upwards consists of luxurious motor yachts.

The company's premises in the industrial area of Umm Al Quwain, an Emirate north of Dubai, has an area of approximately 87,200 square feet (approx. 8,100 square metres) and accommodate the offices, the production halls, an own carpentry, several cranes to move the yachts on the premises, storage area as well as the accommodation of the shipbuilders.

Name: EcoMarine Global FZC
Description:
Eco Marine Global: Sustainability by conviction

Eco Marine Global is an international General Trading Company with headquarters in Ras Al Khaimah, United Arab Emirates. In the year 2016 the two partners Markus A.W. Hoehner and Ahsan Khan founded the company, which is focusing on the production, sales of exclusive solar yachts, the development of water transport systems and renewables for a sustainable future.

Markus A.W. Hoehner has been active in the sector of social, ecological and economical sustainability for 15 years. Under the umbrella of the Hoehner Research and Consulting Group he developed formats such as the Energiewende Award, the German CleanTech Institute, the Joint Forces for Solar Initiative and the International Battery & Energy Storage Alliance, all with the goal of pushing environmentally friendly technologies and bringing stakeholders together.

The Eco Marine Global team is convinced that the beautiful things in life can be appreciated and enjoyed even more when they are in harmony with the natural resources of the earth. The drive of EMG is the heartfelt regard for nature and the sincere wish to preserve its diversity through green technologies.

Because the mobility of the future is green.

Marine mobility is responsible for 15 percent of the global nitric oxide emission. The high consumption of diesel and dead oil, poisonous fumes and black soot particles damaged the image of marine locomotion. Conventional tankers, ferries and other ships and boats are regarded as polluters – in many seaport towns resistance is emerging because of the atrocious air pollution.

With our solar and hybrid yachts we show our customers that marine mobility already now can exist in sync with nature. Luxury and sustainability, freedom and responsibility, nature and technology don’t have to cancel each other out, but can be connected to a positive and exclusive lifestyle – the EcoMarine Global experience!

Name: SWAT-SHOAL
Description:
SWArm and Teaming operation of manned & unmanned underwater vehicle SHOAL
 
The SWAT-SHOAL project, funded by the European Defence Fund (101121429 — SWAT-SHOAL — EDF-2022-RA), brings together 20 European industries, research organizations and SMEs from 11 different countries with a common objective.

The SWAT-SHOAL project aims to enhance collaboration between manned and unmanned assets, organized in swarms, for missions against moving subsurface threats. It focuses on developing a System of Systems (SoS) where different vehicles operate as a unified swarm unit, improving performance and efficiency across various mission types. By integrating diverse vehicle types and allowing command from different platforms, including manned and unmanned, the project aims to address a wide range of scenarios, such as surveillance, reconnaissance, mine countermeasures, collaborative engagement, and support for amphibious operations. Special attention is given to missions in confined and shallow waters (CSW). The project emphasizes close cooperation between engineers from European partners throughout feasibility studies and design phases to integrate components into the SoS demonstrator, for the benefit of end-users. Initial results of SWAT-SHOAL will be validated initially through laboratory simulations and later demonstrated in seawater, confirming the effectiveness of the SoS concept and architecture developed within the project.

Name: SNR Tersanesi
Description:
SNR Tersanesi  eş zamanlı olarak 13 farklı boyutlara sahip olan gemilerin tamir ve bakım hizmetlerini sunan 2 yüzer iskele, 3 iskele  ve geniş çaplı bir rıhtım alanına sahiptir.

SNR tersanesi stratejik konuma bağlı olarak Avrupa yakası havaalanı (IST) den 56,4 uzaklıktadır. 70 dakika sürüş zamanı alır. Asya yakası havaalanı (SAW) ise 16,6 km mesafededir, 17 dakika sürüş zamanı alır. Bölge; deniz operasyonları ile bilinir bu nedenle tersane, dünya çapında gemi sahiplerinden gelen her çeşit talebi karşılayabilecek bir taşeron ağına sahiptir.

Tersanenin emniyet kültürünün kanıtlamış prosedürlerle desteklenmesi ve bu sayede SNR tersanesinin iyi bir mesleki güvenlik performansı sergilemesine imkan sağlamıştır. Biz bu yaklaşımı müşterilerimize en baştan başlayıp geminin teslim tarihinden sonraki dönemlere kadar  yansıtmaktan dolayı mutluluk duyuyoruz. Kendi tasarımlarımızı yönetme tecrübesine ek olarak; acil durum yerleştirme ve  dönüştürme çalışmalarımızdan geniş kapsamlı revizyon hizmetleri  için servis hizmeti sunma imkanına sahibiz.

Müşterilerimiz arasında Savunma Bakanlığı ve bilinen deniz ulaştırıcılarının yanı sıra bazı Petrol şirketleri ve onların taşeronları da bulunmaktadır. Müşterilerimizin çoğunluğu SNR tersanesi tarafından sunulan hizmetleri  takdir eden daimi müşterilerdir.

Yalnızca yüksek teknik standartlara sahip dönüşüm projelerine odaklanırız, her zaman teknik zorluklara meydan okumak isteriz ancak o zaman güçlü noktalarımızı en iyi şekilde kullanabiliriz. Dönüşüm işinde uzun vadede başarıya ulaşma, uzmanlaşmış bir bilgi birikimi gerektirir; bunun nedeni her gemi tipinin belirli gereksinimlere sahip olması için önemlidir. Bu bölgedeki mutlak üstünlüğümüzü, yolcu ve ticari gemileri, offshore üniteleri ve deniz gemileri ile ilgili bir çok proje ile başarıya ulaşarak kanıtladık.

With a seasoned team and a track record spanning over a decade, Humaex Group is poised for continued success in diverse ventures.
