Our Smart Propulsion System features an innovative Detachable Blade Propeller (DBP) concept, offering advantages that adapt to any design or hydrodynamic solution. With our metallurgical department, we can offer the standard alloy or patented alloy, giving the customer the freedom of choice while providing advice.
Our research and development team uses the latest technology and software, including Finite Element Analysis (FEA) and Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD), to simulate various designs and scenarios. Ultimately, we conduct destructive testing and mechanical tests that reflect real-world impact, ensuring peace of mind regarding durability and robustness.
This process has led us to several solutions we can safely offer to our customers.
Ultimately, we provide solutions through partnership, not just as products, fostering collaboration that drives success.

Besides hull structure inspections we also provide inspections of life saving appliances in accordance to SOLAS regulations.

Design department consists of experienced designers shipbuilders, as well as representatives from a number of Mechanical Engineers. All of our employees are university graduates. Name: Privinvest Holding SAL
Description:
Privinvest is an international shipbuilding group, created by Iskandar Safa and Akram Safa in 1990, specialising in commercial and military vessels as well as superyachts. The group operates in several countries across Europe and the Middle-East and employs over 2500 people. Privinvest has developed several areas of expertise throughout it network of subsidiaries.

Today, Privinvest is a major player in the shipbuilding industry. Privinvest Group is headquartered in Lebanon and owns shipyards in the United Arab Emirates (Abu Dhabi Mar), France (Constructions Mecaniques de Normandie), Greece (PISB), the UK (Isherwoods) and Germany (Nobiskrug, German Naval Yards, Lindenau).

Each affiliate specialises in their given field, allowing for Privinvest to provide a wide array of products and services, ranging from commercial and military vessels to superyachts to technology and intellectual property transfer for countries wishing to develop their own naval industries.

Since its creation, Privinvest shipyards have built and delivered over 2000 vessels and their products are present in over 40 countries across the globe. The group has provided services to six national navies as well as several private clients. Privinvest is currently working on new projects, from surveillance and protection of Exclusive Economic Zones (EEZ) to vessel maintenance and repair.

On top of its shipbuilding activities, Privinvest is also investing in R&D in Marine Renewable Energies (MRE) and has invested in a startup specialising in river and tidal turbines for green energy: Hydroquest.

Privinvest also operates within the media industry through its affiliate Privinvest Media as well as in the hospitality and real estate sectors.

Name: Officina Meccanica Navale | Petrozzi e Rossi
Description:
L’ officina Meccanica Navale Petrozzi e Rossi con sede a Viareggio, nasce grazie alla passione e alle capacità meccaniche dei tre soci che la compongono. In poco tempo si afferma nello scenario dell’industria navale, diventando punto di riferimento per comandanti e armatori di Yacht durante la sosta invernale. L’industria navale cresce e all’orizzonte si affacciano i nuovi Cantieri che, si avvalgono dell’esperienza della Petrozzi e Rossi per risolvere problematiche specifiche di meccanica e oleodinamica. Negli stessi anni Viareggio vive una fase rigogliosa per il Refit d’imbarcazioni d’epoca, la Petrozzi e Rossi partecipa alle attività di restauro delle più celebri e spettacolari navi d’epoca. 
La nostra Azienda ha acquisito una pluriennale esperienza nel campo nelle carpenterie metalliche, meccaniche e strutturali in genere, nonché degli impianti idraulici, oleodinamici e pneumatici. I nostri servizi si completano di assistenza al montaggio e collaudi finali con start-up per l’avvio degli impianti. 
Nel campo del refit d’epoca siamo specializzati nella fedele riproduzione di componenti in bronzo, ottone sennonché nella manutenzione e recupero di tutti i componenti di coperta, compresi argani di ormeggio. 
Le nostre forniture possono essere complete di progettazione, disegni e certificazione di classe, laddove richiesto. 
La nostra azienda opera su un’area di 600 mq consentendoci di ospitare le attrezzature e i macchinari necessari per elaborare qualunque tipo di richiesta proveniente dal mercato di riferimento.

Name: Bootsfolierungen.de
Description:
Hinter Bootsfolierungen.de steht ein moderner Yachtservice-Betrieb. Unsere Aufgabe ist es auf den Booten und Yachten schnell und qualitätsorientiert eine neue Außenhaut zu montieren. Dabei verwenden wir ausschließlich Folien der Premiumhersteller. Die Folienfarbfächer können Sie bei uns bequem postalisch bestellen. 
Die Grenzen sind aber nicht nur an einer Rumpffolierung gesetzt. Neben der Yachtfolierung und Bootsfolierung schaffen wir noch Salonfolierungen im Inneren der Sportboote und seit neustem sanieren wir auch komplette Unterwasserschiffe mit einer finalen 0,45 mm starken Antifoulingfolie. Der Vorteil ist ersichtlich, denn an Unterwasserfolien aus Silikon kann nichts dauerhaft anhaften. Zwar mag sich ein dünner Biofilm bei festliegenden Schiffen bilden, jedoch wird dieser Biofilm ab 7 Knoten Fahrt abgetragen. So gesehen, können sich auch keine Seepocken festsetzen. Fragen Sie uns nach Studien und Video-Links und/ oder verschaffen Sie sich gern selbst einen Überblick. Gerne zeigen wir Ihnen folierte Yachten und Boote. Sicher haben wir schon mal eine Yacht oder ein Boot in Ihrer Nähe foliert.
Sie erreichen uns mit vielen Beispielen und Schiffstypen ebenfalls vom eigenen Bildschirm auf youtube und facebook. Suchen Sie dabei einfach nach bootsfolierungen.de
Gern helfen und beraten wir Sie kostengünstig bei Ihrem Yachtrefit. Dabei verfügen wir über ein Netzwerk von Dienstleistern, die Ihnen auch für weitergehende Services an Bord zur Verfügung stehen. 
Wir erbringen sämtliche Dienstleistungen vom Yachttransport bis zur Überführung, um Ihre Yacht zu verbringen. Wir bieten Plätze in Warmhallen zum Refit oder Außenplätze zum Winterlager. Sprechen Sie uns an! 

Impressum - bitte wechseln Sie zur Webseite unseres Unternehmens, um mehr über die Verantwortlichen des Unternehmens und zum Datenschutz zu erfahren:
https://bootsfolierungen.de/impressum/

Name: Nautica Viterbo Garden
Description:
Dal 1970 vi facciamo navigare in un mare di tranquillità

L'inizio della “navigazione” di Nautica Viterbo in questo settore, avviene nel 1970; l’idea fu quella di commercializzare prodotti nautici ovvero: motori marini, piccole imbarcazioni e battelli.

La missione aziendale di Nautica Viterbo è stata fin dall'inizio quella di trovare i migliori prodotti in circolazione, sia affidandosi ai brand più forti, sia cercando tra i prodotti più innovativi per design, tecnologia e funzionalità.

I primi motori cha vennero presi in considerazione furono i Tohatsu, prodotto giapponese al tempo sconosciuto in Italia ma che per la loro grande qualità e affidabilità, in soli 10 anni conquistarono notevole fama nella nostra zona.

La credibilità di questa azienda nautica, è andata man mano crescendo non solo per la qualità dei prodotti nautici trattati, ma anche grazie ad un’assistenza impeccabile e ad un facile e celere reperimento di ricambi di tutti i generi direttamente in sede.

Visto il crescere delle esigenze dei clienti e trasportati dalla  grande passione per il mare, nel corso degli anni ottanta è stato attuato un processo di potenziamento dei servizi, che è culminato nella scelta di allargare gli orizzonti, interessandosi anche di barche di una certa importanza e affiancando al marchio giapponese uno tutto americano: Mariner, che vantava potenze che andavano dai 4 ai 200 hp.

Name: Thermowood Decking
Description:
At Thermowood Decking, we are committed to providing sustainable and visually appealing decking options for superyachts, sailboats, and other high-end vessels. Our thermally modified ash decks are knot-free, stable in changing weather conditions, and boast unparalleled durability class 1.

Our journey began in Tallinn, Estonia, where two experienced deck officers with extensive experience onboard the world's largest mega yachts saw the need for a sustainable decking option that didn't compromise on beauty and performance. They discovered the perfect solution in thermally modified ash - Thermo ash, which provides the performance of teak with stunning visual characteristics, while also being cost-effective, eco-friendly, and real wood.

At Thermowood Decking, we are proud to use sustainable materials and environmentally friendly processes to help preserve the world's tropical rainforests. Our Thermowood Decking timber comes from sustainably managed forests in Canada and Estonia, and we are constantly striving to minimize our environmental impact throughout the manufacturing process.

Join us on our mission to provide sustainable decking options for superyachts. Let's make a difference and preserve our planet for generations to come.

Our very special modified timber (Thermo-ash) has the following benefits:

- Sustainable and eco-friendly, FSC Certified timber
- Knot-free, stable, and durable with unparalleled durability class 1
- A real wood product, providing a natural look and feel
- Cost-effective alternative to teak without compromising on visual appeal
- Low thermal conductivity, meaning it won't become too hot in the sun
- Resistant to warping and rotting
- Minimal maintenance required
- Low carbon footprint

Name: Fratelli Aprea Sorrento 1890
Description:
La storia dei Fratelli Aprea è scritta sui volti dei pescatori e degli uomini di mare che da sempre hanno navigato su imbarcazioni nate dal lavoro minuzioso dei maestri d’ascia di questa famiglia. Un’arte nata a Sorrento e tramandata gelosamente di generazione in generazione. Un legame profondo e indissolubile che lega i fratelli Aprea al mare e a questa terra. Ancora oggi i gozzi sono costruiti in modo artigianale e con la stessa passione di un tempo, seppure innovativi nelle linee adottate e nel design ricercato. Il risultato finale è un prodotto sempre più esclusivo.

Un’azienda creata da una famiglia che lavora ancora nel segno della tradizione e della qualità, cercando costantemente il rinnovamento ed il miglioramento. Durante la II guerra mondiale la storia dei gozzi cambiò radicalmente; furono impiegati dei vecchi motori di jeep per motorizzare le imbarcazioni, intuizione colta da Franco Aprea che contribuì alla trasformazione delle forme del gozzo sorrentino. Oggi i fratelli Aprea continuano a lavorare come vuole la tradizione di famiglia, tramandata dal padre Franco e dagli zii e prima ancora dal nonno Cataldo e i suoi fratelli, dal bisnonno Giovanni e più di un secolo fa, dal trisavolo Cataldo, il primo maestro d’ascia della famiglia, colui che dettò le linee guida per la creazione di un simbolo di artigianato e fascino. Da marina Grande la fama dei cantieri Fratelli Aprea ha raggiunto l’internazionalità.

Description:
Per 14 september 2016 heeft Amersfoort Maritiem b.v. de ontwikkeling, fabricage en verkoop van Timeless overgenomen van Henkjan Watersport. De TIMELESS 34 zal verder gaan onder de naam ‘Timeless Yachts’. 
 
De schepen worden gebouwd volgens de modernste productietechnieken en voorzien van de nieuwste technische details. ‘Timeless’ staat voor comfort en luxe op hoog niveau. De moderne aluminium romp met z'n klassieke uitstraling staat, met aangepaste motorisering, garant voor verrassend hoge snelheden. De Timeless jachten zijn bijzonder omdat in een relatief kleine boot het "custom build" aspect is toegepast. Het ‘custom build’ aspect wordt doorgaans alleen gezien bij jachten van grote(re) afmetingen. Zo kunnen bijvoorbeeld details in de kuip ingedeeld worden naar de wens van de klant. Name: TYKUN Military Yacht Tender
Description:
TYKUN is the division of Gruppo MED dedicated to the design and construction of high-performance, fully custom tenders.
Created for yacht owners and maritime professionals who demand uncompromising reliability, speed, versatility, and personalization, TYKUN brings together Italian design, advanced technology, and over thirty years of shipbuilding expertise.

Thanks to the know-how of MED DEFENSE—the division specialized in the construction of professional vessels for military and governmental use—TYKUN inherits a solid technical DNA, engineered to meet the highest standards of safety, durability, and performance, now applied to the most demanding private yachting applications.

Design, performance and integrated functionality
Each TYKUN model is designed with optimized storage spaces for luggage and water toys, featuring elegant lines and hydrodynamic hulls that ensure high performance, stability, and maneuverability in all sea conditions.

The fleet is the result of a collaboration with Tommaso Spadolini, a renowned name in international yacht design, and stands out for its balance of form and function, luxury and logic, style and power.

Customization on two levels
TYKUN offers:

– a range of configurable models, with a wide selection of advanced options and technical solutions;
– or, for the most exclusive projects, a fully bespoke design service, allowing the owner to define every aspect of the tender – from layout to interiors, propulsion systems to onboard equipment – starting from a blank sheet.

TYKUN can be your perfect tender or your perfect day boat.

Name: Verata
Description:
El mar es la máxima expresión de la vida. Representa el nacimiento y la muerte, el movimiento y la calma, la seguridad y el peligro. 

Nos recuerda que es imposible controlarlo y dominarlo a nuestra merced. Solo desde el respeto y el amor, puedes conocer su verdadera magia.

Desde Verata, entendemos que solo hay un camino para proteger al mar de las garras de la contaminación humana.

Honrar la tradición del oficio artesano y artístico de la carpintería de ribera y cambiar el rumbo de la náutica de recreo hacia soluciones más sostenibles, eficientes y responsables.

En Verata creamos embarcaciones eléctricas exclusivas y únicas para los auténticos apasionados de la navegación y del mar. 

Anteponemos la calma a la velocidad, el silencio al ruido, la producción artesanal a la producción en masa, la energía eléctrica a la fósil, la tradición a la moda pasajera.

Empleamos materiales reciclables, renovables y duraderos, recuperando la elegancia y el poder de la madera. 

Cada material, cada detalle, cada acabado sale de nuestras propias manos para hacer realidad la embarcación que sueña nuestro cliente. 

Pero, por encima de todo, queremos seguir disfrutando del mar, de la naturaleza, desde la única forma que sabemos: sin prisas, saboreando cada instante, pidiendo que el viaje sea largo para seguir gozando de su infinita belleza.

Si quieres contactar con Verata:

⇢  veratayachts.com
⇢  hola@veratayachts.com
⇢  623 064794

Name: Enercon Marine
Description:
Da oltre 40 anni costruiamo innovazione in metallo.Enercon Marine nasce dall’esperienza consolidata di Enercon nel settore della carpenteria metallica e della progettazione industriale.Grazie alla nostra competenza e alla visione tecnica maturata in ambito navale, oggi siamo il partner ideale per chi cerca soluzioni su misura in carpenteria nautica in alluminio.

LA DIVISIONE MARINE
La nostra divisione dedicata alla nautica.Nel 2020, all’interno della nostra sede produttiva sul Lago di Garda, nasce la Divisione Marine, un’area specializzata e attrezzata per la costruzione di strutture, scafi, sovrastrutture e componenti in lega marina 5083.Lavoriamo per cantieri, progettisti, privati e aziende che desiderano realizzare imbarcazioni, componenti speciali o refitting professionali.

SERVIZI OFFERTI
 Consulenza tecnica e co-progettazioneCollaboriamo con ingegneri e progettisti nella fase di pianificazione e industrializzazione del prodotto.
 Produzione interna su misuraDalla fornitura dei materiali al taglio lamiere (nesting), fino alla saldatura e costruzione di scafi e sovrastrutture in alluminio.
 Allestimento e collaudoAssemblaggio di componenti, impianti, accessori, verniciatura, collaudo e preparazione alla consegna.
 Refitting e manutenzioneRealizziamo trasformazioni strutturali, riparazioni e manutenzioni anche su strutture esistenti.

COSA REALIZZIAMO
Scafi e sovrastrutture in alluminio
Imbarcazioni one-off e prototipi
Mezzi operativi e barche da lavoro
Pontoni, passerelle e pontili galleggianti
Componenti personalizzati (porte, telai, consolle)
Accessori nautici e allestimenti su richiesta

PERCHÉ SCEGLIERE L’ALLUMINIO
Alluminio: efficienza, resistenza e sostenibilità.La lega marina 5083 offre:
Strutture leggere (-35% rispetto alla vetroresina)
Alta resistenza agli urti, ignifuga e anticorrosiva
Facilità di riparazione e lunga durata
100% riciclabile: sostenibile ed ecologica.

Name: Catamarine
Description:
Depuis 30 années, nous agissons dans le domaine de la réparation et la prestation de service de navires de taille moyenne. 
Basé à Nouméa en Nouvelle-Calédonie, notre activité de construction navale remet l'homme au centre de la production grâce à son savoir-faire et sa créativité. Nous concevons, construisons et livrons clés en main des catamarans à moteur de 8 à 18 mètres entièrement personnalisables par le client. 
Notre activité se démarque par le respect du concept du "Low-Tech" ; nous construisons nos bateaux en ayant le souci d'une économie pérenne et en intégrant des matériaux bio-sourcés à la structure générale du navire. 

N'hésitez pas à nous contacter ! 
www.catamarine.net

Name: Balco Boats
Description:
Chez BALCO, nous concevons et fabriquons des bateaux modernes et durables, alliant le savoir-faire naval traditionnel à une ingénierie de pointe. Fondée en Bretagne par deux jeunes passionnés de marine, notre mission est de créer des bateaux qui soient non seulement beaux et durables, mais également optimisés pour une faible consommation et la propulsion électrique.

Notre expertise couvre :
- Ingénierie navale et construction de bateaux : des designs sur mesure qui équilibrent héritage et innovation
- Maîtrise des composites : travail avec des matériaux avancés, y compris des résines biosourcées et des fibres naturelles
- Systèmes électriques et marins : intégration, maintenance et service après-vente

L’histoire de BALCO est aussi celle de ses fondateurs :
Teys Cocset, ingénieur naval (ENSTA Bretagne) et constructeur de ses propres bateaux, passionné par l’électrification et l’innovation pratique et concrète.
Antoine Ballot, spécialiste des composites avec une expérience sur des projets de voile de haut niveau tels que l’America’s Cup et SailGP, apportant précision et expertise à chaque construction.

Ensemble, nous incarnons une nouvelle génération d’artisans navals : locaux, innovants et engagés dans la transition écologique. Nous sommes convaincus que l’avenir de la navigation réside dans une conception responsable : des bateaux plus légers, faciles à entretenir, plus performants et naturellement adaptés à la propulsion électrique.

Basée dans le Morbihan, BALCO est déjà ancrée dans la culture nautique locale tout en regardant fermement vers l’avenir. Notre objectif est de rendre la navigation durable accessible aux associations, professionnels et particuliers partageant le même respect pour la mer et l’environnement.

Si vous êtes partenaire, fournisseur ou client convaincu par l’avenir d’une navigation propre et durable, connectons-nous.

Name: SeaOne Yachting
Description:
Fiers de la confiance que nous portent ces marques prestigieuses, SeaOne Yachting est votre concessionnaire exclusif pour les marques Yamaha, Capelli et Chaparral. Nous vous accueillons dans nos locaux situés sur le Vieux Port de Golfe Juan, entre Cannes et Antibes, à mi-chemin entre Monaco et Saint Tropez. A votre disposition dans notre show-room, des modèles en exposition ainsi qu’un vaste choix de pièces détachées pour l’entretien et l’équipement de votre bateau.

SeaOne Yachting est née autour d’une idée simple : tout capitaine a besoin d’un second ! Et le rôle de votre second est de vous assister et de vous suppléer pour toutes les tâches que vous lui confiez. Cela se décline en deux métiers complémentaires : la gestion complète de bateaux pour le compte d’heureux (et de futurs) propriétaires et la location de bateaux sélectionnés et préparés avec soin. Quel que soient vos envies ou vos besoins, vous pouvez vous appuyer, tout au long de l’année, sur notre équipe professionnelle et dévouée.

Gestionnaires de bateaux de toutes tailles, et de tous types, nous proposons nos services pour toute opération ou intervention sur votre bateau, ainsi que pour sa prise en charge complète : achat, vente, place de port, entretien, réparation, hivernage, stockage, financement, assurance, équipements. Nous sommes centre agréé pour l’entretien et la réparation (toutes marques, moteurs, coque et flotteurs).

S’appuyant sur notre propre flotte et sur des partenariats privilégiés, nous vous offrons un large choix d’unités disponibles à la location : coque, semi-rigide, open, cruiser, vedette fly, yacht et superyacht. Pour une journée entre amis ou pour un charter d’un mois en famille, bénéficiez de nos conseils et appareillez pour une croisière de rêve.

• Ser la organización de interlocución y representación de las empresas e industrias vascas asociadas y relacionadas con la náutica deportiva y de recreo de cara a las distintas instituciones y administraciones respecto de los temas relativos a la náutica deportiva y de recreo en Euskadi.

• Representar y dinamizar el sector de la náutica deportiva y de recreo tanto a nivel local, nacional como internacional a través de la propuesta de valor de las empresas de la náutica deportiva y de recreo de Euskadi.

Name: C TOMS AND SON LIMITED
Description:
C Toms & Son Ltd is a family run boatyard that has been involved in the construction, repair & maintenance of boats for the last 102 years.  The yard has been passed from generation to generation and continues a long line of boat building in Polruan, Cornwall.

Our yard has stood in the same location for the past 102 years of trading and has over time been extended to cope with the demands of the fishing fleet, commercial vessels and the ever-growing leisure industry as well as giving us the opportunity to take on larger build projects.

Over the years, C Toms & Son Ltd has developed a national reputation, particularly in the fishing industry and has built boats for customers across the UK.

We employee 30 full time and 2 part time members of staff and have the skills and ability to build boats in either steel or wood and to fit out fiberglass hulls. However, our new build projects over the past 25 years have been predominantly in steel and during this period we have built two car ferries up to 29m, a passenger vessel for the Scilly Isles, workboats and fishing boats ranging in size from 10 metres to 19.5 metres.

In addition, C Toms & Son Ltd owns and operates the Bodinnick car ferry which provides a vital all year-round transport link across the River Fowey for local residents, businesses and visitors to the area.

Name: KRT Yacht Refit & Repair
Description:
KRT Yacht, 1989 yılında İstanbul'un Ayvansaray bölgesinde kurularak denizcilik sektöründe faaliyet göstermeye başlamıştır. Kuruluşunun ilk yıllarında, deniz araçları üretimi ve bakım-onarım hizmetlerine yönelik kaliteli hizmet anlayışını benimseyen şirketimiz, zaman içinde büyüyerek, denizcilik sektöründeki lider firmalardan biri haline gelmiştir.

Başlangıçta Ayvansaray'da faaliyete geçen KRT Yacht, 2000'li yılların başında, modern ve geniş üretim altyapısı ile daha verimli bir hizmet sunabilmek amacıyla Tuzla Tersaneler Bölgesi'ne taşınmıştır. Bugün, Tuzla ve Yalova bölgelerinde faaliyet göstermeye devam eden firmamız, yat imalatı, bakım ve onarım hizmetleri konularında uzmanlaşmış bir kadroya sahiptir.

Yat imalatı alanında, müşteri talepleri doğrultusunda özel tasarım ve kaliteli üretim gerçekleştiren KRT Yacht, aynı zamanda mevcut yatların bakım, onarım ve yenileme hizmetlerini de en yüksek standartlarda sunmaktadır. Şirketimiz, her türlü yat ve tekne için kapsamlı hizmet çözümleri sunarak, sektördeki güvenilirliğini pekiştirmiştir.

KRT Yacht, deneyimli mühendis ve teknisyen kadrosu ile denizcilik sektöründeki en yüksek kalite standartlarını hedeflemektedir. Amacımız, her müşterimize özelleştirilmiş hizmet sunmak, güvenli ve kaliteli yat üretimi sağlamak ve bakım onarım hizmetlerinde mükemmeliyetçi bir yaklaşım sergilemektir. Firmamız, sektördeki yenilikleri takip ederek, teknolojik gelişmeleri üretim süreçlerine entegre etmekte ve müşteri memnuniyetini her zaman ön planda tutmaktadır.

KRT Yacht olarak, denizcilik alanındaki engin tecrübemiz ve kaliteli hizmet anlayışımız ile sektördeki varlığımızı her geçen gün daha da güçlendirmeyi hedefliyoruz.

Name: DM Share Cotas - Barcos, Aviões e Helicópteros
Description:
A volta da lenda DM traz uma história louvável de sucesso com sua perfeita navegação sem esquecer seu ponto alto, o famoso “casco marinheiro”.
Para entendermos melhor, vamos voltar em 1959, no Cabo Hatteras, conhecido também como “cemitério do Atlântico.’ Localizado na Carolina do Norte-EUA- onde agua fria encontra as correntes tropicais do Golfo, cujo resultado é uma das águas mais turbulentas e selvagens do Atlântico e um dos melhores pesqueiros do mundo.

Willis Slane criou planos para construir um barco que poderia conquistar essas aguas, porém sabia que não poderia ser um barco tradicional de madeira. Este novo barco teria que ser robusto e forte para suportar o bater das aguas, além de um barco acima de 40 pés, pois sua finalidade era pesca.

Assim, rompendo todas as tradições, Slane escolheu um material para agregar valor em seu projeto e foi então que entra a fibra de vidro. Juntando os dois (fibra de vidro e madeira), acabou lançando uma nova indústria pioneira, sem imaginar que futuramente sua brilhante ideia seria inserida em muitas das tecnologias utilizadas hoje, como: túnel de propulsão, bandas refletoras laterais, ângulo/multi-ângulo V.

Na década de 70, o visionário Davi Moreira buscou um modelo único de lancha, queria desenvolver um barco forte e resistente, que suportasse mares agitados e que não prejudicasse a navegação. Baseados nestes aspectos e inspirado pela lenda HATTERAS, juntamente com o renomado engenheiro naval Joaquim Kuster, surge o primeiro modelo do estaleiro. Na época um louvável projeto.

Foram anos de produção, com lanchas que atendiam os gostos de 20 a 60 pés.
Participando de vários eventos náuticos, as lanchas DM deixaram sua marca no mercado brasileiro e agora retorna com força total para surpreender e encantar todo publico que nunca deixou de apreciar suas lanchas.

Name: HATTERAS YACHTS EUROPE
Description:
Hatteras Europe has been created from the partnership between Hatteras Yachts and SNO Yachts,successful dealer for over 15 years of the historic American shipyard, to distribute Hatteras Yachts in Europe. Hatteras Yachts and SNO have been linked by a successful cooperation and that has led to the knowledge and appreciation of these American boats in the Mediterranean. The hard work of SNO over the years yielded important achievements, rewarded with great satisfaction and the conquest of many awards as best Hatteras dealer worldwide. Hatteras Europe is the official voice of Hatteras in 32 European countries and distributes the Hatteras boat range: Motor Yachts, Convertibles and the new line Hatteras Express. This partnership provides customer service and an exclusive and direct contact with the American shipyard and ensures that the boats imported are designed for the demanding European market. The main office is located in SNO Yachts Headquarters in Olbia, key location in the center of the Mediterranean that allows, if required, to provide the Customer rapid and efficient assistance directly to the mooring. The sales office is located in the center of the prestigious Monaco. 

The legend of Hatteras Yachts

The Hatteras legend began on the barrier islands of the North Carolina shore where the frigid waters of the Labrador Current encounter the tropical Gulf Stream. The outcome is Diamond Shoals – home to some of the most turbulent and untamed waters in the Atlantic and some of the best sportfishing in the world. Here in 1959 at Cape Hatteras, where nor’easters can blow almost as fiercely as hurricanes, Willis Slane envisioned building a boat that could conquer the waters of Diamond Shoals and surmount the Hatteras weather. No traditional wooden fishing boat could do this. This new boat would have to be rugged and robust to take the pounding of Hatteras waters. But most importantly, it would have to be a great sportfishing boat – big enough to handle a group of avid fishermen and comfortable enough for family back at the dock. Breaking with all tradition, Slane chose a new material – fiberglass – to build this noteworthy yacht that launched an industry. Hatteras produced its first sportfishing yacht on March 22, 1960, in the town of High Point, North Carolina. Christened the Knit Wits, she was a 41-foot twin cabin sportfisherman with a 14-foot beam and a pair of 275-hp Lincoln V-8s. The response was enthusiastic and the Hatteras legend was born.

Description:
Next Generation Boats GmbH is a company based out of Oberrot, Germany. We are the creators of the MAKARA – an e-powered boat which is one of a kind.

We are craftsmen, visionaries, design lovers and outdoor enthusiasts. With our products, we want to give people a comfortable, clean way of mobility on the water that is fun. A means of transport for the journey to new places and to themselves. Join us on our journey!

 The MAKARA story

The company was founded in Oberrot, a small town in the south of Germany, by three guys who have been friends for more than 25 years: Heiner, Peter and Immanuel. After school, each of them followed their own career goals in very different areas. Until Immanuel presented his idea of an e-powered ultralight boat, which promised stability, comfort and driving pleasure in an unprecedented form. Peter and Heiner, likewise passionate about water sports, design and bold business ideas, were thrilled. That’s where it all started. 

Today, Peter, Heiner and Immanuel complement each other as business partners precisely because of their individual experience and competences. But Next Generation Boats is more. We’re a small team of MAKARA enthusiasts located in Baden-Württemberg and Berlin, excited about bringing the MAKARA to the world.

Name: Dark Blue Academy
Description:
Course Presentation
This training series starts with Maxsurf software. The hull is modeled from zero. It is optimized. Resistance and preliminary stability calculations are made. The process then continues with Rhino. The same hull is remodeled on the Rhino. Then the superstructure and compartments are designed. Then, construction modeling and interior design are made. Then, the weight calculation is made and the necessary information is added to the Maxsurf software to create a Final Stability Booklet.

When you complete this course, you will be able to learn in full detail all technical calculations such as new design production, hull modelling, construction modeling with rhino, interior design on yachts, customer design office relationship and stability.

These trainings are designed to give you a much different perspective and take your professionalism to the next level, whether you are an amateur or a professional.

All content, charts and model files from all our courses are available for download. In this way, you will have everything you see in the courses.

If you don't register now, you won't be able to learn while everyone else is learning and you will fall behind.

You don't want to miss this excellent educational opportunity. (These courses are independent of Udemy discounts.)

By taking advantage of the discount, you can register for our Udemy courses where you can learn 3 different software, learn how to do all the design and calculations, and learn how to prepare your own boats for manufacture.

Name: Stickl Yachts
Description:
5 models - one common aim: Enjoyable boating for the whole family!

All types in the Stickl electric boat fleet are a kind of “day cruiser”, in other words cruise ships equipped with the most comforts possible, making them the perfect partner for 1-2 days boat cruises. Stickl models are unique not just in their comfort but in their style as well: some emphasize agility, some emphasize great comfort.

WHAT TAKES STICKL BOATS ONE STEP FURTHER?
1. The “half glider” hull shape has low resistance, so it can provide up to 6-8 hours of HIGH SPEED cruising with one charge.
2. The hull is 30-50% LIGHTER thanks to the use of ultralight materials.
3. Some of Stickl boat types are able of achieving a maximum speed of 20-30 km/h.
4. The state-of-the-art lithium batteries guarantee up to 1 HOUR on maximum speed.
5. The boat is stable and DOES NOT ROCK thanks to its flat bottom design and the specific placement of the batteries. 
6. Long service life of batteries is ensured by maintenance-free and specially programmed chargers.
7. Stickl boats provide elegance and premium quality to all.
8. Stickl boats are designed and manufactured in Hungary, making SHORTER DELIVERY orders as well as seasonal services. 
9. Stickl boats available for testing by appointment.
10. 12 years of boat manufacturing and more than 10 years of export experience made it possible for Stickl Yachts team to have 250 satisfied customers.

Name: Brodogradilište i Marina Betina
Description:
Brodogradilište i marina Betina je osnovano 1948. godine na tradiciji betinske brodogradnje u drvu koja datira iz 18-og stoljeća, od 1740 godine.
Vizure ovog mjesta koje je poznato po višestoljetnoj brodograđevnoj tradiciji odnedavno upotpunjuje novi detalj, impresivni travel lift nosivosti 440 tona, dorastao za vađenje jahti i drugih plovila deplasmanske težine do 440 tona i dužine do 50 metara. Ovo remontno brodogradilište od prije je poznato po profesionalnom održavanju svih svrsta plovila, brodskih motora i nautičke opreme te vrhunskoj kvaliteti mehaničarskih, stolarskih i drugih radova u drvu, plastici i metalu. U tijeku su radovi na proširenju i  uređenju novog betonskog  terminala za remontne radove koji je ujedno i pralište za plovila s ugrađenim cjelovitim sustavom zbrinjavanja otpadnih voda, koje osigurava mehaničkim i kemijskim pročišćavanjem prema najvišim ekološkim standardima. Ova proširena servisna baza od sada može bez ograničenja pružati usluge vađenja i spuštanja brodova, kompletnu uslugu servisiranja i održavanja jahti i komercijalnih plovila duljine do 50 metara te na preko 30.000 metara kvadratnih kopnenog dijela površine, pružati usluge remonta, smještaja i čuvanja brodova. Uz ostalu opremu (20 tonski i 40 tonski travel liftovi), domaćim i stranim brodovlasnicima je omogućeno da na jednom mjestu brže, jednostavnije i cjelovitije riješe sve svoje potrebe vezane za servisiranje i održavanje plovila, bilo da se radi o jedrilicama ili pak o luksuznim superjahtama, turističkim mini cruiser plovilima, ribarskoj floti te drugim plovilima iz segmenta gospodarske djelatnosti.

Name: Phinergy Marine
Description:
Limitations of conventional batteries in marine applications:
Large battery packs are increasingly deployed to improve the efficiency and to eliminate emissions from waterborne transport. However waterborne transport batteries are much more expensive than automotive batteries of equivalent capacity, due to shorter lifecycles than those of ships, and more complicated cooling systems. Other significant barriers to increasing the deployment of fully battery electric shipping are the space and weight of conventional batteries and absence of shore charging infrastructure.
 
Aluminum-air Batteries:
These innovative batteries, already fielded in land applications, create electricity by reacting Aluminum with Oxygen from the ambient air.  Aluminum-air technology, allows an energy density that surpasses conventional battery technologies, at much lower prices. Furthermore, unlike rechargeable batteries, the Al-air battery does not lose capacity when not in use and does not degrade over time. The Aluminum anode depletes only when producing electricity, eventually saturating the electrolyte. Both are easily replaced and recycled. 

Containerized Aluminum-air batteries for marine applications:
We have designed a 20' container with Al-air batteries, complete with all the support systems for providing up to 4.8 MWh. Using containers enables quick turnaround. A comparable Li-ion container provides less than a third of the capacity and weighs more.

Shore power alternative:
Ships in port operate their ICE generators, impacting the local environment. Our solution is to provide the power from Aluminum-air batteries on barges moored alongside. Since these batteries are independent from the grid, the requirement for massive investment in shore power infrastructure is avoided.

Infinity EMA (INFINITY ELECTRICAL & MECHANICAL AUTOMATION LLC) is a global provider of marine engineering and technical maritime services, delivering real-world solutions to both commercial and federal maritime sectors. We specialize in vessel lifecycle support, marine automation, and custom control systems designed for performance in the most demanding environments.

Our engineering team supports every phase of a vessel’s lifecycle—from ship design and construction to overhaul, modernization, and maintenance. We are known for solving complex challenges in marine electrical and mechanical systems, including EMI mitigation, PLC troubleshooting, and the integration of Alarm & Monitoring Systems (AMS).

Infinity EMA designs and manufactures advanced marine motor controllers, pneumatic and hydraulic control systems, and automated monitoring solutions for both manned and unmanned vessels. Our systems are trusted by shipbuilders, fleet operators, and government agencies worldwide.

We engineer for the real world—where conditions are unpredictable, and performance is everything. Whether supporting a single retrofit or a fleet-wide upgrade, we deliver mission-critical reliability, technical precision, and unmatched lifecycle support.

At Infinity EMA, we don’t just build systems—we build trust. Our team of engineers, technicians, and maritime experts is committed to helping vessels operate safely, efficiently, and with confidence.

Learn more at www.infinityema.com

Name: Jefa Steering ApS
Description: Jefa Rudder & Steering is located in Greve near Copenhagen in Denmark and has been manufacturing rudder and steering products since 1980. The Jefa Steering factory is located at Agenavej 43, close to the Jefa Rudder factory at Nimbusvej 2. The Jefa Steering directors all have more than 15 years experience in specifying and producing mechanical steering systems. Over the years a very modern factory with the most modern CNC machines has been built up. More than 20.000 rudder stocks, more than 40.000 rudder bearings and more than 5000 steering systems have left the Jefa factory since 1980.

Name: Choren Design & Consulting
Description:
The history of Choren Design & Consulting began in 1992 when the company was founded by Zygmunt Choreń. Now it employs 10 highly skilled designers permanently, mainly being derived from Design Office of Gdansk Shipyard. We cooperate with wide range of specialists depending on temporary needs. We have experience with building of several types of vessels. Our company applies modern technology and increases its turnover year by year. 

Our services:
Design Office offers projects made in AutoCAD, MegaCAD, SolidWorks, Nupas-Cadmatic or Inventor of all types of vessel in following scope:
- material price calculations,
- full size of technical project for classification approval,
- working documentations including materials specification,
- selection of mechanisms and suppliers,
- naval architect calculations,
- execution in reduction scale models of ships, 
- outfitting work for ships and offshore facilities, 
- welding, joinery, fitter's and electrical work. 

Also:
- marine equipment: 
- equipment for sailing ships, 
- windlasses, 
- OH, H and Meteor type gastight doors used as shelter equipment, 
- Ecological receivers for petroleum products. 

Our Design Office prepares technological documentation. The designers carry out all the work with computer - aided design programs used for designing, hydrostatic and stability calculations, design of wiring systems and computer aided modeling and designing of hull shape. Our company offers production, conversion and retrofitting of whole small vessel, and partially also big ship by own staff.

Name: ZINETI S.A.U
Description:
The company was founded in 1977 and has thus more than 30 years of experience in manufacturing, distributing and studying cathodic protection.

Originally, ZINETI only dealt in the naval field but soon it opened its way in the industrial field and also started to manufacture anodes used for engines and leisure boats.

In the nautical field, we have the widest range of products both on the domestic as on the European market. The company counts with more than 600 references for all types of engines - in-board, off-board and intra-board - , in 3 types of alloy: Zinc, Aluminium & Magnesium.
The raw materials used to make our anodes are of the purest available on the market and are always analyzed on entry to the factory. All our anodes are manufactured under the strictest standards.

QUALITY: ZINETI has the ISO 9001 certification ensuring the highest quality possible in all its products.

ZINETI nace en 1977, desde ese año, nos dedicamos a la fabricación, distribución y los estudios de protección catódica.

En un principio, nos dedicamos únicamente al campo naval, años más tarde, nos fuimos abriendo camino hasta entrar en el campo industrial, más adelante, empezamos a fabricar ánodos para motores y embarcaciones deportivas.

Años de experiencia, nos hacen contar con la gama de ánodos de sacrificio para embarcaciones deportivas, más amplia del mercado nacional y europeo, con más de 600 referencias para motores marinos, fuera e intraborda, en aleaciones de Zinc, Aluminio y Magnesio.

Las materias primas usadas para la fabricación de nuestros ánodos, son de la más alta pureza existente en el mercado y son analizadas a su entrada en fábrica.

Los ánodos ZINETI, son fabricados siguiendo las aleaciones descritas en las normativas más estrictas del mercado, además, ZINETI cuenta con la certificación ISO 9001:2008.

Name: Onda Tenders
Description:
Onda is not just a shipyard.

Onda is a lifestyle. It’s a philosophy that encompasses our most deeply rooted principles on design harmony and yachtmanship. When the first Onda was built in 1962, it set new levels of excellence in seakeeping and style. The Onda, Superonda and Magna marked their era with significant presence in both the pleasure and international military markets.

We represent the citizen of the world; the refined yachtsman that values our principles and identifies the design qualities embodied in our boats. As we introduce Onda to the world, we feel confident that together we have a great chance of building products that will become part of your heritage. And ours.

Name: CATC AB

With our system the plant will benefit from lower power consumption, improved supervision and a demand controlled inside climate.

We pride ourselves in having an in-house knowledge of HVAC control, the marine HVAC practices and regulations. Together, the four of us hold 70+ years of relevant experience. Our customers are ferry, and cruise ship operators as well as system suppliers in the marine sector.

Legal structure of the company

Name: Porsius Consulting
Description:
With over 20 years of experience in shipbuilding and yacht building, Joris Porsius has now acquired a more than solid foundation for the start of Porsius Consulting in 2018. His clients value his analytical skills, vision, leadership and calm approach. Here he has an eye for people and he knows how to gain trust in both management and staff.

By making contact with Porsius Consulting, a client gets the opportunity to fully exploit Joris's qualities and also to make use of his experience and network.

The services of Porsius Consulting solve a current problem with an organization. This can be focused on different aspects:

• Interim management; there is a need for a strong manager for a defined period.

• Project management; there is a need for a heavy, experienced project manager, for starting up and setting up a project, or to turn a troublesome project around.

• Consultancy; providing organisational advice, for example in operational management or project management.

The mission of Porsius Consulting is to serve the client with clarity, peace, leadership and humor.

The boat for traveling on the ocean energy self sufficient, producing its own energy by the power of wind, sea and sun.

My goal in the Li Yachts Project is to create sailboat for ocean voyaging - a boat of the next century. The new design concept covers production, use and maintenance. More information will follow soon. Please stay tuned!

Name: Delta Powerboats
Description:
Delta Powerboats is Swedish leading luxury motor yachts brand.

Founded by a Swedish team of experienced yachtsmen and boat builders, the Delta philosophy is rooted in a strong tradition of Scandinavian yacht design. Our journey began with a limited range of pilothouse boats built for fast, comfortable and efficient island commuting in the archipelagos of Sweden. Today the range has evolved and encompasses agile day cruisers, versatile hardtop cabin cruisers and luxury-class performance yachts made of carbon fiber. Core features found across the range are our strong and user-friendly design concepts and high build quality along with outstanding fuel efficiency and hydrodynamic performance.

To enable us to create the most memorable yachting experience for our customers, we do not treat customers as such. Rather, we develop a client relationship. From sea trials to final delivery, we have an ongoing dialogue and as a prospective Delta owner you are welcome to suggest improvements and adaptions to your new boat or to visit the factory while your boat is being built. In that sense all of our boats are made to order, co-created with the client, making each Delta unique and devised for her owner’s pride and pleasure.

Description:
Ship Design XYZ is at the forefront of modern ship design, dedicated to transforming visions into highly detailed and accurate 3D models. Our mission is to create innovative, efficient, and sustainable 3D designs that meet the highest standards of safety, functionality, and aesthetics. We envision a future where every maritime project, whether a luxury yacht, a cargo ship, or a specialized vessel, benefits from smart, cutting-edge 3D modeling and detailed engineering solutions.
At Ship Design XYZ, we specialize in creating high-quality 3D models and providing detailed engineering services to support the construction of vessels. Name: GT Shipping & Engineering AS
Description:
GT Shipping & Engineering was established May 4 in 2021 by Tor-Arve Skjerli and Geir Almestad. Both have documented and well recognized experience in the shipbuilding industry, having worked with many of the major yards in Europe and Far East for the leading principals.

The company’s business concepts is to develop industry leading and efficient designs for the market of advanced tanker ships, working together with typically ship owners, shipyards, shipbrokers, design companies, suppliers, classification societies and financial institutions. GT Shipping & Engineering can provide services to clients extending from initial idea, through the design process, during the construction phase and until ships are ready to be delivered from the shipyard. Furthermore, modifications projects and assessments/inspections of ships in service is also a service that can be offered.

The company operates with a lean profile at a competitive level. Albeit, shipbuilding in Far East requires experienced and sufficient personnel within the various fields, we are able to provide good and experienced teams lead by a professional and good management.

Upcoming challenging rules and requirements for a reduction in emissions from ships will be high on the agenda, with evaluations of new technologies for both existing ships and newbuildings.

Name: Alifragkis Ship Repairs
Description:
A. ALIFRAGKIS & CO was founded in 1940 in Piraeus under the name ALIFRAGKIS-MARSONIS. In difficult times for the Greek shipping industry, and with the limited technical means available, the company managed to create a name synonymous to ship repairs.
Offering quality services with consistency and efficiency towards its obligations and following the developments in the field, it retains its leading position until nowadays.
It is a member of the Piraeus Ship Repair Association, the Chamber of Commerce and Industry of Piraeus and the Association of Production and Processing of Metal. It is also certified by an international shipping classification society for the quality of its services and operations.
During all these years, the company has established partnerships with major shipping companies, the Hellenic Navy, the Greek Army, various shipyards, refineries and large industrial plants.

Name: High Performance Sailing TU Graz
Description:
We, the HPS TU Graz are an Austrian, interdisciplinary team of approximately 60 students with the goal of applying technology and science to competitive sailing. With this goal in mind, we take part in international competitions every year, such as the Course Croisère EDHEC in France.

Since April 2022, we are developing an autonomous sailing drone "Mola-Mola", which is going to participate in the Micro-Transat-Challenge. At the moment the third prototype is under construction. 

To be updated about our progress and new advancements, do not hesitate to follow us on Instagram, Facebook, or contact us via our website.

Name: Venandi Yachts
Description:
At Venandi we create luxurious tenders and chaseboats for people who expect the very best in life. Every aspect of the build is handled in-house in the Netherlands. Venandi is a young company but we have been working with our sister company Hachmang Maritiem for a decade in the yacht building industrie.

Beside our own line of custom tenders we have the capacity to build a unique bespoke tender on behalf of the owners or yard in partnership with leading designers. Built with the finest materials to match the superyacht, these custom build tenders are available in any shape or size. Super-strong and ultra-reliable.

Name: CS Jachtbetimmeringen
Description:
Topkwaliteit in Jachtbetimmeringen.

Dit is precies wat wij leveren. Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in de complete betimmering van lege casco’s, die wij in onze volledig uitgeruste werkplaats voorzien van een luxe en strak afgewerkt scheepsinterieur.
Wij helpen onze klanten graag bij het maken van een keuze voor de betimmering en inrichting van hun schip: oa met keuzes in houtsoorten, kleuren, bekleding en afwerking. Elke klant is immers anders en heeft een andere smaak.

Daarnaast doen wij ook refits/renovaties van scheepsinterieurs en teakdekken. Dit kan vaak in de werkplaats, maar wij werken ook op locatie.

Bent u op zoek naar een mooi en bijzonder meubelstuk, zoals een tafel, kast of poef? Meubilair voor op/in een jacht of voor in huis?  Dan bent u ook bij ons op het goede adres.

Bij CS Jachtbetimmeringen kunt u terecht als scheepswerf en particulier.
Met ruim 25 jaar ervaring is er bij ons vrijwel niets onmogelijk!

Description:
Sia che tu stia cercando di vendere o acquistare la tua prossima imbarcazione, noi di Riviera Yachts Sales abbiamo le competenze giuste per aiutarti a raggiungere il tuo obiettivo, facendoci carico di tutte le incombenze che ne derivano, così da offrirti più tempo: per te stesso, per le tue attività e per la tua famiglia.

La nostra attività consiste nell'aiutarti a vendere la tua imbarcazione, fornendo supporto tecnico e commerciale.
Assistendoti in tutte le fasi.
Valutiamo il prezzo corretto della tua barca.
Prepariamo e pianifichiamo strategie di vendita.
Negoziamo la vendita e gestiamo la trattativa con i potenziali acquirenti per conto tuo.

L’esperienza nella vendita e la conoscenza del marketing, oltre ad una rete di contatti nazionali e internazionali, ci fanno diventare il partner giusto a cui affidarti.

Se devi, invece, acquistare la tua prossima imbarcazione, il nostro compito non è solo quello di assisterti in ogni fase del processo di acquisto, ma è anche quello, di difendere i tuoi interessi, controllare e gestire per conto tuo tutti gli aspetti della trattativa, così da assicurarti un acquisto sereno e tranquillo.

Ti supportiamo in tutti gli aspetti dell’acquisto, come: la perizia, la prova in mare, le pratiche amministrative, la documentazione, le pratiche di Leasing e le Assicurazioni.

Nel caso tu voglia acquistare un’imbarcazione nuova, seguiamo con attenzione le tue esigenze, ricercando insieme a te, le migliori soluzioni, così da offrirti un prodotto su misura e personalizzato.

Seguiamo il management completo della tua imbarcazione dodici mesi all’anno, coordinando e gestendo per conto tuo: la manutenzione ordinaria e straordinaria, i lavori di cantiere, la gestione della pulizia interna ed esterna, la ricerca del posto barca, i trasferimenti, etc, etc.

Description:
ÜNMAK was established in 1981 and has been serving as a supplier to Turkish Shipbuilding Industry since then and quickly recognized in the commercial and marine valve market. 
Our main goal has been to manufacture all products in our portfolio with great care by using the highest quality materials and workmanship dictated by the international standards and classification societies without any compromise. Because of the hard competition and drastically falling profits in producing valves made of cast iron; cast steel and nodular iron drifted us to manufacturing specialty valves and accessories made of BRONZE based on DIN and VG Norms for various types of the Turkish Navy’s vessels and as well as for commercial ships. Our aim is to reach international competitiveness in the production of bronze valves at ÜNMAK with more than 40 years of extensive experience and to improve and develop the product range.We understand that customers rely on our ability to get their job done right on time as promised. ÜNMAK has been granted the ISO 9001-2008 and NATO Code: NCAGE certificates.
Producing bronze valves is ÜNMAK’s specialty.

Name: ACCF Atelier de Constructions Composites du Finistère
Description:
Construction Navale à Pont l'Abbé.
Créé en 1947 le chantier a dès le départ été soucieux de la finition de ses misainiers pour la pêche locale. La réputation du chantier n’a jamais failli sur ce plan et aujourd’hui encore elle participe au succès de ses voiliers. 
Les techniques mises en œuvre dans les ateliers le sont avec respect des modes opératoires déterminés par les métiers ou par les procédures modernes. 
La charpente marine, métier exercé depuis l’origine dans le chantier, reste une clé du succès des constructions ou la finition est toujours conçue en respectant les règles de l’art et de la mise en œuvre des matériaux. La sélection des bois nobles, le stockage sous abri, le cintrage à la vapeur sont autant de disciplines ou s’expriment les savoir-faire des charpentiers du chantier.
La stratification sous toutes ses formes, en sélectionnant les matériaux qui ont fait les performances des derniers bateaux de régate est le procédé qui donne aux coques ACCF les meilleures caractéristiques. Ces process intégrés dans les ateliers depuis le début des années 70 n’ont cessé de progresser.
La forge marine,  permet au chantier l’adaptation de ses ferrages à la demande des propriétaires. Le travail des meilleurs inox donne au chantier cette facilité unique dans la profession
Les études avec une équipe de 2 personnes et des moyens informatiques adaptés font aussi partie du panel des compétences intégrées.

Name: SAFE CO LTD SP Z O.O.
Description:
SAFE CO LTD – Your Partner in Ship Repairs & Surface Protection

For more than 30 years, SAFE CO LTD has been supporting the maritime industry with shipbuilding, conversions, and over 800 successful ship repairs. Founded in 1995 in Gdańsk, Poland, the company started as an anti-corrosion specialist and soon expanded abroad, entering the French market. In 2001, SAFE established its own shipyard, strengthening its position as a reliable partner for shipowners worldwide. In 2015, through the acquisition of Alkor, SAFE consolidated its capabilities and today operates as a privately-owned, independent shipyard.

Our expertise covers a wide range of shipyard services:
 Hull construction, steel replacement, and section building
 Conversions and vessel lengthenings
 Mechanical, electrical, and piping works
 Carpentry and accommodation upgrades
 High-pressure cleaning, blasting, coating, and advanced surface protection

The core of our operations lies in ship repairs and advanced anti-corrosion technologies. SAFE CO LTD delivers zinc/aluminum metallization, hydro-blasting, epoxy flooring (SAFEGRIP, HUMMERVOLL), and fire-resistant coatings (FLAME CONTROL, CHARTEK), all in compliance with NORSOK standards.

Our competence is confirmed by approvals from leading Classification Societies, including BV, PRS, DNV, as well as international certifications for offshore projects.

With a 150 m floating dock (6,000 t capacity) and fully equipped quay infrastructure, SAFE CO LTD services vessels up to 120 m in length. Strategically located in Gdańsk, we provide fast access to the Baltic Sea and Northern European markets, ensuring efficiency, reduced downtime, and cost-effective solutions.

What sets SAFE CO LTD apart is the combination of:
 Over three decades of proven experience
 Skilled and committed teams
 Certified quality and safety standards
 Flexibility to meet the needs of demanding international clients

At SAFE CO LTD, we keep vessels strong, reliable, and protected.

Name: SUNDOCK
Description:
Sundock es la primera plataforma solar de carga eléctrica  para embarcaciones eléctricas, híbridas y baterías  de servicio de los barcos tradicionales.

Sundock aprovecha el poder del Sol con paneles solares de 2.5kW capaces de generar hasta 23 kWh diarios, asegurando que la energía siempre sea abundante para embarcaciones eléctricas, híbridas o tradicionales.

Nuestro sistema de baterías de última generación almacena hasta 160 kWh, suficiente para la carga completa de dos embarcaciones eléctricas, o la carga parcial de hasta seis.

Puertos Flexibles y Temporales

Sundock proporciona una solución ideal para expandir la capacidad de los puertos durante picos de demanda sin inversiones permanentes. Esta modularidad permite a los puertos adaptarse de manera dinámica, ofreciendo más amarres y simplificando la carga para barcos eléctricos, que requieren puntos de recarga de fácil acceso.

Instalación Autónoma en Áreas Protegidas

Sundock utiliza fondeos ecológicos que reducen al mínimo su impacto ambiental en zonas sensibles o protegidas. Cada unidad puede transformarse en un centro de servicios náuticos sostenibles, como la desalinización de agua de mar para producir agua potable, el tratamiento de aguas de sentinas, o la recogida selectiva de residuos.

Centro Náutico Cero Emisiones

Al unir varios módulos de Sundock, se crean centros náuticos completos que funcionan íntegramente con energía renovable, ideal para localidades que buscan minimizar su huella ecológica. Estos centros no sólo apoyan la carga de embarcaciones eléctricas, sino que también mejoran la oferta turística y recreativa del puerto, proporcionando una experiencia integral y sostenible para los usuarios.

Raymond is a Certified Marine Surveyor (CMS) with National Association of Marine Surveyors (NAMS Global) and a Compliance Specialist with National Marine Manufacturers Association (NMMA). He is also certified with the American Boat and Yacht Council as a Master Marine Technician and holds certificates in Standards, Systems, Electrical, and Corrosion.  He sits on ABYC Project Technical Committees for electrical, electrical components, fuel and ventilation, and detectors and now works with ABYC as an Instructor.

All survey reports are generated in Force 5 with over 700 points covered during the inspection in accordance with Transport Canada TP1332, TC Small Vessel, ABYC, NFPA, ISO, CFR and USCG standards and regulations.

Name: INSPEC TESTING, INC.
Description:
Inspec Testing, Inc. is a nondestructive testing service company founded in 1996 in San Diego, California. Our main specialty is nondestructive testing and inspection in the construction, fabrication, manufacturing and maritime industries. We pride ourselves on our service and responsiveness to your inspection needs.

Inspec Testing’s specific expertise lies in our extensive knowledge of the nondestructive testing methods and techniques, their performance characteristics, the use of state-of-the-art equipment and the ability to recommend and perform the appropriate inspection process to meet your inspection needs.

Inspec Testing retains a staff of the industry’s top technicians making it one of the West Coast’s largest certified professional staff available for your inspection needs. We have assembled a professional staff with over 100 years of inspection services experience. The staff includes ASNT Level I, II & III Inspectors and AWS Certified Welding Inspectors (CWI). Our ability to travel and relocate staff and mobile equipment to your inspection site on short notice is our service advantage that we extend to you. This diversification provides the range of services that our customers can depend on for their nondestructive testing and inspection services from a single company.

Name: Nautica del Delta S.r.l.
Description:
La storia di Nautica del Delta è legata a doppio filo a quella della famiglia Orlandini. E la storia della famiglia Orlandini è una storia di mare e di barche che dura da più di trent’anni. Tutto ha inizio nel 1985, quando Gianni Orlandini, dopo aver lavorato alcuni anni su diverse imbarcazioni a Chioggia, rileva un’azienda nata da poco: Nautica del Delta.

Ampi piazzali, capannoni spaziosi, l’accesso al mare unico nel suo genere uniti alla banchina ed ai distributori di carburante, rendevano e rendono tutt’ora la sede centrale di Nautica del Delta la struttura ideale per il rimessaggio.
Gli anni ’90 portano con sé l’aggiunta del commercio di imbarcazioni alle tradizionali attività di Nautica del Delta: il rimessaggio e la manutenzione. Questa virata comporta l’ammodernamento e la modifica delle strutture degli impianti di Codigoro. L’apertura al commercio e alla vendita di imbarcazioni lanciano Nautica del Delta nell’universo delle fiere nautiche, delle mostre e delle esposizioni. Nel 1997 viene aperta la sede del Lido degli Estensi, seguita nel 2004 da quella di Marina Punta Faro a Lignano Sabbiadoro e nel 2008 da quella del Porto di Marinara a pochi chilometri da Marina di Ravenna.
Dopo 32 anni di attività Nautica del Delta è in grado di soddisfare la grande crescita della domanda di imbarcazioni, offrendo ai propri clienti un servizio completo grazie allo sforzo di tutti i componenti della famiglia Orlandini.
